title: What a beautiful hotel!
comment: This is a lovely hotel. The staff are very attentive and friendly. The food was beautiful and excellently prepared and presented. The grounds are lovely and well tended. The hotel is outside of Hue but there is a shuttle bus. However, the pool, complimentary massage and large, airy room make staying here absolutely bliss. There was a chance to relax completely after the hectic pace of Hanoi. Can thoroughly recommend this lovely hotel and staff.

title: Tranquility in the serene outskirts of the Imperial city
comment:
This Boutique hotel checks all the boxes: luxury, friendly staff, good and very affordable food and clean & large rooms. Given that we had quite some rain unfortunately the room felt a bit dark but I guess you can't do much about that.
Highly recommended

title: Anhill boutique hotel Vietnam
comment:
Anhill boutique hotel was set in beautiful grounds with a very peaceful atmosphere.
Our room was very spacious and luxurious and the staff were excellent catering to any needs we had.
Shuttle bus available to take you into town for free
Excellent food for breakfast with a choice of everything.
Highly recommend.

title: Amazing property
comment: Really great hotel, amazing stuff. The restaurant is perfect as well. Wish we could have stayed one more day just by the pool.

title: A real moment of happiness
comment: Beautiful setting: hotel whose architecture is perfectly integrated with the surrounding nature, luxurious room with lots of charm, very attentive staff and refined food. The spa offers a real moment of relaxation with quality massages. In short, a real moment of happiness!

title: Great little boutique hotel
comment:
This lovely boutique hotel just outside Hue was perfect . The rooms are huge and overlook the delightful grounds and pool. The pool is a great size for proper swimming.
We ate there twice as the food was superb - beautifully presented and very tasty. The staff are so kind helpful and welcoming and really try to make your stay as wonderful as possible.
Breakfast was varied and plentiful and a great buffet.
I would recommend this hotel 100 % .

title: Superb stay
comment: Amazing serene hideaway hotel. Excellent rooms, food, ambience. Staff were exceptional.

title: Elegant and stylish
comment:
A luxurious and modern hotel with fine cuisine to match. Excellent and friendly staff where nothing is too much trouble.
The designer of the spacious bedroom had clearly not experienced overnight in their own creation however !
Two guests having two suitcases have a drawer each but no cupboards, shelves or any additional storage.
The majority of our clothes remained unpacked for the duration.....

title: Relaxing 5* retreat
comment: We stayed in Anhill Boutique for two nights whilst visiting Hue. The hotel is amazing and the staff very friendly and professional. My wife and I both used the spa which was also very good. I would totally recommend this as a great relaxing location when in the area.

title: Recommendation for Hue
comment: Great boutique hotel in greenery with large, stylish rooms and a beautiful garden 7 km from hue.

title: Faultless from beginning to end
comment: Anhill may not be located in the heart of Hue, but it’s peaceful location on the the edge of town definitely gives it an edge on what some might think are more glamorous hotels in the city centre. It’s pretty rare to find a hotel where every little detail has been so thoughtfully considered, but that’s what we found here during an all too short two night stay. Our wonderfully spacious stylish suite was truly delightful in every aspect. As was the fabulous restaurant. Normally the sight of a multi page menu rings warning bells. But here every dish we sampled was simply delicious. From a Caesar’s salad to local dishes, each and every one was a delight. Add to that a friendly team for whom nothing is too much trouble and it really is a great combination not to be missed if you’re in this part of Vietnam.

title: Rural retreat
comment: Beautiful, refined rural retreat. The setting, furnishings and restaurant are high standard. Very comfortable and quiet room

title: Amazing.
comment: The ultimate everything is thought in every detail paradise

title: A fabulous place
comment:
This is an exceptional, tastefully designed hotel.
I appreciated the attention to every detail, in design and in caring for the culture it is representing. The rooms are very spacious, original. The garden beautiful and the food fabulous. Oh! And the massage was so good my husband had a second one. A wonderful stay!

title: Great hotel on outskirts of Hue
comment: Had a brilliant time. Lovely hotel. Great staff. Away from centre of Hue which was perfect. Got a Grab taxi into town for dinner.

title: Absolutely 100% luxury hotel
comment: This has got to be by far the best hotel I have ever stayed. The room I had was huge and the resort itself was set in beautiful grounds. The staff were so friendly and attentive. Cannot say a single bad word against it. Amazing!

title: Excellent
comment: Absolutely a five star experience. Attentive staff, good food and beautiful ambience. Really cannot be faulted. However, a little way from downtown Hue but easy visit with the luxurious shuttle, ( free but limited access), or regular taxis, very cheap.

title: Tết holiday 2026. Fantastic stay
comment: We loved our stay, and everyone was very nice. The Bun Bo and the salt coffee were especially delicious.

title: Lovely hotel in a lovely location.
comment: Wonderful hotel. The location out of the city was great. Wonderful large suite and great garden setting. The food and service was good and staff were lovely. The massages were good. A very enjoyable stay. Very unexpected luxurious service into the city.

title: Lovely hotel just outside Hue
comment: Lovely hotel, beautiful room, fantastic staff throughout, especially ay reception. They could not have been more helpful.

title: Everything was great! 🥰
comment: Beautiful room. Fantastic food. Wonderful garden.

title: Lovely boutique hotel
comment: Wonderful boutique hotel in a lovely setting with fabulous staff. And the massage from the spa was brilliant

title: One of the best places I’ve ever stayed
comment: Wow. What a place. Our experience start to finish was exceptional. The boutique is gorgeous, so calm and peaceful, although the location is a car journey to the centre, I enjoyed being away from the city and wasn’t too far. The staff were interested and made our experience personal and put in the extra mile to make us feel special, celebrating something special. The rooms were luxurious and it made it hard to leave. I would go back to Hue again just for the hotel. Loved it! Thank you so much

title: Beautiful hotel with very helpful staff
comment: Had an amazing stay. Linh, Harry and all the staff made us feel incredibly welcome and were very helpful. The room was immaculate and very nice size. Very peaceful surroundings and not too far from Hue city.

title: What a fabulous gem.
comment:
What a fabulous gem. A very tranquil setting outside the hustle and bustle of Hue.
The staff are courteous, friendly and attentive.
Highly recommended.

title: Tranquil location
comment:
A little out of the way but easy and inexpensive GRAB ride to town.
Lovely pool area and koi pond (can feed them) and garden. Nice and calm for relaxing after sightseeing. Restaurant both inside and covered area outside. Food very good. Staff friendly and chatty. Has a spa but didn't use so cannot comment on that.
Rooms large and clean.

title: A real gem
comment: I have been thinking about to our holiday last summer and this hotel stands out. We had a fantastic time. We were there in low season so it was not busy. The place was faultless. Very helpful staff. Beautiful gardens and grounds. Wonderful :-)

title: Peaceful hotel to rest in after lots of sightseeing
comment: Fabulous room, fantastic massage at the Spa, warm, welcoming staff. Amazing breakfast buffet and wide selection of food for dinner.

title: A special hotel - a perfect retreat
comment: A special hotel in a beautiful setting. The staff make this place a perfect retreat, and a perfect treat!

title: The “quiet luxury” of a magical place
comment:
An enchanted break where everything is only luxury, calm and voluptuous!!
A host of details in the refinement , an extremely attentive and caring team... This place is definitely a big crush for me!!

title: Relaxing location
comment: The staff is wonderful and helpful. I arrived sick, so they made sure I received ginger tea and toast to help settle my stomach. The location is very peaceful.

title: Excellent - except...
comment: The hotel offers very good food, a beautiful garden and the staff are exceptionally friendly, polite and competent. Only the arrival late in the evening on the first day clouds the overall very good impression; the receptionist was exactly the opposite. But that was also the only downer. Otherwise, the hotel can be highly recommended, even if Hue is quite a bit away. Maybe that's an advantage, though.

title: Relaxing stay stay at Anhill Boutique
comment: I can honestly say that Anhill boutique is one of the best hotels I have ever stayed at. After 4 days in Hanoi, Anhill is a haven of tranquility, peace and comfort. Everything about the hotel was perfect for us. The location - 10 minutes in a taxi from Hue town and centred around a beautiful carp pond. Decoration is local, luxurious and comfortable. Food is amazing and the staff could not be more helpful, warm and friendly. Definitely recommend this hotel if you are visiting Hue

title: Zen Hotel
comment:
We Stayed at Anhill Boutique for 3 nights and had the most fantastic stay from start to finish. The reservations team were really helpful in advance with making a transfer from the airport as easy as possible. We arrived very late but even the security guard made us feel welcome and comfortable. All of the staff are genuinely lovely and always keen to say hello or offer assistance with a smile. The decor of the hotel is unique and a blend of styles but it worked for us and the garden is stunning. The out of town location is the only downside here but getting into town is easy and it does make it a more peaceful place to stay. Thank you to the entire team at Anhill!!!

The food and drinks onsite are also delicious!!

title: Superb
comment: Wonderful setting zen decoration very appreciated authentic two-day stay in a refined feng shui atmosphere

title: Best hotel
comment: What an amazing hotel. Everything about it was excellent. Everybody was so welcoming and happy. We felt like royalty. Beautiful room and amazing gardens. Would love to return one day.

title: Amazing hotel with extraordinary service
comment: Beautifully located, very well designed and maintained hotel. The room is so extremely beautiful and thoughtful put together, and the service is extraordinary.

title: A wonder, a place without equal
comment:
We spent two wonderful days at the AnHill hotel – including an exceptional Christmas party, with the staff children forming a choir for guests, delicate attention for those who will not be with their family that night.
Of course everything is perfect, the rooms are beautiful and spacious, the staff is very caring, the cuisine is delicious... but above all it emanates from this hotel built in 2021 a special charm, where we feel a very original project, closely associated with the charm of the city of Hue with glorious (but also tragic) history.
An ideal place to discover Hue.

title: Wouldn’t hesitate to return to this hidden gem!
comment:
I’m currently sat by the pool waiting for our train to Da Nang in a couple of hours, and I honestly don’t want to leave.

This is a stunning hotel, away from the hustle and bustle of downtown Hue but yet only a 15 minute Grab ride from all the attractions. Its location makes it more than worth it; it will allow you to switch off from the world a little, combined with excellent service, F&B and accommodations.

After a little while travelling to Hanoi, Halong and Ninh Binh in the run-up to our stay in Hue, we both came down with coughs and colds, and this was the perfect place to relax and recuperate before the next leg of our Vietnam trip.

I wish we’d booked for longer than just two nights.

If I ever found myself in Hue again, there’s no doubt in my mind I’d book the aNhill again. My job allows me to travel to some of the most beautiful hotels in the world; this is up there with the best.

title: Outstanding. A must visit!
comment:
Please please please book here. aNhill Boutique is stunning. The grounds, the rooms, the staff, the day spa, the ambience & serenity. Oh, and the restaurant…. highly recommend the aNhill twists on Hue specialities.

Enjoyed sitting in the outdoor dining part of restaurant for a family dinner overlooking the bonsai garden & coi carp ponds. Staff built a fire near us to take the very slight chill off the air.

Would like to particularly acknowledge the staff working here. They are fabulous.

Looking forward to my coffee making class this morning.

Hotel is quiet at the moment and we really hope it picks up when the school year ends.

It is only a short Grab/taxi trip out of Hue CBD.

We only booked for one night as Hue is a transit stop for us, but I would have loved to stay longer.

Do yourself a favour and book. Book now!!

The Hamilton Family, Melbourne (Australia)

title: Calm and comfort
comment:
Hotel away from the city center, in a large garden, very well maintained Japanese style. Staff, very welcoming , very kind and considerate. Spacious room with bathtub and shower
Excellent restaurant with typical Vietnamese cuisine. Good breakfast buffet style.

title: The stay at aNhill boutique hotel was OUTSTANDING. They are taking care of every detail, even the smallest ones.
comment: Beautiful room, ultra comfortable beds, excellent food, outstanding service, incredible environment. We were in awe.

title: Excellent
comment: A great place to stay. Peaceful location, beautiful gardens, fantastic food and super rooms. I would not hesitate to stay here.

title: Beautiful luxury hotel and spa in Hue.
comment:
My wife and I just spent three nights at this wonderful property. Design is modern and out of this world beautiful. Zen gardens outstanding. Rooms large and comfortable with spectacular Vietnamese antique art. Joy and Julia at the front desk were highly capable and helpful. The restaurant is impeccable. Breakfasts and other dining excellent.

The spa was also a highlight. We had numerous spa treatments. We couldn't get enough. Nhi is friendly and professional. She gave me great Vietnamese and Thai massages and a foot treatment. Her technique was perfect in every way. Top notch. Duyen provided my wife with a massage, a facial and a herbal hair wash. Duyen is skilled and kind. My wife said it was the best facial she ever had. We highly recommend this property.

title: Quality & serenity
comment:
At first I thought the pictures of this hotel was too good to be true, but when we arrived the hotel was exactly as shown in the photos and even more picturesque. The vibe of the place was so serene, everything was clean, and the staff were so thoughtful. We booked this for a peaceful retreat, and the hotel experience did not disappoint! The distance from the hotel into town was no problem at all, as short as a 10 min car ride. If you book a day tour like we did, the driver may request for a small fee (USD5) extra for pick up and drop off, which is as good as the price of a 2-way grab.

We had breakfast + 3 meals at the hotel restaurant and each time we were surprised by the quality and creativity of the food. My greatest love was the bread basket that came with each meal. Everything in the hotel felt like a thoughtful, curated experience. Hotel staff remembered we were going for a tour and asked about it when we returned, even when the reception staff changed shifts.

We were told that it was the off season and so there were fewer guests - rooms were occupied, but I didn't run into anyone in the hotel during our stay, which made the whole experience even more personal. I wish more people would discover this place!

title: Anhill Boutique Hotel Spa
comment: I had 2 full body massages (90 minutes each). My masseuse was Trinh. She was was very professional and friendly. I thoroughly enjoyed my massages that left me feeling relaxed. I would recommend the spa and especially Trinh.

title: Beautiful oasis
comment: Beautiful oasis just outside the centre but easily accessible by taxi. Amazing food, stunning room, jaw dropping beautiful pool and incredibly hospitable staff. Don’t miss.

title: Sublime quiet hotel 10 min from Hue
comment: Sublime Hotel, Japanese Garden, Perfect Service, Perfectly Equipped Room, Very Good Cuisine, Top Breakfast

title: “A magical stay — memories we’ll cherish forever”
comment:
We stayed for three nights at aNhill Boutique with our daughter, and everything about our experience was truly exceptional.

Every staff member greeted us with a warm smile and was incredibly kind and attentive. The food was delicious at every meal, but the most unforgettable was our last-night experience, “Romance by the Hill.” Since we had a child with us, the team kindly arranged a special setup near the koi pond instead of the hilltop — a candlelit dinner surrounded by nature that we’ll never forget.

Our daughter especially loved the canopy bed in our room, which made her feel like a little princess. She was also thrilled to see the peacocks walking around the property and swim in the peaceful, greenery-surrounded pool.

Even after returning home, she keeps asking to go back to “the hotel with the lady in the red dress” — referring to the elegant, ao dai–style uniforms worn by the front desk staff.

Three nights felt far too short. It was the kind of place you never want to leave. We can’t wait to return someday.

title: Superb hotel
comment: What a stay ... superb rooms ... very helpful and friendly staff ... a little cocoon of well-being ... a bit away from Hue but a taxi costs 3€ to get there ... we appreciated the calm and serenity of this hotel ... recommend 100%

title: Dream boutique hotel!
comment:
One of the best hotels chosen for our trip to Vietnam.
Beautiful design and architecture, delicious food, exceptional spa, cozy and clean rooms but above all a staff that satisfied us in all requests made.
Thanks to Hill for this wonderful stay.

title: Wonderful designer stay
comment: Wonderful peaceful setting in landscaped gardens. Food excellent. Beautiful rooms & decor. Easy taxi ride into old Hue

title: A beautiullly appointed hotel in a tranquil setting
comment:
Just a one night stay as a birthday treat. A little away from the centre of Hue but the 15 minute drive is more than compensated for my the beautifully tranquil setting. A Japanese style garden with Koi pond. At least 2 swimming pools (there may be more hidden away in other areas of the resort). We had a great spacious room on the third floor. I'd describe it as a fusion modernist-colonial style. Lovely comfortable bed and good quality linens. Separate bath and shower and vanity unit.

Good quality buffet breakfast with Vietnamese and Western options which you can enjoy indoors or in the lovely garden setting.

All the staff we encountered were polite and informative.

The only downside of this experience was that we couldn't stay longer, but we already decided we'd be back for sure.

title: Tranquil Hotel Full of Character
comment: Excellent hotel - very large bedrooms, tranquil space. Good buffet breakfast and lunch/dinner menu is a good mix of local and western food. Presentation and taste of food was fantastic. Useful shuttle bus to town in the evening. Very friendly and helpful staff.

title: A splendid hotel!
comment:
What a pleasure to stay in this hotel for a few days
The staff is very helpful and helpful. The meals are delicious and the living environment splendid. This more than compensates for the fact that the hotel is a little far from the city center. But it makes it possible to be in a haven of greenery and peace.

title: Very special stay
comment: Excellent stay for the family. Beautifully landscaped gardens to relax in. Pool was nice and great spa facilities. Food was excellent. Room was best we stayed in during our trip and we loved the little touches that made it special. We enjoyed doing the craft activities offered. The staff were very welcoming, thoughtful and helpful - they made the stay very special.

title: A truly magical stay
comment: We stayed in a 3 bedroom villa which was absolutely stunning - so beautifully and thoughtfully designed. We’ve loved every minute of our stay - the staff are amazing and really worked 100% to ensure we had a fantastic experience. The restaurant is beautiful and breakfast and dinners (and cocktails and mocktails) were delicious. Fantastic range of options. The hotel realised it was my birthday and presented me with a delicious surprise cake which was completely unexpected and so thoughtful of them. Massage treatments amazing and spa beautiful. We really loved every second. Thank you Anhill for making our stay so magical!

title: Suoerb!
comment: This place is a haven of peace. Beautiful hotel in secluded area near Hue. The gardens are incredibly well tended, the rooms are spacious with very private balconies overlooking the canopy. It is very clean, the staff are all lovely and caring and the food is delicious, especially breakfast. We just loved it.

title: Very very nice three day stay
comment: Beautiful and tranquil place just far enough away from the city centre to be peaceful but also close enough to be able to get in quickly to see the sights and explore. Staff were very attentive but also low key - always there when you needed something but otherwise left us to enjoy the accommodation. We will stay again.

title: A Truly Special Retreat in Hue – Highly Recommended
comment:
We are a family of 4 (with two teenagers) and we stayed at this beautiful boutique hotel while travelling across Vietnam, and it was truly one of the highlights of our trip. From the moment we arrived, the staff couldn’t do enough for us – genuinely warm, attentive, and always going the extra mile to ensure our stay was exceptional.

The accommodation itself was superb – elegant, comfortable, and thoughtfully designed. The villa was stunning, offering a serene and stylish space to relax in. The location is peaceful and tucked away, making it the perfect retreat to unwind for a few days.

On arrival we were offered complimentary massages during our stay, which was an unexpected and wonderful touch. The spa service throughout our stay was fantastic – highly professional and incredibly relaxing.

This is a special place – not just a hotel, but an experience in itself. If you’re visiting Hue, I would absolutely recommend staying here.

title: Traveling with family
comment:
Everything is so perfect, that you can not feel in these photos!
Food, clean, service, interior, garden- everything is high level!!!........................................................................................

title: Awesome Staff
comment:
The staff here are awesome. The place is a lovely tucked away hotel on the outskirts of the city. It is very intimate and welcoming. We don’t know if it is a chain or not but certainly didn’t have the stock standard mass hotel chain vibe. Nights are beautiful and peaceful with the occasional gecko making its noise. Just lovely. Food is great, it is pricier than what you can get in town it suited us and the quality was excellent.
The staff will fall over backward for you. I had a medical situation that needed attention, Julie and Minh swooped into action without blinking an eyelid. Offered to stay with my wife even though they were meant to go home. Many many thanks to you for looking after both of us so well.
The guest manager Linh checked in with us numerous times to check on our welfare which was just awesome.
Breakfast was lovely and a great selection. The times we had dinner or lunch, sitting in the outdoor area was so relaxing. The food and drink staff are exceptional. Prompt, friendly and efficient. We enjoyed the coffee making class. We had a superior room, it was spacious and clean. Room service and turn down was spot on.
As many know, there is a great deal of touting for favourable reviews of restaurants, hotels, restaurants and staff. This review is genuine and voluntary.

title: An oasis of calm and beauty - Hue
comment: We spent 2 nights here in early June. It was very quiet as at the start of the low season ( for Europeans). It’s about a 3 mile taxi ride from Hue and is an absolute oasis of calm and beauty. Situated in lovely gardens and with a spa, infinity pool etc, it’s one of the best rooms I have stayed in, very tastefully decorated, and very spacious. Staff, and service is very friendly and warm, restaurant was top class. Highly recommended

title: SERENE HOTEL,BEAUTIFUL ROOMS,GARDENS ARE OUTSTANDING AND STAFF VERY FRIENDLY
comment: You would not be disappointed to stay at this hotel about 5 kms outside Hue in the countryside,no noise so quiet.Taxi ride in using Grab was £3/4usd…are at the hotel,portions slightly on the smaller side but nicely prepared.Ate locally in Hue ,all restaurants keenly priced,best to do research

title: Oasis in Hue
comment:
A fantastic 4 day stay at the aNhill Boutique Hotel we can enjoy. The spacious suite was a dream, the in-house restaurant cooks wonderfully, the pool & garden landscape is so relaxing and a place of peace & quiet & the angenot from the spa simply unique. From 3 nights a full body massage is given...not to forget the strengthening yoga lesson at 06.30 with a still pleasant 28 degrees.
Many thanks to the whole team, Evelyn and Friends

title: Definitely the place to stay while visiting Hue
comment:
Really wonderful friendly service with a gorgeous spacious room overlooking the fabulous gardens and long swimming pool.
Excellent food and drinks and the best massages that we’ve had on this trip.
So peaceful and refreshing while being close enough to visit the Imperial Palace, Tombs and local sites.

title: Beautiful hotel and fantastic service
comment:
Wow, where to start for this hotel.

The staff are excellent and provided a warm welcome, running through the various tours they offer and the facilities of the hotel.

While the hotel is located a 20-25 minute drive from Hue centre, they offer a free shuttle to and/or from the centre at 10am (returning at 1030am), and 6pm (returning at 630pm). If you miss this, the Cabs to and from town via Grab are only about £4 each way.

The rooms are spacious, comfortable, clean, and offer great shower and strong wi fi suitable for video calls.

The TV in the room have a Netflix account logged in so you don't have to sign in on your own account.

The pool is stunning and our recommendation is to use this in the morning as it can get shady after 330-4pm.

We ate three times in the restaurant at dinner or lunch and each time the food was hot, and good.

The breakfast is very good aswell and the restaurant provide a list of local and city based restaurants on check in.

We had massages with Trinh and it was also fantastic. The housekeeping were fantastic and the best we've ever had in a hotel. If we went for breakfast, we'd return with the bed made and fresh towels.

This hotel prides itself on customer service and this is one of our favourite hotels we've stayed in, certainly our best so far in Vietnam. A personal thanks to Jayson on reception who we found excellent. We would go out of the way to come back to this hotel,

title: Excellent. Nothing to complain about.
comment: Beautiful location, calm and serene. Lovely grounds. Wonderful service, very accommodating and helpful, but in a subdued way. Great Spa too. Excellent kitchen. Well appointed room. Really could not have better. Well worth a stay if in the area.

title: Luxury par excellence
comment: To have an enormous bath in a huge bedroom is the pinnacle of superb luxury. It was my birthday during my stay and the hotel produced a beautiful mousse cake waiting for me when I arrived. Such a welcoming thing to do. The provision of a yoga teacher was also a lovely touch. Had an amazing stay, next time would book for longer.

title: Our best stay in Vietnam to date.
comment: This is our best stay in Vietnam to date. The staff were absolutely impeccable in their care and attention. The rooms are large and exceptionally well equipped down to sewing kits. A nice touch was the issue of a novel with a personal note and recommendation. The gardens are to die for

title: Just lovely!
comment: Beautiful hotel right outside the city with gorgeous and spacious rooms. The outside is beautiful green with a pond, a 25 meter swimming pool and a nice outside dining area. We loved the peace and quiet as well as the extremely friendly and kind staff. Great breakfast and lots of fun and interesting activities. We for example did our own rice paper. An extra tip is to visit another local restaurant nearby, Banh ep chi, which serves devine savory Vietnamese pancakes.

title: Exquisite Boutique Spa Resort
comment:
Namia is an amazing place. So beautifully created right by the river. Our villa has a private salt water pool. We were in it a lot. We enjoyed the wellness center and our daily 90 minutes spa treatment. The breakfast is divine.

We are fortunate to be here as my partner had a bad reaction to the food at the previous hotel. He was miserably sick. The hotel sent their nurse in residence immediately upon our checking in to give him treatment and medicine. By the time we checked out, he was fully recovered after 2 days of care by the nurse. I can’t be more grateful to the nurse who kept checking on him and healed him.

We love beautiful interior designs, the calm and elegant energy, and the very happy staff we met everywhere. We will recommend it to all our friends!

title: Nice stay
comment: Hotel located outside and therefore very quiet. The room (lover suite) was spacious and very bright. The garden is exceptional. Breakfast is very varied and tasty. Evening meals are à la carte. The kitchen is good quality. The spa is lovely. very nice and smiling staff.

title: Quiet, relaxing stay outside of Hue
comment: I stayed at Anhill with my family and we had a lovely stay. The rooms look much better in person than on the website... they're spacious, well-decorated, and spotless. We enjoyed being outside of the city but close enough to go into town by Grab or taxi. We ate twice at the restaurant and had long breakfasts at the buffet (so much to choose from!). The pool feels amazing after a long day exploring. Staff friendly with kids (offering fish feeding, etc). I did the morning yoga and it was different than what I've done before but great. Thanks Anhill!

title: Fantastic hotel outside Hue with wonderful rooms, gardens and food
comment: Wonderful hotel set in beautiful Zen garden. Rooms are large, airy and modern. Staff incredibly attentive, polite and friendly. Food in restaurant was delicious and seemed authentically Vietnamese. It is about 15 minutes away from Hue which could be an issue for some, but it really was an oasis

title: SPA FANTASTIC-ANHILL BOUTIQUE
comment: Spa massage personal (Duyen, NGA, Ntli) were very good in massages and kindness. All happy to help us and smiled whole time. Because of how treated all three of us got massages (three myself when only planned for one). Will recommend to friends!!

title: A Tranquil Gem in Hue
comment:
Staying at The Anhill Boutique Hotel was truly a highlight of our trip to Hue. The property itself is stunning—like stepping into a Japanese zen garden with its serene landscaping, thoughtful design, and peaceful atmosphere.

We booked the Executive Suite and were blown away by how spacious it was. The room had multiple balconies that overlooked the pool and gardens, offering beautiful views and a real sense of retreat. The bed was incredibly comfortable, making it hard to leave in the mornings.

The staff were both efficient and genuinely kind, striking the perfect balance of attentiveness without being overbearing. Breakfast each morning was a treat, with a generous spread of options—everything from local dishes to more familiar Western choices—and the food quality was solid across the board.

While the hotel isn’t located in the central part of Hue, that’s part of what makes it special. It’s just a short drive to the main attractions, yet tucked away in a quieter area that enhances the relaxing vibe.

If you’re looking for a peaceful, design-forward stay in Hue with top-notch service and a touch of luxury, The Anhill Boutique Hotel is a fantastic choice.

title: Dream holiday at the Anhill
comment:
Our favorite in Vietnam! Great hotel, friendly staff, excellent food, well done!
We stayed in a villa with swimming pool, very very refined.
Slight downside: you can hear a plane passing by from time to time, but as far as we are concerned, it did not spoil the pleasure.

title: Recommended
comment: A very relaxing setting, beautiful decoration and very nice rooms. Spa recommends and very good restaurant. Breakfast both local and international very good. Very attentive staff. Very good address that can be recommended.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
This hotel is beautiful. Our only regret is we only stayed one night when we visited Hue. It is an absolute oasis. The rooms are spacious and elegant. The pool and outside restaurant are magical. All the staff are so helpful and friendly. We had the best breakfast we ate in any hotel Vietnam- so much choice and delicious evening meal.
I also want to recommend the spa. I had a wonderful facial with Ms Duyen.

title: Magical place
comment: Absolutely beautiful place out of the city! Kind , helpful staff and everything you need for a magical time in Hue. The room was exceptionally beautiful , so clean and organised. Every detail well thought of! A must stay if you are visiting Hue.

title: Perfect Tranquil Retreat
comment: Such a lovely hotel set within a tranquil garden on the outskirts of Hue, the perfect retreat from the busy city after a day of sightseeing. Huge rooms, think loft living (our room was bigger than most one bed room flats in England), really well laid out and comfortable with a great bed and sitting area and a huge bathroom with separate shower and bath. A little lacking in storage space for clothes if you like to fully unpack your suitcase (which I do). Our guide advised us that the restaurant was very good and she was right and whilst it was rather unimaginative, we felt no real need to go into town to eat (the hotel provides a shuttle into Hue in the evening but you need to get a taxi back). The food was delicious, well presented and service was very good. Eating in was a pleasant and relaxed experience. We enjoyed a wonderful full body massage in the Spa which was excellent. Happy hour was very enjoyable beside the pool after being out all day and the F&B manager was very attentive and charming. Our only compliant was that the water in the pool was very cold and we did not get in but it was a lovely pool area with a view of the garden. We would definitely recommend Anhill Boutique and would love to return.

title: Very nice place
comment: Very nice place: Neat garden. Premium service. Beautiful and spacious rooms. Breakfast gargantuan. The hotel is a bit far from the city but is very peaceful. The staff is very attentive. I recommend for anyone who wants to find a quiet place.

title: BEST BOUTIQUE HOTEL IN VIETNAM ✨
comment: Wow! This hotel was the highlight of our entire 2 week trip to Vietnam. From the airport pick up in a luxurious car, to the private romantic dinner they gave us in the gardens for my 40th Birthday, the little fruit platter they left in the room and complimentary book! They went above and beyond to make us feel at home and the service was exceptional! The hotel is set in the country side and we really enjoyed using the hotel bikes to explore and visit the peacocks. They made my 40th Birthday so special and it was such a gorgeous boutique hotel. They have really gone above and beyond to ensure the hotel is immaculate and well presented! The Interior design is especially stunning ! We loved our stay so much - we will definitely be back oneday and highly recommend you visit! Thanks for having us and making it super special ♥️. From Kimberley & Col Dow

title: Great Hotel - definitely recommend!
comment: Great Hotel - first class staff and ambience. Garden is stunning. Great location away from the town, nice and relaxing, Restaurant was excellent. We were treated wonderfully and loved our stay and would have loved to have stayed longer, wouldn’t hesitate to recommend!

title: Beautifully designed boutique hotel
comment: Anhill is a lovely boutique hotel just outside of Hue city. We stayed in one of the pool villas. We found it comfortable, beautifully designed, and private. The resort staff are all kind and helpful. The dining options are convenient and delicious. Great accommodation for your time in Hue!

title: Delightful boutique hotel in Hue
comment:
Delightful boutique hotel in Hue. Stayed 2 nights while exploring Emperor Tu Duc's mausoleum and beautiful Citadel.
Excellent service, breakfast, dinner and spa. Didn't use lovely outdoor pool as weather cool and raining during our stay.
Would recommend you stay. Easy to get taxi into town.

title: Excellent Spa Treatment
comment: I had an excellent full body massage from Trinh at this hotel’s Spa in late March 2025. The treatment was extremely relaxing and the Spa was beautifully decorated. The fruit tea before the treatment was very welcome. I would recommend the Spa and Trinh.

title: A beautiful oasis of peace and tranquility
comment: Stunning hotel, tucked away in secluded position, tranquil and peaceful. Amazing friendly staff and beautiful comfortable surroundings. The gardens are exceptional. Our room was enormous with a large balcony and high ceilings, light and airy. Huge comfortable bed with beautiful bedding. All the furniture and fixtures were of good quality. Exceptionally clean throughout. The outside dining area overlooked the beautiful gardens, the food and service was excellent. The best massage ever at the spa. A wonderful stay we didn’t want to leave.

title: Pure Escapism
comment:
This is a beautiful boutique hotel.
From the moment you arrive you are magically transported into pure escapism, the grounds, the rooms and the hotel public areas are exquisite and the staff are absolutely delightful.
I really didn't want ton leave!

title: Wonderful peaceful hotel, an absolute delight.
comment: Situated a few minutes outside of Hue this hotel was delightful. Set in a peaceful location this was a very relaxing place to stay. The food in the restaurant was exceptional and all the staff were really friendly and helpful. We had a very relaxing massage in the Spa as well. We were very sad to leave.

title: Ideal boutique hotel in Hue
comment:
A beautiful boutique hotel just outside Hue. 10 minute taxi into town provides the perfect combination of peace and quiet at the hotel with great staff and then good choice of restaurants in town and of course the Citadel.

A superb restaurant and well stocked bar - lovely cocktails

title: One of the beat hotels in vietnam
comment:
Amazing property very nice the design of the rooms and the commune area .
Great service. Good restaurant. And breakfast

People always willing to help and very attentive is a place to rest and enjoy

Big rooms. Next time i will go to the villas

Will come bqck for sure.

title: Why didn't we stay for longer?
comment: Stop overnight at Anhill, and immediately regretted not staying for longer. The room was spacious and well equipped, the bed was comfortable, the view from the room amazing, the restaurant was great and the food wonderful, the grounds amazing ..... I simply cannot fault the hotel or the ever-helpful staff.

title: Wonderful relaxing few days in Hue at Anhill Boutique hotel
comment:
This was a really lovely hotel to stay at. Very modern, clean, luxurious and spacious. We were here for three nights and can’t fault it for comfort and the friendly can-do attitude of the staff. In particular I want to recommend a talented girl called Trinh who gave me a delightful strong back massage in the spa when I had a very achy back and hadn’t been able to sleep well for a few nights before arriving here. Afterwards I felt I could stand straighter, walk taller and move better. That and the choice of pillows from the pillow menu (and possibly the mojito cocktail with supper) and the wonderfully comfortable bed, made a recipe for a very good night’s sleep! My husband thoroughly enjoyed his massage with Nga who he would also recommend. The food is delicious too by the way and beautifully presented. A calm and tranquil few days in Hue on our trip from north to south of the country.
Sarah

title: Amazing
comment:
Amazing hotel !!
Very friendly staff and beautiful accommodations, setting is great too . We keep getting little plates of biscuits and cakes in our room ❤️
Love how they do the lots of little things at make the stay wonderful
A little out of town but only 10 minutes taxis away .

title: Beautiful tranquil hotel
comment:
Lovely, tranquil location, great hotel. Rooms were huge and very comfortable. Everything you needed was there. There was a pillow menu. Staff were very friendly, especially Harry and the other reception staff, but I can't leave out the waiters etc. who's names I do not have. Food was really good. The only slight drawback was it was out of town so nowhere really to stroll to, but they did offer a shuttle service and bike hire.
Would stay again.

title: Very impressed
comment:
Gorgeous hotel and gardens with a charming restaurant and delightful staff.
Pristine throughout, with imaginative design, spacious rooms and a relaxed atmosphere.
Good spa service available.
A super cocktail bar.
We were cold in our room but were quickly supplied with a portable heater.
Very impressed.

title: Outstanding hotel
comment:
Although this hotel is about 10 minutes drive from Hue, please don’t let this put you off ! It’s in a lovely quiet location, about £3 in a taxi to Hue & having stayed 3 wonderful nights there, I wouldn’t stay anywhere else.
We organised for the hotel to pick us up from the airport & were greeted by the driver who showed us to this huge luxury van with enormous comfortable seats where you could press a button & have a massage.
Upon entering the hotel, we were greeted by wonderful professional staff & we loved the interior design of the reception, dining & bar areas. We definitely thought the hotel looked even better than the online photos.
Our superior suite didn’t disappoint either & was huge , with a free standing bath , separate toilet & an enormous walk in shower. Our bed was bigger than a super king & was very comfortable with quality pillows & bed linen. There was a turn down service every night with a small sweet treat left in our room.
The gardens around the hotel were a delight. We didn’t use the pool due to the weather but the pool area looked lovely.
The 2 best things during our stay were the staff & the food. All the staff without exception were fantastic. Very helpful, professional,spoke good English & seemed to anticipate all our needs . Thank you.
The food was exceptional both at breakfast & dinner. They offer both Vietnamese & international dishes. They have a very talented chef. The food is a little more expensive than what you can get in many restaurants in Hue but was worth every penny. We also liked the lovely setting & ambiance of the dining area.
My husband had a massage at the hotels spa & enjoyed his experience . We also used the hotels laundry service which was a little disappointing as the items came back quite creased.
However, other than that we could not fault the hotel & would recommend you stay there. It’s not for those who wish to party late - it’s definitely for those who enjoy a bit of luxury & relaxation, good food & service at reasonable prices. It also definitely serves the best coffee we had in Vietnam ! A big thank you to everyone at AnHill who made our stay so special .

title: Wish we’d stayed longer
comment: Hotel is in such a peaceful location outside Hue. Beautiful room and bathroom and our room had a terrace overlooking the gardens. Food in the onsite restaurant was excellent. We only stayed one night sadly. Had we known how lovely the hotel was, we would have booked for longer. There also was a swimming pool which looked very inviting but we didn’t have time to try it out. Staff were very friendly and helpful.

title: Fantastic hotel
comment: Wonderful hotel out of the bustle of city life but just a few minutes in a taxi to the centre of Hue. Service of all the staff was fantastic. Food was delicious. Room large and comfortable. I really can’t fault this hotel. Breakfasts were varied and the best we e been offered£ so far in Vietnam. Great cocktails too! Bed an£ pillow super comfortable

title: A wonderful resort experience
comment:
My wife and I were fortunate enough to choose this resort for our four night visit to Hue.

The previous week, we had met a couple from England that highly recommended Anhill, and we took their advice. We are so glad that we did!

It is a wonderful, modern and extremely well appointed resort. The restaurant is also outstanding. The rooms are all large, comfortable and well equipped; there are no bad choices when you select the type if room that you prefer.

The stand out asset of the resort; the one thing that sets it apart from others, is the wonderful staff.

Everyone is incredibly welcoming, warm and friendly, not to mention the obvious desire to help ensure that your stay in Hue is as pleasant as possible.

Harry, Joy, Julie and the entire restaurant team are particularly amazing.

We highly recommend the Anhill Boutique Resort and Spa, and will return here every time that we visit Vietnam. Hands down, the best accommodation we’ve encountered in this country.

title: A genuinely beautiful boutique hotel.
comment:
Beautiful rooms, each with a large balcony.

The hotel is extremely comfortable, a little out of town, but only $3 in a grab to get back as the hotel has a luxury shuttle to get you into town.

The hotel is beautifully designed, with a stunningly beautiful garden, with a small pool.

The staff are excellent and there is a lovely spa.

Fantastic breakfast and great dinner.

Really enjoyed our stay.

title: Paradise!
comment:
Paradise! What a stay! We had a fantastic welcome and all staff is so friendly. Despite the bad weather, we could relax and really feel good here.
The food at dinner is so good.
Thanks to everyone in the hotel to make it an unforgettable stay for us.

title: A beautiful retreat
comment: A high quality peaceful retreat away from the noise and bustle of the city. The gardens are beautiful and very carefully maintained. Rooms are large spacious and immaculate. For going into town and for a trip to the Imperial city the hotel car is luxurious. We found the Imperial city/ pagoda/ temple tour to be very worthwhile and well worth the money. Our English speaking guide, Ha, was excellent. The staff at the hotel were unfailingly polite and attentive to our needs. This is a far better option than staying in the city.

title: Perfection.
comment: Just a great hotel in all respects. Superb staff. Lovely room and gardens. Excellent food too. Totally recommended. This really was a first class stay. So much better than all the other hotels we stayed in. If I was ever going back this would be my first priority.

title: Peaceful, relaxing hotel.
comment:
Very peaceful hotel, wander around the garden and pond and watch the koi follow you. Beautiful.
We had room 201 which was massive, with a comfy bed, really good pillows and quiet A/C.
The bathroom was brilliant, huge bath, great shower, loads of space.
Breakfast and dinner in the restaurant or just sitting at the bar for a drink and a snack, the food was great.
Brilliant staff, everyone was friendly and very helpful. Highly recommend.

title: Oasis of style and calmness
comment:
An oasis of elegance, set in tranquil gardens.
From the moment you arrive at reception, you know you are in for a special treat.
Attention to detail, attentive staff, immaculate rooms.
A walk around the gardens, watching the Koi carp is incredibly relaxing.
As a base to stay whilst exploring Hue, in my opinion this hotel can not be bettered..
It's been a privilege to stay here.
Haven't left yet, but looking forward to our return stay.
An amazing experience. Thank you.

title: Great hotel
comment: Beautiful place, it all fit! Staff are very friendly and helpful, rooms are very nicely decorated, breakfast is great. Great atmosphere, we have nothing to complain about. Would visit the hotel again and again!!

title: A little piece of paradise
comment: At the top quiet hotel. With swimming pool, pergola, spa. The rooms are beautifully decorated spacious , with bath and shower, very kind personal "colonial" decoration. Nothing wrong. We would have stayed here. The restaurant offers a mixed Asian and European menu, the portions are hearty. Breakfast offers choice with continental and Asian buffet.

title: Gorgeous hotel
comment: This is a gorgeous hotel with enchanting staff and delicious food. Our room was vast with a comfortable bed and a great shower. We aren’t ones for a bath but if we were, it would have been inviting. We were only there for two nights but wish we could have stayed longer.

title: Chilling in the hotel's fabulous garden
comment: We stayed for 3 nights as part of a 3 week trip and really enjoyed the feeling of tranquility of the lovely garden and pond when we ate outside. And yet it is only a short ride in a Grab to town, which the hotel helped us order ( using their own cheaper locals' rates

title: Great hotel and fabulous customer service
comment: We had two nights at this hotel. The reception staff Joy and Harry were superb. They could not do enough for you and treated you as if you were the only hotel guests there. They were absolutely brilliant from booking and recommending restaurants, assisting us with our local guide and generally just very friendly. The hotel was extremely comfortable and decor was great. Would thoroughly recommend to anyone visiting Hue.

title: An Oasis with exceptional service
comment:
Exceptional service, wonderful large rooms, good spa. Would definitely come again and recommend.
From the first greetings of reception (Joy and Harry) to the most comfortable pillows I have slept on - could not fault this hotel. Great breakfast/Bar and restaurant and a very nice pool. The location - about 20mins from the centre of Hue, but an easy taxi ride would be the only thing to note - not a walk into the city centre, but complementary cycles are available.

title: Beautiful hotel in Hue
comment: Beautiful spacious rooms overlooking a wonderful park on the outskirts of Hue. The service was friendly and professional. The food was excellent. We should have stayed longer and stayed less in Hoi An. The lobby and public areas are furnished with beautiful antiques. Will go back as soon as I can !

title: A superb hotel in Hué
comment: Beautiful hotel, friendly and efficient staff. The restaurant was excellent for breakfast and dinner. The spa was exceptional. Overall we throughly enjoyed our 3 days in Hué, and the ANhill Boutique made it that bit more special. Highly recommend.

title: An amazing hotel for an unforgettable experience
comment: I've had the privilege of traveling and staying in many wonderful hotels, but this one stands out as the absolute best. Every detail was impeccable—the room design, the warm and welcoming staff, the delicious food for breakfast and at the restaurant, the serene koi pond, and the breathtaking bonsai oasis. It was perfection in every way. I truly hope to return and experience this extraordinary place again.

title: One of the best places I have visited.
comment:
We stayed here at Anhill Boutique hotel for two nights. To be honest we wish we could have had more time here the staff were great and the rooms were some of the best we have ever stayed in. Great hotel we highly recommend staying here.
Thank you Anhill Boutique for a great experience.

title: Great.
comment: Beautiful location, enthusiastic staff. Luxury dorm room, located near the Grand Interior, the river, extremely beautiful view. I stood on the 25th floor and could see the whole city in my eye. Everyone who is here must come to try it once.

title: Elegant and Sophisticated Luxury with Excellent Service. Just... Not Much Nearby
comment:
The hotel gets five stars because both it, and the staff deserve 5 stars.

Our suite was gorgeous, the hotel is elegant and luxurious and immaculate - and our views were stunning in all directions.

The staff are supremely skilled. Helpful, always available, never in your face. In fact Tin, at the Front Desk is a particular jewel. He helped us navigate the chaos of Vietnam Airlines cancelling our flight to Cambodia, switching all passengers to Cambodia Airlines, failing to notify anyone of the flight change - and therefore being unable to check in.

We were stuck, he stepped right in, called the airlines and got everything sorted. Enormous help and an perfect example of the quality of service at the Vinpearl.

The breakfast is astonishingly good, with numerous stations offering any and every type of food you could imagine - all wonderfully prepared, presented and abundant.

Our only "complaint" has nothing to do with the hotel itself - but note to travelers, there is very little within walking distance: no nearby markets we could find, nothing of interest to visit, etc. This may be a failure on our part (though we have enjoyed great success everywhere else: Hanoi, Hoi An, Da Nang, Saigon, Siem Reap, et al) so the lack in Hue was surprising. Instead of going out and exploring, we chose to take a two night "luxury rest" here and it was wonderful. Great food, abundant drinks, comfort and relaxation.

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment:
This is a modern city hotel in a great location in Hue. It dominates the skyline.
It’s a great place to stay - comfort, staff, food and drink are all first class.
We had a deluxe room on the 23rd floor which afforded fantastic views of the city. If you want to go higher, there is a very good restaurant and rooftop bar.
All in all a great place to stay and highly recommended

title: Unmissable address in Huē
comment:
Unmissable hotel in the center of Huē, high-end service and services upon arrival.
Our room was located on the 25th floor and had a great view of the river.
The decoration is refined, the bathroom spacious and there is no lack of equipment.
The indoor pool with panoramic views is very nice and the water is very good.
We had an early train, so we couldn’t test the breakfast buffet but the reception team was kind enough to have us prepare takeaway bags.

title: Oasis of Calm when travelling though Vietnam
comment: Melissa Vinpearl provided a welcome high end respite from the smaller city hotels during our stay in Vietnam. Rooms huge, every facility perfect and breakfast/dinner wonderful. Walking distance to the imperial Palace and for markets/food tour start points. Fantastic rooftop bar and high enough that we were above the clouds (well it was raining!). Only negative - volume of the music in the rooftop bar if you want to talk !!

title: Absolutely AMAZING 10 🌟
comment: Wow! This hotel is absolutely stunning! From the spectacular set ir to the amazing staff and incredible views from the sky bar and our room. The breakfast was also incredible 🤤 Hands down a highlight stop to my vacation. Thinh @ the front desk went above and beyond and has a BEAUTIFUL voice! I caught him singing early in the morning when I snuck to the lobby because of my roommates snoring!

title: Good experience
comment: Excellent experience while staying at Melia Vinpearl Hue. Because I’m alone, I’ve spent a lot of time at the hotel. I was impressed by the hotel''s service, especially well impressed by you Spa staff named Trang, you were very enthusiastic and suggested a variety of attractive places to visit around Hue. Very Satisfied

title: A week chillaxing
comment: Amazing place to stay. Excellent staff and facilities. Our go to place when we stay in Hue. Highly recommended. Can't wait to go back 2027.

title: I'll bring back a good report of my stay at Melia Hue
comment:
Great to have a team of polite and helpful staff attending o our needs.
Counter staff are patient and their knowledge of English is ood and commendable.
Amenities in the rooms work well.
Cheerful and friendly environment at the restaurant. Well labelled food items catering to diverse tastes.
Well done.

title: Hotel
comment: Good and beautiful hotel. Friendly and courteous staff. Clean and big bed.

title: Great for families and business travelers
comment:
Clean, spacious, modern, comfy rooms. Very business like hotel but they lots of amenities for families. Wonderful indoor pool with a walled in toddler area that I found very helpful. Kids play room with some activities. Incredible range of breakfast items with fresh and delicious food.

Great place to stay.

title: Spotless hotel, great spa, delicious food, and excellent lounge service. Special thanks to Ms. Hiep!
comment: Amazing stay with excellent service

title: THE hotel in Hue
comment:
The Melia in Hue is the hotel that most Westerners stay in when visiting Hue, it is central and the tallest in the city.

It is modern as expected from the Melia chain, and it was a great two night escape given the bad weather we experienced.

We booked a suite Levels experience, which was fantastic. The levels lounge had a great view across the city, with free pouring wine, beer and selected cocktails for three hours, with small snacks. Tea and Coffee were available for the rest of the day.

The suite was fantastic, and in the U.K. would cost considerably more. Well worth the upgrade.

Staff were friendly and helpful in booking transfers and providing suggestions.

title: Wonderful
comment:
Great, modern, brand new feel-good hotel, fantastic views.
Restaurant (top) also highly recommended.

Would definitely come back.

title: Luxury in Hue
comment: We booked a Level Room and we checked in at The Level Lounge and due to our late arrival we missed the evening cocktails and they offered us two free cocktails at The Sky Bar, what an unexpected surprise. Our corner Level Room was huge with most amazing views. Bathroom facilities were exceptional and the free laundry items were very welcome. The Level Lounge is a great place to relax and enjoy snacks and drinks. Breakfast was good with a big variety. We did not make use of the pool and spa facilities but it looked amazing. All staff were very professional and helpful. The hotel is well located and most areas are within walking distance. If you planning a trip to Hue you cannot go wrong with this hotel.

title: A+ experience staying at this hotel, will be recommending to friends and family next time I visit Hue Vietnam
comment: Great stay, friendly hosts, clean rooms and professional staff, would recommend anyone to stay here, stayed on the 25th floor with stunning view of Hue! Great breakfast and recommended steak house dinner in the sky!

title: Modern Luxury in Hue
comment: The Vinpearl is a modern property in central Hue with expansive views. Our suite was expansive with river and city views from floor to ceiling windows in both living and bedroom. The Level lounge and Concierge access is definitely worth including. The staff was flexible and very helpful. .if you are looking for a modern 5 star property in Hue Vinpearl is an excellent choise.

title: EXCELLENT
comment: The location is beautiful, close to the center, we were especially taken care of by Noel, she was polite and helpful, and also helped us experience the very good food service, whatever tastes in Hue she knew. Our family was extremely happy

title: Luxury, fine hotels
comment: Great location, clean rooms, friendly staff. Next time I definitely stay with family when in Hué.

title: A lovely stay
comment: Certainly the tallest building in Hue, the Vinpearl can be seen anywhere in the city. We had a Level Deluxe room based on the 32nd floor with awesome views of the City. A wonderful room, very big and comfortable and being a Level room gave us access to the executive lounge for canopies, beers and wine for 3hrs each day and all other times, tea coffee and soft drinks. For the size of the hotel the swimming pool was small and about 7 sunbeds. There is a Steam room, Jacuzzi and Sauna but it is separated so men and women only. 2 lovely ladies of note that made our stay so nice are Hiep and Tam (i think thats her name, the new girl who usually is on reception but helped out on the Level). Overall, a great stay there.

title: Location, comfort and services
comment: A very comfortable hotel with all kinds of amenities. Attentive and hospitable staff. Very good location

title: Expectations are not met
comment:
First of all, Melia Vinpearl opened in 2018 and is one of the most expensive hotels in town, if not the most expensive. And that's how I'm gonna measure it.
Booked was a Premier room on "The Level", i.e. the Executive/Club floors. Corresponding to what the view great and the room spacious. You can see some wear and tear after almost 8 years but that is very much in line. You can also ignore the fact that the cosmetic mirror is not suitable for women under 1.75m. Breakfast is really good and very extensive. So far everything is fine, but then there are also several very negative points.
First of all, the elevators - I've never seen you have to wait so long for an elevator, the controls are underground. In the end everyone was usually at the top or everyone at the bottom, but you stood and waited. Talking to the other guests, you could tell it was normal.
The second item is "The Level". Booking comes with some benefits and just The Level Lounge. In the end, however, there is almost nothing left of it except the high floor - it is a waste of money.
As in other hotels with the concept, you check in and out comfortably in the lounge. Nice idea, only you can't get into the lounge without a keycard for the elevator. And when you check out you have to wait twice for the elevator - only effect: Waste of time.
Next benefit: Late checkout and early check-in upon availability. But if this is not available 30 minutes before the official time, you might not want to advertise it.
Another point: "welcome amenity in your room and a take – away gift upon your departure". A small dessert and fruit came into the room but at check out there was nothing. You certainly don't need to, but then why apply?
And the main point - the lounge. Between 15:30 and 18:30 there is wine, beer, canapés, otherwise soft drinks, nuts, cookies. That's the theory. On the first evening you had to wait 10 minutes for an orange juice and on the second evening there were simply no free tables. It's not like a hotel knows how many occupied rooms and guests you could have and then build the lounge accordingly. It was practically useless. Also the fact that all drinks run over the overwhelmed service is weird, why can't you put the drinks as usual for self-service? Funny austerity measure?
Unfortunately, I now have a negative point to make that is a little more serious. The safety of electrical installations. There were two points in the room that must never happen. At the cable of the dessert lamp, bare copper wires were exposed at the dimmer. The spot seems to have been patched before (insulating tape) but now the wires were exposed again, quite coincidence that there was no short circuit yet. So you could comfortably grip 220V with your fingers. This could still be described as negligent maintenance (Vietnam may not have close inspection obligations). But the second problem was fully intentional and also potentially life-threatening. Vietnam does not use standard sockets, mostly US or British plugs. Therefore, one usually finds universal socket, so here too. They can only make the grounding contact via pins, such as British plugs. But now they have bought a kettle with a metal housing and Schuko plug, which has no chance to connect the ground conductor. In short, once the kettle has a defect, you are perfectly connected to 220V.
I think after the description it is understandable why I cannot recommend the hotel.

title: Great stay in
comment: The hotel is excellent, up to the chain to which it belongs. Cleanliness flawless, super attentive and courteous staff, the restaurant on the 30th floor with breathtaking views of the city deserves a dinner.

title: Brilliant
comment:
Absolutely amazing stay, we were treated with highest regards as soon as we stepped into the hotel. Throughout the experience has been exceptional and i 100% recommend staying here.

We stayed with the Level package which gave us access to the premium check-in and check out as well as premium lounge area and breakfast area. Definitely staying here again if I’m back in Hue.

title: Fantastic stay
comment:
We stayed here for 3 nights 15-18 Feb and cannot recommend the hotel enough. Any correspondence I had with the hotel ahead of time was swiftly responded to, and we decided to book the Level rooms based on the reviews (plus hubby liked the idea of somewhere to relax with a few glasses of wine).

Due to our flight time from Siem Reap changing, and then a subsequent delay, we arrived closer to 7pm as our flight was into DaNang airport. After being checked in on the 32nd floor, we were still offered a complimentary drink from the bar which was kind as we were outwith the time period. We also managed to snag a few of the canapés just before they got whisked away. They were superb!

Our room was gorgeous, a lovely huge bed (a bit firm for my husband but perfect for me), a lovely powerful shower and great views. Compared to what we stayed at in Siem Reap (and that was nice) , this was so decadent probably because it’s much more modern. As for breakfast…. Yum. A huge selection but we stuck with fruit, some of the Hue specialty dumplings, pho, and perhaps a wee pastry or two (their coconut pastry was really good). Fresh fruit juice was excellent too (sometimes it’s more like from a carton but this seemed truly fresh). Thankfully our 2 days of sightseeing were slow starts to enable us to enjoy breakfast and not rush off.

The staff we dealt with were all very pleasant and helpful and organised us a driver to take us to the tombs on our first day as I hadn’t quite organised myself ahead of time. He didn’t seem to charge much more given it was the eve of Tet. I think I paid 700k for 4 hours of his time.

Our only issue, and this was unfortunate, was that the few restaurants I had ear marked for trying out were closed due to Tet. Nobody’s fault, just one of those things, and we didn’t want anywhere fancy. We went to a little family run restaurant a mere 5 min walk away on our first night and ended up there again. It hit the spot.

It was an easy 15-20 min walk from the hotel to the citadel, and we ended up getting a Grab taxi afterwards to the pagoda along the river and then back again.

I suspect we won’t return to Hue again as we’ve seen all we’d like to see, but you never know. If we do, I won’t hesitate to return to this hotel again.

title: Excellence
comment:
The hotel is very well located, close to many restaurants and a fifteen minute walk from the Imperial City.
The staff is very attentive. The room is spacious and the Spa very nice.
Very good value for money if you go directly through the hotel website to book.

title: Room cleaner steals from room
comment: The hotel is good, but it is very unpleasant that the cleaning ladies steal things from the rooms. My wife's newly bought powder was stolen after cleaning the room. The hotel administration was not very helpful, they suggested calling the police for an item worth 60 euros. The manager, Mr. Linh, was unable to resolve the situation. Shame on this MELIA hotel. I will never return to this hotel. I SUGGEST YOU CHOOSE ANOTHER HOTEL.

title: 5 star hotel for a 3 star price!!
comment: A 5 star hotel at incredible prices!! Can walk all over town and easily find your way back to the tallest building in town. The breakfast was incredible - two hot to order stations, incredible breads, asian food, western food - the best breakfast of our trip!!! The pool and gym are gorgeous as well. Highly recommended

title: Reception, solution-oriented and professional
comment: What thrilled us most was the woman named Noel at the reception, who was with professionalism, very good English and courtesy with all problems immediately helped us. A reliable, solution-oriented work, thank you for this

title: Excellent hotel with some upgrade needed
comment: Overall this is a great hotel and its location is near a number of good restaurants. It’s also near the Hue Walking Street area that closes on weekends. Room is spacious and staff is very helpful and friendly. The breakfast spread is very good. There are both local and western food counters. We stayed on a high level and it overlooks the Perfume River and we had the blessing to watch the Lunar New Year fireworks. So why do I rate it 4 stars - because the television and the telephone doesn’t work well. Plus the electric sockets are quite loose to plug into. Especially those on the floor at the writing table. The television is dated and the screen colours are blurry. When we call the spa for appointment, the receptionist cannot hear us. Hopefully my next visit will be better.

title: Everything is absolutely perfect!
comment: From the room on the 28th floor until the availability of all the staff, everything is done to make this stay inoperative and the Melia sign a reference for our next destinies.

title: If I come back, I'll repeat hotel. It's super!
comment: Super hotel with very spacious and comfortable rooms. Very good bed, shower too and very cool views. The only criticism is that they could run a little better vacuum through the carpet (nowadays another type of floor would be better). The super complete breakfast for both Asians and Europeans. The pool not very large but quiet and pleasant. About the location: quite close to the river and bars and restaurants. You can walk to the citadel but we took a grab (for us very cheap), the same when visiting the graves etc. If I go back to Hue I'll repeat hotel.

title: Great Experience with Professional and Friendly Staff
comment:
The hotel is in a very convenient location, close to many attractions and restaurants. The service was outstanding, particularly from the Level team. Thao took great care of us and made the stay extra comfortable with attentive and friendly support. I would definitely stay here again.
If you want, I can make it sound more luxury, more emotional, or stronger appreciation for Thao

title: Very enjoyable hotel and service
comment: Ms. THAO's very passionate service helped us to connect with the drivers and the company we want to take the bus, so we can stay safe. Very good hotel, stay next time.

title: I really really love this place!
comment: Honestly the staff here are the best, most accommodating, friendliest, most wonderful staff at any hotel I’ve ever stayed at in my entire life. Check in and check out we’re both speedy, Friendly and we had to check out at 5:30 AM and the staff had breakfast boxes waiting for us to take on our journey. And we didn’t even have to request a breakfast box. They just offered to bring us one! The hotel itself is really beautiful and comfortable.We stayed in a rather large suite that was really well appointed. The bed was comfortable, the linens were very nice and the decor was fresh. The restaurants were all really good and the staff go out of their way every single day to make sure that every aspect of your experience is 100% wonderful. This is how all hotels should be. I really love this place and I would come back to Hue just to stay here!

title: Wonderful experience
comment: Modern property near the city center of Huè. Staff always available and attentive to every detail. We stayed in a room at The Level which gave us the opportunity to take advantage of several benefits including free laundry for two garments a day and after a few days of vacation was very useful. Amazing views of the city and breakfast with a wide selection that is banded beyond my expectations despite having traveled to all continents for over 40 years. Special thanks to Kim Mee

title: Five star luxury at an affordable price
comment: The hotel is fantastic and can compete with any 5 star hotel you have seen in other cities at a fraction of the cost. It is easy to find as it is the tallest building in Hue. The rooms are modern and luxurious with every amenity. The included buffet breakfast is huge with so many selections. Hint if you need laundry done, a laundry Dung Da Hue is a 5 minute walk from the hotel at a very reasonable price and when the laundry is done, they will deliver it at no cost to the hotel.

title: Great hotel
comment: This hotel was amazing from start to finish. We were greeted immediately at the door, bags were taken to our room and we were able to smoothly check in. The building itself was immaculate and permanently clean, the facilities were great and the restaurant at the top of the hotel, although not having the most amazing food This trip, had views second to none on our trip so far.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
Great hotel, spacious rooms, great breakfast. A special mention for CHRISTMAS who took care of booking us a guide with a driver for the tours.
Thank you.

title: Meliá Vinpearl Hue
comment:
The service at this hotel was very thoughtful and made my whole trip smooth.The room very clean and bigger than expected(even we are 3 with an extra bed)

It’s highly recommended !

title: Functional
comment:
Functional hotel without too much charm, with all the comforts of a 5 star accommodation. Although it might seem like a large hotel the truth is that, although it is a very tall building, there are few rooms per floor. Its location is fantastic to be able to walk through the best area of downtown Hub and friendly staff, as in all Vietnam.
However, the resignations of the rooms advertised on the website I think overestimate the surface. I stayed in a premium room that I don't think measures 47 m2. Breakfast is also nothing special and, in addition, the room in which it is served is very unwelcoming and with music at a volume that makes it even less comfortable. In any case the value for money of the hotel is more than right

title: Great!
comment:
Very friendly staff. Top room, clean with fantastic views.
Nice Sky Bar.
Breakfast buffet with rich offer.

title: Very average hotel in Hue
comment: The hotel is a physically imposing high rise in an otherwise historic Hue. The staff are pleasant and the public and private spaces are superficially nice. But beyond the surface things are very average. We paid for access to the Level lounge. Again, a nice space but the food offerings are very meager and uninspiring. The breakfast is similarly disappointing. Little or no fruit selection and a buffet of extraordinarily average quality. Even the Vietnamese dishes lack flavor or quality. They have a “Level” area for premium guests. That’s a bit of a joke as all they do is place you in a segregated room that lacks ventilation and is farther away from the food. When we asked for tea and coffee in this “elite” area the staff told us it was self service. It’s not a bad hotel but it’s not a great hotel either. It could be a lot better if the management improved the food offerings and made the Level a bit more premium.

title: Take me back!
comment:
This was probably the best experience I had at an hotel. The room was amazing, the bed was incredibly comfortable.

The VIEWS! Oh my!

However it was the staff that made this stay what it was. Every staff member we came across was so pleasant and went above and beyond. This started even before check in with a welcome email. It was also my birthday and they made it very special. I was greeted by so many staff with birthday wishes. Treats were left with a had written note from guest experience manager.

We spent alot of time with the Level concierge and had so many fun conversations, got lots of recommendations and learned so much about Hue. All the staff there was amazing but there was one in particular I spent so much time talking to and I am so upset I did not write down her name. The Level snacks were great and there was a daily open bar for a few hours in the afternoon.

The breakfast was the best at any hotel we had been to in Vietnam, in fact it was probably one of the best hitel breakfasts we have ever had.

Hue was a beautiful city and will hold a special part in our heart. We would go back to this hotel again in a heartbeat.

title: A nice hotel in a nice city.
comment: Had a wonderful stay in this hotel. I paid for the lounge experience and it did not disappoint. The staff were helpful, especially Nguyen. The breakfast buffet had many options, with even clearly marked vegan options. The hotel is a short walk from the restaurant/night life area which kept noise levels down.

title: We liked everything
comment: A good hotel, right in the center you can reach everything on foot, Imperial Palace about 2 km to the river about 800 m so really well located

title: I want to use this affiliated hotel next time!
comment: I spent three nights in a room with access to The Level Lounge and I can recommend it for its excellent service, dedicated staff and clean, well-maintained facilities. The only trouble is that there is no power source in the place where I use a hairdryer. This is a mystery for a five-star hotel, but it doesn't matter much.

title: Perfect place
comment: Amazing! I can't find the words. This place was the best. I want to come back here:)

title: Excellent!!!
comment:
I would say it’s the most beautiful hotel we stayed in before the final feet of our tour of Cambodia los Vietnam.
Both the location and the design of the building are beautiful. Especially the staff behavior was fantastic, but I've expressed my satisfaction to their managers before leaving the hotel and I want to mention it here. I was especially pleased with the kind care of the “Lam” in the breakfast room, and I was very happy with the close care of all the employees in the front desk when they found out about my inconvenience, including “Quewen.”
All the equipment in the rooms are very Newbie clean shiny rooms design very nice beds sheets very clean and very comfortable, bathroom and all the equipment are very nice.
I'm a traveler who travels a lot because of my profession and I've stayed in different hotels in various countries around the world, but I'm most pleased to say that the friendly and kind care of the staff is key, as well as the cleanliness and beauty of the hotel.
When you leave, I say I wish you had stayed longer, it comes first.

title: Excellent place to stay
comment: These wonderful people go out of their way to assist you and help in anything you want to do. They made reservations for me to attend a cooking class for example.
