comment: Lovely small boutique hotell set off the main road in great location. Staff were excellent, very helpful, particularly Linda, Ryan and Tharh who helped us with arranging a tour around the tombs as the weather was very wet. Beds very comfortable and had great sleeps!

title: Wonderful hotel!
comment: Wonderful hotel within easy walk to numerous restraunts and nightlife, but located in quiet area. Rooms are very clean, well maintained and well-stocked with fresh fruit and bottled water. Great breakfast too! Staff was exceptionally friendly and helpful. Thank you Cam, Kelly and David for all your help!!

title: An Unforgettable Stay in Hue
comment: We couldn’t have had a better stay in Hue. The hotel gave us a free room upgrade, the breakfast was excellent with a selection of special meals just for you along with the buffet. The location was great, and everything they recommended was worth it. They were always willing to help you organize your trip exactly as you wanted. Linda and Thanh were amazing professionals and made our stay unforgettable. Thank you so much!

title: Excellent stay!
comment: We had a really good time at the Scarlett Boutique Hotel! Linda and Thanh were fantastic, they were very quick to offer us advice and recommendations. They really made us feel at home in Hue. Also, Huy gave us a ride to Hoi An, which included several stops along the way. If you have the chance, we recommend getting a ride with him as he was very informative and friendly. 10/10 overall!

title: Would stay again! Hospitality at its finest.
comment:
I had the best stay in Huế thanks to the incredible hospitality from Ruby and Ryan. They truly went above and beyond for my family, from helping us with everything we needed to even taking us to a trustworthy place to exchange money. Their kindness really showed us the genuine kindness of the people of Huế.

Our rooms were spacious, clean, and fully stocked with amenities. We felt so comfortable and well taken care of throughout our stay. The location was also very convenient to coffee, restaurants, and shopping. I highly recommend this hotel and especially want to thank Ruby and Ryan for making our trip unforgettable!

title: Marvelous Stay
comment:
So at first I was surprised because it is located inside an alley, yet once I entered the hotel lobby it has a really warm vibe. Staffs (Linda & Thanh) both greeted me with so much energy and warmth and Linda was very helpful with arranging pick up car for me from the airport. They are the most responsive hotel I ever chatted so far during my trip in Viet.

My trip from the lobby to my room was very pleasant, even though they are just a 3 star hotel they have a really nice interior and smells nice. My room is really nice too, the fruit complimentary was a great touch to it. It is clean and has everything I need.

Location wise, it is near to every place I wanted to visit in Hue, the walking street and to Madame Thu restaurant is just walking distance, there are many food vendors nearby the hotel and groceries are within less than 5 min walk.

To me this is 5 star service especially after knowing they were just surviving floods on 29 Nov.

Thank you for the great hospitality I’ll definitely stay there again if I come back and recommend to others!

Cheers

title: Perfect
comment: The stay was perfect, Linda and Than were really nice and helpful whit everything. Good location near the imperial city. 10/10

title: A nugget
comment:
Small hotel but very comfortable room and bedding. Plus, the staff. Attentive and attentive.
Thanks to Linda, Thanh and Ruby.

title: great hotel in Hue
comment: Excellent location for the Imperial Citadel and the riverfront, quiet because it is located slightly inside the street, spacious and spotless rooms, great breakfast, many activities available, but above all the kindness and expertise of the whole team, especially Ruby and Tranh, very kind and efficient in getting us a sweatshirt in Hoi An that we had left at the hotel. In short, a great choice if you need to stay in Hue!

title: Stay at Scarlett
comment:
Ruby, David & team

Many thanks for being so friendly and welcoming! Hope to see you all again one day!

Lovely hotel room and excellent position to the tourist district, yet down a wee alleyway so it's nice and quiet.

title: Excellent service- good lunch- well located- the teams is excellent Ryan and Than are really helpful
comment: We enjoyed our stay and booked Huy as a driver referred by the hotel to make us Hoi Ang very nice experience

title: One night in Hue
comment: Linda and Thanh were very kind. They gave us a lot of information and advice. The hotel is in a good location. Breakfast is both sweet and savoury. The room is comfortable and quiet

title: Perfect, comfortable and very well located. Staff very available. Linda and David always smiling anticipate all our d
comment: The hotel umbrellas are wonderful and allow to visit the city. Breakfast is very varied. Pre-order what you want the day before

title: Warm & welcoming!
comment:
The stay was just amazing! What made it so special are the people: Ruby, Ryan and the team provided us with an extraordinary experience with their warm & personal welcome.

We strongly recommand the breakfast. You can choose add ons like a Vietnamese Pho or Eggs (the way you like them) without additional charge - thanks a lot for this stay!!

title: Very good stay
comment:
Ruby, Ryan and the whole team are very caring, really welcoming and available to organize our vegan meal (Vietnamese food makes it very easy!)
The spacious and well decorated room, the comfortable bed.

title: 2 nights in Hue
comment: We stayed two nights arriving in the evening from Hanoi, room 503, not very large but functional, very quiet and with good quality sleep. Hotel very close to the center , staff really friendly and ready for every attention, to improve only breakfast, offer a choice of dishes plus predefined buffet.

title: So happy I chose to stay here
comment:
Thanks to Ruby, David and the team. After arriving at 5:30 am in the pouring rain I was able to check in early and then join for breakfast on the first day.

The rooms were the best I have stayed in in Vietnam at this price range. Everything was just how you would hope, I comfortable bed, quiet air conditioning and a good hot shower. And the included breakfast made for a great start to every day.

All the staff were very welcoming and helpful every time coming or going from the hotel.

Highly recommended.

title: We would definitely come back!
comment:
The atmosphere is pleasant and personal, the rooms clean and the bed wonderfully comfortable. I slept like a rock. The location of the house perfect, central yet quiet.

The staff are extremely friendly and welcoming. Linda and Thanh in particular looked after us very well and were always at our side with advice and deed. We felt very comfortable.

Breakfast is rich and delicious. You can order individual dishes for buffet selection. We enjoyed the banana crepe especially well 😊

title: Highly recommended!
comment: Very friendly helpful staff, especially at the Check Inn of Linda and Thanh. There was always fresh fruit and water, good selection at breakfast. It was a very pleasant stay and you felt very welcome.

title: Stay at the Scarlett!
comment:
The staff were amenable, courteous, and super helpful with booking tours around town. Our driver Thangh was awesome - his English was superb, he knew lots of fun "insider" facts about his hometown (and Vietnam in general), and he's a skilled (and safe) driver in a very clean, comfortable SUV. Thank you!

The room was comfortable and clean, and the location cannot be beat, right in the center of the action, but actually very quiet! Perfect.

title: We were very welcome
comment:
We had a very pleasant time in The Scarlett Boutique Hotel. Linda, Ruby, David and the rest of the staff made us feel right at home. You can ask anything and they always have an answer. The rooms were very clean and breakfast was very tasty.
We can recommend this hotel to anyone !

title: Great hotel!
comment: Very clean and cozy small scale hotel. Rooms were somewhat on the smaller side for 2 large suitcases, but very clean and everything in order! Nice breakfast. Super friendly staff, thank you to Ryan, Thanh and the whole team for the good service!

title: Great, centrally located city hotel
comment: Great city hotel, very friendly staff, good breakfast, room spacious, very clean, fast wifi available

title: Outstanding Stay
comment:
I had an amazing stay at Scarlett Boutique Hotel in Hue! The service was truly impeccable. Linda, Kelly, and David at the reception went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect during my visit.

What really stood out to me was how genuinely they take the time to get to know their guests. Kelly is always so thoughtful; she even offered to personally help with a few services herself. When I needed a red envelope for a wedding, Linda brought one from home for me. And during Typhoon Kalmaegi, when the roads were flooded and I couldn’t go out to buy coffee beans, she had them delivered to me and I didn’t have to lift a finger!

The hotel’s location is also great, close to shops with the kind of clothes I’m interested in. Everything about my stay felt warm, personal, and effortless.

Highly recommend! I’ll definitely be coming back!

title: The best hotel in Hue!
comment: Beautiful hotel. Clean and beautiful room. Great staff. Mrs Ruby is the best! Delicious breakfast. You have to stay here!

title: This is a hotel that I would recommend to those who travel to Hue
comment:
Very convenient hotel near downtown Hue.
It was a small hotel but very clean and the staff were full of hospitality. When I entered the room, I was struck by the beautiful decoration of red rose petals in the beautifully arranged royal blue interior. It was also the first hotel to have free WiFi in each room.
Thank you to Ruby, Linda and the team.

title: The best Hotel!
comment: The staff at hotel, especially Kelly, David - were incredibly courteous and respectful. They took care of us very well, to the smallest detail . We were fortunate to stay at this hotel.

title: Best stay ever!
comment: David, Kelly- the staff at hotel were very polite, friendly, kind and loving. We were given the utmost care and respect during our memorable stay.

title: Really make an effort
comment: Stayed here just one night during. Checkin was straightforward, all staff are exceptionally courteous. Hotel offers transport to airport, tours etc should you wish to partake. Room was spotless and comfortable. Breakfast was ok, you need to choose some of it night before. Location wise, am not sure as the weather was bad i got a grab everytime but doesnt seem far from the keysights. This hotel really tries to be exceptional so would recommend.

title: Hue trip
comment: Fantastic!! Highly recommend, staff are amazing - Linda, Kelly, David and Thanh! Travelling Vietnam this is the best hotel I have stayed in and easily the best staff and service. I love the design and decor of the hotel. I would definitely come back!

title: Cosy little hotel in the center of Hué
comment: The staff around Ruby, David & Team were very accommodating and helpful. The room was very nice and very quiet although we were in the middle of the city center. Breakfast was excellent. Only a few minutes walk away are very tasty restaurants such as Madame Thu and (even better) Chan.

title: Really nice hôtel
comment:
Really nice hotel to stay in Hué. Linda, Thanh and the whole team are professional and very kind.
The bed is really comfortable and the room is clean.
Everything was perfect !

title: A wonderful stay in the heart of Hue
comment:
We felt incredibly comfortable at Scarlett Boutique Hotel from the very first moment. The hotel is stylish, quiet and very well maintained – a perfect mix of elegance and warmth.
A special thanks goes to the great team around Linda, Ruby, David and Tamh. They were all incredibly warm, helpful and attentive and made our stay truly unforgettable.
Our room was cozy, clean and lovingly decorated, and breakfast offered everything you could wish for.
The location is ideal – central but still quiet. We would come back anytime and can fully recommend the place.

title: Very good hotel!
comment: We spent two excellent nights in this hotel. The bathroom was spacious, the room a little less but the cleanliness and comfort are there. Special mention to Ruby and Thanh who welcomed us and the whole hotel team.

title: Nice hotel with friendly staff
comment: We had a great experience staying here. The location was very convenient and the hotel was very clean. Ruby, Linda, Thanh and all of the staff were very kind and helpful.

title: Fantastic stay
comment: Fantastic hotel. Linda and ryan very helpful on reception. Probably the best service from a hotel during our stay in vietnam. The fruit in the room was lovely.

title: A beautiful, great value-for-money hotel in Hue
comment:
가성비 아주 좋은 호텔이고, 객실
인테리어 완성도가 높은 곳입니다. 가격대비 좀 놀랐습니다. 리셉션도 잘 도와주셨어요. 특히 Linda, Ryan, 그리고 Ruby님께 감사드립니다.

It’s a great value-for-money hotel with rooms that have an impressively high level of interior design quality. I was pleasantly surprised considering the price. The reception staff were very helpful, especially Linda, Ryan, and Ruby — thank you!

title: Excellent time with many activities in Hue
comment:
We definitely can recommend to stay at Scarlet Boutique Hotel in Hue. Arriving at the train station in the morning, heading to the hotel, we were absolutely pleasant welcomed by Ruby at the reception. She immediately organized a driver bringing us to the emperors' tombs and citadelle. The location of the hotel is good since every important sightseeing point is just a few minutes by foot. The whole team of Scarlet Boutique is amazing and helpful in every situation. The room was also amazing and clean.
Excellent stay!

title: Excellent stay in a comfortable and clean room, with very welcoming staff, thank you!
comment: Ryan and Linda welcomed us perfectly and took care of us during these 3 days in Hue. Always ready to do Service. The room is very clean, and the staff is always attentive and dedicated! A thousand thanks for your kindness.

title: Mega friendly reception
comment: Linda, Ryan and Ruby were fantastic! The room was neat and clean. We were received very friendly. They speak good English here. We only stayed one night in Hue but were allowed to leave our backpacks to explore the city because we went to Ninh Binh in the evening by bus. We were also allowed to wait in the hotel until we had to go to the bus and got free tea when waiting.

title: Amazing little hotel down a little alley.
comment:
Linda, Thanh and the whole team were super attentive always using my name, greeted me every time they saw me whether it was morning or evening.
Laundry service was super efficient.
Great breakfast. Centrally located.

Fab stay!!

title: Excellent Welcoming
comment: Very warm Welcoming of Linda and Ryan. The hotel is very nice, the room very comfortable. And a special mention from Maxime for Linda!

title: Great location and comfort
comment: Very impressed with the size of the room of this hotel. The two major points we love are how quiet it is in the morning nested away from the streets and being in tourist central.

title: Great hotel in a good location with a very polite and helpful staff!
comment:
The hotel was really nice. The Room was spacious and had everything you could ask for. The staff was very attentive and gave us many tips for the area.
We even received some local fruits in our room! The breakfast was really good as well! Overall it was a pleasant stay!

title: Great location, nice rooms, very friendly staff
comment:
Very good location near Walking Street. We had a room in the 6th. Floor with good views over Hué.
Very comfortable bed, nice bathroom and (important for long hair) a big, very good hairdryer.
All staff are exceptionally friendly and helpful. Danke an Ruby, Ryan, Linda und Than.
We booked the transfer from Hué to Hoi An through the hotel. Huy was a great driver who informed us very well. The car was spacious and very clean.
We can recommend the hotel and transfer without restrictions!

title: Ruby and the Scarlett team are a jewel in Hué's crown
comment: From the moment we arrived the staff, led by the wonderful Ruby and her trusty sidekick, Ryan, were everything that you could wish for from hotel staff...friendly, efficient and attentive, the room bijoux yet immaculately stylish and the excellent breakfast is served from 06.30 which suits my early rising nature. It's tucked away from the Hué hustle at the end of a quiet alleyway which keeps the dull roar of traffic to a minimum. All in all a very peaceful and pleasant experience and one I shall repeat next time I'm in Hué. Go Team Scarlett!

title: Great hotel in central Hué
comment: We loved this hotel. The quality of hotels in Vietnam has generally been high but this is the best yet. Perfect location, comfortable, good breakfast and relaxed atmosphere. But the outstanding quality is the service, which is incredibly friendly and professional. An absolute gem of a hotel!

title: Hidden Gem in the heart of Hue
comment: The Scarlett Boutique hotel is a hidden gem in Hue city. The rooms are spacious and had one of the most comfortable beds I’ve slept on in Vietnam. Location is great, staff are friendly. Would stay again!

title: Excellent treatment
comment: Excellent treatment from ruby, david and his team! we were upgraded for reform of the booked room, the great room with all the details, the breakfast very well also with a menu to choose what you want. highly recommended!

title: 5/5.Great comfortable stay with attentive to details and stay like we are one family
comment: 5/5.Great location.opposite are the walking street, restaurants ,massage shop.5 sense SPA just in front of the Hotel .Special thanks to Linda from the moment steps in to the Hotel .Providing guidance and suggestion to us on trip arrangement with reasoable price.Room exactly like the photo in the website.Ryan bring us to the room and explain on the service provided and call to reception if we need assistance.Welcome fruits was given in the room.Linda and Scarlette boutique hotel team provide a surprise birthday cake to my husband during the breakfast time .Linda prepare an umbrella for us for our joint in tour small group.A truely warm heart and caring service.Extra miles given by the the Teams provide a truly hospitality service which is an assets the to Hotel.Strongly recommend to friends going to visit Hue .

title: A lovely place to stay with excellent staff
comment:
We stayed 4 nights here and every single member of staff went out of their way to be helpful and friendly. Nothing was too much and a lot of them took the time to chat to us about all sorts of things.

The hotel is down a small alleyway which makes it much quieter than being on the main road. The room we had was really large and very comfortable.

Breakfast initially looked small on the selection but we were not disappointed. They focus on proving much better quality food and don’t stretch themselves. You will not go hungry and there’s something for everyone. They have a buffet (fruit, yogurt, bread, local food, etc) then you order special items the night before. My suggestion is to try the banana crepes!

The hotel does try and encourage you to book their tours. Go for it if you want to be taken care of but if you are happy to order Grabs (Uber equivalent) you can travel around unaided, very easily and cheaply. They had a really good selection of tours if that helps you.

I can’t really fault this place. It’s not super luxurious but it doesn’t need to be. It’s an excellent place to stay and you won’t be disappointed.

title: Excellent and definitely recommended
comment: Really like the classic quiet ambiance of the place, staffs ( Ryan and Kelly )were really helpful and cheerful, food combination of western and Vietnamese cuisine in a very affordable price rate in the heart of the city.

title: Super fine service
comment: The Scarlett Boutique Hotel is a very nice hotel. We were received with fruit and juice by Linda and David. And a refreshment cloth, very welcome. Our room was perfect. The hotel is very centrally located but 100% quiet. A problem in the evening with the shower was solved immediately the next morning. The reception has always helped us well and provided excellent recommendations. Breakfast is partly buffet, but it is also possible to order extra. So I got delicious unsweetened yogurt and ginger tea here. We booked a driver to Hoi An. With some sightseeing along the way we were about 5 hours on the road. We asked for driver Huy. He drives very nicely and informs us well. Both the hotel and the driver are definitely recommended! !

title: Excellent stay, lovely hotel, recommend!
comment:
Absolutely wonderful! Ruby and her staff took excellent care of us. The rooms and the hotel are beautiful and quiet.
Spotlessly clean, lovely decor, high quality beds and linens.
Rooms are spacious. WiFi is strong. Breakfast is very good and reasonably priced. We hired a couple of tours, one to see the local sights and one to transport us to Hoi An. Our driver, Huy, was fantastic and we enjoyed ourselves so much. We would 100% recommend the Scarlett hotel for a comfortable stay in Hue.

title: A Great stay close to Hué citadel
comment: I only stayed one night but I wished I could’ve stay more. Linda and David made that one night really perfect. The hotel itself is very well located, from a walking distance to the Hué citadel. My room was excellent, for a very affordable price. I highly recommend this place !

title: Great.
comment: Very nice staff, spacious and comfortable room, good breakfast buffet. Good location, central location. Thanks to Ruby and Ryan for their kindness and attention.

title: Average stay
comment: Rather strange decor in this hotel, not our cup of tea. Too many dusty drapes. Room had a musty damp smell on entering. Bed was comfortable and surprisingly the tv was good and worked. The balcony was useless as no chairs were on them. Breakfast area was cramped and food could have been better quality.

title: Perfect stay with very friendly and helpful staff!
comment:
I highly recommend the Scarlett Hotel in Hue! We stayed for two nights, and everything was perfect. The location is fantastic: it is tucked away in a quiet alley yet within walking distance of one of the liveliest areas in Hue. It is also just a few minutes’ drive from the Citadel.
The hotel staff are extremely friendly and helpful. They were always kind and went above and beyond to assist us with anything we needed. Linda, Ruby, and David were especially attentive—thank you so much for your help with the scooter booking and for all the wonderful local restaurant recommendations.
The room was spotless, and the hotel itself is charming. We truly enjoyed our stay here.

title: Great team, convenient location.
comment: Ruby, Thanh and the team were great, they gave us good recommendations for food to try in the area and were helpful taking care of our needs on the day we checked out. The rooms themselves were up to standard, and the location was convenient--walkable to nightlife, a nice gym nearby, and plenty of restaurants. Would stay here again!

title: Fantastic stay at Hue with a great staff
comment: Our stay in Hue was wonderful! Linda was absolutely amazing – always available, kind and very helpful. She helped us organize everything, including a fantastic cooking class, and made our experience in Hue unforgettable. Thank you so much Linda and the whole team!

title: Fabulous!!!
comment: The boutique hotel is quite wonderful, very clean, nicely decorated, super friendly, English speaking staff:inside! Special thanks to Ruby, Linda, Ryan and Thanh 💕 for their care and efforts! An exceptional hotel and delicious breakfast! We will come back!

title: A place to visit!
comment:
We stayed very well at the hotel.
Clean and comfortable.
We had a great tour from Hue to Hoi An with their taxi driver Huy, we went to lang co, the Hai van pass and to My son. Beautiful and comfortable. Huy very kind and professional.
He gave us information during the road and recommendations.
Thank you we really enjoy the day!

title: Simply Perfect!
comment:
Super service. Linda & Ryan attented us in all the aspects, reserving also a private driver at a very good price. The room was big, clean and the breakfast complete of all.
Super super hotel.

title: Great experience!
comment: The experience at the Scarlett Boutique Hotel was very good. Linda and Ryan were very helpful. They also offered us a tour through the city that was amazing!

title: A good address in Hue
comment: 3 nights with family Very comfortable room, well located hotel for visits, Breakfast and linen Service very well also a staff with little care, very friendly and efficient. Thanks to Ruby, Thanh and everyone on the team 👍👏😀

title: Hotel in huè
comment: Very nice hotel, very nice staff. Breakfast good, varied and plentiful. Perfect room, clean and spacious. Than and Ruby very approachable and friendly. Perfect location. Recommended for everything.

title: Thank you for a wonderful stay! We can’t wait to return :)
comment:
We have just enjoyed 3 fabulous nights at the charming Scarlett Boutique Hotel.

Tucked down a quiet street, just a very short walk from walking street, the location was superb.

Our flight arrived late on the first evening and we were warmly greeted by the wonderful staff at the hotel, who were so welcoming and attentive for the duration of our stay - assisting us with private tours, and even packing us a breakfast box to take with us on checkout due to an early train departure.

The rooms were clean and the beds were incredibly comfortable, allowing us to have wonderful rested sleeps.

Thank you Ruby, Thanh, Linda and team!

We hope to be back soon, and will be sure to recommend your hotel to friends or family visiting your beautiful city.

title: Best staff in Hue
comment: Fantastic team at this hotel. Ruby, Thanh and the others are super helpful, have a great sense of humor and always smiling. Beds and linen are high quality, very clean rooms and the service is 5 star. Perfect location as well only a couple hundred meters from night walking street.

title: A very pleasant stay
comment: We arrived in the morning around 06:00 after a night of travelling. In the hotel we were so warmly welcomed. Our room was perfect; clean, lovely beds, nice decoration. The hotel is quietly located in a side street, away from the crowds. Breakfast is fresh and varied, delicious. Throughout our stay we have been so warm and well received , lots of tips and warm conversations. Our compliments to Linda and Ryan. You have a place in our hearts forever! Thanks for the sublime stay! 100% recommended for anyone visiting Hué. Su, Cezan en Esther

title: The best address in Hue!
comment:
Small charming hotel, sheltered from the hustle and bustle, and very well located in Hue. The rooms are extremely comfortable, and the hotel is beautifully decorated on the theme of “Gone with the Wind”.
But above all, it is the Welcoming that makes the difference. The team is really at the top with constant attention and remarkable kindness. Mention
special to Ruby who really was a great hostess.
If you are visiting Hue, don’t miss the opportunity!

title: Exceptional staff led by Linda
comment: We spent 3 weeks travelling around and while we stayed in many good places, the Scarlett was my favourite by far. It was not the biggest it’s true but the exceptional staff made our stay truly memorable. Linda and her team were warm, friendly and always helpful. She made arrangements and gave recommendations that were genuinely appreciated but beyond that, they created an atmosphere that made us feel at home. We look forward to returning

title: Top, do not hesitate
comment: I really liked the purpose of this property: to satisfy and simplify the customer’s life. Attentions they make that stand out from the others: a plate of fruit in the room rematched every day, a very well presented memo for TV channels and their channels (TV5, CNN, ...) and rose petals on the bed, ..., for our arrival. Otherwise the establishment is close to the pedestrian streets for dinner, the staff is super friendly and always available, the room is clean, quality cleaning, breakfast, no complaints, scooter rental without difficulty and driver to take us to Hoi An with 3 visits on the way very nice and with a reasonable cost.

title: A night in Hue
comment:
We loved our stay at the Scarlett. We stayed for one night.
The staff was really nice to us and very helpful.
The room was clean.
The breakfast buffet was the best we’ve had after travelling Vietnam for 2 weeks.
Very central location.
Would recommend !

title: Amazing Hotel in Hue and I love this vibe💙
comment: I just had a wonderful stay at The Scarllet Boutique Hotel. From the moment I walked in, the bellman help me a lot with the great smile. The room was great decorated, lovely city view. Also, the hotel’s location is also very convenient to go to Song Huong. Everything was great also the staff ao helpful ❤️

title: Amazing hidden gem 💎
comment: This is a hidden gem. Nestled in the city walking distance to all you need - food, massage, shopping etc. Staff super friendly and always acknowledge you by name and speak good English and helpful for all your needs and help with recommendations. Rooms are spacious, clean and amazing beds are big and comfy. Would 100% recommend this hotel. Special mention to our hosts Linda and Thanh that made us feels like royalty.

title: Amazing staff and hotel
comment: An unbeatable value for money. The room was very well arranged with a great view on the 6th floor. The staff was amazing (notably Linda and Thanh but everyone else too). Linda helped us plan our stay (scooter rental, airport shuttle, guided tour). And to finish a superb breakfast!

title: Dreamy stay in Hué
comment:
Lovely and welcoming from the minute we arrived tired from our 19h bustrip from Sapa. Immediately Ruby and Thanh set us up with juice and coffee, they took care of our luggage until the room became available for an early check in. The location is great, short walk to the imperial city, and at night it's literally around the corner from walking street and the Chan restaurant (best we had in Vietnam, with vegan options even )
In the morning the breakfast was delicious and Linda gave us the most pleasant send off.
Would definitely stay here again.

title: Hue Hotel the Best
comment:
Hue Hotel not to be missed.
Love, love this boutique hotel. From the moment you enter the foyer we had the most heartfelt welcome. The management and staff were extremely professional, friendly and a pleasure to interact with. The rooms were very well maintained and clean. The bed was so comfortable and air conditioner worked well and we had some of best sleep of our trip. The hotel is close to all attractions, restaurants and walking street. Special mention and thank you to Linda and Ruby and the staff from front of house, kitchen and all areas of the hotel.

Unfortunately, I became unwell during my stay. Everyone at the hotel checked on me each day to ensure my quick recovery offering soup, rice and ginger tea. They showed genuine concern and kindness that I will always remember and appreciate.

The breakfast meals on offer were delicious and a great way to be introduced to Hue cuisine.

I rarely write reviews but I feel this hotel and its staff need to be applauded and rewarded for their hard work.

Do not hesitate and book this hotel you will not be disappointed.

title: Good location
comment:
Good service here
linda and ryan both care about me
Location is also convenient Cp value is good
The room is quiet.
The opportunity to adapt can choose them

title: Great Hotel 10/10
comment:
I had a truly wonderful stay at this hotel. From the moment I arrived, I was warmly welcomed by the friendly staff. In particular, Ruby and Ryan were incredibly helpful and kind — they assisted us so much during our time here and made our stay even more enjoyable and stress-free.
The room was spotless, spacious, and well-equipped with everything we needed. The bed was comfortable, and I appreciated the peaceful atmosphere and thoughtful touches throughout the space.
The entire team was outstanding. Every staff member was attentive, professional, and always smiling, which added to the positive experience.
This was a fantastic getaway, and I’m so grateful for the excellent service we received. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone. A big thank you again to Ruby, Ryan, and the whole team for making our stay so memorable!

title: It''s a restful and affordable hotel.
comment: It’s about 50 meters to walk in, but the staff will help with their bags. The staff here are very hospitable, smiling, both Ruby and Ryan are so attentive and surprise to the family with a beautiful, clean room with every fruit.

title: Perfect hotel to see hue on the way to hoi an
comment: A perfect hotel to visit hue passing through to hoi an. A very nice spacious and clean hotel with good breakfast. The hotel has also arranged a car tour for us from hue to hoi an. It was very bad weather but our driver and guide huy was fantastic and still made it a nice trip for us!

title: Nice and excellent
comment: excellent accomodation, stayed in a small alley, centered with manyy amenities nearby ranging from restaurant, cofffee shop, especiallu the Huong River. beautifull view. Moreover, the staff is really friendly and Welcome. a best place to stay while travelinggg to Hue

title: 10/10 Would Come Again
comment: The hotel is in a fairly good location. In the heart of Hue, close to the Imperial City. Rooms come with complimentary fruit and water, which is a pleasant touch. Linda, Thanh, and all the other staff were quite friendly and helpful. Laundry can also be done at the hotel for a reasonable cost. Overall, I would recommend this hotel to anyone.

title: Fabulous hotel in great location
comment: Fabulous stay for 2 nights in Hue. The staff here are lovely. Linda who checked us in and made us feel so welcome.They also arranged a tour of all the special sights in Hue and a driver (Huy) to take to our next destination of HoiAn with some stops along the way. Ruby and David really take care of their guests.

title: Great little hotel inspired by Gone with the wind
comment:
We had a great stay at the hotel. The staff were very helpful and always cheerful. The room was looking a little dated but very nice. Comfortable bed and very clean and a decent selection for breakfast in the mornings too.
Special thanks to Linda and Thanh for their professionalism. We would stay here again when we return to Hue.

title: Great mid-range hotel choice
comment: Comfortable, clean rooms, centrally located, fairly inexpensive with friendly and super-helpful staff even by high Vietnamese standards. Great trip to pagoda and some of the mausoleums with Huy who was very knowledgeable and an excellent driver. Would definitely recommend if in Hue.

title: Would recommend
comment:
Beautiful (quiet) hotel, great breakfast, nice staff (Kelly, David, Thanh) and central location! Would definitely recommend this hotel.

Beautiful (quiet) hotel, great breakfast, nice staff (Kelly, David, Thanh) and central location! Would definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Great location and value!
comment:
Amazing hotel in the centre of Hue, literally steps away from restaurants/action and yet quiet enough to get restful sleeps to recover from the amazing things to see and do in Hue.

Linda at reception was amazing and so helpful - she looked after us v well!

Ryan was also super kind and helpful- always ready to lend a hand with a nice smile.

Thank you to Scarlett boutique for a memorable stay at Hue!

title: Small hotel in a quiet spot
comment:
Stayed for only one night last week. Situated down a little alleyway down it’s quieter than staying overlooking the main road.
From arrival staff were all super helpful and very friendly. Exceptional service. Had a really good nights sleep, breakfast downstairs was good. Checkout was easy and I was looked after by David and Thanh who were very kind. Wonderful small hotel with personalized service. They even remember your name when they greet you which is really nice and shows their commitment to their customers. Highly recommend to stay

title: Beautiful boutique hotel with exceptionally friendly staff ❤️
comment: Situated down a laneway off the main street making the Scarlet Hotel a quiet escape with wonderfully helpful and friendly staff ( thank you Ruby/ Cam) and a romantic decor. The breakfast buffet covered a variety of options plus added choice of two other dishes was terrific. The room was beautiful with a plate of fresh fruits provided daily. I will definitely stay here again.

title: Great hotel with an awesome atmosphere
comment: This hotel is a great place to stay in Hue, it is central and the staff are very helpful, Ryan, Thamh and the team made sure our stay was warm welcome, and provided great tips and advice about the region. The room was very comfortable and very clean, the rooms are well styled and made the stay even more special, with a great breakfast too. Highly recommend this place and look forward to returning on my next trip through. Well done!

title: Stylish hotel near Nightwalkingstreet
comment:
Beautiful hotel with very well maintained ambience and stylishly decorated! Service is very important here. We were greeted very friendly and given good tips for the city.

In your own case:
We stood at the reception on May 25th at 6:30 am. The staff received our luggage and offered us a room where we could shower. This has embellished the start of the day very much Thank you!

title: Unforgettable drive from Huế to Hoi An – a real highlight thanks to Huy!
comment:
We stayed one night at this hotel and were overall very satisfied – the room was lovingly decorated, the breakfast was rich and the staff warm and attentive. But what really made this stay unforgettable for us was the private transfer we booked through the hotel: a ride from Huế to Hoi An with the wonderful driver Huy.

After just a few minutes in the car it was clear: It's going to be more than just an ordinary car ride! Huy was not only incredibly friendly and personable, but also incredibly entertaining and informative. He told us so much about Vietnam, its culture, the cities and life here – always with a pinch of humor and genuine enthusiasm. We learned so much and laughed a lot at the same time.

The route was fantastic – Huy stopped at beautiful places that we probably would never have found on our own. We were able to take photos at breathtaking viewpoints, taste local delicacies and gain little insights into the real Vietnam along the way. Also the car was top – very clean, comfortable and modern.

This trip was a real highlight of our Vietnam trip for us. If you're staying here, be sure to take the opportunity to ride with Huy – it's absolutely worth it and a great way to get to know the country from a very personal perspective.

Many thanks to the hotel for the mediation – and especially to Huy for this special experience! We would do it again anytime.

title: Nice place and great driver
comment:
We spent a night in this beautiful little hotel. Our room was lovingly decorated so we felt very comfortable. Breakfast was great! You have a wide choice. The staff was also very nice and accommodating.
Since we wanted to go to Hoi An the next day, we chose a private driver from the hotel and that was really great! Our driver Huy was just super cool and fun and explained a lot about Hue, Hoi An and the region. It was a lot of fun and we can really only recommend this to anyone! The route was also great, so we passed very nice places on the way to Hoi An that we probably wouldn't have seen otherwise!:)

title: A great stay
comment:
A high-class hotel on a human scale. Well equipped rooms with fruit to welcome us! A hearty and varied breakfast. Linda, Kerry and David were lovely and caring.
Ideally located near restaurants and bars. We'll be back

title: Small and friendly hotel
comment: We stayed 3 nights at this accommodating hotel. It is off from the main street and is very quiet. The staff, Linda and Ryan, was very friendly and helpful. Linda helped us arrange a day trip to Ba Na Hills with a driver. The breakfast options were delicious. Daily fruits were provided in the room. We would visit the Scarlett again.

title: Excellent hôtel. Perfect choice.
comment:
Very centrally located in town, this hotel is in a quiet street.
The rooms are very comfortable and well equiped.
Breakfast is varied and nicely cooked.
The personnel was extremely helpful and smiling with us. Thank you more specifically to Linda and David.
I would certainly come back if I ever travel to Hué again.

title: 2 nights st the Scarlett Hotel
comment:
We had a lovely time at the Scarlett. Fabulous romantic decor complete with fresh rose petals on the bed. Great bathroom, huge comfy bed. Quiet well appointed room, we didn't have any shared walls with another room. Fresh fruit every day was a nice touch.
Super attentive and helpful staff both days especially Linda and her colleague on the first day and Ruby and David on the second.
They organised a car to take us to Hoi An. The driver Huy was cool. He told us about Vietnam history on the way. A very calm driver, skilfully negotiating traffic. I sat in the front and wasn't scared at all!

No complaints about the Scarlett Hotel and I can't think of anything that needs changing.

title: Fabulous stay
comment: Fabulous stay for 3 nights. Convenient to sites and restaurants but away from the noise. Great chocolate shop nearby. Staff excellent, Ruby, David and Thanh. Lovely breakfast. Can order as much freshly cooked food as you want. Very helpful. Woukd definitely stay here again.

title: A very good hotel near the historic center of Hue
comment:
Very good hotel well located not far from the citadel. Comfortable and quiet.
Very professional and attentive staff. Thanks to Ruby, David, Linda, Thanh, Kelly and all the staff for their kindness.
Very good breakfasts.
Possibility of renting bicycles to go to the seaside (15 km) using small country roads, in contact with the population.

title: An uplifting stay in Hue
comment: A fabulous hotel contained within the heart of Hue. All the hot spots are a walking distance away. This makes for a very convenient stay. Breakfast us divine, with the buffet offering the basics and plenty of other items available to order. The staff are so beautiful and well mannered. I want to especially thank Kelly, Thanh and Linda for making this stay so memorable. Our time at Scarlett Boutique and Hue was made so much better because of their kindness, advice and humour. They remember your name and always enquire after your well-being and ensure you have all your needs catered for. My partner and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay here and would be back here for sure. Shout out to the chefs too, the food was delicious. Highly recommend the Bun Bo Hue here too.

title: CP Good Value Hostel
comment:
The staff at the hostel is very friendly and friendly.
David, Linda, Ruby and others are very concerned about the needs of the guests, but don't bother, and the recommended restaurants are also delicious
The hotel as a whole looks some trace of time, but comfort remains
The decoration is in a classic European style, very special
Location Isolated Royal City or Night Market Walking Area is not far
Nearby is busy, at night girls walk alone also feel safe
It is a good choice for small people

title: Elegance and artistic beautiful hotel
comment:
An elegant and artistic hotel in a quiet alley.
The appearance of the lobby feels like an artwork.
The price is also cheap and breakfast is not included but very cheap. Breakfast is great, of course.
Hotelliers are all friendly and good-soul owners.
I especially want to thank Kelly and Thanh. Ryan too.
If I come back sometime later I think I will book this hotel unconditionally.

title: Excellent
comment: This is a small, excellent hotel in a very good central location close to shopping, restaurants, the river and the Imperial City. Great service by everyone who works there. They do all the important things well. Very comfortable room, well appointed, and clean. Excellent breakfast. Ruby at front desk is knowledgeable, friendly, and funny. Our driver Hyu was very good. Like most hotels in Vietnam, the Scarlett will arrange tours and transportation for you if you need them. If you want a smaller, boutique hotel in Hue, this is your place.

title: Nice quiet hotel in central Hue
comment:
The Scarlett Boutique is a relatively small run hotel down an ally way in central Hue. The rooms are comfortable, although the décor felt a little dated. They have everything you need including AC, Wi-Fi and a fridge.

The breakfast is a mixture of buffet and order off the menu, although they like to know the menu orders the night before. As you’d expect with a small hotel, there isn’t a restaurant on site, but there are plenty places to eat and drink nearby and there’s a couple of convenience stores very close to the hotel.

The main tourist attraction (the Citadel) is a short Grab way and getting to and from either the airport or the station is easy as well. The only disadvantage is that if you are ordering Grab, you’ll need drop a pin on the shops at the end of the ally in the app, since cars can’t drive right up to the hotel front door.

title: Great place and service!
comment: We had a really nice stay at The Scarlett Boutique Hotel in Hue. Ryan and Thanh were very friendly and helpful throughout our visit, making sure we had everything we needed. The room was clean, comfortable, and well set up. Would definitely recommend if you're visiting Hue.

title: Excellent Hotel in Hue
comment:
We very much enjoyed our stay at this hotel in a great location in downtown Hue, close to the citadel and the lively evening neighborhood.
Ruby and Thanh welcomed us warmly and were always very available for our solicitations.
The room was comfortable and spacious, and the breakfast excellent.
We highly recommend this hotel in Hue.

title: My home from home in Hué
comment:
I absolutely loved my 4 night stay at The Scarlett. I’ll start with the most important reason - the staff. They were all so friendly, helpful, and professional. The “Welcome back” each time I returned to the hotel was a nice touch too.

In addition, the room was extremely comfortable, especially for the price; the breakfast was plentiful and fresh; and the location was perfect (a short walk to bars, restaurants, cafés, the river, etc or a short Grab ride to the Citadel). Being set back a short distance from the street made for a peaceful night’s sleep too.

Hué is one of my favourite places in Vietnam and I very much look forward to returning to The Scarlett when I am next in the city.

title: Quiet and welcoming charming hotel
comment: We had a great stay at this charming hotel, well located. The rooms are quiet and spacious, tastefully decorated. The bedding is very comfortable. The staff is very welcoming and helpful. I recommend this hotel.

title: Hue summer 2025
comment:
All staffs are very nice. Quite and cozy feeling there. The hotel is close to many famous places to enjoy the traditonal foods of Hue. Beautiful smiles and truly a good place to stay in Hue.

A very welcome from Nghiem, Hue, Thanh, Thuy and Cuong😋

Will be back here in the future to see u guys all!! peace and love.

title: Excellent location and sympathy
comment: The location is excellent and the staff very friendly and helpful. We were very well received by Ruby and Thanh. We had a fruit plate in the room waiting for us, which was a pleasant surprise. The breakfast is excellent.

title: Nice and well located hotel
comment: The hotel is very well placed in a quiet street in the immediate vicinity of a lively evening area with many bars and restaurants. Very clean and very nice. We highly recommend this hotel! Thanks to Linda, David and Thanh for their advice and help during this stay in Hue!

title: That's good.
comment: The staff is amazing. Tours of the ruins and even a limousine to Da Nang were well served. I'd like to use it again the next time I get the chance.

title: It was perfect, thank you!
comment: We stayed 4 nights in this hotel and everything was perfect. The staff is very friendly and helpful. They're very smiling. I even got a little surprise for my birthday. Breakfast is tasty, the rooms are large, clean, the bed extremely comfortable, the curtains well blacked out. The hotel is very well located and yet it is very quiet. I'll be back without any problem. Thanks to the whole Ruby, David and Thanh team, you were on top!

title: What a nice small scale hotel in the center of Hue
comment: A very nice and quiet small-scale hotel in the middle of Hue, near many restaurants and cafes. We enjoyed here, starting with a nice breakfast, nice quiet room and very pleasant service from Kelly in communicating online about our booking and the checkin. She also arranged a very interesting private tour with Pham (our driver) along important highlights. Thanks also to Ruby, David and Thang for top service at the reception and breakfast. And last but not least, we were taken by Huy via the Hai Van pass to Hoi An. We experienced him as a very pleasant and friendly person, so the ride with him was really top. He told us a lot about the environment, life in Vietnam and history and culture in very good English along the way.

title: The best service you should try in Hue.
comment: I had the wonderful honey moon in The Scarlett. The service was very good, they decorated the room with the honey moon cake & roses. All staffs are very professional, friendly & helpful; especially 1 man staff (I didn't remember his name but he was born in 1996 with colored hair). I appreciate their service & staff, it is even higher than 5-star hotel's service I travelled before. The hotel is in a peaceful alley, about 10m to the main road only. This was 1 of the best traveling experience I had. Thank you all! Wish you all the success. If I travel to Hue again, The Scarlet will be my decision again.

title: BEST HOTEL IN HUE
comment: Ruby, David and Thanh (and the rest of the hotel staff) were the most friendly, most considerate, and most helpful people I have ever met for a hotel experience. They did our laundry, rented us scooters, scheduled us an amazing tour of Hue, and even cooked me a rice soup because my partner told them I was feeling under the weather. Everyone is so kind and seem genuinely interested and happy to get to know their residents. Overall, a 12/10 experience!!

title: Wonderful Hosts in Hue
comment: We had an amazing stay from both nights. The room was comfortable, a/c worked well, water was available and the breakfast was amazing. Ruby was extremely professional and kind and arranged our transport, transfers and ensured all our needs were met.

title: Lovely hotel and staff
comment:
The front staff was really helpful, they gave us advises to enjoy our stay in Hué.
Ryan and Kelly even managed to make a surprise for my boyfriend's birthday by giving him a cake in the morning and singing happy birthday. It was so thoughtful and lovely.
Breakfast was really nice, we loved the pancakes with banana and the bun bo hue.
The room was cosy.

title: Clean cosy and cute for a fun family vacation
comment: Clean cosy and neat place. Close to food joints and shopping. Kelly was lovely and was excited to know about my culture and traditions to understand customers better. Breakfast buffet is quite nice if you like their beef soup dish you’re in for a treat.

title: Classic
comment: The front desk staff is excellent. Linda, Rudy, and Ryan to name a few. They're very polite and very helpful when we have questions. The hotel location is very convenient to the night market, shopping mall, restaurants and bars. One important improvement needs is that my wife found a roach in the bathroom this morning. Perhaps, the pet control will be helpful.

title: Excellent hotel with outstanding staff
comment: Excellent boutique hotel in a very central location in Hue - big comfortable room with lovely bathroom. However what sets this hotel apart is the outstanding customer service. From the moment we walked through the doors the staff could not have been more helpful - everyone goes out of their way to help you. We had a superb tour with Huy organised by the hotel at short notice - he was a fantastic guide - excellent English and very knowledgeable with the big plus of a very comfortable air conditioned car ! I would highly recommend this hotel and the tour with Huy.

title: Exceptional service
comment: We had a wonderful and unforgettable 1 night stay at The Scarlett Boutique hotel for my parent's wedding anniversary and my birthday. Exceptional service by Linda and Thanh. We were treated by tastefully decorated bedroom and the next morning with a birthday cake. Linda actually remembered the guests name. I'm impressed.

title: Comfort in Hue
comment: Spent only one evening at the Scarlett, but it was memorable. Being very close to Walking Street, Scarlett was the perfect respite after a long day of sightseeing and a long night of people watching on Walking Street. Linda was the ultimate hostess and everyone else that worked there was friendly and accommodating. I would highly recommend.

title: Everything was beautiful!
comment: Very nice hotel, spacious and authentic room, exceptional shower! We regret that we only stayed there one night. Breakfast was varied, lots of different fruits and juices, a delight. Thanks to Ruby and Ryan for their kindness and kindness.

title: Boutique hotel - excellent staff, location, comfortable room- can’t beat the price for value
comment: We celebrated our 25th anniversary here. Incredible service and friendly staff. The hotel is tucked away from the street, and has maybe 20 rooms. The rooms are really comfortable and we were greeted with a beautifully decorated rooms rose petals and cake! The location is great- walking distance from the river walk, beer street, restaurants and the mall. Special thanks to Ruby and Ryan for their attention and helpfulness.

title: Absolute gem
comment:
Wonderful experience for our brief 2 night stay in Hue. Special thanks to all the team and in particular, Kelly, Ruby & Linda for the genuine warmth they displayed in making this stay so special. A big thank you to their driver /guide, Huy for a great outing to the DMZ area Imperial palace and city sights. thanks for the tip on the local restaurant around the corner from the Scarlett too, we loved the Quan Hanh food.
We will be back!

title: Great people, great place.
comment:
A boutique hotel worthy of the term. I've stayed here on both my visits to Hue and have been blown away by the kindness and friendliness of the staff. Ryan actually remembered me from last year's visit which was quite flattering. Ruby and the rest of her staff provide exemplary service and exude professionalism in all facets.

The hotel has a funky, delightful decor and is well-situated in the heart of Hue. They also serve a nice breakfast in an intimate atmosphere. I will look no further for lodging on my visits to Hue.

title: Successful
comment: The hotel is super central. Nevertheless, it is very quiet! Bathroom and room were clean with cozy beds. The staff was very accommodating and helpful. We forgot something in the previous hotel. The reception cleared everything for us and on the same day we got the things brought to the hotel. The breakfast was delicious, extra wishes you ordered the night before.

title: Hue's a hidden gem. A wonderful stay in a beautiful city with a rich history.
comment: Our recent 2-day stay at The Scarlett Boutique Hotel in Hue was delightful! The hotel's quiet location was convenient, just a short walk from food and drinks. The room was clean, beds were comfortable, and amenities like air conditioning and hot showers were a plus. The front office team, including Ruby, David, and Thanh, were friendly and welcoming. Their warm greetings made our stay even more special. Highly recommend this hotel to friends and fellow travelers. Kudos to Ruby, David and Thanh for a memorable experience.

title: Great Stay
comment: The Scarlett Hotel Hue, Vietnam is a cozy hotel near shopping and restaurants. We enjoyed our brief stay at the hotel and the staff go above and beyond for their guests. They arranged a transfer from the hotel to the Hue Airport at 5am and sent us off with breakfast to go. When you stay you are given a menu to order breakfast for the next day, while all the items are good, the banana pancakes are out of this world, I ended up ordering another order because they were amazing. Ruby offered to make additional pancakes for me while I was checking out. We enjoyed our brief stay in Hue and would not hesitate to book The Scarlett Hotel again. Thank you for a great stay.

title: A great time a service at the top
comment: Great experience, they are taking care of you. The breakfast is excellent, the rooms are very clean and perfectly stocked. An address to remember. Ask Linda, she's adorable. Quite a few Frenchmen in the hotel. It is friendly and not gigantic.

title: Fantastic Stay
comment: The room not big but comfortable bed and pillow, it's cozy and well arranged. The environment is peaceful behind main street. Good choices of food in breakfast buffet cost USD4 only. Cafe and restaurants all nearby especially walking street. The staff are friendly, helpful and attentive with good grasp of English especially Linda and Rosie. Will choose this hotel if I come back to Hue again.

title: Best way to start your day in Hue
comment: The hotel is in central Hue, close to all major attractions, the room very comfortable, quiet at night ensuring a good nights sleep. The staff are all fabulous, attentive and know their city, shout out to Linda and David, breakfast very good way to start your day, great stay.

title: Would highly recommend this hotel
comment: We all loved our stay at Scarlett boutique the staff were so friendly and really could not do enough for you. Ruby is absolutely lovely her English is very good and she has a really good sense of humour. The rooms were very nice & spacious and breakfast was good. Thank you to ruby & all the staff for making our stay in Hue so special from Gill, Tony, Jane & enda xxx

title: Lovely Hotel in perfect Location of Hue
comment: We enjoyed our pleasant stay at this Hotel. It is very close to the walking street as well to the river and the Citadell. The Breakfast was perfect, but most of all I wanna thank to Linda and David which really did a great job. They helped us to plan our stay and gave us really good recommendations. Thank you!

title: Amazing stay in Hue
comment: I had an amazing 2 nights stay here, everyone in the staff was super friendly and helpful and the hotel is on a very centric location, close to all the restaurants and bars. The room was very clean and they had complimentary water and fruits. The breakfast was good, with a buffet including fresh fruits and a la carte menu to choose some additional dishes. They helped me book a motorbike tour of the city and my transport to Hoi An, which was very convenient. Special thanks to Ruby who found me room to shower when I arrived at 6 am from my sleeper bus from Ninh Binh. Also to Rosie and David and everyone else in the staff for making my stay very relaxed and enjoyable.

title: An exceptional stay - thanks to incredible staff
comment:
I rarely leave reviews, but my stay at the Scarlett Boutique Hotel was so special that I had to share. The hotel itself is in a fantastic location, comfortable, and offers great value for money—but what truly elevates it to excellence is, without a doubt, the staff.

Every single team member was genuinely lovely—not in that polished, impersonal way you sometimes encounter, but with a warmth that made it clear they truly cared about making our stay memorable. Yes, they offer thoughtful touches like complimentary drinks and fruit plates (which you’d expect at much pricier hotels), but it was the smaller, more personal gestures that won me over completely.

For example, they recommended a cheaper group tour not just because it was better value, but because they honestly believed it was the better experience. They remembered our names and our plans for the day, checking in afterward to see if we needed anything to unwind. It’s this level of attentiveness—authentic and unprompted—that made all the difference.

If you’re looking for ultra-luxurious facilities, this might not be the place. But if you want a stay where you feel genuinely welcomed and valued, the Scarlett Boutique Hotel delivers something far more special than just five-star amenities. For me, the kindness and sincerity of the staff made it a perfect experience.

title: Great stay, room and staff goes the extra mile.
comment:
If you are thinking of staying or deciding between this and other property; choose this one.

Staff is absolutely great! Breakfast is highly recommended and has a good variety of options. Have the banana pancakes, simply great!!!

Thanks to Ryby and Danzl for the great stay.

title: Lovely hotel and friendly staff
comment:
We really enjoyed our one night stay - the hotel is very well located, nice room, great breakfast (with lots of a la carte options included)

The staff in particular deserve a shout out - they were so friendly (with nice touches like remembering our names!) - thanks in particular to Ruby and Ryan!

title: Fantastic people
comment: The hotel is good, the breakfast is very tasty and has local food options. But the best thing about the hotel is the people who work there, especially Rubi, David, Linda and Ryan, they were all absolutely fantastic. The location is also great as you can walk to bars, restaurants and even the Citadel.

title: Great location, very friendly staff, always in a good mood and available,Rosie and Linda especially .....
comment: Hotel well located with very available staff and always smiling and pleasant. We were very well received by Rosie and Linda of a rare kindness.I highly recommend this hotel to visit the city of Hue in all serenity and calm

title: Restful stay and genuinely wonderful staff
comment: We were pleased with the European feel, well-appointed room with fresh fruit on arrival, filling breakfast with generous menu of local foods and western staples (cocoa krispies!). The hotel is well situated for restaurants, atm’s, and not far from major tourist sites like the Citadel and Dong Ba market. The ace up their sleeve is Scarlett Boutique’s staff. Ruby was exceptionally gracious and helpful in arranging rides and tours and providing restaurant advice as well as explaining the correct pronunciation of some Vietnamese terms. Huy drove us around a good part of a day to pagodas, temples, and the Citadel, giving us clear instructions on where to go and always being there to meet us after our tour of each site. He provided interesting background on each site as well.

title: Look no further than Scarlett
comment:
Excellent base to explore a wonderful city.
Convenient location, just 5 mins from the main tourist strip, yet in a quiet area.
The rooms are modern and well maintained. Good breakfast with options.
Best of all are the excellent staff who really make the stay as enjoyable as possible. Look forward to returning.

title: Perfect few days
comment:
Perfect location, excellent staff especially Rosie and Ryan, great breakfast included in price. Comfortable bed and everything there you would need. We had a great time. I would highly recommend staying here if visiting Hue.
Martina 😊😊😊

title: Great Boutique Hotel
comment: A wonderful stay at the Scarlett. The hotel is very convenient with lots of coffee shops and restaurant in the area. The Citadel is also about 25min walk. The breakfast was delicious but what stands out is the friendly and helpful staff. Big thank you to Linda a the front desk in making sure I had a pleasant stay. I would stay here again in a heartbeat!!

title: Perfect for a short trip
comment: The hotel is centrally located and the sights are within walking distance. Restaurants, bars and massage parlours are nearby. We had the room Passion, this was a bit small but clean and sufficient for two nights. The beds and pillows were very comfortable.The breakfast was sufficient and you could still order hot food that was freshly prepared. The staff was extremely friendly and advised us very well. Also we booked a trip through the hotel (DMZ) very interesting and really super organized. We can recommend the hotel 100%.

title: Imperial service with a smile 😊
comment: Location is great, 5 mins close to the Perfume River..our room was very spacious on the fourth floor. The hotel receptionists and restaurant staff are all very friendly and courteous. Highly recommended.

title: Great Experience in Hue at the TTC Imperial Hotel
comment:
I had a great stay at the TTC Imperial Hotel in Hue for the last 3 days of March ‘26. The hotel was clean with nice amenities as was the room. My room was facing the rear of the hotel, and it was quite quiet with no need to use the ear plugs I’ve been using at other hotels around Central Vietnam. The breakfast at the hotel was also good.

The experience was made better by Van Duc’s exemplary service - always there to greet and make conversation as I left and returned. He presented me with reasonable guided tour options for sightseeing around Hue and even arranged a reasonably priced ride to the airport on my day of departure.

I will definitely consider TTC Imperial for my next stay in Hue.

title: Van Duc? Van Awesome!
comment: Excellent hospitality and accommodations. Staff are friendly and happy to help with questions and recommendations. Van Duc the bell captain was the best and made us laugh so much. Great breakfast if you’re a noodle fiend.

title: Convenient Location, friendly staff
comment: Stayed at TTC imperial for 2 nights with family and friends. We had a pleasant stay and staff were polite, friendly, and attentive. The bell hop, Van Duc, was especially great! He answered our questions and provided great recommendations for us. He also had great sense of humor and kept us smiling and laughing the whole time. We recommend staying at TTC and hopefully you will get to meet Van Duc!

title: Friendly staff
comment: My family had a brief stay at TTC Imperial Hotel Hue on our way from Lang Co to Hanoi. Van Duc was extremely helpful in coordinating transport from Lang Co, then on to the airport also a last minute tour of temples. Our driver, Nhan, was also very accommodating when we left something behind. Both gentlemen made our stay restful and relaxing.

title: I would like to put in a good word for Van Duc (entrance greeter and guest caretaker): he is very friendly & sincere
comment: Very clean, reasonable prices and hotel staffs are very good

title: Lovely Hotel!
comment: Stayed March 19–21 and absolutely loved it! The rooms are spacious, clean, and have a nice antique style, with everything you need and a beautiful river view. Great location—close to the Perfume River and plenty of restaurants and small shops. Staff were super friendly and helpful. Would definitely stay here again!

title: Nice hotel.
comment: The hotel is beautiful, the staff is very friendly and helpful. Rain and Snow You have provided full information, I will be back

title: I'd love to come back.
comment: Beautiful HotelsThank you very much for a wonderful location, Mr. Thu Hang, Ms. Tuyết Anh

title: Good service.
comment: Good hotel, good breakfast, close to the center and easy to move around, good staff

title: Too good.
comment: Good hotel, friendly staff, beautiful and spacious rooms

title: Perfect.
comment: Nice hotel, good breakfast, cute reception staff Thúy Wan and Trichi

title: Very satisfactory experience of staying in TTC Imprial Hotel in Hue city, Vietnam.
comment: Recently had a very comfortable and cozy stay in TTC Imperial Hotel in Hue city, Vietnam. Room was spacious and had high ceiling with good sunlight in daytime. Breakfast was sumptous. The staff was very polite and helpful. Mr. Nahn, who drove us to Hoi An was very friendly and courteous. Indeed enjoyed our stay there.

title: Great hotel with one issue.
comment:
Good rooms, location and service. Nice bar on the top floor.

Just check the Emergency Exits carefully.

title: Beautiful hotel in great location!
comment: This was a beautiful hotel to stay in. The unique decor was stunning. The location was perfect for walking about the city. The rooftop and pool area are very nice. The staff were so friendly and very helpful. Van Duc and other employees always made sure we were looked after. I would stay here again if we come back to the lovely city of Hue!

title: 2 wonderful days at the Hotel Imperial
comment:
Very nice centrally located hotel, clean large rooms and nice staff. Many thanks to Van Duc who always helped us friendly and quick.
Thomas + Bärbel

title: Perfect!
comment: Perfect stay. Room was clean, comfortable, great views. Really enjoyed the pool. Greeted by all staff, Van Duc was so very helpful explaining the city and mapping out sites to see. He made the stay very special.! Thanks😊

title: Excellent
comment: Van Olic made the stay special. He was very helpful and always happy.

title: 100 is good.
comment: Thanks very friendly and helpful hotel staff, clean and spacious rooms, hotel near the center very convenient, will be back soon

title: TTC Imperial Hotel Hue
comment: Beautiful hotel, very friendly staff, special mention to Van Dlic - extremely helpful 👏

title: Great views of the city!
comment: Wonderful views of the city. The amenities and buffet breakfast were great. Van Duc in the lobby was very helpful and friendly. Would stay here again!

title: Stay of 10
comment: Van Duc was very attentive, helped us at all times, with transportation and offered us different tours to get to know Hué better.

title: On top
comment: Excellent welcome in general and especially from Van Duc the concierge. Cleanliness, breakfast, comfort. Nothing wrong.

title: Good
comment: So excellent staff 🥰🥰 ,love hotel🥰🥰🥰

title: Excellent.
comment: Good hotel, close to the center, the hotel has many restaurants and casinos, friendly and fun staff, quick check-in and fun and cute bellmen luggage staff

title: Too great.
comment: Ttc very good, professional friendly staff, wide room and river direction, will return to khach hotel

title: Good
comment: Thanks so much, i love hotel TTC imperial

title: Beautiful and elegant.
comment: Good and beautiful hotel, located right in the center of the street and there are a lot of walking neighborhoods, luggage staff and friendly young sisters.

title: Perfect hotel, poor tour organiser
comment:
One of the nicer hotels with that imperial treatment feel as it is well maintained, richly adorned and has plenty of old money smell about it. Can’t fault anything really, except… the tours they offer which are completely under par of the hotel level such as this. Felt like some aunty had a brother in tour business who took care of scraping together a group and sent them on an imaginary tour without any info what’s included in the tour, paid by cash with no receipt and therefore no insurance if things go south. When you expect a 5 star service and get barely any.
Oh and the bell boy, Van Duc is a star, funny and engaging. Very welcoming feel from the second you enter to the day you leave.

title: Best value in Hue
comment: We had to make a last minute change to our accommodation and were very pleased with our stay at TTC Imperial Hotel. The rooms were very clean with top notch customer service - especially from Van Duc! Thanks to Van Duc and TTC Imperial for making our stay in Hue exceptional!

title: Nice hotel.
comment: Nice hotel and great staff Snowman and Vi Pinh helped a lot

title: Early.
comment: Mr. Van Duc was very friendly and friendly.
Price/quality, excellent. And thank Van Duc for being so attentive.

title: Very nice hotel.
comment:
Love this hotel.
Great rooms and great staff.

title: Visit the TTC Imperial Hotel
comment: Nice hotel, clean. We were constantly hired by you to write and support with enthusiasm and care.

title: Amazing breakfast buffet
comment:
It wasn't my first choice, but exceeded expectations.
Pros:
-Staff was very friendly and helpful when I had a glitch with a tour I'd booked on my own.
-Comfortable sleep, firm mattress.
-The breakfast was excellent, up there with a Sherton property in Capetown years ago.
-Location near center. The entry drive made pick ups, drop off feel a little less harried.
-Bathroom had plenty of hot water at good pressure. Good towels and a washcloth!!

Cons:
-The bathroom: Bad lighting, but did have a wall mounted magnifying mirror. My least favorite kind of shower, a rainfall, fixed position and very difficult to even turn on, let alone adjust, without standing under it.
-There is a bar to one side of the elevator bank on the top floor, and a restaurant to the other. The latter was completely empty when I was hungry at about 8:30 pm. The bar serves no food which i found annoying as I would have been more comfortable there. You'd think they'd collaborate.
I did enjoy the old colonial feel and the beautiful view of the river from 1416.

title: Good staff
comment: They Van and Tuyet Anh so helpful

title: Prima, city hotel
comment: The hotel is very central and is an ideal base to explore. Mr. Van Duc helped us perfectly in organizing our tours.

title: Great hotel in the heart of Hue
comment: Great hotel at very competitive price. To highlight the service of Van Duc, a lovely man, attentive to any problems we may have. The hotel ATM swallowed the credit card and resolved the problem with the bank on Sunday. Within 30 minutes we had the card back. He helped us in obtaining other services such as bicycle rental. It certainly helped make our stay at the hotel ten.

title: center
comment: the hotel is centrally located, the reception team is helpful and friendly, the breakfast is delicious, and the Tsuen Wan and Snowy English support

title: TTC Imperial Hotel stay
comment: Our concierge Mr Vanduc was very helpful and most informative about what to see in Hue during our stay. Five stars

title: Good viewen
comment: Friendly and warm reception team with Shennong and Snow Eng

title: Nice to be here
comment: The hotel is very beautiful and classic, the staff is cute and very helpful with the friends Tsuen Wan and Snow Eng

title: Book this place
comment: Van Duc, the bell captain, was so helpful to get us the transfers we needed in Hue and also to get us to Hoi An. The hotel was amazing with an excellent breakfast buffet

title: Cultural
comment: Van Duc very friendly and efficient

title: Excellent
comment: The hotel is very good the room very good, it lacks a little choice at the breakfast buffet the receptionist van dlic of an extreme kindness

title: Super stay
comment: Great hotel and especially a big thank you to Van Duc who was very attentive and friendly with all our family

title: We will recommend
comment: Excellent service very satisfactory Van Duc

title: Lovely hotel and great car service.
comment: Stayed here 15 March 3 nights. Superb stay and lots of help from Van Duc at concierge desk. Also we had fantastic transfer with several stops with great driver in hotel car , Nhan. He made several stops in lovely spots and made sure we got to our hotel at Hoi An after a great journey. Thank you.

title: Terrible
comment: The experience at TTC was good, I stayed for one night but I still feel the enthusiasm of your staff, Zhu Yuan and Ping

title: Outstanding service
comment: Mr Van Duc was very helpful. He had knowledge about Hue which could not be found in guide books. Could recommend nice restaurants for food eaten by locals. Also was helpful in giving advice in regards to shopping.

title: Superb hotel in great place with lovely staff.
comment: Superb location very close to all central attractions. Very comfortable room with great views. Breakfast plenty of choice and lovely terrace outside to enjoy early cool weather. Roof top bar is great place to watch sunset too. The concierge service was perfect, Van Duc (who is always smiling!) ensured we had all the information we needed to decide where to go, helped to arrange trips and finally made sure we had an easy transfer to our next location. Thankyou, we would stay again.

title: Good van Duc
comment: Van Duc number 1,thanks so much Van Duc

title: Hotel in Hue Vietnam
comment: Brilliant hotel with everything you could ever need! Breakfast exceptional and the trips organised by Van Duc made our trip fantastic! Room was great! We loved it because of the people!! All amazing.

title: The hotel is so beautiful
comment: The rooms are very beautiful, especially the New Year's Eve friends, Triang very cute and helpful. Great food. Beautiful pool and close to many popular sites

title: Beautiful
comment: Helpful staffs Thuy Van and Thu Hang, lovely hotel and restaurant

title: Great
comment: Lovely hotel and staffs Thuy Van and Thu Hang

title: Great
comment: The hotel is very Pro and helpful, thank you Zhuyun and Zhuang for helping us

title: Too ok
comment: The staff is too enthusiastic (Snow English friend, hanwg, writer)

title: Very good staff. The rooms are clean and tidy.
comment: Good and well-located for city Attractions.

title: Excellent Stay
comment:
The hotel is beautiful with a classic, royal vibe and a perfect location to explore Hue.
​Special thanks to the reception team! They were incredibly professional, friendly, and went out of their way to help with every request, thank you Thuy Van

title: Great staff in TTC
comment: I had an amazing stay in Hue. My Trips and the group of friends are over, but I still remember the Honky sincerity. Especially the TTC hotel staff. Yue Hoi and Yue Yuen have always been a helpful part of our team. The restaurants they showed us were delicious and reasonably priced. The rooms are always clean, the hotel''s restaurant is Pro. $10 for service. I will be back again.

title: Great time with TTC Imperial Hue
comment: I had a wonderful time in Hue with my partner. The staff were very kind, knowledgeable, and always helpful. A special thank you to Ms. Thu Hang for her great support and warm hospitality during our stay. She made our experience even more memorable.

title: Beautiful Hotel !
comment: Beautiful old hotel with character & lovely reception area. There's even a temple on the roof. Very pretty roof top bar & outside area. The views over the perfume river are stunning. The rooms are very nice, big and very clean. Breakfast is fabulous with a lot of choice of delicious foods. Very efficient team always clearing up & very helpful. The pool area is nice but only 4 sunbeds & lot of chairs. Our concierge Van Duc was brilliant he checked us in as we sat enjoying a cold drink. Gave us helpful tips on where to go & sorted our taxi to the airport. He is a credit to the hotel. The reception team were very efficient & friendly. The only thing letting this hotel down is the Rooftop Bar. Beautiful bar with stunning views but the service is terrible. When you manage to get served we got warm beer.
