I asked for Gin & Tonic they said had run out of Gin. When i went to pay later there was 3 bottles of Gin on the shelf ! The tables werent cleared of empty glasses. We stayed three nights & only had two drinks up there!Shame as we would have been there every night just for the views. Nevertheless great location & lovely good value hotel. Only 5 mins walk to Walking Street the main street for bars & restaurants.

title: awesome
comment: friendly staffs Thuy Van and Thu Hang, good service and beautiful views

title: A must stay in Hue
comment:
Everything was just perfect. From the warm, smiling welcome we received from Van Duc, his wonderful sense of humour and making sure that we were having the best time. The reception staff were always smiling and couldn’t do enough for us. We love taking our time over a meal, especially an early breakfast, and each morning we spent two hours relaxing, chatting, planning our day and, of course, enjoying the wonderful buffet. We never felt rushed.
Lastly, if you like to explore the city on foot like us, TTC Imperial is the place to stay. It is so close to everything and easy to get around.

title: Great

Van Duc, the front manager was extremely helpful and organised our transport and other activities whenever needed. We will definitely stay here again next time.

The only good thing: Breakfast is very varied and delicious. In the room you are given complimentary flip-flops and there is also a laundry bag. On the way out I was asked to return the bag of dirty laundry and complimentary slippers.
NHAN has been our driver from Hue to Da Nang and has been very nice and has been stopping us at several points of interest on the route.

title: Excellent experience!!! Will continue to support!

Excellent hotel within easy walking distance from the main attractions.
Very friendly and attentive staff, especially Van Duc who was always there to greet us.
Room was large and spacious with superb views over the Perfume River ( we were on the 15th floor!)

title: Good hotel

The pool is good but has only four sun loungers, a bit bit for a hotel of this size. The hotel is well located and does not have much fuss. All staff are helpful and nice. Two who helped us very much with super service were Van Duc at the entrance and Thuttang at the reception. A big thank you to them both. If we come to Hue again we will return to this hotel
Jeppe o Kerstin Sweden

title: Roomy Hotels

title: Holidays to rest
comment: The city of Hue, is super pleasant the climate, the people, hospitality of the hotel where we stayed the TTC Imperial without words.

title: Very good

title: Don't hesitate and book!
comment: I'll start by saying my overall experience was wonderful and definitely suited 5-star treatment. From the amenities to the staff's attitude, absolutely enjoyment. In particular I'd like to name Van Duc who went out of his way to help with anything needed and always with a bright smile! Will definitely return to TTC again!

title: TTC HOTEL
comment:
Excellent experience at this 5 star hotel. Not only is it beautiful but the staff goes completely out if their way to ensure your satisfaction.
Great service from Van Duc, Vinh Hung and Thuy Van

comment: Wonderful experience exploring Huế, first time with family and Friends. Duc Nguyên bell captain and the hotel staff was incredibly friendly and helpful. The check-in was perfect and fast. The location is perfect.

I find the hotel exceptionally beautiful I like these golden yellow colors.
I felt comfortable there from the beginning? The room was spacious. Clean. I have to be flawless. And also tastefully decorated.
What's particularly important to me is that the mattresses are mad. And they were, I could sleep well. But what I want to highlight in particular is. The quality of the staff the people here are just great. I had lost problems due to my mobile phone, the train on the journey to Hue right on my arrival they did everything humanly possible to help me. The reception but also especially the Bell captain van Duc

title: Good experience

title: Great hotel and great service

Van Duc, the bell captain, assisted us with everything and made our stay perfect and well organised. If we ever return to Hue, we will definitely stay at the TTC Imperia Hotel again.

comment: We had a great staying. Staff kind and pro, always at demand. Great location and food. Everything neat and clean. Super furniture. A special mention to Van Duc, a true gentleman. Super recomanded.

Mr. Vav Duc was very accommodating shortly before our departure and shortened our waiting time with a good tea and then took the suitcases to the taxi. It was a very nice stay here at the hotel. can only be recommended if you make a short stop here in Hue before traveling on to Da Nang.

comment: It was a great day. Everybody was helpful for whatever we needed to do very friendly staff. I would come back here again next time I’mback in Vietnam.

title: Imperial Service!
comment: We had a lovely experience at this hotel. Beautiful location, excellent facilities and great service. The staff went above and beyond to help out. An added bonus was the lovely Van Duc who is very friendly and extremely knowledgeable. He is a real asset to the hotel and a credit to them. If you get the chance to stay Van Duc is your man to get advice on everything from laundry to tours.

title: 5 star Hotel
comment: Clean and very comfortable, great location. Van Duc a concierge there was very helpful, seek him out for advice and bookings.

title: Great choice for visiting Hue. Highly recommend.
comment:
Great service from reception staff and concierge Van Duc, who organised trips and transport.
Good size room with comfy beds
Breakfast -plenty of choice.
Hotel in a great position for easy access to all areas

title: Best holiday in Vietnam yet
comment: “Our room had a great view of the river. The breakfast buffet had a wide selection of delicious dishes. All the staff at the hotel were polite and friendly but Van Duc, the doorman, stood out in particular as someone who was not only friendly and good humoured, but also a useful source of travel advice. We plan to come back to this hotel again next year “

title: Best Hotel stay in Vietnam
comment:
We traveled from Hanoi to Huế and stayed at TTC Imperial Hotel, and it was hands down the best customer service we’ve experienced at any hotel in Vietnam.
I visit Vietnam two to three times a year to see friends and family. While we usually stay with family, when we travel to different cities, we enjoy experiencing different hotels—and this one truly stood out.
Van Duc was exceptional. He was extremely attentive to our needs, guided us in the right direction, and went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of. His professionalism and genuine hospitality made our stay even more enjoyable.
I highly recommend TTC Imperial Hotel to anyone visiting Hue. We will definitely be back!

title: Very empathetic hotel and helping great service
comment: Best hotel and best experience of my life. Van Duc was extraordinary to me, spending a crazy time helping me cancel the train tickets I mistakenly took with kindness and cordiality. Without him my trip to Vietnam would not have been the same. Thank you ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

title: Excellent trip from Hue to Hoi an.
comment: We had a wonderful transfer from Hue to Hoi An with Nhan. He is a very professional, friendly, and punctual driver. The car was clean and comfortable, and we felt very safe throughout the journey. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a hassle-free trip! 5 stars!.

title: Luxury Hotels
comment: Very luxurious and luxurious hotel,Friendly and helpful staff specializing in Mai Hoa,Zhuang and Wiping

title: Amazing time in Hue!
comment: It was the best experience at TTC hotel. Our service was incredible, especially from Van Duc. The spa was amazing as well. The location was easily accessible.

title: Central location for tourist activity!
comment: Clean facility, pretty architecture and central location. Van Duc was really helpful with our luggage post-check out and helped us book car to the airport as well. Thank you!

title: Lovely stay
comment: Our stay is very comfortable. Room was cleaned and replenished everyday. Reception and security always greets you with a smile. Staff are friendly. When you need anything, see Van Duc in the entrance area. He's very helpful and can speak very well English. If you need anything from tours, he is very reliable. Location is near the riverside, great location. Plenty of food and coffee nearby.

title: An upscale hotel to feel good about
comment: Excellent hotel that leaves nothing to be desired. Highlights include the equipment of the rooms, the richness of the breakfast buffet and the great service of Van Duc, who accompanied the stay at the TTC optimally and was always responsive.

title: Very friendly staff 😊

title: Thank you Van Duc
comment: Hotel reception very friendly and helpful booking restaurants etc. special mention to Van Duc who went the extra mile organising transport etc extremely helpful .

title: Great hotel, great location and great staff, especially Van Dic the doorman.

title: Thank you
comment:
Our stay.
8 /18 th February

What a lovely room ,will ask for it again when we return .
What can I say about our time here
ONE MEMBER OF STAFF
Has always been there and done more than his job entails
That’s MR VAN DUC
It was a special anniversary for us and one we won’t forget down to him .
Lovely cake and our Wedding photo in Antigua put in a frame
He has always been there to tell us where to go and things to see
We will miss him,would love to take him home ,but that means we would not come back . Look after him he one in a million.

Bad side. More sun beds needed in pool area
And milk .English people like milk in there tea

Thank you all for making us enjoy our time here

title: Our Hue Stay!!
comment:
We spent few days in Hue and we stayed at TTC hotel for its quality/price ratio. And cause it was Just 10 mins walk from the citadel.
Staff was very helpful, shout out to Van Duc that was extremely helpful and also very funny, he helped us arranging a private taxi for a day to explore some tombs and helps us through out our stay as we had a family member with some mobility problems.
Also very nice rooftop bar with a stunning view on the city and the river!! Sunsets were amazing!!

title: Fabulous hotel for wondrous city
comment:
Great hotel with such lovely staff. Lovely breakfast. Fantastic location for Citadel and restaurants and bars nearby.
Roof top bar for sunset is a must.

title: Imperial stay in Hue
comment: We had a nice stay at Imperial hotel. The hotel was ok, but what made it special was the staff. The staff was very friendly and helpful. Especially the bellhop Van Duc. He went out of his way to assist my mother who has Parkinson’s disease and needs extra help. Van also helped us schedule a tour to the tombs and was always available with WhatsApp to answer our questions. It seemed that he worked there from morning till night every day. A very hard worker! Thanks for the nice stay and all the help.

title: Fantastic staff and great rooms
comment: Fantastic, helpful staff. Van Duc was really helpful with arranging a tour to Hoi An and for recommendations in Hue. Breakfast is very good and the rooms were spacious and clean.

title: Great stay at TTC Imperial
comment: Van Duc is always welcoming and friendly. He asked about our day and gave some advice when asked. We really enjoyed our stay at TTC, partly thanks to Van Duc.

title: Stellar Host
comment: Van Duc was a great concierge and went above and beyond 👍🏻👍🏻

title: Majestic View!
comment: The hotel is perfectly situated in the heart of Hue, making it incredibly easy to explore the Perfume River and nearby historical sites. I highly recommend visiting the restaurant on the top floor. The 360-degree view of the city and the river is breathtaking, especially at sunset! The staff were the highlight of my stay always smiling, professional, and eager to help with tour recommendations or transport. Thank you Thuy Van and Thu Hang

title: Great hotel! Thank you Mr Van duc for all your help!!
comment: Very nice hotel, clean, comfortable spacious. Mr Van Duc is incredible, he's helped us with all of our questions, recommended some great places to visit in the area and is just an all round amazing person! Thank you so much for your help sir!

title: Great stay!
comment: We had an amazing 1 night stay at TTC. Van Duc was helpful and friendly!

title: Great stay in TTC!
comment: Great room, very good breakfast and very nice service from Van-Duc!

title: pleasant stay
comment:
Thank you to Mr Van Duc and all the staff of the Hotel for the pleasant stay we had. Upon arrival, we were greeted with great professionalism, kindness and attention. Mr Van Duc has been particularly available and attentive to our needs, always ready to advise us and find solutions quickly when necessary.

The room was comfortable, clean and well maintained, which allowed us to rest fully after our discovery days. We also appreciated the quiet of the establishment and the quality of the facilities offered. The staff, without exception, helped to create a warm and reassuring atmosphere, with a true sense of service and attention to detail.

Breakfast was varied and of good quality, offering a choice adapted to different tastes. Each member of the team showed courtesy and discretion while remaining available at all times.

This stay was a very nice experience, and we will keep a great memory of this hotel. We highly recommend this property to anyone looking for comfort, attentive hospitality and professional service. Many thanks again to Mr. Van Duc and his entire team for their commitment and hospitality.

title: Great experience at TTC
comment: Great experience at TTC. Van Duc was very helpful and polite. Really good hospitality

title: Happy stay
comment: Beautiful hotel, very comfortable beds and amenities. The staff member Van Duc was very friendly and helpful. We will definitely stay here again if we ever come back to Hue.

title: Great service
comment:
I really enjoyed my stay at TTC
Imperial Hotel. The room was clean and comfortable, and the hotel has a great atmosphere.
The staff were very friendly, professional, and always helpful. I would highly recommend this hotel and would love to come back again. Thank you Tuyet Anh and Thuy Van

5/5 stars! The TTC Imperial is a beautiful hotel with a great view of the city. The rooms are spacious, clean, and very comfortable. What makes this place special is the staff, they are so friendly, polite, and always smiling. They really made us feel at home, thank you Thuy Van and Tuyet Anh. If you are looking for a place to stay in Hue, this is it.

title: Clean, great service, breakfast and spa.
comment:
We had a great time staying at the hotel. We stayed here two nights. The rooms were great with a beautiful river view, we their breakfast very much and their pool is very calming as well. The staff and service are five star. We also got a chance toget a massage in their spa and it was very professional and relaxing.
But best of all the Bell desk was the best. Mr. Van Duk was remarkable. He took care of all our needs, booking our tours, Taxi, and greeting us with a smile every time we walked in. We saw him many times a day every day. He was very polite and professional, and I think he’s a great asset to the hotel. He was our link to many things in Hue giving us apt warnings and directions. Thank you for your hospitality.Van Duk.

title: Van duc was very good and helped us a lot .. a excellent person.. made our stay so pleasant 😊
comment: Van duc was very good and helped us a lot .. a excellent person.. made our stay so pleasant 😊

title: Beautiful and clean! Friendly staffs that will help you get around Hue with no worries!
comment: Awesome accommodation by the staffs and employees. They were quite efficient and fast with whatever we needed. I had been craving chili paste with my fruits it is a snack I ate growing up and had needed lime and fish sauce they brought it up so quickly. Thu Hang and Viet Binh had also helped with our car arrangements for Da Nang for the next day. Hotel was also very beautiful and clean, smells good and looks very up to date. Thank you so much for the stay will be sure to visit again soon! ((:

title: Treated like Kings ... literally!
comment: We had a great stay at the TTC. The staff are outstanding. Van Duc looked after us so well always smiling amd making sure we had everything we needed. Luan had us dressed up like kings on day one. The hotel is decorated in an Imperial style so looks a little dated but we were made to feel very welcome here. The breakfast was excellent, the view from our room was amazing- 2 windows both looking out to the river and Imperial Citadel. Massive bed and lovely shower pressure. Could not fault our stay.

title: Amazing hotel and staff, specially Van Duc
comment:
We stayed only one night, but this hotel is definitely worth staying more than one night. The breakfast buffet was excellent, with a great variety and very good quality. The price was also amazing — great value for money.

What truly made the difference, though, was Van Duc. He gave us excellent advice, took great care of us, and was always attentive and helpful. From the moment he welcomed us at the hotel, he made us feel comfortable and well guided. His recommendations on where to go and what to avoid were incredibly useful.

Thanks to him, our stay was even more enjoyable. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend this hotel.

title: Best Hotel in Hue
comment:
Everything was just perfect. Especially
Thu Hang and Trien were very helpfull and kind Thank you so much. It’s a must stay place.

title: Friendly and helpful staff
comment: We spent 3 nights in the TTC and had a good time there. Especially Mr. Van Duc helped us with finding and booking a wonderful tour in Hue. He also made possible, that we could watch the Australien Open in our room.

title: Feb 6,2026
comment:
TTC Imperial Hotel is a great pick if you want to be right in a very convenient location. The hotel is in a nice area that makes it easy to get around, and it was one of the best parts of the stay.

The staff were genuinely friendly and welcoming from check-in to check-out, and it made the whole experience feel smooth and comfortable. Overall, it’s a solid choice for anyone who values a great location and warm service.

title: Kindness of treatment and service
comment: We stayed in a large corner room with stunning views of the Perfume River, everything was to be desired, well composed breakfast. The hotel's staff in all functions was characterized by warmth and willingness to help. We were met when we arrived by Van Duc who offered tea and took our bags when we were exhausted after 14 hours on the sleeper bus:))))

title: Good vanDuc
comment: The hotel is great, the breakfast is varied and delicious. The location is very good. The staff is nice and polite. I would like to highlight the Van Duc, who is helpful and has a very good sense of humor.

title: excellent concierge service
comment: we had a wonderful stay at the TTC imperial hotel. Văn Duc at the Bell desk looked after us very well with excellent advices for where to go and eat, plus booked us on the bus that goes to Hoi An that is a much cheaper option than a private car. Văn Duc greeted us every time we come in and out of the hotel with a big smile. It makes our stay that much extra special. We had a room with the Riverview and highly recommended.

title: Hue, The Imperial Hotel & staff
comment:
The hotel is very centrally located, beautiful and great food. The top floor bar and terraces have extraordinary views and are nice places to relax.
The reception personnel, especially Van Duc, greeted us daily with great smiles and incredible service

title: TTC Imperial Hotel, Hué
comment: The staff and the reception personnel, specially Van Duc, were very helpfull, attentive and friendly. The hotel facilities, including the rooftop observation areas, are great! Very spacious room and great breakfast spread. Loved it

title: central, cozy, top service
comment: Very centrally located, a few minutes to the sights, even shorter to the restaurants and bars of Walking Street; very clean hotel, comfortable rooms, excellent food, Skybar with delicious drinks at decent prices. The staff is very friendly, especially at the reception has explained with Mr. Van Duc daily extremely friendly many useful things. That was great. Any time again in this hotel.

title: Class establishment!
comment: Wonderful stay here. After chaos of central Hanoi TTC Hue was a super calm base for our time in the city. Walkable to river and busy areas for a lively evening but peaceful. The concierge Van Duch deserves a special mention for attentive but fun service,ready to help with anything from taxis to haircuts! Equally happy to just pass the time of day with guests,a real credit to the hotel!

title: Very good hotel, recommended.
comment: An excellent hotel with large rooms and good service. If there are language difficulties, contact the very helpful and competent staff member Mr. Van Duc, who will clarify everything immediately.

title: very pleasant stay
comment:
we had a very good stay, the staff is very nice, the receptionist van trien, the supervisor thu hang and van duc who welcomed us warmly made our stay very pleasant.
the buffet lunch was perfect.

title: Great stay and location.
comment: Beautiful hotel and extremely friendly staff. Van Duc is the porter who welcomed us to the hotel and helped us during our stay. Highly recommend the hotel.

title: When Only The BEST will Do!!
comment: Van Duc, our Bellman…Is The Absolute Best/Professional/Friendly & HELPFUL Bellman Anyone Could Ask For. Courtesy At Its FINEST..Van Duc 5 Stars All Day!!

title: Exemplary Bell Staff at a well located hotel
comment:
We stayed at the TTC Imperial for 2 nights. Totally enjoyed our time in Hue and relaxing with the excellent services provided at this hotel. Very conveniently located within walking distances to Walking Street and all sorts of restaurants. As well as Riverside boardwalk.

Special mention goes to the bell services provided by Mr Van Duc! With exemplary work most others cannot compare to. Van Duc was able to communicate fluently in Einglish. Baggage handlings were were quick and efficient with care both during our check in and out.

What was even more amazing with Van Duc was how he was able to make contact with me on some missed medications I had left behind and then have it delivered to the next hotel we are staying at! And get this- for a SAME DAY Delivery, for just a nominal charge by the courier driver!!
Absolutely impressed with suc a high level of service, attention to details and efficiency. Bravo TTC Imperial and Mr Van Duc 👏

title: Great service
comment: Van Duc was very helpful and provided excellent service and ideas for places to go in Hue. The hotel room was also very clean and confortable.

title: Just perfect.
comment: We had a great stay at this hotel, thanks to Van Duc for his warm welcome and kindness and good advice to visit the city.The hotel and quiet and 10 min walk from the Imperial City. The breakfast is excellent.

title: good
comment: a beautiful hotel and friendly staff Thuy Van and Van Trien helped us a lot when we stayed here, rooms are nice

title: Great Hotel, beautiful, well located and outstanding service!
comment:
We stayed here for 3 nights and had an amazing experience. When checking in we decided to upgrade to a suite so that our newborn can sleep in the living room and by doing so we were given an extra meal (besides breakfast) for 2 (which was enough to feed 4) for each day. The food and service were outstanding! The hotel is well located, close to everything you need and walkable to the imperial city and perfume river promenade! Hotel has a great rooftop patio and bar with beautiful views of the city and river.

Special shout out to Van Duc the concierge who helped us get settled in and saved me a trip to the train station to buy our tickets (since the official site didn’t take international credit cards). He took care of booking our tickets from the comfort of our lobby and arranged the pick up for us in the morning. He also is always there to greet everyone, remembers your name when walking in and out, and will take care of anything you need around the city! One of the best concierges I’ve had at any hotel!

title: Good van Duc
comment:
TTC Imperial Hotel is a definitely a first class hotel. Service is impeccable. Buffet in the morning, included in the price is something we look forward to. Front Desk staff is generally very helpful. Housekeeping is fabulous and fast.

The only minor point is the Starlight Restaurant food (in my humble opinion) could use some improvement. For example, serving caramelized goby would be a negative. Menu is somewhat limited.

I enjoy talking with Bellman Van Duc everyday. He’s definitely a valued employee as he is so cheerful and helpful. If I come and stay here again, it’s because I feel like he has become my friend.

title: Nice hotel good location
comment: Van Duc referred us a good guide to the imperial city and it is informed of us every time we went into the hotel knowing that everything was fine for our stay. Thank you!

title: Beautiful accomodation with the best service
comment: Amazing place with very kind service. And with Van Duc's help, organising trips by car to other cities was very smooth and easy.

title: Happy & satisfying stay
comment: Nice hotel, good location, excellent services especially Mr Duc, the bell captain. Will come back & recommend to family & friends

title: Mag
comment:
Very nice
Hotel, very refined decorated with solid furniture and precious materials. Very welcome. Thank you very much. IIiiiii

title: Thank you Van Duc!!!
comment:
We had a wonderful stay at this beautiful well located hotel. We stayed in a suite with our 2 kids and the traditional meal offered with it was so MUCH WORTH the upgrade!

The staff is extremely kind too: Van Duc was helpful enough to book us our train tickets for our entire family and was always greeting us with a smile.

title: Beautiful hotel

title: Superb Hotel with exceptional facilities.

title: Van Duc so good
comment: We had a great stay at Ttc imperial, the bell captain was extremely helpful in organising tours for us ((Van DUC) . Our driver NHAN was excellent and a very safe driver.

title: Perfect.

title: Excellent service
comment:
Location and atmosphere are great
Rooms are neat and clean value 100%
Employee: Van Duc ♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️😂♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️

title: Very friendly helpful staff & magnificent hotel in Hue
comment: During traveling our luggage lost one wheel caused airport delivery, the hotel staff Mr.Van Duc offered to fix it without any charge, our luggage got fixed! Much appreciated! Hotel room is big and super comfortable, Great! Very good Locution! Very short walk to Imperial City! Awesome!

title: A great choice for Hue!
comment:
A great hotel in a brilliant location for exploring Hue.

We were looked after so well from the minute we arrived.

Our room was clean, spacious, comfortable with a great view over the river.

Breakfast was excellent, bathroom was great, everything you needed for a sightseeing hotel stay.

Breakfast is also very good and nice with a terrace that allows you to sunbathe while admiring the just splendid view!!
Really nothing to say, I recommend 100% this hotel

title: Wonderful Vacation

title: Exceptional Stay at TTC Imperial Hotel, Huế.
comment:
Our stay at TTC Imperial Hotel was truly exceptional, from the beautiful architecture inspired by Huế’s imperial heritage to the consistently magnificent customer service.

We would like to extend our heartfelt thanks to Thu Hằng and Việt Bình, along with the entire team, for their outstanding care and support throughout our stay. Every interaction was filled with warmth, professionalism, and genuine passion. It’s clear that the staff take great pride in what they do, and it shows in every detail.

This hotel made our time in Huế both comfortable and memorable, and we would highly recommend it to anyone visiting this beautiful city.

Warmest regards,
Neil Ta & Le Tran

title: Best hotel in Hue

title: Excellent stay!

*5 stars out of 5!*

I just got back from my stay at TTC Imperial
Hue hotel and I can say it was absolutely fantastic! 😍

From arrival to departure, everything was perfect. The staff was extremely friendly and helpful, always ready to meet my every request.
Special thanks to Nhan for his attention , helpfulness and sympathy . Thank you Nhan!!!

The room was spacious and clean, with very comfortable beds and stunning views of the city. The bathroom was luxurious and equipped with all necessary amenities.

Breakfast was delicious, with a wide choice of hot and cold dishes. And the hotel restaurant was a real paradise for the palate!

But what made my stay really special was the warm and welcoming atmosphere of the hotel. I felt like home!

*Strengths:*

- Friendly and helpful staff
- Spacious and clean room
- Delicious breakfast
- Excellent restaurant
- Warm and welcoming atmosphere

I highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious and relaxing stay. It is absolutely worth it!

Patrizia

comment:
Location: 5 of 5; very centrally located, close to popular tourist areas and the perfume river

title: Too noisy
comment:
I stayed at White Lotus for three nights and had a mixed experience overall. On a positive note, the staff were accommodating and allowed us an early check-in, which was much appreciated. The building itself is beautiful, and the river view is a real highlight. You can walk to the Imperial City in 20 minutes.

Our room was a perfect size, the gym was well stocked for a solid workout, and the pool area was pleasant with enough shade to relax comfortably.

The laundry service is reasonably priced, though my white t-shirt came back with a mark (it looked like make up, and I don’t wear make up) that wasn’t originally on it.

The buffet breakfast offered a great variety of food, although some items were cold even though we arrived right at opening. The food in general was okay and reasonably priced, but unfortunately they were out of stock of what we wanted for lunch. I was also advised to visit the tour counter for recommendations, but the advice I received there was fairly average and the staff member acted inconvenienced.

The bathroom had a combined shower and bath, which leaked every time we used

Unfortunately, noise was a major issue and ultimately the reason I wouldn’t return. This hotel also operates as a conference centre, which I wasn’t aware of when booking, so there was loud music playing (not just on NYE). On top of that, there was significant noise from the corridor on our floor. On our first afternoon, staff and guests were talking extremely loudly outside our room on level 10 for at least 30 minutes (practically screaming) and I ended up closing their staff door myself to reduce the noise. Although I notified them of this, it continued on and off throughout our three-night stay and made it very difficult to rest.
it.

Overall, if noise doesn’t bother you, this hotel may still be worth considering due to its location, views, and facilities. However, if you value peace and quiet, this is something to be aware of before booking.

title: Great property in a great location
comment:
This is a lovely property very close to the city centre.
The rooms are large and well proportioned.
The entrance lobby is welcoming and well decorated.
The staff is very courteous and helpful.
Highly recommend

title: Great Location and Outstanding Amenities, With a Few Room Quirks at White Lotus Hue
comment: White Lotus Hue Hotel is well-situated within easy walking distance of Hue’s lively tourist area—surrounded by restaurants, cafes, shops, clubs, the waterfront, and the iconic Truong Tien Bridge. The property shines in its amenities, especially the impressive pool area and what may be the largest, most well-equipped hotel gym I’ve ever seen, complete with an unexpected outdoor mini golf practice range. Staff throughout the hotel, including laundry services, were friendly and accommodating, and the breakfast buffet offered a generous and varied spread. The bar and restaurant boast beautiful views with a menu that’s decent, though not remarkable. Rooms were clean and somewhat modern, however, felt a bit small, and the open bathroom concept—with the combined toilet/shower and a raised water threshold—was not ideal and proved easy to trip over. Overall, White Lotus Hue delivers strong value with excellent facilities and service, even if the room layout isn’t for everyone.

title: A wonderful evening at the rooftop bar of the White Lotus Hotel.
comment:
A wonderful evening at the rooftop bar of the White Lotus Hotel.

The bartender, Mr. Lahn, is gifted, not only he is mixing delicious cocktails, he also created the "Tràng Tiên" himself. It's a dream of fruitiness (peach, kumquat) and light Asian spice. But much of the other cocktails are also very tasty.

The entire hotel is beautifully designed and the staff are very helpful and friendly. Only the breakfast was not quite up to the high standard of our European Tongues.

title: As big as a city
comment: Great hotel with every confort.Abbiamo slept on the sixteenth floor in a very modern room with a spectacular view.Very nice and large pool where you can relax.In the evening take an aperitif on the Roof, located in an area where it takes just a few steps to reach restaurants and take a nice walk on the river

title: Nice experience
comment: Very well located hotel. The hotel reception helpful and the waiters polite. Small but clean and comfortable room with everything you need for a pleasant stay. The full breakfast buffet although with few varieties of bread. They make eggs in all their versions at once and have Western options and local food. The pool very quiet and clean. There is gym and spa but we do not enjoy it. Also a bar on the top floor where you can eat or have a cocktail. This hotel is a good choice to enjoy the center of Hue.

title: Good

Good cleanliness, breakfast, and comfort of the rooms, which are equipped with huge windows with panoramic views of the city and the river. Excellent takeaway breakfast Service for those who check out early in the morning. The only flaw is the shower curtain in the en suite bathroom, really uncomfortable.

title: Aggressive
comment: The hotel was okay (rather expensive for Vietnam). I found it surprising that it was not very welcoming. Staff was not friendly and they have a very aggressive stance regarding items in the room. Detailed inventory, instructions and we even had to wait a long time in the lobby while they checked the room again before we left. Treating every customer as if they are a crook does not seem like a wise business policy.

title: Almost fair experience but ….
comment: We stayed 3 days in a family room (two rooms and a dining room). Views were very nice and we also had two bathrooms. Breakfast was fair, even if the choices weren’t so ample as expected for a 4-star hotel. Air conditioning was unpredictable: you choose 24 degrees and after some time it “decides” to change to 27 at its pleasure! Last: we broke an inexpensive glass in the bathroom, they charged us 30.000 Dong for it. We found this charge extremely overcharged for a used glass and a complete fall in style for a 4 star hotel. Should we come back probably we would choose a different hotel.

title: good accommodation with excellent staff
comment: Centrally located is a very pleasant hotel. Prompt and professional Welcoming. Very nice and spacious room. One of the walls is almost completely made of glass so you have a great view of the river and the bridge that at night becomes multicolored. Pool on the fifth floor quite comfortable. Terrace with bar on the 16th floor. The day we were there there there was particularly pleasant live music. Hearty breakfast and with good products. To be recommended

title: We enjoyed our visit and stay at the White Lotus. We used the pool and the rooftop bar. Close to many activities.
comment: We enjoyed our stay at the White Lotus very much. We use the rooftop bar and the pool both days that we were there. Everything was clean and fresh. We had everything we needed. This hotel is close to a lot of activities. We would highly recommend.

title: The Perfect Hotel
comment:
A truly exceptional stay from start to finish! This hotel defines luxury in every sense—beautifully designed, incredibly spacious, and thoughtfully detailed throughout. The rooms were immaculate, with plenty of space to relax and unwind, making it feel like a home away from home.

The service was absolutely outstanding. Every staff member went above and beyond to ensure our stay was perfect, always friendly, professional, and attentive without being intrusive. It’s rare to experience such genuine hospitality.

Everything about this place exudes comfort and elegance, from the stunning interiors to the peaceful, relaxing atmosphere. If you’re looking for a luxurious getaway with top-tier service, this hotel is simply unbeatable. A well-deserved 5 stars!

The restaurant was great - delicious food and helpful staff (especially Ha and Ty). Breafast is insane - so much choice and all of it very tasty! Our transfer to Hoi An was made so much easier by booking a private car which made stops along the way.

Had a very lovely stay at this Hotel in Hue. Location was in a nice neighborhood, while not in the Partystreet,it has lots of restaurants, coffeeshops and bars/places where you can grab a drink with locals.
My room was spacious, value was great. Breakfast was very nice, really wide selection at the buffet and you can get yourself dishes cooked.

title: Brilliant stay
comment:
Stayed here for 2 nights in December 2024 as part of an organised tour.

We'd taken the overnight train from Hanoi to Hue, so arrived at the hotel mid morning and left our luggage there, before heading out to see a bit of the city. Fortunately, we were abele to check in when we got back in the early afternoon.

I was given a room on one of the upper floors which was a bit compact, but was fine for me on my own and would be fine for a couple who knew each other and had big suitcases. The room had a big king sized bed at one end, a desk with chair, mirror, hanging space and then an open bathroom in one corner. Everything was very modern and clean, including the towels and bedding. Did use the air con at one stage and it worked well.

The shower was great - plenty of water pressure and hot water. As I said above, you'd want to be sharing with someone you know well as there's just glass between the bathroom and the bedroom!

The lift was just down from the room, but I didn't hear too much noise from it, nor from other rooms. The wifi worked well, with good speed and range.

Location-wise, the hotel is in the middle of the city, so it's nice and easy to walk around, or just use Grab to get where you need to get to.

The included breakfast was good - they had a wide choice, including sushi! You could also have an omelette cooked fresh as well. All of the staff in the hotel were friendly and helpful. One of our group had her birthday whilst we were there and the hotel helped us have a small celebration for her - they even provided their own cake alongside the one we'd got her!

Overall a great stay and I'd definitely recommend if you're in Hue.

The hotel restaurant, with an extensive menu was overtaken by the wave of newly arrived tourists and the lack of some products that generated some discomfort among guests. It must be understood that the situation they were experiencing was very sad and serious. The few people who tended the place were not enough.

title: A very good hotel in Hue
comment: A very good hotel, carefully managed by well trained, very pleasant staff (like e.g. our very attentive receptionist, Thu Giang, and the breakfast room staff). The location is great (very close to Le Loi, the Perfume River and the shopping and dining districts) and the breakfast room is located on the 12th floor of the building, affording spectacular views of the city. Our room on the 5th floor was very nice: nice size, tastefully furnished, with a large comfortable bed (I'm 1.94 m tall) and a nice bathroom; only slight disappointment was that we didn't have a view to speak of (though other rooms, on higher floors, probably will). At breakfast we had ample choice of local and international options and the quality was always very good.

title: Great
comment: We loved our stay at the Thanh Lich. It is in a good location in central Hue and has a traditional Vietnamese charm rather than a generic hotel that could be anywhere. The corner rooms are massive and have floor to ceiling windows giving great views. . The bed is massive and super comfortable. We visited the rooftop bar a couple of times which has a good choice of reasonably priced food and drinks and almost 360 degree views across the whole city. Good breakfast. The staff in all areas were great, especially the reception staff who went out of their way to help me. Excellent value for money, highly recommended.

title: The Royal Treatment
comment:
This was one of the best stays of our entire holiday. From the moment we arrived at Thanh Lich Royal Boutique Hotel, we felt like royalty. (Be careful not to confuse it with Thanh Lich Hotel, which is located in the busy city center.)

We were pleasantly surprised with a complimentary room upgrade for our family—such a lovely bonus. The Royal Boutique is about a 10–20 minute walk from Walking Street, making it a peaceful retreat away from the hustle and bustle.

Our room and bathroom were absolutely spotless. While the ceiling was a little low, it was still comfortable for my 6'2" husband. Our kids loved the pool, and the breakfast buffet offered a nice variety of dishes to suit all tastes.

The staff were always smiling, friendly, and genuinely helpful. Every question or request was met with warmth and efficiency. On departure, we were even given a thoughtful gift—which made the experience all the more memorable.

This hotel will always hold a special place in my heart, and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend it to anyone visiting Hue.

We stayed at this hotel for 3 days and the hotel was so great we decided to extended it to 6 days. Unfortunately the 4th was full so we couldn't do it, which is very unfortunately.

This is a top pick hotel among 6 different hotels/resorts we stayed this time, and it's our best choice if we want to stay in city center:

- Service is top notch, our experience is as great as other 5 stars resorts in Hue. The bellmen are very helpful. Mr. Quynh is very helpful and Mr. Minh Tam is very friendly and playful, especially with kid. Our kid always ask to watch the fish with Tam and we noticed that other kids are also playful with him.

- The location is great. There are plenty of service (market, minimart, cinema, kid playground, dentist...) nearby and on weekend you can enjoy the walking street event.

- Room is very good quality.Bed is comfortable and aircon work well. We initially stay in the 2 person room and then changed to 3 person room as we have one more family member with us. Receptionist was very helpful with the change.

- The breakfast restaurant " Huong Ngu" was great. We would recommend to try their lunch and dinner as well. Their local cuisine taste like home and we regretted that we didn't try it earlier.

They have another hotel near where all the tourists go and party, but that one is smaller than this hotel.

There is a few minus points as well, though it did not hurt our experience it's worth to mention:
- The pool is quite small. We tried it one time and unfortunately for us at that time there were a big family and they were very noisy. Since it's indoor pool it become very loud.
- Their mini fridge is more like mini cooling. It can get water to cool temperature but not freezing.
- You must be careful when adjust water temperature. It get super hot very easily. They sure did warned us but I still get burn several time.

title: Great Hotel for services, cleanliness, courtesy of staff. At reception Mrs. Hoai and Mrs. Very courteous indeed.
comment: Excellent hotel. Clean and spacious rooms. Good Spa. Excellent catering (breakfast plentiful and possibility to dine with a wide choice a la carte). The staff was very kind. At the reception very courteous Misses Hoai and Anh.

title: Lovely night away in Hue
comment: We had the pleasure of staying at that Thanh Lich hotel in Hue for a night. The room, pool facilities and breakfast were impeccable. Additionally, the staff were so approachable especially Tuyen Ngoc who personally helped us throughout our stay with food, trip recommendations and transportation. She really made a positive contribution to our night!

title: Highly recommend
comment: Beautiful hotel with fantastic breakfast buffet. The rooms were fantastic and clean. The pool area was unreal with views of the city. We were welcomed by Ngoc who looked after us so well, she is a star!

title: Beautiful stay
comment:
The room is spacious, comfortable and very clean.
Breakfast is very varied. Everyone can benefit from it.
The staff is very attentive to us and speaks French like among others, Mrs. Nguyen Thi HUONG. Thanks to everyone.

title: Perfect.
comment: Very nice room very nice and spacious comfortable very clean, the staff great availability and kindness especially Mrs. nguyen thi Huong thank you to her. Meals and entertainment great traditional and high quality music.

title: Good.
comment:
Integrated overall, clean.
Sound insulation can also prevent thunderstorms from becoming small.
After 9 p.m., the hotel's karaoke will be closed.

title: Enjoy a HUÉ
comment: I particularly enjoyed the welcome by HOAI and HUONG at the reception as well as all the rest of the hotel services cleanliness comfort spa treatments and beautiful breakfast , beautiful city! unforgettable stay in our trip to Vietnam we were very well advised for a tour with guide ANH

title: Discovery of Vietnam
comment: A very good hotel with a very hearty and good breakfast buffet. Large room with a king size bed. The manager NGUYEN THI HUONG is very pleasant, she came to accompany us to the exit of the hotel. Besides, she speaks French.

title: Nice
comment:
Room is good
Breakfast is delicious
If it is a lot
Thu and Anh
Service staff very kind
Everyone laughed.
Make people feel comfortable
Very recommended anyway.

title: Exellent
comment:
The stay at the hotel was very relaxed. The staff was very friendly. Thanks also to Giang Anh from reception and to Ngoc for booking the ticket.
We really enjoyed the stay. Breakfast buffet fat was very extensive and it tasted very good.
Andrè + Tina

title: Excellent hotel service
comment: The staff, Anh Giang is helpful and nice! The hotel room is spacious and comfortable! The hotel breakfast is good and there is variety of food choices. We get the chance to enjoy the local food. The hotel’s quality and services are excellent! We have a great time in the hotel!

title: Vietnamese Cultural Experience!
comment: When you enter Thanh Lich Boutique Hotel in Hue you feel as if your in Vietnam centuries ago! The lobby is so unique and a daily pleasure to experience! The front desk staff where friendly, helpful and always available for assistance! This is an extremely well kept, clean hotel. Rooms are always cleaned daily and well stocked. The bed was comfortable and room has paintings, furniture was purely Vietnamese! Shower was one of the best things about the room. Your right on Walking Street so on weekends it is so easy to just exit the hotel and enjoy the activities! I will return in November 2025.

title: Center of it all! Yet quiet!
comment:
Such a good hotel to stay at! Right in the center and have everything you need. The customer service is outstanding, friendly, and very knowledgeable with the suggestions for slight seeing. The room layout is superb!

While everyone is great, the notable are Huong Thu and Quynh (whome helped us with our luggage and friendly chats).

title: Like at home
comment:
From the cab’s alight, you’ll be greeted, packed, offered a welcome tea and invited to discover the sky bar experience.
Swimming pool, gym in an unbeatable condition.
Unbeatable quality of service. Very helpful and attentive staff.
Special mention of Giang and Angel

title: Wonderful Clean & Friendly Hotel
comment:
We just enjoyed a fabulous 4 night stay at Thanh Lịch as a family of 4 in interconnecting rooms. Beautiful spacious rooms, beds were huge and comfortable, great aircon which continues to run even when you remove your room key from the slot ensuring you return to a cool haven after exploring in the heat. Breakfast had a large array of western & local foods, definitely something for everybody. We enjoyed lunch and room service also. The children enjoyed the pool on the 6th floor.
All the wonderful staff were lovely, welcoming and accommodating. Special shout out to Anh & Giang, Thankyou we will definitely stay again next time we visit Hue!

title: I will come back again.Thank you
comment: Hello we are leaving today the hotel is good n the staff are politely. HOAI HUONG.we will be back .Thznk you so much.love the hotel n the place.the breafast is good.on behalf of my tour .thank you. The room was nice and the hotel near the center.

title: Very well suggested to stay at this Boutique Hotel
comment: From the staff service, the room and their food are so satisfying. Thank you Ms Hoai Houng she is so polite & helpful in our every need. Thank you Thanh Lich Royal Boutique Hotel. Very nice & cosy too. Very convenient location just around the city

title: Feeling at home with luxe, grat location and the lovely Ngoc and Thru
comment: Great experience mainly because of our hostesses the lovely Ngoc en Thu who made our stay feeling like home, very luxureous and spacey rooms hotel is located in the middel of rhe centre close to all sightsee spots and the imperial citadel ans palaces

title: Wonderful stay!
comment: NGOC & ANIM treated us with the best service and smiles. We felt very welcomed and very looked after with all our enquiries and assistance finding food spots or tourist attractions. Highly recommend! Great location, roads were not too busy but close enough to walking street, imperial city and the perfume river!

title: MERCI A HONG
comment:
Hello Mrs. hong
Is very good and helpful. Thank you for his professionalism and kindness always there and very attentive.
The hotel is very good with varied dishes which allowed us to spend a kon stay.I want to make
A BIG THANK YOU TO HONG

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment: Very large room, clean comfortable, silent a very good restaurant and a team to receive us exceptional and especially. Thanks to Huong who took care of us during our stay. I would definitely recommend this hotel booed go with your eyes closed

title: Amazing stay
comment: Spacious room with very good lighting. It has both a shower and a bathtub. We were well received from the start by the employees. Thanks to Ahn and Giang who knew how to advise us well during our stay. I will go back!

title: B.
comment: The rooms are spacious and big, the beds are very friendly, the bathrooms are spacious and clean, the amenities are well-equipped, the atmosphere in the accommodations is very good, the breakfast service is good, the food options are great, and the likes are so many.

title: The best hotel I've ever been to
comment:
Perfect room. Super equipped bathroom. Cleaning 10.
Unbeatable customer service. Thu Anh has helped us in everything we have needed with kindness and efficiency. Fully recommended. Terrace and spectacular viewpoint. To repeat.

title: Good.
comment: I had a wonderful experience at Thanh Lich Hotel. The hotel is clean, well-equipped, and conveniently located in the city center—perfect for both business and leisure. I would especially like to thank Mrs. Huong Giang for her outstanding service. She was incredibly friendly, professional, and always willing to assist with anything we needed. Her dedication and warm hospitality truly made our stay more comfortable and memorable. Thanks to her, everything went smoothly. I highly recommend this hotel and will definitely return on my next visit.

title: A good hotel
comment:
The +:
- very comfortable bedding
- large bathroom, bathtub AND shower
- the rooms are in accordance with the photos, spacious
- bottled water and free coffee/tea
- the varied breakfast buffet
- the pool

The - :
- the average English level of staff who slow down exchanges
- rooms could be more soundproofed

title: Incredible luxury hotel with fabulous breakfast and beautiful pool/spa area
comment:
Incredible stay in this luxury hotel 2 km from the Imperial City of Hue!
The room is elegant, decorated with care, everything is designed to make you feel good: mattress and comfortable bedding, nice furniture, beautiful bathroom, full of welcome products...
The breakfast buffet is amazing. I have never eaten so much in quantity and diversity as I did in this hotel. The view of the restaurant is superb over the whole city.
The pool very nice and spa also with massages etc...
The whole establishment is decorated with elegant and neat decoration with pretty paintings, beautiful furniture, statues etc.
Photos of the hotel in compliance.
Go stay at this hotel!

title: Wow!
comment: Attention to the customer, very clean structure. It is located on a street that in the evening is pedestrianized, a good refuge from the city traffic. Breakfast is for all tastes and the view from the restaurant and bar is really impressive. Mrs. Anh Giang welcomed us in an amazing way and gave us tips for tours as well. Would stay again.

title: Gem of a place to stay in Hue
comment: From the moment we arrived (my friends have stayed a few times) the staff are polite and help in every way. When shown to my room I was very pleasantly surprised by the size of the bed and how clean and spacious the suite was. Breakfast was the best I have ever seen in any hotel and never hurried. Would definitely return.

title: Central placed hotel in Hue
comment: Excellent hotel close to everything in the centre of Hue. You can walk to almost anywhere in the centre within about 20 minutes. The hotel has everything you could ask for and offers very high-quality service from all the staff. Definitely worth a visit.

title: Great place for a family
comment: We loved our stay here. Ngoc and Anh were so helpful. We were fortunate to be upgraded and the suite was amazing. Our train was in the evening and we could leave our bags during the day and use the pool and shower before we went to the station and after a hot day walking around the imperial city, this was wonderful. Definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Lovely hotel and amazing staff
comment: Amazing staff and hotel. Very helpful with any requests. Lovely and clean. Great location.

title: A wonderful stay in an impressive hotel
comment:
Great location and lovely clean room!
The breakfast was fantastic with a great selection of local and world food.
We had dinner in the restaurant and the service, presentation and quality of food was world class. Highly recommended.
There is a large swimming pool outside with plenty of loungers to relax on.
In the evening there was a jazz duo in the bar area which was non intrusive and enjoyable.
The staff went out of their way to make us feel at home and we had a great stay in this wonderful hotel which provides exceptional value for money.

title: This amazing hotel was the highlight of our trip to Vietnam!
comment: We had a wonderful time at this magnificent hotel! The accommodation was excellent and the staff were extremely polite and friendly. Our room was upgraded to a Junior Suite which was truly exceptional! Thank you Indochine Palace!

title: Rustic but elegant hotel
comment: Very nice rustic hotel about a 20 minute walk to the river, 25 minutes to the walking street area, and a 10 minute scooter Grab ride from the Imperial City. Big beautiful pool, a very nice spa, functional gym, and a great breakfast buffet in tge Fewnch restaurant that outside of breakfast has a huge menu with Asian and Western food options. As you would expect from the outstanding hospitality of Vietnam, the staff were kind and helpful. I recommend staying here.

title: Best place in Hue
comment: Beautiful place and exceptional staff.

title: Nothing else but good…
comment: Vy and An are absolutely outstanding staff at Indochine Palace . Their help during my stay was invaluable, and they went above and beyond to make everything smooth and enjoyable. Warm, friendly, and always professional, they truly made my experience memorable. The breakfast was excellent, and the room was very clean and comfortable.

title: Fantastic hotel and service
comment: We had a fantastic stay at the Indochine Palace. Their breakfast buffet was amazing and their service second to none. I mistakenly left my earrings behind and they were kind enough to reach out when they found them and organise express postage to my hotel in HCM. I was blown away by this service. I want to express a special thanks to Hồ Trang who facilitated the return of my earrings. Thank you so much!

title: Lovely older hotel
comment: Lovely older hotel near the centre of town. Very quiet and smelt really good. The staff were beautiful - especially Kha (concierge) and Mau who served us in the restaurant - they both helped us out with our rudimentary Vietnamese. Kha recommended a great restaurant (Chan) and booked us a table. Great pool & really enjoyable stay.

title: Very good hotel
comment:
Stayed here for two nights whilst visiting the city.

Staff are lovely and the rooms quite large. We were at the front of the hotel over looking the road, although the traffic noise didn’t bother us at all. The bed was super comfy, so we had a good nights sleep both nights.

Hotel location is good for local restaurants and shopping. However, a bit too far to walk to the citadel for most people, which would also be alongside busy roads. There are plenty of taxis available if you want one. We walked down to the perfume river from the hotel which talk about 30 minutes. The citadel would be another 20 minutes.

The hotel bar area and seating downstairs lacked a bit of life when we were there (a quiet two days), although afternoon coffee and then cocktails later in the evening were well made / good.

Breakfast offers lots of choice and is very good quality.

Didn’t use the pool which is at the back of the hotel as we were either out sightseeing, or it was raining (or both!).

Definitely bring a light raincoat, as Hue is on the windward side of hills, so rain can be frequent at certain times of year. The hotel has plenty of umbrellas for guests to use.

Overall, a very good hotel and an enjoyable two day stay.

title: Amazing Luxury Affordable Palace Hotel
comment:
This was our first time in Vietnam and having spent a few days in Ho Chi Minh City, we caught the internal flight to Hue. We loved our accommodation in this beautiful Palace Hotel with its wonderful décor. The location was great, the room was quiet, clean and spacious with a very comfortable bed. The restaurant was amazing serving wonderful dishes throughout the day and nothing seemed too much for the very helpful staff. We used the hotel laundry service and we were delighted when we got our laundry back within a few hours with such efficiency.
The Indochine Palace Hotel was affordable, even though it was luxurious, definitely worth staying at this wonderful place.

title: Excellent Stay
comment: We had an amazing stay at Indochine Palace. The hotel is beautiful, rooms are huge and beds are so comfy, clean and amazing price for what they were. It is in an excellent location, the facilities are great. The staff are really friendly and helpful. Big thank you to Vy, Guest Relation Officer for making us feel so welcome. We cannot recommend highly enough.

title: March 2026
comment: Great hotel with friendly staff and good atmosphere

title: Holiday
comment: Staff very helpful particularly vy guest relation officer went above and beyond

title: Smelt of damp and I consider the balconies dangerous- had to sign a disclaimer about them!
comment: The corridor and bedroom smelt of damp. The bed sheets felt damp. The room had a dehumidifier but it was not emptied every day and was full so not working. The hotel remedied the problem promptly but we should not have had to ask them to empty the dehumidifier. This was not the weather. It seems to be a problem with the building which appears to have poorly designed ventilation. Also the rooms balconies which were small but felt dangerous and the balcony doors had a lock a child could easily open. I have never seen such a high building have such balconies before ( they are usually sealed) and we had to sign a disclaimer on arrival to take responsibility for using the balcony! It was an attractive hotel but I would advise against it and certainly not with children. I will be advising my tour operator accordingly.

title: Vy
comment: I had an excellent experience with the concierge service. By was very helpful. Traveling solo and she made my day so easy. Planned the day trip for me , guided me through. Very respectful, knowledgeable, helpful and very understanding. You have a great asset to the company. By thank you for all your services , going above and beyond for me to make sure I have tension free stay . Thank you again for being a good person

title: Disappointing stay
comment: We felt the hotel was very tired and outdated. Our room felt a little grubby and had a damp smell. The bed was not great, it had a very thick mattress topper that just felt like sleeping on a duvet. Breakfast offered plenty of choice but not particularly good quality. Service lacked as coffee often didn’t arrive. Used the spa and had a very good massage. Some nice touches, fruit, flip flops and umbrella in the room. Probably wouldn’t recommend.

title: Outstanding warm service from Start to Finish
comment:
We had a fantastic stay at Indochine Palace.
The service was outstanding, we arrived early and, although no rooms were immediately available, the team arranged an early check-in within an hour and made us feel very welcome.

After we missed our train, they also quickly organized a private taxi to Hoi An for us, which we really appreciated.

The facilities are slightly worn but still very good. The pool and spa area are wonderful, breakfast is excellent, and the WiFi works perfectly. The bed and pillows were super comfortable, ensuring a great night’s sleep

Only minor downside: just very few international TV channels for news.

Overall, a truly GREAT experience… we would happily stay again.

title: All staff polite and friendly.
comment:
The hotel was beautiful,
Swimming 🏊‍♀️
Staff friendly & helpful
Breakfast lots of choice.

title: A wonderful stay
comment:
We had a wonderful stay.
Luxurious room, clean and very comfortable with all necessary amenities and toiletries. The atmosphere is soothing.
Beautiful swimming pool, towels and bathrobes available
Excellent breakfast.
The staff is lovely, at our service.
They arranged our trips with private drivers and our transfer from Hue to Hoi an.
Great location.

title: Service was outstanding!
comment:
Excellent service and hospitality for everything!
Vy Rum Bao, Le Bao Fantastic!

title: Too many families with screaming and running children
comment:
Too many families with screaming and running children

Specially asked for a room without family with children next door, and what do I get.....

The studio is a nice room, but all studios are connected rooms. Better get a more expensive one if you don't want a connected room.

title: Trailfinders choice
comment: Stayed at this hotel in January and it was excellent. We could not fault the room, breakfast, cleanliness, service or the staff. A special mention to Ms Vy for her advice and attention....superb. 👍😊...will visit again....

title: Superb staff excellent service.
comment:
We were greeted on arrival by a lady called Kha. She was superb and provided us with places to go and visit. She also recomended an excellent restaurant . We booked the hotel car with her which I would recomend.
The room was spotless and it had the best shower I have ever had.
The bar w as quaint and again staff who were helpful and attentive.
Breakfast was great with a huge selection.
The hotel is a ten minute walk to and area wth loads of restaurants I would recomend this hotel for anyone visiting the city.

title: Thank you very much, Ms Vy!
comment:
My stay at Indochine Palace was excellent. The room was spotless; the cleanliness was really remarkable and constant throughout the day.
I would like to thank the team for the attention they received, especially Mr. Rum and Ms Vy, who were extremely friendly and attentive. I make special mention of Ms Vy, who was extraordinary from the very beginning: she performed a very professional check-in, gave me excellent recommendations for food, transport and activities and always showed a warm and efficient attitude. Their professionalism and friendliness perfectly represent the hospitality of the hotel and the city of Hue. THANK YOU VERY MUCH VY!!

title: Splendour with charm
comment: Fantastic charming colonial splendour hotel with sumptuous rooms and first class service . The staff are so efficient but friendly and kind . Everything is dine with grace and happiness. We hope you are served by Lena who is such a happy young lady

title: Felt like royalty at the palace
comment: We had a fantastic time at this hotel. The rooms, facilities and staff were all top class. Special mention for VY and Edward who were so helpful and polite during our stay. They were excellent hosts in a magical place

title: Fantastic experience
comment:
Fantastic hotel
Great food Very helpful and friendly staff in every area
Would have to mention 2 of the staff
VY and EDWARD who were very engaging and friendly great ambassadors for the Indochine Palace and have excellent English and very knowledgeable

title: Lovely Family Holiday
comment: Had a super time at Indochine Palace. The staff were very friendly and accomodation was excellent. We were particularly impressed with Ms Vy for the help and information she gave on the local places to visit.

title: Incredible staff
comment: Every single member of staff was, without exception, delightfully pleasant, incredibly helpful, and spoke a level of English unparalleled on my travels through Vietnam to date. My room was spacious and spotlessly clean, and the breakfast offering was vast. A couple of smaller things around the hotel might have benefited from a refresh, but nothing to majorly detract from a fabulous stay!

title: The Staff here will Spoil You with Service
comment: Indochine Palace is truly a place! Elegant and beautiful! The ambience, food, and rooms were all wonderful. What is exceptional if the service by the staff. Our concierge, Edward, and VY from guest services, as well all of guest services staff took SUCH GOOD CARE of us. They truly spoiled us, and were so eager to do so. I highly recommend this five star hotel!

title: Great experience. Wish I could taste it higher than 5 stars.
comment: Cannot say enough good things for this hotel. Right from the start fui the final checkout everything was seamless. The staff were so accommodating and courteous. If I was to pick one person, it would be utterly doing injustice to the rest of the staff. However, I have to give out a special shout out to Kha we made a stay memorable right from the word get go. The location of this hotel is prime.Close to all attraction. I would certainly stay again at this location hands down if I was to come back to Hue.

title: Luxurious
comment: Great location, clean, friendly. We loved the morning breakfast! The gym had enough equipments. Loved the sauna!

title: Could not ask for better!
comment: The location of this hotel is perfect. It’s a magnificent hotel with beautiful rooms and extremely helpful staff. Especially, but not only, Vy and Rum.

title: Highly recommended quality hotel.
comment: Superb quality hotel. Room furnishings are of the the highest quality and with a sophisticated feel to the design. The staff are ultra friendly and obliging eg checking that you are happy with the room shortly after you have unpacked. I had a break in the frame on my reading glasses and the friendly receptionist arranged for their in-house engineer to undertake a temporary repair with superglue. Overall, I thoroughly recommend this hotel if you are visiting the Hue area of Vietnam.

title: Lovely stay with a bit of luxury
comment:
Wanted to treat myself by staying somewhere extra nice, and Indochine Palace did not disappoint.
Very comfortable rooms, good menu and food in the restaurant too.
Thanks to Kha in Guest Relations, and Sarah in Le Brasserfor all of their hard work too.

title: Great old-style hotel
comment: This is a classic old hotel with lovely rooms, grand public spaces, a gorgeous pool, terrific staff, and the best and most extensive breakfast selection ever.

title: Dreamlike luxury holiday
comment: Just fantastic! The colonial style that can be found everywhere allows you to immerse yourself in another era. We were allowed to stay there for 14 days and so I took the time to admire the many different chests of drawers from the colonial period, for example. What craftsmanship! Great service! Room service, kitchen, restaurant staff, reception staff, bouncers, the wonderful gardeners who continued with their work when it rained like crazy!!, the watchful security staff and everyone who worked in the background so we had an unforgettable time we would like to thank you again! An incredible breakfast buffet awaits guests every morning!! I can't understand that most guests only stayed there for 1 or 2 nights!! 1 week should be minimum to relax and enjoy the sights and food of Hue! Always friendly and helpful from the heart and not to make money! Totally relaxed with wonderful impressions we leave Hue and the Indochina Palace! A special thanks to the award-winning top chef who conjured up my favourite Vietnamese dish for my birthday!

title: The great place to enjoy Hue and its people
comment:
I am a frequent guest at Indochine Hotel, and every stay confirms why I keep coming back. From the very first welcome to daily interactions, the level of professionalism, kindness, and genuine care shown by the staff is consistently outstanding.
I would like to mention Ngoc, Ngan, and Quynh in particular, as I remember their names by heart, but my appreciation truly extends to the entire team. Everyone contributes with warmth, attention, and a friendly attitude to the refined, relaxed, and authentic hospitality that defines this hotel.
I would wholeheartedly recommend Indochine to anyone seeking an unforgettable experience and a truly luxurious stay in Hue. A wonderful place, made exceptional by its people. I look forward to my next visit every day. Massimo

title: Beyond expectations in all fronts
comment: Staff were friendly and professional and extreme attention to detail such as checking rooms post checkout. Johnny was attentive to our needs and went above and beyond. He called our bus driver company ( not related to the hotel) and updated us about their whereabouts.

title: A fabulous place to stay in Hue
comment: A beautiful hotel in a great location in the city. Amazing breakfast too! Special thanks to Kha for giving us ideas of where to visit and what to eat. Highly recommend staying here on your next trip to Hue!

title: Comfortable & cozy stay
comment: Travelled to Hue with my mother & we were staying in Indochine Palace Hotel, they have complete faciliies from gym, pool to sauna. We were attended by very friendly hoteliers. They suggested nearby restaurants to go to and food to try. Very comfortable stay in the hotel & we love it here

title: Thank you Vy, Rum, and Nam
comment:
The best part of this hotel is the staff. Thank you, Vy and Rum, for going out of your way to make our stay exceptionally comfortable and welcoming. Vy made arrangements for our dinner reservations as well as provided suggestions for places to visit. She made recommendations for art exhibits, temples, restaurants. She also made sure to take care of our family members when one fell ill.

Rum also went above and beyond to help with car accommodations and was exceptionally kind.

I also want to thank Nam, the driver who spent an entire day with me. He was patient, kind, helpful - making sure that we made all of our stops and included suggestions for other locations as well.

Our family was well taken care of.

The hotel, however, should consider managing the humidity in the building. The staff was definitely able to help with this, but it was a concern throughout the property.

I look forward to visiting again.

title: Great hotel for exploring Hue
comment: We stayed in this hotel just before Xmas 2025. Very large hotel with great facilities and an enormous swimming pool! Great breakfast and we were delighted with the room and facilities. Thank you.

title: Comfortable stay in Hue
comment:
A spacious and clean room with a very large comfortable bed. The room facilities were very good, great shower, television with free movies, mini fridge and bar, and daily water. The bathroom area needed more shelf space for toiletries, towels etc but this is being picky in an otherwise good room. Additional towels are offered nightly, if needed but there are sufficient anyway.
The hotel was under capacity, it was apparent that many cancellations had been made because of the October floods, but the hotel had been very well cleaned and there was already no sign of the earlier upset in the city.
The hotel is about a 10 - 15 minute walk from a good variety of bars and entertainment.
The food and drink in the hotel was of good quality and very affordable.
As with every Indochina hotel, the staff here were so welcoming, helpful and friendly, eager to chat snd help if needed. Thank you Vy in customer experience for advice and information about the hotel and city, she was very nice, but really so was every staff member.
The only downside, minor, is that the hotel looks a little tired in places, perhaps recently weathered.

title: Great hotel to stay in Hue
comment: Excellent hotel to stay in Hue. Very close to the center. Excellent service and service. Rooms with great style and charm. I don't give five stars why I see two points as improveable. They have to improve the soundproofing of the rooms, you could hear the traffic of cars and motorcycles. And there are too many lights in the LED room of the TV, the router, the TV box,.. and others that makes turning everything off see a lot of light in the room to sleep. Everything else, Excellent.

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Room service is very good all staff very good vy _ rum very helpful. They give us great experience and memory in hue city. Highly recommend

title: Great Stay & Friendly Staffs
comment:
Great room and everything was perfect! Not to mention the place is near to a grocery store and also some late night stroll shops/bars/food

The sauna facility was great too !

title: Great hotel
comment: We stayed for 2 days and everything was great. Breakfast, gym, spa. Comfortable room, tv with movies. Vy and all the staff were great. Property kept in good condition. Will come back.

title: Lovely, but empty.
comment: We stayed here 3 nights in November. It is a very grand hotel and very presentable. The only thing is it was empty which affected the atmosphere..... this could have been because of the weather which was very wet. We ate here (due to wet weather) and the food was fine. One thing that was annoying is that the bar shut at 10 pm which was is early and they enforced this event if you were a guest! Which wasn't very hospitable. It was my birthday whilst I was here and with out any prompting the staff left a lovely cake and flowers in my room - this was so nice! thank you.

title: Comfortable and luxurious.
comment: Great room, comfortable beds, stylish decor. Very helpful and helpful staff. Very good breakfast. Near shopping center.

title: Staff
comment: All the staff are extremely courteous and helpful. Shout out to Vy- she was wonderful! She provided some good suggestions and was always ready to help! Thank you Vy for making our visit simply wonderful.

title: Great hotel in cental location in Hue
comment:
Excellent hotel with great facilities and staff who go above and beyond
Special thanks to Johnny for helping us organise an unexpected free day and help with restaurants
The hotel is centrally located close to shops , restaurants, and nightlife

title: Great couple of nights
comment: The staff are lovely, the breakfast was good quality with plenty of choice. Our room was spacious and beautiful, but our only complaint would be about the lighting, as it was a bit dim for our liking.

title: A pleasant stay
comment:
Elegantly appointed with amazing studio rooms…. A great area to sleep separated from the dressing space and separate toilet & shower. The colour in common parts was a little tired though.
Really helpful and polite staff especially Vy in guest relations who went over and above to ensure our enjoyment.

title: Old colonial luxury
comment: Absolutely stunning. Old colonial luxury on par with Raffles in Singapore. Gorgeous hotel, beautiful pool, fantastic staff, breakfast and coffee. Loved every minute of it!

title: Exceptional Hotel
comment: Wonderful staff, facilities and cleanliness. Great menu for those eating in and wonderful care when a family crisis unfortunately occurs.

title: Lovely hotel
comment:
Hotel was comfortable and spacious - surprising for such a well equipped bedroom to have no drawer space for clothes. Most staff were very charming.
We enjoyed the live jazz but would have liked some interaction between the band and guests

title: Exceptional
comment: Deserves its name palace. Beautiful art deco building, staff has the height, large room and breakfast outsized, all for a derisory price for the service. For those who like this style of hotel.

title: Two night stay Indochine palace
comment: Great stay in Hue, hotel was immaculate-great location and staff were very friendly, helpful and informative-especially Kha who checked us in/out👍🥰

title: Wonderful hotel and wonderful staff in record-breaking flood
comment:
A huge thank you all the wonderful staff at this amazing hotel, where we became stranded in a record-breaking flood. We were part of a group, scheduled to stay for just one night, but this was extended to two nights (and therefore a whole extra day) when the flooding made it impossible to leave. There were very few guests in the hotel, but the wonderful staff continued to provide a full service for us, staying way beyond their normal shifts (and, we suspect, at considerable personal cost). Their kindness and professionalism was quite overwhelming and every single member of staff was still smiling on what was probably Day 2 or even Day 3 of their continuous shift.

I have stayed in hotels all over the world and have never felt so genuinely welcomed and cared for as I did in this wonderful hotel. Thank you, thank you, thank you, Indochine Palace and all your amazing staff.
