Also worth mentioning that the beds were exceptionally comfortable and the rooms really beautiful. Thanks to the flooding, I will always remember Hue as an all-time great hotel experience.

title: Convenience of Hue’s Indochine Palace
comment: We stayed here for two nights and were very well looked after Vy. She offered us great recommendations for vegetarian restaurants in the area. We were able to walk to most of the popular places. The rooms were slightly dated compared to some other hotels in Vietnam of that standard.

title: 11 days of pleasure
comment:
From the moment we arrive till the day we leave . Everything was such a pleasure. Indochina Palace's team did such a great job during our stay .
The hotel was a classic French-designed . Opulent and so charming . It's suits the travelers who love nostalgic style.
Staff are friendly and very helpful. They'll do their best to be there whenever you need.
Special thanks to Mr Vu for doing such a great job with our lost luggage .
And to the F&B team for the surprise birthday gift on my partner's birthday.
Rooms are very comfortable , spacious .
Breakfast is a huge range of food from Asian to European .
We had a great spa experience. The massage was excellent .
Overall, this hotel has everything that we need for our vacation .
Definitely recommended

s

title: Impeccable
comment: We loved this place. Attractive, clean, great service and food. And in a typhoon, this became a lovely refuge! Thoroughly recommended as a destination with access to beautiful places.

title: Stunning Accomodation
comment:
This hotel is outstanding! The rooms are huge with beautiful decor. Staff went above and beyond. The included breakfast catered for all nationalities and dietary requirements. Amazing pool. If I could give it 10 stars I would.
Definitely will return to this gorgeous accomodation.

title: Very grand traditional style hotel
comment: Located about 10 minutes walk from bars and restaurants. Hotel had large room and very comfortable. Swimming pool was amazing size for a city centre hotel. Breakfast buffet -great selection for all tastes. Traditional decor and style Only critique is hairdryer in room very small and ineffective.

title: Very nice experience
comment:
A very nice establishment with very attentive staff.
Highlights: very large rooms, a very large pool a varied breakfast buffet.
Only weak point: a little far from the historic center

title: A palace fit for a queen. This place has so much charm not only to be found in the architect. They are the jewels in the crown o
comment: The reception staff are fabulous. Just to name 3 - Vy. Rum and Minh have always treated kim and I with respect, coutesy and willing to help sort all our needs

title: Hue hotel of choice
comment: Very good stay. Massive room with the comfiest bed ever. Great views over Hue. Good location, excellent staff and delicious breakfast. Definitely recommend this hotel if you are staying in Hue.

title: Excellent hotel!
comment: Excellent hotel – modern, spotless, with super friendly staff. The food was amazing, and Jhonny at reception was especially helpful even after we checked out. Highly recommended!

title: Nice stay
comment: The overall staffs services is good, breakfast is good, the staffs at breakfast is very friendly n helpful. We are happy staying in this nice hotel.

title: Great experience with Indochine Palace
comment: Enjoyed our stays from 07-09 September and we are impressed with staff Kha & Hieu at this great 5 stars Indochine palace. Looking forward to another visit soon.

title: Excellent
comment:
Wonderful place, perfect location, staff extremely helpful especially Kha and Daniel. The rooms are excellent with beautiful views. Great breakfast and overall amazing experience.
Thank you Indochine for making my stay so wonderful.

title: You will ave lots of beautiful photos with the pool view
comment: My family had a wonderful experience staying at this hotel. The service was excellent, the room was spacious, and the staff were friendly and attentive. Especially, the swimming pool was beautiful and gave us a truly relaxing time. We were very satisfied and would definitely come back

title: A lovely classic hotel, with wonderful staff, excellent breakfast, and luxurious beds
comment:
A beautifully styled hotel, close to the centre of Hue. Our view overlooked a small lake.
Our deluxe room was spacious and the beds and pillows were luxurious, guaranteeing a great nights sleep.
The breakfast buffet had everything we wanted and more! The swimming pool is an absolute stand out and the gym is well-equipped.
There are so many areas where you can comfortably relax and take in the surroundings.
The staff were attentive and helpful and we enjoyed our one week stay.

title: Super suite, huge pool, great spa and fabulous breakfast.
comment: Great hotel - absolutely enormous with huge pool. We had a great suite on 10th floor with so much space for 4 of us with two bathrooms. Super breakfast - and very attentive service from Alice. We did trips arranged by Vy in guest relations. We were driven around by Tam who was a great driver and looked after us with cold water and umbrellas for shade. Thank you also to Rum. Also lovely restaurant recommendations from another concierge lady and thank you to the spa team.

title: Amazing room in the central Hue city
comment:
Central of Hue, rent a motorbike at Receptionist can go anywhere in Hue City.

Amazing room with affordable price, good breakfast.

Mr. Johnny gave us a lot of recommendation.

----------
Luu

Stayed in 18th and 19th Aug

title: Nice hotel with character but don't drink there
comment:
Really nice city hotel. Built in old elegant French style like a Paris hotel but is not that old. It's right on the city near the river.
I booked a studio room thinking it would be small as I was only there for two nights. The room was massive and very nice
The breakfast was excellent.
The pool is good .
All for less than half I would normally pay for a hotel like this.
My only complaint was the price of the drinks in the bar. Twice what I paid in other 5star hotels in Vietnam. This is probably why the bar was empty. I went down the road to eat and have a beer.
I booked a city tour at the hotel and it was excellent and good value.

title: Overnight stay in Hue
comment: Great location, comfortable room and bedding but a little old hotel. Regarding the pool, unfortunately we were not able to enjoy it properly because there was a school group that had invaded the entire pool that day. We only stayed one night but unfortunately there was a lot of noise due to uneasy guests shouting and chatting loudly from one end of the hall to the other in the night without worrying about others. The staff is welcoming and smiling especially Julia. Indeed, the day before our departure we encountered a problem with a plane ticket and Julia accompanied us until the problem was resolved. Many thanks to her!

title: An Exceptional Welcoming!
comment:
The hotel is fabulous and the staff extremely kind. I would like to thank very warmly Mrs. Sophia who very kindly agreed to correct an unfortunate mistake made at the time of booking.
I had a great stay at this hotel which I highly recommend.

title: Would thoroughly recommend!
comment:
Our family of six had a great stay at the Indochine Palace after a long hard but fun day on an easy rider tour over the Hai Van Pass from Hoi An.
One of our sons got a nasty foot injury whilst swimming on the bike trip and Hieu from the front desk was very helpful tending to my son’s injury and organising the hotel’s doctor to visit and deal with this issue. Lovely hotel/ great breakfast and great spa /pool.Would highly recommend this hotel to anyone travelling to Hue!

title: Great stay and good location
comment: Really good hotel in central Hue. The rooms are spacious and of a high quality. Good breakfast and jazz in the evenings. Very well located and walkable / minor taxi ride to most locations. The staff are very helpful. Kha, one of the staff there was particularly excellent with her recommendations and assistance. We'd definitely stay here if we come back to Hue.

title: Top to Hue!
comment:
Very good hotel!!

In Vietnam, a lot of the ( Stars are not really there because the Service is really short (I know something we are in Da Lat in a 5 Stars below everything).

The indochina is very well located, a really Top Staff with a good command of English!

The rooms are just huge en Suite and the responsiveness of the Staff is super Top!

The equipment on site is very good and Bravo to the SPA which has a great Team!

Price quality ratio, I recommend 100%, because unlike more modern competitors, Indochina brings an extra soul:-)

title: Good option in Hue
comment: Beautiful hotel, great location. Pool is large and great temperature, most hotels pools were too warm due to extreme heat, this pool was great. Would suggest maybe a few more sun lounges but not a big problem. All other facilities are high standard, spa, gem, breakfast etc.

title: Excellent!
comment: A luxurious historic hotel in Hue. It had a luxurious feel. The hotel staff were all kind and friendly, especially Vy's hospitality was excellent. Thank you for telling me about a delicious banh mi restaurant. I would definitely like to visit this hotel again.

title: The pool area is remarkable. The room was great. Probably the best hotel in Hue.
comment: The staff is very attentive and very understanding, and we had a great time. We can't wait to get back.

title: Indochine Palace Hotel, Hue – 2 Bedroom Apartment
comment: Indochine Palace was a highlight of our trip. The 2-bedroom apartment was luxurious, spotless, and perfect for a family. The pool area is beautiful and the breakfast buffet offered something for everyone. The staff were attentive and made us feel very welcome. We would highly recommend this hotel for families looking for space and comfort in Hue.

title: Great rooms and facilities
comment: Lives up to the five star title. Rooms are spacious and always clean. The ground level and breakfast are great add-ons to the hotel.

title: Good.
comment:
Good hotel, we ordered picnic to bring breakfast and prepared everything great, salty, sweet, fruit and coffee.
It was an overnight stay

title: Palace Experience in Hue
comment:
I stayed for a weekday business trip and was a great choice. Location is walking distance to the Perfume river and lots of amenities around the hotel (restaurants, shopping mall)

Great front desk team—guest service and bellmen were always attentive and accommodating. The facilities are classic and very elegant, truly worthy of the name “palace.” Breakfast had an amazing selection, much more than I expected. The room decoration is phenomenal, with a beautiful colonial French style.

Highly recommend!

title: Two night stay
comment: What a palace! It is suited to all kinds of people. Families, couple or solo travellers. The pool area is magnificent. Lovely restaurants and bars within walking distance of the hotel. You can walk or get a taxi to the main attractions like Imperial City. Rooms are clean and the staff are friendly. We got food when we used the pool facilities and the pizza was tasty. Our room had a balcony overlooking the city.

title: Best and unforgetable experience
comment:
Best ever hotel in Hue I experienced..I stayed here one night with my family, my room is kind of suit room.. the receptionist and hostess (Lena) welcomed warmly as soon as I checked in. I had Lena take photos and she did well.
The room was amazingly perfumed and spotless.. I had dinner at the restaurant in the hotel, the food was super tasty and nice. Especially, the staff was skilled, well-experienced and friendly..namely Sophie giving me good advice in choosing course suitable with my taste.
At breakfast,I want to send a big thank to Vanessa and Tom who support me and my kid during breakfast time.
I surely will come back this hotel for the next holiday.

title: Amazing quality hotel!
comment: The staff here provided excellent and exceptional service, the room was beautiful, very good quality and clean, The breakfast was delicious, the location was also very central to the city, we would highly recommend staying here. If you are visiting Hue!

title: An Exceptional Stay at Indochine Palace Hue
comment: Indochine Palace offers a perfect blend of classic Indochine charm and modern luxury. The rooms are spacious, impeccably clean, and well-appointed. Staff are highly professional, courteous, and attentive to every need. Its central location makes it convenient for both business and leisure travelers. A top-tier experience — highly recommended.

title: Great hotel
comment: We really enjoyed our stay at Indochine Palace. It’s an older style hotel which we enjoyed. The staff were super professional and extremely helpful. The breakfast buffet was top class and our room was excellent. The hotel is well located. Would highly recommend!

title: Excellent value and comfortable stay
comment:
The best hotel I have ever stayed in.bedroom was perfect.all hotel staff were amazing. Pool was inviting. Breakfast was excellent so much food.
Location was perfect to all close attentions.
Cleanliness was amazingly serviced twice a day friendly english speaking staff with a can do attitude. So appreciative
Excellent value and have rebooked
Thank you all for a pleasant and enjoyable stay

title: 5 star luxury and fabulous staff
comment: What a fabulous hotel. Bedrooms are luxurious. Beds comfy. Air con very welcome and just right for hot days. Pool very nice Breakfast - everything you could need and if not staff will arrange it for you for the next day and staff genuinely cannot do enough for you. We miss you now we’ve moved on! Totally exceeded our expectations

title: Wonderful Stay!
comment:
Beautiful hotel, gorgeous pool, great location, excellent breakfast. But what stands out is the exceptional service offered by all employees. Julia at the front desk took great care of us along with the doormen.

Thank you, Indochine Palace, for a lovely stay!

title: Hue sightseeing
comment:
We had a room with balcony facing the main street. Nevertheless there was absolute no disturbance by street noise. The room also featured a ceiling mounted fan which allowed us to switch off aircon during day time.
The hotel staff was very attentive and helpful. Especially the breakfast staff fulfilled all wishes. We stayed 4 nights and already on the second morning the people remembered our preferences.
The location is in walking distance to many restaurants and the river. For the old city and the palace its better to get a Grab or taxi.
The hotel has a small gym, nothing too fancy but good enough to do maintenance. The pool is quite chlorinated. It's recommended to bring swimming goggles.

title: Comfortable, affordable excellent quality, staff friendly go out their way to help 😊 central location. 100%
comment: Excellent I’d recommend you to stay here , staff very friendly & helpful. Rooms are clean , spacious, modern with an old world feel. Pool , gym, spa , restaurant, breakfast lots of choice. Close to all the sights of Hue. The hotel with its grand entrance & exterior 😊

title: Why do hotels not ban speaker phone conversations in public areas?
comment: A nice building although a little run down. Breakfast was a little chaotic, but that’s fairly normal for a hotel with mainly Vietnamese guests. Staff generally friendly and helpful, but were unwilling to confront guests in the bar area who were having speaker phone conversations at full volume. I did their work for them, but was largely ignored in my requests for courtesy. We moved elsewhere which was a shame. Not a unique issue in Vietnam but the staff should have been supportive.

title: Wonderful Hotel
comment:
This is my second time here, & I again find it a great choice. It is located near the river, mall, & center of town. It is stylish in a classic Info vine way but s relatively new.
The rooms are big & comfortable, the AC works well (not so well in an older hotel in town). The breakfast Buffett is great, and the good for other meals is good too. There’s a big outdoor pool & a nice spa (& gym) on the lower level. The on-site concierge is ready to make recommendations for restaurants, etc.

title: Just amazing, time and time again
comment:
Wow, just wow! This was our second visit to Vietnam and to the Indochine, this time extending our stay as we were so impressed with the last stay. This stay only cemented our love of this hotel, its staff , Hue and its surrounds as well as the people of Vietnam.

We arrived early but all the stops were pulled out to get our rooms ready for us, despite the hotel being incredibly busy. We were impressed on our last visit with the comprehensive nature of check in, with all parties showing a genuine desire to please and ensure we had a fantastic stay. The level of customer service it outstanding.

We were fortunate to be upgraded to suites on a higher floor, which were beyond anything we have stayed in at previous 5 star hotels in any country. We didn’t want to leave our rooms!!

We at breakfast , lunch and dinner over the course of our stay and each meal was fantastic not only due to great service and food quality but also the setting next to the wonderful pool. Unfortunately we once again didn’t get to use the pool, but even more reason to visit again!

The real jewel in the crown of this hotel is not the rooms, the pool or the food, it’s the amazing service from all the staff. Every single person we interacted with went out of their way to help us, engage with us and genuinely wanted us to enjoy our stay and the country. We feel like we left friends behind !

Needless to say we will be returning again next year (this is becoming our annual pilgrimage)!

title: Very good hotel for yne step to boo
comment:
We spent 3 perfect nights at the Indochina palace.
We had taken a superior room, very large. Very good bedding, the shower was at least 5 m2... soft towels too. A small flat on the sink plan, which does not allow to have a mirror in front of the sink.
Apart from that, the pool is very beautiful, the restaurant offers several types of dishes, and breakfast is varied as well.
Special mention for the kindness and helpfulness of all staff.

title: Great!
comment:
We came to Vietnam as part of our honeymoon and stayed in the hotel for two nights

We absolutely loved this hotel. The staff were so friendly and gave us good advice on where to go out in the evenings we loved our room which was very spacious and clean and modern.

The pool was also lovely and very relaxing.

We would come back here again.

title: High End Hotel in Hue
comment: Very high end hotel. The bedroom was traditional and well decorated. Beautiful dining area with views of the pool area. Service is also very high end. You feel spoiled the entire time. And really enjoyed all the sightseeing in Hue. Really marvelous!

title: Fantastic hotel
comment:
A fantastic hotel, great staff who offered excellent recommendations, thanks Joey and brilliant service, thank you Lena.

Would recommend this hotel with great location for exploring Hue. Excellent breakfast in an elegant restaurant.

title: Exceptional customer service
comment:
The staff members were exceptional in all areas. I was suffering from a knee injury and staff members supplied ice and an ice pack on a regular basis without making me feel I was a nuisance.
The mattress and pillows were so soft and fluffy and easily the most comfortable of all the 7 hotels we stayed in on our trip. All in all a first class experience at this lovely hotel.

title: A lovely hotel, pity the weather didn't match
comment: We spent a comfortable 2 nights at the Indochine Palace. Our room was large enough to be comfortable in and everything was clean and in good condition. Unfortunately the weather was overcast making the visit to Hue somewhat of an anti climax. We tried walking from the hotel but there is little of interest nearby so transport is needed.

title: Wonderful staff!
comment: Clean and spacious rooms, excellent location, superb breakfast. But above all, very friendly, competent, genuine, stylish, helpful and knowledgeable staff, which actually made our stay a truly human experience. We are extremely grateful to the whole team!

title: Fab 5 star hotel
comment:
The hotel was a complete haven, I was feeling poorly, and having made the overnight train from Hanoi. I messaged the hotel about the possibility of an early check in which they were able to do. And from there on in they could not be more helpful.

Everything about the room was great, the shower one of the most powerful I have come across.

Housekeeping and room service were quick.

We used the pool, which is a great size for a city location, and again the staff were attentive but not overly so.

This is a genuine 5 star hotel, and i highly recommend, so much so we extended our stay!

title: Holiday 27-29 Mar 25
comment: On arrival we were upgraded to a suit it was fantastic this really enhanced our experience of Hue. The staff were very friendly and helpful at all times. The hotel was very clean with exceptional facilities. The pool was really big with plenty of beds and towels supplied on arrival at the pool. We only had breakfast but this was fantastic. The bar was well stocked with a good verity of cocktails, wines and beer and again the barman on the 28th was very knowledgeable and friendly. I would have no problem recommending the indochine palace hotel Hue five star ⭐

title: Wouldn't stay here again
comment:
Rooms are just weird -- No separation between bathroom and the bedroom. The sinks are on a circular island with no mirror. We couldn't find one of the light switches so we slept the entire night with a light in the other room on (turns out the switch was behind a sofa).

Location was good, and the rest of the hotel was fine -- tiny gym in the basement, but the pool looked great. Check-in process was fast and easy. On the other hand, the check-out process was a pain -- it took about 10 minutes because they wouldn't let me check out until the maids checked the room.

Restaurant food was good, and overall the staff was friendly and responsive. Would give 4 stars except for the weird room design.

title: Excellent 5 stars
comment:
Very nice hotel well located, a shopping center 5 minutes and the 2nd to 10 minutes walk. Bcp restaurants within walking distance.
Spacious and clean room, fruit offered ts on 2 days. Breakfast varied and quality.
We enjoyed the welcome of the staff, especially at the reception where Julia and Vy are of incredible kindness and great professionalism worthy of a 5 star!
We recommend 100%

title: Simply Fabulous
comment:
Great hotel in an excellent location. Warm, friendly welcome received from staff on arrival. The grade of room we had booked was unavailable so we were upgraded to a suite
- no fuss or drama. Excellent customer service.

The hotel facilities were superb. Our room was clean, comfortable and well maintained. There was a great selection at breakfast with food regularly checked and topped up by one of the chefs.

The Spa offered a great range of treatments and all very reasonably priced compared with the UK.

I would thoroughly recommend this hotel and will certainly stay again on my next visit to Hue.

title: Absolutely Amazing
comment:
This hotel is simply outstanding! A prime location, beautiful and comfortable rooms, and an overall luxurious atmosphere make it an absolute pleasure to stay here.

• Spacious & Stylish Rooms: The rooms are stunning, featuring a fantastic walk-in shower and a soft, wide bed that guarantees a great night’s sleep.

• Incredible Breakfast: The breakfast buffet is exceptional—extensive, high-quality, and delicious.

• Top-Notch Service: The staff is incredibly friendly and professional, ensuring a truly welcoming experience.

• Perfect Ambiance: Whether enjoying a fantastic dinner or simply sipping a drink in the lobby with live music, every moment here feels special.

Our conclusion: everything about Indochine Hotel exudes luxury, comfort, and hospitality. If you’re looking for a truly exceptional stay, this is the place. Highly recommended

title: A wonderful place to stay in Hue
comment: The rooms are clean and elegant and the staff is very friendly. We really enjoyed the food served at the restaurant. As average American tourists, we were treated like royalty. Another plus is that it is walking distance to many nice restaurants in Hue. It’s a lovely hotel!

title: Perfect hotel
comment: Great room, it had everything you could ask for. The hotel was the perfect location to get around on foot. Breakfast was great and the staff were wonderful. We also had dinner there on one evening, the food was fresh and of high quality. Highly recommended

title: Welcome to luxury
comment:
The Indochine Palace in Hue is an expression of luxury, especially when you get an upgrade. Professionalism is lived here in every joint of the house. The suite assigned to us left nothing to be desired and breakfast the next morning as well.

We thank you for the trust and hospitality. There's nothing to complain about here. And so we don't end up so one-sided: Nearby, there is a Melia hotel that seems to be at least as attractive.

For the Indochine Palace we definitely give the top grade.

title: Excellent stay
comment: We stayed during a tour of Vietnam and Cambodia in February and March 2025. The hotel was very well situated and very comfortable. Food was also very good. Our only criticism was that the pool was in shade most of the day and so cold for swimming

title: Indochine Palace - High-End Luxury with top level hospitality
comment:
Absolutely loved the staff. Kha, Bao Le, Edward, Rum, Hien, Daniel, Vy. The concierge desk was fantastic and couldn’t do more to make our stay memorable. They’re an asset to the hotel, provided great recommendations and were so pleasant! And Kha’s English was amazing! Love her!

Awesome shower and pressure!
Awesome bed, pillows!
Awesome robes that fit Westerners!
Awesome breakfast!
Rooms are very large!

I was on 11th floor in a one bedroom suite - with a balcony and we stayed for 5 days. Request a pool view when you book (not a street view).

title: Very well appointed hotel
comment:
Three friends travelling together so we had been booked into a suite . One twin room and one double with a lounge seating area. All well furnished on the 11th floor but not very private . From the lounge into the double room was glass and the bath room had no diving door so you had to take care where you sat to give that person privacy .
In the twin room again no door separating the bathroom . Fine for a family not quite so good for friends
Aside from that fantastic pool and good bar area live music one night while we were there. Very good breakfast so much to choose from of all nationalities
Sadly the roof top bar area was not open while we were there which was a shame

title: Very nice place to stay
comment:
Warm welcome , friendly staff .very nice room.
We can recommend this beautiful hotel anytime. The drinks at the bar were excellent too, also the breakfast with good variety of everthing.
On our next trip to Hue we wozld always return to this place.
Thank you😀

title: Wonderful staff
comment: Lovely hotel, wonderful friendly staff, great choice for breakfast, large swimming pool, wonderfully soft pillows. Great bedroom with all the facilities you need and a lovely strong shower. . Thoroughly enjoyed our stay, thank you very much

title: Great Place
comment: The place was by far the best hotel that we stayed at in all of our South East Asia tour! The rooms are nice, bed comfortable, staff amazing and facilities are gorgeous! Definitely worth staying there, and we wish were able to stay there longer!

title: Great Hotel Choice
comment:
Lovely spacious hotel located not far from the Imperial palace. Our initial room was at the front of the building, facing the busy street which made it very noisy. The hotel staff moved us straight away to a rear room overlooking the pool area which was very quiet. Each floor has a communal area with tables and chairs so we could meet up with the others in our party to play cards each evening.
The breakfasts were amazing, with a great range of food to choose from.
Loved the pool and spa area (steam room and sauna). All very clean with nice toiletries. We enjoyed playing pool at one of the two tables available.
Staff were very friendly and helpful with recommendations for restaurants.

title: GREAT!
comment:
This is a real 5 stars Hotel at all. I am completely satisfied and the sad thing is to leave it. All, check in, out, room, restaurant, all the people, the services, pool, gym, spa, the neatness of each thing and place.
Special thank's to the nice Misses from restaurant, suporting in all, with very nice and helpful service, Ngnoc, and Mau, thank You!

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Beautiful hotel in Hue Vietnam. Excellent service, friendly helpful staff. Lovely restaurant serving good food. Buffet breakfast very varied and good quality. Bedroom excellent with large comfortable bed. Everything we could wish for.

title: Very nice comfortable hotel and well located to enjoy Hue
comment:
Huge rooms decorated in Asian style
Superb swimming pool and spa with sauna and hamman free access
Charming staff
Very generous breakfast buffet
Request a room on the back to avoid overlooking the main artery in front of the hotel

title: A fabulous place to stay
comment:
This is a great hotel. From the minute you arrive up the sweeping drive the staff can not help you enough. So incredibly friendly and welcoming.
The lobby has a fabulous staircase, the rooms are spacious and quiet (including the air con). The bed was comfortable.
I would recommend staying here. A fabulous hotel.

title: Impressive and elegant hotel
comment: Elegant hotel with shiny marble floors, high ceilings, courteous and formal doormen and staff and luxury rooms. Kha was the young lady who checked us in and she was kind, professional and answered all our typical tourist questions. Her English was extremely good! She walked us to our room and helped us locate all the buttons and switches. I wish all hotels had Kha! It would make our introduction to a new city so much easier. Our room was spacious and had a nice balcony that overlooked the pool. The bed was very comfortable. Bathroom was clean and toiletries were nice. Air conditioning kept us nice and cool. I definitely would stay here again!

title: Beautiful and very comfortable classic style hotel centrally located in Hue.
comment: This is a very beautiful hotel with a classic style architecture and with a high comfort standard. There is free Wifi, which however sometimes was a little slow. Everything else was just perfect. The breakfast buffet is excellent and very large. We could recommend this hotel anytime.

title: Excellent city centre hotel
comment: Excellent quality city centre hotel. Good food options, staff friendly, efficient and polite. Amazing outdoor pool. Only complaint is gym which is too small for size of hotel with old equipment. …………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………

title: Beautiful hotel, would love to return some day.
comment:
Excellent hotel, room was spacious with a very comfortable bed and pillows. The room was very quiet which is a priority for me.

We loved the buffet breakfast with lots of choices, fresh fruit, egg station, Asian meals and cappuccino coffee.

Very professional staff that organized a private hotel car for our day trip to the sites around the city. They also secured our train tickets to Da Nang which we couldn’t do with our foreign credit card.

The pool is gorgeous, too bad it was too cold and rainy during our stay and we couldn’t use it. Would have appreciated chairs on the balcony, the only thing missing from an otherwise perfect stay.

Download the grab app for convenient and inexpensive trips to the walking streets for dinner.

title: Wonderful time at Indochine Palace!
comment:
We booked this hotel without knowing it was 5 stars, and so you can imagine were pleasantly surprised when we drove to the entrance. The place is beautiful, and the breakfast buffet is full of options and delicious. The pool is beautiful and a wonderful place to lay and relax in.
Vy, our guest relations clerk, was very helpful and kind. She suggested places to eat and get coffee, where to visit and discover new things… We had a great time! Loved this place.

title: Beautiful rooms
comment: Absolutely beautiful rooms and the biggest buffet breakfast I’ve ever seen. We really enjoyed our stay here. A little out of the way but a 10-15min walk to the river and lots of restuarants. There is a good restuarant near the lake but not much around other than that. The pool is huge and the staff are very nice. Would recommend staying here

title: The best hotel
comment: No other hotel we stay at will compare to Indochine Palace. Amazing decor, clean, FANTASTIC staff, comfortable bed, great food. From check in to check out, our stay was absolutely perfect. All you could want in a hotel and more, could not recommend higher

title: A must stay in Hue
comment: A fab base for exploring Hue, one of the best hotels I have stayed in plus we got an upgrade to a suite which I could have comfortably lived in! Great pool area and spa facilities. Service was excellent and they were very helpful in helping to plan our tour around Hue monuments via Taxi. You don't need an organised tour to do this.

title: Great service, hotel, and food
comment: We had a tremendously good stay in Hue at the Palace. The room was spacious and very clean, hotel is close to tourist area and river, and the concierge was superb. Ms. Vy helped with our excursions to the Citadel, tomb, and other places, while Mr. Tam drove and guided us around. Tam went out of his way to find a short river cruise with afternoon tea and cookie service and trip to a nice pagoda complex on river. All were quite affordable. Tam also drove us to Hoi An after our visit and we stopped at five places along the way, service was great and we highly recommend staying at the Palace and having them book excursions for you. On arrival, they sit down with guests to go thru your booking and help plan excursions and where to eat and so forth. Much more helpful and personable than typical hotels so we were so happy with Vy’s help and Tam’s chauffeuring us to see it all. Also, breakfast buffett is really big and well appointed with food and nice surroundings. We highly recommend staying here.

title: Beautiful room, clean and comfortable. Smiling and friendly staff
comment: We were well received upon arrival at the hotel with drink and despite some problems during our booking we were treated to a magnificent Suite room. The staff is dedicated and helpful and do everything to make our stay pleasant and we thank them for it.The breakfast is plentiful and varied in a very nice room. The pool is superb but unfortunately it was a little cool with rain at times. Too bad! The hotel is really recommended!

title: Senna Hue Enjoyed by all
comment: Beautiful Hotel with gorgeous staff, food 10 out of 10, 12 of us touring together & all of us agreed best Hotel to date we have stayed in for Vietnam

title: A nice hotel but breakfast was a bit lacking
comment:
Our room was very comfortable with lovely air conditioning. The overall setting of the hotel is done very well, and the staff are very happy to help, especially the porters out front. The pool is lovely but it could do with some loungers (there’s only ten total).
The room was very clean and comfortable. However, you can hear everything in the corridors and outside too - including kids or talking or a very loud school assembly announcement at 7.45 in the morning.
Breakfast could also be improved- the egg station was a bit sub par for a five star hotel, our eggs were done on a very dirty pan which still had chunks of omlette in and a spatula with food stuck on it. With a vegetarian in our party this wasn’t so great as we couldn’t be sure there weren’t traces of meat in the eggs. The egg chef was wiping his nose and witho it washing his hands, went straight to cooking. He also didn’t ask of it had been done long enough and just dumped it on a plate.
There was also little bread available as they stop restocking at about 9am or earlier. The best thing was the cereal and croissants - sadly the waffles were pretty inedible. They also only offer the weakest tea imaginable as they put a couple of tea bags in a hot pot and don’t refresh them, just add new water.
Overall a lovely hotel but not the best breakfast offering.

title: Fabulous location, personalised service, extra comfy beds
comment: Fabulous hotel, the staff are wonderful. We loved all the little to touches, extra delivery of water bottles every afternoon, welcome snacks on arrival, daily really delicious shortbread as part of turn down service. The hotel was super helpful with booking taxis, recommendations for trips, meals. Lent us a large umbrella. Very personalised service, even modified the menu to adjust for increased vegetarian options.

title: A great stay in Hue.
comment: A lovely modern hotel situated near the middle of town with the old city just next door and the imperial city across the river 10 minutes away. Room was modern, spacious and the staff were very helpful and professional. Nice pool and outdoor amenities.

title: Great Stay at Senna Hue Hotel
comment:
After a minor mix-up during the check-in process, the issue was quickly resolved by Dihn at the front desk (special callout to him for handling it professionally). Everyone at the hotel was very friendly and welcoming.

The breakfast buffet was excellent and very diverse, with plenty of options to start the day. The hotel itself has modern décor and a very central location, making it convenient for exploring Hue.

One note: there is currently construction next to the hotel, so if peace and quiet are important to you, it’s worth requesting a room that does not face the construction side.

Overall, a very good stay and a comfortable base for visiting Hue.

title: Centrally placed clean hotel.
comment: Centrally placed hotel with clean, well appointed and spacious rooms. Breakfast was good, though allergy labelling was not great.

title: Excellent and welcoming hotel
comment:
A warm welcome when we arrived for an early morning check in after our overnight train journey from Hanoi. The room(326) was ready and we could enjoy breakfast and then a swim in the delightful pool.
A well located hotel and very pleasant staff throughout...we were only sorry we were only staying for one full day and overnight. Thank you

title: Very pleasant stay in this wonderful hotel with an amazing pool area
comment: Excellent service, very nice rooms, excellent restaurant and very friendly staff

title: Lovely stay
comment: Lovely room spotlessly clean even smelt nice , really conveniently located , all the staff were helpful and charming , great pool

title: Great location for exploring Hue
comment:
Fabulous location for exploring the city and walking distance to the Imperial City.
Rooms, staff, and food all excellent.

title: A Comfortable, Relaxing Stay in Hue
comment:
I had a lovely stay at Senna Hue Hotel. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, and the reception team gave us some great recommendations for places to explore and local food spots, which really enhanced our time in Hue.

The location was great and easy to get around. I didn’t get to use the pool, but it looked beautiful and well maintained. The spa was a highlight — the massage was brilliant and deeply relaxing.

Breakfast had a good variety, especially Vietnamese options. As a Westerner, my preferences may just be a little different, but the atmosphere was chilled and there were still choices to enjoy.

Overall, a very comfortable stay with wonderful service — I’d happily recommend it.

title: Excellent place to stay!
comment:
The room and also bathroom were
huge and comfortable! The staff was very friendly, always greeting and informing. Special thanks to Linh from reception for rebooking our room! The breakfast was really great, both Asian and Western the choice was huge. The pool is beautiful and lovely to cool off. A driver from the hotel took us to our next stay in Hoi An in a very luxurious and comfortable way with 4 stops. Team Senna, thank you so much for everything! For us the best hotel to stay when you are in Hue.

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
Exceptionally good hotel: huge rooms, all very well maintained and clean...But above all: attentive, friendly and very hardworking hosts throughout the hotel!
The fitness center is well equipped, the pool is always well looked after and the nice staff pampers guests from the heart!
We will come back and can absolutely recommend the Senna Hotel!

title: the place to be when visiting Hue center
comment: excellent location,excellent Management, very efficient staff , hotel to be recommended to somone visiting Hue and willing to be right in the center of the town

title: My family was pleased
comment:
Centrally located, quiet, clean, spacious and well-appointed rooms, lovely hotel staff
Good breakfast, varied

title: Mid-range hotel
comment:
Pretty nice premium hotel on board simple design swimming pool rather nice but you will have to rush there are only 8 deckchairs and 2 beds for everyone!!!
Guests find themselves sitting on chairs facing the pool while the square allows for a beautiful installation...
Pretty nice breakfast
Spacious room but strong smell of moisture the sheets are wet as the ground and then the building next door is under construction the jackhammers and excavators are 3 meters from the window awakened at 7.30 am piles by the very intense night of the construction site
Not their fault but the hotel offers -50% on booking which suggests that it is not full so in my opinion it is not wise to place customers stick to the site
Fortunately we only stay 2 nights

title: Great Stay
comment: What a gem!! This hotel was probably one of the best I have stayed in for a longtime. The Staff were ALL helpful and courteous. Breakfast was delicious and the rooms were great, plus the garden and pool area were very pleasant to sit in, especiallyt in the evening around G&T time.

title: Nice hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel, welcome, nice room with large shower 🚿.
Very hearty breakfast.
Beautiful swimming pool with garden.
Small local restaurant nearby very good.
We recommend this hotel.

title: Why a 5 star hotel?
comment:
We've been here 2 days. Let me start on a positive note. The location right in the center is super. Nice hospitality within walking distance.
The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful.

That is the only positive thing to mention about this hotel which seems to be completely renovated in 2023. As soon as you check in at the reception you look at broken wall coverings (see photo).

The room was also bad. Air conditioning that rattled so much that we just left this one off. Musty smell in the room. Leaking toilet. Sewer drain whose lids couldn't be closed. Musty smell on the hallways.

We stayed here because the reviews on TripAdvisor were so positive. We really don't understand any of this. This hotel is rather worthy of 3 stars. Certainly not 5!

It says it was completely renovated in 2023. On the ground floor, the rooms on an entire wing have been emptied and the sliding doors are open to the terrace and pool. These sliding doors have been open for years, making it look like a dark haunted hotel. No work (anymore) takes place here either. In our opinion, the planned renovation never took place.

title: Beautiful hotel, great service - what a treat!!
comment:
Positives:
Unbelievable hotel! Besides the beauty of the hotel itself, the level of service is like nothing else we've experienced so far on our travels through Vietnam - the management should be extremely proud of all their staff.
We arrived early off the train and were able to drop our bags and head out to explore.
The room is huge and immaculate and the bed extremely comfortable. The gym, although small, is adequate for a quick workout. The pool and garden areas are beautiful and the massage I had in the spa was wonderful. The included breakfast is a VAST buffet with local and western options (try the century egg, it's an experience in itself!), plus the option to order eggs cooked to your liking.
For all this, I thought the price was fantastic.

Downsides:
The only downside is that area in the spa where the sauna and steam room is located is looking a bit rundown compared to the rest of the spa

title: A beautiful surprise in the heart of Hue
comment:
Senna Hue Hotel is one of those places that looks unassuming from the outside — but the moment you step in, you’re completely stunned. It’s a massive property with one of the best pool areas I’ve seen, beautifully complemented by gorgeous koi ponds that create a calm, resort-like atmosphere.
We stayed here around Christmas, and were pleasantly surprised with a cute tote bag as a welcome gift on arrival — such a thoughtful and lovely touch that instantly set the tone for our stay.
The breakfast spread is huge, with an excellent variety of Vietnamese local specialties to choose from. Our room was spacious and spotless, with a balcony big enough to throw a party of 10, overlooking the pool. The room was well stocked and extremely comfortable.
The staff were consistently polite, warm, and supportive, always happy to help. The location is a solid 10/10 — within walking distance of major attractions like the Imperial Citadel, Dong Ba Market, Truong Tien Bridge, and An Dinh Palace. Step outside the hotel and you’re surrounded by countless eateries, from cozy cafés and local restaurants to great beer spots.
If you love shopping and fashion, you’ll enjoy the cute boutique stores nearby. By night, the area transforms into a lively party street with plenty of fun bars and drinking places to choose from.
I would recommend staying here 200% — a perfect blend of comfort, location, and delightful surprises in the heart of Hue.

title: Super Senna Hue
comment:
Although the hotel was listed as a 3/4 * I have given a 5 stsr review for the customer service received there. The staff could not have been more helpful and friendly, we were made to feel extremely welcome and were looked after very well.

We had a couples massage in the spa which was very good value for a hotel and felt thoroughly spoiled.

We had 2 excellent meals in the restaurant too. Highly recommended.

title: Great hotel and SPA!!!!
comment:
Hotel in good location, very nice and clean! All the staff really friendly!
It really deserves if you come to HUE!!
We slept two nights, but really great!!!
Also enjoys excellent SPA, we did me and my wife a massage done by Hong and Phuoc, really but really relaxing! Wonderful!!

title: Beautiful hotel with loads of amenities in the heart of downtown Hue.
comment:
First and foremost, I'll like to give massive compliments to the front desk staff, the concierge and the staff handling the luggage. All the staff although young, are not lacking in experience. They are so well versed in the information asked, and their responses are always enthusiastic, energetic, full of warmth and friendliness.
Hotel is in a superb location, with a famous Vietnamese dessert shop just a few minutes walk away. It is also very walkable to the river and across the bridge to the citadel.
The room that was booked is huge and has a balcony overlooking the swimming pool.
Just a little suggestion for the management to consider though. The shower area of the room is rather big and the floor is rather slippery when wet. Although there is a rubber bath mat, you should consider making the shower floor more safe as we very nearly slipped on a few occasions. This is still definitely a five star hotel and highly recommended stay.

title: Beautiful hotel impeccable service
comment: I was with my family. Really everything perfect from the food to the service to the rooms to the garden and pool. Super recommended.

title: 2 nights comfort in the center of Hue. Quiet and relaxing hotel near the river of perfumes......
comment: 2 nights comfort in the center of Hue. Quiet and relaxing hotel near the river of perfumes. Spacious rooms and huge bathroom

title: Senna Hue Hotel the best
comment: Friendly staffs/ service . We had 8 rooms which Check in very quickly , the rooms are clean, nice rooms. Excellent breakfast. We will come back to stay this hotel which is the best in Hue and great location! Love it.

title: Spectacular hotel with impeccable service
comment: Absolutely stunning hotel centrally located with impeccable service, attention to details and your needs are immediately addressed. The rooms were clean, comfortable and luxurious. The amenities like gym and pool were amazing. Personnel were polite, courteous and professional. The breakfast buffet was ample, fresh and of high quality. It was all delicious. Would definitely recommend and come back when in the Imperial city.

title: Beautiful hotel in Hue
comment: We really enjoyed our two-night stay at this wonderful hotel. The room was spacious with a lovely garden view, and the central location made it easy to explore nearby attractions and restaurants. Breakfast was varied, though vegetarian options were a bit limited. The pool was beautiful but cold due to the rainy season; however, the spa kindly offered us access to the hot jacuzzi. The reception staff were extremely friendly and helpful. We highly recommend this hotel and would gladly suggest it to our friends.

title: Lovely hotel
comment: This is the best hotel we experienced in Vietnam. The location is central and close to major attractions. The room was spacious with a beautiful garden view. Breakfast was varied and satisfying, and the free sauna was a great bonus. The staff were friendly, helpful, and always ready to assist. We would definitely stay here again if we return to Hue.

title: Highly recommended!
comment: What a beautiful place to stay! Room was gorgeous, staff were all very friendly and keen to help. Breakfast was amazing... with a huge variety of both Vietnamese and Western food. The garden/pool area is a beautiful oasis, very peaceful and a lovely spot to relax outside. Hotel is in a great location within easy walking distance of many fabulous restaurants. Can't fault, would stay again in a heartbeat 😊💚😊

title: Senna Hotel Spa- incredible!
comment: Had a lovely and relaxing massage and body scrub with Hông today. So relaxing in such a beautiful space. Would highly recommend this spa and their treatments. Beautiful

title: A touch in Hue
comment: We stayed in the hotel 2 nights and we enjoyed the stay very much. Beautiful hotel, spacious and comfortable room. We experienced the massage at the spa, very nice. Beautiful garden with pool view to have some drinks. Breackfast very rich with typical vietnamese hue meals and information how to experience it. The staff is very attentive and smiley, a special thanks to Pham and her kindness.

title: Perfect for exploring the area.
comment: We had a wonderful stay in this hotel. Very well located to explore the surrounding area and chance to eat local food. Plenty of bars in nearby area walking street. The pool was a lovely relief from touring. The hotel was lovely and clean and the staff extremely friendly and helpful. Definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Great location, recommended
comment: Attentive, friendly and very helpful staff. The room was large, bright and clean. The bed was very comfortable. We stayed here for two nights for our honeymoon and they also offered us a very good dessert. Convenient location for activities and in an area close to the centre with bars and restaurants.

title: Clean, affordable and central.
comment: Senna Hotel is a lovely place to stay. It is very clean and the location is central. The staff were fantastic, especially Linh who checked us in and also arrange for a takeaway breakfast box as we were checking out at 5.30am. It is also good value for money.

title: Delicious experience! Highly recommended for its facilities, amenities location and excellent treatment
comment: A delicious experience! Hotel highly recommended for its facilities, location and exquisite personal treatment. Thank you.

title: 100% recommended hotel
comment:
It's a well-deserved 5 stars. Very spacious and comfortable rooms, with all kinds of amenities and complements both bathroom and otherwise.
Exceptional breakfast.
Very friendly and professional staff.
We have been two nights and unfortunately there was a lot of rain and flooding of some areas near the Perfume River. However, the attention was full. We were allowed to check out until 5pm as our flight leaves late.

title: WONDERFUL SENNA HUE HOTEL *****
comment: A Luxury Hotel, A Charming Team throughout all areas. I Stayed 3 nights probably more than I needed but if there had been more to do in Hue I would have stayed even longer. I Ate in the restaurant 2 evenings and the menu was quite varied. I’m a Pho Ga person so I had that both evenings and Chilli prawns with the fried lemon grass it was delicious. I hope you’re meant to eat it!! 😂. You could have burgers or even spaghetti Bolognese if you’re missing home food. I’ve been in Vietnam 15 days staying in nice hotels but this one is the first where I’ve been able to eat breakfast as it had very clean areas and the food looked fresh, you could order fried eggs, (if you eat eggs🤢) omelette and Pho as required. All in all a wonderful experience a wonderful Hotel and Restaurant.

title: Incredible
comment: One of the best hotels I’ve ever been to. The flower yogurt that we had at breakfast is a must try. Thank you for your kindness!

title: Centrally located hotel
comment: The hotel is very comfortable and modern. Staff always friendly and accommodating. Room very clean. We stayed 2 nights here and felt very comfortable.

title: A stay at the top
comment: Nice experience at the senna hue hotel. The staff is friendly and helpful. Everyone has a smile. The room and spacious and comfortable we slept super well! And the buffet breakfast is great! Great choice.

title: How to still make bad feeling.
comment: Complete but sterile hotel. Great breakfast buffet. Not flexible: we got two bottles of water a day. Not incomprehensibly we took the chilled. Chilled bottle turns out you have to pay. How to know is unclear. Nevertheless, we were called out of the car of our guide on departure for non-payment. Annoying experience. Explanation on my part was not understood.

title: All right!
comment:
Very good!!
Great location, top room!
Small garden and swimming pool very nice.
Welcoming and smiling staff.
Great breakfast.

title: Happy relaxed stay
comment: Hotel was lovely, beautiful rooms , pool and bar areas very clean . Plenty of choice for breakfast . We got a complimentary 5 course meal , every course was delicious and would have happily paid for it . The staff were gracious,friendly and very helpful. The hotel is in a very good location. Would highly recommend this hotel and looking forward to staying again . When it rains all the teeny tiny frogs come hopping out of the grass,so cute . Thank to all the staff for making our stay so pleasurable

title: great hotel in Hue
comment: the hotel is very well located in a quiet area but close to the old and commercial areas. the hotel is really lovely with great staff, excellent facilities including a very nice pool, very diverse and good breakfast and over all a very comfortable stay. once again, a great plus goes to the staff who are outstanding

title: top Service, top hotel
comment:
Very nice and clean place. Very well located for exploring the city.
The staff is wonderfully helpful and how thank you especially to Dung for the very good care.

title: Hotel very nice
comment:
We were delighted to stay at this hotel during our stay in HUE.
Great location, attentive staff.
The rooms are spacious and clean. The mattress is very comfortable.
Too bad Typhoon Bualoi did not allow us to enjoy this magnificent pool.
We highly recommend this hotel.

title: Most pleasant experience
comment:
This hotel was recommended to me by a friend stating I would not be disappointed. He was not kidding. From the moment I arrived I was greeted with smiles and a beautiful hotel. The hotel is very nice and clean. The rooms are spacious. The grounds are immaculate. But that is not the best part. The best part is the staff. They are so kind and courteous. I really do not have the words to do them justice. It just happened to be my birthday during my stay. I guess they had noticed it from my passport. At breakfast the presented me a birthday cake. While at breakfast they had made and decorated my room. And it seemed that most of the staff in the hotel knew it was my birthday for they were all wishing me a happy birthday as I walked through the hotel.

Thank you Hotel Senna Staff for a memorable stay.

Lory Foster

title: The best hotel and the best Spa in Hue
comment:
We stayed at the Senna hotel in Hue 3 nights and loved it.the rooms were great and so were the breakfasts and the dinners we had at the hotel restaurant.
But the greatest thing for me was the spa.it smelled great and every therapist was very nice and professional.But the special massage I recieved from Mr.Phouc ,the spa manager , was something I never had.
He gave all his heart to the massage and was so insightfull and so professonal that I felt like a new man after it.
I wish that I could get a massage from his powerful hands every week.
We will defienately stay at the Senna hotel in our next visit in Hue and I would ask for Mr.Phouc....

title: Paradise
comment:
This hotel was exquisite. From the moment you walk into the elaborate foyer to the lush beautifully manicured gardens and that enormous swimming pool- utter bliss. I booked an in-house aromatherapy massage with a therapist named Phuoc and cannot recommend him highly enough. It was like visiting a fancy day spa. The massage itself was thoroughly relaxing and afterwards I was served complimentary rose shaped jelly cake and green tea. Magic!
We had a garden view room with a private balcony and the bed and shower were both enormous. The breakfast which was included a feast for Kings and the whole experience was completely fabulous.

title: Beautiful hotel with spa and pool
comment: Beautiful hotel very well placed in the center.Beautiful room and bathroom also (we had the first rooms upstairs and the 2nd to the fourth floor with balcony). We enjoyed the beautiful Swimming Pool as well as the garden. Pleasant time at the Spa and a massage session in a zen setting.Breakfast is fabulous with a very wide choice and for all tastes. The staff was very friendly and always ready to help. Our stay was perfect.

title: Great stay
comment:
Excellent hotel. Great service. The room was very nice, clean, spacious and modern. Loved the pool. The breakfast buffet had great variety and quality.
Watch for the kids running wild in the breakfast room. The parents don’t seem to care
Walking distance to the river and entertainment area.

title: Luxury hotel!
comment: A beautiful hotel perfectly located. The staff were amazing, the rooms were spacious. We enjoyed cocktails in the lovely big pool and the breakfast was awesome!

title: The best place to stay in Hue, we won't look anywhere else.
comment: Senna Hotel Hue exceeded all our expectations! The staff were absolutely wonderful and the friendliest we experienced in Vietnam, nothing was too much trouble, and they even helped us organise a driver. Our room was spotless and so comfortable, with icy-cold air conditioning, a super comfy bed, and a massive balcony to relax on. The location is perfect for exploring Hue, and if you’re there over a weekend, don’t miss the nearby walking street for great food, music and atmosphere. Hue is such a beautiful city, and staying at Senna made our trip extra special. We honestly didn’t want to leave! We are planning on coming back to Vietnam next year and the Senna is the only hotel we will be staying at again.

title: Yeah, good!
comment: Great stay!!! The hotel and the room are superb, the pool is beautiful and the staff is very caring with us! Breakfast is delicious and extremely varied. I recommend 100%

title: Very nice hotel well equipped and maintained close to the city center.
comment: Very nice hotel with spa pool and garden. Service and impeccable maintenance. Breakfast varied and very nice. Spacious and very comfortable room.

title: Senna Hue Hotel rất tuyệt
comment: I had a fantastic stay! The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to help. The hotel’s atmosphere was warm, relaxing, and beautifully maintained. I would definitely come back and recommend it to others

title: Great location, great hotel
comment: Loved our stay at Senna Hue Hotel! The staff were so friendly and genuinely wanted to help with anything we needed. Our room was huge, comfortable, and had everything we could want. The pool area was such a relaxing spot to spend an afternoon, and the buffet breakfast had so many options we never got bored. Would definitely stay here again and happily recommend it to others.

title: Excellent hotel. Highly recommended.
comment: Amazing hotel and facilities. Had a room with king bed, which was very spacious and a huge bathroom. Room was quite new. The pool was really large and nice, with good temperature. The staff were very polite, happy and always willing to help. Couldn’t do more for you. Love this hotel and would definitely stay here again. Highly recommended.

title: Excellent treatment
comment: The staff was very helpful and excellent treatment. The rooms are huge and very comfortable. Very clean. The pool area is in the n inner courtyard, but it is nice, at the end of a small garden.

title: A Five Star Stay
comment:
My extended stay at Senna hotel was excellent. The front desk staff were polite, professional, and always greeted me with a smile.

The staff for daily room cleaning were prompt, efficient, and kept the room in perfect condition each day. In the evening, they would deliver a plate of cookies with additional waters and do a quick turn down service.

The staff at the pool greeted me each time I arrived and made sure I was provided with a fresh towel. There was always a pool attendant sitting nearby for whatever anyone needed.

The breakfast included a wide variety and was also staffed with a friendly professional team.

Overall, it was a five star stay made by great accommodations, and a very professional staff in every department.

I will definitely stay at the Senna if my travels take me to wonderful Hue again.

title: Great hotel
comment:
Great hotel, excellent breakfast and coffee.
The rooms were very spacious, and we also enjoyed the pool.
The location was also very convenient

title: Great hotel!
comment:
We had a great time in this hotel!!
Location is perfect. You can walk into the crowds in a few minutes.
Pool and garden were beautiful!
Breakfast was good!! My kids love hot pancakes. These were just cold here. After I asked for warm ones, the kids got them every day, without asking.
Room was fine, especially the lovely bathroom. Shower is slippery though, beware
Ear taxi transport I recommend nguyen 0944171838. You can easily and in en app with him

title: Amazing Pool
comment: Spacious comfortable rooms with a great bed so you could sleep well. Rooms were also quiet. Excellent buffet breakfast with many choices. Friendly helpful staff. The pool was amazing about 25 meters long. Great for a swim after a hot day out.

title: Gorgeous hotel
comment: This is a beautiful hotel in a fantastic location. The rooms are huge clean and comfortable. We enjoyed cooling off in the stunning pool during the day and evening. Staff are welcoming and helpful. There is a large breakfast selection both Asian and western. Strongly recommend a stay here, one of the nicest hotels l have stayed in.

title: Very successful stay
comment: Very spacious rooms and very attentive Service (both reception and restaurant). The pool and garden are very nicely landscaped and offer a haven of peace. Breakfast offered a very wide selection and there was something for everyone. We would recommend the hotel anytime.

title: Great experience
comment: Very nice room and common space. Staff was helpful. Location is 10/10, it's near to everything. Not really sound-proof

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment: Very good service, everyone here is enthusiastic. Breakfast is varied, room is clean and big. The hotel is centrally located, I can eat famous dishes within walking distance.

title: Fantastic
comment: The room and bathroom are huge, all very comfortable. The breakfast buffet is really spectacular, the best we have had in Vietnam. The employees as in all Vietnam very helpful. The pool is fantastic

title: Best 5 star hotel we stayed at in Vietnam, hands down.
comment: Honestly, it's one of the nicest hotels in Vietnam. Initially, I was not expecting much as the rates were cheaper than other 5 star hotels, and the location was not considered 'high end', but as soon as we walked in, I was blown away at how luxurious and well decorated the hotel and room was. Service was excellent! This hotel is hands down better than those so called 5 star western chain hotels. Shout out to Hao Nguyen for the exception customer service! Will definitely visit again!

title: A hotel worthy the emperor
comment: Stunning hotel! We were six people, four adults and two teenagers travelling from north to south. After a tiring train trip, arriving at Senna was exactly what we needed. Everything at the hotel was amazing. The rooms, the design, the pool, but most importantly, the people and the service. Will for sure stay here again.

title: Great stay
comment: Comfortable and well appointed room with a sit out (ours was overlooking the central courtyard). Smooth check in. The landscaping is great. Wide selection of tasty food in the breakfast buffet. Hotel is centrally located. Helpful staff conversant in English which is a plus.

title: Nothing Negative!
comment:
Everything was perfect and satisfying. The decor, ambiance, staff and services were excellent. Best part was the room size. Big and well appointed. Twin beds were comfortable and hence the sleep quality was good. Did not have lunch/dinner but Breakfast was good and well laid out.
Truly, value for money.

title: The perfect hotel. A must stay while in Hue.
comment: Just completed 4 wonderful nights at the Senna Hue Hotel. If you are planning a visit in the charming city of Hue, The Senna Hue Hotel should be the place you stay. Simply put, it’s the perfect hotel. We booked an executive suite with a garden view and the room was incredible. It was spacious with a huge living room area, very large bedroom and bathroom (with a shower and large soaking tub). The large balcony overlooked the lovely gardens and pool. The pool area was an excellent escape from the hustle of the city. A huge pool, big enough to do laps and plenty of shaded seating around the area. It was like a little oasis away for the bustle of the city. The breakfast was excellent with plenty of both western and Asian choices. The staff was extremely friendly and went out of their way to make sure you stay was/is perfect. The nice size gym was an added bonus. We did not use the spa but I have no doubts that it would have exceeded my expectations as did my stay at this wonderful hotel. The location is excellent, very close to the historic old town with numerous restaurants close by. Not sure why this hotel is not #1 on Trip Advisor. Do yourself a favor and book this hotel if you are visiting Hue (you won’t be disappointed).

title: Senna-sational
comment:
Great hotel. Great location, only 7 minutes from Walking Street with all its bars, shops and restaurants. The staff were brilliant, especially the girl on Reception with glasses (sorry I forgot her name) and Nguyen Vi in the Restaurant.
Breakfast was good, the room was huge with a walk in shower, the bed was huge and comfortable.
Our only gripe with the hotel was that the pool area is in the shade from about 1.30 every day. That didn’t go down well with the missus.
We did have another couple of issues, more with Hue than the hotel. The taxi situation at the airport is ridiculous and very stressful. You can’t use Grab at the airport because apparently any Grab taxi drivers on the turf get beaten up. Because the hotel doesn’t offer airport transfer, you have to pick one up which is a nightmare. I’ve heard loads of horror stories, so I was equipped with the names of reliable (and honest) taxi companies. Thankfully I found one.
The other issue was the lack of Money Exchanges in Hue. The hotel doesn’t do it and there are no “unofficial “ kiosks anywhere, or shops that provide the service. Apparently Gold Shops in Hanoi do it, but not the 4 in Hue we found. We finally got lucky in our fifth bank (banks don’t do money exchange either). The large BIDV Bank about 15 minutes walk from the hotel.

title: Great experience at Senna Hue Hotel.
comment:
It was a short but splendid time we spent at Senna Hue Hotel. We arrived too early (8:30am) and need not only an early check in but also a room and a possible breakfast… We were happy to have found DUNG, a nice and sympathic recepcionist, with all the answers and solutions we need. We are thankful for all the suport and foccused action of Dung.
We will recommend the Hotel! 15/06/2025

title: Lovely hotel with a fabulous pool
comment: We had a beautiful garden view room with balcony. The room and bathroom were huge! Lovely bed, pillows and linen. Staff were very friendly and helpful - breakfast was varied and plenty of options to suit everyone. The pool is amazing! We are glad we chose this hotel and would definitely return - highly recommended

title: Lovely hotel and excellent spa
comment:
Lovely hotel with friendly, welcoming and helpful staff and excellent room.

My husband and I each had a couples head, shoulder, neck and back massage at the on-site spa.
We had never had a massage before but were made to feel very welcome and comfortable by the fantastic Trang and Hong who provided our service.

It was an extremely therapeutic experience that we both enjoyed immensely and really helped us both unwind. I also had a wonderful hair rejuvenation treatment that really helped my hair look healthy and beautiful xx

We would highly recommend this spa and its staff for their excellent service. ❤️

title: We loved staying here
comment:
A wonderful stay. Room large with beautiful view.
Beautiful gardens and large pool to cool off.
Staff were attentive and polite providing excellent service.
Room service prompt and easy to use.
Excellent laundry service.
We loved staying here

title: Fab
comment:
Fantastic hotel one of the best I have stayed in. The staff were all welcoming attentive and nothing too much trouble.
The hotel is spotlessly clean ,the breakfast excellent. Lovely afternoon spent at the pool. A special mention to An in the spa amazing beauty treatment which ended the day perfectly

title: That's great! Great location and super friendly staff
comment:
Fantastic staff, everything taken care of perfectly. The best hotel I found in all of Vietnam.
Spectacular breakfast and top services.

They were able to meet all my needs, even the most particular, with exceptional timing.

title: 5 Star Wonder
comment: The most beautiful hotel in Hue and probably Vietnam. The room, grounds and people were all wonderful. The pool area was just beautiful, set in gorgeous grounds. We wish we could have stayed longer at this lovely hotel and if we come back to Hue, we will definitely be coming back to this hotel.

title: Beautiful Hotel and Senna Spa must do
comment:
After a long day of travel, I decided to unwind at the Senna Spa, and I’m so glad I did.

Trang took care of my massage, and her skill left me feeling completely reenergised and relaxed. The experience was thoughtful from beginning to end — I was offered tea both before and after the treatment, and it concluded with a lovely touch: a rose tea cake that perfectly capped off the visit.

The pool would have to be one of the best we’ve experienced in Vietnam so far.
The location is perfect and within walking distance of vibrant restaurants and bars.

Highly recommend this hotel and especially Senna Spa for anyone looking for true comfort and care.

title: Hospitable Huế Hotel
comment: It appears that this hotel has been recently refurbished, with very contemporary decor and a luxurious swimming pool in the courtyard. The restaurant is good, offering good of room service options and a wide ranging breakfast. The hotel itself is centrally located and within walking distance to some good restaurants.

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment:
had an excellent experience at Senna Hotel Hue. The staff were incredibly friendly and dedicated, always going out of their way to make sure every detail was taken care of. My room was spacious, clean, and comfortable, providing a relaxing space to unwind after exploring the city. The hotel’s location is perfect – right in the heart of Hue, close to key attractions, restaurants, and shops. I truly enjoyed my stay and would highly recommend Senna Hotel Hue to anyone visiting the city!

Big applause for all the staffs: from securitiy guards to restaurant, hotel!!!

title: Perfect
comment:
Excellent hotel! 5 star hotel which felt more like a 10 star hotel (comparing this to other 5 star hotels we stayed at in Vietnam).
Can't fault anything. The room was big and the bathroom was great with a big shower. Also had a big balcony. Some people say the mattress was soft but I found it to be on the harder side.
The breakfast was amazing. Such a variety of food. Too good!
The pool was nice and big and warm getting in. Plenty of sunbeds.
The staff were great and friendly.
I found the location to be great. It was quiet at night. Not far from the main part of town...maybe a 10 min walk. A few little gem nearby for food and coffee.
Highly recommend and would definitely stay here again

title: Great hotel
comment: Beautiful hotel with a great pool and luxurious, comfortable rooms. Breakfast was very good and service was excellent both there and generally. The hotel is situated about half an hour's walk from the Imperial Citadel but you can take a cyclo ( cycle rickshaw)

title: Exceptional hotel
comment:
The Senna Hotel Hue is a beautiful hotel in a central location. It is the nicest motel we have stayed in throughout Vietnam. The rooms are spacious and beautifully presented.
Excellent buffet breakfast and restaurant. Immaculate gardens and swimming pool.
Very helpful staff.

title: Spa experience
comment: I’ve just enjoyed a really good massage in the spa. Hong was very professional and it was just what I needed after a day of travelling. The spa is very welcoming and although there may be cheaper options available elsewhere this was still very good value for money

title: Nice hotel with friendly staff
comment: Room was spacious and comfortable. Included a small terrace. The staff were very friendly and always attentive, ready to help. Breakfast was good and plenty of variety to choose from. Location is good for exploring the area. I would book again.

title: Beautiful hotel in a great location and would highly recommend
comment:
Beautiful hotel in a great location. The staff are welcoming. The rooms are spacious, comfortable, and clean. The bathroom is large with a wonderful shower and very modern decor. The buffet breakfast is amazing.
The pool area is beautiful, but unfortunately, the pool was fairly warm.

title: Excellent choice in Hue
comment:
Excellent hotel in Hue! We stayed only one night but we can say that this is the best hotel in almost 3 weeks travelling around Vietnam.
The hotel has a very good location. It is very nice, has very large rooms with comfy beds. Also the bathroom is large. Everything is very clean.
The bar and the restaurant are very nice and clean. Breakfast is very reach and can satisfy all tastes: Asion and Western food. Difficult to choose what to eat.
What we like the most is the service. The staff is very professional, speak good English (which is not so usual).
A special thank to Nhu and Phuong, from the reception. They helped us organising very last minute sa private car for visiting the imperial tombs.
Great value for money. Highly recommended.

title: Excellent hotel and service!
comment: Excellent hotel, service and food! Breakfast buffet was awesome! The pool is so relaxing! Rooms are gorgeous! The front desk staff were super helpful with recommendations with walks to the market and local restaurants! Thank you! We will definitely recommend it!

title: A wonderful hotel!
comment:
This is a great hotel situated in the centre of the busy town. We had a garden facing room with a balcony that was large quiet and peaceful. The gardens and pool area are beautiful and a great place to relax. The breakfast choice was fresh and delicious, with all types of cuisine available, The staff were helpful and friendly, we just wish we had been able to stay longer. Would highly recommended the Senna Hue
Thank you for a lovely stay!

title: The hotel and the massage... sensational!
comment:
The hotel is very nice with a perfect location.
The rooms super spacious, a beautiful pool and the service and attention, excellent.
The spa is sensational and therapists Thu and Phuoc, extraordinary. It was a unique traditional massage! We really enjoyed it.
We only stayed one night and would have liked to spend more time here, it will be for the next visit.

title: Great hotel
comment: Nice spacious rooms, nice pool and high quality breakfast buffet. We slept very well. The beds are comfortable and pleasant linen. The staff is very friendly. The hotel is very central. Our days in Hue were very pleasant.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
A beautiful hotel tucked away from the crowds. Lovely pool area and nice spacious rooms. Hotel stall very helpful and breakfast is exceptional. It is only a short ride to the Imperial City and within walking distance there are lots of places to eat. I’d recommend the spa for great massages at
A very reasonable cost. I’d love to return!

title: Great senna spa and Therapist Phuoc!!!
comment:
Great senna Spa and Phuoc !
Amazing Senna Spa
I and my Dad stayed at senna hotel for 2 days. Everything was wonderful. we love massage so much so every place we came, we almost spent time for massage. .I loved everything in senna spa,very nice ,comfortable and relaxing. I and my Dad booked two Aroma massage. Mr. Phuoc, who we booked 2 times was so helpful to recommend the necessary services which proved that I wouldn’t regret for that at all. It was so relaxed and enjoyed the treatments. He’s definitely a very potential staff for any higher position, I’m sure. Highly recommended! By staying at this hotel, our holiday became much more memorable.
Next time I will spend my holiday at Senna and spend more time at senna spa.
Thank you so much!

title: Highly recommended
comment: Highly recommend this hotel for your stay in Hue. Staff were super friendly & helpful, foyer was amazing, pool area was great, dining area & breakfasts superb. Rooms were very spacious with a luxe feel. Lovely gift shop & even after we had checked out & traveled 170km to next town I decided I wanted one of the hats in the gift store, they managed to get it to me in Hoi An.
