Highly recommend this for your stay in Hue *****

title: Forget about resting in this hotel
comment: Horrible night!!. Impossible to sleep with the noise of the garden animals, I think they were frogs. Very uncomfortable beds, soft mattresses and very soft pillows. Bad smell sheets, shortage of soaps and just a roll of toilet paper.

title: Great for couple
comment: This hotel offers a truly pleasant experience with its immaculate rooms. The staff's helpful and friendly nature creates a welcoming atmosphere. Efficient service ensures a comfortable stay from beginning to end. The delicious breakfast spread features a variety of local delicacies. It's a wonderful place to enjoy a relaxing and satisfying visit.

title: Thank you for a wonderful massage Thu!
comment: Thank you to Thu for the amazing deep tissue massage! The spa is very relaxing and a great place to rewind after a long travel day. Great hotel, worth every penny for the amazing pool, clean modern rooms, and assorted breakfast that was a mix of Vietnamese and American food.

title: 5*plus hotel and stay
comment: The hotel is beautiful and fully deserves its 5* rating- we had one of the best hotel breakfasts we’ve had anywhere and the couples aromatherapy massage with Phoc and Hong was amazing. They were both excellent masseurs and we wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them.

title: Excellent spa
comment: My boyfriend and I had a couples back neck and head massage by Phuoc and Hong and it was excellent. Very relaxing and thoughtful service. We showed up at the time we wanted a massage and didn’t book and it was no problem. There are male and female masseuses available.

title: I will remember the hot chocolate 😋
comment: Very nice hotel complex, exuding a serene atmosphere. Nice room with a beautiful bathroom. Large cold water pool, perfect for making lengths. Breakfast very varied, with the best hot chocolate I have ever tasted.

title: Trải nghiệm Senna Hue Hotel
comment:
I was genuinely impressed with this hotel!
The room was spacious, spotless, and beautifully designed – a perfect blend of modern style and cozy comfort. I especially loved the layout and architecture; it created such a relaxing and luxurious atmosphere.

The location is also a major plus. Situated right in the city center, it made getting around incredibly convenient – whether for sightseeing, dining, or shopping.

The service was truly five-star. From the front desk to housekeeping and lobby staff, everyone was exceptionally friendly, professional, and attentive. I really appreciated how well they took care of every detail – it made me feel warmly welcomed throughout my stay.

I’ll definitely come back in the future and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this place to friends and family!

title: Quiet oasis with very friendly and knowledgeable staff
comment: We have enjoyed the beautiful courtyard with the quiet brook and traditional Vietnamese garden gently lit up at night. Beautiful pool with refreshing water. The pool doesn’t appear to be heated, but we enjoyed it anyway. Spacious rooms, attentive staff. The breakfast were delicious with the broad range of Fruit, vegetables, cooked vegetarian, meat and fish dishes. There was also a corner ofHue cuisine, which was delicious and touching. Our room was quite large and well appointed. Excellent bathrooms with the high-quality appliances.

title: Excellent comfort
comment: On arrival the lobby is sumptuous and the pool garden beautiful. The room was huge, very clean, and the bathroom superb. The breakfast buffet is a varied and delicious wonder. The service is excellent. Very well placed in the city two minutes from the busy streets.

title: Central Hue
comment: This is a lovely hotel with very spacious rooms. And a very nice swimming pool. All staff were helpful and friendly. The buffet breakfast was one of the best I’ve come across on our tour. A great selection of food. Well worth staying at if you're visiting Hue.

title: Exceptional stay at this lovely hotel
comment: The room was so spacious and confortable, with a lovely view of the beautiful garden and the pool, it's peaceful and quiet. Great service from the staff. Very good breakfast. We also tried the pool, it was fantastic, warm water. The spa was a very nice touch. Truly great price/quality ratio.

title: Great if you want to visit Huè
comment: Modern and very comfortable hotel in the center of Huè. Equipped with all services. Wifi fully functional. Garden with a beautiful swimming pool. Fitness room. Great and hearty breakfast but the restaurant is also open day and night to have a meal if you do not want to go out. Friendly and welcoming staff

title: Fabulous gardens
comment:
We’re just about to leave this hotel having spent two nights here as part of our Vietnam tour.
Our bedroom was very nice, very large, very comfortable bed, the bathroom is huge with a massive walk in shower. The towels are of a good size and there’s plenty of amenities for your use. There’s more than enough wardrobe space and shelving and we had a lovely little balcony overlooking the pool.
The gardens here are stunning, it’s a gorgeous little oasis away from the chaos that is Hue traffic.
Staff are all very polite and welcoming and treat guests very well.
Breakfast was fantastic, so much choice and freshly cooked with eggs to order. Drinks from the bar are well priced and were cheaper than a couple of bars we visited in town.
We didn’t get time to use the spa or the pool unfortunately, perhaps if we return we will make sure we do!

title: Great hotel
comment:
We stayed at this hotel for two nights while in Hue.
From the minute we entered to the moment we left the service was amazing.
The rooms are spacious and clean. We would compare this hotel to higher end resorts with many amenities. We cut one of our tours short just to sit and enjoy the pool area for the afternoon.
We only had breakfast in the restaurant but it was fantastic. The selection and quality were second to none. Thank you.
We utilized the laundry service. Again the service was excellent.
There is nothing that we can say that was negative.
We would return to this hotel in the future and suggest it to everyone.

title: Beautiful
comment: The service and welcome are impeccable. The rooms are spacious and comfortable. Breakfast is hearty and varied. The garden is beautiful and relaxing, after a day of walking. I highly recommend this hotel.

title: Hotel ideally placed to visit HUE.
comment:
Located in the most popular area of Hue. To remember the friendliness and kindness of the staff and the quality of the hotel's services.
Many thanks for the special attention for our wedding anniversary.

title: Very nice hotel
comment:
Very good hotel in central location. It is breakfast is important and was also thick fine, something for everyone. Nice clean room, with a good bed and a nice shower - premium garden view (for me personally the room was a bit too big).
Friendly and helpful staff, contact via whatsapp and email went easily. Shops, ATMs and eateries nearby, a must to eat is Cạm niêu Chạ a few minutes walk from the hotel. I had a nice stay at Senna Hue Hotel.

title: Beautiful gardens with pool.
comment:
A pristine hotel in a great location. The team here are super friendly.

Its buffet breakfast has everything you could possibly think of, no matter what your tastes are! For us, eggs cooked to order and the freshest of breads, are a winner.

We had a superb massage in its spa - so can highly recommend whether you stay here or not.

Our room overlooked its tranquil and highly manicured garden and swimming pool. A perfect place to relax if the town gets too much. The bedrooms are spacious and turndown provides welcome treats each night. If you want to get over the jet lag and watch tv one night, there was a good selection of channels and options - Netflix available.

We couldn’t drink all of the complimentary bottles of water that were provided - very generous!

title: Best Massage At Senna Spa
comment: I went to Senna Spa in Senna Hue Hotel a few days ago. Thu Hong was one of the best massage therapists I've ever had. The spa was spotlessly clean. The ambience was very relax and tranquil. Hong's professional manner and her skills are superb! Will definitely come back.

title: PERFECT AND REMARKABLE MASSAGE
comment:
Fabulous hotel, and well located. Very spacious room, extraordinary bedding, king size bed. Perfect environment: garden, swimming pool... impeccable welcome. Only downside, no money exchange.
Extraordinary massage. Thank you to Hong-Phuoc for his outstanding service.

title: Superbly held, nice welcome and efficient
comment: Large impeccable room, 2 pillows of different sizes very soft. Comfortable mattress. Nice bedding. Large bathroom. Rooms overlook the pool in a beautiful environment, quiet, large pool. Fabulous breakfast and wide choice. Flow from the large shower, if you insist on the flow eventually coming out of the shower and flows to the toilet drain

title: Super Hotel
comment:
Splendid hotel in the center of Hue close to all places to visit
Beautiful spacious room very well equipped in a beautiful environment (garden and swimming pool)
Friendly and efficient staff
We also tested the Spa it was perfect
No complaints about the full breakfast
We can stay there without problem

title: Great hotel in Hue!
comment: Great central location. Large spacious room. Huge bathroom and shower. Good counter space in bathroom. Bedding was so comfortable — best sleep since arriving in Vietnam a week ago. Breakfast was very good — great selection and excellent service. We were here only one night, but we would definitely come again next time we are in Hue.

title: Good central location
comment:
5/5 lovely hotel in very good location. Hotel staff were very friendly and efficient. Pool area very nice and a splendid choice for breakfast.

Hotel is situated near all the restaurants and bars but far enough away to be quiet

Rooms are very spacious - we had a pool view which I’d recommend

title: Beautiful luxury hotel.
comment:
Senna Hue hotel is excellent in every respect. The staff are extremely friendly and courteous and nothing is too much trouble for them; they really do aim to make your stay special.
Our room was large, spacious and well equipped with everything we needed. The whole hotel is spotlessly clean. The breakfast is amazing - so much choice! I would highly recommend the Senna Hue Hotel for a touch of luxury in Hue.

title: Recommended spacious hotel with large pool
comment:
Very accommodating staff. Waiting for vacant rooms could be optimally spent by the pool in idyllic garden. The pool is unusually large also for swimming lanes

Very clean. Good location. Located 1.5 km from the Imperial Palace in the Old Town.

title: Wonderful Stay
comment:
The Senna was a beautiful place to stay in Hue, Vietnam. It's very modern and has the feel of an upscale European hotel. While we had some meals at local places, the hotel restaurant was good too.

I booked a 90 minute massage at the spa, as well. Dhoc-Thu, my therapist, gave a very thorough and enjoyable massage for roughly $40. It's a pleasure to be pampered for such a reasonable fee.

I'd certainly stay here again the next time we visit!

title: Definitely recommend
comment: Beautiful hotel in the heart of Hue. Rooms overlook the gorgeous central garden and pool and our room was huge. Buffet breakfast changed daily and had great variety. Easy walk to river and restaurant area. Could cross bridge and walk to Citadel.

title: Appropriate
comment: Ks is in a good position, csvc though old but smooth. Breakfast is on schedule, and if you are a vegetarian, then let Ks be served.

title: Travel to Hue city and stayed at Muong Thanh Holiday Hue Hotel
comment: The hotel is located right in the city center, close to the Imperial City and the lively Western quarter. The people here are very friendly and cheerful. From my room, I can see the beautiful and poetic Perfume River through the window. The breakfast is also very delicious. Ngân, the staff member, served me very enthusiastically and with a cheerful attitude. I felt very comfortable during my stay here. If you visit Huế, you should definitely stay at this hotel to experience its services.

title: The day I came
comment:
Too great. Ks is in central position.
The first impression was Mr. Minh’s smile when the door opened too gently and fresh. The receptionists (sister Phon, sister Trâm) were agile, supporting the room quickly.
The food was very good, three days I gained almost 2 kg of meat

title: The first choice.
comment: The food is delicious, many memories. The hotel is clean and green. The staff is fun, enthusiastic. The conversation with my husband was fun and careful. You guys and I are very helpful.

title: Nice location
comment: Decent hotel at a nice location.

title: Nice hotel at a good price
comment:
The hotel was conveniently in the tourist part of the city. All amenities such as ATM, laundry, taxi, and so on were easily accessible. There’s also a nice Highland Cafe in the lobby. Breakfast was not bad. A mix of local and western foods. Service was also very good and accommodating.

The room was large and clean and the bed very comfortable. The bathroom was also roomy, but the bathtub had only a half glass enclosure that did a poor job of keeping shower water from splashing on the floor.

Every evening there was loud music coming from across the street. It did not last all night but if you’re an early and light sleeper it may be an issue.

Overall, I would recommend this hotel with the noise caveat mentioned above.

title: Quick visit to Hue
comment: We had a 36 hour stay in Hue and had a very good time. The hotel and staff, led by Thai, were friendly and helpful. Good position centrally with many restaurants close by.

title: Satisfied
comment: Hotels that are conveniently located for dining and fun

title: Value for money
comment: The rooms are beautifully decorated, centrally located, making it convenient to visit and visit. Come back twice

title: Worth it
comment:
Stayed in ks Meng Thanh
Delicious, eye-catching food
The staff at Mail, Hung and England are very nice, happy

title: Mindful
comment:
Delicious breakfast in Mui Thanh Hue. The waitstaff was very cheerful, attentive. Post-World-You're on a roll
Multiple hotel stays

title: Word of mouth
comment:
Very good Hue multi-course breakfast
Good hospitality. English staff, Forever in bloom, helpful catering

title: Good
comment:
Good breakfast. Friends, happy, enthusiastic, attentive
Hotels in the center

title: Spacious hotels in the ancient city of Hoi An
comment: The room was spacious and beautiful, and the front office staff (especially Ms. ANH) were very helpful. The breakfast restaurant setting is open and offers local rice and fruit, with plenty of options and good food. The location of the hotel was undisputed.

title: Not a 4 star hotel ...
comment: Ac didn't work , the shower curtain smelled of bacteria, room looked worn and old... bed was comfortable- buffet was "okay" .. nice to have coffee shop next door! We had two different rooms and we both thought the ac did not function correctly.

title: Clean
comment: The staff named Yangyung Hong is friendly, the housekeeping was neat, I was very happy, I will definitely book this hotel again later

title: Fantastic
comment:
Stay was fantastic and the staff was very friendly.
Specially the Cu and Ms.Ans support and made us comfortable in our stay at the Hotel.
Highly recommend for a stay

title: Excellent
comment: Staff is very friendly and supportive specially Cu and the Anh.

title: Very good
comment: I love it, thank you very much, will be back

title: Excellent experience.
comment:
A very nice hotel. Breakfast is full.
The service is impeccable. The staff is exceptional. The maid Toả is professional.
Congratulations.

title: Have a good trip
comment: The room is clean. The staff are so friendly and in good location. It meet my expectations.

title: Value for great view and convenient location
comment: My 2nd time and it was great: location, river view to the bridges and mountain backdrop. Big, clean room is comfortable. I miss their Bun bo Hue and coffee! I have visited many coffee shops and yet surprisingly none is better than their breakfast coffee. I wonder where in Vietnam their beans are sourced from.

title: Friendly steps and comfortable room
comment: Thank you for being kind to Uncle MINH. The steps were all friendly and the breakfast was delicious and the room was clean and comfortable.

title: Minh is so kind.
comment:
Minh kind and kind
Aunt Feeling
Thank you.
I'd like to come back later to see our students.
11/2 I'd like to come back for the graduation ceremony.

title: Wonderful Hotel
comment: Mr Minh ‘s service is the first rate. Hotel staff are professional and helpful. Buffet breakfast is the first class with smiles all round

title: Muong Thanh Hue Hotel
comment: Mr Minh's service is first rate. Hotel staff are professional and helpful. Buffet breakfast is first class with smiles all round.

title: Nice hotel
comment: Excellent services , good foods and beautiful receptions Ms. Tram , Ms . Thy and Ms. Phuong . I will come back and stay at this hotel when I visit hue Viet nam

title: Best!
comment:
The staff are very friendly. Great!
Cu min tram staff are very friendly
The hotel breakfast is delicious.
Highland coffee is great:)

title: Excellent Hotel!! Will stay again
comment: This is a great hotel in downtown Hue. It’s near everything and the staff has the best customer service I have ever experienced. Their attention to detail and to their customers is awesome. I was staying for a while so they upgraded my room for free. And one day I slept in and missed breakfast and they noticed I was not there and brought a plate to my room. Truly outstanding. A special thanks to Mihn, Cu, Ngoc, Tram, Phoung, and Hoong.

title: Short and sweet!
comment: Very comfortable, very sweet staff and lovely experience from Thai and Ngoc. Service was so fast and a very good sleep. View from the hotel was lovely

title: Thank you for Toa & SON
comment: From Korea to Vietnam, I stayed for three weeks. I used the 5th floor and I thanked Toa for always welcoming me with a bright smile and cleaning very well. The hotel breakfast was also able to enjoy a variety of menus and delicious fruits! Especially Son's omelet is very delicious, so I ate it once a day while in the hotel:) The staff at the front was also kindly greeted so we could always start the day with a good feeling. I want to visit again next time!

title: Three Night Stay In Hue
comment:
We enjoyed our stay in this fine hotel, very well located in Hue. The staff were really friendly and helpful just like they have been everywhere we have stayed in Vietnam.
We stayed in a Deluxe King Room, which was spacious and comfortable. The breakfast was good with a great choice.

title: Great people
comment:
I came as a guest and left as a changed human being — all thanks to the absolute legends known as Cu and Thai.

I am not exaggerating when I say that their kindness transcends normal hospitality and enters the realm of myth and folklore. Cu and Thai don’t just help you — they elevate you. Their smiles could power small cities. Their friendliness is so genuine it feels suspicious, like they might secretly be angels disguised as hotel staff.

Every interaction felt choreographed by destiny itself. They anticipated my needs before my brain had time to form the thought. At one point, I’m fairly certain Cu knew what I wanted before I did. Thai, meanwhile, mastered the rare art of making you feel simultaneously relaxed, welcome, and emotionally supported.

If this hotel ever loses Cu and Thai, humanity loses. Simple as that.

I would return to this hotel purely to experience their kindness again. Rooms, location, amenities — all fantastic — but Cu and Thai are the real five-star experience.

Book immediately. Thank me later.

title: Perfect help
comment: The service was perfect. Cu and Thai were so nice to us and helped us with revert question we had. :) They gave us an amazing service, giving us inside Tipps and recommendations.

title: Gooooooood
comment: It was very good. The best personal was Cu, Tram and Ngoc. I love it. The location is in the centre. Good food. Shops near hotel, many restaurants.

title: Good trip
comment: Great hotel with an excellent location and beautiful rooms. What stood out the most was the hospitality of the staff, especially Phuong and Thai. They went above and beyond to assist me with everything I needed. I will definitely come back!"

title: Have a good vacation.
comment: The service was very good and the food really well made. Thanh Tam Shepherd, Hang, Son, My Ngan, Hien staff are also friendly. I had a great time here 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

title: Great property with very kind staff
comment: Lovely place and lovely people. Mr. Cu from reception is a lovely person and Mr Ngoc from belldesk was very helpful. At the check in, I asked for a specific room and they went above and beyond to accommodate us. Thank you.

title: Hospitality.
comment: The hotel is conveniently located and easily accessible to many tourist attractions for sightseeing and dining. The room was clean and tidy, the balcony spacious, the breakfast general, the staff warm and attentive. Ms. Tram, Ms. Phuong and Minh, the baggage handler, helped our team. The welcome drink is delicious and perfect for today's weather.

title: Helpful and kind reception staff
comment: Cù was at the reception and was very kind to let me and my friend use the hotel reception’s bathroom while our sleeper bus stopped at the street.

title: Bình
comment:
Classic but gold. I went to here 2 day
Loveeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

title: A really nice luxury hotel
comment:
Great hotel, perfect location, and really adorable staff! The receptionist Cu welcomed me with great kindness and professionalism. The whole team, men and women, were adorable! Anh, Trâm, Hoàng, Minh, Thy,...
On the 9th floor, I was treated to a balcony with river views, it was the top. A very spacious room, impeccable cleanliness, really nothing to say!
And all for a very reasonable price:)

title: Pleasant stay
comment: We had a pleasant stay of three days at the hotel. The staff was friendly and the location was right in the center nearby the Perfume river.

title: Lovely service
comment: I had a lovely experience with the staff here, Especially Cu and Tram, who were incredibly friendly and helpful with advice on where to go:)

title: Riverview room Hue
comment:
Room was comfortable and the staff are excellent.

My only complaint is the hair dryer is way too hot with only one setting and hot water jug is dangerous to use.

title: Nice stay with good breakfast
comment:
Good breakfast buffet, with lots of choice, especially Vietnamese food. Fresh fruits.
Good bed and bathroom.

The staff and manager were very toughtful, they visited my father, who was in the Hospital even tough he never was in the hotel as a guest, regularly asking how he was doing. They treated us with the utmost care.

title: They are good people because they help people for everything okay!
comment:
I’m talking to the guy he name Cu,Mình
He very nice and good boy. I tell him about Hotel name ( Muong Thanh) .@@@@@@@@@@@@@

title: Good
comment: Everything here is great. Here I was served very enthusiastically from the reception to the restaurant to the room. The staff here are very enthusiastic and cheerful. The hotel is located quite close to the center of Hue. The first time I came here, I felt very beautiful. At the hotel, I experienced very attractive local dishes, especially the delicious Hue beef noodle soup. The restaurant staff are very enthusiastic. Especially Hien, she is always ready to help bring hot food to the table and make delicious coffee. The staff here are very happy and welcome guests. The restaurant space is spacious and airy. As for the room, I found it not very new but very comfortable, clean and tidy, giving a very comfortable feeling. I had a great experience at Muong Thanh Holiday Hue Hotel. Thank you very much.

title: I am very satisfied with the service here.
comment: Muong Thanh Holiday Hue Hotel is conveniently located in the city center with a beautiful location on the riverside, the scenery here is very poetic, the reception is very good, the staff is always ready to support me when needed, there are many delicious and strange dishes of Vietnam. The service quality is quite satisfactory. Hien and Loc are two restaurant staff that I really like because of their kindness and friendliness, helping me make coffee, get eating utensils very quickly, and helping me open the elevator door. I am very satisfied with my trip here. As for the bedroom, I found it quite okay, comfortable, clean, airy, very worth experiencing on the next trip.

title: 2 weeks in Hue
comment: Muong Thanh hotel was a great deal, very convenient for most attractions in Hue, comfortable, and had a delicious breakfast every morning. Front desk staff, especially Cu and Tram, were always super friendly and helpful. Would stay here again.

title: Perfect base for exploring Hué’s historic heart
comment: I had a wonderful stay at this clean, beautifully appointed hotel. Its central location made it incredibly easy to explore Hu é on foot—just steps away from the Imperial City and surrounded by some of the city’s best restaurants. After a day of sightseeing, I loved coming back to the quiet, comfortable rooms, which were spotless and thoughtfully designed. The staff were warm and helpful, special thank to Cô, offering great recommendations for local dining and attractions. If you’re looking for a convenient, comfortable place to stay while discovering Hu é’s charm, this hotel is an excellent choice.

title: Muong Thanh Hue Hotel offers a comfortable stay with excellent service and a great location near the city center.
comment: Muong Thanh Hue Hotel provides a pleasant and memorable stay with spacious rooms, friendly staff, and convenient access to many famous attractions in the city. It perfectly combines modern comfort with traditional Vietnamese hospitality.

title: Extremely welcoming and convenient location.
comment:
The hotel staff were amazingly welcoming on my arrival and throughout my visit.
The room was well equipped tidy and clean with a beautiful view and had a very comfortable bed!
The hotels location was perfect with bars restaurants in nightlife on the doorstep and a coffee shop on the premises. The Imperial City , markets and many museums were within 20 to 30 minutes walking.
I will definitely be revisiting Hue and this hotel will be where I stay.

title: Wonderful!
comment: I had a wonderful stay at Muong Thanh Hue Hotel. The room was clean, well-equipped, and offered a beautiful view. The staff were friendly, attentive, and always ready to assist, which made me feel very comfortable. I especially appreciate Thai, Anh, Phuong, and Cu, who were very enthusiastic and cheerful in guiding me to explore the famous attractions of Hue. The hotel’s location is also convenient for sightseeing. It was truly a memorable experience, and I look forward to returning.

title: Great hotel
comment: Check in early was no problem, easy snd quick, staff were very helpful. Rooms are large and spacious, comfortable and hotel is within easy reach of main city centre

title: Quiet and comfortable hotel.
comment:
The hotel is not located in the historic center, but in a very close island. Not being in the confusion of the center is one of its strengths.
The rooms are clean and comfortable. Very good breakfast. The pool is not very large, but the children had fun.

title: good
comment: I stayed at Muong Thanh Holiday Hue in early August 2025 and had a wonderful experience. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful from the moment I arrived. My room was clean, comfortable, and had a great view of the city. The breakfast buffet offered a wide variety of local and international dishes. I especially appreciated the warm hospitality and excellent service. Highly recommended for both leisure and business travelers!

title: good
comment: nice hotel and has an amazing view, the staff was very friendly and helpful. breakfast was delicious. I definitely would stay here again and high recommend.

title: Wouldn’t return
comment: During our time in Vietnam we stayed in several places, all in 4* hotels. This one did not compare in any way. It was very dated and quite grubby in parts. The bath was not clean and the whole place just felt like it needed updated. The Reception area looks nice and fresh but this is the only part. The staff are very nice and were helpful when we needed things such as the safe unlocked but the general place itself is not up to a 4*. Our room was incredibly noisy also as it looked out onto the pool/ street and we seemed to hear every noise possible (roads, yelling, bars etc). The pool area was quite shoddy and I was shocked at the amount of children that were running around unattended when it clearly states that an adult must be with them at all times. A lifeguard was there sometimes but at times he also vanished, leaving 2 children there without an adult/ parent. There were another 2 who were running in and out of the gym fiddling with the weight machine. This was highly dangerous and I ended up leaving and reporting it to a member of staff as I was concerned they were going to hurt themselves or someone else (they were touching the treadmill while I was using it!). The breakfast is very basic compared to what we’d had in previous hotels and we wouldn’t opt to stay there again when there are nicer places in Hue.

title: great
comment: I had a good stay at this hotel. The front desk staff were friendly and helful throught my visit. I had a luggage issue at Hanoi Airport, the receptionist Thai and Phuong helped me get in touch. I would recommend this hotel to anyone visting!

title: Good
comment: It s all good nome cu is wanderfoul ....the hotel is fantastic and clean. the receptionist cu is fantastic perfect and very polite

title: May 2025 Stay
comment: The staff was very friendly and welcoming as well as accommodating for us as English speakers. The room was spacious and clean and had an amazing view of the city of Hue. Breakfast was great and there were a lot options that were good. I definitely recommend this as a stay.

title: Muong Thanh Hue hotel
comment: Great location beside the river with links to bus and dragon boats, and lots of eating options within short walking distance.Also attached to lobby is a Highlands Coffee outlet.Welcoming staff and very clean . Superb breakfast served in nice setting.

title: Excellent location
comment: Good quality hotel in a great location, right on the river and close to the walking street. Room very spacious. Highlands Coffee just off the lobby. Very comfortable bed & pillows. Excellent friendly service from Ms. Anh, Front Office Manager.

title: Excellent customer service
comment: Excellent friendly service! The front person Cu was very generous helping me solve a problem! I would recommend this hotel for its service and central location thats close to everything! Also great breakfast with a wide range of Vietnamese and Western foods.

title: Good hotel
comment:
very weel located , very nice room and all the of the employees were so professionnal and sympatic.

Sure now I know where i ll stay again when i ll come back next time .
Highly recommnend this hotel if come to Hue
#Muong Thanh Holiday Hue.
(*≧∀≦*)(o^^o)（＾◇＾）(^｡^)（＾ν＾）

title: Not even 3 star hotel
comment:
Unbelievable, hotel does not have iron set up. Asked the staffs and they said they had no iron to send to the room and its not safe because of fire safety. Ridiculous for a so called 4 star hotel
Hotel also very old and smell bad. Public toilet with water everywhere. There is mold in the bathroom. This is no where close to even 3 star. They forgot to set up things in the room like slipper, hair cover..towels look like 100 years old
No aircon in the elevator and you feel like youre in a burning hot tube during the day
So bad experience and never come back again

title: Excellent service.
comment: Excellent comfort and kindness of staff. No problem checking in and out. Nice breakfast. Welcome by Monsieur CU. Very professional. I regret the absence of a bar to drink refreshments and cocktails. Very nice hotel.

title: Great stay at the Hue Muong Thanh Hotel!
comment: We had a marvellous stay at the MT , Hue. This is the third MT property for us on our Southeast Asia travels, and they have all been clean, well cared for, and staffed by attentive professionals. Binh was a great representative, amongst many others. Unfortunately the weather wasn’t the best, but our hotel was situated wonderfully with a view of the Perfume River and close to the attractions we favoured. The breakfast buffet was a favorite of mine. Great bar and grill to visit nearby is the DMZ ( hey, I bought the tshirt!!).

title: Hue hotels
comment: Only stayed one night. Lovely hotel. Rooms are a bit tired. Staff are friendly and location is great. Breakfast was good. Swimming pool and gym on site though the water was cold when we were there. We were on the Main Street side and no traffic noise. Would stay again

title: 3 days in Hue
comment: The staff were extremely friendly and always smiling; they were very helpful. While we were waiting for our taxi to the train station when we were leaving, they brought us tea. Very comfortable room in good location with very good breakfast.

title: Yes
comment: Thanks Cu for welcoming me in this place. Really gentle and professionnel man, can speak english, Vietnamese and French. The hotel looks beautiful, i had a good experience of the bathroom. A light in the cloudy Hue Sky. Thanks a lot Cu appreciate it

title: Very good experience
comment: The staff is really nice and friendly. They help a lot. The building is very great at so pretty. I talked a lot with the cù and he was really nice and had a lot to say about the city and the country. You should definitely go here you will not regret it.

title: First night in Vietnam
comment:
This was my first time visiting Vietnam, and I had the pleasure of staying at Muong Thanh Hotel, Hue on my first night. The hotel was clean, luxurious, and exceeded my expectations. The atmosphere was welcoming, and the service was excellent.

A special mention to Mr. Cu at the front desk, who was exceptionally kind and helpful, making my stay even more enjoyable. Overall, a great experience to start my journey in Vietnam!

title: Nice Hotel
comment: Hotel in strategy location, room is clean and good interial design. Food also varient and good. Special thanks to Mr. Cu and Ms Tram, they are friendly and helpful. It's a right choice for me for this trip. 👍🏻Strongly recommend for who visit Hui.

title: Suitable for one night
comment: For one night, this hotel was just fine. A longer stay would not have pleased us. This is partly because the hotel and the room furnishings are getting old, partly because it smelled strongly of smoke. This especially in the corridors, but also easily in the room, which was carpeted. By the elevators, under the “no smoking” symbol, there were ashtrays, which were usually well filled. In our view, this is no longer timely. The cigarettes belong extinguished outside the entrance of a hotel.

title: Great stay! 🫶🏼☺️
comment:
The hotel is very clean and offers besides a cozy and spacious room a rich breakfast. The imperial city, the citadel, souvenir shops and restaurants are in the immediate vicinity.
Many thanks to Anh, Thai and Cú who took care of us in a friendly and courteous manner.
☺️☺️☺️

title: Clean hotel, good breakfast, friendly staff
comment: Very nice hotel, clean and good breakfast. Lots of options to chose from, juices, coffee, and hot options as well. Close to downtown. We enjoyed our stay here and Cù made sure we were very well taken care of. We will definitely come again when we are in the area.

title: Deninitely will come back
comment: My 2nd time staying at Muong Thanh Hue. We stayed 16 nights throughout Tet Holiday. Perfect as usual. Love the staff hospitality the most, feeling like staying home with families. Best view to Truong Tien Bridge and Huong River, making us so lazy to go out. Definitely will come back and stay at Muong Thanh Hue whenever we visit Hue again.

title: A Stay with a very memorable experience.
comment:
This hotel is absolutely amazing. Really!! It’s part of a chain which I stayed in one of their other hotels in the city of Vinh and the experience in Vinh was quite negative in comparison to Hu’e.
When I checked in, the porter escorted me to a suite where he demonstrated the functions of the air conditioning and TV controls which to me is quite important particularly during foreign travel.
The very next day was my Birthday and to my surprise each of the breakfast staff on duty that morning took it in turn to come to my table and wished me a very Happy Birthday. That was an amazing touch which I hold as an unforgettable experience.
Later that day, Anh, a lady from the management staff and two of her colleagues visited my room holding a Birthday Cake where again I was totally surprised. They came into my room singing Happy Birthday and shared the cake with me.
The day after I had booked on a trip and whilst awaiting my transport I experienced a slight altercation where I believed that I was short changed at a coffee franchise connected to the hotel. However, as my trip was a full day Anh, the lady of the management team, awaited in her own time for my return to demonstrate with CCTV footage that I had been mistaken with my financial transaction at the coffee shop. Of course I apologised to the person whom I’d believed to making the error but more importantly that the hotel staff went to the extreme to ensure that the guests are treated fairly and that they are very important people. Anh had explained that her shift had finished a few hours earlier but as she’d already made a connection with me she’d made her task to await for my return so that she could explain the out of the earlier situation.
The next day following this, Anh was working on reception duty where we shared a few laughs involving some of the other staff. They truely go out of their way to ensure that guests are having a positive experience. Knowing that western guests (particularly solo travelers) are such a very long way from home they really do go a very long way to include you.
I was enquiring at reception the logistics of private transport to the local airport and they were very efficient in organising me a private transfer vehicle at the cost of only 300,000 VDH, = £10 = $14-15 which is a bargain!!
The cost of this hotel is a little more expensive than your average Vietnamese Stay but it is Four Star, quality service, fantastic facilities which I did not take advance of such as an outdoor pool, a spa at very reasonable priced £10 for a full body massage etc.. It is very quiet and especially clean.
If I’d any complaints they would be very petty such as the coffee cups at breakfast are too small for my liking, I got maybe five or six sips from it and I like my coffee hot and fresh but it is what it is and I don’t want to be too overpowering with petty demands after all, they really are customer focussed!!

title: Great staff!
comment: Lovely place, clean, good tours. The staff were the highlight for my friends ans I. Cu was especiallg helpful and lovely when we lost our bags on a sleepr bus and had to sceamble to find them and get them back. Without him we wouls have surely lost all our things.

title: Very helpful staff
comment: Our friend lost his bag on a coach getting here, the staff were incredibly helpful in getting it back before we had to leave for hanoi. Cu served us, his English was great and he called the coach company because we aren't very good at Vietnamese.

title: Great hotel for the value
comment: The service at Muong Thanh was exceptional. Tram was helpful and accommodating and Thai was professional. All staffs were attentive n met our needs. Breakfast at Mương Thanh serves different noodle dishes daily and each day I had 2 bowls and 4 eggs. I greatly recommend Muong Thanh.

title: Excellent and clean hotel
comment: Tram and Thai provided phenomenal service. The hotel is extremely clean and maid service did an excellent job cleaning our room. I would definitely recommend my friends and family to stay here. I will be booking this hotel for my next stay. Thank you Tram and Thai for hospitality provided!!!

title: Great staff and breakfast
comment: Very professional staff and amendments. Included breakfast is varied and a fun start to the day. The location is right by the hot spot of the city, with many bars, street vendors, and restaurants. Highly recommend if you intend to come to this city.

title: perfect experience
comment: the room was clean and spacious and all the amenities are good. breakfast features Hue’s delicacies which we didnt have time to explore during the trip outside. The view is magnificent and we got two rooms with riverside view at level 9 with direct view to the Forbidden Citadel. Overall, very good experience

title: The location was centre in the city. You can walk to the river 5 mins and a lot of nice local restaurants around.
comment: The bed was really comfort and everything clean. The hotel staffs were really friendly and helpful. The breakfast was diverse with a lot of fresh ingredients and fruits. The selection of drinks was also nice. I will stay again on my next trip to hue.

title: Friendly staff, great location
comment: Nice little boutique hotel.. The staff (Linda, Ruby, Ryan, etc) were all very friendly and accommodating, and very helpful with booking the tours and recommending places to eat, visit and do in Hue. The breakfast was good, though I think it can be improved.. The other minor issue was the initial musty/damp smell when I first entered the room but eventually it disappeared after a while.. and also the rain shower didn’t work (but the normal shower did so it’s all good).. Overall, the hotel’s great service, location and condition makes it a great value hotel to stay at in Hue!

title: Quaint and Hospitable Boutique Hotel in the city centre
comment: A quaint and rustic boutique hotel right at the city centre. The hospitality of the staff here is excellent, they go over and beyond to ensure that you love your stay here. The breakfast buffet is a great mix of western and local Hue food - they ask you to choose the breakfast items you prefer as well. Full marks to Ruby and David who were extremely professional, courteous and hospitable. Excellent location as well - very close to the waterfront and restaurants. Highly recommended for staying in Hue.

title: Lovely staff and beautiful boutique hotel
comment: This is such a cozy and lovely boutique hotel. The staff were absolutely wonderful. The ladies working the desk arranged for rides, tours, and even to have our laundry done. The young men. Wouldn’t allow us to touch or carry anything. I did not want to leave. The beds were the most comfortable i experienced in Vietnam. The breakfast was delicious every morning. It was just a lovely place that i would definitely stay in again when in hue.

title: Very nice hotel
comment:
The staff is extremely kind! The comfort of the king size bed is top! The room is very very spacious.
Many thanks to Linda and Rosi for their kindness and beautiful smiles!
Nice quiet hotel in 1 small cul-de-sac what inhabits from the noise of the avenues

title: Great hotel
comment: Very good hotel. Nice room, nice bed and fantastic breakfast. Everything was very clean and tidy. Rosie, Ryan and Linda from the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful! This hotel is definitely recommended if you are visiting the beautiful city of Hue.

title: Very nice, small cozy hotel with great service
comment:
Small nice, very clean hotel in a quiet location right in Hue. Ideal starting point for sightseeing.
The staff is very friendly and helpful.
Very good tips for restaurants in the old town, so just around the corner.

title: Best location
comment: The hotel is conveniently located at walking distance to restaurants and shops. We booked a tour with the hotel and Huy was our tour guide. He was knowledgeable and courteous and flexible with our schedule. Huy also recommended local eateries that served the best Bun Bo Hue. Don’t miss out on this hotel

title: À place to go
comment:
We stayed 2days in this hotel two wonderful days!
Everything is done to make you feel good and to help you if necessary.
the place is realy very nice and clean.
I want to Thanks especialy Linda and Ruby for their kindness, their smiles and their sense of humour.
We do loved our stay in Scarlett hotel!!!!

title: Great Hotel & Location with a warm welcome
comment:
We loved our stay at the Scarlett Boutique - the room was quiet and the beds cozy. The shower is separate, which we appreciated a lot but is not always the case in Vietnam. The included breakfast is very good - every day you could select extra options like eggs, pancakes or vietnamese soup. In the room we got fresh fruits every day.

The staff was extremely friendly and welcoming - especially to mention David and Linda. They knew our names, we had a nice personal greeting card in our room, they gave us restaurant recommendations and supported us with day trips, guided tours and just a driver for a day to our preferred sights. It was a worry-free stay allover, thank you!

title: Love the staff
comment:
We recently spent two nights at the Scarlett Boutique Hotel in Hue, and from start to finish, it was a relaxing experience. After a late-night cab ride from the airport, we were warmly welcomed by the staff, setting the tone for a truly hospitable stay.

The check-in team is incredibly proactive, ensuring a smooth and efficient arrival. Our room was spacious, clean, and the bed was extremely comfortable—perfect for unwinding after a day of exploring Hue.

On our last day, we arranged a private transfer through the hotel to Hoi An with Huy as our driver. This turned out to be a fantastic decision! We made three breathtaking stops along the way, and Huy not only drove safely and skillfully but also acted as a knowledgeable guide at each location. His professionalism and friendly demeanor made the journey even more enjoyable.

Bottom line—if you’re visiting Hue, the Scarlett Boutique Hotel is a fantastic place to stay. The combination of warm hospitality, comfortable accommodations, and excellent service makes it a top choice. Highly recommended!

title: Excellent
comment:
The location of the hotel is perfect on the second line of the street which allows to be quiet. Well maintained hotel, perfect staff, very well received
For breakfast you can order in the evening for the next day special dishes that are in addition to the basic buffet.

title: Very nice welcome and pleasant stay
comment:
We had a great stay at this hotel. The room was spacious, very clean and comfortable. The staff is very nice and considerate. Perfect for breakfast!
Special mention for Rosy who is francophone and very good advice and who organized our trips and visits with efficiency and quality. Our driver Nam, was considerate, discreet and made us discover his area, sometimes off the beaten track. Thank you all.

title: Felt like family
comment: The location was so central to everything we wanted to see and eat. We only stayed one night, but was ready to stay longer with how comfortable our stay was. Rosie and David made everything so welcoming and smooth. We felt so special staying here. Rosie helped us book a private car to Hoi An with Huy. Huy was a very knowledgeable driver who showed us great sights along the way. Very enjoyable time.

title: Great Experience!
comment:
The stay at the hotel was amazing! Rosie and David were so friendly!

Also highly recommend taking a car from Hue to Hoi An. Our driver Huy was great and took us to a couple of stops and explained to us history and places on the way.

Cant recommend enough!

title: Excellent Hôtel
comment:
We spent two nights at this hotel. Great location in Hue close to the tourist district and the Imperial City. ( 15mn walk ) .
Very quiet staff very friendly and helpful and a special mention for welcoming Rosie and David.
Address we recommend.
Dominique and Benoît

title: Excellent service
comment: We stayed 2 nights and were very satisfied. The service is perfect the staff is very friendly and they speak English very well. The beds are very comfortable. Buffet lunch is good but the choice is limited. However, they have a menu that is included and fine. The hotel is located close to restaurants and is quiet. In short, we recommend this hotel.

title: Great service & great value
comment: We arrived at the hotel greeted by Ruby & David. They were exceptional. Room was ready even though it was before check in time. Clean room & comfortable bed. What's makes the hotel stand out I would say their service & staff. During our stay Front office ( Rosie, Ryan, Ruby, David, Linda & Kelly ) make sure that our stay is enjoyable & memorable. Their service beyond our expectations. Good location & great value.

title: Beautiful experience
comment:
The hotel is ideally located, close to the lively center of boo and 30min walk from the citadel district.
The rooms are nice and clean and the hotel staff very welcoming! Breakfast is good and varied and local dishes are offered.
The loan of a scooter is possible which is convenient to visit the mausoleums outside the city.
Attention for our honeymoon!

title: Rainy Hue
comment: Communication with hotel before was excellent and when arrived was greeted with such welcome and friendliness by staff. Room was comfortable with all amenities needed for short 2 night stay. Breakfast was excellent buffet style but could also order ie poached eggs, omelette, fried banana pancakes. Location was excellent t for getting to Citadel - around 15 min walk over the bridge. Also lots of good eating places and bars within 5 min walk. Really enjoyed our stay and would recommend to anyone thinking of staying. Special mention to Ruby and Ryan who were so lovely and helpful

title: You will love your stay at the Scarlett Boutique Hotel
comment: We had a lovely stay at this hotel and highly recommend. The staff, including Ruby, Ryan, Rosie and Kelly were extremely kind, welcoming and helpful. We loved having the opportunity to check in with them on activities and appreciated their advice on the best way to see the tombs, pagoda and citadel. The room was beautiful and included fresh fruit each day which was delicious and helped us out a couple of times when we were out and about a lot. The room was also immaculate. We loved the breakfast options and the food was very good. The hotel is very central with good food and cafe options and clubs if you want some nightlife options, very nearby We can’t recommend this hotel enough for your stay in Hue!

title: Nice address!
comment: Hotel set back slightly from the road, quiet. Nice rooms. Good breakfast. It is a small structure with pleasant and considerate staff. Thanks to Linda, David and Rosie. Not to mention the other staff members. Perfect stay

title: Very good hotel
comment:
A superb establishment with a really caring staff
Thanks in particular to Ruby and Rosy, who speak French and are very elegant.
The staff is incredibly kind, welcoming and helpful.
The rooms are spacious, we were treated to flower petals on the bed and and on the towels. All the comforts are there, good water pressure for shower, fruit welcome, water bottles, there is nothing missing. The bedding is excellent. Establishment in a small dead end, so no road noise yet right next door.
Possibility to pay by CB free of charge.
You can order drivers for the airport or for the visit of the tombs (waiting for you the time of your visit)
Hearty and varied breakfast.
In buffet form + possibilities to order Vietnamese food on order the day before.
I recommend this property without worry. Perfect stay.

title: Great small hotel with even better location
comment: Great little hotel that is well appointed and has a fantastic location. We stayed here for five days and the rooms were large and well appointed with a veranda. Its position is down a small alley way and the view from the veranda is obscured by some roof tops, but it’s a clean and safe area. The reception staff were excellent and the breakfast that use included in our rate was plentiful and varied. The best part of this hotel is its location which is a very short walk to bars and restaurants in the old Hue waking street area. The old citadel is about a 15 minute walk. If you like a cosy little hotel then this is it.

title: A must stay in Hue
comment: This was the best hotel we’ve stayed in during our time in Vietnam so far, and we couldn’t recommend it more highly. It was raining when we arrived and the staff ran out with umbrellas to help us in! we were given and welcome drink and time to relax before heading to our lovely room. Everything was done so nicely with fantastic extra little touches to make you feel incredibly welcome. The staff couldn’t have been more helpful if they tried. The breakfast was also great with lots of different options (Vietnamese and continental). Would 100% stay here again if we’re ever back in Hue.

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
Everything perfect! I stayed here for 3 nights and the welcome was really great. Very friendly staff, hotel in the city center 10 min walk from the riverfront and about 15/20 min walk from the Citadel. Within walking distance of the hotel the central district of Hue with numerous restaurants bars etc.
Spacious, spotless and welcoming rooms. Good breakfast and super staff.
Linda and Roise will welcome you and recommend plenty of activities to do in the area.

title: Lovely small hotel close to sights and restaurants
comment: Lovely little hotel and we were made to feel very welcome. Linda on reception helped us organise our stay and book a private car for our last day before we took the overnight train. She always remembered our names and our activities. Breakfast was very good, especially the fresh mango. The hotel was close to many restaurants and bars. Also not too far from the river and the Citadel. Thanks to Rosie and David too.

title: Lovely place to stay in Hué
comment: We had a lovely time here in this hotel. Conveniently located in the city. Many thanks to Linda and Ryan for taking good care of their guests. The breakfast is well assorted. There aren't many rooms in this hotel, which makes it more of a personal experience. All in all a very recommendable place to stay in Hué.

title: Nice staff, great service
comment:
Super happy service, central location.
We stayed at the hotel in 2019 and it still looks the same even though the owner has changed.
But since the whole city has changed something, you can hear the loud music in the evening. But that didn't bother us much.
Thank you Ruby and David

title: Exceptional service from Ruby and David
comment:
Ruby & David were EXCEPTIONAL in their attention to detail and communication. It was an absolute pleasure being hosted by the two of them.

This was best hospitality I received in my two weeks in Vietnam!

The hotel room was also amazing. Would definitely stay here again.

title: Marvel at this magnificent hotel!
comment: Quiet hotel located in a small alley, but very surprising from the inside up to the layout here. The bed was very soft and absolutely relaxing. The staff is friendly and very helpful, especially Ryan at the front desk. The hotel area is also very convenient for walking and dining out. Thank you and see you soon if you have the opportunity to visit Hue

title: Great location
comment:
Small hotel very close to the walking street. For a three star hotel it was nice and the people were all lovely.
The hotel is noisy over the weekend until about 12.30 because it is so close to all the bars.
Breakfast was limited, although you could order various eggs as well.
Room felt a little damp and the shower over the bath had a slightly mouldy ceiling.

title: Hotel and staff very welcoming!
comment:
Very nice room
Very nice bathroom
Very welcoming and very kind staff
Thank you Linda and Ruby!
Breakfast at the top
Very good location, 2 steps from the neighborhood that moves in the evening (pedestrian streets)
We recommend!

title: Clean and fancy room near Night Market, full-accommodations and service-minded staff
comment:
Fancy-look room and all accommodations are clean. There was warm welcoming since I get off the car. Special thanks to Linda & Ruby for good welcoming, good communication in English and proactive service ❤️🙏

There also include extra services like limousine car back to Da Nang, City trip and other lot of things. I hope I’ll have a chance back to here

title: A really great mid-price hotel with very kind staff
comment: This is a modest but very comfortable hotel in a good central location. It is tucked down a side alley, so very quiet. The staff were very helpful and arranged a good tour of the sites at a very reasonable price. Ruby and Ryan and the rest of the team were great. Breakfast was included and very good. Highly recommend.

title: Excellent choice for a hotel in Hue
comment: This is an excellent choice for a hotel in Hue. Nicely located on a quiet street yet very close to many restaurants, bars and sites to visit. The hotel staff is superb, the rooms are clean and comfortable, very modern. The staff, in particular Ruby and Ryan, went out of their way to help us. They were so gracious and accommodating.

title: worth visiting
comment: Great value for money hotel. Very nice helpful staff Ruby and Ryan who helped us booking tours in Hue, and driver Huy who drove us to Hoi An. He knows all the places for making the best photograps. All 3 of them deserve 5 stars. Very good breakfast. Good beds, we have slept great here. Many restaurants are within walking distance 3 minutes, so can can always find a good meal.

title: FANTASTIC BOUTIQUE HOTEL IN HUE
comment:
The Scarlett Boutique Hotel is a gorgeous hotel located down a small alleyway, 3 minutes from the walking street in Hue.

We arrived about 5.00 pm and were immediately met, welcomed and given a refreshing drink whilst our bags were taken to our room.

We instantly felt at home at this lovely hotel. It is very stylishly decorated with the prominent theme been Scarlett O'Hara, and the book Gone With The Wind, apparently one of the owners favourite. Also one of ours, as our daughter is named Scarlett.

The team at the Scarlett Ruby and Ryan are amazing and so helpful should you require anything booking, nothing was too much trouble for them.
We had a delicious breakfast of fresh fruit, croissants and omlette, with other hot options if you required.

Our room was so beautiful, The Scarlett Suite. There were rose petals on the bed, and fresh fruit and water in the room which was so lovely. The bed was huge and very comfortable and the Scarlett red bathroom very spacious. We slept so well with no traffic noise even though we were in the centre of the city.

There is no restaurant in the evening at the hotel but with all restaurants within a 5 minute walk this is nothing to worry about. We ate at Madam Thou 2 which we can highly recommend.

We would recommend anyone to stay at the Scarlett who is visiting Hue. The hotel was recommended in The Telegraph Travel guide and it definitely deserves its review.

Thank you to everyone at The Scarlett for such a great stay

title: Very clean hotel with amazing staff!
comment: This hotel is lovely, well kept and clean lobby and rooms. Great breakfast to order in the mornings but what really sets this hotel apart is the amazing and friendly staff including Linda and Rosie who go above and beyond to answer any questions and provide any services you may need before, during, and after your stay! Highly recommended!

title: Great experience in Hue
comment: Central hotel, in the newest part of the city, surrounded by nice places to eat. But it is accessed by an internal road that isolates it from traffic noise. Our room was comfortable and clean, with a functional bathroom. Breakfast varies, you can choose Vietnamese or Western dishes. But the real strength of the structure is the staff, which makes the stay very pleasant. With us they were really valuable because they went to great lengths to help us solve a serious problem we had. We are very grateful to Ruby, David, Rosie, Linda and Ryan. Everything really perfect!

title: Very friendly place!
comment: Excellent experience and friendly service. All employees went out of their way to make our stay enjoyable, especially Linda. Huy was very responsible, caring, and a great companion for our trips. The location of the hotel as well is great.

title: Excellent boutique hotel
comment:
Excellent small boutique hotel, very well located in a quiet area.
The room and bed are very comfortable, large shower.
Very good breakfast with several personalized choices
The staff; Ruby, Ryan, Linda made our stay extra wonderful with their warm reception and help in planning activities

title: Awesome day trip with Guy organised by the staff
comment:
Info: in this review I solely concentrate on the service of the hotel and not my stay itself. If you want to book the hotel you may want to check the Infos in booking as well

The staff in the hotel are super friendly and helpful. They organised a one day trip in and around Hue to visit the most important tombs. Our driver - shout-out to Huy 😊 - was nice. Super safe driver and a broad knowledge of the hotspots we went to. He also suggested us restaurants for our next location in Hoi An. We will definitely try those Bang my.

All in all nothing to criticise with the service!😀

title: Great quality and location
comment: Fantastic hotel, great service by Ruby and Ryan and team, it was everything we wanted..super comfortable room, great breakfast and location. Also a perfect place from which to visit central Vietnam including Phang Nha, Hue city, Hoi An, etc

title: Three days in Hue
comment: A comfortable and well situated Hotel. Linda Ruby and Ryan were extremely helpful with recommendations and arranging trips for us. A special mention also to our driver, Huy, who took us on two excursions, was very knowledgeable and a very good driver.

title: Best driver you can have
comment: Huy was our driver for the pickup at Da Nang airport and for the transfer to Hoi An via the mountain pass. He is a very good and quiet driver. He gives you all information you need during the tour. Very happy with him. He is the best driver you could wish.

title: Good Location and Excellent Service
comment:
The staff are very attentive, friendly and helpful and can speak good English. One of our friends was sick upon we checked in and front desk staff offered to cook porridge n hot ginger tea n sent to our room.
The breakfast spread was good and you still can order a selection of other food from list.
The hotel also provide transfer to Hoi An at a very reasonable price n includes 3 sightseeing.
I highly recommended Scarlett Boutique Hotel if you are travelling to Hue.

title: Amazing little hotel
comment: In terms of room decor, this hotel was my favorite in Vietnam. Such a great boutique hotel nestled in a little alley and super close to all the restaurants at night. Breakfast was also delicious with made to order western and Vietnamese food. Ruby and the whole staff were outstanding.

title: Cosy hotel with great staff
comment:
A wonderful, clean and cosy hotel with excellent breakfast and great staff, just a few minutes walk away from numerous restaurants and bars.
Also a nice walk along perfume river to Imperial city.
Thank you Linda and Ryan for servicing our pleasant stay.

title: great staff and location!
comment:
my family enjoyed our one night stay in hue at the scarlett boutique! the location is off the main road so it is quiet, but in the city center right next to the walking street for nightlife!

the hotel has some musty smells, but the room and decor were very nice! the breakfast food was excellent, with some vegetarian options and the choice to pre-order local dishes (try the bun bo hue!)

the staff is what made this experience exceptional! thank you for kelly for helping us book our excursions and especially to our driver/tour guide huy who was the best! huy gave us a memorable tour, drove safely, was patient to stop and allow us to enjoy the journey, gave us local restaurant recommendations, and provided us with a humorous history lesson of hue and insights to life in vietnam!

title: Very good experience
comment:
We spent two nights in this lovely hotel and great location. Perfect rooms, hearty and tasty breakfasts.
Excellent and friendly welcome at all times from arrival to departure. Special mention for Ruby and ryan

title: Best location with wonderful service in Hue.
comment: The staff is highly skilled and trained. The managers and employees are sweet, welcoming and go far beyond the guests needs to offer a wonderful service with sympathy and care. I totally recommend Scarlett Boutique Hotel when visiting Hue, Vietnam.

title: Good experience
comment:
Very good hotel, good breakfast and nicely located! The room was a bit humid, but they solved that quickely. Reason for 4/5 is that the hotel receptionist is quite pushy. She offered us a taxi/asked when we were leaving a lot of times, this was less pleasant.
We did a tour with Hui, that was very good and 5/5!

title: 10 Stars out of 5! Beautiful venue/ incredible staff!
comment: Firstly, the staff are so incredibly friendly, attentive and helpful. The lovely Linda organised all my tours, and transfer to Hoi An. For some strange reason this hotel was listed as 3 stars, but it felt like a 5 star hotel. The room was spacious, the bed was so comfortable, the decor was luxurious, the bathroom was stunning, bar fridge was adequately stocked and cheap. They provided beautiful crockery (plates/bowls/coffee cups/wine glasses, other glasses) Fresh fruit was complimentary every day. I had not included breakfast but they gave me free breakfast one morning. I ordered it another, the continental buffet was quality and a nice variety. If was conveniently located close to the tourist areas, an easy walk to the citadel/ palace across the river, same for the markets. I could not recommend this hotel highly enough. When I come back to Hue I will be staying here again! If I could give this 10 stars out of 5 I would. Love, love, loved it!

title: Classy hotel with super helpful staff
comment: Scarlett is well located just over Perfume River from the Imperial City and near the vibrant area for restaurants, bars and cafes. The hotel is new and My room was very pleasant. Best attraction is the staff - Ruby, David, Linda and Ryan are always warm and friendly, ready to help.

title: Nice Boutique hotel in fantastic location with top service from the staff ‘team’
comment: What a great boutique hotel in a perfect location. We were made to feel very much at home and both Ruby and Kelly could not do enough to make our stay enjoyable, from organising trips (Huy was a great driver), taxis and even a take away breakfast on our last day. The hotel itself is chic and our room was lovely (302) great base for a couple of days staying Hue. The location is close to crazy walking street full of bars but don’t be deterred there are nice slightly quieter bars all around like OCB bar or the secret bar. Hue is a nice town and if going I would recommend Scarlett’s boutique hotel.

title: Private Tour with Driver - Tu Duc and Khai Dinh Tombs with Pagoda and Ancient Citadel
comment:
The Scarlett Boutique Hotel is a little gem of a place tucked down an alley in Hue. The staff here really couldn’t be any more helpful during your stay and organised our pick up from the airport by the delightful Huy who is a fountain of knowledge about Hue and its history. We were delighted to have Huy as our driver when we arranged a private tour with a driver to the Tu Doc and Khai Dinh Tombs the following day. This guy knows his stuff and was full of interesting facts about the tombs, pagoda and various sites along the way. Huy waited while we explored the various sites. We were dropped off at the Imperial City upon our return and had a very enjoyable trip altogether. Thank you Huy!

Top Tip - hire an audio guide at the tombs - they are very reasonable in cost and add to the experience.

Try the Garden Cafe near to the Citadel - we had a fantastic lunch moments away from the tourist trail.

title: 5 star service ⭐️‐️‐️‐️‐️
comment:
Super friendly staff speaking French to be nice to you 😉

I was able to get a Check in earlier when I got off the train 🥰

Friendly hotel near the Citadel, the city center of Hue.
Pan-Gaulic breakfast!
Very nice and quiet room, many well rated restaurants nearby!

Supreme luxury: an à la carte taxi service via Mr Trung to visit the sites and where to go to Hoi An in tourist ride mode at very decent prices, I recommend!

Thank you to Roise, Linda and Ryan for their welcome which allowed me to enjoy my stay in Hue!

I can only recommend this property ♥️

title: Super Hotel!!
comment:
Great hotel! It is very well located, quiet while being very close to restaurants.
The room is beautiful and clean.
The staff is super welcoming, Rosie (even speaks French very well), Ruby and David do everything possible to make sure you have a good stay. Breakfast is very good, lots of choices and very good. Congratulations to the whole team for a great stay. Hotel to advise without hesitation!!!

title: Service levels +++
comment: Absolutely first class stay with service levels +++. The super friendly staff - Rosie, Linda and David - combined Vietnamese friendliness with world class levels of customer care. Fabulous! Excellent location and value for money too, Would recommend 100%.

title: Best hotel ever
comment:
This hotel is absolutely beautiful, definitely a five star.
It is very clean, has everything you need.
Food was amazing, went to the spa we had the best foot and body massage ever.
The staff were amazing especially VAN DLIC the door man, always there to help with a lovely smile every time.

title: Really good
comment:
I wanted to stay two nights but in the end stayed even three nights. The hotel is really nice and the price is good. The view is among the best you will have in Hue. Check out the pagoda on the roof.

The stuff is super friendly and helpful. The organised me a moped for a day trip and a transfer to da nang. Special thanks to Van Duc.

I would recommend

title: Wonderful hotel with excellent customer service.
comment: We stayed at TTC for 2 nights. From the moment we arrived, we were treated like royalty. Everyone greeted us with smiles and a slight bowing. Van Duc assisted us the most. He suggested places to go and arranged transportation to Danang. Our room was large with comfortable bed and pillows. We had views of the city and river. We’d definitely stay here again. Only downside is there are not many selections of shops/eateries outside of the hotel.

title: Great hotel and experience thanks to Van Duc
comment:
Van Duc was an amazing and nice guy who helped us with everything regarding city tours, what to see and also with booking bus to go to Hanoi.

Great esperience and great hotel, and Van Duc made it more special.

title: Good
comment: I stay in 1409, what a lovely hotel, and good food, thank you to Thuy Van and Thu Hang so much, gonna come back here next time

title: Staff at the TCC Imperial Hotel
comment: We were met on arrival by Van Duc at the information and tour desk. He was exceptional in his help, friendliness, professionalism and local knowledge. The hotel is lucky to have such a good emoloyee.

title: Van duc
comment: Van Duc was so amazing and helpful in our travel. He gave amazing selections for drinks and dinner. Can’t wait to go back to this hotel

title: Good stay in Hue
comment: Excellent stay, our hosts Thuy Van and Anh fere very hospitable and helped us out with info and requests. Would recommend and will comeback.

title: Very nice stay
comment: Very nice experience - we also want to thank Van Duc for a very good service. Overall a very nice stay and good breakfast at the place.

title: Great value hotel in the heart of Hue
comment: Hotel is in a great location and I was in room 1506 which had amazing views of the Perfume River and City. Breakfast had lots of options and was very good quality. The staff were friendly and helpful though one in particular stood out ... Van Duc, the concierge. He would always go out of his way to greet you and help you, even when he seemed really busy. He also recognised it was my birthday and surprised me with a birthday cake ... I go away every year over my birthday and this is the first time that's ever happened. He is a real asset to the hotel, a proper professional.

title: Hue experience
comment: Hotel was very traditional, so th good facilities but not what I consider 5 star. Van Duc the doorman was incredibly helpful with recommendations on where to go and what to do. He organised cheap transport to Hoi An. Must try restaurant Nook !!

title: Imperial experience
comment: Location is good, breakfast is more enough with various options. Restaurant is expensive, small portions. Staff is helpful, especially Mr Van Duc is a perfect guy. He helps always for any topic. He is the best hotel staff I have ever seen so far. Vietnam is my 34th Country, Mr Van Duc is unique and the best.

title: Great service
comment: All staffs from front desk and tour desk are so friendly. Van Duc is great in providing information too. The location is great too

title: Location was great
comment:
Van Duc made the stay easy. Great location. Loved walking around this great city.
The information and help provided by Van Duc made the visit a pleasure.

title: Wonderful stay in Hue
comment: We had a wonderful stay at the TTC Imperial in Hue. Centrally located luxurious hotel, short walk to the perfume riverside, very clean with excellent breakfast. All the staff were great, Van Duc was particularly helpful and attentive to our needs. Strongly recommend this hotel.

title: Outstanding service - special thanks to Van Duc
comment:
We had a very pleasant stay at the TTC Imperial Hotel in Hue.
The hotel is well located, clean, and offers a good breakfast and comfortable rooms.
I would especially like to highlight Van Duc, one of the bellmen. After riding motorcycles through heavy rain and mud, our shoes were extremely dirty. He didn’t just dry them – he cleaned them properly and returned them in great condition.
To be honest, we arrived looking pretty rough after the ride, but we were treated completely normally, with kindness and respect, without any judgment. This level of hospitality really stood out to us.
Communication was smooth, Van Duc was friendly, proactive, and genuinely caring.
Small gestures like this make a big difference when traveling.
Thank you, Van Duc, and thank you to the TTC Imperial Hotel team. We would happily stay here again.

title: Great experience
comment: Van Duc was Very professional, efficient and polite. The hotel standard was high and exemplary. The rooms were clean and comfortable.

title: Great stay in
comment: Great stay, friendly and knowledgeable staff. In particular van duc, who not only organized the trip to Hue but also the sleeping bus to reach hanoi

title: Great service, tips and views
comment:
Very friendly welcome. Great location. The concierge Van Duc made it the perfect stay with valuable tips.
The rooftop bar offers fantastic views!

title: Run away
comment: No hello when we entered, after 15 min seated no one came with the menu. They were 5 laughing behind the bar but no service at all. We left the bar without drinking

title: TTC Imperial a 5* stay
comment: I have to start with a special mention to Mr Van Duc for his kindness and help! The TTC Imperial is a 5* hotel up to the standards of its category and that shouldn't be taken for granted! Clean ,nice pool ,nice breakfast! Very kind staff!!! Thanks again to Mr Van Duc!

title: Amazing stay, wish we had more days here!
comment: Amazing hotel, very clean, lovely rooms, delicious breakfast but mostly incredible service, people working at the hotel really made our stay, they were so friendly and even helped us with a small problem that occured to us that had nothing to do with the hotel!

title: Very good experience
comment: Great location, room are spacious. Excellent breakfast. Service provided by Van Duc was also great, he helped us a lot during our stay.

title: Make yourself comfortable. The language barrier is fine, too!
comment:
Even though we don't speak English or Vietnamese, they were kind to us.
When I arrived in Hue, I had the concierge Van Duc take care of the sightseeing, and I was able to charter a tour cheaply.
The room was large and the shower was only from the ceiling, but the hot water came out properly.
The air conditioning is also comfortable.
I was surprised to see a welcome message on TV.
Paradise Cave can also be reached with this hotel departure.
I'm very impressed. Please use this hotel by all means.
Thank you VAN DUC 😊

title: Beautiful stay in Hue
comment: A beautiful hotel right in the centre of the action. The staff were exceptionally helpful, making suggestions about where to go and what to eat. We also arranged transportation through them as well. The bar was beautiful with expert drinks, made for us, and an absolutely stunning view of the city! A very special shout out to Van Duc and Nhan you were especially helpful and always had a smile and a cherry greeting when they saw us! Thank you so much again for a wonderful stay we will be back!

title: Incredibly kind Staff.
comment: We have an amazing stay. The staff were extremely kind and helpful. Our driver, Nahn, who transported us to Hoi An, was super kind and attentive

title: Good
comment: The hotel is in the city center very convenient employees are listening very kind helpful, buffet t breakfast and very hearty. The employee Van Duc is very attentive to customers, a big thank you to him.

title: Wonderful staff
comment: Cannot say enough good things about this hotel. The food was excellent. We have stayed many places and the food here was delicious. Staff are wonderful, especially, Van Duc. Super helpful and nice. The hotel is lucky to have him. Will come back again

title: A great place for foods, history and memory, Hue
comment: We stayed at ttc imperial hue hotel for 6 nights and had the best time. The foods were great and the staffs were very helpful and lovely. One staff in particular was just a gem. His name is Van Duc. He is just amazingly helpful and knowledgeable. He helped us arrange transportation, pointed out great eatery and even offer local insights. We can certainly say that he made our visit to hue very special and we would definitely recommend the hotel and Van Duc to our friends who want to travel to hue. Thank you for a great time and lovely memory.

title: Very thoughtful concierge staff
comment: This hotel has spacious rooms and very well located. Best of all were the staff who were very helpful, and considerate. Thank you to Van Duc for the umbrellas and the kind greetings each day. He and his staff were great.

title: Good
