comment: Genuiely felt like royalty. Impressive from the entrance throught to the very spacious rooms with horgeous views.love pool area which was well utilised by our group,would highly recommend, thank van Duc the staff was very kind

title: Thank you!
comment: Mr. Van Duck is amazing! And all the people are so friendly. We will come again. My group was so satisfied. Thank you so much and happy new year !

title: Excellent
comment:
Excellent value for money, great location next to the Imperial City and all amenities, very comfortable hotel.
Van Duc is very kind and helpful, he helped us a lot with good advice

title: Very loud and poorly equipped – only Van Duc was top”
comment:
We spent two nights at this hotel and unfortunately the stay was not pleasant. The hotel is very noisy, the walls are extremely thin and you can hear every door slamming as well as conversations of the other guests. Recovery was hardly possible. The bathroom was missing basic things.

Breakfast was a disaster, as was coffee. For one night it might still be acceptable, but two nights were really not feasible for us.

However, we would like to highlight Van Duc as a positive employee. He was very friendly, extremely diligent and chatty and has tried very hard to make our stay more pleasant.

title: Excellent
comment: This was one of the best hotels we have ever stayed in. Absolutely everything was wonderful – an excellent location, a very tasty and varied breakfast, and an exceptionally kind, attentive, and professional staff. I would especially like to highlight Mr. Van Duc, who took care of us throughout our stay and made our experience even more pleasant. I would definitely highly recommend this hotel to anyone planning a stay in Hue.

title: van duc good
comment: very good experience, a first class staff, especially Mr. Van Duc. ,💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗💗

title: Hotel imperial
comment: Beautiful hotel, great service one of the best spot in Hue, Thu Hang Tuyen Anh, the service front desk is so awesome. I needed some items and they do deliver it to me without asking.

title: Van Duc the best !!!!
comment: I often visit the lberial hotel in hue.Amazing hotel,friendly staff.Captain bell boy aways welcomes us with smile,ready to help at any moment.Thank you mr VAN DUC!!!!

title: Fantastic stay with unforgettable service!
comment:
We had a wonderful 2-night stay at TTC Imperial Hotel in Huế and couldn’t be happier with our experience. The room was spotless, the bed incredibly cozy, and the views (from our room, the restaurant, and the rooftop bar) were absolutely amazing, especially overlooking the city.

Breakfast was really good with a big variety of both Western and Vietnamese dishes, all fresh and delicious. There was something for everyone.

A very special thank you to Bell Captain Van Duc, who truly made our stay exceptional. He made us feel so welcome from the start, went above and beyond, arranged a table with an extra-special city view for us on Christmas Eve (without us asking for a special table, which makes it an even more amazing gesture!), and even took care of drying our soaked sneakers after a rainy day exploring the Huế Citadel. His recommendations were excellent, and his kindness and attention to detail made us feel genuinely valued.

We highly recommend this hotel as it combines comfort, great views, and outstanding service. We will gladly return if we're ever back in Vietnam!

title: Lovely staff
comment: Van Duc was so helpful. He is the kindest person we’ve met in Hue. Not only he helped us with a very important matter but also offered us some tea and gave us advice. We will be forever grateful for what he did 🙏

title: Good experience
comment: Very good experience. Van Duc was especially very helpful throughout. Would definitely stay here whenever we come back.

title: Van Duc is a legend
comment:
Great location- good rooms - very good customer support and service especially the best Van Duc , he helped us soo much when it was raining.

Thank you for hosting us and thank you Van Duc for helping us soo much during the rain

title: Amazing stay
comment:
A beautiful hotel with lovely "imperial" interiors! Great service by all the staff, especially Mr. Van Duc!
Hope to visit again!

title: Not a five star hotel experience
comment:
In all fairness, this is a nice hotel, it just was not a five star experience.

Also, Van Duc was wonderful. If the review was solely about him, it would be five stars.

Regarding our stay, one issue was the lack of drinking water. When we requested more than 2 bottles of water, we were told there is a limit of two free bottles per day. Additional bottles of water had to be paid for. The cost was not the problem--it was only 15,000 VND per bottle. The problem is the tap water is not safe to drink in Vietnam, and in a country where that is the case, ANY amount of water should be included in the cost of the room, especially at a supposedly five star hotel. This is good customer service. We would prefer if you charge more for the hotel room if it includes unlimited water in the price because it felt like nickel and diming. (Nickel and diming is a very Western phrase, but apparently a similar phrase in Vietnamese is "Họ tính tiền cả hơi thở của bạn"). Again, the money is not the issue, it was just annoying. Our hotels in Hoi An and Hanoi both gave us as much water as we needed with no extra charges.

Another issue was the air conditioning which was broken when we checked in. A handyman was sent to fix it and they did after only a few hours, so all was fine. On our third day however, the air conditioning broke again, which was frustrating. Again they fixed it pretty quickly, but then on the morning we checked out, it broke again.

Not an issue, but one area of potential improvement would be the room service menu. The Vietnamese options were delicious. We really enjoyed the Hue style beef soup. However, their Euro-American options were a bit lacking, they only had soups and salads, but no sandwiches.

To summarize, suggestions for improvement so it feels like a five star hotel:
1) Don't charge for additional water. Seriously, just increase the cost of the room by a few VND if you need to.
2) Include sandwiches on your room service menu. They're simple to make and a really nice comfort food for Euro-American travelers.

title: TTC the place to be.
comment: We spent two nights during a roundtrip at TTC Hotel and had a wonderful time there - the hotel is a place where you truly can feel at home. Highly recommended. Our best regards go to Van Duc, the friendly and attentive bellman, who always greeted us with a friendly smile and was helpful in every respect.

title: Nice hotel with nice staff
comment: We had a great stay at Hotel TTC Imperial. Beautiful hotel and very nice staff. Van Duc received us when we arrived here and gave us a nice welcome!

title: Overall stay very pleasant
comment:
The hotel is typically Vietnamese, slightly in its juice, but that is precisely what makes it so charming. It gives off an assumed colonial atmosphere, almost out of time. Surprisingly, if Agatha Christie had set a novel in Hue, she would have gladly chosen this establishment as her setting.
The staff is remarkably polite, very helpful and professional throughout the stay.
Breakfast is correct and varied, mainly oriented to Asian tastes, but with a sufficient Western choice and good quality.
The room was spacious, furnished in a typical style, and impeccable cleanliness.
On the other hand, the departure was less happy: under the guise of checking that we had not forgotten anything, the room was inspected, which clearly looked like a check on the minibar or any missing objects. This type of practice is unusual, and even inappropriate, in an establishment of this standing, and breaks with the atmosphere of trust expected at this price level.
A hotel of character, endearing and full of charm, but which would benefit from aligning its exit procedures with the level of elegance displayed during the stay.

title: Relaxing and welcoming stay
comment:
Superlative in every way. Gorgeous lobby, rooms, facilities. From the moment I stepped into the hotel they were expecting me, attentive my needs, even down to the little things like a cup of tea while waiting for a cab. I want to call special attention to Van Duc, he is friendly, welcoming, and polite without pretention.

If - when - I return to Hue I cannot think of a better, more welcoming place to stay.

title: Super friendly staff
comment: The hotel was very clean and has a top standard. The staff is very friendly and it was no problem at all to tour and organize the onward journey via the hotel.

title: Staffs professional service
comment: The staff were attentive and provided a professional service. Our driver Ngoc provided a faultless service with our drive to the airport.

title: Huge sunny rooms!
comment:
The hotel is beautiful, with colonial furnishings. Our room was huge, airy and sun filled.
The staff was amazing overall, especially Van Duc, such a helpful chirpy and friendly man!
Hotel is quite centrally dictated which was great.
The breakfast catered mainly for Asian/ Vietnamese tastes. There was a sparse selection for international travellers.
The staff at breakfast knew virtually no English which made it very difficult to communicate! You would expect some level of English!
The "gym" was transformed from a pre existing lounge/ pub area.
No safety belts on the 2 very old Treadmills, the sparse equipment hardly worked. The gym was entirely carpeted with no towels nor sanitiser nor cups for water! So was not quite a gym!

Overall stay was good

title: Excellent 3Nights in Hue

title: Great place in Hue

title: Our stay at TTC IMPERIAL HOTEL HUE
comment:
Excelent stay at TTC Imperial Hotel Hue during two nights. The room was wonderful and comfortable and we received the warmest of attentions from all the staff. Specifically We would like to remark the attention , kindness , simpathy and good advices from Van Duc.

Ana & David

title: Great stay!
comment: Amazing stay. The hotel is very close to imperial citadel and also lots of restaurants and shops. Old charm. Mr Van Duc took care of us from the first moment we stepped in to the hotel to when we left!!

title: Honest and modest elegance and prestige stay
comment:
It’s been a beautiful stay in Hue with TTC Imperial Hotel.

We were fortunate to have many beautiful staff members in their elegant Áo Dài, especially Van Duc, really friendly, honest, caring and supportive with giving us tips about the city, guidance with where to go and consistently provided us with time and attention.

The Pattaya Thai Spa massage parlour on the ground floor was exactly what we needed on our first night. Super friendly and skilful with their techniques, the ambience was very calming and welcoming.

The breakfast buffet was excellent, we haven’t had much luck with great food and services over the past couple of weeks travelling around Vietnam. We really praise the quality and options that were provided, from eastern to western cuisines, I’m sure they’ll cater to anybody’s preferences.

Thank you for the upgrading our room as a complimentary service, we got to admire the river and city view of Hue over the past couple of nights. Will love to return here in the future!

All the best and keep up the great effort!

title: Recommended to stay at this hotel
comment:
The hotel very good, Imperial decor, very clean room, very good place, good facility.
The people at the hotel reception very friendly and helpful as Mr Van Trien, Miss Thu Hang.

title: Very nice stay
comment:
We had a wonderful stay at TTC Imperial Hotel and the experience was truly pleasant. The hotel is well located, elegant, and very comfortable — perfect for relaxing after a day of sightseeing.

A special mention goes to the entire staff, who were always kind, professional, and attentive. In particular, we would like to thank Van Duc for his exceptional friendliness, professionalism, and for making us feel genuinely welcome from the very first moment.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of high-quality options, including both local and international dishes, all well presented and plentiful.

Overall, a very enjoyable stay in every aspect. We highly recommend TTC Imperial Hotel to anyone visiting Huế and looking for comfort, great service, and warm hospitality.

title: Majestic and Magical
comment:
From the moment you walk into the beautifully stunning lobby, you knew you were in for a treat! It just so happened that we arrived on my birthday and I was greeted in the lobby with a beautiful cake and many birthday wishes. There were roses in the room as well. I felt very spoiled! Also need to mention that the front door porter was helpful and amazing (sorry we didn’t get his name).

The room was large and well appointed. We had a beautiful view of the river. The bed was comfy and bathroom lovely.

The hotel was very well located and we walked and explored Hue each day. The pool was great and a nice place to hang out after a day in the sun.

Breakfast was excellent. A full offering of both western foods as well as Vietnamese fare. Of all our stays they had the best Pho on the breakfast menu.

We absolutely recommend this hotel!!

title: Relaxing & Fun Hue visit
comment:
VAN DUC is helpful, knowledgeable about the city, his always there to answer questions about best place to experience HUE foods, activities and also arrange for transportation.
He always have the smiles for the guest .

title: Great Service

title: Flooded Hue!
comment: Our stay at the hotel was very nice. We were stuck due to the typhoon but the hotel staff did everything possible to keep us comfortable. Van Duc (concierge?) was fabulous. He traversed flooded streets to keep us in cold beer and helped us arrange transit when we were able yo leave.

title: Exceptional service in severe weather conditions
comment:
The TTC imperial provided exceptional support during the rains on Oct 26-Oct 29, 2025. Van Duc was especially helpful in providing whatever we needed! We will always remember our stay.
Thank you TTC Imperial and Van Duc!

title: October 27-29 2025 flooding of Hue - Best Adventure Ever!
comment: We were trapped in Hue due to flooding throughout the city and the team at the TTC Imperial Hotel took fantastic care of us, especially our friend from the front desk Van Duc. Van Duc was able to find us everything we needed to be comfortable and happy during the flooding. He waded through the flood to obtain snacks and drinks and helped us negotiate all the challenges we had to face.

title: Best guest service in a Vietnam
comment:
This is a wonderful hotel for the value. The customer service is the best we’ve experienced in the entire country. The food was very good and the rooms were beautiful.
We made a great friend with the Bell Captain Van Duc. He helped us book tours of the city, and advised us on many of the issues with some of the places we wanted to visit. He spoke very good English and I would visit this hotel again just to see him as I now consider him a dear friend.
I also became close friends with two of the young gentleman that worked in the Cafe on the 16th floor. Ngô Việt and Trần Trung Hiếu. They were very kind and we spoke for a long time about the differences and similarities of our two countries.
The view from the roof and restaurant are STUNNING!
The entire staff was wonderful but these three people really made us feel like friends or even as close as family. Of all the places we visited in Vietnam, this was our favorite due to the staff at this hotel. If you visit this hotel, please tell these three that Tony and Stephen from America said hello!

title: Good job
comment: Everything's brand new.Staff is amazing and are so kindi booked a night bus and they took me to bus stop and also gave a lot of recommendations with best stop in town, and thanks the staff were amazing Van Duc and M Hoa , was very helpful when needed

title: Great Stay

title: Amazing Hospitality Right from the Gate
comment:
I had a wonderful experience staying at this hotel. From the moment I arrived, everything felt warm and welcoming. I especially want to mention Van Duc, the gentleman at the main gate — he was incredibly kind, polite, and always greeted me with a big smile.

He went out of his way to help with my luggage, gave great local tips, and made sure every guest felt comfortable and respected. It’s rare to meet someone so genuine and attentive. His positive attitude really set the tone for the whole stay and made the experience even better.

Thank you, Van Duc, and the entire team for making my visit so pleasant! I’ll definitely come back and recommend this hotel to others.

title: 24hr stop over.

Very nice stay. Hotel comfortable and clean.

Very nice stay. Hotel comfortable and clean.

title: Great hotel, fantastic service.
comment:
The hotel was very clean. It's located close to the major attractions in the area. The breakfasts offer a good selection of food.

The concierge, Van Duc, was immensely helpful. He can perform the impossible; managed to track down a wallet that was left in a taxi several hours earlier. Can't thank him enough for that!

title: Excellent service

title: Marvellous

Simply one of the best hotels we’ve been to, the Service is amazing. The food is very good. Service is an excellent level of customer attention and worthy of a five star rating. The pool is amazing and the Welcoming Tea is very good.

title: Excellent

comment: Hotel was one of the nicest in hue.hotel was very clean the room was spacious.the staff were very pleasant and helpful. We were greated by Van Duc who was very informative about the area in hue and suggested things to see he was very friendly and pleasant .

title: Nice hotel

title: A Fantastic hotel - the place to stay in Hue!
comment: What a fantastic, clean hotel with beautiful staff (Van Duc, Trien, Van) close to all the sights. And amazing views. They made me feel very special on my birthday. We would definitely recommend this hotel ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

title: Very good hotel and impeccable, kind and helpful staff
comment:
I had a stay at the hotel due to a business trip.
The hotel is in the city centre, just 100 meters from the river and next to the nightlife.
At the front desk I met Mrs. Thuy Van Trien.
She served me very quickly with a smile and courtesy and explained everything about the hotel.
At the entrance Mr. Van Duc Trien welcomed me and quickly transported my luggage to the room.
I thank him so much.
The hotel very good and the staff perfect.
I recommend it for a stay in Hue.

title: Van Duc is the best!!!
comment: This hotel is gorgeous inside and out, well maintained, clean rooms, with ornate Vietnamese style decor. We experienced a few glitches when we arrived… pool closed for construction, bathtub drain didn’t close and air conditioner not cooling properly. Had maintenance in our room twice our first night. We wanted to shorten our visit and leave the next day., but we stayed and glad we did. They offered twice to upgrade our room, although we opted to stay in our room because the view was spectacular and the room issues were taken care of. Staff were friendly and courteous, all but one. Van Duc was the sole reason we stayed our full 3 days. He laughed and joked with us…made us feel like family. We shared stories and family photos with each other and took selfies with him. Cannot praise his work ethic and personality enough. While the hotel is amazing and deserves 5 stars (if the pool had been open), Van Duc deserves all the stars in the sky. Will visit again and recommend to friends because of him.

title: Lovely hotal
comment:
We had such a great time at the hotel! They even upgraded us for our honeymoon.
Special thanks to Van Duc — he helped us from the moment we arrived, planned our trip around the city, arranged our ride back, and was always there for any question. He even came up to our room with a cake for our honeymoon!
We totally recommend staying here if you’re visiting Hue!

title: Great location, great service
comment: Excellent location in Hue, adjacent to bridge near Imperial City. Service was excellent, including Van Duc, the concierge that arranged everything from city tour to spa. Will definitely stay here again. Breakfast buffet was superb. Rooms clean and good A/C

title: Excellent hospitality!
comment:
Great hotel, perfect services and hospitality. The Bell manager van Duc made us feel at home from the moment we arrived.

Van Duc had great restaurant tips for the area. He advised us to go to the madame thu restaurant. Great tip, we really enjoyed our dinner there.

title: Highly recommended

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Excellent Hotel, well located near perfume River. The staff are all very helpful, especially the concierge Van Duc, he is a gem, always friendly and very helpful. I would have given The Imperial a 5 * rating except the pool was being renovated. The rooftop bar is fabulous and a great place to relax at any time. The rooms are well appointed and the bed is comfortable. The restaurant and breakfast is fantastic with lots of choices.

title: Home away from home
comment: If you want to leave home but be treated like your at home come to TTC. We had a great stay in Hue of 3 nights and we loved our stay. Van Duc was always helpful and cheerful and made us feel welcome everytime we came back to the hotel.

Their front desk deserves praises for courteous and prompt response particularly from Thuy-Van and Tuyet Anh. These young ladies went above and beyond their duties to make sure everything went smoothly for the guests. Love them.

title: Hue
comment: Excellent service van duc was exceptional handsome too we really enjoyed the hotel breakfast was delicious 🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩

title: Walking around Vietnam
comment: Very nice and elegant hotel, central and convenient location to reach both the center of Hué and the imperial citadel. Staff really friendly, always helpful and very prepared to give advice about the city, in really good English. Spacious and really clean room, hearty and good quality breakfast buffet.

title: Good hotel in central Hue
comment: A very good hotel in a central Hue location. Easy walk to restaurants and bars and river area. The hotel has a good sized outdoor pool on 3rd floor, serves a daily breakfast and has a rooftop bar. The concierge Van Duc was very helpful and always happy and friendly, arranging activities and transport options

title: Recommended, hopefully the A/C will be upgraded so it truly becomes a 5-star hotel again
comment: Excellent staff such as Mr Vinh Hung and Mr Viet Binh. Great beds, nice rooms, only the A/C is outdated and not working properly. Very good breakfast buffet.

title: Staff Lover
comment: Van Duc, who works at Bell, was so kind and full of smiles and really grateful. I checked out of the hotel because it was raining heavily on the sightseeing day, but came back to change. It was very helpful for him to be happy to use the fitness center on the third floor. Thank you for your consideration.

title: Good 👍
comment: Great hotel with excellent staff. Van Duc on the tour desk was exceptional and made our stay so much easier and memorable. Perfectly positioned hotel for a stay in Hue.

title: good hotel
comment:
this hotel has very nice view and delicious breakfast, recepionist very helpful, specialy Viet Binh and Thu Hang
i will visit again

title: Nice vacation
comment: I had an amazing stay at TTC Hotel Hue! The service was exceptional, and the staff were always friendly and helpful. Special thanks to Hung, the FO Supervisor, for his professionalism and warm hospitality. The room was clean and comfortable, and the location is perfect for exploring Hue. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting the city!

title: is best hotel in Hue city
comment: the services are very good, the rooms are nice with the view of river perfume, Van Duc and Mai Hoa are very friendly, helped us many♥️,

title: Nothing else to say. Best hotel
comment: Very good nice and clean hotel. Staffs are all helpful. Very good location. All are perfect. I only stayed for 2 days but will be back here next’s time.

title: Many thanks to the hotel and its great team!
comment: The hotel provided a truly wonderful experience with 5-star service. I was especially impressed by Mr. Vinh Hung and Mr. Viet Binh. Both were very attentive, professional, and always greeted guests with a warm smile. Thanks to their thoughtful support, my stay was much more comfortable and memorable.

title: Lovely hotel to stay
comment: Lovely staffs!! Especially Mr Van Duc, who is very passionate, caring and funny. He helped us a lot during the time we stayed here. He even gave us some food, which were also good. The nicest receptionist i’ve met!

title: Wonderful staff
comment:
What a fantastic grand Hotel. Very regal feel to the place. I would like especially to mention Ms Hang at Reception who was extremely kind and helpful. She also speaks very good English and made my stay very comfortable.
Also, Mr Trien at Reception was very knowledgeable about the best places of interest, restaurants to visit during my stay.

Very professional and kind staff

title: Okay. Strong.
comment:
Hotel is very nice. Satisfied.
Nothing is short.
Good view, clean and spacious and good location
After travel, all holy places can be walked.
And in the lobby of the hotel, there's a pleasant professor van duc who's having fun from check-in to check-out.
The pickup car that I intended to meet in front of the hotel did not come without any other guidance, so I asked you to see what happened.
Return to the doctor at the next visit 100%!!

title: Good experience
comment: Good hotel, very good staff, travel desk specially mr. van duc is very good, all travel related help, he is excellent. Also any other help he is eager to help

title: Great staff decent facility
comment: Good hotel, staff is great. Especially help from Van Duc (bell staff) who helped us make travel plans and book cab to Da Nang. Very knowledgeable and courteous.

title: Lovely hotel!
comment: Beautiful hotel. Van Duc in particular is an exceptional staff member, always warm and friendly when greeting us and very helpful.

title: Wonderful Hotel in Hue
comment: Beautiful hotel, excellent service and very well located in the city of Hue. Van Duc in particular was very friendly as we left the hotel each day and also gave us recommendations for our next travel location! He also helped us with our very heavy bags!!!

title: Highly Recommended
comment:
very good hotel with high standards. Great breakfast, great view and perfectly located to explore the citadel and walking-street on foot or on bike. Very friendly staff.
Highly Recommended

title: Wonderful stay!
comment:
Our stay at Imperial Hue TTC was wonderful! Lovely decor in the rooms and the lobby, definitely gives a royal feeling. Amazing service from the staff from the reception, the housekeeping and the restaurants, and especially the bell captain Van Đúc.

I would very much recommend going to floor 16 for a lovely cup of salt coffee to accompany a brilliant view of the city, especially the river.

title: Spectacular hotel, top of the range staff!
comment:
Spectacular hotel. Central location, convenient to both the center of Hué and the imperial citadel. Fantastic Welcoming with really nice staff, always helpful and very prepared! All very smiling and cheerful, with excellent knowledge of the English language.
Spacious and really clean room, varied and plentiful breakfast.
Highly recommended!

title: Out stay at TTC
comment: We had a great time at the TTC Hospitality hotel. The rooms were clean and the service was great. Also Ngoc Nhan was a great driver who drove us to Hoi An.

title: Wonderful hotel, wonderful stay
comment: TTC is a wonderful hotel. The greeting and service we received from Van Duc and the reception team was so friendly we immediately felt at ease. All of the staff are brilliant. The breakfast is superb with a good choice, the pool is clean with plenty of towels and rooms are spotless. Good restaurants within easy walking distance, especially for local Hue cuisine. Would stay here again next time we visit Hue. Hen gap lai Van Duc.

title: 10/10 experience.
comment: We had an absolutely fantastic experience from the very beginning. Clean and spacious rooms and super friendly staff. Special shout-out to Van Duc for fixing my luggage, arranging cabs for us and bringing us a beautiful cake for our honeymoon! Thank you for making our stay so special.

title: Perfect hotel, no hit.
comment: The staff is spectacular as well as the facilities. It is a hotel that lives up to expectations. Welcoming and Van Duc’s constant smile have been a major source of satisfaction. It's a pleasure to be around people this kind

title: Great location, great atmosphere
comment: TTC was a fantastic location and within walking distance to anything we wanted to see and do. The hotel was very clean and spacious too. Van Duc was a friendly face each morning and was very willing to assist with any directions or recommendations we required throughout our stay. His English was also very good. Thanks for having us!

title: Memorable visit
comment:
Mesmerising hotel in Hue, Vietnam, the decor, the hotel ambience is second to none. Above all, the staff were more than hospitable, they genuinely treat you as a honourable guest.
Big mention to Mr ‘Van Duc’, extremely kind in assisting you in all matters, he kindly helped me plan the rest of my trip in Vietnam🙏
Highly recommend this hotel. Make sure to take a room with a river view, absolutely worth it. Look forward to returning. Hue, is an awesome city🙏🫶

title: good
comment: Really 5 star experience, from the staff to the facilities. Thuy Van and Van Trien was really wonderful always helpful.

title: Perfect Hotel in Hue
comment: This hotel was nothing short of perfect. Its styling is one of classic Viet, elegant and timeless. The rooms were spacious, clean and welcoming. A nice touch was providing two key cards, so that if you are out snd about, you can leave the aircon on etc for your return. I was on the 14th floor and the views over the city were great. Breakfast was plentiful and the catering staff were highly efficient without being rushed. The swimming pool was very good - deep enough for adult swimming but fine for kids and non-swimmers. The hotel location was ideal - 5 mins walk from the noisy touristy part, 10 mins walk from the market, 20 mins walk from the Citadel (Inperial City). The staff at the hotel, be it managers, reception or cleaning staff were very helpful and courteous; a special mention goes to Mr. Van Dlic, who went out of his way to suggest and book transport from Hue to Hoi An. Would stay there again without hesitation.

title: TTC Hotel Hue offers stunning Perfume River views, friendly and caring staff, and authentic Hue-style architecture, crea
comment: TTC Hotel Hue offers stunning Perfume River views, friendly and caring staff, and authentic Hue-style architecture, creating a cultural and relaxing stay in the heart of the city

title: Fantastic stay and great recommendations from Van Duc
comment: We had an excellent stay. The hotel and rooms are beautiful. In addition, Van Duc recommended different places to visit in the city. Thank you very much.

title: Best choice for Hue
comment:
Central hotel, wonderful imperial atmosphere, exceptional roof top with 360° city and river view...
But most importantly, excellent and professional staff who with respect, care and smile try their best to assist in any matter...
Special congratulations to all front office staff, like Mrs Thu Hang and Thuy Yan who make me feel hommy every time I visit the hotel.
My thanks also to restaurant staff, especially Mrs Ngoc for her professionalism and care during dinners...

title: Good van duc
comment: It's was excellent hotel good service and helpfull staff specially Mr Van Duc he fixed my hand luggage thank you so much 😀 😊

title: Imperial stay
comment: Great hotel - Imperial! Thanks to Van Duck for his help with all our reservations and advice in the city - we had a great stay - very complete breakfast buffet

title: Stayed here twice already!
comment:
I have stayed at this hotel 2 times. Both times were amazing. The first time was back in 2022, and we were treated immensely well. The bellhop named Van Duc was a great help, personable, warm, and always on the look out to make your experience better.

Now in 2025, the same bellhop Van Duc remembered us and greeted us as we were checking in, despite there being 19 people in our group this time. The hotel felt like home. Everything was easy and at your fingertips. We planned a surprise birthday party for my mom, and the staff was unexpectedly in on it. They helped pull some strings without having to ask, and made the entire experience stellar. Folks, don’t waste your time looking elsewhere. Yes, it’s a 5-star hotel but for a VALID reason.

It is always clean, there’s 24-hour security, the place is GRAND. And the staff is what makes the hotel the way it is. RUN, don’t walk, to book here for your stay at Hue.

title: Great Stay at a luxurious hotel
comment: We had a great experience at the hotel. The friendly staff such as the lobby manager Van Duc and the cooks and waiters at the breakfast buffet were forthcoming and attentive, and the rooms were clean and spacious. With the central location and the amenities, exploring Hue and returning to rest and relax was easy and fun 😊

title: 5 Star experience
comment: Really 5 star experience, from the staff to the facilities. Van Duc was really wonderful always helpful, polite and professional.

title: Nice Stay
comment: We stayed in the TTC Imperial hotel for two nights. Hotel staff were lovely and welcoming. Van Duc was very helpful with organizing tours and transportation. We would stay here again.

title: Good hotel
comment:
Trien and Tuyet Anh are so kind
I come from a group and this time is so good because they are very helpful. The hotel decoration so beautiful. Swim pool is very blue. Hotel is very huge,@@@@#@######

title: Good hotel
comment: Ttc imperial Hotel niec View tuyet and and Trien. Very nice and beautiful 😍 see u againhjjjjjjjjjjj♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡¿♡♡¡

title: AT HOME
comment:
We had a minor problem with the room, and they resolved it quickly. It's nice to know you feel at home in this hotel.

Thanks to Trien, van Duc, and Tuyet Anh.

title: Excellent
comment: Close to everywhere. Big bathtub and pleasant stay. Van duc easily book daily tour for us. Hue have less tourists and offer rich experience. Imperial citadel and tomb very beautiful and interesting.

title: Nice hotel
comment: I went to this hotel last month. It was so beautiful and stunning. The people here are so kind and cheerful. The two receptionists, Trien and Hang, were so nice, they told me a lot about their country, Vietnam. It's also close to the city center, we walked down to the Perfume River, it's so beautiful and romantic. If you have a chance, come here.

title: Highly recommendedg
comment:
Very good reception, especially Mr. Van Duc was very helpful with everything:)
The breakfast was delicious. The view from the roof gradios

title: Phenomenal, I highly recommend!!
comment: This hotel has exceeded my expectations! Everything has been very easy, rooms are clean and spacious. I went on a 19 person family trip where the staff has been nothing but kind, genuine, friendly, and considerate. They truly want to make sure you have the best experience. I coordinated a surprise birthday party for my mother during their buffet event, where the entire staff made my mom feel so special. Van Duc (one of the workers) has been so lovely and easy to talk to. He’s been very attentive to my family and has made our stay feel extremely welcoming. This has been my second time staying here, I highly recommend this hotel!!

title: Classic hotel with great hotel staff
comment: The hotel has some neat imperial decoration with great amenities. The breakfast buffet is great with a lot of varieties. What stands out the most is the hospitality of the staff and how friendly they are. Mr. Van Duc was especially helpful to our group of 19 people every time we are trying to get organized and go on our expeditions. The front desk were helpful in getting us transportation for our trips.

title: The glories of the past
comment: Very large hotel in a great location close to both the nightlife and the old part of Huè. The rooms are spacious with classic furnishings, a bit bleak to be modernized. The bathroom door is inexplicably perforated. Despite being on the 15th floor you can hear the traffic below, we would need better soundproofing regarding the windows. Excellent breakfast with anything you can imagine, nice also the bar on the top floor although full of Asians with children screaming and making a hell of a noise.

title: Traditional style hotel with lovely service on an area within walking distance to most of the sights Service 2nd to none
comment: We booked this last minute for a two day stay in Hue, it’s the best hotel we have stayed in so far. We had a room upgrade from a deluxe double to a junior suite with plenty of room and city and river views with full size picture windows on the 11th floor. The breakfast was tasty & plentiful with a great amount of choose. We did not have time to use the other facilities but the service from Van Duc who was front of house in the foyer was fabulous. He advised on places to go & eat and visit & helped us hire a moped for two days. At first the hotel looked dated but we realised it’s a traditional decor and actually quite grand. We really enjoyed our stay- Thank you.

title: Fabulous stay. Highly recommend
comment:
Great place to stay. Central and clean. Great pool.
Van Duc at front counter was beyond helpful. He organised everything for us we had no idea how to get around the places we needed to. Lovely guy. Seek him out.

title: A beautiful hotel
comment: Nice hotel. Many thanks to Mr Van Duc for his constant help and kindness. If you need anything, ask him, he will find you the solution.

title: Good value stay in good location with helpful staff
comment: Very centrally located hotel with super helpful staff. Van Duc managed our days for us, checking to see what we wanted to do, any other interests and then organising transport which was cheaper than Grab - this made for a super easy stay! His recommendations for food were spot on too! Do try Madame Thu’s as they do a great dish where you can try all the typical Hue cuisine in one meal.

title: Total rest
comment: Arriving at this hotel was a great relief on this intense trip, we have been very careful all the hotel employees, a Service of 10. I would like to make special mention of Van Duc for his Availability (in covers) and advice, he has made things very easy for us, thank you very much for these days

title: Great service
comment: We were very pleased with our stay at the Imperial Hotel. The staff especially Van Duc was very helpful with organising our driver Ngoc Nhan who drove us all the way to Da Nang via many interesting places and even a beautiful spot for lunch. Thanks guys for making our holiday so memorable.

title: Perfect, personal and friendly
comment:
Great hotel, everything is tidy, clean and looks good.

The personal is friendly and helpful, which makes the stay more pleasant. They have a great conciërge, mister Van Duc, we recommend having a chat with him. He has good recommendations for trips and is just fun to converse with.

Massages are also a recommendation, it's done very well. Overall, great place!

title: Good van Duc
comment:
Van Duc provided excellent service and friendly service. Welcome drinks free. Sample of fruit was delicious. Lots of quality recommendations and suggestions.
Our stay at TTC imperial was amazing and made even better service from Van Duc. Thank you

title: Great service and wxperience
comment: Amazing experience with great service and the fabulous support of the always available Van Duc which made as feel home.

title: Very nice hotel with very friendly, helpful staff
comment:
Very nice and pleasant hotel. Very friendly and helpful staff. Mr. Van Duc has helped us with arranging things like transport of luggage to booking a nice transfer to Hoi An.
Extensive and varied choice for breakfast.

title: 5-star hotel, Van Duc wonderful.
comment:
5-star experience.
Large and bright rooms, overlooking the city. All very clean. Possibility to use the swimming pool with view and the gym.
Hearty international breakfast with some very good dishes, others average.
The hotel is in a strategic area, close to the nightlife.
Slightly average in price level.
Van Duc, the concierge, is a welcoming, witty person who takes the whole structure up a notch: without him our experience would not have been so pleasant.

title: Great stay in
comment: Great hotel to stay in Hué, welcomed and pampered by Van Duc, very nice consierge, clean rooms, relaxing pool and wide choice for breakfast.

title: Fantastic hotel
comment: A truly magnificent hotel. Room equipped with all comforts, comfortable and huge bed, bathroom with both bath and shower, varied and abundant breakfast. Practically a 5 star really deserved. Note of credit to Van Duc, very helpful and really nice person, ready to welcome you and provide any help.

title: Exceptional Service
comment: Upon arrival at Imperial Hotel Hue, I was very impressed with Van Duc's services. He was very helpful and polite. He deserves a promotion as he's very in his job.

title: Hue stay
comment:
Fantastic
Good location, not far from the river and a stones throw (boulder roll) to the main eating district.
As soon as we arrived we were greatd by Van Duc the head porter/font of information/great guy all round he helped with check in and getting cool
Good knowledge of the area..

Thanks for the stay

title: Ten Queue
comment:
Van Duc was extremely helpful and friendly.
A bit of renovation noise but it stopped as soon as I mentioned it.
Ten Queue.

title: Great hotel and staff in Hue
comment: We had a wonderful stay at TTC Imperial in Hue. Mr Van Duc was especially good as the host of the hotel. He remembered all our names and gave us good advice for our time in Hue.

title: Recommended
comment: i had a great stay at TTC Imperial Hotel. The staff were friendly and professional, the room was clean and comfortable, and the location was very convenient. Breakfast was delicious with lots of choices. Everything was well-organized and made me feel at home. I would definitely come back again!

title: Hotel good
comment: I've never been more satisfied. Here is central and comfortable. Perfect!!!! Great great...thankVan Duc so much

title: Swimming pool
comment: Swimming lessons by the locals, lesson after lesson. Small pool, really terrible. Left after an hour. Was not on the site either, otherwise we would not have chosen this

title: Terrible
comment: On there site was not mantion there where swimmimg lesson all day long. A little pool with a lot of children. In a hotel!!!! After 1 hour we left because 1 group after another game by. We where not happy.

title: A must try in Hue !!!
comment: Very impressive hotel. The service is incredible and the rooms are very spacious. The spa is modern with competent personnel and affordable for this high quality standard.

title: Visit to the city of hue
comment: We stayed only one night in this hotel but we really enjoyed it! The rooms were quiet and very clean! Breakfast was very plentiful with different types of food! The staff is great! We found ourselves very well with Mr. Van Duc that when I pointed out that a wheel had broken in my suitcase, he immediately fixed it! We highly recommend this hotel if you want to spend time in hue.

title: perfect stay
comment:
Excellent stay at this 5 star hotel.
The friendly staff listened to our wishes in a professional manner.
I particularly appreciated the wise advice of Mr. Van DUC, the concierge, whose help was invaluable and so smiling.
Thank you, Mr Van DUC!

title: Van Duc good job
comment: Have had fantastic time at this hotel. Exceptional service from bell captain Van Duc. He has been so helpful and generous with his time. Professional and friendly at all times. Would stay here again.

title: Perfect for visiting in ideal conditions
comment: Wonderful stay in this magnificent hotel, ideal location to discover Hu, friendly staff and a special mention to Van Duc for his Welcoming, kindness and sense of humor!!

title: Great.
comment:
Very nice hotel. Friendly staff. Breakfast suitable for all nationalities.
Van Duc (concierge) is very friendly and very nice, helpful and dedicated. Thanks to the receptionists Hung and Thu Hang also very appreciated.

title: Really excellent
comment:
Excellent Hotel Service, really beautiful. The staff at the top.
Mr VAN DUC welcomed us with great professionalism and humor. I won't forget.

CẢM ƠN 🥰

title: Great experience !
comment:
Amazing hotel. Everything is beautiful and the rooms are perfect. The SPA is great, spent a really nice time there.
One of the workers called Van Duc that welcomes you when you arrive is a great person. Really friendly and funny you'll have a nice time with him.

title: best because
comment: I would like to sincerely thank Van Duc from TTC Hotel Hue for his outstanding service and warm hospitality. His professionalism, attention to detail, and kind attitude truly made our stay special and unforgettable. He went above and beyond to assist us and made us feel at home. People like Van Duc are the reason guests want to return. Highly appreciated!

title: Fantastic hotel!
comment:
The hotel is very good. Nice big cool and open lobby. The rooms are beautiful, wooden decorated, clean and very good beds.
The hotel is close to the centre. Close to the river.
The personel was very friendly. Especially Mr. Van Đuc. He helps you with everything!
If I come back to Hue I definitely book again.

title: Great visit
comment: We had a wonderful time at the hotel; it was amazing! The breakfast was a great start, and everyone was friendly and helpful. Van Duc, the Bell Captain, was absolutely fabulous. He looked after me; it was my birthday, and he had a cake for me on arrival. He was most accommodating with trying to help us get around the town and a really great guy. He always remembered my name and said hello Steven when I came in; he was great!

title: Great hotel
comment: Very nice hotel with generous room sizes. Van Duc greeted us every day with a smile and was very helpful. The breakfast buffet is great.

title: Great hotel
comment:
Great hotel with great Service. The rooms are very pleasant and invite you to linger.
Van Duc in particular was very generous and helpful.

title: Totally fine
comment: Nice room, high in the building on corner of the property. Because of that beautiful view. Nice bed and very welcoming service. Especially big compliment for Van Duc. Very welcoming and he makes people smile!

title: Highly recommend
comment: Stayed at this hotel for 5 days. Absolutely beautiful facilities. Vẫn Dục was also very welcoming as I was coming and going during the day. He always had a smile on his face. Would highly recommend………………………………………………………………………………………………..

title: 2 great days in Hue
comment: The hotel is superb with luxurious rooms, a swimming pool and breakfast. We were very happy with host Van Duc who arranged 2 excellent days with a personal driver to visit the interesting sites of Hue. Also he helped us with a transfer. He really helped us out.

title: Nice hotel with good help from Van Duc
comment: Excellent stay with a family of four. The hotel is good and clean with a nice swimming pool on level 3. Van Duc is very helpful and arranges top visits with comfortable car and great driver. He is always there to help you with all your questions.

title: Super service from Van Duc
comment: Really good hotel, with super nice rooms and a pool. Exactly on the good place close to all the good restaurants and bars. The staf member Van Duc is so kind and helps us every time!

title: Incredible suite
comment: The hotel was superb and the Service also, I recommend to all. I also thank Mr. NGOC NHAN our driver who picked us up and took us to our next destination.

title: 2 wonderful nights in july 2025
comment:
Van Duc alone already deserves 5 stars – he is a very professional and helpful concierge who finds a solution to every problem.
The hotel also offers a fantastic view over Hue, clean rooms, and good food.
The only downside was the gym – it seemed more like decoration than something actually usable.

title: Excellent customer service!
comment: We had a wonderful experience thanks to Van Duc’s outstanding customer service. He was incredibly friendly, helpful, and professional throughout our stay. He even went the extra mile by assisting us in booking our transfer to Da Nang, which made our travel so much easier.

title: Hotel concierge
comment: Van Duc the concierge was just great. Really friendly and so helpful. He made our visit to Hue very special. I would come back and stay at the hotel because of his service.

title: Very good
comment:
Very well located hotel, with excellent views, the pool is a bit noisy
They have a concierge, Van Duc, who makes excellent recommendations and is completely trustworthy. He has managed activities, transportation, restaurants, and massages for us very efficiently, and his recommendations are cheap and very good.

title: Great Family Hotel in Huè
comment: Located within walking distance of the perfume river and night market in an area well stocked in terms of restaurants and various tourist services. Staff very welcoming and ready to take care of your needs. Overall the structure is beautiful and well maintained although objectively dated, this is most evident in the pool terrace. The spacious room with large bathroom equipped with both shower and bath. Rich and varied breakfast buffet. Special thanks to Mr. Van Duc who helped us organize the excursions and supported us during our stay.

title: Tốt
comment:
Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, sang trọng, đầy đủ tiện nghi và có view nhìn rất đẹp. Dịch vụ dọn phòng cũng rất chuyên nghiệp, luôn đúng giờ và tỉ mỉ. Buffet sáng phong phú, món ăn tươi ngon và không gian nhà hàng ấm cúng.

TTC Imperial is not only one of the best places to stay. Cám ơn Thu Hằng and Thu Vân

title: Great location & wonderful staff
comment:
Great location. Close to river, palace & central city, with great views.

Thanks to the helpful & friendly staff, particularly the Concierge, Van Duc, who made us feel very welcome and provided good practical advice that made our stay very memorable.

title: Great hotel by the river, amazing welcoming staff
comment: Really enjoyed our stay at TTC Imperial, particularly enjoyed meeting Van Duc the concierge who made us feel so welcome and was so helpful recommending tours and ordering rides for us. Great location close to the river. Amazing spread for breakfast too!

title: Exudes luxury
comment: The moment you enter this hotel, you are greeted by the spacious (and I mean spacious) lobby. The hotel exudes luxury throughout. Check-in was minimal fuss and the staff members were very helpful. The room was more than spacious and very clean. I like the separation of the shower and the rest of the bathroom. There's a large soaking tub. The breakfast buffet has a very good selection with indoor and outdoor seating. Check-out was also minimal fuss. The hotel's location is excellent, as it is close to all the stores and restaurants.

title: Great place in Hue
comment: Great location near to all amenities bars and restaurants as well as well a nice little massage parlour. Good breakfast and nice swimming pool. Patronised by locals and tourists. Great view of the river and the city. Walking distance to nearby tourist attractions and very safe

title: Beautiful hotel service
comment: Superb hotel very nice service and impeccable service from Van Duc who welcomes guests with kindness and great availability.

title: The best in Hue!
comment: Van Duc, Mai Hoa and the rest of the staff is incredible! They help arrange all the sightseeing and always incredibly kind.

title: Fantastic stay in Hue
comment: The hotel is very comfortable and customer friendly. The Bell service person, Van Duc, was extremely helpful and friendly. He helped me several times when I needed help.

title: Good job Vqn Duc
comment:
Très bon hôtel bien placé le bell captain van duc it is verry good, always smile
TTC impérial hôtel center city so easy walk around

title: A Hue Gem
comment: The Imperial’s location is convenient to the Citadel, university and the walking street along the river. The hotel staff is professional and friendly and made us feel at home especially Van Duc, the bell hop who did more than just handling the bags.

title: Nice hotel, friendly staff
comment: I would stay here again! The facilities are nice, the breakfast has a wide variety, and the location was pretty convenient. But what stood out to me the most was the staff - particularly Van Duc, the bellhop, who made an effort to learn my name, greet me kindly every time I was in the lobby, and made sure I had the best deal on a ride to the airport. After I checked out I was killing time before my flight, and he had a couple of suggestions for me to stay comfortable until then since it was too hot outside for me to wander very far on foot! Lovely service at a nice hotel.

title: Comfortable hotel in great location
comment: We had a great stay at this hotel. Very clean and comfortable. The rooms were large with fantastic views over the city. Our concierge Van Duc was very helpful, always friendly and smiling and bringing us tea while we were in the lobby. Good breakfast selection and we enjoyed the pool.

title: Fair experience
comment:
Pros:
- bedsheets are clean and comfy
- spacious room
- aircon isn’t noisy
- decent breakfast buffet spread

Cons:
- room still has this retro TV set with some white noise for every channel you switch to
- only a rain shower head in shower area; no adjustable shower head or shower hose

title: Nice hotel, central location, great view
comment:
I booked a Deluxe Twin with River View. The room had corner windows and a great view of the river. Quiet and comfortable room. The A/C fan was a little noisy but worked okay to keep the room cool all day. Included breakfast featured some Hue specialities.

The doorman Van Duc provided helpful tips for visiting the city and always greeted us with a friendly smile. His presence gave our stay a personal touch. Every other staff member was friendly and helped make our stay pleasant.

If I will definitely consider staying here again if I ever return to Hue.

title: Thanks Van Duc
comment:
Hotels TTC imperial hue center city
Is very good and very helpful the bell Man Mr Van Duc is a very friendly and very nice person he helps people with the best
I really recommend him and this hotel it it’s very hospitality and very close to every thing

title: Best in Hue
comment: Every need is catered to from a world class breakfast everyday, laundry services, assistance with acquiring transportation and finding tourist opportunities! Be sure to visit the Rooftop bar, restaurant and Buddhist temple! You will leave Hue with no regrets if you stay here!

title: Best experience in Hue. Value for money
comment: The hotel staff are very friendly and helpful. Mr O Van Duc is an excellent employee, always very helpful and informative. The hotel is well run. The breakfast buffet is the best we ever seen in Hue. So much variety of food and fresh fruits. Located very close to the river and on the side streets good selection of restaurants and cafes. Rooms on the western side have the best river and city views.

title: Great Hotel
comment: We had such a fantastic stay. All the staff were lovely and very accommodating, especially Van Duc who greeted us on arrival with a big smile and looked after us the entire stay also helping us with tours and transportation. Great rooms and great location.

title: A great value with great staff
comment: The TTC Imperial is a great stay comfortable and elegant in a great location. The staff is friendly especially Van Duc who was informative and helped me arrange tours and transfers along with a friendly greeting every day. You can be confident in your choice to stay here

title: Concierge and staff are amazing!
comment: Lovely clean happy hotel . Van Duc, the concierge amazing. Helped us with cars and info in area. Other staff super friendly and eager to help. Breakfast awesome. Recommend highly to stay here. 5 star service all the way. Mini bar inexpensive as well 😆

title: Wonderful stay
comment:
Location 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍
Rooms 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍
Atmosphere 👍 👍 👍 👍
Service 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍
Cleanliness 👍 👍 👍 👍 👍
Amenities 👍 👍 👍 👍 (need to add some body lotion maybe?)
Great views of Hué from the rooftop restaurant and bar.
Special thanks to the staff who made my visit a very nice one!
Trien was so helpful and super attentive and resourceful 👍👍👍 Also thanks to Hang, Anh and the charismatic Van Duc for their valuable assistance!
I strongly recommend this place on your future travels to Hué City.

title: Old world charm, old world values
comment:
We loved our stay at TTC Imperial. A very beautiful building with values that reflect the way hospitality is done correctly.
Staff are super friendly and respectful, especially Van Duc who went above and beyond to make our stay something to remember!

title: A hotel with class
comment: A real gem of a hotel. Although now 15+ years old the craftsmanship and quality of the fittings, furniture and the hotel remains. Comfy bed, fluffy pillows and quiet but central. Our room had an absolutely stunning view of the river. What makes this hotel also is its staff. All so very friendly, helpful with everything, always happy and very good English. Special.mention of Van Duc in the lobby always welcomes you like a long lost friend and eager to help with anything to make your stay even better. Will def stay again and highly recommended

title: Perfect.
comment: Yeah, good! Welcome to the top, room with superb views of the river of perfumes, comfortable bedding, spa to test absolutely. Breakfast with lots of choices. Staff available to guide you including Mr. Van Duc and Mr. Ngoc Nhan on excursions and city tour.

title: A Hotel I call Home
comment:
Two weeks ago I returned from my 63rd business trip in Vietnam, and although I don't write any reviews nowadays, I decided to review my stay at TTC Imperial Hotel, although I have stayed there many times in the past. However, this time it was different because although the hotel was extremely busy due to the Easter holidays, the service was once again excellent in every respect.
To start with, all the staff members are extremely friendly but at the same time highly professional, and the rooms are spacious, spotlessly clean and extremely comfortable. Dinner on the 16th floor with the best view over the Perfume River and the city, is a unique experience not to be missed!
But the main reason I'm writing this review is to praise the Hotel Concierge, Mr. Duc Nguyen. No matter how busy the hotel is, he always manages to deliver the luggage to the rooms in no time! However, this time he went a step further and even replaced a suitcase wheel, which had gone missing during the trip.
I thank him and the Imperial Hotel for my unforgettable stay in Hue and I am sure I will be back before too long!

title: Happy Stay at TTC IMPERIAL HOTEL HUE
comment: Fantastic hotel value for money,great location,clean rooms,super friendly service especially Mr Van Duc,very helpful.He booked for us VIP tour in Hue.Great swimming pool,we stayed at 15th floor with amazing river view.Breakfast buffet had great choice.

title: Great experience. Highly recommend. Wonderful, Supportive and Kind Staff. Beautiful Hotel. Special thanks to Van Duc!
comment: My 2-day stay at the Imperial The hotel was simply amazing. The staff was very polite , considerate and extremely professional! Housekeeping was very timely in delivering requests and supportive in responding to requests. Gorgeous, well decorated room with stunning furniture. Comfortable beds with breathtaking room view. Van Duc was very outstanding and welcoming. This will definitely be an annual trip. Can't wait to go back!

title: Good 5 star hotel
comment: I had a wonderful stay at TTC Imperial Huế! The hotel is beautiful, clean, and perfectly located with stunning views of the Perfume River. A special thank you to Ms. Thuy Van at the front desk—she was incredibly friendly, helpful, and professional throughout my stay. The entire reception team was welcoming and made me feel right at home. I truly appreciate their excellent service and warm hospitality. Highly recommended!

title: Good
comment: I had a wonderful stay at TTC Imperial Hotel Hue! The hotel is beautifully located with a great view of the Perfume River and close to many attractions in Hue. The room was clean, spacious, and very comfortable, making me feel at home right away. A special thank you to the front desk staff, Tuyet Anh and Thuy Van, who were incredibly welcoming and helpful throughout my stay.

title: Very good
comment: TTC Imperial Hotel Hue truly exceeded my expectations! The hotel is elegant, clean, and perfectly located in the city center with a stunning view of the Perfume River. I was especially impressed by the front desk staff, particularly Ms. Thuy Van. She was incredibly friendly, professional, and always ready to assist with a warm smile. Her excellent service made my stay even more enjoyable. Thank you, TTC Imperial and Thuy Van, for a wonderful experience!

title: 5 star hotel
comment: I had a wonderful experience at TTC Imperial Huế! The hotel is beautiful, clean, and perfectly located in the heart of the city. A special thanks to Ms. Thuy Van at the front desk—she was incredibly kind, professional, and went out of her way to make sure my stay was comfortable. Her warm hospitality truly made a difference. Highly recommended!

title: Good hotel
comment: I had a great time at the TTC Imperial Huế. The hotel is beautiful, very well located, and the service is impeccable. Special thanks to Thuy Van at the reception, who was incredibly professional, kind and attentive. Thanks to her, my experience was even more memorable. I highly recommend this hotel!

title: Excellent stay. Exceptional customer service
comment: This hotel is amazing. Staff were so wonderful, in particular Van Duc at the bell service area. He went above and beyond every day, assisting me with everything required. Customer service outstanding for him and all the staff. The room was lovely. Bed super comfy. Bathroom great. Rooftop bar is huge and good. Nice and relaxing for a quiet drink and eats. Food was so good and large portions. Delicious pizzas. Buffet breaky had everything. Super happy with hotel, cost and location. Will definitely come back.

title: An outstanding hotel!
comment: We had an amazing stay at the TTC Imperial Hotel. The rooms were beautifully appointed and our room had a lovely view of the river. The staff were fantastic, in particular Mr Van Duc went above and beyond to ensure our stay was a wonderful experience.

title: Thank you, Imperial.
comment: The TTC Imperial Huế Hotel is a perfect choice for those who wish to discover the beauty of the city of Huế. Not only does the hotel offer a luxurious setting and modern amenities, but the service is also exceptional. In particular, receptionist Thuy Van is very kind and professional, always ready to help and offer an unforgettable experience to guests. I am completely satisfied and will definitely come back next time!

title: value for money stay
comment: I traveled with my young daughter, and we were exceptionally well cared for by the hotel staff—from the front desk to the dining team and spa staff. Everyone was friendly, helpful, and attentive, promptly addressing any questions we had. The hotel is ideally located in Hue, with all attractions easily accessible on foot or a short taxi ride. A particular highlight was Mr. Van Duc, who went above and beyond to ensure our stay was truly enjoyable. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hue.

title: Great Hotel!
comment: Great Hotel, excellent location, wonderful service! The Bell Captain, Van Duc, was especially attentive and helped us to organize a private car for our trip to Da Nang. We really enjoyed the night life in this city, with the Main Street life area just a short walk from the hotel.

title: Mostly excellent with caveat
comment:
Excellent location. Friendly and helpful staff. Luxurious room. Impressive breakfast. Perfect view from room of Perfume River.
Four stars because of very loud and lengthy scraping of furniture (?)above ceiling in early hours meant disrupted sleep.

title: Old School beauty
comment: Our stay here was very enjoyable, breakfast was great and the rooms large and clean. The pool on the third floor is very nice and is picturesque the rooftop bar has a great view of Hue. The entrance is beautiful and the staff assist with any information that you may need.

title: The place is highly recommended
comment: Great place, very nice care by Mr. Van Duc. Location central. The breakfast is rich and there is something for every taste and also the beauty studio is highly recommended. Sunset on the rooftop bar is not to be missed.

title: Great hotel
comment: Grand hotel with an amazing lobby, in a great location. Walking distance to the river and the Phu Hoi area with lots of restaurants and bars. We had great views along the river. The room was large and comfortable, with a great large bed. Breakfast was excellent, with a lot of choice.

title: Good hotel
comment: This is my second visit to Hue city Vietnam. This time I had the opportunity to stay at TTC Imperial 5 stars hotel. Very happy with my stay here. Upon arrival, I was greeted by a smiling and friendly bell captain Mr Van Duc. Make my visit so welcoming. Guided to the reception and given a drink while the front desk ladies Mai Hoa and Thu Hang prepare for my stay. What a great reception.

title: Wonderful stay at TTC Hotel—great river view, helpful staff, and Van Duc made it extra special!
comment: Our stay at the TTC Imperial Hotel was a wonderful experience. We absolutely loved our room and the beautiful view of the river—it made our stay even more special. The receptionists were always very helpful and made everything easy for us. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted by Van Duc, and we felt an immediate connection with him. He was friendly, kind, helpful, and a lot of fun. Van Duc went out of his way to make our stay truly memorable. You can tell he loves his job and takes pride in making guests feel welcome. It was always a joy to have a laugh with him whenever we saw him. Thank you so much for a wonderful 3 nights!

title: Wonderful Hetel and fantastic customer service
comment: Omg where to start. This hotel is amazing. Staff were so wonderful, in particular Van Duc at the bell service and information. He went above and beyond every day. Helping me with places to eat and see to laundry, ordering me a driver and arrange even for a Dr to come to hotel to see my sick husband. He was absolutely amazing. Customer service outstanding for him and all the staff. The room was so lovely. Bed super comfy. Bathroom great. Rooftop bar is huge and good. Nice and relaxing for a quiet drink and eats. Food was so good and large portions. Delicious pizzas. Buffet breaky had everything. Super happy with hotel, cost and location. Will definitely come back.

title: Happy
comment:
TTC Imperial Hotel is one of the best accommodations I have ever stayed! The rooms are clean, spacious, and offer stunning views from the windows, offering a peaceful atmosphere, perfect for a relaxing getaway.

Most importantly, appreciate the welcoming receptionist Van, who provides with a smile and friendliness, she provides clear information and helps with everything, and it’s impressive that she also knows about Thai Granta traditions, making it more warm and intimate.

If you come back again, you won’t hesitate to re-select TTC Imperial, highly recommended!

title: A Destination Within Itself
comment:
If you like charming hotels and great service this is the place to stay. Upon arrival, we were led into the grand lobby and greeted by a very friendly and welcoming staff. A young lady served us tea. We saw a gift shop with pretty items and a bar we did not get to… Then we met the grand Duke of the place, Van Duc. He made us feel comfortable and helped us with every part of our stay-where to visit for food, tours, etc… and supplied us with a handy map of the city.
The hotel rooms are very comfortable, view of river and city, gorgeous, especially at night! Bed and pillows, very comfortable. Bathroom had shower and tub, and plenty of hot water!
Loved the surroundings, pool was great to swim in and never crowded. Breakfast had a large selection of many different options. Patio was pleasant to sit at while we ate.
There is a nice zen factor to this hotel that is not easy to describe. Very peaceful.
Van Duc also arranged our transportation to get to our next destination.
Location of this hotel can not be beat if you wish for the whole package in Hue! Thank you all!!

title: Perfect
comment:
This hotel lives up to its 5 star rating. One of the best I’ve stayed in in Vietnam.
Rooms are large, bed comfortable, bathroom clean. Breakfast was amazing. Best hotel breakfast in Vietnam I have experienced.
Location great.
Rooms very well soundproofed - very quiet. A very comfortable stay. Thankyou

title: Top stay and very fruendly and helping people. Esp. mister Van Duc
comment:
We had a wonderful stay here. The hotel is nearby the Imperial City, at walking distance. We were in a very beautiful room with 2 big window sight on the river at the 14th floor. As it is a 5 star hotel, everything was super clean, good bed, no noise, ecc. The rooftop is amazing beautiful as also the nice swimming pool. Breackfast is worthy of a 5 star rating.
A special word for mister Van Duc. He helped us a lot, even without asking him. We were waiting in the hall after the check-out as we had to take a sleepingbus. He gave us all the exact information, and he assured us about the bus and the right time to leave the hotel, get a taxi and go to the busstop. We appreciated that a lot!

title: Wow!
comment:
This place exceeded expectations. It's very opulent; from its grand entrance to the rooftop terraces that include a temple.

Service is exceptional, especially the friendly face and greetings from the concierge, Van Duc.

Our room was on the 12th floor, so we had no road noise, we had a lovely view from 2 big windows. The room was large and had all the facilities as described. The only negative comment would be that our AC was not very cool at all. This wasn't too much of an issue for our stay.

The pool is beautiful but the gym is very poor.

Breakfast is outstanding, and I had the best Pho here.

This hotel is only 5 minutes from the train station with Grab and 20 minutes walk from the imperial city. We ate nearby each evening without any problems, and there are lovely bars nearby, too. Also, Atms and mini markets if needed. This hotel has to be no1 in Hue; just beautiful and very cheap too

title: Good hotel
comment: It is the first time I came to Hue and choose to stay at TTC Imperial Hotel. All the staff are so friendly, especially receptionist Van, Binh, and Anh. Breakfast is so yummy and tasty. I love noddle beef, the pizza was amazing. I recommend this hotel for every one who love travel

title: The imperial review 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
comment: The rooms were spacious and bed was comfortable. The view was nice and we could see the newly built bridge. The fridge kept our drinks nice and cold! Breakfast was delicious. The staff were very friendly. Bell captain Van Duc will help you with anything you need. We had an enjoyable stay here and will come back the next time we visit Hue again.

title: Excellent hotel with great customer service
comment: I had a wonderful stay at TTC Imperial Hotel. The hotel is beautiful, with great rooms and friendly staff. A special thanks to Van Duc, who organized all our transport and made everything so easy and stress-free. His excellent service really made our trip enjoyable. Highly recommend!

title: A great gem in Hue
comment:
This hotel is a magic oasis in the hectic city of Hue. Close to everything and spotlessly clean. The buffet breakfast is second to none offering an endless selection of both local and western options.
A stand out highlight was the amazing friendly staff in particular the Bell captain Van Duc who made everything seamless and easy. Coming back to the hotel everyday was like being greeted by an old friend. This man is your key to unlocking the inner Hue. Already asset to the company.

title: Exceptional hotel
comment:
Thank you to the hotel team who was fantastic. Great hotel and very good breakfast.
A special thank you to Mrs. Van Duc who is the concierge and who helped us greatly in planning our trip.
I'll probably be back next time.

title: Excellent hotel - staff and location
comment:
I guess we were quite lucky having a 14th floor room with fantastic vistas down the river and across to the citadel, but on top of this the hotel and staff were great and the location perfect. Just a short walk to the river front and the centre of town.
The pool area lacks sunbeds (only 5 when we stayed) and the in house casino surprisingly had zero customers when we popped out heads in.
Breakfast buffet was plentiful.

title: Great location and quiet
comment: The concierge Mr. Van Duc was a valuable help, he directed us to the main monuments to visit. Breakfast was very good and there was something for everyone with a good selection of fruits. On the other hand I must say that the beds were very firm.

title: Disappointment
comment:
02:00am arrival
The key cards twice did not work
There came a conservative who didn't speak elementary English and opened us with a passport card
At 07:00 new keeper to check the fire lamp..
Morning Medium
In the country with the most delicious coffee, they only had filter coffee

title: Outstanding and thoughtful staff, specifically Van Duc
comment: Our stay was truly outstanding because of one specific staff member— Van Duc, the bell captain. He is truly wonderful! He anticipated all of our needs before we could even express them, he was thoughtful, attentive, funny, kind, and welcoming. He always remembered our schedule and greeted us each time we came and went from the hotel, always with a smile and making us laugh. He takes his job seriously and is dedicated to only the best guest experience. He truly made our stay at the beautiful hotel even more memorable and enjoyable! Thank you, Van Duc!

title: Simply fantastic
comment:
Truly a great hotel, exceptional staff (helped me in a couple of crucial situations, lost and found etc.. especially mr. Van Duc.)
Courtesy and cleanliness really at the top.
Ideal location to visit Hue
Highly recommended

title: TTC Hue
comment: What a great hotel, friendly and helpful staff, great rooftop bar for your sundowners, great location for walking or getting your sightseeing tours, the buffet breakfast is very good, the concierge Van Đức who was on duty when we stayed was so helpful and friendly👍

title: Great hotel, views, staff and location
comment:
The minute you step into the TTC Imperial Mr Van Duc is there to meet you with a warm smile and any help you might need for your stay.

We were on the 14th floor, fantastic views and a lovely big room, although the views were better from the 17th floor Temple.

And when leaving for a day out or evening stroll Mr Van Duc is there for you before you go.

title: Large but still personal hotel
comment:
Very centrally located. On foot you are quickly by the river and in the nightlife district . Still, it's not loud.
Staff very friendly- from reception to Bell Boy Van Duc.
Breakfast buffet was good. Wide choice.
Our room had a great view.

title: Great place to stay in Hue
comment: The Hotel is wonderful, the location is very central, not far away from historic places like the imperial city. The breakfast is great with a big variety of asian and western food. The staff is very friendly, especially Van Duc was extremely helpful.

title: Flights to Hue
comment:
Very nice and nice hotel in a strategic position to reach the Citadel and some great restaurants. The assigned room was very spacious and clean on the fifteenth floor and with a beautiful view of the river. The pool is large and clean, unfortunately they do not carry out bar service to sun loungers.
We used the Spa and recommend it.
A special mention for Van Duc who was able to help and advise us to improve our experience in Hue.

title: Hue imperial city
comment:
Great hotel, great location. Very good stay, nice bedroom / bathroom - a small flat: small pool for also large hotel.
Hearty breakfast and very varied.
A special mention to Van Duc the concierge for his courtesy and availability.

title: Great hotel in great location, with beautiful spacious, quiet and clean room
comment: Great location; value for money. Spacious, clean, quiet room with great river views and comfortable beds. Breakfast was served in a spacious dining area. The staff were friendly and all spoke adequate English, especially Mr Van Duc. Highly recommend this hotel.

title: Best hotel stay ever!
comment:
Absolutely wonderful experience. Facilities were top notch and manager Van Duc took excellent care of us and made sure all of our needs and questions were professionally addressed.
Excellent customer service!
I would strongly recommend this hotel to anyone traveling to Hue!
Cameron Melville

title: A hotel with human heat
comment:
As we value a hotel perhaps for infrastructure, for its facilities, location, etc. Today I will make a review that for me I hope will be the first and the last of its kind. The day after we arrived in Hue, I had a very serious health breakdown that could perfectly put my life at risk. Upon going down to the lobby they immediately sought transportation to the hospital. So far it seems to me that it was what they could do, but no, my wife does not speak English and was alone and faced with a totally unexpected situation, they, Vanduc, Mai Hoa and Van, lobby staff, were permanently watching her and even visited me in the hospital. How can one rate this. For me, this is my first time and I will be grateful to you for the rest of my life.
Of the rest, about the hotel is excellent. Nice room. Good location.

title: Great service :)
comment: Had a great time at hotel. Staff was very helpful and friendly. In fact I lost my phone (left it in hotel car) and the driver (Van Duc) immediately called us and drove all the back to return it to me. I used small gym in morning which was clean. Beautiful rooftop bar and restaurant and pogoda. Complimentary breakfast was great. Pool was cold my girls dragged us in anyway :)

title: TTC Imperial experience
comment: Excellence customer Services. Friendly and Polite staffs. Room is big but a Little dated. Pattaya Thai Spa is worth a try. You can view the whole city on The 16th floor rooftop patio. Overall, exceptional experience, will come back or recommend to our friends

title: Excellent stay
