Without me having to ask, she even upgraded my room so I would be in a quieter area. I was very grateful. She even messaged me to say she was leaving for the day but the other staff will take care of anything I need. She was right. When I messaged the office with a question Cam responded within minutes.
I was there to celebrate my birthday and Annie coordinated with the breakfast staff to bring me a slice of birthday cake and everyone sang to me. It was very special. She even gave me a cute little pink fan as a birthday gift because I told her I forgot mine and it was very hot that day.
It wasn’t just Annie, it was the entire staff who cater to your every need. They know what it means to provide service.
The breakfast was delicious. Sadly, I only ate at the other restaurant once. The food was amazing. The grounds are beautiful and well maintained. The Detox massage was amazing.
I regret only spending 2 nights there. I will definitely be back and will stay longer next time. If you’re looking for a luxury resort this is it.

title: If relaxation is what you are looking for, visit Vedana.
comment: Vedana resort exceeded our expectations on every level. From the moment we arrived we were made to feel very welcome by the friendly and attentive staff. There were plenty of activities to do when not relaxing by one of the amazing pools. We enjoyed activities like morning Thi Chi and yoga. A highlight was our visit to the on-site bird sanctuary. A big thank you to Loan and the amazing Vedana team. I hope I am lucky enough to come and visit again!

title: The best resort and service we experienced in Vietnam !
comment: An incredible stay .. sad to be leaving ! We had an awesome time from start to finish . The staff especially Loan and Cam and Nina in the restaurant couldn’t have d one more to make our trip memorable. Thank you :) .

title: Wonderful Family Stay! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
comment: We had a fantastic time at the resort! The service was excellent, the food was delicious, and the staff were all so kind — especially Tân and Nina, who made us feel truly welcome. We had a small issue with insects in the villa, but the front desk team handled it quickly and professionally by moving us to another room. The highlight was definitely the pool overlooking the lagoon at sunset — absolutely stunning! Highly recommend and hope to be back soon.

title: Wonderful vacation spot!
comment:
This is a very nice and relaxing vacation spot. The staff are extremely nice especially Cam and Loan,who have been the best hostesses to us.

The food is great and the facilities are wonderful. The morning yoga is a must do to unwind. The spa is also a nice treat.

Overall, we enjoyed this very much and will definitely come again!

title: Amazing experience!
comment: We stayed 3 nights in a 2bedroom water pool villa and everything exceeded our expectations! The views are breathtaking, the villa was huge and well appointed, and the staff were incredible. The resort is very family friendly so we would recommend hiring a pool villa if you want to relax and have your own space. This is the perfect place to unwind and enjoy the scenery and all the amenities on offer. Everyone gets a bike, and riding around the resort is the best way to soak in the view. There isn’t much around in terms of restaurants and shopping. There are a few seafood eateries near the entry, but they have limited supply and most of the fresh seafood is sent to Hue. We ate at the restaurant every night since it had a great selection of food (Vietnamese and Western). There are daily shuttles to Hue if travellers really feel the need to visit a big city - but we didn’t want to leave. The Vietnamese hospitality really sings here and the team were simply amazing. A very special thank you to Annie, Cam, Ni Na, Tan, Thao and Vu for ensuring we had a magical experience! Julie & Tony

title: A Serene Slice of Paradise – Unforgettable Stay at Vedana Lagoon
comment: Our stay at Vedana Lagoon Resort was truly exceptional. Nestled between the sea and mountains, it offered breathtaking views and serene luxury. From the moment we arrived, Loan Cam and the entire Vedana team ensured every detail was perfect. The overwater bungalow was spacious, peaceful, and beautifully designed. Daily breakfast by the lagoon was a delight, with fresh, flavorful dishes. The spa treatments were world-class, and the service throughout was warm and personal. Whether relaxing by the pool or kayaking at sunset, every moment felt special. Thank you, Loan Cam and Vedana team, for an unforgettable and heartwarming experience!

title: Holiday resort located along a beautiful lagoon near Hué.
comment:
The relative new watervilla was excellent, with a swimming pool and a view!
The, in our view 4*, resort is large and elongated along the lagoon: the bicycles or the buggy rides offered are necessary to be able to go to the bar, the restaurant or the spa.
The service is friendly and accommodating. It is a holiday resort, so be prepared for families with kids, especially at breakfast and in the restaurant.
The spa is also located over the water, but inside the rooms you do not notice; some knowledge of english would have been nice. The treatment was fine.

title: Landscape and services
comment: It's my 8th times I ve been there and it was always delightful! I was in a villa on water and the view is breathtaking! Staff is very kind and helpful especially , Nina for all you need or request and Toàn, at the restaurant. Tip: you can also eat outside the resort, at pha tam giang restaurant good and cheaper!

title: A special place, a special stay, amazing staff
comment:
This was a special place made even more beautiful by the staff, Nhi, Cam and Loan constantly went above and beyond among many other staff to make sure we had a special stay.

The facilities are excellent and you have the opportunity to do yoga classes, access a spa and enjoy excellent meals.

We would thoroughly recommend anyone visiting Vietnam to take a trip to Vedana lagoon.

title: Beautiful paradise
comment: This place is next level. It is so so so beautiful and relaxing but what makes it really special is the kind and careful and thoughtful treatment by the staff. Cam in particular was phenomenal. Little details were not overlooked - the mini bar was restocked daily with the items we used most and preferred. We asked for extra towels once and extra towels were brought every night. I mentioned my partner is vegetarian and each morning at breakfast the staff carefully pointed out all of the vegetarian options. One day we needed some medication and the hotel organised it all without any fuss - they went above and beyond. We had a hillside pool villa and the butterflies and birds were magic. It’s outside hue but has a free shuttle service. But to be honest, it’s a perfect world all of its own. Highly recommend and particular thanks to Cam and Viet Trung at breakfast who was so lovely.

title: Beautiful and Rejuvenating
comment: My husband and I came here as part of our honeymoon, and it was such a wonderful and rejuvenating stop. Don't skimp, and make sure you book a room with your own private pool! We had such a wonderful time just lounging all day. We loved having the option of biking or using the buggies to get around. Even though we were in some of the further villas, we also walked to the front a few times - it's not that far! The food was okay, but all the restaurants serve the exact same thing, so we got a bit sick of it. We ended up doing dinner multiple times at the little seafood restaurant directly outside the front gate, which I would argue is a must do! It was some of the best food we had in our entire 2 weeks in Vietnam. Also don't skip the bird garden!

title: Amazing hospitality and customer service
comment:
We arrived very late, almost midnight and there were staff awaiting our arrival. They processed our check in quickly and had a buggy take us to our lagoon villa. The lagoon villa had an infinity pool in the middle, and one very large room each side of the pool.

The rooms were spacious in ceiling height and floor space. Even the bathroom space was huge, with a shower and toilet in a separate greenhouse-like area. A bathtub was also in our room.

Kudos to Cam who arranged a private car for us after we had booked a spot on the Hue city shuttle bus, which was either overbooked or they had misplaced our reservation. The private car was arranged without haste and was a round trip for the four of us. They kept us updated about this process, were apologetic and were helpful via whatsapp whilst we were in Hue to make sure we got back to the resort just fine.

We tried the tai chi and yoga which was fun and challenging at the same time. The breakfast was good with a decent variety of choices. Dining was at the on-site restaurant. Bicycles are available all over the resort so you can cycle and see sunrise on their jetty, or get to any other facility they have including a gym and kyaking activities.

The resort is about an hour away from Hue city and about 30min from the new airport.

title: Wonderful , relaxing stay!
comment:
My partner and I have just stayed at Vedanā Lagoon for 7 nights and had an excellent stay.

First and foremost, the staff are fantastic. Every single member we met over the 7 days was warm, welcoming and very attentive. A special mention to Nhi, Cam and Ha for making our stay so special.

We stayed in a hillside villa which was exceptionally spacious and relaxing. Housekeeping were very good and the daily restocked mini bar, water and fruit was welcomed. We also used the free shuttle bus into Hue on an overcast day, and would recommend visiting the Imperial City should time allow.

The breakfast buffet selection was excellent and lunch and dinner menu very good.

Overall we really enjoyed our stay and would recommend Vedana to anyone looking for a relaxing break in Vietnam. Thank you to all who made our first trip to Vietnam so wonderful - we hope to be back very soon!

title: Noce hotel
comment: This hotel very big and quite room. All staffs were friendly and helpfulllll. Big breaffast and special thing break and barkery. Free bicy le and swimming pool very clean . Hope to come back again. Nearby the old town in Hue ………………………………………h

title: Vietnamese Maldives
comment:
Houses on stilts laid on the lagoon.
The incredible view and the feeling of floating above the water...
The room is huge, the decoration a bit Japanese and the pool laid in front of the bed.
Every alarm clock and bedtime is an incredible sight.
Distances are long and bicycles or a buggy is at your disposal.
Breakfast is delicious.
The staff is extremely kind and efficient, and responded to all my requests very quickly.

title: An ideal place to feel good and relax.
comment:
A resort to feel good and relax. After the hustle and bustle in Hanoi, this was the ideal place to enjoy peace and nature. There are different accommodations, we had chosen a water villa and this was a very good choice. We also got wellness treatments, daily cocktails and free minibar as an encore. Thanks to the ladies at the spa and the twilight lounge, Kim mixed great cocktails. In general, the staff were super friendly and helpful, here a special thanks to the buggy drivers and our personal caregiver Loan, who cared for us lovingly. In addition to transportation by buggies, one could use bicycles, which were available at each accommodation. We also used the wheels to look at those around the lagoon.
The only criticism concerns the restaurant, we had opted for duck from the menu. The duck leg we got was totally tough and dry. And the price is way too high. The other days we have been to the pubs outside the facility for food.

.

title: Beautiful and amazing
comment: Absolutely incredible place. The villa was so comfortable and felt a bit lavish. The guest relation officer, Nhi, was so sweet and friendly and had a twinkle in her eye I will never forget. Access to free bicycles to get around resort campus. The breakfast buffet was so fresh and delicious. If you stay here, you CANNOT miss the bird garden. Dozens of tropical birds will fly around and land on your shoulders and head, it is exhilarating and unforgettable !!!

title: Great stay
comment: This is our second stay at the Vendana Lagoon Resort, and hopefully not the last. It's so peaceful and well maintained. Kindly given the same water bungalow that we stopped in the first time we went as we think it's a gorgeous view. Was nice to sit out and watch the local fishing boats pass by. It's a really beautiful place and so tranquil. Many thanks to Cristy, Cam and all the staff who made our stay so special.

title: Cant wait to “Cam” again!!☺️
comment:
My stay here was near perfect! The room was luxurious and private, we had our own villa on the water and it was a magnificent view. Our villa was gorgeous with an amazing rainforest-like shower! The service was superb, special shout out to assistant manager Cam! After my mom mentioned how much she liked the welcome drink, the assistant manager shortly after sent a whole thermos of it to our villa despite the rain!. It was sprinkling a little while we were there, and the drivers would pick us up from our room and take us to the restaurants and wherever else on the grounds swiftly.
They also provided us with bicycles to ride around the grounds, and the best part, a shuttle to Hue city. The hotel is a bit secluded, great for privacy but iffy if you want a stay closer to the city. It was beautiful, comfortable, and incomparable. I can’t wait to come back again! Thank you to the staff and drivers there for making our stay wonderful!

title: Nice staff
comment:
This is a nice place to stay. It is located far from city and quiet, good place to escape busy town and rest.
The room is very clean with good smell.
The staffs (Cristy and Anh) are super friendly and supportive.
Very delicious and healthy food :-)

title: Amazing stay
comment:
The stay was terrific; on a scale from 1 to 10, it was a 100.

I was there for a week for workshop, a facility was the last thing I thought about before the trip. But from the first moment they picked me up at the airport to the every experience after that, it was all pleasure.

Location: not far from the center of Hue city, but you have everything in sight, including mountains, rivers, sunsets, sunrises, fresh air, clear sky, quiet, and peace.

Service: high standard. I was amazed by the level of detail they provide, consistently from a room to a restaurant, from a facility for hobbies to the conference room.

Foods: various foods, you can find local dishes as much as western ones with fresh ingredients.

Staff: They made the spirit to a resort, I felt welcome everywhere, which made me feel like I was living in a neighborhood rather than a service-feeling-of-a-cool-nice-resort. I can't tell enough about Christy and Phuong Anh, who took care of us very well from the beginning till I left. I still felt warm in my heart.

I definitely come back with my mom.

title: Best holiday ever!
comment: This resort is superb! One of a kind. The facilities, the room and the view are 5 stars quality. And the staffs really makes you feel at home, kudos to Christy and Phuong Anh. I love you guys already. I never felt more refreshed after a holiday than this!

title: Exceptional Experience
comment: our experience was exceptional from check in to check out. Beautiful villa, spotless, incredible amenities, beautiful spa, the most friendly staff. Ms. Annie and Ms. Cam were so lovely and made our stay absolutely perfect. Great food too. We took the bus service to Hue and it was incredibly good, on time, clear, fun and helpful. Looking forward to coming back and would absolutely recommend.

title: Best resort
comment:
Literally the best service I’ve had in any resorts in Vietnam. One message and they came within 3 minutes, whether to pick me up in a buggy or missing anything. Cam and Ngoc Anh made a Zalo group so I could text whenever I was in need for anything.
The buggy service is on top. The villa view was amazing, bicycles are available for biking around the area, villa was clean, heated pool was super nice, everything was perfect eventhough it was rainy when we went, but we still had a very good time. Free shufflebus to Hue city and pickup.

Amazing place!!!!!

title: Stunning & peaceful spot with excellent service and a great location
comment:
A wonderful, high-end resort. The views and sunsets over the lagoon are stunning, as is the hiking in Bach Ma National Park only a short drive away. Apart from the location what really stood out was the service. I was very well looked after by Anni and Cam; nothing was too much trouble, whether organising a last minute taxi to Bach Ma or accompanying me on a boat tour around the lagoon.

I took a hillside villa which was very spacious, modern, and clean.

title: Luxury lagoonfront resort near Bach Ma National Park
comment: A fantastic resort sn a lagoon near the very exotic Bach Ma National Park. Located on the lagoon, many bungalows over the water, all very spacious and spacious, extremely well maintained and very luxuriously equipped. The staff is very friendly and helpful with all questions and wishes. The food wonderful, yet reasonable in price. The location near the national park is wonderful for many activities. Too bad we only had one day.

title: A perfect stay in an idyllic place.
comment:
It was our second stay at Vedana Lagoon and again we were delighted with these few days spent in the resort.
All the amenities were excellent (the villa on the water, catering, swimming pools, spa, etc...), and we again appreciated the exceptional kindness of all the staff. It contributes enormously to the pleasure of staying in this beautiful place.
Thank you to Cam and Annie for their welcome and quick responses to all our requests. Thanks to Nina and all the staff at the restaurant.
In short, this five night stay was perfect, and we warmly recommend the Vedana Lagoon. We will be back with great pleasure next year.

title: Very good resort, fully recommend!
comment: Hotel is excellent which is roomy and great view. Reception by staff Hoai Nhi was excellent and warm. The warm ginger tea soothed all our tiredness away as we were on a cycling trip. Answered all our questions and shared the resort details clearly, love the resort!

title: Great place made memorable by the friendly staff
comment: Beautiful location and amazing villas. The staff are incredibly friendly and helpful, and in particular Annie looked after us very well during our stay and was always ready to help out with our requests. Thank you to all the other staff for making it a memorable visit. I gave 4 stars rather than 5 as I think the owners of the resort should make some nature trails into the forest behind the villas, taking the opportunity to encourage visitors to learn more about the natural environment around them and ensure it is well looked after and sustainable 😊

title: 2 nights near Bach Ma Nationalpark
comment: We had a very lovely stay and visit in Bach Ma National park, where we booked a driver from the hotel to drive us to the five lakes and wait for us at the end of the track. The Hotel had a very quiet and relaxing atmosphere and we were welcomed by Friendly and helpful personel

title: A must stay if you can!
comment:
We spent 6 beautiful nights at Vedana. The property is stunning and incredibly well maintained. Views day or night were fantastic and we loved the use of bikes to travel from our villa to breakfast etc. So fun! There are golf carts that are also always available to move you around too. We used their transfer service and also booked a DMZ tour through them….both excellent and Mr. Buu was a great driver.

The breakfast buffet was sizable and had A La Carte options too. Dinner menu was also quite expansive and included lots of Vietnamese and Western options. The staff were AMAZING and we throughly enjoyed meeting each and every one of them. I don’t have all their names but Miss Ni Na and Miss Cam were just both exceptional and kind to us.

Would highly recommend Vedana.

title: Special experience in the middle of nature
comment: I stayed for 1 night with family on the way to Hue city from Da Nang. It was rainy and cold, but reception(Annie) was warm and friendly to check-in. Resort is located next to Lagoon, so this reminded me childhood in rural. We enjoyed all of facilities and experience with Spa and Yoga. All of them were kind.

title: One of the best places we’ve ever stayed
comment: Honestly one of the best places we’ve ever stayed. We booked a water pool villa, and everything was perfect. We loved the spaciousness of the villa, the wonderful food, the spa treatments and most of all the friendliness and helpfulness of the staff at the resort. Highly recommend this place!

title: Excellent service!!! Love Annie<3
comment: My second time at Vedana Lagoon Resort! Travelling with a baby is never easy but the excellent customer service here makes me feel like home! Thank you team for your hospitality and especially to Annie!!!! The best Guest relation officer!!! And all the other staff. Thank you ! Will come back again

title: Best Resort Ever
comment:
We had the pleasure of staying at this resort from January 13th to January 17th, 2025. The staff were the most remarkable aspect of our stay. They were exceptionally friendly, authentic, and prompt, always available and willing to ensure our stay was both comfortable and enjoyable.

The resort itself was immaculate and well-maintained. The pool and the view were outstanding. The cleaning and housekeeping team performed their duties flawlessly. The breakfast was extraordinary; words cannot adequately describe how exceptional it was.

I highly recommend this resort. Special mention must be made of the wonderful staff members: Nhi, Cam, and Fo and the handsome driver Nhan Additionally, the spa and massage services were a delightful bonus and very pleasant.

title: My visit was great! I would totally recommend this resort to anyone who's looking for a fantastic view, with great amenities.
comment: The views are spectacular and the service even better! The two front desk girls, Annie and Cam, were extremely attentive and caring about our needs. The whole staff, in general, was extremely helpful. The rooms were immaculate and the bed was the most comfortable bed I've ever slept on.

title: 2nd time around. Still the same great experience
comment: One day of our most memorable stays in Vietnam. Our hostess name is Anne and Cam, were super sweet and helpful, along with the rest of the staff. Been here for the second time and had the same great experience. Highly recommend the spa treatment

title: Water Bungalow just great
comment:
We had the pool villa right in the water.
Very nice and very clean.
Ideal for relaxing.
Our heartfelt thanks belongs to Trinh who has looked after us very well and was always there for us.
We wish you all the best for the future.

title: Highly recommend for a luxurious stay
comment: We stayed in one of the private waterside villas for just two nights. The villa was very spacious, and very luxurious. The staff were incredibly attentive and very friendly. We loved Hang who catered to our every need. I had a foot massage and a Thai body massage, both were a wonderful experience. Used the heated pool too which was wonderful. Good fun using the bicycles to get around the resort. Breakfast was delicious and a good range of food.

title: 2days on the lagoon
comment:
Incredible staff , especially our host and waitress in main restaurant wonderful food
Free shuttle service to Hue made for a lovely day out
S.p.A. probably the best I’ve ever visited
Amazing infinity pool. Local restaurants are not up to much

title: Amazing value for money, amazing staff
comment:
Amazing place to stay, the staff are so friendly and helpful,the book a buggy was so easy as we were on a what's app group,the spar treatments were amazing to.. such a great place to stay.
We had a bungalow on the lagoon it had a huge bed, and looked out over the lagoon. Was magical, never put a review on before but this place was worth a review ..

title: Perfect Experience! We Absolutely Loved Our Stay!
comment: Everything at Vedana was absolutely wonderful. Communication after booking was top notch. We needed to change our dates and type of room a few times before arriving and they were very accommodating and helpful. Transportation to the resort from Hoi An and to Hue airport was very nice. The staff was so kind and welcoming. The over water pool villa was stunning - book it, you won’t regret it. Spa services were great and relaxing. Getting around the resort is a breeze with the provided bikes or electric buggies. Communication with management and staff via WhatsApp made requests and spa/activity bookings super easy and quick. The restaurants have a large and varied food and drink menu. We booked a romantic sunset meal on the wharf; definitely a highlight experience. Our only quibble is we felt the day trip to Hue was a little too long; would have loved a shorter time frame option. The bird garden is a very fun 45 minute experience. I would highly recommend Vedana to anyone looking for a beautiful and relaxing stay away from the major cities.

title: A Peaceful Getaway That Keeps Getting Better
comment:
A few years ago, I visited Vedana Lagoon with my family, and this time, I returned with my boyfriend. Just like my fond memories, the place remained unchanged in its charm. The construction of the swimming pool and other facilities, which was ongoing during my previous visit, has now been completed, making the experience even better.

Vedana Lagoon is consistently being refined, and I have no doubt that it will be even more impressive the next time we visit.

My family, especially my younger sister who joined me during the last trip, was quite envious when I shared photos, and my boyfriend was so satisfied that he suggested we minimize our time in Hoi An and stay here exclusively for our next trip.

The private pool in the Water Pool Villa we stayed in was a bit chilly, but not to the point where swimming was uncomfortable. The area was quiet, free of bugs, and ideal for relaxation. The food was excellent, leaving nothing to be desired. Comparing it to the accommodations we stayed at afterward, Vedana Lagoon stands out as the perfect place to unwind in peace.

All the staff were incredibly kind, and I’d like to extend my gratitude especially to the two staff members, Hein and Nhi, who responded promptly to our requests via KakaoTalk in real-time.

We’re already planning to revisit as soon as our important exams, scheduled for early next year, are over. We look forward to seeing you again soon!

title: Vedana
comment:
On the first day, the hotel staff helped us check in early. Then we drove to Bach Ma, a wonderful excursion. Trinh explained the Bach Ma Tour, she prepared wipes and cajuput oil for us to take away.

On the second day of our stay at the resort, Trinh helped us with everything, including cleaning the room, ordering food.
In particular, Trinh speaks German very well, so we talked completely in German. Trinh said we were her first guests in the new year.

Here we really feel comfortable and cared for.
We will definitely stay in the
Summer coming back here.

title: Hotel in great position, lovely staff
comment: We arrived in Hue after an overnight train journey and were delighted to get to this lovely hotel. We were fortunate to get an upgrade and had the most amazing room. All the staff were great, Phuong, Vy and Tram on the front desk were lovely and very helpful. The hotel is in a great position for bars shopping and sights. Loved it. Very good breakfast.

title: Central, good!
comment:
Good Hotel, very central, location eprmises to visit the city on foot '
Spacious and clean rooms, friendly staff although for a small problem with the safe I had to solicit several times....
breakfast in the norm

title: Great location for river and old town access
comment: Great location for river and old town access on the commercial side. Good breakfast. Many good local restaurants very close buy and shops. Took a cyclo trip for two at night which was great to the old town. Booked through hotel reception to get best guide and price for 1 hour. Highly recommended.

title: Very welcome from the beginning to the end of the stay. Comfortable and very nice room.
comment: Hotel to recommend absolutely. Very good location. Thank you to Mrs Phuong and Ms Nhung for their availability and professionalism.

title: Lovely Hotel
comment:
The staff are welcoming and warm and were so helpful during our stay.
We were upgraded to a suite room. It was huge with a seperate bedroom and great view of the river and surrounding area.
Everything was very clean, the breakfast was yummy and pool area was a welcome from the heat.
Loved this hotel, especially the staff.

title: Stay at the Moonlight hotel in Hue
comment:
4 star hotel that deserves it. Perfect and responsive Service. Were upgraded on initiative. Very large room, very well equipped and very clean. Redone every morning. The hotel has a gym, swimming pool, massage room etc.
Breakfast on the top floor with 360° view. Excellent breakfast. For every taste.
Very good location in the city center without the noise nuisance.
A 20-minute walk from the Imperial City. A few steps from the river of perfumes.
I am pleased to have chosen this establishment for my stop in Hue.

title: Touring with HolidayMax
comment:
Great location, friendly staff, excellent service.
Highly recommended.
Always keen to help, nothing was ever a problem.

title: Return customer from the past
comment:
I've picked this hotel before and had a good stay here. I originally booked the Signature Suite only because the Deluxe King River view was fully booked on several hotel booking platforms and i really wanted to stay here again. But found it too big (you can hold a big meeting in there) and too posh for just one person and would have been a complete waste of space on just one person alone.
So I asked the reception Ms. Thao and Ms. Ly if there had any deluxe king river view room. And the 2 ladies were very accommodating to my requests... at the time I sure they were quite puzzled but were very pleasant and gracious nonetheless. And just nice too, because I learned that the very next day the larger room I had booked was home to a bigger group of guests... it was the right choice made to ask for a smaller room for myself.

The location is excellent. Bed and pillows just the way I like it. Shower water pressure was strong. Good breakfast selection, great views, super clean and bright. Which is why i chose to stay in the Moonlight as my 2019 stay was simply amazing. Book early if you want rooms because the rooms with the river view do sell out fast though. Just right for all sorts of travellers who was a good stay in Hué.

title: Advice for guests : get clean, showered, and makeup-free to this hotel. Don’t use the towels!!
comment:
We stayed two nights at the Moonlight Hotel in Hue. The hotel is fine. The mattresses are a bit hard. The pool is small. Upon check-in, I had the unpleasant surprise of being shown a photo of a makeup-stained hand towel. They told me they had to charge me a fee. One receptionist said 30k dong, and the other said 50k (€2.70). We told them that doesn't happen anywhere, and they told us they couldn't use that towel for another hotel. We asked if they didn't wash towels between guests. They insisted on charging that price, and when I commented that it was more than the towel costs, they replied that I could take it if I wanted. At this point, I got extremely angry. I could take the dirty towel if I wanted! I asked to speak to a manager, and they showed me a guy standing next to me. He told me it was hotel policy. I told them I'd give them a negative review, and then they started talking about refunding my money. The problem wasn't the money. It was the poor treatment and the senseless way they charge you for a dirty towel and then offer to take it away for you. It's outrageous, we won't be returning.
Advice for guests : get clean, showered, and makeup-free to this hotel Otherwise, you'll face a penalty and the scolding attitude of the front desk staff.

title: Sleeping on a nightclub? No thanks.
comment:
Hotel renovated but not modern
Efficient staff and thorough cleaning
Timely laundry service
Rooftop restaurant on the 14th floor with a beautiful view
Rich breakfast and fitness room and pool on the 5th floor
Unfortunately, the noise of the rooms on the street in front of it is incredible even standing on the eighth floor!
In fact, in the room amenities you will find earplugs

title: Family Holiday
comment:
The staff were amazing organised a special gift for my wife's birthday great service overall.
We were in a great part of town walking distance to bars and shops, swimming pool is great views in the dining room are spectacular,
Rooms were comfortable.
thankyou.

title: Hotel medio
comment:
The hotel has a nice view of the city too bad that my room gave on the street where there is absurd music until 1 am and it is hard to sleep.
The room had some problems (door closing, hairdryer) which were partially solved.
The staff went to great lengths and were friendly.
We stayed two nights and had dinner (not memorable dinner but at least enough) and breakfast was on the same level as dinner.
The most beautiful thing is the view from the upper floors of the city.
The WIFI was jerky and often crashed.
The hotel could use a freshen up maybe soundproofing the rooms at least to the outside.

title: Nice hotel, great price
comment: We really liked this hotel for our two-night stay, room was quite sufficient with a little table and 2 chairs (which you don't always find in smaller hotel rooms), and the staff was great, especially Thai Nam - very helpful and sweet! We would stay there again.

title: Outstanding!!!
comment:
We arrived as guests we left as friends. I can only congratulate the front counter staff for their kindness , eagerness to serve, and support. Lan Phuong, Khanh Vy, and Huong Ly, ladies, you are amazing. Thank you for your support and kindness. Even helping us with a request outside your job description.

The hotel is fantastic with clean and spacious rooms. Good food and a very tidy restaurant. Well done.

title: Good hotel except intens night music which is not normal for a European customer
comment:
Good bed, good breakfast, central location but! Middle in a a karaoke area with much chaotic music enters the room all night, windows are not soundproof, door of room has also a large gap where a lot of corridor light enters.

Everyone coming home at night on your floor can be heard because there is no sound insulation in the hallway.

title: Great hotel, even better staff.
comment: Large rooms with super sized beds. The staff were incredible. Mrs Phuong and Ms Nhung not only booked us a taxi at the hotels expense (the travel agent will pay them back) when out taxi to the station did not show up but they made sure one turned up quickly as we could not wait for a grab car. Thier restaurant recommendations were perfect and they provided all the support I needed to manage refrigerated medications I have to travel with. Super friendly and comfortable hotel. Breakfast was the best buffet breakfast with a wide range of Asian and European options including freshly made omelette and other eggs.

title: The Best Hotel 4Star In Hue with Halal Food ♥️
comment:
This hotel has a strategic location, close to the city center and tourist attractions. The bedrooms are comfortable and clean. The hotel staff service is also friendly and professional.
This hotel's facilities are complete, such as a swimming pool and fitness center. The cleanliness of the rooms and the surrounding environment are also well maintained.
And you know, I met a reservation officer named Mrs. Phuong who was very kind, friendly, beautiful, and coincidentally we were both pregnant.
I hope we meet again another time Mrs. Phuong. Nice to meet you 🫶🏻♥️🥰

title: Some nights in paradise
comment: Wonderful stay, top Location with view over the bay (Pool Villa). The staff were incredibly warm and welcoming, anticipating our every need. Jennie, in particular, looked after us with such care, gave us great tips and was simply lovely. We felt completely at home. We’d come back in a heartbeat!

title: Exceptional Hospitality at Banyan Tree – A Truly Memorable Stay
comment:
We had an absolute pleasure staying at Banyan Tree. While the natural beauty, weather, and the resort itself are truly stunning, what made our experience exceptional was the level of care and attention we received throughout our stay.

From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by Jennie, who looked after us with genuine kindness and professionalism. She checked in on us regularly, ensured seamless communication, and was always available for any questions or requests. Her warmth and constant smile made us feel instantly at home.

Midway through our stay, Mi became our host and continued this outstanding level of service. She thoughtfully arranged activities, organised special surprises, and was incredibly attentive—especially when she promptly assisted us to the medical centre when needed. Her friendly and proactive approach made a lasting impression, and we are so grateful for the unforgettable memories she helped create.

We would also like to extend a heartfelt thank you to Vinh, who drove us around with such positivity, always with a smile, and to the lovely Thom, who not only served us delicious cocktails but also took the time to chat and capture some beautiful photos for us.

The entire experience would not have been the same without such a professional, dedicated, and genuinely caring team. Thank you all for making our stay so special.

Thank you!

title: Paradise in Lang Co
comment:
Such a wonderful place and even more lovely people who just go out of their way to make you feel welcome and comfortable throughout. We were just blown away by the attentiveness and care shown especially by Man Truong, Hieu Vo, Daniel, Lo, Dieu ( Watercourt) and every other person around.

Not to mention the peaceful landscape where you can just switch off from the world. The beach villas are just amazing. We really hope to visit again.

title: Fun Cooking Class Experience!
comment: Fun Cooking class making vietnamese spring roll with chef Nho Le.

title: A pleasant stay and excellent getaway
comment: Overall very good experience. Had a cooking class with Nho Le- very interactive and fun. 🤩

title: Cooking class
comment: Very nice teacher! great experience

title: Exceptional stay with outstanding attention to detail
comment:
We had an exceptional stay at Banyan Tree Lang Co, everything was truly perfect. The attention to detail and the staff’s genuine attentiveness were outstanding.
We were also touched by the thoughtful daily gifts in our villa, the freshly baked cookies and many more small details that made a big difference.
A special thank you to our villa host, Tuan, who made our stay even more memorable and carefully arranged the birthday surprises.
There was honestly nothing that could have been improved. We would absolutely love to return!

title: Cooking Class
comment: We had a great cooking class with Nho Le. She made the experience so much fun. She is a great teacher and the food was delicious.

title: An interesting experiment.
comment: Bayan Tree is a beautiful and wonderful destination beyond expectation.

title: Beautiful well maintained classic hotel
comment: What a beautiful hotel & lovely staff in this day where every hotel feels the same this has retained it’s glorious era with lots of memorabilia to see it’s a reminder of grand old days of the hotel industry beautiful & relaxing courtyard for breakfast buffet which covered Asian & western tastes rooms were large & comfotable had one of the best sleeps & we had room facing traffic location is excellent on the river

title: Good value but past its best
comment: The rooms are nice, large and clean but the hotel seems to be hanging onto its glory days and not doing a very good job. Breakfast is ok but so busy it’s like being at a conference or tour hotel. Coffee not great, but it’s fine. We ended up ordering lunch one day as we were waiting for the train.. it was over priced and rubbish! Do NOT get your washing done… big mistake. Cost 10 times what we have paid elsewhere!! Also charges us $5 for leaving our plastic key at breakfast! It is good value but use as a base and don’t use their services!

title: Special location
comment:
Historic hotel. Inside you can breathe air of other times. The rooms are large and have a beautiful floor. Ours was on the third floor and overlooked the river and the illuminated bridge and had a nice view. In the morning the traffic below is barely felt. Huge bed. Hearty breakfast both sweet and savory. Excellent solution for visiting the
Cities

title: A passage in history
comment:
Located in front of a busy avenue where the name Saigon hotel Morin appears in Grand above the entrance of the hotel , from the first steps in the lobby , history seems to have caught up with the past , a few meters from the reception you can see a huge courtyard surrounded by trees , tables , chairs wrought iron it is here that you have a rich and varied breakfast in the morning .
Departure for the room by elevator and direct exit to a long corridor very wide lined with pictures of the time of the beginning of the 20th century that tells the history of this hotel by the French , the Morin family .here the unoccupied rooms are left open , and the old wood is omnipresent in all the rooms.if you like the quiet it is better to be at the back, in front you will have the noise of the avenue and those thousands of scooters that they never stop. The bedding is comfortable and the smell of dark furniture and parquet flooring plunges us back during the night the time of the past.
Here the story continues to live it is a rare moment , a hotel I will not forget

title: Awful
comment:
Stopped for coffee in supposedly good courtyard

Coffee undrinkable and toilets filthy

Avoid at all costs and do not stay here

title: We won’t stay here again.
comment:
We are currently staying at Saigon Morin now. We checked in yesterday, Sunday, February 8, 2026. Thế receptionist was very helpful, friendly, polite, best of the best.
However, we have been here for visiting families several times, almost every year. However after 60 years we decided to stayed here with hope for some golden memories.
The room set up was great, We were a little disappointed…we understand this is a very old hotel but we couldn’t imagined that they have no hair conditioner, thus is the only time I failed to bring own shampoo and conditioner.
Unable to open the closet door, poor maintenance guys, they tried their best but still unable to fix it..the AC is not functioning properly. The shower’s drainage is the biggest problem here..we don’t need to describe how bad it was…
We hope to see some improvements soon, today, we don’t want to suffering for three more days.
Still our old time favorite hotel. Brings back memories of when we first got married.

title: Needs updating
comment: Is an old colonial Hotel built in 1901 the same family still run it now. I would say this place at its hay day was amazing but they seem to be holding on with both hands and not holding up! We stayed five nights. The rooms are very large you have two different seating areas we had a double bed and a single would have been happier with one bed but we wanted the deck. The Deck over looked the side street which was fine. The pool was tiny and not much good for exercise was very cold. There’s no happy hour the drink prices are out of this world which for Vietnam is not fair! We liked the old world charm for sure but the place is going down hill it seem they are not putting money back in the place for upgrades. The carpeting is old and smells very musty. The breakfast was ok not many western options but good Asian options just was not a lot there for the size of the hotel. The staff are all very helpful and friendly always willing to help you out! The food and drinks are very high priced and we chose not to partake because of the price. We went for a drink one day and the price was just very high and the drinks were not well made! We did the two highway tour to the DMZ and Tunnels and found it was over priced but we saw what we wanted! Rooms were clean the public washrooms one in the front lobby was nice and clean the one behind the restaurant was very unkept! If you like old world charm stay but only a couple of nights

title: Worn out hotel
comment: A very worn out hotel, the rooms were dark, the bed was hard and there was a smell of mold. glad we only stayed there for two nights otherwise we would have changed hotels.

title: Back to another time
comment:
Stayed there when visiting Hue central Vietnam. Home of royalty. Old world charm. Similar to Raffles in Singapore. Close to restaurants, banks ect. Room was very clean. Staff were very accommodating and able to help with anything.
We journied back to a more gentle time away from the hustle and bustle of the 21st century. Enjoyed our few nights there

title: Great Team
comment:
We arrived at Hotel Saigon Morin right after they had terrible floods in Hue. Many thanks to the team for their positivity during our stay when they probably would have been concerned about their own situation.
Big shout out to the hotel's driver, he picked us up from the airport, took us to the tunnels the next day, and then drove us to Da Nang the following day.
Hotel was comfortable, real old world! In a good location.

title: Faded glory still has some charm
comment:
This classic old hotel has seen better days the out door breakfast area and pool needs a good tidy up and clean .
There are dead plants broken pots and a generally scruffy appearance if you look closely. However the lobby is large open and has a touch of glam to it still the restaurant it elegant the staff helpful the price good and the rooms very large .
We only needed a room for a few nights Or I would have had to change rooms as our balcony looked out over the main road ( it said perfumed river but its a busy intersection with a lot of noisy traffic before you get to the river )
We could not sit out because of the noice level .
The room was huge with a very large TV some fruit and coffee making equipment provided as well as a fridge safe and robes . The bathroom was large and over all the room had an air of old world glamour of a long gone era that I would have enjoyed if it had just been a bit more nicely landscaped cleaner and tidier- new paint and a general power wash / spruce up would do wonders
It’s not in a bad location and very close to the train station .
Tip dont book tours or drivers thru the hotel the taxi at the train station will offer you assistance at a much reduced rate I could have saved over £50 .
The breakfast was not nite worthy and very limited if you dont want local food or like me are vegetarian and the quality did not seem great .
As it was outdoors the bugs and humidity / rain affected your meal .
The spa staff speak very little English that caused some issues. I booked a 2 hour massage hair conditioning and blow dry package at what I though was a reasonable price ( they give you a coupon at check in ) But they messed up my blow dry leaving actual knots in my hair that was still 1/3 wet when they were finished and they did not add any heat protectant to it when using the heated tools . I had to get the hotel manager to come with me to explain why I was upset and make them re wash it and blow dry it again . My mother and my friends all enjoyed their massage and facial services however .
The staff were helpful when I injured my eye and called a Dr for me who came within the hour to see me in the hotel lobby and actually drove me to the local hospital ( £36 for his services thats a lot of money in Vietnam ) where I was treated .
Would I stay again NO
I had two hotels I liked the sound of and I wish id gone for the other . I chose this for the outside pool but upon seeing it in real life rather than the hotels photos I was very disappointed broken beds dirty furniture and not very pretty looking over all it needs a redo .

title: Old classy hotel in its day nice location
comment: This is an older hotel very classy in its day. Great location across from the Citadel and on the Perfume river. If you need to stay connected you might want to consider somewhere else as the wifi is horrible. The beds are hard and made my back sore maybe a pillow top cover for the mattress might be something to consider. The free breakfast was ok and some of the other meals were ok. We had to eat at the hotel for most of our meals because of the record rainfall and flooding. The staff were helpful and very friendly.

title: Great base for a few days Hue
comment:
The location of the hotel is in a good place, and has rooms with river views. However, it is located on a busy street. The rooms are spacious the beds somewhat on the stiff / hard side. The breakfast buffet is given in a beautiful authentic courtyard garden and is richly equipped with Vietnamese and Continental options in a beautiful arrangement. The hotel / rooms are a bit dated with some overdue maintenance, but that can not be otherwise, this is a large hotel dating from 1901 and that also has its charm. All in all a good base for several days in Hue.

Some of the staff are allowed to be a little friendlier and are welcome to say Xin Chao (hello) instead of ignoring and pretending not to see you. Also the Service to book a train ticket, for example, can be given some help with this instead of referring to the train station.

title: Colonial charm
comment: This hotel has a great location and offers colonial charm. The rooms are spacious and quiet. The pool and garden are a great place to relax in a busy city. The only drawback is the somewhat outdated airco in the room, which is noisy at night.

title: Beautiful, but not comfortable and broken
comment:
The hotel is beautiful, with interesting history, rooms are large in size, furniture is made of natural wood. That was the end of the upside.
We booked a superior room, wrote straight to the hotel and asked for a quiet room. Arriving at the hotel, we checked in, but as it turned out, in the noisiest room available. Right on the corner of the building, at the intersection of two highways. After telling the front desk manager, we were offered a room with no view, but facing the yard, but it turned out to be a tiny one-person room with one bed. Naturally we disagreed, we were two adults and we were booking a room with two beds. We were promised that after 10:00 p.m. everything would be quiet... It didn't work out, the 10:00 p.m. highways don't stop driving and honking. We went to the reception again and after a little scandal, we were given a number that looked out on a different road, quieter.
On the first day, breakfast came early in the morning, and it was great, a variety of food, everything delicious.
On the second day, we decided to sleep it off, because breakfast is till 10 a.m.... And that's where we had a nasty surprise. When we got to the garden at 9.15, we found that there was virtually no food. Most of the tanks are empty, and there's no way to put anything fresh out. We got ourselves practically the last thing there was. There were no cups or coffee on the coffee and tea counter, all empty. At the same time, most of the tables have already been dismantled, napkins removed from them, upholstered seats from chairs. The people who came after us didn't catch the food at all, though again, breakfast is official until 10:00 a.m.! A lot of people addressed the waiters, swore, but it was no use. At 9.45am, the staff started throwing leftover food in the trash from the handout. I find it disrespectful to people, can't you wait until 10:00 a.m. and then start taking things apart?
There is a large construction in the courtyard near the pool, noisy work is carried out from morning to evening. There's a tractor and something's dripping, the pool itself smells like diesel. And lying on a deckchair doesn't make it comfortable.
There's a lot that doesn't work in the room itself. The lights in the cabinet are not working, the lamps were not on the table, the tap on the sink is working at a certain opening angle. The barrel on the toilet started working after we did some digging. Half of the buttons didn't work on the safe, so I had to come up with a password from the rest of the working ones. The window to the balcony didn't open, and we didn't risk trying to open it.
If you stay in this hotel for a day/two, you can survive. But no longer.

title: Good Value Stay in the Heart of Hue
comment:
Location & Atmosphere
The hotel is perfectly located in the historic center, with stunning views of the Imperial City island and the riverside. The building has a historic, old-fashioned character that gives it a classic Hollywood golden-age vibe.

Staff & Service
Staff were very helpful and empathetic. Their English was clear and sufficient for both non-native and native speakers.

Dining
Breakfast in the inner garden courtyard was a highlight of the stay — a very enjoyable experience.

Room & Amenities
The bathroom water pressure could be improved, and some amenities felt a bit outdated. However, the facilities matched the photos provided, and the reasonable price made it a good value overall.

title: Excellent place to stay when visiting Hue.
comment:
We thoroughly enjoyed or stay at Hotel Saigon Morin. Beautiful preserved bygone era ambience with all the modern features discreetly built in. Our room was magnificent and it was a joy to walk the hotels wonderful corridors and halls.
The staff at the hotel are brilliant, super kind, pleasant and helpful. The Concierge welcomed us like old friends and always took time for a little chat as we came in.
Breakfast in the Courtyard is surreal, delicious food, outstanding service and magnificent surroundings. Just spectacular.
I reserve a special mention for the lady who cooked me the best scrambled eggs I have ever had for my breakfast.
Hue is an excellent place to visit. Saigon Morin stands on the banks the river with beautiful walks along its banks in the early morning or cooler evening. If you visit Hue and have the chance to stay at Saigon Morin, do it without hesitation is our advice.

title: A disappointing return trip
comment: We stayed here 9 years ago & loved it, but this time was a disappointing stay. We were so sad to see the standard of the service had dropped so much at the front desk. We booked here to celebrate my birthday & to go on two special tours, which we had missed out on previously due to lack of time, but saw advertised on our last visit. I was notified by the hotel, 1 month before my visit, that our tours could be organised by them, so l didn’t try to book elsewhere, but when the time came, they let us down. Our main reason to return to Hue, was to visit these areas. Very poor communication on the hotel’s behalf, created this problem. We also had problems trying to convert our cash & paying our bill. Our transfer from the airport was good, it was a very kind gesture to receive a beautiful bouquet of flowers & card for my birthday & our complimentary transfer to the station. We enjoyed our breakfast in the beautiful outdoor setting & the morning we left we were able to get a breakfast box to take on the train. Our check in & check out on the day were good, but apart from that we tried to avoid the front desk.

title: 5 day stay
comment: Lovely hotel, staff were good , breakfast included a wide range to suit ymost people ,set in a beautiful courtyard. Pictures of balconies show seating outside but there are none. Managed to get a couple of plastic chairs. Beds were comfortable but on last night they were replacing all mattresses with very hard one's, ruined the last night for us. A couple of problems and they fixed them immediately. Limited tv options and old small tv's. Not far from walking streets which I recommend going to .

title: A good stay
comment: A place steeped in history. This hotel was built during the colonization, then transformed after the war as the University of Hue and finally re-established as a hotel. It highlights a façade and a very classy style dating from the time, the staff is very friendly.

title: Family holidays
comment:
Welcoming was a bit cold. The spacious room, comfortable bedding. Lack of brightness.
Breakfast was hearty.
No real individualization of Welcoming. Hotel passing and no more.

title: Disappointing...
comment:
We were very disappointed by this hotel... The rooms are very "veiled" with a smell of withdrawn. The bathroom was not very clean and very worn (all the equipment seems to be original...). We are very surprised at the positive feedback from other travellers. The pool is in his juice, the towels were even holed.
We had to pay for the two bottles of water that are offered in the other hotels... one last detail: the hotel told us that we had free fruit available in our room, but that was not the case at all...
To avoid...

title: Breakfast never seen before
comment:
Hotel with a history of over 100 years where Charlie Chaplin was on his honeymoon. The whole hotel is rich in history and antiques all clean and arranged in ad hoc locations. The breakfast buffet is a stratospheric thing, the best ever seen before. The quality, quantity and variety of dishes exceeds imagination. Think of one thing and there will be.
Giant rooms with period furnishings.

title: Best location in Hue
comment:
125 years old hotel but it is not old. Everything is in good condition. Professional staffs and service
Nice room, nice amenities.
Good breakfast
Morin hotel locates just few walk steps away from Trang Tien Bridge and Huong River. Close to everything within walking distance, includes Hue Citadel, Night Market

title: Stay somewhere else
comment: Very dissatisfied with our stay here. Hotel is run down and rooms are very dated. We had multiple issues from mould in our bathroom to cockroaches in our shower/bath. Breakfast is very ordinary compared to other properties we have stayed at in Vietnamese and the service is poor. Check in was not great and no one ran through the property with us explaining day spa/restuarants/ facilities etc. we were upgraded to “better “ room but the air conditioning didn’t work nor did the mini fridge to keep water cold, also the bath plug was stuck so when we had a shower the bath filled with water and we couldn’t drain it

title: Sadly, its best days are long gone.
comment: I don’t like to write negative reviews, but sadly you can’t trust the pictures. How anyone gives more than two stars is beyond me. I can only think it’s because of the service. The concierge, Nie (not sure on spelling), is amazing, and should be working at a top notch hotel instead. The hotel is in need of major renovation. Its heyday was long ago. Our first rooms had mold on the walls and smelled horribly musty. They weren’t slightly musty. We complained 15 minutes after arriving and were moved upstairs to the 3td floor where the rooms were better, but they still weren’t anything to write home about in a good way. To renovate the hotel would probably cost a fortune given the size of the hotel and all of the needs, which is likely why the place just seems to be deteriorating. The hotel is not old charm, it’s just plainly old and in sad shape.

title: Stayed but wouldn't stay again
comment: Although this hotel has earned its 5-star rating, we don’t believe we would choose to stay here again. Our experience was somewhat disappointing, as we found that only one staff member truly went above and beyond to provide exceptional service. This was the gentleman who arranged our dinner cruise on the river, who was very attentive and made sure everything was perfect for our evening. Unfortunately, we expected more from the rest of the staff and felt that their service did not match the hotel's high reputation.

title: Elegance preserved
comment: Very well placed on the opposite bank to the Imperial City, this old hotel still has a lot of class. The rooms are spacious, the service very nice and friendly with their own drivers if you want to go to Hoi an through the neck of clouds. We recommend.

title: Rooms Need Renovation
comment: We stayed here in 2013, 2017 and this time. We were impressed with this hotel in the first stay n 2013. However this time, the room is running down needing renovation. Lack of electrical ouutlets. The continental breakfast is average but the breakfast staff is really great. The location is really good.

title: It was a lovely garden setting & delicious food, but I experienced a terrible musky room stench.
comment:
We were excited to arrive there after a long flight from Australia. During our recent 4-night stay (1 - 5 March), water leaked from the shower and toilet areas in our first room. Even though the Hotel was nearly fully booked, to his credit, the night manager quickly upgraded our room to an Executive suite, room 211.

Positives: Our charming room was uniquely furnished and spacious. It had two large bathrooms and balconies overlooking wonderful river and park views. I loved the lovely pink orchids in the oriental vase. This quiet room had a comfortable, nicely scented bed, pillows, and sheets.

We watched Netflix and YouTube on our Smart TV. The powerful air conditioning worked well. The rich shampoo, conditioner, and body lotion were fragrant. The spa bath had medium jets.

Meals: We were well catered to as vegans. We had dinner from room service. Our meals included complimentary sweetcorn soup, spring rolls with soy sauce, vegetables and noodles, and stir-fried vegetables.

Breakfast was delicious, and the food quality and freshness were terrific. The chef cooked us vegan specialty soups/options. There were many vegan options: steamed potatoes, sweetcorn, other vegetables, steamed dumplings, baked bean salads, great jams, and bread options. Soy milk and natural sweeteners were available for breakfast. Some dishes are changed daily. The breakfast area is in a relaxing, beautiful garden with fishponds.

Laundry service was quick, and the clothes were folded and smelled lovely. It was excellent value for money.

The concierges were welcoming and helpful.

Housekeeping provided a fantastic service.

Negatives: The gym was underwhelming. I had an average 90-minute full-body massage. The shower area was tiny. There are no digital scales in the bathroom.

Unfortunately, our room had a terrible musky stench. This room may have rising dampness issues as this is an old building. We had to close the adjacent door to minimize the smell. My partner and I had breathing problems. I had headaches and was coughing. I have never experienced these issues before in any hotel. After I left this Hotel, both our negative health symptoms disappeared.

In short, the staff were terrific, but the issues were beyond their work scope. I would return to this Hotel for breakfast, lunch, or dinner because the food and garden environment were fantastic. However, I could not recommend Room 211 to others due to the horrible, musky, sour stench. The Hotel owners/managers must resolve this and other room maintenance issues before guests arrive.

title: Amazing and a fabulous experience! Never been anywhere like it for culture and history
comment:
Amazing staff and an excellent location facing the imperial city which is just across the bridge.
Clean and immaculate and you feel you are going back in time and can feel the history of this place.
You must book a massage and sauna in the hotel ! Amazing and very safe and very professional.
Garden is just about to bloom and is a real labyrinth of beauty and energy.
Simon and Mandy were in room 255 standard room but very large. 🙌🏻🙏🏻🇻🇳🇻🇳🇻🇳🇻🇳

title: Read the reviews before booking don't rely on the pictures
comment:
A beautiful old hotel which shows the old style but unfortunately that's where it ends
The rooms are large but very dated and a little untidy
The beds are harder than the floor bathroom old and average at best
Lots of road noise and the breakfast buffet is mostly for the Asian visitors

title: Possibly not worth the spend
comment: The bed was immense and the pool is really lovely and deep. But the breakfast was far from the sensational I had read about with the coffee in particular being remarkably bad for a place in Viet Nam. There was also not enough seating for all the guests booked in.

title: Remember old glories past
comment: As soon as I spotted it I was amazed that it is a hotel built horizontally. Very nice architecture French style. My room is spacious and equipped with comfort, there are coffee-tea sets and water and fruit offered by the house. Recommended.

title: Iconic hotel
comment: Stayed here as part of a trip through Vietnam. On the banks of the Perfume River across the bridge from the huge market. Room was lovely and well equipped. It’s not far from good cafes and restaurants. Bi Bun Hue noodles is delicious at breakfast

title: First class hotel and staff
comment:
We have stayed at this hotel many times and hopefully many more times.

title: Great experience at EMM Hotel Hue
comment:
We had an incredible stay at EMM Hotel Hue during our recent visit to Hue. The location is absolutely perfect, making it easy to explore Hue's rich cultural and historical sites. The staff were exceptional—warm, professional, and always ready to assist with a smile, which truly made our trip memorable.

The highlight of our stay was dining at the hotel's Spice Viet restaurant. The menu is a delightful mix of authentic Hue traditional dishes and modern culinary creations, catering to every palate. Every dish we tried was bursting with flavor and beautifully presented.

We highly recommend Emm Hotel Hue to anyone visiting the area. It’s a gem that combines comfort, excellent service, and fantastic food. We’re already looking forward to our next stay!

title: Best experience at Emm Hotel

title: Stunning coastal retreat - perfect for two or three nights
comment:
Angsana Lang Co is one of those properties that genuinely takes your breath away when you arrive. Nestled between the ocean and a lagoon with the mountains as a backdrop, the setting is simply spectacular.

We booked a seaview king room and were upgraded to a junior suite with private plunge pool at the far end of the resort - incredibly private. The beach is clean, the water is calm and clear, and the overall environment is peaceful and beautifully maintained. The gardens are stunning throughout.

The welcome amenity was a lovely touch, and the team went out of their way to organise a birthday cake for my partner which was a delicious homemade chocolate sponge, not the generic hotel afterthought you sometimes get. Staff throughout the property are kind, warm and genuine, and English is generally good which makes everything easy.

Both restaurants are excellent. Rice Bar (Japanese) and Rice Bowl (Asian) deliver quality food in a beautiful setting. Yes, pricing is higher than you would expect elsewhere in Vietnam - closer to what you might pay at a good restaurant back home in Australia - but the quality justifies it. Happy hour runs from 3pm to 6pm with two for one cocktails which we enjoyed thoroughly.

A practical note that’s worth highlighting - the resort offers a complimentary shuttle to and from Da Nang International Airport, which we really appreciated. Given the isolated location, this is a genuinely useful inclusion and takes the stress out of arrivals and departures.

That said, be honest with yourself about what kind of traveller you are before booking. This is a genuinely secluded resort and exploring the region comes at a cost - a day trip to Hue, which is about an hour away, will set you back around $100 for a private car. Most activities at the resort also come with additional charges, so if you’re planning to keep busy beyond the pool and beach, budget accordingly. There is very little to do beyond the pool and beach, and it’s possible you may feel trapped as we did - we ended up checking out after two of our three nights. If you are happy to completely switch off and do nothing, you will love it here. If you need stimulation or want to explore, the isolation may get to you.

Also worth noting - this is a very family friendly resort and the main pool reflects that. If you’re travelling as a couple and value your peace and quiet, request a room with a private plunge pool and you’ll be perfectly happy. We were fortunate to have one with our upgrade and barely needed the main pool at all.

One practical note for Accor Plus members - Angsana operates under an agreement with Accor but is not a core property, so the Accor Plus Explorer 30% dining discount does not apply.
If you’re after a beautiful, peaceful, isolated retreat - you won’t be disappointed.
