comment: Great hotel, good breakfast and friendly staff. Great location to reach the main restaurants and cafes in the area. I highly recommend staying at this hotel and thank Supervisor Phuong for the friendliness and help provided

title: A royal party!
comment:
What a beautiful evening with a delicious royal dinner!

Everything was perfect, the meal, musicians , costumes and considerate staff made this evening unique.

The hotel is comfortable and the rooms very spacious.

What a lovely place with an incredible dinner!!

title: Great Hotel!
comment: Great hotel. We were treated exceptionally well from check in to check out by all the staff! Great location. breakfast with anything you could want. Comfy bed. Only 1 night but i wanted to stay longer! You won't be disappointed with this one. My best this season!

title: Very nice experience
comment:
Very nice welcome! Traditional group great.
Special mention for Mrs. Phong for her kindness very attentive and care us.

Very nice welcome! Traditional group great.
Special mention for Mrs. Phong for her kindness very attentive and care us.

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Excellent hotel, amazing staff and lovely food. It is also centrally located; close to pubs and restaurants/ cafes. The breakfast was great with a good spread of both Vietnamese and western dishes. We will be back next year when we visit Hue again.

title: Great experience
comment:
Very well received super hotel
Very large room
Super pool
Breakfast and excellent food
French very well spoken
Very good reception staff
Great location in the city center of boo
A very good point and a big thank you PHJONG

title: Fabulous stay
comment: Lovely hotel. Very a comfortable bed and great facilities. Breakfast and restaurant meals were delicious. Very clean, wrll located with lots of cafes and restaurants very close by. The staff were so friendly and very helpful. Highly recommend.

title: Hue 2025
comment: Great hotel, very welcome phuong and van anh with little care for us speaks very well French, than happiness! Exceptional breakfast, delicious meal, everything was perfect! Staff, really attentive and little care for his guests

title: Very good address to boo
comment: Spacious and comfortable room, nice staff, swimming pool etc... We were even able to take a shower in the pool area after a night on the train when our room was not yet ready! All the elements are gathered for a very pleasant stay to boo.

title: Overnight stay
comment: Excellent hotel, very friendly staff, a really fantastic bed, not slept so well for a long time, very clean, delicious breakfast. The air conditioning also worked perfectly. Really totally perfect. I can definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Thank you.
comment: Neat hotel and felt very welcome. Lovely and helpful people who work there. Breakfast is very generous. The people who work there also take the wishes into account and they try very hard to make it to your liking. On request, they had gone above and beyond for a very clean room. Thank you supervisor Phuong.

title: Wow.
comment:
You really can't go wrong if you book this hotel! The staff were so friendly, helpful and thoughtful!! :) The breakfast is amazing with lots of options and a lovely balcony to eat it on. The location is fantastic (close to everything, attractions, street food etc.) and the bed in the room was super comfy.

It really was the staff that made our stay in Hue so special! For example they gave us a packed lunch for the sleeper train after we had already checked out 🩷

title: Excellent
comment:
Very good hotel. Very good welcome and well located.
Mr Cuong is most helpful and considerate.
Perfect stay. The breakfast is perfect. Great location to visit the city. The room and very spacious and very clean. We had a great time.

title:
OK fine 👍🏻 that was a okay
Accommodation.
The buffet breakfast contained everything the heart could desire.
Friendly staff
comment:
Lovely located hotel in the center expect a little night noise 🤗👍
The hotel is otherwise fine, the breakfast is good and friendly staff.
we generally had a good stay, staff are even helpful in giving a good rating 😃.
we were here only one night 👍🏻

title: Great service and value for money
comment: Very good location and value for money. The staff were very welcoming on reception and especially Phuong. They could not have done more for us. The rooms were clean and large. Would stay there again if in Hue. There for 4 of us travelling staying in two different rooms categories and all were happy.

title: Just fantastic!
comment: Our stay at this hotel was fantastic. We were greeted extremely friendly by the staff. Our booked room unfortunately no longer existed, but we got a breathtaking upgrade for it. Our room was great and very clean and the breakfast very delicious and there was everything. Especially Mrs. Thao Linh was extremely nice and even handed us a small packed lunch - very sweet. Anytime again!!!

title: Fnt care with good breakfast
comment:
A little too hard beds for me, but the staff were amazing and I liked the breakfast very much, good and strong coffee. Fresh rooms, felt very clean.
Very nice care of Miss Phuong 🥰 when I come back here I want to stay here.
Thanks for this time ❤️

title: BEST HOSPITALITY
comment: Hotel is situated on the prime location.all the hotel staff are very welcoming. Food is also very nice..I will recommend this hotel if anyone wants to visit HUE.Hotel staff is so kind. Reception Manager dropped us till our Car door.This is unusual and rare to see in any hotel..

title: Really good 3 star hotel!
comment:
Very, very nice hotel staff!
Very good breakfast with great choice for a 3 star hotel!

Our room was clean and large enough, but unfortunately a bit noisy. Especially on weekends there is something going on on on the street in the evening.

title: Very good hotel
comment: Courteous and service-minded staff who would like to provide a little extra. The location is really nice. Nice, clean and quiet room. Good restaurant, but not everyone understands - or speaks English so well, so it has to be said several times. Nice little pool.

title: Great hotel to stay in!
comment:
A very good size room, very clean with nice view. Great variety of local and western food on the breakfast buffet. Polite and friendly staff. Phuong and Tien are lovely!
Great location, with loads of restaurants and bars around. I really recommend this place!

title: Phuong I meet at breakfast and she was wonderful and very helpful she made sure I was comfortable thank you Phuong
comment: I have been in Vietnam for 10days and I had the best sleep ever the pillows are amazing the staff are beautiful and so helpful Van anh is an amazing young lady she is always trying to help with your needs thank you for a wonderful stay. If you are traveling to Vietnam make sure you stop at this hotel

title: Excellent hotel in Hue, Vietnam
comment: I was part of a group walking tour of Vietnam, staying for two nights in Than Lich Hue Hotel (59 Vo Thi Sau Street). Very comfortable and clean facilities. Staff are personable, attentive and professional - I would like to mention An Thao - receptionist.

title: Excellent staff
comment:
A great hotel, clean and friendly!!
Breakfast was excellent and rooms were very comfortable!!! Hotel was nice and boutique,staff was helpful like Linh and Cuong were super nice and even gave us food for our train trip!
Highly recommended!!!

title: Lovely Hotel and Lovely Staff
comment: Amazing hospitality. Very comfortable and clean rooms. The breakfast had a great variety of food and we were very satisfied afterwards. Linh & Cuong were fantastic and even gave us food for our long train ride to Hanoi as we were leaving. 100% recommend coming here!!!

title: Classy Thanh Lich
comment: It’s my second time to visit Thanh Lich and it still has the good quality that they serve. Cuong was also very helpful and hospitable with us during our stay. he also was kind enough to remember me haha. See you again next time! My wife and I enjoyed our stay

title: Holiday in Vietnam
comment:
Excellent staff. Special mention for Ngan and Cuong,nhi ,hoai ,enjoyed my stays for 2 nights and enjoyed royal dinner.
Breakfast very good with nice coffee,stays 2 night in beautiful room ,I highly appreciate for staff and lovely stay ,,👍👍

title: Vietnam adventure
comment: Great location clean Great host, always able to help. Great breakfast people are very helpful and good take care , the room very space and clean ' specially staff incredible: Cuong and Linh , I highly recommend and come back stay here , lovely stay

title: Great stay, special thank you to Loi
comment: We had a great stay at Huong Giang hotel, but more than the hotel, the star of the show was Loi, he was super welcoming from the moment we stepped into the hotel and all through out our stay, always looking after us, making sure we were comfortable, it wouldn't have been the same without him.

title: Very complete hotel and HỒ PHƯỚC LỢI the best!
comment:
Very good hotel, very complete breakfast with western and eastern food. Very friendly workers.

Above all we liked the sympathy and help of Bell Captain HỒ PHƯỚC LỢI. He was always with a smile whether in the morning or afternoon. I was getting happiness! Very friendly!!

title: Fabulous breakfast
comment:
The hotel was so clean and organised, we loved it. The staff was very friendly and we had a nice chat with Lói when checking out, so smiley and kind.
The room was spacious and had a nice view over the river.
The breakfast was fabulous.
They offered money exchange service what was very convenient and tour informations.

title: Great location and Breakfast!
comment:
We stayed here for a couple of nights and the location is fantastic, walking distance to everything. Buffet breakfast is excellent, staff were fantastic too. Rooms and resort are a little dated, but were more than adequate for the price. We stayed in a family room with adjoining rooms.

We organised a one way transport to Hoi An via the hotel, and we left a camera behind in the car. The staff followed up with the driver and arranged for it to be sent to our hotel
In Hoi An. Went over and above for us, thanks!

title: Review
comment: Hai anh, anh Lợi và anh Hai rất là nhiệt tình, dễ thương và giúp đỡ nên sẽ quay lại. Good service! We had a very good time here, they will always be there whenever we need them. Absolutely good work ethics!

title: Beautiful Hotel in heart of Hue
comment:
I originally stayed here 20 years ago, enjoyed my time there so much I booked it again for this trip with my husband. Very pleased to say we were not disappointed.

Unfortunately we were in Hue during the recent heavy rains, the Hotel had suffered some flooding. However the amazing staff ensured our stay was a memorable one.

Dining services were limited, however they ensured we did not go hungry.

Rooms were beautiful, very comfy bed, lovely view over looking the perfume river.

Recent renovations to pool area, pool was very inviting.

We have to say the Management and Staff were incredible, they worked non stop cleaning up after the floods. They always greeted us with a big smile and kind words, even thou a lot of them had major flood damage to their own homes.

Thank you to all staff for looking after us during our stay.

title: Fantastic
comment: Had a great stay here. Mr Loi welcomed me and was super friendly and helpful! The room was very nice with a great view and fantastic breakfast.

title: Very good hotel , well located , large , beautiful and attentive attendants
comment: Well located, attentive staff, smiling and helpful Hotel clean, organized good rooms the shower that left a little to be desired. Oh the breakfast coffee was amazing predominated Asian food, but varied breads, cakes, jelly, fruits, eggs, tomatoes to the oven with cheese, bananas in a boil, crepes all very well prepared and tasty kitchen staff deserves congratulations. I recommend this hotel

title: A gem in the heart of the city
comment: I had a wonderful stay at Huong Giang Hotel! The rooms were spotless with lovely big, comfortable beds, and the view overlooking the river was beautiful. Food and dining area was lovely. The location couldn’t be better — right in the heart of the city, close to everything. Some renovations going on and the pool was not in use due to the weather but that did not disturb our stay. The service was exceptional from all staff, and I want to give a special thanks to Mr. Loi and Mrs. Yen for their warm hospitality and professionalism. Highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting the area! Great value for money.

title: Great stay
comment: While currently under renovations, the service and standard is still exceptional! The staff, especially the valet Mr Lợi is very friendly and engaging. Helpful in every manner. The pool and sauna is not available but its not a big deal to us as we like to go sightseeing. The room is very clean and ordered. The bed is huge and comfortable! Nice selection of food for breakfast.

title: Nice Hotel
comment:
The hotel is very nice and in a good position.
Breakfast is full everything you need.
Staff is very kind and friendly, special thanks to Mr. Loi who can halp you for everything

title: Mr Loi
comment: Mr. Loi was very kind and helped very, very well. He was a very good bellboy. I'm very satisfied with him. Otherwise the hotel was also good.

title: Excellent stay
comment:
Comfortable rooms.
It is located at a very convenient place near Perfume River.
Staff is very helpful and courteous.
Thanks to Win Quynh Dao and the team

title: Awesome Staff
comment:
We were happy with our stay at this resort. One of the biggest in town. Breakfast wasn’t much but healthy. All staffs were friendly and helpful. Especially, a bellman, Mr Loi who is always smiling, greeting guests by name, and extending hospitality to make us feel at home
Thanks
CB Nguyen

title: This will be a 5 Star in 12 months -
comment:
The location is great - the view on the river will be fantastic - the pool will be excellent- just need the renovations to finish.
Regardless of this - the buffet breakfast was STUNNING - the room was Excellent and the staff were just sensational.
Bar downstairs with live music was very enjoyable.
Looking forward to going back.
The hotel was built in 1964 and it does the renovations it is undergoing - but the room i had - had been done and I was very happy

title: Come back on 1 night
comment: We have excellent moment with Mr loi. And the hotel its good in the place too juste next to city center is perfect. I make massage it was perfect too. And breakfast its so gooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooood !!!!

title: Excellent
comment: Huy was amazing I will love to stay here again. The food is excellent, the people are amazing. They will take care of you here. The location is exactly what I was looking for. It’s in the heart of the city. Thank you for everything. Will definitely be back

title: Friend
comment: Very good rooms and views . Very nice cooks staff and the people at the bar and check in the very cute lady Hong Nhung .I have been here before. Well treated I highly recommend you this Hotet😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄😄

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Very nice hotel! All staff very friendly, doorman Mr Loi,hai became our friend, very nice man😊 We can highly recommend this hotel. Good food, nice restaurant and good location. Excellent service and facilities, room was big and nice. We will return😊

title: Old and worn hotel
comment: The staff was friendly. Rooms were big and clean. This hotel works fine if one does not have expectations of a luxury hotel. A little too old for that. The hotel carries the mark of being a little tired and old. It does not meet the expectations of a 4-star hotel compared to other similar hotels.

title: Super 😍
comment: Amazing Hotel and Service. Staff are so friendly. Be sure to visit their awesome bartender, Mr Phan Chau. Always greets with a smile and cocktail maker. The staff at the hotel also organized tours based on what we wanted to visit, hassle free. 😍.

title: Awesome
comment:
Mr loi was very welcoming and very fun. Thank you for your hospitality Mr loi.
Very good views of the river and nice cheap beers. Pool area is very tidy. Nice looking gym with a spa and sauna not fat away.
Close to many good food spots
I recommend this place

title: Leuke ervaring. Mooi en proper hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel. The buffet in the morning was very good. The rooms were also very clean!

The outside area at the bar has a great view and was nice to sit.

The swimming pool is also nice to relax.

Nearby pubs and streets with always something to do.

Mr. Loi always greeted us at the entrance. He was always happy, very friendly and helpful.

Only downside is the noise from the traffic.

title: Spending the Tet holidays in Hue
comment: Huong Giang Hotel is set on the calm and lovely Perfume River......located in an area bustling with spas, bars, coffee bars, restaurants and near some major tourist attractions. Across the river one can see the large Vietnamese flag flying over the ancient Citadel, the home of the Kings and Queens of what was once the Imperial City of Hue. A city tour bus is located nearby. Dragon boats are nearby.....my wife and I took an excursion on one to a beautiful pagoda. We planned to be in Hue during the Tet holidays and what fun! A fantastic fireworks display beyond the river could easily be seen and heard by all the guests staying at Huong Giang Hotel. What a treat! The hotel is large with a sumptuous breakfast in the morning and a staff ready and willing to help with most any questions or situations you may be facing in Hue. A bar is convienently located near the lobby area that serves well made drinks by the two bartenders......Nhung and Huy......both speak English very well if you are visiting from a part of the world that speaks English. Both were friendly and all smiles......as I should say everyone that we encountered at the hotel was. We stayed for two weeks so my wife and I feel we got to know the vibe and culture of the hotel - and it was great! We think this is the most important aspect of a hotel.....the people.

title: Great value for money
comment: We had a great time at this hotel. The place is clean, breakfast is delicious, location is excellent and the staff is extremely friendly. The bell captain Ho Phuoc Loi was the best, super cheerful and always ready to help. The hotel is right by the Perfume river and close to all the restaurants and bars. It is also around 25mins walk to the imperial city and to Con Hen island. If you enjoy walking then you can easily walk to most places from here.

title: HUE WITH A VIEW 🇻🇳⭐️
comment:
Huong Giang Hotel - Hue, Vietnam

Originally built in 1963, the Huong Giang Hotel must have been a stunning landmark in its prime. Though the years have taken a toll on the structure, it’s clear that with some care and attention, this charming property could be revitalized to its former glory.

Nestled along the picturesque Perfume River, the hotel’s location is truly enchanting. The staff are incredibly attentive, going above and beyond to ensure a memorable stay.

A special commendation to Nhung Le and Huy Phan, whose exceptional service made our visit particularly delightful, plus the happy concierge greeting you every day.

The buffet breakfast offers a wide array of international options, and the cheerful “Egg Man” is always ready to prepare eggs to your liking, a lovely touch to start the day.

While the facilities show signs of age, don’t let the dim ambiance deter you from getting one of there 90 min massages with hot towel wash down, was a great experience for only $40 (Aust)

However, a few notes for future visitors: the king-size beds are spacious, but the mattresses are quite old and very firm and could definitely use an upgrade.

Additionally, rooms near the lifts can be noisy due to inconsiderate guests waiting nearby, so consider requesting a quieter location if you’re a light sleeper.

Caution: The hot water in the shower can reach scalding temperatures, posing a risk of burns which scalded my feet. With the step-in bath design, it can be difficult to exit quickly, increasing the chance of injury. A warning sign in the bathroom to alert guests to this hazard would be a valuable safety addition.

With a bit of refurbishment, the Huong Giang Hotel could easily recapture its former splendor and offer an even more comfortable and serene experience, if they don’t in a few more years sadly it will be beyond repair 😔

title: Good hotel near Perfume River
comment:
Good old hotel with excellent service near Perfume River at city centre with nice river view. Only 1.5 km to Imperial Palace Complex, that UNESCO site.

Room was spacious with a huge bed, but only few electricity sockets available to charge our all electrical equipment. Very clean and all maintenance well done even the hotel is pretty old.

Good breakfast with huge local and international varieties with early opening hours (to go to day tours to DMZ and caves). We enjoyed.

The pool near the river was not usable, only nice fountain.

Many thanks to friendly and helpful staff, specially Mr. Loi thuyen.

title: Very pleasant stay at Hue Resort during Vietnam tour
comment: Beautiful Resort, unfortunately we stayed only one night, but it was wonderful. Very kind staff, romantic atmosphere in the green, with frogs gravitating in the pond, beautiful pool, comfortable and clean triple room, great breakfast with a variety of delicious fruit. Great dinner, the best of our entire trip. Highly recommended

title: Look no further than this hotel!
comment: A lovely hotel just outside Hue. The staff were wonderful with everyone greeting you with a smile. The rooms are excellent and there was a great choice for breakfast. I recommend this hotel to anyone visiting this part of Vietnam!

title: We enjoyed every moment at Pilgrimage Hue
comment: The check in is very welcoming, the room is wide with a balcony, the pool is gigantic, the Spa is exclusive. Let alone the wonderful breakfast and the lovely evening bar and restaurant. We’d gladly come back anytime for another pampering experience

title: Truly paradise
comment:
We stayed here for four nights during our Vietnam tour and felt very comfortable right away. The rooms were huge and beautifully decorated. The rooms and the whole complex are very well maintained and clean.
We ate several times at the restaurant and were more than satisfied. The service was friendly. The breakfast buffet left nothing to be desired. It was great.
We would definitely book this place again.

title: Excellent stay
comment: Beautiful location, perfect service.

title: In a word: WONDERFUL!
comment:
Beautiful resort and bizarrely good service! Such lovely employees!

The location is a bit far from the center but the hotel offers a free shuttle bus. Perfect!

All the staff were so incredibly friendly and we were served at our beck and call. They make you feel really special.

Spa was lovely and wonderful. Pool super big and beautiful. Lots of sunbeds. Drinking cocktails at the pool bar.
Great food n the restaurant in the evening and the breakfast buffet was the best we had in Vietnam.

If we ever spend the night in Huế again it will definitely be here. Highly recommended!!

title: Beautiful resort in what feels like the jungle
comment: Fabulous resort in the jungle of Hue. Spacious room & bathroom & lovely facilities. Plenty of room by the pool & excellent restaurants.

title: hotel that surprises you with a jungle atmosphere and perfect staff
comment:
You get a private check in away from the lobby and are welcome with tea. We were upgraded and got a beautiful room for 3 on the first floor of one of the villas. The view from the large and comfortable balcony was fantastic: you felt as if you were in the jungle! Our room and bathroom were spacious and spotless and room service was very attentive and fast.
The staff worked in an incredibly efficient way and was always there to help. Lots of umbrellas are at your disposal, which is convenient. We loved the long slope pool and the drinks and snacks which were offered in the bar in the afternoon. The choice for breakfast was extensive but the breakfast area felt too crowded (though the staff manages everything well) and does not live up to the otherwise high standard of the hotel.
We also recommend having dinner à la carte in their restaurant.

title: Nothing to add, no false notes
comment:
A warm and considerate welcome,
A listening and smiling staff,
Luxury rooms with comfortable beds,
A superior breakfast to many other hotels.
A site, a well-maintained swimming pool.
Finally the most beautiful hotel during our trip to Vietnam. Bravo.

title: Simply outstanding
comment:
Wow, what an experience we had at the Pilgrimage village boutique resort in Hue. From the beautiful garden setting to cocktails by the magnificent swimming pool - the pool is a 49 metre pool - so doing lengths or coasting along is a breeze.

The food was absolutely outstanding, especially the breakfasts. Evening meals were equally enjoyable and, considering the quality, very reasonably priced.

The staff went out of their way to assist us, regularly checking in to make sure we had everything we needed.

The team were simply amazing—very friendly and incredibly helpful. All I can say is that I would love to return in the near future.

A special mention to Claudia and Thanh for their help and assistance throughout our stay.

title: Super chic spot to relax
comment: Very nice hotel complex composed of small villas scattered in beautiful tropical vegetation very well maintained. Served by pretty pedestrian paths. Great pools. Hotel service with little care. We recommend the spa.

title: Amazing experience at the Pilgrimage
comment: Excellent stay, Nina and team were extremely lovely. We stayed in a Pool Hut, totally stunning. One of the best stays ever for myself and my wife. Food excellent, Spa great. All in all 10 out of 10

title: Beautiful resort
comment: Beautiful resort and wonderful service. Prices at the bar and restaurant are very expensive relative to restaurants just outside the door. Buffet breakfast is good but can get crowded. Pool is quite nice but also busy. Rooms are spacious but shower area splashes out a lot and creates a wet floor area. Overall a nice resort that felt like an all inclusive resort in other parts of the world.

title: A wonderful place
comment: What a wonderful place to stay. The rooms and cabins are absolutely gorgeous and kept in immaculate condition. The staff are wonderful, warm and helpful without intruding. There is a lovely pool with towel service and changing area as well as a small bar. The breakfast food is great, with effort made to please a vegetarian. I really loved my stay here as a solo traveller in a small tour group.

title: Fantastic Resort
comment: We stayed here recently and couldn’t fault anything. The resort is beautifully laid out and constructed with lush vegetation and of a high quality. The pool is large and clean. Breakfast plentiful and varied. Dinner not at all expensive for its quality and variety and a fraction of English prices (though a little more expensive than other local outlets I would highly recommend the resort restaurant). The room we had (tge old honeymoon suite) was superb with a very large comfortable bed and high quality slippers and robes and complimentary spa treatments each day. I thoroughly enjoyed the tree morning Tai Chi and Yoga. Staff were friendly and polite and always available by wassap or at reception.

title: Great setting but didn't live up the marketing hype for us
comment:
The hotel certainly has the 'Wow' factor when you step through the front entrance off of a small road.
Only stayed 1 night as part of a group tour and had a lovely meal in the restaurant.
The pool is very distinct in its green colour water but heavily shaded so unlikely to catch much sun and limited sun beds.
We felt the room was badly let down by the puny shower above the bath. Please get some decent walk-in showers fitted as I dislike climbing into a bath at my age and the shower head reached my stomach.
Lots of groups staying which made breakfast at 07.30 so busy and not enjoyable at all. It was tough to get a table and everyone walking around with a plate trying to work out where to get items.
I can see why people love it and maybe I could have grown to enjoy it but for night as part of a group we were keen to move on.

title: A wonderful stay !
comment:
Beautiful setting well kept lush gardens and pool area . Our room was spacious, quiet and clean . The staff here are super friendly and polite and extremely attentive. We had a problem with our WC and couldn’t believe it when they changed the entire unit within 2hrs while we were at the pool. Fantastic service!
Great choice at breakfast catering for all tastes and more.
Can recommend.

title: Lovely place to stay
comment:
We had a great time staying at the Pilgrimage Village in Hue.
Great location, lovely room and amenities, exceptionally clean and staff so very friendly and helpful.

title: Stop 4: Hue
comment:
Stayed for one night, a colonial style set in a green environment of trees and shrubs not far from the river. Although not in the centre there are restaurants and shops around.

The room and bathroom were large, we were in a second floor room. The rooms are dark wood and close to other blocks, so not a lot of privacy if shutters are open.

The rooms were spotless with a really comfortable bed and nice linen. The rooms have a safe and t/c making facilities. The bathroom was large with an over bath shower in which the head was directed into your face unless hand held.

Breakfast was excellent with good variety.

A nice stay

title: Charm
comment: A hotel as I like full d3 charm spacious garden beautiful breakfast top. Resto too. Thanks to javier and claudia for their welcome

title: Excellent place. Well laid out with an impressive staff culture and great facilities. A pleasure to stay there.
comment:
Excellent, as it was 2 years ago, hence why we came back!
Lovely relaxing atmosphere, attentive, kind staff and top notch facilities. Shout out to Claudia, who went above and beyond for us during our stay - and even remembered us from 2 years ago! Long may she stay at the village.

title: Heavenly Hue
comment: This resort is lovely. The room was spacious with a large balcony. I loved having the screen doors so could actually sleep with the sliding door open. The pool is gorgeous, complete with swim up bar, fast service by the chaises an a 2 for 1 happy hour. The restaurant was excellent for dinner and then breakfast was one of the best I had in Vietnam. There is a nice mix of guests - families with small children, older couples, small tour groups. Overall, an outstanding stay.

title: Peace and tranquility in abundance
comment:
Our arrival at the hotel was much later than scheduled due to a flight delay, but the hotel served us with an excellent meal at 11pm at night. The care and attention was also evident in organising a visit to the city and its historical monuments for us the following morning.
Our accommodation was first class in terms of its facilities and cleanliness, although the mosquito net did represent something of a challenge in accessing our bed! 🙂
The food was of a very high quality with exemplary service and attention from staff.
The peace and tranquility of the hotel were in stark contrast to the surrounding area, although Hue itself was quiet in comparison to the freneticism of Hanoi from where we had come.
An excellent hotel which is highly recommended.

title: An oasis of calm
comment:
If you have seen the TV series White Lotus you will know what to expect here. The rooms are in colonial-style buildings set in superb garden surroundings which come alive at night with the sounds of the cicadas and the frogs. The pools are superb. The breakfasts are exceptional arrays of Indochinese and European choices. There is nothing not to like.
Perhaps the location away from Hue may be regarded by some as a negative but it's a small price to pay for the luxury of this setting.

title: Stay here…won’t be disappointed!
comment:
We just completed our second stay at Pilgrimage. It is a wonderful resort with outstanding service/staff…you can tell they are well trained. The grounds and buildings are beautiful and well maintained. Menu choices are varied between local and western options. Breakfast is amazing.
We would like to recognize Ms Nina, Ms Thanh, Ms. An and Ms. Claudia for such great care and hospitality. We certainly hope to be back again. Best Wishes…Murray and Jennifer

title: A Gem of a Hotel
comment: Whilst on tour through Vietnam, our tour included a stay at this gem of a hotel. From our moment of arrival, the staff were charming, friendly and super efficient nothing was too much bother. Our room was huge and immaculately clean, as was the whole hotel. It gave you the feeling you were located on the edge of the Jungle, and even a bullfrog sang in the evening to my delight. Highly recommend this gem of a hotel, it was our overall favourite hotel during our tour of Vietnam.

title: Oasis peace and beauty a stone's throw from Hue
comment: Beautiful resort surrounded by greenery, a few km from Hue city. Wonderful pool, top-notch SPA, great restaurant. Large and spacious rooms, although some with a little poor lighting. Improved shower in the bathroom, there are curtains that do not repair totally, and water goes a little everywhere. However, the service is impeccable in every area, great kindness and professionalism. The breakfast buffet is one of the best I have ever tried in all my travels. Great facility to relax from the chaos of the city. Highly recommended!

title: Away from the city center
comment:
Located on the outskirts of Hue, this resort is committed to a horizontal accommodation concept, with low and very personalized villas, surrounded by gardens and pools, which provide tranquility and a sense of spaciousness. This architectural philosophy explains its location outside the city center, but compensates with a relaxing environment.
We chose a villa with direct access to a heated pool shared with other nearby rooms, a very comfortable option to enjoy the resort at any time of the day. The room was very spacious, with a large double bed covered with mosquito net, and an equally spacious bathroom with separate shower and bathtub. The private terrace communicated directly with the pool, where a small bar offered drinks and snacks.
The room service, managed through WhatsApp, was fast and efficient, with a practical pick up on the terrace. Breakfast, in buffet format in the restaurant next to the main pool, stood out for its variety and for a cooking station at the moment with eggs, crepes and smoothies, designed to satisfy both local and international customers. Special mention deserves the staff, always friendly, attentive and very professional.

title: An oasis for wonderfully relaxed days and nights, ideal for excursions.
comment: We had a wonderful time here: An oasis just outside the city yet great for day trips (Imperial City, DMZ, etc.). Definitely a few days or afternoon for the pool, the spa leave. Wonderful relaxation for the mind the soul. The place and its team ensures a fantastic holiday feeling. We had a wonderful breakfast here every day and at my birthplace a festive dinner in the restaurant. As soon as you leave the resort, you have on the street opposite nice simple restaurants and shops for daily needs.

title: One of the top Resorts/Hotels I’ve ever experienced
comment:
What an awesome place to stay. Straight away within 5 minutes you are relaxed and due to all the plants it’s about 5C cooler than outside the resort. Actually by the time we reached our room we had decided to extend our stay by one night it was such a good feel to it. All the staff were extremely competent and had great english skills. They really took such good care of us. As I have coeliac disease I require a strict gluten free diet and I mentioned this once. That’s all I had to do and every time we went to the bar or restaurant they immediately knew my requirements without me having to advise them. I was also suffering from severe sinusitis and they kindly provided me with ginger tea at each meal, which helped immensely.
I had originally booked the hotel due to their awesome pool and I was not disappointed just a shade under 50 metres I guess but perfect for laps to knock out a 1km or 2.
We also availed ourselves of the spa and had a 90 minute massage and also a pedicure - absolute bliss. I am already committed to coming back one day to enjoy the resort whilst I am in good health. Next time I will book 2 weeks and just stay and enjoy the resort more fully without being sick with sinus issues.
Due to my severe sinusitis, I wasn’t able to do much and it was the perfect quiet place to relax and just enjoy being there. They also even arranged a Doctor to come and see me, I had already been to the international hospital but the Doctor there was not competent in English whereas the house doctor was fluent in English which was a godsend. He took a full history and like the resort staff extremely competent.
There was nothing they could have done better.
And they have an awesome system where they make you a whats app chat so you can use that one chat of which all the departments are part of to arrange anything - food, room service, housekeeping etc. Such as great idea - simple to use and so useful.
Great rooms for restful sleep - quiet and dark with an awesome balcony with a day bed.
Special call out to Thanh and Nina who were just always there to help with anything and everything.
The only one negative is it’s so peaceful there you find it hard to find the impetus to leave and explore Hue, you just want to stay there cocooned and comfortable in your little slice of Heaven.

title: We loved this hotel - great room, services, spa and restaurant
comment:
We had a great experience staying in this hotel while visiting Hue.

We stayed at the Villa Double room with pool access. The room was large and comfortable. The setup was beautiful and the bed was comfortable.

We loved the ground with different ecosystems represented - from tropical plantations to the villa room that we could access to the heated pool from our backdoor.

The lobby was exquisitely decorated with natural wood materials.

What stood out about this place vs other 5 star property was the attentive and responsiveness of the staff. We especially would like to thank Aditya who helped us checked in and took care of us throughout our stay. His friendliness and yet professional approaches made us feel pampered and yet comfortable. A gem among all the great service staff at the hotel.

This was my best experience among all the 5 star hotels we stayed in our one month multi city trip in Vietnam. We highly recommend this place.

title: Tropical paradise in the ancient city
comment:
Me and my wife spend 4 days at this tropical resort.

We can only recommend this place for people seeking a peaceful sanctuary in the otherwise busy country of Vietnam.

Everything at this place was great, Claudia one of their staff members was really helpful with assisting us. From booking the airport transfer (which was reasonable priced compared to other hotels we stayed at) and to help us book other things and in general coordinating with us.

The place it self is very beautiful with some of the biggest and most beautiful butterflies we have ever seen flying around.

We had a 4 hour “free” car service which took us around the city. We recommend going to the old palace and maybe be there for 3 hours. We were there for 2 and felt like we could have used more time there.

The restaurant and bar were also great and the food was very delicious. But the biggest recommendation would be to get a massage at this wonderful place. We both agree that this might have been the best massage and Spa experience we have ever tried. Even though there was a small bit of noice coming from the construction of new bungalows. The spa area with the hot and cold baths was also very relaxing.

The breakfast buffet was really delicious especially the Vietnamese options. Also sitting by the river with the fish swimming around was a nice cosy way to start the day slow. If I should give an advice however it would be to make the bacon crispy as it was a bit soft and under cooked based on our personal preferences (maybe this is an European point of view)

Overall we can only recommend this amassing place to anybody visiting Hue.

All the best G&A

title: Perfect expérience ! Thank you
comment:
Thank you for the experience it was perfect !
The hotel is beautiful and the service very nice

title: Passing through Hue.
comment: A truly beautiful oasis near the center of Hue. We stayed only one night and had breakfast and it was definitely the most complete. Immense room. Very well cleaned. Give advice .

title: Magic
comment:
Beautiful place and very courteous and professional personal I highly recommend.
The restaurant is very nice and the food excellent.

title: A beautifully appointed resort just outside Hue. We were made to feel welcome and comfortable from the moment we arrived
comment:
The location and setting of the resort is stunning. Lush, well -maintained grounds, 2 large pools, several lounges and spa make it a fully relaxing experience. The breakfast buffet is extensive including authentic and fresh local dishes like Pho and Spring rolls plus Western favourites like yoghurt, eggs, bacon and potatoes. The range of fresh fruit was the largest we've ever seen. Wonderful fresh coffee or tea offered upon arrival.
I may have had the best foot massage ever! Yoga or Tai Chi on offer before breakfast welcome after long trip.
Every attempt to make a guest feel welcome and comfortable was made during our stay.
Can definitely recommend for a tranquil escape from other busy city destinations around Vietnam. A regular shuttle service to central Hue made staying outside city very

title: What a pearl !
comment: We hesitated before choosing the Pilgrimage because we prefer smaller, more personalized hotels. What a wonderful discovery! All the hotel staff, whether gardeners, housekeepers, or restaurant employees, are exceptionally kind! And what can we say about Thanh! Such charisma and professionalism! The breakfast is excellent with a wide selection. And the restaurant is truly delicious. We had a family room (connecting rooms) and it was spacious and comfortable. They also offer a shuttle to the very near city and if you miss it, you can take a Grab easily ! If we ever return to Hue, we will definitely stay there. Thanks to all the staff members for making our stay memorable.

title: Surrounded by greenery, excellent hotel
comment:
Large and well maintained rooms, clean and equipped with a lot of comfort. Surrounded by greenery, you walk pleasantly on paved paths to reach the restaurant located on the bank of a pond. Great food and very nice and helpful staff. Highly recommended.
To spend, if possible, more than one night: it is not a hit and run hotel, here you really relax.

title: Beautiful place with incredibly friendly staff.
comment: Beautiful place with great facilities and incredibly friendly service. Located about 15 min out of the city and is thus shielded from a lot of noise.

title: Very nice hotel
comment: Very friendly and helpful staff, very good food, quiet location. Beautifully landscaped complex on the outskirts of Hue City

title: Relaxing stay in a beautiful resort where you’re treated like family.
comment: Our stay at Pilgrimage Village far exceeded our expectations. From the moment we checked in to the time we checked out, we were treated with kindness and hospitality. The staff go above and beyond everyday to make sure you have a memorable experience. The rooms are clean and comfortable and amenities offered at the property are lovely. Breakfast is exceptional. We will definitely be planning a return visit next time we are in Vietnam.

title: Warm, friendly and super clean
comment:
We had been travelling for a long time after delayed and redirected flights, we were shattered. I checked in, went to bed went for breakfast. I was in tears within minutes as we just missed breakfast and I wasn’t able to get a much needed coffee due to a dairy allergy.
The staff at the hotel quickly rectified this and things just got better from there.
We are not spa people but have it a go, not for us but I could see the appeal for those that enjoy this type of thing. The spa area was very tranquil and exceptionally clean. The ladies were lovely too.
The food was excellent and they catered for me throughout my stay here to ensure that I could always have something to eat and drink as we don’t eat fish (Vietnam probably not the place to go if you are not into fish 😅).
We went on a few private tours through the hotel, the tours are more expensive but as they say - you get what you pay for. The tour guides were knowledgable, didn’t take you on tourist traps, took time to answer questions and were really lovely people.
Our children took the cooking class and then ate it for dinner that evening which was lovely, my son made many notes and was allowed the time to do so. And we also took part in conical hat painting which was very relaxing and were allowed the extra time to finish.
The rooms were lovely, spacious with good quality toiletries provided, the housekeeping staff were almost invisible but meticulous with a turn down service. My son loved the Vietnamese stories left on his bed of an evening.
We played pool and made use of the swimming pool which wasn’t crowded and was clean.

Generally, everything is as I’d expect from a 5* hotel, however, the difference here was every member of staff were excellent. I couldn’t even start to give a list of names for the level of service. The people were above and beyond and great care given. I loved that there was a mix of people from Hue, India, Spain, yet they all seemed like a family. Everyone clearly works hard and it shows, the owners of this hotel should be incredibly proud of the staff they employ because it is them who make the difference.

The only things I would suggest is maybe some drawers in the rooms to unpack clothing.

title: Superb place to stay. Amazing staff. We only have positive things to say - you must visit if in Hué
comment: An amazing place to stay with superb staff. We were looked after from the moment we arrived up to and beyond leaving. Special mention to Nina and Claudia who always went above and beyond to help us during our stay. We stayed 5 nights and really did feel looked after and very special. This is indeed a very special place to stay and if you are considering it, consider no longer as it’s must stay when you are in Hué.

title: Beautiful eco hotel close to boo
comment:
A large eco hotel in a large pleasant and quiet natural area near Hue.
We had chosen a plunge pool villa room therefore, with a small pool, bungalow style and with a small garden; a nice surface for a large living room room with a very large bathroom.
But we found the room ultimately inconvenient and ultimately a little disappointing despite its size and charm.
A bed on the floor on a platform (I had never slept on a mattress without bed base or bed in a 5-star hotel), a large room almost empty, a sofa not comfortable; when in the bathroom a bathtub embedded in the floor and an outdoor shower in the garden. As it rained to shower, you had to put yourself in the bathtub! Not the most convenient.
Many spaces finally and not well arranged.

The outdoor swimming pool of the
Room is small it is a watering hole to cool off
.
As for the rest, there is a very nice communal pool near the breakfast restaurant.

On the restaurant nothing to say about the quality price proposed it is very correct and varied for the price proposed.

Excellent room service and in general the staff is always available and at your disposal.

title: A very nice hotel nestled in lush vegetation
comment: Despite a sullen weather that did not allow us to enjoy the beautiful pool , we had a pleasant stay in this superb complex. Our arrival was late , but we were able to enjoy a small dinner served in our room without any problem .Our room very spacious with its balcony overlooking the pool and with lush vegetation . Breakfast is served in a large room with a terrace next to it. Excellent choice for this morning meal.

title: Green screen, perfect stop in Hue
comment:
Here’s a resort like you’d like to see more of: boutique spirit, as the name suggests!
Villas, small buildings, serene pools, bar, restaurant, spa and gym, everything is nestled in tropical nature, between ponds and curves of small brick paths.
The perfect chemistry between Western 5-star standing and the spirit of Vietnam.
And everywhere the smiles, the gebbly and the natural subtlety of all the little fairies who welcome, garden and anticipate our needs.
With special mention to Claudia de Barcelona whose
generosity and big heart have been our Christmas gift.
Without hesitation, go ahead, it is the perfect place to rest after the splendid visits of the imperial city and the tomb of Tu Duc!
3€ in Grab from the lively Centre.
A highlight for the visit of the Vietnamese center!

title: Excellent Service
comment: Thanks to the outstanding service offered by Nina and her team the stay was made especially pleasant. Unfortunately, due to the rain, we were not able to enjoy the resort fully. Food at the restaurant was excellent and well presented, service was also good. Rooms were big, but the seating in the room not very comfortable .

title: Excellent
comment: Thank you so much for the amazing stay, this was definitely one of the best experiences and great staff. The breakfast was great, the massage was amazing and the staff are really one of a kind service wise. Special thanks to Nina and the manager Thanh. We wished we could stay longer.

title: Great experience at Pilgrimage Village Boutique Resort and Spa
comment: It is a very well run hotel with very nice and helpful staff. I would particularly like to highlight Adi and Claudia, who were always there for your guests. We would like to thank you again for the free and no-demand upgrade of the hotel room, which was very spacious and equipped with high-quality furniture and located directly on a small river, which was looked out on from the balcony and from the bathtub. The hotel complex is designed as a green garden with tropical plants, has small islands surrounded by water to linger and a pool for children and a pool for adults. The varied and extensive breakfast buffet and body massage were also very good. The hotel is quietly located and offers a free shuttle service to central Hué several times a day. The place is top and worth a recommendation!

title: An unforgettable moment.
comment: An unforgettable moment in a sublime hotel. An exceptional setting, impeccable service and above all the kindness of the people. Breakfast on the terrace really invites to zen!

title: Successful solo trip ✨
comment:
I would recommend this hotel to anyone travelling alone! The staff is very helpful ✨👌 really! Always a nice word! a group whatapp and created to facilitate the link ✨ great idea
Very clean room 👍 excellent food 👌 fabulous hotel 🤩

title: Low ambiance but fine food
comment: Decent dining experience — staff was friendly but ambiance was low and food was fine. Convenient as located in the hotel but otherwise wouldn’t go.

title: Tropical forest retreat
comment: Stayed 2 nights in a tropical villa, and felt like we were living in a rain forest paradise. The grounds with the well maintained trees, paths, water features, etc. provide a peaceful environment, and the designed buildings give a real sense of rustic, yet refined authenticity. Enjoyed a couple of spa massage services, including a hot (not warm) stone massage and foot acupressure that was relaxed, yet energizing in a beautiful spa hut. The pool is gorgeous, and the restaurant menu is extensive. Highly recommend this spot for a stay in Hue, even though it is not in town.

title: Amazing dinner at the hotel restaurant
comment: Our dinner was great with friendly and attentive service. The atmosphere is local but calm and romantic. We can really chill, rest and well fed after a long travel day

title: Quaint Stay in Nature & Excellent Hospitality
comment: My girlfriend and I booked this well in advance and had a great two night stay. We’re upgraded to the bungalow upon check-in. Lovely room, very clean, great service. The property is exceptional. Located slightly outside of town but a $3 Grab will get you to the Imperial City. We also ate at the restaurant and had a decent meal; one of the most expensive we had in Vietnam (but average by western standards). The spa is excellent. Very accommodating and very serene. While I likely won’t be back in Hue again, I’d definitely stay here again if I was.

title: Good treatment
comment: I must say, I found this particular hotel and its staff to be extremely comfortable. I really appreciated the effort they put into making our stay so seamless and enjoyable.

title: Top
comment: The best location I found in Vietnam. I stayed in north and middle of the country and visited 8 different accommodation, the Pilgrimage was absolutely the best. Quiet location, in a wonderful tropical garden, very nice person, top breakfast.

title: Pilgrimage Village in HUE - Nature, lots of greenery, peace and quiet
comment:
The resort is located in a very peaceful environment. It is close to several restaurants and shops, but far from the noise of the city. The staff is exceptional, and the cleanliness is very good. The pools are very pleasant and well maintained. When you return from your excursions, it feels like coming back to an oasis.
We usually just had breakfast, which was very tasty and offered a wide selection. I recommend trying the Junrei restaurant in the village. We took advantage of the massage service in the wellness area, which was excellent.
We stayed in the small villas, which were perfect. Small paths lead to the villas, and it is easy to get around the resort in the evening as it is nicely lit. The staff are fantastically attentive, which makes your stay there fantastic. Perfect accommodation.

title: Haven of peace in Hue
comment: We were upgraded and were accommodated in a very comfortable villa. The whole hotel site is beautiful, the traditional wooden buildings are very beautiful, the park is splendid. The restaurant serves delicious food. The breakfast is amazing and very varied. The staff is very attentive. Finally, the spa is in a nice serene area of the complex.

title: wonderful experience.
comment: I had a wonderful experience. The staff was friendly and welcoming, and I felt at home. The room was cozy and relaxing, the spa area was lovely, and the food was absolutely delicious. Thank you for making my stay memorable.

title: Very Good
comment: The loction is few minutes from the city center but there is transpotation to the city. In the hotel everything in the hotel was Very Good.

title: A dream night
comment: very nice hotel with very large bungalow rooms , a beautiful terrace overlooking the pool , a lush garden , and an incredible buffet for breakfast ,, the restaurant is delicious and refined it is a hotel where you must pass during your trip to Hue in Vietnam

title: An excellent hotel
comment: It is a beautiful hotel in the middle of nature. The staff is very friendly and accommodating. Also the morning buffet is very rich. Highly recommended.

title: Paradise
comment: Everything was perfect, an absolutely beautiful place, huge rooms with refined style, an extremely varied and high quality breakfast, in short an exceptional stay

title: Wonderful.
comment: The hotel is an oasis in the middle of the hustle and bustle. The service is excellent. We were upgraded to a room without asking for it and at no additional cost. We met Claudia Catalan working at the hotel which was very friendly! Spectacular breakfast! Too bad we only got to enjoy one night!!

title: Vietnam tour
comment: We stayed in Huè and stayed only 2 nights in this resort, really nice and comfortable surrounded by a park, excellent service and catering, hospitality and kindness of the staff. To return.

title: Unforgettable stay
comment:
Back from the holiday in Vietnam and can say with no doubt that this resort is the best experience we had in almost three weeks.
Location: excellent
Rooms and villas: well appointed and spacious
Customer service: exceptional (a special thanks to Thanh that made this possible)
Restaurant and bar: very good. Remarkable food and delicious wine and cocktails
Breakfast: the best in Vietnam. Ho made marmalade , juices, fresh food and fruits and so much more I cannot even list.

We asked on a few ad hoc services and had the top quality we dreamed on.
This is definitely the place I recommend to anybody wanting to relax, sleep in peace and feel pampered.
Bravo! Hope to see you again
Much love,
Lela

title: Beautiful stay!
comment:
Beautiful welcome, superb service, idyllic spa, amazing breakfast..
An experience (despite complicated weather conditions) at the top of the line!
A big thank you to all and special dedication to Claudia for her exceptional energy kindness and professionalism.

title: Pilgrimage Hotel, wow what a Sanctuary of calmness
comment: We recently stayed for 2 nights at the Pilgrimage hotel. From the first moment of stepping into this hotel we were looked after, our room was a beautiful large bungalow with a super comfortable large bed. We had spa vouchers included to use for treatments, definitely recommend the Vietnamese massage. We tried the yoga and meditation too which were excellent. There was so much choice for breakfast and we enjoyed trying new foods. We really enjoyed our stay in this stunning resort.

title: A top location in a wonderful city
comment: What a luxury, what a beautiful hotel. Spoiled with a beautiful room. Surrounded by super friendly staff. A lovely restaurant. Don't hesitate, just book!

title: 10 out of 10
comment: Fantastic hotel with great facilities, very helpful staff with an excellent restaurant. The Spa was reasonably priced offering great treatments. Breakfast was exceptional. If you go to Hue be sure to stay at the Pilgrim, excellent value.

title: A great place to stay in Hue
comment:
This is a great hotel. We came in right after the recording breaking typhoon in November so there was a little downside because of recovery. But have to say the staff was great l…especially Ne Na. She was everywhere and there to make sure we were very comfortable. We would definitely stay again. The massages and sauna/steam
Room were awesome.

title: An incredible hotel near Hue
comment: A fantastic 5 star hotel on the outskirts of Hue! We had such an amazing time at this incredible hotel. Despite the rain our 2 night stay here was perfect with such attentive service and plenty to do in and around the hotel. From complimentary yoga to relaxing spa treatments there was so much on offer. We were so well looked after we would definitely come back. Can't recommend this hotel highly enough

title: Magical venue
comment: Beautiful site, delightful room overlooking a small lake, wonderful staff, and incredible, varied fresh Vietnamese food - the most delicious menus expertly cooked. The rain could not dampen this spectacular experience. Would love to visit again.

title: Vietnamese vacation highlight!
comment: We had a truly lovely experience. Our plane arrived late and restaurant was kept open for us. Staff super welcoming and helpful. The room was large and comfortable with a well appointed bathroom and chill vibes. The restaurant was an inspiration with the most interesting, contemporary Vietnamese cuisine we’ve had on our vacation. A real highlight. We can’t wait to return to Pilgrimage Village Resort and will be bringing our friends along too.

title: Wonderful experience
comment:
Our experience at the Pilgrimage Village was exceptional. Beautiful room with super comfy bed. Morning yoga sessions a great start to the day. The highlight though for us was the staff-they were so attentive, efficient, friendly and helpful, arranging bikes, tour guide, pick up from the railway station and generally showing interest in our plans and anything they could do to help us with them.
All round, an amazing team. Thank you

title: A superbly staffed, delightful spa resort.
comment:
This was a perfect stay that even the unseasonably heavy rain could not ruin. The resort is situated away from the bustle of Hue City (though a short car ride away from it) and the emphasis is on calm and relaxation. The hotel room (we were given an unexpected upgrade) was well-appointed and spacious, with very comfortable beds. Both dinner and breakfast menus were extensive and very well prepared and served in spacious, beautiful areas. The top-class spa was magnificent and the therapists highly skilled: we had some of the best massages of our lives here.

Best of all was the staff, who were outstanding in every respect. Nothing was too much trouble for them and they were so helpful and warm in their interactions with us. The resort’s management team should be very proud of them.

An outstanding experience. Very highly recommended.

title: Review of our stay
comment: We stayed here briefly in Hue for 2 nights and we were so happy with our brief stay. The staff and the food and amenities . Rooms were very spacious for family of 3 . We will definitely come back again and will stay longer .

title: Amazing , luxurious , simply TOP
comment:
This resort is sublime , amazing , blissful , no words for .

top domain where you not only have the beautiful Resort & Spa , but a super green , beautiful setting .

I can safely say we have visited many 5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ hotels / resort , castles during our many holidays , but like the Pilgrimage village Resort & Spa I have not had many yet , which was all more than top 👌🫶.

Super friendly staff, really nothing was too much,
Beautifully furnished rooms / villa with all comfort without words pfff.

Breakfast or dinner , the choice is huge and only fresh products .
I’ll add extra pictures, as they speak louder than words.

if you won't be content here you won't be anywhere 👍🥂🌸🇧🇪.

Did you find this info useful , please let me know with a 👍

Thanks in advance

title: My parents could not be happier with their stay in Hue. Thank you Pilgrimage Village!
comment:
Absolutely wonderful hotel.

I booked this hotel for my parents while they were staying in Hue, and they could not have been happier with their experience.

At check-in, the hotel very kindly gave them a room upgrade. I’m sure their original room was nice, but the upgraded room was really spectacular!

The grounds and facilities themselves are stunningly beautiful and well-maintained. The service was amazing, and the staff were all incredibly friendly. Even the cleaners, gardeners etc. greeted them as they walked around the grounds. The lifeguard at the pool was also very attentive.

My mother wanted to highlight the wonderful spa staff too. She said she received the best massage she’s ever had in her life!

Also, communication with the hotel prior to their arrival for arranging things like airport transfers was always punctual, clear and friendly.

If you’re looking for a relaxing, beautiful and luxurious place to stay in Hue with wonderful service, look no further than Pilgrimage Village. Yes, it’s a little further out from city centre, but don’t let that put you off - it’s easy to get a taxi/Grab and only takes 10-15 mins. The hotel also has a complementary shuttle bus.

100/10 experience - thank you for giving my parents such a wonderful stay in Hue. I hope to stay here myself one day, too!

title: Fantastic and beautiful hotel
comment: A beautiful hotel with fantastic staff! From checkin to checkout everything was perfect. Outstanding staff - thank you Thanh and Claudia! Absolutely recommended!

title: One of my best experiences!
comment: Probably one of my best experiences! Service was just perfect, rooms were large and well furnish, and the restaurant was very good. Unfortunately, due to the weather, we could not enjoy the pool which really looking nice.

title: Impeccable service & stay
comment: Had such an incredible stay here. We were only in Hue for one day/one night, and arrived early in the morning when it was raining heavily. The staff were incredibly attentive and so kind. They were able to give us an earlier check in and kindly upgraded our room to one of the suites free of charge! This hotel is very well staffed (both in quantity and quality), staff remembered who you were and it was so easy to WhatsApp them with various requests. We also had an amazing massage there too. Also had some very good room service (probably the best I’ve ever had). Would recommend this hotel a million times over. Fantastic 5 star service, thank you!

title: Outskirts hotel that doesn’t flood
comment:
On the outskirts of Hue - but doesn’t flood!
Quirky layout with rooms outside. Umbrellas provided.
Breakfast in a separate building with a lot of choice. Bar was nice under the main building.
Staff very helpful.

title: Average Experience
comment:
The Pilgrimage Hotel sits in undeniably beautiful surroundings — lush, peaceful, and serene. The setting alone creates a wonderful first impression. Unfortunately, the overall experience didn’t quite live up to that promise.

The hotel itself is decent, but I didn’t feel it offered good value for the price. Several of the “extras,” such as the nightly story and other added touches, sounded charming in theory but didn’t add anything meaningful to the stay, making them feel unnecessary rather than enriching.

The breakfast buffet is extensive, but quantity doesn’t make up for quality; despite the variety, very little of it was actually good. Service throughout the property also felt overly staffed yet strangely not customer-focused. When I called room service, the staff member I spoke with struggled to understand a simple order due to a language barrier — surprising for a hotel in this price range.

Costs add up very quickly here. Many things felt significantly overpriced. A good example: the water poured at the restaurant cost 85,000₫ — far more than expected, especially when asked for filtered water. The first time we asked for it in the restaurant, it was no charge, which means the 2nd server didn’t understand what we asked for (not tap water as it’s undrinkable in Vietnam). I asked for the cost of a taxi to take us to Hoi An and the price quoted was twice as much as a taxi on Grab, the taxi app used widely across Asia/Vietnam.

In the end, while the surroundings are beautiful, the experience didn’t justify the expense. With better service, clearer communication, and more attention to value, this could be a much stronger offering. As it stands, it’s hard to recommend at the current price point.

title: A hidden gem!
comment:
We had a magnificent stay at the Pilgrimage Village. The highlight of our visit was undoubtedly the exceptional staff; they were incredibly warm, attentive, and genuinely made us feel at home throughout our entire stay. The rooms are spacious and clean, and there are special touches added by the staff.
The food at the hotel restaurant was wonderful. The spa was lovely, providing a tranquil oasis where we enjoyed some of the best treatments we've ever had. This hotel is a hidden gem. A special mention to some of the staff Thanh, Nina and Aditya who ensured our stay was wonderful and catering to our every need. From the superb hospitality to the delicious cuisine and relaxing spa, this hotel is a must-visit for anyone traveling to Hue, Vietnam!

title: A Perfect Stay That Keeps Me Coming Back
comment: There’s truly nothing to complain about. This accommodation beautifully captures the charm of Vietnam. I tend to be sensitive about cleanliness, but this place exceeded my expectations in every way. I came back after three months, and I’m already planning to return again on my next trip to Huế. Thank you to all the staff for taking such good care of me.

title: Top welcome in a beautiful resort
comment: The reception by ms Claudia and ms Tan was top. It is a beautiful resort with a large quiet pool, many hidden kiosks for private chats in a romantic setting. The full body Vietnamese massage was blissful, the food, from breakfast to dinner peerless.

title: Gem in the jungle
comment: Beautiful hotel, a little gem in the middle of the jungle. The team welcomed us and were highly attentive. We had dinner in the restaurant and it was delicious.

title: Amazing stay at spa retreat
comment:
What a fantastic stay we had here in Pilgrimage Wellness Retreat! We were here for six nights and we have never experienced such attention to details and with impeccable, beautiful rooms. We had the Plunge Pool Villa for 3 nights and they were kind to upgrade us to the Tropical Villa for 3 nughts more. Silent and calm area. The breakfast was fantastic and with great variety. Local Huế dishes were very tasteful. And the spa treatments were wonderful. We joined tai chi and yoga every morning, just awesome. The bar was cozy with billard and beers/drinks.
Thank you, Ms. Nguyen Thanh and the rest of the team for your help during our stay. We will for sure plan to come back!

title: Beautiful oasis
comment: We really enjoyed it here. Surrounded by greenery, the different accommodations are distributed. The large pool with 40 meters length is a dream. Breakfast leaves nothing to be desired. All staff are very friendly! Thanks Thanh - our angel ☺️ - for the great support.

title: beautiful
comment:
Welcome on arrival with a very pleasant volatile in a beautiful atmosphere
The setting is breathtaking in the greenery with apartments but also bungalows scattered in nature

title: Beautiful grounds and excellent spa
comment: We had a fantastic time - the room was spacious and the breakfast room excellent. We also both really enjoyed their spa (massage) and complimentary yoga class.

title: SOLUTION TO A SUITCASE PROBLEM EN ROUTE FROM SAIGON TO DA NANG
comment:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
During my stay at Pilgrimage Village Resort & Spa (Huế) I had a serious problem with my suitcase: it had broken during a flight and was almost unusable.

I asked the Maintenance Service for help and Quốc Khánh, a young man with an impressive skill and will, appeared.

Not only did he find a piece of another suitcase to replace the missing one, but he also repaired the zipper with incredible precision, reinforced the broken joint between the two parts and welded everything solidly and cleanly, leaving it looking like new.

When I wanted to offer him a tip, he asked me only to write a favorable review. So I gladly deliver:
Quốc Khánh is a Real Artist, a Real Crack and a Person with a Great Service Attitude. 👏

Thanks to him, I was able to continue my journey smoothly. An example of professionalism and goodwill! 🙏🌟

title: Very enjoyable stay at the Pilgrimage Resort
comment: Staff were extremely friendly and went out their way to accommodate us, even upgrading our accommodation to a honeymoon suite! Breakfast was amazing & all delicious. The dinner menu had a great selection of meals and was beautiful presented

title: Hue hidden gem
comment: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The facilities were excellent and staff professional and friendly. The main pool was superb. All the meals we had were delicious. Breakfast had an extensive range of fruit pasties and cooking options. Also had a fabulous spa.

title: Great place for a stop in Hué
comment:
We recently stayed at the Pilgrimage Hotel in Hué and had a truly lovely experience. Even though the weather wasn’t great during our visit, the staff made the stay memorable. Everyone was kind, helpful, and attentive — they interacted with us warmly and always made sure we were comfortable.

The rooms were clean, confortable, providing a peaceful atmosphere to relax in. The overall ambiance of the hotel is charming and welcoming.

All the family really appreciated the care and hospitality shown by the team. We would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hué.

title: Best of the best !
comment: We had a most enjoyable stay here. The facility, food and staff were the very best experienced on our month long Asia trip!

title: Highly recommended resort in Hue
comment: The resort and staff surpassed our expectation. Even in the extreme weather conditions they exceeded their hospitality, the manager noticed that elderly persons require different type of rooms and prepared it at no time. All of staff greeted you with smile and their laundry service was very fast. Hotel facilities including restaurant, spa, pool were clean and this is a perfect choice to relax after the excursions.

title: Memorable stay
comment: We booked a “Plunge Pool Villa” for four nights at Pilgrimage Village Boutique Resort. Check in was scheduled for Oct. 23rd afternoon, however, in the aftermath of Fengshen storm, our arrival was tougher than planned. Our flight Hanoi to Hue was cancelled as we were already at Hanoi airport. We managed to catch a fly to Da Nang and thru the help of the Resort's staff, organize a pickup at Da Nang Airport, which is approx. 2.5 hours by road from Hue. We arrived at Pilgrimage Village around 9 PM under a tropical downpour. From that very moment on we were treated literally as member of a royal family. The stay will remain memorable under many aspects, particularly because of the warmth of the management and the staff, the quality of the infrastructure, of the Vedana SPA, of the food, of the service and the lushness & beauty of the property. Our room consisted in a spotless huge villa with porch and private pool (we used it even if it was raining) an external shower, an internal recessed bath tub with shower, a huge bathroom and plenty of wardrobe space. Given the weather conditions we daily took advantage of all possible services offered by the resort such as SPA, Hot / Cold Jacuzzi, steam room, lounge bar, restaurant, laundry and dry service. A memorable stay under all point of view with an emotional farewell from both sides upon departure, featuring the shy & talented Lady Chef de Cuisine and the managers Claudia, An and Ni Na to whom we truly express immense gratitude.

title: A little piece of paradise
comment:
Our stay was perfect here, the rooms are comfortable and very spacious.
The staff is lovely, helpful, very smiling. We enjoyed every attention, it could not be better. Special thanks to Than and Claudia 🤗
The place is beautiful, ideal for resting and taking care of yourself.
We recommend a thousand times!!

title: Best boutique & spa resort we have ever been to
comment: We stayed at this wonderful resort and had an overall wonderful experience during our sojourn at the end of October.During check in we were already treated like we are at home far away from home. My wife and I had even had to move to another room in the resort because of the management‘s concern as our first room was in danger of being flooded. The serenity of the whole resort, the restaurant, the lobby, the bar and all other facilities are GORGEOUS. The quality of the food and drinks is simply outstanding and the dedication to service and friendliness of all the staff serves as a prime example what excellent customer relations and perfect hospitality should look like. We can only recommend your booking this resort as we are certain you will not regret it.

title: Beautiful tranquil resort in Hue
comment:
We had a lovely few days here. The room is beautiful and shady. The pool is incredible and great cocktails at the in-pool bar
Dinner in the restaurant was exceptional cuisine. Staff were all friendly and helpful
I would definitely return here

title: I 100% recommend Pilgrimage Village!
comment: The experience we received at Pilgrimage Village was far beyond anything I could’ve imagined. Every single person working there that I encountered was so polite and friendly. The property in itself was magical, the food was beyond amazing, and the spa was so peaceful. My fiancé and I stayed in the Villa with our own personal pool. I will let the photos do the talking. Thank you so much to everyone at Pilgrimage, our experience was a 10/10! Also we live in NYC as a reference and once again, Pilgrimage exceeded all of our expectations.

title: Fantastic staff and hotel
comment: What a beautiful hotel, the rooms, food and especially the staff are fantastic. We was upgraded to a tropical room which was really lovely and then when We got stranded there after checking out and having to return with the floods, they were so kind and helpful to us, finding us a room last minute which was a pool bungalow also lovely. I cannot recommend this hotel enough, or thank the staff especially Thanh and Nina. there is a shuttle service into Hue or a taxi is cheap

title: Amazing
comment: We had some serious floods because of the rain, but the hotel was in great conditions, and even more the personell were very helpfull with all the problems we’d got.

title: Dream come true
comment:
Best find ever! It far exceeded my expectations with the quality of service, attention to detail and the genuine warmth received here. All the staff are incredible.. thank you to the team who supported my stay especially Claudia, Nina, Lanh, An Tran with the handy WhatsApp… helping me negotiate bookings and transport.. and generally being fabulous … special mention to the kind, funny warm and extremely skilled Tan at the wellness spa on site .. the spa treatments are next level and they’re all fabulous. Oh and the foooood!!!!
Thank you so much and I hope to come again

title: Best stay in vietnam
comment: My experience was incredible ! The resort is beautiful; staff making your life easy and very pro. You have spa; yoga; free bycicle and Shuttle to center. I loved it; perfect honey moon in the bungaoows

title: Excellent hotel experience made visit to Vietnam all the more enjoyable
comment:
Having spent almost three weeks travelling in Vietnam, I can say this is the best and most enjoyable hotel I’ve stayed in. This surprised me as I’m not usually a fan of ‘large’ hotels. So why?
Beautifully landscaped site, not congested with plenty of space for trees and water and within a reasonable distance of the city centre.
Good food, the breakfast was excellent covering Vietnamese and western tastes, with a good selection of fruit and vegetables.
The tastefully furnished rooms were of a very high standard.
The hotel personnel (Claudia and colleagues) were extremely professional, creating a good atmosphere in the hotel.
Unfortunately, I only stayed one night. This being an excellent hotel and there being so much to visit in Hue, a stay of three or more nights would be more appropriate.

title: Wonderful 2 nights visit to Hue City
comment:
We visited Vietnam in October and also had the pleasure of staying 2 nights in this beautiful resort. Super friendly staff, like Claudia who is very helpful and speaks fluent English and Spanish.

The resort is of a very tasteful kind with nice art in the green gardens, but also in the rooms.

The breakfast is overwhelming, a large variety of different tastes and also here lovely staff. You can easily visit the city of Hue using the complementary shuttle bus.
I can highly recommend this resort when visiting Hue area.
