title: A Tranquil Oasis with Exceptional Service
comment:
We had an unforgettable stay at Pilgrimage Village in Hue. From the moment we arrived, the service was outstanding. A special thank you to Tranh and Claudia, who went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect. Their warmth and professionalism truly made a difference.

The spa was a highlight — the therapists were incredibly skilled and attentive, creating a peaceful and rejuvenating experience that we won’t forget.

The breakfast buffet was another standout: fresh, delicious, and beautifully presented, with something for everyone.

This resort is a perfect blend of serenity, luxury, and genuine hospitality. We can’t wait to return!

title: To be done again.
comment:
We just left this little paradise in which we spent 4 wonderful days surrounded by a team concerned with the well-being of these guests.
Special mention to Than.:)
We are already planning to come back next year, as we have been won over by this place.

title: Wow, best hotel of our trip through Vietnam
comment: Wow, just wow. This was really the best hotel of our self-organized tour of Vietnam. Great room, great facility, all always very friendly. The best breakfast. Great pool. And tried Tai CHI early on. The room rate included a head massage. For 400 thousand we were able to upgrade to a 60 minute full body massage. And I tell you: fantastic including all-round care before and after. Simply luxury. Best value for money. Have annoyed us that we only booked one night but will come back

title: The best
comment: We went on a honeymoon in this exceptional hotel. Welcoming was perfect, a team with little care worthy of the biggest hotels. This is by far the best hotel we have seen in Vietnam

title: Just amazing room and facilities.
comment: The truth is that the hotel is somewhat isolated, but it has opposite a small shop to buy and several very good restaurants. We had 2 family suites and overlooking a huge and fantastic pool. In the pool there is inside a bar, and it was a wonderful end to the day. Super deluxe breakfast buffet. Highly but highly recommended.

title: Exceeded expectations
comment:
I have had the fortune of staying in some lovely hotels and resorts and this will rank as one of my favourites. Having become a little bit jaded by reviews and not quite knowing what to trust I was pleasantly surprised that this place exceeded expectations
The room was amazing. As a solo female I really appreciated being given a room by the pool which was not for children. All 3 pools were much bigger than I expected. The gym was well equipped, the free yoga and meditation really good and the spa treatments great - along with the use of the jacuzzi etc all to myself !!
Food and in particular breakfast was the best I have had in a hotel in Vietnam
But what made this place was the staff. Having a personal whatsapp group to ask questions any time was genius
I wish I could have stayed longer and was sad to leave
Well done to all the team. They do an amazing job

title: Jungle-like resort
comment: We stayed at this resort surrounded by green nature for four days. It’s really a wonderful place for people to get closer to mother nature. The staff is so friendly and considerate and spa service here is also definitely worthy to have a try.

title: Stay at the Pilgrimagevillage
comment:
A paradise hotel, with exquisite staff, very helpful, smiling, very attentive to guests.
Beautiful and very large swimming pool, in the middle of greenery.
An excellent memory

title: Huè Vietnam
comment:
We stayed at this hotel during our trip to Vietnam, located in the old state capital in a magnificent tropical park there are clean and spacious rooms, large outdoor pool, great breakfast and meals.
Recommended.

title: Pilgrimage Village a peaceful cultural delight where you can get lovely spa treatment, looked after so well by the staff & even
comment: Tranh and her team were fantastic, the location and upkeep of the resort were fantastic. The natural feel and look of the village resort added extra charm. We'd fully recommend this place to stay to anyone in a heartbeat

title: Great experience
comment: Excellent food, fantastic, great Service from Lien. I'd love to go again. Unique experience 😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍😍

title: Fantastic experience
comment: Everything perfect, excellent and attentive staff. Also excellent restaurant with generous portions. We also tried the spa

title: Nice resort
comment: Friendly staff, great facilities, clean room and a quick drive into the main area. If you are looking for a relaxing stay in hue this is the place.

title: Best hotel service in South East Asisa
comment:
We stayed at the hotel for 4 nights. The service was exceptional. The hotel staff personally make sure you’re enjoying staying at the hotel. The first day we arrived. Welcome drink and snacks were provided. Next morning we went to breakfast hotel concierge came over and asked how was our first night. The hotel gives a touch of personal attention to our wellbeing. It was a great experience. I would come back next time. I would recommended this hotel to travelers due to excellence hospitality of the hotel staffs.
Thanks and Best regards
Anh-Vu

title: Beautiful resort
comment: Very nice hotel in a beautiful garden and perfectly maintained. The architecture of the wooden and brick buildings is very authentic, we have been upgraded to a superb honey moon room with a huge bathroom overlooking the vegetation and a large very comfortable balcony. Very zen place. Two beautiful swimming pools including a quiet one, with possibility to be served a drink. Beautiful table (we even ordered a board of cold cuts cheese - we don't get done again- delicious but a little light for two) and excellent breakfast, efficient reception and small shop with nice affordable items. A little eccentric Hue but easily reachable with a Grab, all like the Tombs which are quite close. A very nice stay during our trip to Vietnam.

title: Perfect stay.
comment: This hotel is an amazing place to relax. We booked 2 nights and ended up extending our stay. The vegetation is beautiful, the pool is very nice and we recommand going to the spa for a relaxing massage. Everybody is so nice and attentive. Absolutely amazing staff. A special thanks to Thanh, Nina and Thao for assisting us during our stay. Will come back as soon as possible !

title: A dream!
comment:
Pilgrimage Village was a dream. The moment we arrived we were greeted by the concierge with fresh towels and tea. Our bags were taken care of while we checked in and brought to our room. The resort itself is beautiful. Lush green nature and butterflies throughout. The architecture, river and Koi ponds added to this natural feeling. Our room was spacious, clean and comfortable and two a/c units kept us cool. We had breakfast and dinner a few times while we stayed there and the food was great. They served authentic viet food and refreshing juices. The tour selection was also very good and we were able to explore Hue city including the old citadel "The Imperial City" and tombs, temples, a pagoda and other notable sites and spots. The staff were polite, kind, courteous and did everything possible to make our stay as pleasant as possible. I will be returning to the resort next time I visit Vietnam!
The only thing I thought was weird and did not like was that they charge extra to use the jacuzzi area. There's a jacuzzi, sauna, and steam room area and they charge by the hour to use it. It was very strange for me that it wasn't already accessible to guests like any other hotel.

title: Travel highlight: Pool Villa in Pilgrimage Village
comment:
The water villa in Pilgrimage Village was the highlight of the trip. The private pool was a blessing in the hot weather, the comfy bed ideal for sleeping and the premises all around perfect.
Even the reception was great despite late arrival. We felt “welcome” from the beginning. Until the very end, no wish remained unfulfilled.
Should we go to Hue again, we book here again!

title: Amazing hotel
comment: One of the best hotels we've ever stayed in! First of all, we'd like to thank you for the free upgrade to a room with direct access to the small pool—an amazing surprise that made our stay incredibly enjoyable. The hotel is fantastic—beautiful, large pools, excellent food, friendly staff, and a great spa. You feel taken care of from the beginning to the end of your stay. We highly recommend it!

title: heaven on earth
comment:
If you want to stay in Hue, I highly recommend this Hote.
It has transport to get you closer to the sights, if not, there is always a tour to hire.
The rooms are beautiful and sober decorated in wood and work seen. With essence vaporizers so that when you enter it smells like glory.
The bathroom has a shower and bathtub and to make your experience premium, they add the salts so you can relax after a long day.
It is a quiet hotel, surrounded by magnificent greenery that will make you feel like in the jungle.
The pool is wonderful, like swimming in a Mexican cenote and the staff working in that area, attentive and detailed as few.
The buffet was very rich and varied, with 2 cooks to prepare you the whims you want.
For lack of time I could not try the free yoga classes offered by the hotel (ashtanga and hatha) and it is one thing I regret.
The restaurant you have, the food is very good and the Service, for a change, impeccable.
Clearly of the hotels I have stayed in Vietnam, this is the best by far.

title: Wish We Had Stayed Longer
comment:
This hotel is a little hidden gem in Hue. It was giving “White Lotus” in the best way possible.
From the moment we stepped foot in the hotel at check in (which was after 11pm) we felt like our every need was taken care of. We especially loved the decor of the hotel, it’s wonderful and charming. Our room was very spacious with a huge balcony with a couple of wooden rocking chairs. Big shout out to the gardeners who keep the hotel grounds looking amazing. We tried early morning yoga, so peaceful and zen (and beginner friendly). Breakfast buffet was 5 stars.
The hotel also organised a driver to take us to Hoi An. Thank you to Claudia for sorting that out for us. And I’m annoyed I didn’t write the driver’s name down but he really was excellent and took great care of us (if management happens to read this, we travelled from Hue to Hoi An with pit stops at Khai Ding Tomb, Lang Co and Hai Van Pass on 07 Sep 2025). 100 out of 10 staff and hotel.

title: Most beautiful accommodation EVER 💪
comment: It was an unforgettable time that we were able to experience at this hotel. It all fitted. The welcome and personal attention during the stay was awesome, we felt like kings. All staff did everything to make us feel comfortable. The food was extremely fine, wide selection and also the Western cuisine was cooked better than in their own country. The breakfast buffet gigantic. The rooms with the huge bathroom and balcony/terrace spectacular, the outdoor area with the many plants like paradise. It is all very clean and well maintained. We would love to come back, thank you for this lovely stay 💕🙏💞

title: Great place to stay
comment: What a lovely place! Great accommodation and fantastic staff. We have lacked for nothing and we have done very nice excursions!

title: Great hotel
comment: The location is not the best as it is on the banks of the city, but the hotel is very large, has many green areas, pools and the rooms are very good size!!! And very friendly staff.

title: Beautiful and relaxing
comment: The resort is located out of the center, so out the noisy pressure. Indeed, You can explore by bicycle the villages, beauties and heritage of Huê. The bungalow is quite beautiful & the spa works with incredible therapists for relaxing massages. Besides, the service is friendly and efficient, providing a lot of attention. I highly recommend.

title: Calm, well managed and happy
comment: Only the best can afford to be at ease with their management and staff working so well together. From the moment you arrive you realise that this is an undersold gem; tai chi, yoga and meditation (none compulsory !) taught by excellent, calm, members of the spa team, an impressive breakfast, many pools, areas to relax without others being on top of you, no loudness, just cool, happy staff who are willing (and allowed by the management) to chat with you, play cards, remember what your plans are and have been. It felt like a large family home, no stress, no corporate influence. Nice touches; before we left a member of staff asked, quietly, whether we would like our luggage collected at a particular time the next morning. And stepping out of a taxi in a monsoon (don’t be put off by the rainy season, it adds to the atmosphere) an umbrella just appeared in the hands of the security manager. Understated, brilliant. Thanks to Claudia, Thanh and their team

title: A Village style hotel
comment: The hotel is big, but during our visit in August, was not overcrowded. The rooms are more in a Japanese style, spacious, but not particularly welcoming. The pool is nice with plenty of sunbeds, and staff are friendly. The restaurant is quite expensive, but food and service was good. Breakfast is varied, but the tea is not good, it's much too strong. There are a couple of restaurants opposite the hotel for cheaper dining options.

title: Heaven on earth!
comment: Wonderful property, literally immersed in a beautiful forest, equipped with rooms and villas, all with private access. Two huge pools, accessible at any time, for an unforgettable night bath immersed in absolute silence, plus a third children's pool, equipped with slides and other entertainment. Beautiful Spa.

title: Paradise in Hue, Vietnam
comment: This is a must go place to if you are planning to stay in Hue. We had an action-packed week of travelling before arriving in Pilgrimage Village to relax, enjoy, and be in one with yourself and yours. Our two-night/day stay afforded us exactly that. From the moment we entered this beautiful oasis we were looked after amazingly in every way, and always with a smile. The facilities, including a large outdoor pool, wellness (jacuzzi and sauna), wide range of treatments, free yoga and tai chi classes were all we could wish for. Accommodation was fabulous, so tastefully designed! Food, starting with lush breakfast (included with accommodation), was a perfect way to start the day of leisure, relaxation and pampering. And not to forget the cookery lesson we did! In a word, a paradise.

title: Amazing experience - Good for the soul
comment:
​Overall Rating: 5/5 Stars

My partner and I chose Pilgrimage Village to celebrate our anniversary, and it was the most perfect decision we could have made. This resort isn't just a place to stay; it's an immersive, soulful experience that made our special occasion truly unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, we were swept away into a world of tranquility and beauty.

​
A Heartfelt Welcome: We felt so special for our anniversary. The staff surprised us with a delicious cake and a handwritten card in our room. It was such a thoughtful gesture and a memory we'll always cherish. The resort itself is a lush, sprawling sanctuary. The traditional Vietnamese architecture, the quiet ponds, and the beautiful, well-kept gardens create an atmosphere of complete serenity. It felt like we were in our own private, peaceful village, a perfect escape from the outside world.

Service Beyond Expectations: The staff here are phenomenal. Every single person we interacted with was warm, genuinely friendly, and went out of their way to make our stay special. A special shout-out to the lovely team at the Lotus restaurant, who remembered our favorite table and even recommended a local specialty that we absolutely loved. It’s this level of service that makes Pilgrimage Village stand out.

Thanh - rm
Minh lap - Receptionist
Loc - bell man
Dai An - Bellman
Xuan phuong 
Hang
LUYEN - HOUSE KEEPING

Our Perfect Villa: Our villa was a private haven. It was spacious, impeccably clean, and beautifully decorated. Waking up to the sound of birds and the gentle breeze was pure bliss.

Experiences to Cherish: We made full use of the resort's amenities. The pools are stunning and beautifully integrated into the natural surroundings. The complimentary Tai Chi and yoga classes in the morning were a wonderful way to start our day, and the cooking class with Chef Le was a major highlight.

​The Bad:
Honestly, it is hard to find a fault. The resort is a short taxi ride from the city center, but they offer a free shuttle service, which makes it very convenient. The secluded location is actually part of its charm.

​Who is this hotel for?
Pilgrimage Village is the perfect retreat for couples celebrating a special occasion, honeymooners, or anyone seeking a peaceful and authentic luxury experience. It's for travelers who want more than just a hotel; they want a unique, memorable experience that reconnects them with nature and a rich culture.

​Final Thoughts:
Our anniversary at Pilgrimage Village was a once-in-a-lifetime experience. We left feeling completely relaxed, refreshed, and with a deeper appreciation for the beauty of Hue and the warmth of its people. We couldn't imagine a better place to celebrate our love and will cherish the memories for years to come. We are already looking forward to our return!

title: A happy surprise
comment:
Excellent experience.
The size of this resort elicited a first sense of expectation, having a holy aversion to the crowd. The organization of the resort succeeded in removing this negative prejudice.
The bungalows are quite spaced and we were surprised at the calm that prevailed.
The vegetation is beautiful and well maintained.
The pools are beautiful in size (we have not tested the children’s pool).
The spa is beautiful and the treatments excellent.
The yoga session was very pleasant.
The restaurant is excellent. A special mention to Supervisor Ni Na, warm and caring.

Details to be improved:
- Check all water bottle caps - the water is supplied in recycled glass bottles (well), and sealed but we came across a cap of approximate cleanliness.
At the blue pool: propose a changing room rather than using the toilet of the gym as a changing room.
- The slope bar: consider a warmer decoration - currently the Mood is cold in a very large room - it does not make you want to go there.

title: Very good choice in quiet
comment:
Stay of 3 nights in connecting rooms for 2 adults and 2 children.
The hotel is located 5km from the center of Hue, quiet and easily connected to the city center by Grab

Hotel with several beautiful pools including one for children with slide

Very welcoming and professional staff.

Beautiful rooms overall but requiring a little refreshment, especially the bathroom (old shower, shower curtain...) but comfortable bed

Good breakfast, and good restaurant although quite expensive considering Vietnamese prices.

Overall, a very good choice, more pleasant than hotels in the center of Hue, and with a very good value for money, especially the family package

title: Stunning vacation
comment:
Awesome Resort with a premium service

The food is great, Staff's are the best I've ever seen.
Thx for this great experience.

title: Haven of peace
comment:
Real haven of peace and lush vegetation. We feel privileged.
I recommend this property
The staff is nice

title: Top experience!
comment:
Probably the best hotel I have been in my life. And I am a big traveler..
Why?
The facilities are amazing- clean, well organized, with all the needed services (places to chill and rest, two swimming pools, a high quality spa, a gym, etc). All with big colonial charm.
The breakfast buffet could not get better with tons of choices (even the option to make a Spanish breakfast with “tomate rallado” and nice avocado). We had the best mango of our lives! And the restaurant has also very good food.
We had a full body massage. This was my third one in Vietnam, and by far the best. You can tell the professionalism behind as well as the care for details ( a short survey for health, fruit and tea afterwards).
The high point of my experience was the free Yoga class in the morning. What a gift to start the day!!

But our experience would have not been the same without the caring and profesional human touch of their stuff.
I specially would like to thank Thanh and Nina- their incredible attention brought our experience to a different level. You both are jewels. 🙏 🫶

title: Wonderful experience in Hue
comment: This hotel is superb, very nice with a beautiful pool. The team is very attentive and their advice is very good. The juices, cocktails and meals are excellent (especially breakfast with these stalls run by cooks preparing Vietnamese meals).

title: 110 and praise
comment:
Well-kept resort, excellent services, 5 stars from Welcoming, Restaurant Service, Spa, Pool. A real shame that we spent only one night.
Breakfast very good and varied, served both indoors and outdoors on a pretty terrace surrounded by greenery.
For those who do not want to go out for dinner the resort has a really nice restaurant, again you can dine outdoors, but even inside the room is beautiful. Very good Service, not exaggerated prices.
Friendly and welcoming staff.
We had a mix-up with the room booked by the agency (I had requested room on the first floor and not on the ground floor but evidently the agency had not passed the message to the resort) and not only did they replace the room, but to make up for the change (a derisory wait, 15 minutes at most) they made us take a nice exploratory tour of the village.
Really good at everything, they fully deserve the positive reviews they have!

title: A little paradise
comment:
Only a few minutes from downtown Hue reachable with 2 euros of Grab
Magnificent place in the green
Very large rooms where you can hear only in the evening the sweet sound of frogs
Excellent breakfast

title: Amazing second stay :)
comment:
2025
After having an amazing stay here in 2023, we stayed here again just for two nights prior to staying at their sister resort (The Vedana Lagoon & Spa - which we also highly recommend). The staff couldn't have been more welcoming to us as returning guests, they really made us feel special on our 1st wedding anniversary and we had an amazing stay in one of the villas near the quieter pool. It was lovely and I wish we could have stayed a bit longer. With our direct booking we got a lovely spa package and really enjoyed daily massages at the spa, where we enjoyed a lovely tea and dragon fruit post massage. We dined again twice at the Eco restaurant across the street, which we'd highly recommend. We'd love definitely consider visiting Hue again just to stay at this hotel and their sister hotel again. Thank you for a lovely stay!

title: Fabulous stay in Pilgrimage Village
comment: We loved Pilgrimage Village, it's a little piece of paradise. The staff are very welcoming and super efficient. The food is excellent both breakfast and the restaurant. The swimming pools are beautiful and we would highly recommend the spa. We had a wonderful stay.

title: A perfect stay — truly a gem, and by far the most beautiful hotel we’ve experienced in Vietnam
comment:
We had an unforgettable stay at the Pilgrimage Resort. The villas are spacious and stunning, and the setting is both peaceful and refined. The restaurant is a real gem: excellent à la carte dishes, an elegant buffet, and very reasonable prices for such quality.

The pool and spa are splendid, with a special mention to the masseuses, who are highly skilled and professional. The service is impeccable: the staff are warm, attentive, and clearly happy to work here.

A huge thank you to Thanh N’guyen, Guest Relations Manager, for his exceptional welcome and attention to detail that goes above and beyond all expectations.

We wholeheartedly recommend this place and are already looking forward to coming back!

title: An unforgettable experience in an exceptional setting
comment:
Our stay at the Pilgrimage Resort was a pure enchantment. The villas are beautiful, comfortable and tastefully decorated, offering an intimate and soothing atmosphere. On the gastronomy side, we feasted: refined à la carte dishes, varied and elegant buffet, all at very reasonable rates for a hotel of this standing.
The pool is splendid and invites you to relax, while the spa, nestled in a beautiful setting, offers treatments of remarkable quality. Masseuses are of impeccable professionalism.
The staff, smiling and attentive, are very attentive to the guests. You really feel that they love working here, and that makes all the difference. Special thanks to Thanh N’guyen, Guest Relations Manager, whose availability, kindness and attention to detail are simply exceptional.
In a word: a magical place where Comfort, Wellness and impeccable Service meet. We will return without hesitation!

title: Not to be missed.
comment: Outstanding, in every respect. Great breakfast and refreshments for lunch and dinner. Beautiful pool and spa area. Fantastic free massages. Spacious double room with outdoor shower and small private pool. Yeah, great. Friendly, helpful and knowledgeable staff.

title: Great quiet hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel with very good Service. Thank you for the Welcoming.
Very spacious villa with private pool.
The quality of the spa massage was amazing!

title: Very nice hotel, very nice pool
comment:
Very nice hotel, with a very nice pool in the greenery. Very extensive (a little too big for my taste), with an excellent spa in a beautiful environment. Pretty far from town.
Excellent breakfast very well presented, with a wide choice of fruit and juice, an egg station, soups, salads and other Asian specialties aplenty... homemade jams and very good pastries too. A very good point!
We had two Deluxe rooms that I didn’t find extraordinary. Huge but quite poorly arranged, with lots of empty space and very dark. Balcony without view, which does not really invite to enjoy
We had a problem of double billing a transfer and a forgotten taxi order (yet requested in advance) that almost made us miss our train and created a stress at the start. Organization to review, even if we finally found an arrangement.
The staff is bloated and willing, but not everyone speaks good English.
Late Welcoming (our flight was late) a little cold on arrival
Spa formula + Laundry included ++

title: Amazing resort!!
comment: Great resort. Beautiful and very big pool with great view. The breakfast was absolute perfect, everything you want was there. Also the service was very nice and everyone who works there is really kind. We really enjoyed our stay there.

title: Beautiful resort with a beautiful garden
comment: This is a gem! The resort is big and there are a lot of rooms. Yet it does not feel massive due to the beautiful setup in a beautiful garden. The rooms are just fine, not special. But the environment is that we and everything is perfectly maintained. Also the pool is very nice and super big, maybe the water is a bit on the warm side. The restaurant is excellent, but very expensive. Across the street you might as well eat for half the price. The people at the resort are very open and even the gardeners and women greet you, very nice! In short: a good place to stay if you visit Hue

title: Great experience in Hue
comment:
Very nice hotel but far from the city center
Breakfast at the top
Beautiful swimming pool in a superb environment
I recommend

title: Cozy, peaceful and relaxing
comment:
I would love to mark it 5, your display didn’t let me!

🌿 Peaceful, beautiful, and truly relaxing

I had a wonderful stay at Pilgrimage Village during my solo trip to Hue. The resort is quiet, spacious, and surrounded by nature — a perfect escape from the busy city.

The staff were warm and professional, especially the manager Ngoc Ha who was helpful and flexible.
The room was clean and cozy, the swimming pool was relaxing, and the spa treatment I had was excellent.

Food was delicious, breakfast had lots of variety, and the whole experience felt thoughtful and calm.

Highly recommend for anyone looking for a peaceful stay in Hue.

title: EXTRA stay
comment:
Excellent stay, Welcoming, smile, availability of staff and especially Claudia and Thanh who were great with us and our boys.
The hotel is very comfortable, the services are excellent, the pools superb .. and everyone is caring. We spent 2 days at the top. Only regret, not staying longer!

title: Great family stay at Pilgrimage Village
comment: We had a fantastic stay for 2 nights at Pilgrimage Village with our family of 5 (2 adults, 3 children 14,12,10). We stayed in interconnecting rooms and we particularly loved the pool area. The Vietnamese body massage was amazing and we did a 5 hour tour to Thien Mu Pagoda, the citadel and Tu Doc tomb with an English speaking guide which we would highly recommend. The laundry service was also fantastic. All in all a fabulous experience and we wished we could have stayed for longer. It would be great to return one day! Thank you for the memories!! Ps the banh beo in the restaurant is delicious and our children loved the pool table in the bar!!

title: We loved it!
comment: We wished we stayed more nights. Hue is a vibrant town and the resort wonderful: we loved the superior rooms/ very clean/ great service and pool/ massages. Thank you Ni Na and Claudia for a wonderful stay.

title: Exceptional stay at Pilgrimage Vilage Hue
comment:
We spent a night in this superb hotel, remarkable experience, exceptional comfort and personal more than listening.
Everything is put in place so that your stay goes as well as possible and you can fully enjoy the place, which lives up to its promises.
We highly recommend!

title: Absolute top-class service and best hotel experience in Vietnam
comment:
Best hotel experience we've had in Vietnam. Everything played from start to finish and we are so happy that we had 6 nights in this beautiful hotel/resort.

It's a huge place with +100 rooms, but you don't even notice the many people. The area is large and like a small beautiful and green town. There are different pool areas and we are very grateful for an upgrade to poolside villa/room, which is located next to a quiet (adult) pool with cozy lounge music and good service (coffee, juice mm).

When we booked we were a little overwhelmed by the many different room types and would clearly recommend to be completely sharp on the purpose of the trip (whether you are going as a couple, families m/u children etc).

There is yoga every morning (and some afternoon classes with meditation/yoga) which I/we attended every day. Nice gym and great breakfast (buffet). The spa was also visited diligently as we ate in the restaurant 4 out of 6 days, so it can definitely also be recommended.

The whole place emmer of extraordinary good service, where they have complete control of their guests (indicates really good management). It is very appealing and if I could give a higher grade, they would get it. Just a big thank you and a huge recommendation.

title: An unforgettable experience
comment: One of the best hotel in the south East region. First class equipment (spa, badminton, gym, yoga,…). Beautiful cottage and exotic garden. Excellent service.

title: Lovely resort
comment: We stayed here for 3 nights. Rooms were large and clean, although a little soulless in feeling. The staff were wonderful, kind and helpful. The restaurants, gym, spa and pools were also fantastic. The whole resort was quite busy but is spread out with gardens so it didn’t feel overwhelming. It is a bit out of town so. E prepared to get grabs to and from if you want to see the sights.

title: Beautiful hotel in amazing location
comment: This is a totally gorgeous hotel - as soon as you arrive the staff look after you incredibly well - the rooms are spacious and well laid out- the pool and spa are wonderful and we loved the daily yoga

title: bel hôtel
comment:
Positive
Beautiful hotel in greenery
the very welcoming staff pleasant and attentive
the restaurant is nice
Breakfast is varied
The pool is very nice clean and huge

Negative
Pick up by the driver at the airport pleasant and with little care
The hotel is immersed in a green setting and beautifully decorated
Welcoming and professional staff
The room is clean
Yoga classes available in the morning
Shuttle made available to take guests to a specific point in town / pick up also. ( several times)
There are two swimming pools for children and adults
The pool is large and well maintained with a lifeguard

Room:
The cot is charged 15 euros per night c is exaggerated when you make the reservation via booking for 3 people!

Hotel:
The kid’s club does not offer to leave children with activity it is necessarily accompanied by parents

Situation:
Hotel a little away from the city
15/20 min by car
Make more shuttle available

Restaurant:
Do not put the restaurant menu on the napkin or plate it is not hygienic
Add shuttles between 3pm and 5pm
Grab is available nonetheless
Taxis are expensive with the hotel

title: Idyllique, dream hotel
comment:
The hotel was very good.
Everything is perfect from the warm and personalized Welcoming, the attentions for those who stay several days in the hotel to the excellent restaurant.
Tai Chi and Yoga Lessons Every Morning
All the staff are very caring for their guests and we always feel very kind
The setting is idyllic whether it's the rooms the pools the spa
The most beautiful hotel of our stay in Vietnam

title: Recommend
comment: Stayed Honeymoon pool by villa for a few nights room was great, the bed huge and the service is amazing just as is the spa. Breakfast was perfect as well as the restaurant. Not in town but I think that’s the charm easy and cheap to get around, regular courtesy bus that we used daily.

title: Dinner and stay at the pilgrimage
comment: Had a great dinner thanks to the assistance of out waitress who delivered a very professional service and made us feel at home. Thank you Lien!

title: Great resort with great Service!
comment:
We really liked it. The grounds are very nicely designed, the staff are friendly and helpful, the pools are great! The overall atmosphere on the complex is just very pleasant.
Breakfast is really outstanding, with a huge selection and everything is fresh or is being prepared fresh.
The Service in the restaurant or pool are also great and again the staff were always super attentive and nice. In addition, we were always surprised with small attentions.

It's just nice how the staff take care of you and always offer you help or ask if everything is okay.
We would always come back if we are traveling in Vietnam.

title: Idyllic spa hotel, amazing customer service near the fabulous city of Hue
comment: This hotel is a paradise resort hidden away from the hustle and bustle. It’s an idyllic spa hotel with amazing staff! Thanh and Claudia were both fantastic and ensured we had the best experience possible. Hue is a great city with lots of cultural sites to visit and has a vibrant night life. We wish we could have stayed longer!

title: Pure relaxation, best travel experience in Vietnam!
comment: We stayed in this facility for almost a week. What can I say, our best travel experience in Vietnam so far! The facility is very nice and although it was almost fully booked, it all spread well. Service is just outstanding, all very friendly and very attentive - we have never lacked anything!

title: Top stay in pilgrimage fully met our expectations
comment:
I found the stay top, soothing and the people very welcoming. I was also really looking forward to the hotel, especially after hectic days Hanoi / sapa / Halong
All you have to do is ask or app and people will be there for you. Great nature and a swimming pool which I have not seen before in 5 star hotels (and yet seen quite a lot after 4 times Asia)
I'm in hoi an now and longing back for Pilgrimage
The Rooms, Mini Bar Service and tranquility of the spa center. The Indian head treatment exceeded my expectations
Also restaurant top, only minus that my lobster was really very small.
Ok the restaurant is pricey but you are also in a 5 star hotel.
Greetings annemarie

title: An oasis
comment: Belle experience. Super find Claudia who attended and advised us wonderfully. The fantastic massage. The pool very quiet. All the staff very attentive. Tai Chi class in the morning to awaken mind and body. A lot of vegetation everywhere gives a fresh feeling, which is appreciated in Vietnam.

title: Beautiful historic hue
comment:
Lovely and tranquil.
Great food
Enjoyed the daily yoga
The staff all went out of their way, particularly the guest relations manager . She organised a fantastic tour guide for is called Minh and that was a definite highlight, he was so friendly and knowledgeable.

title: Unforgettable family vacation at Pilgrimage Village
comment:
We stayed at the Pilgrimage Village Hotel as the first leg of our family trip to Vietnam with our two kids (4 and 6). We initially intended to stay for two nights, but loved our stay so much that we extended to five nights. Let me tell you why:
- Beautiful premises: the hotel garden and premises are beautifully tended, and are a haven of peace from the business of Hué. We are usually quite active travellers, but the hotel was so relaxing for us that we ended up spending a lot of time at the hotel during the day because we wanted to take advantage of this unique opportunity to relax in such a beautiful environment.
- Suitability for us as a family: our kids loved staying at the hotel. When we were not out sightseeing, we split our time between the kids pool and the main pool, enjoying a mid afternoon snack or fresh juice in the pool bar located in (!) the pool. Our 4 year old learned how to swim in the pool. In addition, our kids went to the kids yoga class most days, and we took advantage of the crafting classes for our kids to allow us to enjoy some couples time or get a massage.
- An outstanding spa: our room rate included daily 2*30 minutes complementary massage. We quickly came to appreciate the expertise of the massage therapists and ended up increasing our daily massage time as we felt the physical benefits.
- The unmatched service quality: the kindness of all collaborators at the hotel stands out - and in particular the individualised support we received through the dedicated WhatsApp group created for us, which had any question or request responded to in a matter of minutes. A very special thanks to Thanh and Claudia, your daily support has been fantastic and our kids cannot wait to see you again at our next visit!

title: Perfect
comment: We’ve stayed 4 nights at the Pilgrimage resort and it was simply perfect. The resort is situated in a beautiful green environment with great rooms/villas. The service is really personal and excellent. They are really helpful and respond immediately to every need. We planned some tours and spa treatments adhoc, which they helped to organise. The diner at the restaurant was also great (see the other review). The shuttle bus to Hue town is also handy, although a Grab can also be used. We really recommend the Pilgrimage to relax and get a personal luxury treatment.

title: Great stay in
comment: A very nice place, the Mood is really beautiful. We stayed two nights in this village, regenerating. The spa is very organized and the masseurs are very experienced. The restaurant is excellent and also has international food

title: Awesome spot for a lush, jungle resort stay
comment: Friendly and welcoming staff, beautiful campus, nice rooms, free yogo and meditation options - even for kids which was great. Pools were awesome - big one and the kids pool. Kids pool had a great slide. We did not visit the adults only pool but I bet it is great. Breakfast was great.

title: Hue's best hotel!
comment:
AMAZING, beautiful, breathtaking boutique hotel that makes you feel in the middle of the jungle, but with all the comfort and luxury for a GREAT vacation, we went with our kids (7 & 9 ys old) and they also were truly happy!

The pools, rooms, restaurant, spa, and the extraordinary team make you feel at home, we will come back for sure!

title: A very nice family experience
comment:
The hotel is very nice, we stayed a little week with family 2 adults 2 children (9/12). The team on site was very attentive to accompany us. The room is spacious, the decoration and garden immersive and maintained.
We have enjoyed the spa many times which offers very good quality massages.
The meals are also very good.
The main pool is very large, we never ran out of space.
I was also able to test the gym which offers basic equipment for training. A large gym is otherwise available 1 minute walk away.

title: So good, this experience!
comment:
So much attention for guests. The staff is doing an excellent job to let you feel much welcome in this beautiful resort.
Claudia (spanish) and Hùng (vietnamese) are worth to mention especially.

title: Great food.
comment:
Lovely hotel and had a very nice meal in the Junrei restaurant with excellent service from Lien. Amazing food and service !
Very nice clay pot chicken, fried snapper, beef and coconut curry, prawn fried rice and sautéed morning glory with garlic.

title: Beautiful resort exceptional staff
comment: We didn’t have any expectations coming to this hotel but we were blown away by the friendliness of the staff and the standard and cleanliness of the rooms and grounds. The pool is large with plenty of sun lounges and a swim up bar. The rooms are beautiful. The food is terrific. The staff are exceptional. The resort is a bit out of town so some transport is needed. The resort runs free shuttle bus to Hue centre several times a day. Getting a Grab or taxi is easy and the staff will help if needed. Last but not least a very big thank you to Thanh and Claudia. These girls work tirelessly all day and are exceptionally friendly and helpful. We came to think of them as friends rather than staff. Would definitely recommend this hotel and we would come back just to see Thanh and Claudia.

title: Relaxing family stay
comment: We had a wonderful three night stay, and would have loved to stay longer! The staff were so friendly, particularly with our young daughter, who they went out of their way to talk to and walk with. Our room was lovely, with thoughtful touches like local candy. Spa was great, with some of the best massages we've ever had. The two pools were also really nice, and big, so it didn't feel too crowded. Highly recommend staying here, we'd like to return!

title: Great relaxing, top notch stay at Pilgrimage Resort!
comment: Lovely few days at the resort. We booked it last minute on our family trip to get out of the hustle and bustle of Saigon. I wanted a peaceful and relaxing retreat along with some local history and culture and decided on Hué and the Pilgrimage resort… and I’m glad we did. From the booking confirmation, to arrival; during our stay, and back to the airport, the staff and hospitality team (Thanh and Claudia) were there to make sure our stay was as comfortable and convenient as possible. Whatever we needed, it was just a WhatsApp message away. We booked private care to see the historical sites, we booked massages and Jacuzzi, and also ate onsite a few times. Everything was great. I even had a situation with my room A/C and they promptly acknowledged the issue and transferred me to an upgraded room due to the inconvenience. We’d definitely would recommend this place and look forward to returning soon.

title: Nice summer get away
comment: It was very nice to get away from the big city. The service was amazing and the resort was lovely and very relaxing!! I had so much fun with my family, and the massages were so good!

title: Superb
comment:
The hotel is very beautiful, in nature. The family rooms are very spacious and comfortable.
The pool is huge is very nice with a bar in the water.
Breakfast very complete.
We stayed two nights and it is great between visits to enjoy this place...

title: Perfect 5 star oasis
comment: Perfect, boutique 5 star hotel. Hidden oasis close just outside Hue centre, away from the chaos. Incredible service, spacious modern rooms and amazing pool area. Cannot fault it. They also changed internal flights for me which made my life a lot easier than doing myself.

title: Wonderful og peaceful
comment: This place is really a gem. We stayed in a family villa, and it is truely beautiful with its own little swimming-pool and terrace. The whole stay the staff took excellent care of us, with great attention to detail. Would definitly come back if I’m ever given the chance.

title: Perfect relaxing stay with wonderful staff
comment:
The resort is a little outside of Hue but is 10 mins in a Grab taxi or use the hotel shuttle. The resort itself feels secluded and calm. The staff were wonderful, particularly the manager Claudia who seamlessly managed all our requests.
The room was huge and spacious for our 2 adults and one child.
We did a DMZ tour while there which was fantastic and had spa treatments at the resort. Also great.
We ate one night in the resort and one night at the Eco restaurant outside the front gates. Both great although the latter significantly less expensive!

title: Amazing hotel and wonderful stay
comment:
We had a fabulous time at this beautiful resort
The facilities were fantastic particularly the spa where we all enjoyed a massage
The staff were incredibly helpful throughout our stay

title: A Gracious and Serene Stay in Hue – A Hidden Sanctuary at Pilgrimage Village
comment:
After a blissful few days at Vedana Lagoon Resort, I moved over to Pilgrimage Village Boutique Resort & Spa, their sister property in Hue — and it was such a warm and elegant experience from the moment I arrived.

Check-in took place in the Candle Room, a peaceful lounge where I was welcomed with a refreshing drink and personally greeted by the guest relations manager. It was a smooth and thoughtful arrival experience, and that hospitality carried through my entire stay.

I was also kindly upgraded to a bungalow villa, which made a world of difference. My original booking would’ve placed me near the main pool, which was quite lively with families and young children (understandable during local holiday season), but after the peaceful seclusion of Vedana, I truly appreciated the quieter setting. The bungalow had access to the exclusive Blue Pool, reserved for adults and children over 10, and it offered the calm atmosphere I was looking for.

Everything at Pilgrimage Village is designed with gentle, intentional touches — from tiny flowers placed delicately on linens and trays, to aromatherapy diffusers, humidifiers, and cotton robes in the room. Every corner whispers relaxation.

Summary:
👉🏾Warm, smooth check-in experience in the peaceful Candle Room
👉🏾Friendly and professional English-speaking staff
👉🏾Gracious upgrade to bungalow villa with Blue Pool access
👉🏾Handy QR code cube for in-room services and hotel info
👉🏾Beautiful amenities: dressing gowns, bathroom water, humidifier, aroma diffuser
👉🏾Sweet little touches like flowers on towels and trays
👉🏾Thoughtful nightly turndown service, including a bedtime story scroll left by housekeeping
👉🏾Vegan breakfast options – loved the lychees and papaya
👉🏾Peaceful breakfast setting, away from the busy main area
👉🏾All staff greet you with genuine warmth
👉🏾Late checkout was offered with no fuss
👉🏾Cushioned wooden loungers by the Blue Pool – very comfortable
👉🏾Cold towels and water poolside – such a refreshing bonus

Overall, Pilgrimage Village is a soulful, charming retreat, and a perfect companion property to Vedana Lagoon. Though different in style, it shares the same dedication to care, comfort, and personal attention. I left feeling restored and so well looked after. I’d absolutely return.

title: Holidays with growing satisfaction
comment:
Very pretty, large family hotel with a remarkably charming, exceptional and talented guest attendant, Claudia, who cleans up every little discrepancy.
An asset to the hotel.
We would also like to thank the staff again, who were very welcoming and gracious, always greeted kindly and waited patiently until we left the pool area in the evening.

title: Wonderful stay!
comment:
We originally booked two nights at Pilgrimage Resort and were surprised with an upgrade to a pool villa right upon arrival. We were very happy about it! The whole complex is fantastically beautiful and ideal for relaxing.

A special thank you goes to Claudia and Thanh, who took incredibly warm care of us. Due to health problems, we could not continue our journey. However, the spontaneous extension of our stay was possible without any problems. Everything was lovingly organized, and we felt well taken care of.

Massages at the spa were great, as were the two spacious pools. Breakfast was varied and delicious. Overall, the service was excellent and everyone is super friendly and attentive.

We would come back anytime and can highly recommend the Pilgrimage!

title: Mendial Hue
comment: Nice hotel, big room, had a bath, good breakfast, but the mattress on the bed is not comfortable. Comfortable location. From all the sights by car. I recommend this hotel. But the mattresses should be changed.

title: For one night ok
comment:
We stayed only one night and did not have breakfast because we had plane early. Rooms with that air of the 70s, old bathroom with shower inside the bath and plastic curtain, impossible to use because of broken hook.
A little dust here and there
View and location ok

title: Great hotel, clean big rooms, good breakfast
comment:
Lovely big room, very clean. Excellent staff, always happy to help. Very good breakfast, wide variety.
The gym was basic and seems unloved, could be improved very easily. The free weights are leaking sand but all useable.

title: Nice experience
comment: Great location...spacious room with city views but well soundproofed... the nice pool and very good breakfast served on the top floor with city views... The staff is charming and attentive

title: Worst hotel ever. Not recommended
comment:
Worst hotel we ever stayed. The hotel dated and need renovation. Old smelling carpet all over. Wooden door and furniture like in a motel in the 80’. Terrible mattress that you can feel the metal ring around and all of the springs.
The worst ever is its location. It’s really far away from the center and there’s nothing around for food or entertainment.
We got stuck in this hotel by our travel agent via Asiana Tours.
Not recommended. We suggested Asia Hotel Hue, way better and right in the center.

title: You would be hard pressed to find a better place to rest.
comment: I concur with the rave reviews. This place is special. From the attentive, obliging front desk and smiling attendants, to the warm inviting rooms and the scrumptious breakfast buffet. They provide excellent service, helping with “finding your way” in this busy city. Overall, it is great value. You would be hard pressed to find a better place to rest your weary head...

title: Family holidays
comment: Hotel conveniently located in the city of Hue. Friendly and helpful staff. Beautiful pool and delicious breakfast at the top of this hotel. The rooms are large and spacious. The hotel also has a gift shop.

title: EXCELLENT SERVICE
comment: Our family stayed one night at Mondial Hotel during the Tet Holiday. This place truly made us feel at home with its warm hospitality and excellent service. Upon our arrival, the bellman quickly assisted us with our luggage, and the receptionist greeted us with a warm smile. The room was spacious, clean, and offered a beautiful view of the city. The breakfast buffet was excellent, featuring a wide variety of both Asian and Western dishes. Thank you, Mondial Hotel and staff, for always making our stay easier and more enjoyable!

title: Nice choice in Hue
comment: A very solid hotel in Hue. Beautiful old Art Deco design in the lobby areas. Incredibly kind staff, especially Ms. Nguyet. We booked day tours through the hotel and both were very good. The breakfast was great and dinner was good as well. Rooms are on the older side so don’t expect anything too modern. But overall a nice and comfortable stay.

title: They spoiled us on my first return to Vietnam since the war
comment: Historic and luxurious. Very handy to all we wanted to do. The included breakfast alone is amazing. Views of the Perfume River are pretty much blocked by another building though. They spoiled us.

title: Impeccable service, great location.
comment: I honestly try not to give perfect reviews, but I could not find a thing about this hotel that was not top-notch. Maybe the pool could’ve used a little more shade! But otherwise the breakfast buffet was fantastic every day. The service was impeccable. They even drove us to our next hotel in Hoi An; a 4 hour drive with Khao was very nice.

title: Great location, wonderful staff
comment: We stayed for three nights in mid March in a lovely room overlooking the river. The room was comfortable and the staff, particularly Vy at the front desk and Khao, our driver were outstanding. We arranged two tours through the hotel - one of Hue city highlights and one tour of the DMZ and both tours were very well done and educational. The breakfast buffet was very good as was dinner.

title: Peaceful and Luxurious
comment: A wonderful luxurious place to stay. All the staff caring, well mannered and very helpful, with a smile. Convenient for everything though slightly out of toen centre. Good river walks.

title: Gorgeous Property On the River With the Friendliest Staff You Could Ever Meet
comment:
This is probably the friendliest hotel I have ever stayed in. It wasn't because they felt they had to be nice but genuinely all just seemed to be lovely people who couldn't do enough for me. Without trying to sound trite, it really was nice to come back to every time as they all seemed so pleased to see you.
I thought I would be late arriving, as there was an issue on the railway line from Da Nang, so I messaged the hotel. Unlike most places I contact, the reply came back almost straight away. They welcome I got when I arrived was so warm, and the property so beautiful, I immediately booked for an extra night and would happily have stayed forever.
I had a spa with Su, which I think originally should have been 60 minutes. However it took as long as it needed to and rather than just being a set massage from the menu, it was entirely suited to my needs and I felt incredible after.
The amazing manageress informed me at breakfast on my final day, that the railway line was again closed but she arranged a private car, that cost me less than the Grab I had to get on the way there. The driver did a detour via the spectacular Hai Van Pass and stopped at the top for me to admire the view at my own pace.
I would love to back to this hotel or the other one they have. I even purchased a bottle of the scent you can smell throughout the hotel, to remind me of my stay.

title: Not a 5* hotel, 4* is pushing it!
comment:
This hotel prides itself on its art deco heritage but it’s actually austere and almost institutional inside. Not much decor or flowers, nothing to make it feel luxurious.

We booked a river view room but there was a conference venue between us and the river, so not much of a water view at all, just the back of a building under construction. There was a wedding taking place there when we arrived with loud music and shouting. The hotel moved us on request and upgraded us at no extra charge, a good outcome for which we were very grateful. The 2nd room was good.

The pool area is horrible. The worst I’ve seen in a long time. The paving around the pool is old and dirty although the actual water looks clean. The pool is way too deep to stand except for one small area. The pool area is surrounded by 10 foot wire fencing like tennis court fencing, very ugly. This area needs a major facelift. The outdoor furniture at the pool bar is unusable because it’s in full sun and is made of black metal, so burning hot. The grounds are ok, just, but the paving throughout is also old and ugly. During the day there is loud music with a heavy beat blaring from next door, that conference centre, again!

Breakfast was disappointing, although not surprising! The English breakfast was poor and sparse. The layout and presentation of everything was very underwhelming.

To sum up. This hotel is in dire need of some tlc. It needs decor, it needs a pool area upgrade, it needs thoughtful attention to detail if it wants to consider itself even a 4* hotel. It’s a shame, with a decent budget this place has serious potential as the staff is kind and it’s in a good location

title: Very nice art deco hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel of typical art deco architecture 1932, one could imagine returning to Indochina of the time. Impeccable service, good restaurant.
It’s decided, we’ll be back.

title: Relax and regenerate
comment: Had the most relaxing and regenerative foot massage at this hotel with Miss Su . Highly recommend this amazing 45 minutes of treatment. Walking on a cloud now!

title: Wonderful stay
comment: Couldn’t have been better from start to finish. Room, food and facilities were excellent but what set it apart was the service. When one of our party left something behind, the hotel immediately arranged for it to delivered to our next location, before we could even think about asking. They then stayed in touch until we confirmed we had it. They really went above and beyond.

title: Fantastic Hotel!
comment: Superb hotel with fantastic staff & facilities. Wonderful Spa, amazing Swedish massage by ‘An’ who I would highly recommend. Walking distance to main historic sites. Grab cabs readily available if walking not your thing. Would definitely stay here again!

title: Almost perfect
comment: While in Hue for one night we are welcomed in this very nice art deco hotel and is very well maintained. The staff is very professional, welcoming, courteous, smiling. The restaurant offers international cuisine and it's really good (vanilla pumpkin soup 👍). Breakfast is also of very very good standard. In short if you come to Hue do not hesitate. With the phone you can't put 4.5 so I put 5 however hotels in Vietnam, even 5 stars, all have a problem with sound insulation. Music played by the outdoor speakers at night 😤

title: The memorable stay
comment: Quality is everywhere: the staff is helpful, kind and efficient. The hotel is superb: colonial building renovated with taste. All the amenities are there: bikes available, perfect gym, quality breakfast, unlimited sweet snacks, bar that prepares delicious cocktails in the evening, in short, one of our most beautiful memories of this holiday in Vietnam.

title: Very professional and smiling welcome
comment: Very nice welcome in this beautiful Art Deco Hotel , all the staff is Very smiling nice and efficient. Very nice buffet at breakfast.

title: The place to be in Hue
comment: Perfect stay, refined historic site, service and perfect welcome, friendly and very professional

title: Lovely Stay in Hue!
comment: Lovely hotel in a fascinating city. I was in Hue for the Set celebrations. This meant the city was in a celebratory mood, with fireworks and lovely flower displays. It also meant that many establishments were closed. The staff at the Azerai, in addition to being very friendly, dealt with this very capably. The front desk, particularly Vy, were just great.

title: Great experience - perfect
comment: We spent 4 wonderful days, the service is impeccable and very attentive, very good and quiet room , beautiful pool. We'll get back to that.

title: Art deco wonder
comment:
Wonderful art deco hotel on the river bank opposite the citadel

The interior has a lot of original features and a very friendly and helpful team

Breakfast buffet is all you need and sitting on the terrace in the cooler early hours is a great way to start the day

We had a top floor room with a river view which was great - super terrace to sit in the evening breeze after a day’s sightseeing

The only issue is unfortunately someone has built a large entertainment pavilion right in front of the hotel so lower level rooms will have lost their river views (see photo). Not the hotels fault but request higher floors when booking

Superb experience

title: Don’t hesitate book now!
comment:
Favorite hotel in Vietnam so far! I booked directly through the hotel for a Tet package which was a marvelous value.

1) Lovely setting: I especially enjoyed sitting outside the lobby area for afternoon tea, and enjoying a cold Huda beer. Seems they offer complimentary refreshment for guests as well including cakes and fruit.
2) Amazing pool. Hue was about 25-26 degrees when we visited but the pool was amazing especially after a long day of visiting temples and the Citadel
3) service: genuinely the most friendly and attentive service we have experienced in Vietnam. Starting with the car ride from the airport which included cold towel service, cookies and water. Then, the staff even helped me to fix the handle which had broken off my suitcase after a Vietjet flight.
For my jeep tour, they even stored my luggage until the company could come pick up my suitcases after. They also take credit card which is An amazing convenience in Vietnam.

4) Parfum restaurant was such a lovely place to enjoy Hue local specialties for breakfast lunch and dinner. Reasonable pricing and very convenient especially during Tet when many places outside are closed. Also the breakfast included in the room is amazing

Also loved the details of the room, which clearly have been lovingly renovated and maintained. The complimentary services include snack bar with cashews which my wife loved.

title: Excellent all round
comment: Fantastic old colonial style hotel with very modern up to date rooms, lovely staff, extremely helpful concierge, driver Khoa was brilliant, thoroughly recommend

title: Wonderful stay at Azerai La Residence, Hue.
comment: Omg 😆! This hotel was wonderful about everything !!! My husband and I stayed there last month when we visited Hue for the first time. The concierge lady Ms. Moon (Nguyet) helped us organize our private tours to visit Important sites in Hue including the former DMZ areas. Our city tour guide Ms. Van was very helpful to show us the imperial palace and the Tu Duc Pagoda. She explained every aspect of the sites we visited. Our second tour to DMZ with Ms. Hai was very informative about the area and she was very patient when we walked through the tunnel. Thank you both very much for excellent tours !! The hotel also provided our personal driver Mr. Quy who picked us up from the airport and drove us around everywhere when we did our private tours. He also drove us all the way to Hoi An. We appreciate his service very much for his very safe and comfortable driving. We were also very happy with two ladies who provided great massages to me and my husband. Thank you, Ms. Vi and Ms. Anh. The spa manager lady was always very welcoming whenever I visited the spa during my stay. We were always very pleased with the servers at the restaurant, too. Ms. Ti was very friendly and hospitable while we had our special imperial colonial dinner. My husband and I can’t thank you enough for all the wonderful hospitality during our stay !! You made our stay very special !!! We will be back for sure !!!!

title: Treated us like family
comment:
The hotel is wonderful. We had an unexpectedly interrupted stay, my daughter became very ill on our first evening (and my son and I also but not as badly) of our stay and the leaders of the hotel were fantastic. Hotel manager gave my wife her WhatsApp direct contact & ensured all staff were aware of our issue and everybody went above and beyond over the three days of her illness/recovery to help us, ensured her comfort and look after us all. Really felt as though we were treated as family by the staff who were so amazing through the experience. Hotel doctor was excellent also, and the management team and all staff, the servers in the restaurant through to the front desk and concierge services all were genuinely concerned for her and looked after us all so wonderfully I can not express how appreciative we are of your wonderful hotel and the staff there. I can’t imagine being so well looked after anywhere else as we were here.
We extended our stay by a night while she recovered and the staff helped shift and arrange tours for those of us well enough to go later in the stay.
The hotel itself is also beautiful and spacious, and the pool and spa services top quality.
I would unreservedly recommend this hotel to anyone considering a stay in Hue.

title: A hotel with fabulous charm and a very available and efficient team
comment:
We had a great experience at the Azerai Hotel which is an unbelievable charm
We particularly appreciated the services, advice and availability of Ms. NGUYET
similarly, our driver, Mr KHOA made us live a great day on the occasion of our transfer to Hoi An
Thanks to the whole team for their availability and smile

title: azerai residence great hotel
comment: Really nice hotel , centrally located and staff excellent . Facilities and rooms are all good . Would definitely recommend this hotel

title: You got to try this place
comment: 1930's governor's mansion, carefully preserved. Everything about the place was great and walking distance to city for local food experience.

title: Terrific return to one of the best historic hotel properties in Vietnam
comment: Excellent return to a terrific Art Deco hotel- very well renovated and maintained by new owners. Great food and staff. Just hope the development next door does not spoil it.

title: Beautiful comfortable hotel by the river
comment: This beautiful hotel is very comfortable with wonderful service. We had several delicious meals in the restaurant and our sever Chin was particularly helpful. The reception desk was very nice particularly Vy. We enjoyed the large refreshing pool after our touring.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment: Beautiful hotel especially for those who love art deco! Very nice rooms! Too bad the restaurant is not up to it!

title: Wonderful stay during the Christmas break
comment:
We spent a few days at Azerai, including Christmas Eve with a wonderful celebration organised by Azerai. The staff went a long way to make it a special evening for the guests, and it was indeed memorable. The staff member in charge of the restaurant let us try the wines we were choosing for our Christmas celebration until we were happy with our choice. The manager reserved an extra room for us for Christmas Eve in case the celebration in a neighboring restaurant elsewhere would disturb our sleep, but it ended early and we happily stayed in our room, with the peace of mind of having been given this thoughtful choice. We also enjoyed their great spa, and the massage by Ms. Kimanh was the best I have ever had. She really took care of me with great relaxation techniques, applied as an art. I made sure to go once again to the spa for another massage with her in the following day, before my check out.

We have only to thank everyone at Azerai. The staff was so kind, attentive and pleasant throughout our stay. We will remember fondly of it, whether in relation to the place, service, meal and drinks, and hope to have the opportunity to come back soon.

title: Colonial charm in imperial Hue
comment: We are returning guests and stayed here on a family New Year's vacation. It's a charming Art Deco colonial-style property with warm service and a great riverfront location. The rooms are either river-facing (the river view is subjective) or some rooms face the inner courtyard, which I would recommend. The hotel organised a local cultural experience of lion and dragon dance at the New Year's Eve gala party. The bar serves up delicious cocktails, and the breakfast spread is generous. The hotel can help arrange a dragon boat to cruise at sunrise (foggy) or sunset down to the pagoda and a cosy garden up the steps with a functioning monastery at the back. The only setback would be this huge commercial complex that's behind the property, which can be noisy at times with karaoke and entertainment. All in all, I can't think of a better place to relax and be lazy in this sleepy, charming imperial city.

title: Gorgeous Hotel in historical building
comment: Gorgeous historical builiding preserved in impeccable taste. Beautifuloutdoor swimming poolFantastic location to explore the sites. Outstanding staff and hospitality. Excellent restaurant both for breakfast and dinner.

title: Great visit in Hue!
comment:
Great trip with the best bartender in Vietnam-Tuyen.
Hue is beautiful, walkable and Azerai Laresidence Hue is beautiful, well-located w/ exceptional staff.

title: Fabulous hotel with excellent service
comment:
We have just left this hotel after an amazing 3 night stay.
The hotel is beautiful and the staff are amazing. They are friendly, helpful and go above and beyond. Particular mentions to VY, Duong and Nguyet who were all so helpful.
It was my birthday when I arrived and they made it so special with flowers, a cake and fan.
The hotel is situated out of the really busy part of town but it is a lovely stroll along the river front to reach this area.
The food was delicious and so varied, we had breakfast included but chose to eat in the restaurant 2 nights as the food was so good. You will not be disappointed.
We stayed in room 512 which overlooked the pool and river. Unfortunately we didn’t use the pool due to the weather but the facilities are excellent.
The gym was also excellent. The only negative would be the spa as I had a shampoo and blow dry which I would not recommend as blow drying hair is not their specialty and my hair was not good. This does not detract from my 5 star review.
Stunning hotel.

title: Wonderful stay at Azerai
comment: I had a wonderful stay at Azerai. The scenery is beautiful, and the hotel has such a warm and welcoming atmosphere. The service was excellent, especially from My, who took care of me during lunch. She was very friendly, attentive, and gave thoughtful recommendations for the dishes, making the experience even more enjoyable. I would definitely return and highly recommend this place to others.

title: Great stay at Azerai
comment: The. Hotel was very good. Food was excellent and the whole team were really wonderful... so caring and looked after us so well, especially Hoa on reception and Nhu Thao who served us often. We went to the spa which was wonderful. Would stay here again.

title: Special stay at the Azerai Hue, Vietnam
comment: The hotel is truly first class. It is comfortable, very clean, beautiful and most of all the staff are wonderfully friendly, helpful, and always interested in making sure that guest feel welcome and have whatever one needs. I would like to give special thanks and recognition to Tam, Nguyen, Vy, Khoi, and all the breakfast and spa staff and housekeeping staff who made our stay special.

title: A superb stay in an historic icon
comment:
La Residence in Hue was originally the home of the French governor to Viet Nam during the colonial era.
It is now a very comfortable and accommodating hotel option in the ancient capital, evocative of another time.
We recently spent three nights in Hue at the Azerai La Residence. It was the perfect place to stay.
Despite the problems caused by catastrophic weather conditions over the past few months, the property presented in splendid glory with beautiful grounds, an atmospheric interior and a sparkling pool.
An absolute testament to the people who work in and care for the hotel.
Our room had a view of the Perfume River and the flag flying over the battlements of the Imperial Citadel.
The room was well proportioned, had a separate toilet to the bathroom area and a very comfortable bed.
We ate twice at the hotel in the evening and the food was excellent.
Breakfast is a feast of western and SE Asian offerings. Much of it cooked to order.
We had a very pleasant stay and felt very well looked after.
Special mention to all the people that form the heart of the Azerai hotel. They are warm, welcoming and eager to help.
A special mention to the delightful Nguyet as Concierge and Tri who assisted with a seamless check in.
We travelled to Hoi An following our stay in Hue and arranged a private transfer through the hotel.
It was reasonably priced for the distance and the sites we visited on the journey.
Our driver Quy was very competent and careful in undertaking the journey. We had a number of stops along the way including lunch at the beautiful Lap An lagoon, a drive up and over Hai Van pass and a stop at Marble Mountain near Danang.
Quy was very professional, informative and attentive to our needs. The trip was a highlight as we had only previously flown this route before and not had the opportunity to see the fantastic scenery in this part of Viet Nam.
You will not be disappointed if you select the Azerai for your home in Hue.
Be sure to talk to Nguyet about the day trips on offer through the hotel.

title: Great Hotel
comment: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel, a former government residence of the French, beautifully maintained. Our room was comfortable, well equipped, and quiet, overlooking the pretty gardens and pool. The breakfast buffet was extensive with local specialties and fruits as well as international foods. Most of all, the staff here is superb. Our concierge, Ms. Nguyet, corresponded extensively before our arrival, as well as making last minute arrangements, all exactly what we wanted. On a day trip she arranged to Hoi An, our driver, Mr. Qui, was wonderful. He drove us over a mountain pass for the scenery on a very windy road, and brought us back at night in some heavy rains, all very safely and skillfully.

title: Beautiful old colonial hotel in quieter area of Hue
comment:
Beautiful relaxed hotel by the river. Staff amazingly helpful, especially Khoa who kindly took some photos of myself outside of the hotel.
Will definitely return out of rainy season.

title: 10 out of 10
comment:
The divine hotel with all kinds of amenities, pool, gym, well located, fabulous breakfast, varied and super friendly staff,
I would definitely return
Thank you.

title: A perfect hotel
comment: Hotel, perfect with excellent location!! the staff was as helpful as they were dedicated. Breakfast is varied, Vietnamese, American or European. The rooms are very comfortable, the one with river views are romantic. In front of the hotel cyclo shoots are available. Otherwise, the hotel will take care of any Taxi reservations for tours, excursions. The spa is remarkable with an extremely efficient massage service. Especially after a day of visiting. The restaurant is excellent and the Vietnamese specialties are outstanding.

title: Very pleasant setting, kindness and efficiency
comment:
Top hotel in a refined art deco style.
Team available , professional and efficient .
Bravo to Hao,Thao, Khoaet Moon

title: Fantastic staff! Khoa a driver was superb!
comment: They go far out of their way! We needed help and they came through………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………….

title: Beautiful hotel close to the train station and Imperial Palace
comment: Luxurious hotel with top-notch service. We stayed for two nights while exploring the Nguyen Dynasty tombs, temples and palaces. Despite the fact it rained the entire time, we had a wonderful omfortable stay at the hotel. The service was the best we experienced in. Vietnam. The breakfasts and dinners in the hotel restaurant are delicious and authentic. We can’t recommend this hotel enough for travelers to Hue.

title: Fantastic
comment: This hotel is amazing. All the staff were so friendly and welcoming. We loved the pool and the bar staff they were also great. We only ate breakfast which was another fantastic experience. Would return if we ever make our way back to Hue.

title: The Heart à La Residence
comment: It’s unusual to experience hotels with vision and charm. La Residence so faithfully captures the architecture of the original, even down to the latches on the French doors in the old building. And this flows on to the floors and into the rooms. The other low-rise buildings link cleverly to each other and sit around lawns, plantings and a large L- shaped pool. If this were not enough, La Residence should be a foody destination. The chef, Mr Dông Hai, put up 5 star plates on the three consecutive nights we ate there. As for the charm, that comes from the people who work there. It’s an easy, warm charm: seems to come naturally from Tam, Moon and Phuong who offered to go the extra 2 miles with organising sites to see and fixing travel hassles. That was also true of the other staff we met. Such a place!

title: The best hotel worldwide
comment:
We stayed at Azerai la residence for 4 days this month. We travel constantly and this hotel is one of the very best I’ve ever stayed at. The hotel is beautiful and the rooms were spacious. Our dinner and breakfast were delicious.

But what made this hotel spectacular was the wonderful people working at the hotel. The most wonderful of all these excellent people was Ms. Moon who heads the Conceirge service. I’ve never meet someone like her at any hotel. She is so nice and helpful and always has a big smile. We were so spoiled by her and the team that when we checked into another hotel chain in Hanoi, I almost flew back to Hue just to spend more time with the wonderful people at Azerai.

If you have a chance to stay at this hotel, I strongly recommend it. And thanks everyone at Azerai for letting us experience what exceptional service and wonderful facilities are really like.

title: Peaceful, friendly, top noch heaven!!
comment:
The Hotel is in a convenient location.
The Hotel room is very new and of high standard. The bed and cushions were comfortable.
The bathroom is too standard.
The pool and gardens are Devine.
The breakfast buffet is delicious.
The staff is so welcoming that you feel immediately home.
The little treats delivered to the rooms for the evening and the available coffee and sweets during the day in the lobby are amazing.
It’s a very clean, calm, environmentally friendly place.
You must try.

title: A wonderful hotel
comment:
A fabulous stay in the Azerai in Hue.
The hotel is elegant and very comfortable, and the staff are lovely.
A special mention to Su and Trang in the spa who gave my wife and me a wonderful massage.

title: Nice hotel to stay in Huế
comment: Very nice experience. Hotel room and the facilities are excellent. We did their local food tour and they also help us arrange the car ride to Hoi An. VY, Moon and our driver Khoa has helped us with all the arrangements. Very nice people. They made our stay in Huế relaxing and worry free.

title: Charming, historic hotel.
comment:
This is a charming historic hotel made extra special by the wonderful staff who cannot be more friendly and accomodating. A special call out to Khoa our hotel driver!!
I definitely recommend this hotel. Restaurant La Perfum is excellent. Staff are wonderful and it exudes old world charm.

title: Love Coming Back to Azerai Hue!
comment:
I had the chance to return to Azerai Hue during the National Day holiday, and it was truly heartwarming and wonderful.
What made this stay even more special is how much my girl enjoyed it.
