She absolutely loved the greenery everywhere, adored the caring and gentle staff, and spent so much happy time at the cute and well-organized Kid’s Club. Seeing how well she was taken care of made our holiday even more relaxing and fulfilling.

Azerai Hue is not just a beautiful resort; it feels like a warm, welcoming home where every return brings joy and new memories. Definitely a place we will keep coming back to.

title: Great Hotel, pool and restaurant
comment: Beautiful hotel, great food, Azerai driver Khoa took us to the Hue highlights and shared his local knowledge. This is a great way to explore Hue and see several places of interest in the one day.

title: Colonial chic
comment: Great hotel by the river. All in refinement and discretion..top room, spacious perfectly equipped. Luxury in Hue. Spa extra. Breakfast very complete and refined, the best of our stay..go there with your eyes closed and enjoy the splendid pool. And let's not forget the dedicated and extra staff

title: great hotel in Hue.
comment: This is the most beautiful hotel. right by the banks of hteperfume river within easy distance of the train station and market area. staff were so helpful, room was fantastic ( free upgrade to give our 3 kids who were sharing more space). their room looked over hte pool and the river. The building is beautiful with so much character. great breakfast and fantastic pool. Highly recommended

title: Family stay
comment: We stayed with family at this hotel. Beautiful decoration, witness of art deco. We're like transported back to another era. Flawless Welcoming.

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment: The facility, room service, staff.... are all on point. They make you feel like home. The hotel is in the middle of everything so it is super convenient for walk or taxi. Mr Oanh from the bar is our favourite person and kudo to him. Initially, we just wanted to have couple drinks and leave for downtown but his bartender expertise, hospitality and welcoming made us stay at the bar until midnight. The drinks and the foods were super great. You dont need to do any research before coming to Hue, just ask the hotel staffs and they will give you accurate, authentic advice.

title: All perfect.
comment: Everything perfect!! Very hospitable and central. Everything went very well. Recommend if you come with the family, the Citadel is quite close. Breakfast is plentiful, ideal for families or couples. The staff is very friendly. Modern hotel.

title: Just beautiful
comment:
Beautiful - wonderfull - extraordinary!
The staff is just amazing
My welcomes us in the best way! With care and exemplary professionalism!

title: 100 points!
comment: Fantastic Hotel, Exceptional Service. The location is perfect, I recommend to everyone staying at this 5 star hotel

title: A place that touched both heart and senses
comment:
Amazing days well spent at Azerai La Residence Hue. The hotel is so beautiful. Colonial elegance mixed with modern style. The garden, pool area, and spa felt like a peaceful oasis - a perfect place to relax.

Amazing service. The staff were warm, kind, and always so helpful.

Our rooms was spacious, tastefully decorated, with amazing views from the balcony. The bed was incredibly comfortable, and we truly appreciated the fresh fruit, cakes, and the ginger tea with honey - especially thoughtful, as I had a sore throat. All the little details made us feel genuinely welcome. We were truly impressed.

Breakfast was absolutely delicious, with plenty of options - all made with care and high-quality ingredients.

Special thanks to the incredible chef Mr. Nguyen Dong Hai - every dish was a masterpiece. We were in awe of the flavors, the presentation, and the love behind the food. The entire dining experience felt like a culinary adventure.

I highly recommend Azerai La Residence Hue. Would love to go back.

title: A great choice for your Hue vacation
comment:
We stayed at the Azerai La Residence Hue for 4 nights. From the moment we walked in to this historic and well cared for hotel we felt relaxed, with a warm greeting from their lovely staff and a gorgeous room overlooking the perfume river. You can tell all the people at the Azerai love the hotel and Hue. From reception to the restaurant to the spa. Other stand outs include the guest relation manager Nguyet, Y in the Spa, and Khoa who drove for both our transfer to Da Nang as well as our tours of Hue. Definitely get a tour of the Imperial City, Mausoleums and Pagodas of Hue. We did 2 tours organised by the hotel, with Khoa as driver and Van as our guide, and these were absolute highlights of our trip. Van was an amazing guide and she is a wonderful ambassador for the city, providing informative and insightful background to some of the city history and monuments.

Only comment for improvement would be that the swimming pool was very deep and consequently only the shallow end was really usable, but we enjoyed it nevertheless each day. Should change be considered to the pool area in the future the hotel should consider making the pool shallower in depth, and adding some trees nearby that could provide some shade over the pool itself during the hot days. But only very minor points as this is a fabulous hotel. Thank you to the Azerai for a wonderful stay in Hue.

title: Azerai Hue
comment: The Azerai is an outstanding hotel where all members of staff are totally residents focussed. Guest Relations was especially outstanding able to make arrangements with impressive professionalism. The food is worthy of separate comment…. It was beautifully presented and of great quality

title: Plus que parfait ;)
comment:
The experience is more than great. The hotel itself is well decorated and clean. There is nothing to complain. But the small details and gestures that the staff put into this place are stunning. They pay so much attention to the guests and make our stay perfect.

L'une de mes expériences les plus belles. Les personnels sont incroyables et font très attention à notre bien être. On a eu une belle vue sur la rivière des Parfums en plus. C'est génial !

title: Fantastic location near the train station.
comment:
A Refuge in a Busy City.

First Class Service. Kind staff. They go above and beyond. The restaurant and shops are operated by talented teammates. We cannot wait to return. Was. Their driver, Khao, drove very safely and accommodated our last minute long drive.

I’m coming back soon for a family retreat.

title: So very charming
comment:
A beautiful colonial style hotel on the banks of the Perfume River. Originally, the French Governor's House, two wings have been added sympathically and in keeping with the original building.

After booking through the hotel's website, I was sent confirmation by the hotel's guest relations manager and also details of services provided by the hotel. I booked a car transfer from Da Nang airport and two private tours: half day Highlights of Hue with Perfume River Cruise and day tour to the Demilitarized Zone (DMZ). The trip was also partly to celebrate my travelling partner's birthday. After enquiring if there was any special meal I could arrange, I was sent the hotel's Colonial Life Book which contains many special dining options; I chose the Colonial Dinner.

Airport Transfer: problem free in one of the hotel's vehicles (2 hour journey from airport to Hue).

Highlights of Hue Tour: an excellent, informative and unhurried tour with a guide who spoke excellent English. A very good introduction to Hue. The boat departure point is adjacent to the hotel and only a few minutes walk.

DMZ Tour: a long day but highly recommended. Transport (as with Hue Tour and airport transfer) was in a hotel vehicle with the hotel driver whose driving was careful and safe. The guide was extremely knowledgeable and engaging. Again, totally unhurried, the trip was taken at our pace. The highlight was the final stop at the Vinh Moc Tunnels, similtaneously a sobering and uplifting experience. The guide asked if we would like to explore some tunnels that were not open to the public. We agreed straightaway and spent several minutes navigating unlit tunnels with only our phone lights to guide us!

Colonial Dinner: on arrival, one of the staff went through the menu with us because there were some small changes due to minor dietary requirements. The actual dinner for 2 took place by the pool. It was superb. The service was faultless and the food was delicious. The hotel turned a special evening into a very, very special and unforgettable one.

My recommendation would be to book your trips through the hotel for guaranteed safe transport and excellent guides.

General comments: we stayed for 5 nights in a Deluxe River King which was spacious and very comfortable. The rooms are in keeping with the style of the hotel and to some guests that may mean "dated" but for us were just right. All the staff, without exception, were helpful and smiling (we were even advised to make sure we wore a hat and took suncream on our trips!). Breakfast was buffet style with a wide choice and, again, excellent service. We also ate in the restaurant where again food and service were superb. The pool area is large with a pool bar and plenty of sun loungers. The gardens are beautifully kept and the hotel has its own herb and vegetable plot. The bar is very pleasant with almost a Hercule Poirot feel to it.

It is only a 20-25 minute stroll to the Citadel across the river and about 30 mins to the Dong Ba Market. We also walked along the promenade in the evening and it was interesting to see all the locals playing badminton, basketball or takyan.

We also discovered the Le Cercle Sportif restaurant and rooftop bar situated just along the promenade. We made a reservation through the website. On arrival, we were surprised to find one or two hotel staff there. It is owned by the same group as the hotel and some staff rotate between the restaurant and the hotel. The restaurant is well worth a visit and I will be completing a separate review of it.

Although all the staff in the hotel were brilliant, a special thank you to Nguyet who dealt with all my enquiries before, and during, the stay. Also, when she knew we were travelling to Hoi An after our stay in Hue, she researched some things for us to do. One recommendation was the Teh Dar Show. Nguyet booked our seats and sent us our tickets (as it happened, the best seats in the house!). I cannot thank her enough for making our holiday throughly enjoyable and memorable.

To sum up, the stay here was almost as if we had been transported back in time to the days of an unhurried, relaxing holiday in a charming residence with personal, faultless service.

title: A Really Enjoyable Stay
comment:
We stayed four nights here in a River King Deluxe Room.
Location is excellent. It takes only 25mins to walk or 7 mins by taxi to the Citadel. The hotel style is best described as ‘colonial’.
All the staff we met were delightful, spoke very good English and were pleasant and eager to help. Ms Thi had been exceptionally helpful with our Reservation process. Our room was an unusual design, with a separate sitting area, and a large balcony. Everything was spotlessly clean, and the room well equipped, with the exception of an iron and ironing board, which are readily available on request. We were warned on check in about construction on the adjacent river bank and possible noise issues, but what little noise we experienced was not obtrusive, and did not affect our sleep or impact our enjoyment of the hotel. We used the hotel Limo service to drive to Da Nang Airport at the end of our stay. The drive took just over 2 hours and the driver, Mr Khoa, was excellent, very safe, and gave us no uncomfortable moments, which in the Vietnamese traffic is no mean feat!
We would happily return to the Azerai Hué and would highly recommend it.

title: A little bit of luxury overlooking the Perfume River.
comment: This hotel was wonderful. It was bright and spacious and in excellent condition. Our room was wonderful - looking over the river. The pool and pool bar was beautiful - salt water! Every employee was nicer than the next. The breakfast and room service was excellent as were the martinis!

title: Superb service in old-world charm
comment:
Probably the best hotel/resort in Hue. Colonial history and architecture sets the tone for a true 5-star experience, and the staff know exactly how to uphold that service. Food was mostly just okay, but extremely well-presented. However my Beef Tournedos was one of the best steaks I've eaten! The Perfume River Suite had a massive two-corner terrace with sunset and river views that made our stay truly special.

Location: Directly on the brand new (and expanding) river promenade for an evening stroll. Only a few other restaurants nearby however.

Disliked · Our first room Deluxe King with River View felt small and had only one air con vent for two rooms - causing one room to be freezing while the other was warm. We paid to move to a larger room - which we enjoyed immensely!

title: Highly recommended
comment: We loved our stay at the Azerai. We were grateful to be able to swim at the end of hot day of sightseeing. The hotel is full of old world charm and the rooms are very comfortable. But it’s the service that really makes the place. Vy at the front desk gave us many restaurant recommendations and all of them were wonderful. Everyone was so friendly and helpful which added to the experience. Thank you for a wonderful holiday!

title: Well choose your room currently
comment:
Very nice hotel with a staff available and going out of their way to resolve small inconveniences. A quality breakfast a very nice dinner. Beautiful pool But currently important works along the river with excavators and therefore the view and noise that goes with it. Choose your room if you take river view because at the moment some rooms have above all a view of the construction site.
Side street a little louder.
SPA very nice

title: Nice hotel nearby the city center!
comment: We liked the hotel a lot, but the room was a bit outdated. It's nearby the city center and a very nice park to walk around. Lots of activities during the night with boats on the river. The hotel breakfast is amazing. Can definitely recommend staying here.

title: Great service wonderful Art Deco hotel
comment: What an amazing entrance, feels like we stumbled into a Poirot novel, just lovely. Rooms are clean bit a little dated and only a curtain for the bathroom door. Great hotel, lovely pool area, great breakfast and service from Reception. Nia welcomed us so well but star of the show is Oahn,the bar tender. What a lovely man, made beautiful cocktails and when we were sitting outside, came to spray us with mosquito lotion, just in case! We didnt get bitten, thank you to Oahn, you are a wonderful man.

title: Absolutely perfect
comment:
What a sublime establishment!
A real nugget.
With your eyes closed, we can book.
An impeccable service
From the staff the most attentive
Comfortable room
Quality restaurant
Great location to go for a walk
And art deco buildings... a joy!
Thank you.

title: Very nice welcome
comment: Very nice hotel (for common areas), remarkably held. The room was sober, international style (a bit of a shame). What we appreciated most was the hotel staff who are very professional and very friendly.

title: Two Days in Hue
comment: We had a great experience at La Residence. We got upgraded to an amazing suite that had a living room and a separate large Bathroom. It had access to a large deck that was incredible. The restaurant was excellent and had an excellent dinner as well as breakfast. The service could not be beat and I would recommend this hotel to anyone going to Hue.

title: Warmest service !
comment:
I had the pleasure of staying at Azerai La Résidence, Huế during your 7th anniversary celebration, and I must say — every detail contributed to a truly memorable experience. Choosing to stay
atAzerai was undoubtedly the right decision.

From the moment of check-in to the spa services, bar, in-room dining, and the complimentary bicycle service — every aspect exceeded my expectations. A solid 10/10.

I would like to extend my sincere thanks to Ms. Thi (Reservations), Ms. Nguyet, and Mr. Thinh from the Front Office team. Their warm hospitality made me feel genuinely welcomed and valued, even during a complimentary stay using a voucher — a situation that can sometimes feel uncomfortable at other properties, but certainly not here.

There is just one suggestion I would like to make for future improvement: I recommend installing a bike chain guard. Unfortunately, my pants were stained by chain grease, and the marks have proven difficult to remove.

Thank you once again for such a wonderful stay. I look forward to returning soon

title: Amazing hotel!!!
comment:
Great hotel, great service. Great massage from Mrs. Kim Anh + Ms. Sv.

Restaurant and pool are also amazing, all in all it’s very relaxing. Good cocktails, great lobster. Nice spacious room, good bathroom, nice balcony and quite close to the city.

Would recommend!

title: Such a Lovely Experience
comment:
Oh, my, the Azerai La Residence in Hue is a lovely hotel! Our room was perfect - a twin room overlooking the garden. Not just for its loveliness, the Azerai stands out for me among our hotels in Vietnam - while I was there I needed to recover from a gastro issue that developed from a meal I ate at the Hanoi airport on my way there.
The Azerai was a perfect place to lay low. As soon as one of the restaurant staff at the breakfast buffet learned i was sick she made me some ginger tea, which I then drank morning, noon and evening for the duration of my stay, along with their beautiful Pho and noodles. Thank goodness! I became ill about half way through our trip and I credit the care and appropriate meal choices at the Azerai with healing me. Although I wasn't able to, my friend enjoyed complimentary drinks in the bar, swimming in the pool and the fabulous breakfast buffet. There were so many little treats at the Azerai, one of which was the doorbell ringing each late afternoon with a gift of cookies in a small treasure box. Every staff member we met in the hallways or restaurant greeted us with kind smiles and regard. Honestly, I can't say enough about how much we enjoyed staying at the Azerai in Hue. Highly recommended!

title: Excellent stay with colonial flair
comment: The Azerai La Résidence is a historic Art Deco colonial hotel in the center of Hué. Guest service is excellent and Ms. Nguyet made our stay a very memorable one. I would also like to mention Khoa our driver for a one-day tour around Hué and the transfer service to Hoi An. He speaks very well English, he is attentive and a careful and safe driver.

title: Elegance in Hue
comment: Elegant, colonial-style luxury hotel. With attention to detail, it´s very well located nearby the river. Rooms are very well sized and breakfast is fantastic. We stayed for 2 nights and enjoyed also the pool and the gym. Definitely the place to stay when in Hue, away from the noisy night life yet close to the river corniche. Staff was always very helpful finding us a great limousin transport to Hoi An.

title: Terrific hotel - great service and gracious hospitality
comment: Azerai La Residence is no doubt the best hotel in Hue. It is stylish, comfortable, impeccably clean, offers wonderful service, and does its best to cater to all your needs. The room - we upgraded to a king bed when we arrived - was spotless, with an excellent bed, linens, teas, and coffee. Our suite had a seating area and balcony - lovely. The breakfast is excellent - they have GF options on request. The bar is also terrific, with classic and new cocktails. We opted to eat dinner at a table at the bar as we wanted a light supper the few nights we were there. The front desk is marvelous - they organized a last minute day tour to Da Nang and Hoi Ann via the Hai Van Pass - great day out with a fantastic and knowledgeable driver. Yes, the hotel is elegant, and nice, but what sets it apart is the great service. Wonderful, relaxing stay.

title: Art deco experience in Hue
comment: Fantastic service provided at Azerai, especially our private driver Khoa who took us to the Citadel and some of the nearby tombs. Loved the hotel’s art-deco architecture. The only issue we had related to the booked river-view room only to find that there were building works next door and no river view. We ended up changing rooms so all ended well.

title: Greatest Hue Hotel & Spa
comment:
Hotel: wow! What a great relic of yesteryear!! This fabulously appointed art deco hotel recalls airs of a roaring 20’s movie set.
Staff is super attentive& really cares- not just looking for extra tip.
Food is a good array of offerings in western style. Did a cooking class that was fun- went to market for views only as all products produced here are from clean, fresh& organic vendors via supermarkets of food distributors.

Champagnes are a bit exotic in offerings but really do the job.
Concierge arranged a great 1/2 days tour w/ hote car which was amazing as it has been very hot 35’& humid.

SPA: Anh & Kimanh treated my love and I to a great thai and Swedish massage then had just reset in just the right way. After a hot& humid day of walking through the Imperial City, what a delight!
ProTip: ask to have extra 15minutes to clean up in large private bathroom.
Experience ended with fresh glass of orange juice and good feels.

March/April 2025- Restaurant being built next door so there are construction sights& sounds from 8am-5pm but Hotel is super attentive to this & made great strides to overcome this annoyance for the ladies. I loved seeing the whole site rapidly developing over these days.

title: The people are the culture
comment: As a new “affordable luxury” brand from the mastermind of Amanresorts promising immersive experiences in local culture, I was very curious to stay at the Azerai. On first impression the hotel’s location in a restored colonial mansion on the Perfume River delivered. We stayed in a deluxe river view room in the newer wing (supposedly quieter as away from the street). The bed was very comfortable but the furnishings felt a bit “corporate purchasing office” and too big for the space. The focus really seemed on getting the guest out of the room and partaking of the stunning spa, gym and wellness facilities and local activities. Unlike a lot of other hotels where you feel like they are hawking tours just to get a commission, it’s clear they put a lot of thought into the itinerary and guides they work with to deliver a very personal and enriching experience. But the standout quality of the Azerai Hue that would make me come back is the service. The sincerity, kindness and integrity we encountered from the general manager down to the employee who outfitted us with bikes provided perhaps the most profound insight and immersion into the culture and people of Hue.

title: Delicious romantic culinary
comment:
Lovely hotel with excellent food and top service.
Lovely terrace overlooking the perfume river.
The location is perfect for the city 10 min on foot and also for performances on the river .
Also much for free like welcome drink and massage for 15 min.
We did 2 cruises high tea and gastronomy highly recommended.

title: A splendid hotel
comment: This used to be the French Governor’s Residence and the beautiful art deco building has been tastefully restored and extended. The staff are highly attentive and our suite was light and spacious with an amazing terrace. We would certainly return if we were in the area again. Thanks to all the staff for making our stay so enjoyable

title: A delightful, relaxing few days We were exceptionally well looked after by the staff, especially Khoa, our driver who speaks goo
comment: It is a beautiful hotel which afforded us a relaxing experience. We ate in the restaurant twice because the food was delicious. We received a warm welcome, and all the staff were exceedingly attentive. There were lovely treats delivered to your room each day which we enjoyed.

title: A 5* hotel that knows how to be a 5*
comment:
5* from beginning to end. A beautiful hotel with amazing service. We only had 2 nights in Hue, so didn't get to spend as much time in the hotel as we would have liked as we had day trips pre-planned. Everything about the hotel exudes quality from the moment you walk in. The staff are attentive and super helpful. The pillow menu, in the superbly comfortable and very well appointed bedroom, was something new on my travels :-) The breakfast is amazing, the selection and quality of a standard that deserves 5* recognition on its own. We ate dinner in the restaurant on one night, again the food was delicious. The weather wasn't suitable for the pool but we did use the gym which was well ventilated and air-conditioned with decent equipment and all one would expect.

There was construction work going on behind the hotel when we were there and we were given a complimentary drink/cocktail in the bar as compensation for any possible disturbance, of which there was none.

Highly recommend.

title: Superb hotel in French Colonial style.
comment:
Fantastic hotel - we loved it from the moment we walked it. Stylish, French colonial building sensitivity restored with lovely features. The staff were all extremely friendly and helpful. We used the spa steam room/sauna (at no additional cost) which was prepared just for us...a wonderfully relaxing treat (although men and women have their own separate facilities).
The bar was pretty relaxed, we enjoyed a couple of cocktails before dinner. Breakfast was amazing with plenty of choice from local to international options. Highly recommend Azerai Hotel.

title: Massage
comment:
Very relaxing
Ms Kim anh did very nice job
Would recommend
Peaceful setting and very pleasant staff
If you stay will recommend booking massage!!!!
Will be coming back again soon!!!
They give you tea before and oj afterwards
My back feels much better

title: Am amazing experience in Hué.
comment: The amenities, food and, especially, the services at Azerai are exceptional! They changed our room, even though we did not explicitly ask for it. They realised that we enjoy high quality teas and without us asking, went to get a few for us. They even offered us two free massages for the « inconvenience » of having had to change room, even though it was them who had taken the initiative, seeing us unhappy with the choice of room we had been awarded. The hotel also has exceptional food, a beautiful design and an amazing pool. We loved our stay at Azerai!

title: Healthy and Healing — wonderful Spa in Hue, Vietnam at AZERAI LA RESIDENCE
comment: The spa at AZERAI in Hue, Vietnam is first rate. Massage therapist KIM ANH is an exceptional professional. The entire experience — from arrival being welcomed with warm towels and tea to the refreshments offered as I was preparing to leave — was healing, rejuvenating, and relaxing.

title: Perfection
comment:
This stunning Art Deco hotel has not only a great location but the staff are simply wonderful.

We also indulged at the spa and our therapists miss FO and Trang were so good we fell asleep.

Nothing was too much trouble and we can highly recommend.

title: Perfect way to relax after exploring Hue
comment: A trip to the spa at Azerai was the perfect way to relax after a busy day exploring the wonderful city of Hue. I had a fabulous Swedish massage with Trang. If you like a firm deep tissue pick “medium” and it will be as firm as anything anywhere! My body felt rejuvenated!! I loved the fresh squeezed orange juice at the end of the treatment. Plus the sauna and steam room before hand. I give Trang and the wonderful staff at this incredible hotel my highest praise!

title: OTTIMO HOTEL
comment: Hotel a bit outside the center, but very nice. Elegant structure, friendly and knowledgeable staff. The breakfast was great. Nice and spacious rooms. Impeccable cleanliness. Center reachable in 10 minutes by taxi. Definitely the best hotel in town

title: Massages at the Azerai La Residence
comment:
Had the pleasure of having a massage by Ms. Suong, that ended with the traditional Tibetan singing bowl done my Mr. Duy.

The massage was very soothing and relaxing and the singing bowls seemed to settle the relaxation of the massage. All with all a very pleasant experience and would recommend it to others.

All of this was organised by the kindest Ms. Kim. Who greets you with a big smile and great hospitality.

title: Very disappointing compared to Azeraikanto. The location and architecture were very good.
comment:
The Azerai in Kanto was so good that I tried to stay here too, but to be honest, I was expecting too much.

Good location along the river (especially if you want to enter Hue by train, it's about a five-minute walk!)
The architectural atmosphere is also good.
But it felt like it wasn't as good a performance as it was priced. The reason:

(1) An uncle stands at the entrance, but he is oblivious to the arrival of the guests and ends up walking past them.
(2) When I checked in, I was told that the restaurant serves dinner as well as breakfast, but when I asked to have dinner that day, they said, "Because it is a private business for a wedding, dinner is not open, but will be served at the lobby bar."
(3) I was looking forward to booking the river view, but when I arrived, the revetment was under construction, the noise was unpleasant, including in the early morning, and the scenic river view was ruined.

As for (2) and (3), the hotel should have known in advance,
I could have put it on the website, or emailed it to the person who made the reservation beforehand. I thought it would be inappropriate not to be informed until I arrived on the day, and as for (2), I should at least avoid being told that I was also serving dinner.

Although the location and architecture were very good, we noticed only the other unfortunate aspects of service,
It was very disappointing compared to Azerai Kanto, where the service was very good.

title: A luxurious retro art deco bracket that transports us out of time.
comment: Art Deco retro atmosphere. Impeccable service and very attentive. Spacious rooms in pure art deco style but revisited to ensure the best comfort to its guests. Exceptional breakfast without forgetting the Spa Session with SU that put me back on my toes after the long walks. Everything was on top.

title: Excellent
comment: Very enjoyable stay here in Hue with this fabulous hotel and staff. Everything was wonderful and the bar manager (we are touring and I apologise for forgetting his name) provided us with excellent service served with fun! All hotel facilities here are superb

title: Great spa experience
comment: Fantastic spa treatment with Trang. It was very relaxing with a perfect level of pressure. I would highly recommend and it is consistent with the very good level of service in this hotel. Hope to be back again soon. Thank you very much Trang! :)

title: Relaxing and Therapeutic Massage
comment:
I have had many massages in the States. This was my first in Vietnam. Anh’s touch was remarkable. Firm pressure relieved the pain which had been getting worse as I toured this friendly, energetic country.

The Azerai’s spa is a quiet, meditative setting, with lotus tea upon arrival and freshly squeezed orange juice at the end of the visit. Overall a classy and professional experience.

title: Excellent
comment:
Beautiful hotel in a colonial mansion on the banks of the fragrant river.
Comfortable rooms equipped with every comfort. Excellent and knowledgeable staff. Great breakfast buffet.
Beautiful spa with Turkish bath and sauna is a wide range of treatments. Recommended!

title: Spa treatment
comment:
Enjoyed a superb spa treatment at the wonderful hands of Sia: Trang & Anh. Many thanks for undoing the knots in my aching neck and back. The head and scalp massage was so nice to end with. My wife thoroughly enjoyed her leg and foot massage and is now floating in the air. Many’s thanks.
Kevin & Sally P

title: Excellence
comment: There is no better place to stay in Hue. The hotel is beautiful, peaceful and across the bridge from the Imperial City. We stayed 2 nights and had plenty of time to walk around and see the main attractions. The pool is amazing, service is 5 star and the staff is really attentive and caring. We loved our stay!

title: Very average and not 5 star
comment:
Nice enough building and rooms but a little blighted by some work in the neighbourhood at the moment.
However…. A few problems.
When the restraint is busy it’s unbearably noisy. The buffet is average. The clearing stations are in the restaurant so there’s a constant clatter of plates and cutlery as the staff clear up. It would be simple to fix.
We asked on arrival for a restaurant recommendation, we were given one and wanted to go there the next evening. When I asked a different person to book she I believe deliberately booked a different one despite me asking for the first one…. So confusion followed. It was pretty obvious they were incentivised to book us Madame Thu instead. She was rather insistent until we insisted on Banh Gánh which was really good. One for management to watch out that restaurants are not incentivising the staff overtly.
Very average stay, bit disappointed.
Wouldn’t recommend nor stay there again.

title: Wonderful stay with a beautiful spa
comment: Excellent hotel, top service, the friendliest staff and amazing affordable massages. Food for both breakfast and dinner very good. Trang and Anh from the spa team were very talented and even went beyond the allocated time for our 90 minute Vietnamese massages

title: A charming boutique stay in Hue
comment:
This is a beautifully decorated boutique hotel with equally charming staff. From the moment I entered the welcoming and spacious lobby area, I knew I had made the right choice in staying here for my visit to Hue.
I stayed two nights and would have happily stayed longer in the double room with a roll top bath which is just as pictured. Clean spacious room with all the amenities included in the shower area plus robes.
Quality linen on bed and the mattress is softer than most places I stayed in Vietnam.
Easy check in process and hotel communicated with me as soon as they got the booking so were expecting me. Hotel accepts bank cards.
Any requests to hotel staff were dealt with promptly and with a smile. Efficient on site laundry service.
I used the onsite sauna which was highly welcome after a day out visiting the sites.
It is located on a quiet street close to the river (about 5 minute walk) and about 15 minutes walk from Walking Street.

Some areas visitors should note:

No elevator on site so may not be suitable for anyone with a mobility issues.
No breakfast on site but plenty of choices around the corner.
I found the sauna area was not as clean and tidy as other areas of the hotel so this may need checking by cleaning staff more frequently.
Cleaning staff leave their cleaning trolley on 2nd floor BLOCKING the FIRE exit which is a major health and safety issue

Whilst there are some niggles, I would still highly recommend and would stay here again if in Hue.

title: Boutique place to stay in...Hue!
comment: Cute boutique hotel with a lovely mezzanine room. The room was perfect with all the amenities you need. The hotel is located a pleasant 15-20mins walk from the Citadel and sightseeing places, and the same distance to the restaurants & bars of the bustling Hue bar street, in the opposite direction. However, there were several places to eat and grab a coffee right outside the hotel. There was a cute, and our fav, coffee place for Vietnamese egg coffee right opposite! The staff at the hotel were really lovely, welcoming and friendly. My only negative, was that there was no TV to watch, every was through Youtube but we weren't here to watch TV but to explore wonderful Hue. All in all the hotel was great and amazing value for money. We def recommend The Chum Boutique as a place to stay in Hue

title: Pleasant four night stay at Chum’s Boutique Hotel
comment:
We picked Chum’s for its great location, and the staff were lovely, friendly and welcoming. It’s definitely a bit different, quirky even as far as hotels are concerned. Overall we were happy with our choice but like other reviewers there are some things to note before booking;

- there’s no elevator, not a problem for us as we’re fit and able to do 3 flights of stairs with luggage
- it can be a bit noisy and there’s not much soundproofing
- no breakfast available but lots of options locally and one morning the receptionist even sent out for some Ban Mi for us but lots of good breakfast options nearby in the street or the adjacent street to Chum’s or if you’re happy to walk 5-10 minutes I would recommend Cafe on Thu Wheels.
- the mattresses on the beds are quite hard but you sort of get used to it.
- there’s a sauna in the basement that guests can use but we didn’t.
- We’d booked a duplex room but didn’t really need the second bed as only two of us (think it must have been the only room available when we booked). I would seriously worry about a child or elderly person using the mezzanine level though as it involves having to go up and down the spiral staircase. See photos!

The room we had also had a bath which we didn’t feel like using, it’s a shame in a way as it compromises the useable space in the room so the shower room and toilet are small but other guests may love having a bath as well as a shower. Would recommend a stay but we might try a different room next time.

title: Superb view
comment:
The charm of this hotel is its view from the room but especially from the roof terrace and pool!!
The staff was very professional and pleasant, at the front desk, at the bar and at the restaurant for breakfast.
The room was spacious, the bed huge and comfortable, everything was clean and upscale.
The location is disappointing, however, far from the city center of Hue 4km with major roads to get there (use of Grab to plan to go out), no restaurant, nor any place of interest in the immediate vicinity of the hotel.

title: INCREDIBLE breakfast buffet!
comment:
I was not expecting such a high level of hospitality! This property doesn't seem to obviously market itself as a 5-Star luxury hotel, so although I was expecting it to be nice, I wasn't prepared to be blown away, which I absolutely was. Hospitality was consistently warm and enthusiastic. My corner room was beautiful and extremely comfortable, with wrap around views and a perfect bed in which I had a beautiful, deep night's sleep.

Breakfast was FANTASTIC. Not only was it very varied with Vietnamese and Western fare as is expected, but every dish I tried was delicious! This is extremely rare for breakfast buffets of any caliber because the chefs have to prepare so many different kinds of dishes and inevitably cannot make everything perfect, but the chefs at La Vela Hue come shockingly close! This was easily one of the best breakfast buffets I've had in any hotel. And the breakfast staff were all smiles despite the chaos and crush of guests. Their warmth made my morning. 🥰

I will absolutely be coming back to this wonderful hotel next time I'm in Hue.

title: Good modern hotel what a lobby
comment:
Modern well appointed hotel .. great bathroom and lobby
I would recommend it and stay here again

title: 5 ⭐️ facilities but disappointing hospitality
comment:
The room itself was absolutely beautiful and truly felt like a 5-star stay spacious spotless & very comfortable. Breakfast was excellent with a wide choice & many of the staff were friendly and attentive.
However the overall experience was let down by how unwelcoming it felt at times. Being asked to pay in full before the stay set an uncomfortable tone followed by a strong emphasis on rules & potential extra charges. It was also disappointing to be billed about using just two bottles of water from the minibar on the first day which felt unnecessary for a hotel of this standard.
What we appreciated least was being offered free tickets to the Imperial City in exchange for leaving a 5-star review on Trip Advisor. This felt very inappropriate & undermined trust especially as I like many others rely on honest genuine TripAdvisor reviews when choosing where to stay. While the hotel itself is beautiful the approach to hospitality & transparency did not fully reflect a true 5-star experience.

title: Nice hotel in Ancient Capital
comment:
A good hotel in Hue, new and cosy. The design was quite impressive. Room is comfortable. Staff are nice.
Things the hotel can improve should be the details in room : The water pressure at the washbasin seemed too strong than it should be. On the other hand, we had to wait for at least 5 minutes to have hot water in the shower stall. Needless to say, only cold water as we started taking shower and it was not a pleasant experience.
Did not have chance to enjoy the pool but trust it is a selling point of the hotel.

title: A Luxurious and Unforgettable Stay
comment:
The moment I stepped through the sleek glass doors of La Vela Hue, excitement flickered through me. Bright white walls, bursts of blue tile, and friendly reception staff told me I was somewhere purposefully fresh and very much alive.

Inside my suite space stretched out, almost theatrically generous, every edge gleaming as if the cleaners had just departed. Morning light brazenly flooded the room, and I kept drifting back to the window, stunned by how the roofs and rivers of Hue swirled beneath me like a re-playable postcard.

Then there was the rooftop pool, a shallow basin of glass that floats at the very top of the building. Bathing there at dawn brought misty silhouettes to sharp focus, but slipping in again at sunset, with the streets below pinned with tiny lanterns, felt like being wrapped in a mobile treasure.

What sticks with me long after I checked out is the crew who looked after me. They moved through the day with real warmth, cracking jokes at the front desk and nudging me toward the best local spots without sounding rehearsed. A quick smile there, an extra towel here, and suddenly the place felt less like a hotel and more like a late-night chat with neighbors you want to hug goodbye.

La Vela Hue Hotel nails that tricky blend of wow-factor and coziness; polished finishes sit side-by-side with staff who clearly love the city they call home. I packed up with a silly grin because, for a few blissful days, the room felt like a corner of my own living room dressed in silk curtains and perfect climate control. If your idea of a win is slipping into peace yet still hearing the pulse of Hue just outside the window, book it-Ill be trying to swipe the same dates next spring.

title: Very nice
comment: The service was very good at the hotel and restaurant, especially by Xuan Nhi. The rooms were also very clean, whilst food was very good. The hotel also has many decent facilities like a gym or infinity pool, which were enjoyable to relax and enjoy.

title: Exceptional staff
comment: The staff were exceptional. So very kind, friendly and helpful. Nothing was too much trouble. The room was very clean and to a high standard. The food on the hotel was very tasty. The shuttle bus was really good and took you to a good location in the city.

title: Great stay in Hue
comment:
Great stay at this hotel. Rooms were large and well appointed. Staff was very helpful and friendly. Restaurant was excellent with many local foods. Food was delicious.
It was close to many of the historical sights,
Ould recommend this hotel for a visit to Hue.

title: Beautiful japanese style resort
comment: I am glad I picked this beautiful resort during my vacation in Hue. The resort is a lil bit far from the center but you do not need to go anywhere. Everything in the resort includes fabulous onsen, delicious buffet, large lake with many koi fish. I highly recommend this place for people who want to enjoy peaceful atmosphere .

title: Good service
comment: Nice hotel,good service,good food

title: Great place, nice to rest and reset
comment: Everything was extraordinary

title: Clean, quiet resort — perfect for relaxing
comment:
Overall, it’s a clean and peaceful resort, great if you just want to relax and get away from the city. I really liked how well everything was maintained, and the villas are super nice and comfortable.
The staff were good overall, but it would be even better if the reception team were a bit more friendly.
Breakfast was okay, nothing too special. Local dishes like bun bo Hue weren’t that great, so if you want to try proper local food, I’d recommend going outside.
Since there’s a lot of greenery around, there are quite a few insects, so just keep that in mind.

title: Very relaxing place
comment: It was a good stay worth for the money five star service specially Khanh he s very helpful high recommend 👍

title: Staying at Kobi Onsen Resort
comment:
I had a really memorable and fun stay at KOBI Onsen Resort Huế, Affiliated by Melia. You can say that you are impressed by the quiet, peaceful space of a resort located far from the center of Huế. The onsen area is extremely clean, warm mineral water is pleasant, recommended for those who travel to heal, reset themselves.
The staff here is friendly, has a friend of the Yellow Light reception enthusiastically supported him from the time of check-in, introducing clear information. Overall, this is an ideal place to relax, relax and enjoy the peaceful space. I will definitely come back and recommend it to friends and relatives.

title: Short stay at Kobi Onsen
comment: The service was very good and the staff was very nice especially Ngọc and Trung.

title: Good service.
comment: Good service, sister's reception and Mr. Central support staff are very cute, our spouse is very happy

title: Good.
comment: Very good service, enthusiastic staff, super good take-care spouse

Everything in the resort includes fabulous onsen, delicious buffet, large lake with many koi fish. I highly recommend this place for people who want to enjoy peaceful atmosphere .

title: Good service.
comment: Good service, sister's reception and Mr. Central support staff are very cute, our spouse is very happy

title: Good.
comment: Very good service, enthusiastic staff, super good take-care spouse

title: Beautiful and authentic hotel
comment: Exceptional hotel in a typical style. We stayed in the garden part. The room was beautiful wooden and traditional. In a very quiet area and not far from the Perfume River. Very good restaurant.

title: Perfect oasis of Vietnamese beauty and culture.
comment: Exquisite, enchanting and peaceful. Lovely foot massage, gorgeous tea and beautiful swim upon arrival. The scent of gardenias and lemongrass.

title: Gorgeous and elegant
comment: Gorgeous, peaceful, quiet, comfortable, romantic, elegant, boutique hotel nestled within a very nice walkable residential neighborhood. Lots of foliage, 2 beautiful restaurants, one bar, 2 pools (one may be long enough to swim laps but we didn't), massage and other salon services on premises. Such a nice respite from the busy streets and sights. Staff was amazing and attentive. Room was beautiful, large, comfortable, with a little hidden sitting porch. I would definitely stay here again.

title: A lovely setting for a meal
comment: We visited Hue garden villa’s restaurant after our guidebook recommended it. It was a lovely experience, and there was a vegetarian menu. We had lovely cocktails too, including a mango based one which was just delicious! It’s more expensive than other local restaurants but the food is presented beautifully and it’s a nice setting.

title: Ancienthue hotel
comment: This is a very special peaceful hotel. Intimate with excellent service and dining in quiet part of Hue. Highly recommended.

title: Zen and exceptional
comment: We came only to have lunch in this "hidden" place in a narrow alley and when we enter, the first feeling is "Gorgeous". We enter a green setting where calm and zenitude reign. We have not seen the rooms but from the outside they look sublime. The welcome is very courteous and very classy. The interior of the restaurant is sober and classy. We were in a group with a pre-established menu and this is one of the two best meals we have had since arriving in Vietnam, 6 days. The food was fine and very tasty. A magnificent establishment to do if you come to Hue, at minimum for lunch.

title: Fabulous stay at Hue
comment: Wow, what a nice hotel. One of the best if not the best in Hue. Our host was Que, who was so helpful and polite we felt right at home. The hotel, garden and accommodation are top notch, simply beautiful and well kept, the rooms are fabulous, large and furnish authenticity. If ever in Hue I will not hesitate to book this 5 star hotel again and again. All an all a very exciting stay.

title: Magic tucked away
comment: An absolutely amazing hotel, situated not too far from the city centre. Tucked away is this gem. Ensure you save some time to indulge the hotel while you are staying here, a stellar service as well. Highly recommend

title: Perfect step back in time
comment:
​If you are looking for a stay that feels less like a hotel and more like a step back into a refined, poetic era of Vietnamese history, the Ancient Garden Houses in Hue are an absolute must.
​From the moment you enter the grounds, you are struck by the stunning architecture. These traditional nha ruong (wood-paneled houses) are masterpieces of craftsmanship. The intricate carvings, dark timber beams, and open-air layouts create a seamless flow between the indoors and the lush, manicured gardens. It’s rare to find a place that feels so historically authentic while remaining impeccably preserved.
​The Highlights
​Exquisite Rooms: The rooms are beautiful, balancing rustic heritage with modern comfort. Waking up to the view of pomelo trees and lotus ponds through handcrafted wooden shutters is an experience I won’t soon forget.
​Atmospheric Grounds: The "garden" aspect isn't just a name; the landscaping is intentional and serene, following the traditional Feng Shui principles that Hue is famous for.
​Amazing Service: What truly elevates the stay is the staff. The service was amazing—warm, attentive, and deeply knowledgeable. They treat you with the grace of a guest in a private home rather than just a traveler in a room.
​Verdict: This isn't just a place to sleep; it’s a living museum of Hue’s soul. Whether you are a fan of architecture or just someone looking for deep tranquility, this property is a sanctuary.
​I highly recommend booking a traditional tea ceremony on-site if they offer it during your stay!

title: A blissful weekend .
comment: A tranquil and peaceful hotel which is very tastefully laid out - beautiful rooms and amazing swimming pools with landscaped gardens - a gem!

title: Beautiful resort and very friendly staff
comment: Incredibly beautiful grounds and very well maintained garden. Our villa was just fantastic. Extremely friendly staff. Man feels welcome!

title: Delightful hotel
comment:
Really enjoyed our stay!
The room (#19) is large and comfortable with lots of space and a great bathroom.
The restaurant is excellent and a real highlight. Great breakfast and dinner! And reasonable prices for the cocktails too!
Take a massage too and enjoy the pools!

title: A haven of peace
comment:
A great address in Hue.
Slightly off-center but still about thirty minutes walk from the imperial city, the hotel is in a very quiet area.
The hotel is really nice, exemplary cleanliness and welcoming and smiling staff.
The hotel restaurant is very good.
An excellent address!

title: Nice stay in Hue
comment:
Very pleasant, quiet place to relax. The real jewel is the entire staff, so courteous, cheerful, they fulfill all wishes. Breakfast is excellent!
We felt very comfortable.

title: Absolutely wonderful and special hotel
comment:
Hotel is absolutely delightful. When booking you have the choice of a “French” styled or a “Vietnamese” styled room. We opted for the Vietnamese and felt we were experiencing an authentic old home- updated with all the comforts of a modern bath and good a/c. Staff was lovely: helpful, kind and wanting to make our stay special. We also had marvelous massages.

The hotel is situated in a quiet neighborhood close to the Citadel. (If touring The Citadel, get the audio guide; it was very informative. Private guides can be hit or miss depending on their language skills and historical/cultural knowledge. Audio guides solve those problems!) We walked there and enjoyed exploring a bit and even found a great place to drop off laundry for a very low cost. Tip: when traveling in SE Asia, there are usually overnight laundry services near most hotels that clean everything for a fraction of the hotel cost.

This hotel is a real winner in my book!

title: Fabulous setting and top quality cuisine
comment:
We booked this dinner to experience the ancient Hue cuisine in a setting fit for Royal guests and it didn’t disappoint.

From arrival to being seated, the service and the cuisine were all top class and certainly one to visit if you are in Hue.

They also offer a Royal banquet offering, where you can dress in regal attire (provided) and dine as the King’s guest would with a set menu and entertainment.

We opted for the more al la carte with dishes from ancient Hue’s Royal past with lavish settings and intimate service.

title: An oasis of peace, right in the historic district of downtown Hue
comment:
One minute you're driving through the lively center of Hue. And then suddenly there's the oasis called Ancient Hue Garden Houses. We felt spoiled, in every way.
A nice, spacious and quiet room, equipped with all amenities. A great spa with fantastic massages. A rich breakfast and extensive options for a fantastic culinary dinner with a choice of an extensive wine list with many interesting wines. We felt incredibly at home here!

title: Overrated
comment:
Really not sure who writes your reviews as this is not a 5 star hotel . We shared a similar experience to one of your other recent reviewers who commented on the outside noise from barking dogs and in our case croaking frogs in the middle of the night ! Whilst the offending frogs were removed this disturbed our sleep on more than one occasion. The swimming pools are tiny and not as depicted in the pictures.
The bathroom had nowhere to place a towel, no grab rail in shower or hook to hang a robe. Small details but nevertheless irritating. Apart from this our large bed was so hard that we asked for a topper to soften the mattress. The room itself was beautiful with adequate cupboard space for a 3 night visit such as ours.
The worst aspect of our stay was the disappointing breakfast which was à la carte and there was no buffet. Unappetising fruit was placed on a small side plate. Easily the worst breakfast at any hotel we visited on our journey through Vietnam . The French Restaurant was another disappointment as one course was returned as inedible although this was removed from our bill.
On the plus side the staff were lovely and did their utmost to rectify the issues we had during our stay .

title: Exquisite
comment:
My wife and I were lucky enough to stay at this superb boutique Hotel for two nights. It’s exquisite. The staff were excellent, attentive and friendly at all times, a special mention to Nhi Lê.
The massages in the Spa were fantastic. The food was delicious.
Perfectly located , away from the city but close enough to walk in. Not that we did as we just loved the calm hotel.

title: Our favorite in Vietnam
comment:
What a charm! As always impeccable staff and very kind.
Our room was a very large suite perfectly equipped decorated with very nice antiques. An air of Indochina! The gardens are beautiful as well as the pool. We are offered a superb tea per stay like we never had before, as well as a dream foot massage. The Vietnamese restaurant is very good.

title: Best experience in all of our Vietnam travels
comment: We stayed here with a lot of other friends and family members for our son’s wedding in Hue. Can’t say enough good things about this beautiful hotel/resort. We stayed in the Garden Houses and it was a big room with everything you would expect from a 5 star hotel. The two restaurants are great and the included breakfast is delicious. The hotel grounds are very well maintained and manicured. But the best thing about this hotel are the people that work there. We’ve stayed in many hotels in Vietnam last two years, and Vietnamese people are friendly and dedicated to their jobs. But the people that work here, from the folks at the entrance to the restaurant workers, the maids, to the people working the gardens and the super helpful front desk personnel, are at a different level. We had some minor sickness and the folks at the front desk went beyond our expectations to help us with a doctor and with staying an extra night. Thanks to all of you who made this trip unforgettable. If we come back to Hue, we are certainly staying here.

title: NOT customer friendly
comment: We stayed for two nights in this beautiful boutique garden hotel. Unfortunately, there is NO attention to customer service. Our introduction was them trying to sell us spa appointments except that they had none because of a corporate booking. Then, we ate dinner in their lovely French restaurant only to be given a survey before we got our check. The service was poor and we gave honest feedback only to be confronted about our feedback. So uncomfortable and unprofessional. We checked into an absolutely amazing suite of rooms only to discover that ours sat directly on the road. Avoid room number 8 unless you want to listen to a symphony of barking dogs, motor scooters and loud residents all night long. Today, we toured the city, returning in time for the promised happy hour only to find that happy hour had been cancelled due again to the fully booked hotel. This was a very DISAPPOINTING experience, not to be repeated.

title: Had a great stay and highly recommend
comment: Loved the hotel. Really nice big room with large bathroom and balcony overlooking pool. All the staff were lovely and helpful. Amazing couples massage. Had lunch in Vietnamese and dinner in French. Both great. Breakfast decent too. Grab easy to get into town and Citadel. Walked to Thien Mu Pagoda down the river (get to river side and then walk traffic free all the way down). Pool a bit cold for me but nice to cool off after days out. Would recommend and would stay again.

title: Like a mandarin house
comment:
We stayed two nights and this house really has exceptional character and authentic surroundings.
The atmosphere is an invitation to calm and very quickly we feel like in a cocoon
We had chosen to stay in the Vietnamese decorated part, everything is delicate, pieces of unique furniture, cushions and silk bed and special attention to the smallest details.
Always smiling
A foot massage offered
Courtesy kits in the bathrooms
Fresh fruit
Delicious tea and coffee not low-end bags
First-rate service
Restaurant and spa decorated with mother-of-pearl wood
I recommend this establishment with a lot of warmth where you will feel treated like a mandarin.

title: Look no further
comment: Ancient Hue Gardens is such an amazing, peaceful and iconic place to stay, the staff are all so incredibly friendly and helpful, the whole place is spotless, the food is amazing and the royal set menu!!! Get the costumes and experience an imperial degustation in style! We are so sad to be leaving. Thankyou so much for having us, Son and the team you are the best!

title: An exquisitely beautiful, comfortable hotel.
comment:
A very beautiful hotel that was also extremely comfortable. The food was also excellent - both the lovely breakfast in the Vietnamese restaurant and the dinner in the French restaurant.
The stand out however was the excellent staff. They were very attentive and helpful, without being overbearing or intrusive.

We will definitely stay here again the next time we visit Hue.

title: Beautiful property and warm, attentive service
comment: We had a fantastic stay here. The rooms are large and beautifully appointed. The staff is incredibly attentive and warm. Special thanks to Son, who took care of our every need, and made our stay especially memorable.

title: A tranquil slice of Hue
comment: Ancient Hue Garden Houses has an elegance and serenity to it that truly captures the history and culture of this beautiful city. The rooms were so gorgeous with a great ambiance that intersects between functionality and nature. The staff itself was top notch. Our every needs was taken care of. The staff was communicative and responded to all of my requests and inquiries via WhatsApp quickly. I was able to book spa appointments and laundry service without any issue or fuss. My spa treatment was amazing and honestly better than the ones I had in the states.

title: Beautiful Place to stay while on Hue
comment: What a beautiful place to stay! The rooms are beautiful, comfortable and have everything you need. The staff is great, the breakfast is fantastic and the French restaurant in house is good.

title: A paradise, staff dedicated service to you
comment: What an attention! I got sick from earlier in my trip. Everytime they were asking about my conditions. I had to go buy some meds, they sent their staff to get them for me! During our lunches and dinner, we had a dedicated server, always next to our table for anything we needed. The facilities, oh my God, so pretty, well maintained, rhe value was exceptional for what you have onsite and the service. 3 restaurants onsite. Rooms are cleaned 2-3 times a day, they alway keeping you with still water. It is just 20 min walk to Hue Imperial Palace. They all went abobe and beyond in courtesy and attention. Thank you, thank you for a wonderful experience.

title: REFINEMENT & DELICACY
comment:
This property is a wonder in many ways.
First of all the place, the rooms, the outdoor spaces, the decoration are of beauty, of an incredible timer. No false notes. Everything is delicate and so refined.
Attention to detail is everywhere!

Then the staff, as friendly, friendly as professional. Whether at the reception, in the restaurant, in the room or in the gardens. A high-end staff without obsequity!

The restaurant is very good, as well as breakfast. Beautiful and hearty dishes.

We enjoyed all the delicate attention including that of a free and delicious tea-time.

The most beautiful place of our stay.

title: Very nice boutique hotel in Hue
comment: Nice, personal boutique hotel in Hue. Simple but nice and clean rooms. There are 2 small pools and good food. A good base to explore the city.

title: Beautiful traditional hotel complex in Hue
comment:
Beautiful traditional quiet hotel complex on the outskirts of town with very courteous service.
We stayed in a real old garden house, which had the charm of the last century but still had all the comforts you could wish for. Located on the edge of town but by taxi / Grab(Uber) you are in a few minutes.
The restaurant is highly recommended for both the tasty a la carte breakfast and the really delicious dinner. We can highly recommend for a visit. Despite the rainy season we felt very comfortable

Fantastic. Beautiful hotel, friendly staff and delicious food.

Wish we could have stayed longer and that the weather was a little better to enjoy all the facilities. One of the pools was closed because of the terrible flooding the week before but it wasn’t an issue for us. Will stay here again on my next visit to Vietnam

title: Beautiful oasis in Hue
comment: Such a lovely hotel! Feels like a secluded oasis, with lots of plants, flowers, pools and interesting architecture. The service is outstanding; everyone is friendly and very quick to help. Highly recommend

title: Stunning Hue Accomodation
comment: Ancient Hue Garden house is a stunning place to stay in the heart of Hue. The rooms are beautiful and the staff are so helpful. We had dinner in the Vietnamese restaurant at the accommodation and it was lovely food. Would highly recommend staying here .

title: Ancient Hue Garden
comment: A truly magnificent all round experience. The rooms were luxurious, cool, spacious without being over the top. We dined in the Vietnamese restaurant and enjoyed each course and the wine.

title: Good
comment:
PROs
Charming Reception, Common Areas, Cottages, Restaurant,
Good Breakfast & Good dining options for lunch & dinner
Friendly staff
CONs
Pools are small & deep - not suited for kids
Shower water is "hard" & pressure can be better
Location is a little out of town/ nothing in walking distance

title: Beautiful hotel area with very friendly pesonnel
comment:
I've never been to a better hotel, everything was just fine!
Very friendly and absolutely helpful staff. There were some minor issues, which were solved immediately. Wonderful, big rooms, clean pools and beautiful gardens around the villas! Good food in the vietnamese restaurant (the french restaurant we did'nt try)

title: haven of peace and tranquility
comment:
beautiful Vietnamese-style hotel set back from the hubbub of the city
Beautiful rooms.
prefer Vietnamese style rooms

title: Recommend
comment: Very nice hotel and splendid room. Interesting location, quiet. Charming staff. Disappointing breakfast.

title: A refuge! We would love to come back if the flight from Germany wasn't ready
comment:
Super nicely landscaped small complex, beautiful rooms, very friendly and loving staff.
Breakfast is served and delicious. Even dinner in the restaurant is highly recommended. The nicer room is the one in Vietnamese style.

title: Beautiful hotel and excellent service
comment:
A beautiful hotel and an oasis in the city. We only stayed for one night, but had an excellent time. It is a stunning hotel with both traditional Vietnamese and more modern French areas, including different pools, styles of building/rooms and restaurants.

The service was extremely welcoming and very high quality, helping us get early access to our room.

We loved the design and look/feel of the hotel and would have loved to stay for longer. Highly recommended.

title: Unique experience
comment: We stayed two nights . It was unique staying in a 200 years old garden house . Stunning property and architecture . With the territory of staying in an ancient house comes the lack of privacy and soundproofing . One house was divided in two suites with no privacy between them. It was as clean as can be within a room that had plenty of exposure to the outdoors as walls, doors and windows had cracks everywhere . It was quaint but not the most comfortable. Food at dinner was truly outstanding . Would return for dinner but not for sleep .

title: 3 night stay
comment:
Beautiful 5 Star ⭐
Quiet peaceful and serene
Amazing food and staff
Beautiful clean and authentic rooms
Highly recommended 5 Star ⭐

title: Absolutely perfect Hue stay
comment:
Wow!! We finished our 3 night stay at Ancient Hue garden houses this morning and are already missing it.

This place is simply perfect. We stayed in 2 connecting rooms in the Gustave Eiffel villa and it was everything we hoped for.
The rooms were beautifully decorated with charming French Indochine style and spotlessly clean. Definitely the most clean and well kept rooms we have stayed in out of all our Vietnam trip.

The staff were so friendly and helpful from everyone we crossed paths with and the breakfast choice was fantastic. So much nicer than a buffet style breakfast at most hotels.

It is such a charming boutique style property but with 5 star service and amenities.

We will definitely be back again in the future.

Thank you to everyone who made our stay so memorable, especially Son.

title: Fantastic hotel
comment:
We stayed for 2 nights in June. we had one room in the old-style part of the hotel for us and one room in the French-style part of the hotel for our adult children (as they can't do twin beds in the old-style rooms). Both rooms were spacious, clean, had lovely bathrooms.

The hotel had two lovely swimming pools - one in each part of the hotel and neither were busy.

Breakfast was all ordered (i.e. not a buffet) but you could order over and over if you wanted more of anything, and it was all very tasty. We didn't eat dinner in the hotel but they had complimentary afternoon tea - which was a lovely break in the day.

The location is excellent - located centrally in the area of the main sites. Grabs were easy to get.

We did the local sites ourselves and then hired a car+driver (arranged ourselves although the hotel offered) for an afternoon to go around the sites that were further afield (the three main tombs and the abandoned water park).

The hotel team were very friendly and helpful.

This was one of the nicest hotels we have stayed in and we would definitely stay there again.

title: 6 out of 5 stars
comment: real luxury in a good way. we had been upgraded due to renovation and what a room, it was really nice with an outdoor shower as an extra little detail. the facilities and service were top notch, two lovely swimming pools, nice restaurant and an ala carte menu for breakfast, with everything you could want. the staff were always attentive to help and service, fantastic. our warmest recommendations

title: Wonderful Experience
comment:
Our three-night stay at Ancient Hue Garden House was simply delightful. Although we were initially disappointed to find that the traditional Chinese-style rooms (one of the main reasons for choosing this hotel) were under renovation—and this was not mentioned in advance—the French villa room we were given was beautiful and full of charm. The fresh flowers in the room added a thoughtful touch, and we appreciated the complimentary welcome drinks and afternoon tea.

Breakfast was served à la carte, freshly prepared, and consistently delicious. We also dined at the hotel’s restaurant twice and found it to be easily the best meals we had in Hue. The quality of the food was high, prices were fair, and the setting was lovely.

The heart of this hotel is undoubtedly its staff. Everyone we encountered was warm, attentive, and engaging. We genuinely enjoyed chatting with them and even took photos with the restaurant and front desk teams. Special thanks to the manager, who made it a point to greet guests during breakfast—such a nice gesture. This was easily our favorite hotel during our travels in Vietnam.

One caveat: the massage experience was underwhelming. It felt rushed and was interrupted by construction noise from the ongoing renovations that continued past 5:00 PM. Despite filling out a form indicating where the therapist should focus, they did not follow it. Additionally, it was uncomfortable and inappropriate when the massage therapist asked me to change my rating after the session. The spa did not meet the high standards set by the rest of our stay.

title: A fabulous place to stay
comment:
We had the pleasure so stay 3 nights on this fantastic Hue resort-like hotel where rooms are located in separate houses. Its location is great, close to the Citadel and very quiet. The grounds are fabulous, gives you an intimate feeling, it's like walking in paradise. They have relatively few rooms and we had the top King suite, a very spacious room with a high ceiling and ultra quiet, with a very comfortable king-size bed and great pillows. But the most outstanding feature is the incomparable good service from all their personnel, who treat you as if you are the only guest and make you feel at home. They also provide a suite of tours and transport services so one never has to go through the trouble of arranging it somehow with outside companies.

I don't know if I ever will be back in Hue, but if I do I will not even bother to look for another place to stay than Ancient Hue Garden Houses. It belongs to a rare pinnacle of outstanding hotels.

title: This is a full-service resort perfect for couples.
comment:
I spent all three nights here during my stay in Hue and I was very satisfied. Breakfast is delicious, warm and varied. I prefer this style, as it is bespoke rather than buffet and each item is carefully crafted. It was more heartfelt than a mechanical buffet, and I liked it.

We also used the on-site French restaurant Le Soleil, and we had a great time.

Overall, it was a very comfortable and pleasant stay.

title: To advise on a tour in Vietnam near the nice city of Hue
comment: We stayed there 2 nights on the occasion of our trip to Vietnam. We tested both restaurants...and 2 different pools. Charming and helpful welcome, very good restaurants. A la carte breakfast (no buffet) very good. Very good value for money. Very nice city to visit nearby

title: The best and only place to stay in Hue!!!
comment: The only place to stay if you’re in Hue!! The room was spectacular and the pool was a huge highlight as well. What stood out the most was the fantastic service. From the moment we checked in to even after we had checked out, the staff at Ancient Hue Garden Houses went above and beyond for us. My dad and I were interested in buying some of the local Vietnamese snacks we had been served during tea time and Nhung went out of her way to show us not only the brands, but even offered to pick them up for us as she lives near the best shop they make them at. It’s truly a 5 star hotel and a 5 star experience staying and dining here!

title: Very nice hotel a little off center
comment: Exceptional poolside ground floor rooms with typical decoration, despite the rain we loved this hotel, very nice restaurant and good quality dishes, breakfast on top , very attentive staff we highly recommend this hotel despite its high price

title: An amazing little hotel
comment: We had a beautiful stay at this charming hotel- everything was perfect from the gorgeous garden to the rooms, the food and the incredible service. The whole team is so helpful and professional. A special thank to Hon who is just formidable! Thank you

title: exceptional small hotel in Hue
comment: An exceptional small hotel to stay in Hue - its location perfect for visiting, the enchanting ambiance, the rooms, the friendly and helpful team, the delicious local food - everything was impeccable. We had a perfect 3 days visiting Hue and relaxing in the beautiful surroundings of this hotel. Really sad to leave. We will come back.

title: A polished hidden gem of a hotel.
comment:
If you appreciate history, beautiful antique furniture and architecture, impeccable fine dining flavours and excellent hospitality service within the grounds of a jasmine and rose scented garden, Ancient Hue Garden House would be the perfect place to stay at. My family and I enjoyed this beautiful peaceful hotel very much. The French restaurant is a culinary destination in itself for one of the most exquisite French style food I’ve ever had, and the gorgeous interior is lovely. Vietnamese cuisine at Kim Long fine dining are delightfully plated with vegetable carvings and showcase a repertoire of uniquely Hue dishes. I recommend the enjoyable cooking class with Kim Long’s chef as I learnt useful techniques to create restaurant-quality dishes and these techniques are an intangible souvenir of Hue’s cooking style. The elegant accommodation (we stayed at Kim Phung house) and delightful spa services also left a deep impression.

Thank you so much once again to all the staff at Ancient Hue Garden House for creating thoughtful and beautiful experiences for your guests!

For improvement, it would be nice to have a pillow selection. Everything else was excellent!

title: Service is place EXTRAORDINARY
comment:
If there were 6 stars, I would give them all. This is one of the most extraordinary hotels I have ever stayed at, if not the most extraordinary.
The service is outstanding and the staff is fantastic. I would return to Hué just to stay here again. Congratulations to the whole team!

I hope this is the review you were looking for to convince you to finally book.

The food is amazing in both restaurants. The laundry service is crazy. Massages are the best.

I can't say it enough: the best hotel ever.

title: Royal place in the imperial city!
comment:
Authentic: we slept in the historic part of the establishment in the middle of a very soothing garden. The service is perfect.
We had dinner twice: all the dishes were excellent but a special dedication for the starter “assorted Hue Savory cake”

title: Beautiful grounds with a few setbacks
comment:
The grounds at Ancient Hue Garden House are absolutely stunning — lush, peaceful, and beautifully maintained. It truly feels like a tranquil retreat. The rooms are nicely decorated, blending traditional charm with comfort, and the beds were excellent, making for a restful stay.

However, there were a few downsides that impacted the overall experience. Each evening, large tour groups arrived for dinner, which disrupted the otherwise calm atmosphere. We stayed for two nights, and both evenings were affected. Additionally, our room was located next to the French restaurant, and we could clearly hear guests leaving late at night — these were not hotel guests, which made it feel less private.

While the restaurants offer a beautiful setting, the food wasn't particularly memorable. It wasn’t bad, but compared to the many fantastic meals we had during our two-week trip across Vietnam, we expected more.

Also worth noting: you can hear activities from the surrounding village, including early morning traffic and construction, which may be disturbing if you're hoping for a completely quiet environment.

With some improvements in soundproofing, food quality, and guest flow, this could be a truly exceptional place. That said, the setting and ambiance still make it a special stay for those visiting Hue.

title: High end experience worth every Dong!
comment: Our room looked like a beautiful high end designer suite. We felt privileged and pampered. After a gourmet dinner on the terrace we went to the spa for a 90 minute couples massage that was so relaxing, we both fell asleep. We were only sorry we were only there one night! We will definitely book here our next time in Vietnam!

title: A bit of paradise in Hue
comment: A beautiful place to stay in Hue, Vietnam. The staff were very welcoming and the whole experience was relaxed and peaceful. The food was excellent and the spa was wonderful. We would highly recommend it. An easy journey into the Citadel and close to the Perfume River.

title: Happiness!
comment: The previous comments are archival. Great hotel, beautiful rooms, excellent welcome, very friendly and very accommodating staff, restaurant (we went to the Vietnamese both evenings so much we feasted) excellent. My only regret: stayed only 2 nights , excellent value for money for this hotel. Congratulations to the whole team.

title: Outside center but a true gem in Hue
comment:
Exceptional setting, although on the outskirts of the city the location is excellent.
Rooms are nicely decorated, with high quality products. Big bathroom.
Staff is very friendly and helpful.
If you want to get a break from the city hustle , this is the place.
2 smaller pools with loungers.
Restaurant for dinner is beautiful and food is nice.
Breakfast, no buffet which is very good as served on the table.
Staff will do their utmost to give you an excellent service

title: A wonderful ancient styled vietnamese Hotel
