comment: It is a wonderful hotel. I would like to recomand for 100%. The villas, the food and the friendlyness of the staff is extraodinary. The wonderful garden is amazing. We felt very well during our stay here. We tried both restaurants. They were excellent. Also the treatment in the spa was very relaxing after a day full of excursions.

title: Colonial charm , great comfort and welcome at the top
comment: Wonderful place .Charm, quiet ,great comfort,Really top home. Service always smiling and very available. 2 excellent restaurants (French and Vietnamese. Recommend 100% for any visit of a few days in Hue.

title: A true paradise on earth
comment:
Everything is perfect and beautiful.
Exceptional staff, Gourmet quality restaurant. The exteriors are very wooded and well maintained. The place is very quiet and soothing. The pool is beautiful. We will be happy to come back to that.

title: Serendipity
comment: We were changed to this hotel at very short notice due to disturbing work outside our initial choice on the river at Hue. It transpires we were lucky. Marvellous spot. Attentive staff from first arrival to departure. A wonderful Villa room which compares well with anywhere we have stayed on our trip so far. Lovely breakfast made to order (no buffet which was a plus). Grounds are very pleasant. We had eaten well during the day so didn't try the restaurants although the ambience of both was very inviting (and the wine selection very good). We will be recommending this location to friends visiting Hue and giving similar feedback to our agent.

title: A great experience
comment:
I loved the hotel. We stayed in the Old part of the hotel. The rooms are a cute all wooden, well decorated with period furniture, well maintained, spacious bathrooms, comfortable beds.
Little privacy.
The food was very good and very original. A joy.

title: Very nice hotel, charming and comfortable
comment: Very nice place, quiet, beautiful decoration, very comfortable. Nice garden with pools and fish. 2 very clean outdoor pools. 2 restaurants of neat and different style. Good food. Breakfast included hearty and delicious served at the table. Generous supplies in the room and in particular, which is rare, the mini bar is included! Charming and smiling staff. We are not downtown (10 minutes by taxi), but the neighborhood is quiet and cute.

title: Too Beautiful to Miss (and affordable)
comment: The entire experience is five stars. The rooms are exquisite. We were able to stay in two different types of rooms during our visit so I feel like we got a good look around. The staff is second to none. They took such good care of us with so much feeling, and love we were overwhelmed by the attention to detail. Also not to be missed is an Indian Head and Shoulder massage at their spa. Quyen is masterful and I would request her services again if we had more time.

title: Great Viet Nam Experiences 2025 February
comment: This is one of the nicest places you could pick to stay at. The special services, Spa for messages and pedicures, truly outstanding staff that make you feel right at home. Meals are fantastic and whether or not you pick local Vietnamese or Western you are going to enjoy them. I will kind of warn those who prefer coffee, cups are on the short side. Be prepared to order several servings at the onset. However, the flavor of Vietnamese coffee is fantastic! On a separate note, the exchange rate of Dong to American Dollars takes a little getting use to, something like 1 million Dong equals $39.45 American Dollars.... and there isn't coin money, only paper bills. But, I found most places (people) are more than happy to accept American Dollars. Next time I visit here, bringing good amounts of of GreenBacks, $5, $10, $20 and some $50. Tipping is honestly necessary, the service you receive is so good you will want to TIP! One more and lastly, I suggest you do tours that are private, you and wife or special other, so much more information and quality in the experience.

title: Didn't want to leave: Stunning Hotel
comment:
I stayed here for 3 nights of my honeymoon as we travelled through Vietnam. I couldn't fault it at all, the rooms and grounds were immaculate and so beautiful incorporating the historic architecture with the new french style villa. The staff couldnt have done more for us, they were all so friendly and made the visit seamless. We are sad to be leaving it has been the nicest hotel we have stayed in so far.

Tip: Take advantage of their car service. We found that a lot of the trips online still got you to pay for your entry tickets to the tombs making them a glorified taxi service. The hotel car was cheaper than any of the trips you will book online and gives you complete freedom to see the local landmarks at your own pace.

title: Fantastic stay
comment: A must when visiting Hue. We experienced the Royal dinner and worn regal gowns and headdress , what a memorial experience!! The rooms are a luxury. The staff are so welcoming and gracious . We also experience the Lunar New Year with a dragon dance.. Thank you Ancient Hue Garden House.

title: Unique, beautiful rooms
comment: Beautiful rooms in renovated traditional Vietnamese wooden homes. The grounds are amazing and the service is friendly and exceptional. The food at the restaurant was very good. We love Vietnam and its people and are sad we have to leave soon.

title: Garden Sanctuary in busy Hue
comment: Fantastic setting, one of the most beautiful hotels I’ve stayed in. Gorgeous gardens and pristine traditional rooms. Service was excellent and 2 fantastic restaurants to dine in. I cannot recommend this hotel enough, an absolute pleasure to stay here.

title: Perfect serene location away from the hustle and bustle of traffic
comment:
What a fabulous property. It is slightly off the beaten track which we loved, as you leave the hustle and bustle of traffic for the serenity of this garden resort.

We had a wonderful room with a comfortable bed, table for two, and bathroom with a tub and shower.

The property offers two restaurants, one French and one traditional Vietnamese where you were are so served an à la carte breakfast in a delightful atmosphere.

The staff was so friendly and accommodating. We highly recommend.

We dined in the French restaurant our first night. Unfortunately, we did not get to experience dinner in the Vietnamese restaurant, though the breakfast was wonderful. They make their own yogurt, which was divine breakfast comes with a small plate of fresh fruit, a basket of delicious baked goods, their croissant were the best we've had in Vietnam.

We thoroughly enjoyed their spa and had massages both days we were there.

title: Exceptional address
comment: We stayed two nights at this recent property and recommend it with your eyes closed! Room with neat decoration, restaurant and breakfast served in a very nice place and with high quality cuisine, welcome and very warm staff with care offered on arrival, the TOP! 5/5

title: Oasis at every angle
comment:
Exquisite rooms & service, with the best restaurant in the Imperial City for visitors looking for a modern take on traditional culinary.
The garden vibe were tranquil with the Ancient quarter, and the new french Villas.

Thank you Phúc & Quê for taking care of us. We all love coming back to visit.

title: Excellent place to stay and eat.
comment: A beautiful hotel to stay at. The rooms are clean and spacious. The service was excellent. The restaurant food was amazing. We ate dinner here two nights. The breakfast was very good as well. It has a French and Vietnamese restaurant. We choose to eat Vietnamese both nights.

title: Excellent Hotel Peaceful location.
comment: A delightful hotel with two lovely pools in a tranquil setting. Staff are lovely and everything is professionally run and well kept. The breakfasts were included and of high quality and the restaurant one of the nicest in Hue. It was a $4 taxi ride to the centre of town and it was very easy to hire a scooter by staff. My wife had a one hour massage which she rated as the best in Vietnam…

title: An oasis of a hotel!
comment: From the moment I walked in I was struck by the beauty of this property. The bungalow style accommodations feel both timeless and luxurious. Customer service here is simply beautiful. I would love to bring my family the next time I come. If you want both a convenient and private place to stay, this is it.

title: Wonderful place
comment: Nice hotel, good place for sightseeing, friendly and helpful staff, nice pool and rooftop terrace, delicious breakfast with many different fruits, clean and big room

title: Beautiful room and wonderful staff
comment: Thank you so much for a wonderful stay. The room was fantastic and the service incredibly gy. And thanks again for the cake to celebrate our Silver Wedding

title: A good hotel in a great location for walking to the citadel and for restaurants and bars.
comment:
Jade Scene is located down a narrow street slightly off the beaten track. It was about a 20 min walk to the citadel. Nearby there were good restaurants and bars.
The staff were very friendly and helpful. Breakfast was of a good standard with lots of hot and cold options.
On the roof was a very good, small swimming pool, and a small bar alongside serving beers and cocktails. All in all a great value hotel that I would recommend.

title: The place to be
comment: Good location. Hotel well equipped. Breakfast very varied in buffet form. Extraordinary staff. Transfer to Hoi An organized by the establishment at a very attractive rate, driven by Peter: perfect!

title: WOW what a great hotel
comment: Excellent location within easy walking of many restaurants and bars. Has a rooftop pool and bar which were lovely. The room was spacious. Great value

title: Amazing stay
comment: Thank u to all at jade scene hotel for an amazing stay. Lovely room great breakfast and good location. The staff were amazing and couldn’t do enough to make our stay perfect.

title: If in Hue it has to be Jade Scene Hotel
comment: Outstanding location in a very happening place - market, street and perfume river. Outstanding breakfast (great spread) and nicely curated terrace pool and garden. Anna and Thao are always smiling, welcoming. Thieng and Peter as a drivers are very warm & friendly. Will visit again

title: Great.
comment: Super welcome!! Good breakfast. Very professional staff. We left clothes in the room when we left, the hotel contacted us quickly to inform us and to know our address in Danang to deliver our clothes free of charge. What was done two days later!!! We definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Very calm location
comment: Jade Scene is placed in a quiet street, and the welcome is warm. The room was large enough. The staff is fantastic. Breakfast deserves a little more choice but nothing serious. The upstairs pool is beautiful even if we could not enjoy it, too cool for our taste

title: Very nice hotel
comment:
Lovely hotel, beautiful rooms
In a quiet alley within walking distance of the Walking Street
Very friendly ladies at the reception who surprised me on my birthday with a birthday cake with candle
Everything was also very clean, shower floor can be a bit slippery when wet, I found the beds pretty hard to my wife has slept wonderfully

title: Since I visited Vietnam I have been getting accustomed to the friendliness of the Vietnamese people. Hue is at the top of my lis
comment:
Since I visited Vietnam I have been getting accustomed to the friendliness of the Vietnamese people. Hue is at the top of my list, it is a great place to visit & I especially enjoyed my stay in the Jade Scene hotel. I enjoyed getting up in the morning going for a swim in the hotels rooftop pool before enjoying their excellent breakfast. The staff stood out they were very approachable, friendly and helpful.
HOWEVER THE LASTING MEMORY,, AS I WAS LEAVING I NOTICED A LARGE AMOUNT OF MY CASH HAD BEEN STOLEN FROM MY ROOM SAFE.
DO NOT LEAVE VALUABLES IN THE ROOM SAFE

title: Great hotel, great driver Peter
comment:
Great hotel. Very comfortable beds. Nice staff.
What we found especially great: The hotel has its own shuttle service. We drove with our driver Peter from Hue to Hoi An. Peter was super pleasant and made the ride a very nice experience. We stopped at great sights along the way and talked well, he was very funny without being intrusive. Very pleasant indeed. Good ride J:)

title: Best hotel in Vietnam so far
comment:
Best hotel in Vietnam so far!
Everything was perfect the rooms the staff equipment and security. And especially Ms. Ngoc Ha

title: Excellent stay
comment: Great hotel, exceptional welcome, always available, speaking a little French. Today superb visit of the graves with our driver Peter , he is super friendly. We recommend it and the hotel.

title: Great Stay with Fantastic Staff
comment: I had a really pleasant stay at the Jade Scene Hotel. The room was comfortable, the swimming pool was great and the rooftop bar was a nice place to relax in the evening. Breakfast was varied with a good amount of options. What stood out the most, though, was how kind and helpful the staff were throughout the stay. I’d definitely recommend this hotel and would happily stay here again.

title: Very enjoyable stay at Jade Scene Hotel
comment: This was the best of the 13 hotels we stayed in, in Vietnam. The rooms were very nice. The breakfast was lovely. Nice little pool and bar on the roof and in a good quiet location, but just round the corner from bars and restaurants. But best of all were the staff. The ladies on reception were so helpful and happy every time they saw you. Their English was good too. Couldn't do enough to help you. All the other staff were nice too, even if we couldn't communicate as well. Just a smile and a happy face goes a long way. We would highly recommend this hotel.

title: Very happy with Jade Scene
comment: Very friendly and sweet staff. Had a room with a balcony that I enjoyed. This hotel is in an alley with other hotels and small restaurants and just around the corner from very busy night street with lots of people. Location was ideal for me and exactly what I was looking for.

title: Great stay
comment:
We had a great stay at Jade Scene in Hue. Lovely helpful staff, good variety for breakfast each morning.
We enjoyed the rooftop pool and private seating areas

title: Best hotel experience in Hue, Vietnam
comment: Located near the Hue walking street, this hotel offers an optimal blend of professional service and pristine environmental maintenance. The staff’s expertise was evident in their meticulous assistance and dedication to guest engagement, particularly in their curation of local event recommendations. This experience stands as the premier highlight of my travel across Vietnam.

title: Great hotel, staff and location
comment:
The hotel is well positioned, close to bars, restaurants, and a few shops. Grab is so cheap, so everything is within reach. A 15-minute trip from the hotel to Hue station was 45,000vnd (A$2.80).

Sleep quality was very good. Couldn't hear a sound. Pillows and bed were typical for Vietnam.

The staff are excellent. Very friendly and always willing to please. Nothing is a problem, from extra pillows to sugar.

Breakfast has a great variety. Eggs cooked to your liking, bacon, a great variety of fresh fruit and some cereal. Pancakes, waffles .. the list goes on. Some Asian dishes are also available. It changes based on the guests' nationality each day, which is very smart.

title: Central and comfortable
comment:
Lovely hotel on a quiet street in the centre of Hue, close to all bars and restaurants.
Staff friendly and helpful.
Breakfast reasonably varied with options to choose off a menu.
Rooms spacious clean and well decorated, with nice shower and daily free water and coffee.
Good family run restaurant a few doors away.
Rooftop pool area looked lovely but wasn't the weather for a swim.

title: Wonderful place, perfect location!
comment: The location is perfect, the staff is nice, welcoming and helpful. The pool area is very nice to relax and have a drink. Room very clean, everything was perfect ! Would come back anytime.

title: Little gem in the middle of Hue
comment:
Very nice, quiet hotel in the center of Hue.
Beautiful pool with roof terrace.
Breakfast very good. The staff here were super nice.

title: Pleasant people
comment:
All of the staff were a delight especially Ha and Peter my driver. Its difficult travelling when you're wheelchair bound but kindness shown by the hotel staff maae the difference.

Thanks

Mark

title: Excellent choice.
comment: We had a terrific experience at Jade Scene Hotel. Well located, clean and well equipped. The room was lovely with a great shower, air con and cable TV and a cute balcony. We loved the rooftop chill out pool area that had several levels. The included breakfast was good and the staff were very helpful. Peter, a driver who took us to the airport was excellent. Safe, very helpful and a good communicator. All in all a great choice of accommodation.

title: Hué ❤️🙏
comment:
The location of the Jade Hotel is very practical and close to the center. We immediately felt very welcome and at the reception they immediately gave us a map showing us how best to get around and how to reach the most popular destinations. We rented directly in the structure a scooter that we recommend to reach more distant destinations. Super friendly and helpful service and staff. The room was very large and clean and we could relax at best. We highly recommend the Jade hotel and thank you again to all the staff for making our stay magnificent.
Best regards, Eliana and Michele ♥️

title: Excellent location to explore Hue, great rooftop pool to cool down, before exploring the culinary streets next door.
comment: Top spot close to the shops and restaurants. Still walking distance from the emperor city. A nice rooftop pool to cool down. Room was clean, good shower. And still spacious for 4 adults

title: Jade Scene Hotel Hue
comment:
3 of us are travelling through Vietnam for 2 weeks and took the opportunity to stay at the Jade Scene hotel. The rooms were lovely, the location great but what I’ll remember most is how helpful the 3 ladies on reception were - thank you Ha, Nhi and Trang you couldn’t have been more helpful

I’d highly recommend and hope to come back again
John

title: Merci beaucoup
comment: Perfect location. Very friendly and attentive staff . Room are beautiful and comfortable and it's quiet at night . I would definitely go back

title: Perfect place to relax and explore Hue
comment:
Hotel is great. Great size, not to big, not small, gives the "like at home" feeling. Staff is super kind and helpful, room is big and very comfortable. Bath- great fo relax after all day exploring.
Very central, yet quiet.

title: A hotel like this you haven't seen yet! Enjoy every moment!
comment:
This hotel deserves 20, not just 10.

From the moment we arrived the whole staff gave us such a warm welcome, helping every step, answering every question and explaining all necessary information with a smile from ear to ear.
An amazing experience.
The breakfast was very rich and tasty!
The room was perfect, clean, with all amenities including a pair of robes.
The rooftop bar has a nice view to the city.
Finally the spa experience with the current promotion bundle body+foot massage was fantastic!

title: Top notch hotel
comment: Great hotel,all the staff were lovely always smiling and welcoming,nice rooftop swimming pool,we slept great very quiet room and it was spotless,service brilliant including same day laundry service,short walk to restaurants and shops

title: Very pleasant step.
comment: Very professional welcome, friendly staff and attentive to travelers' requests. very complete and delicious breakfast. I highly recommend this property.

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
Excellent welcome
Endearing staff and very available
Warm room, clean, comfortable bedding
Nice rooftop swimming pool
Very good stay of 2 days
I recommend without hesitation

title: The Hue experience xx
comment: What a gem, this hotel is so lovely, staff very helpful & Peter our driver was top notch,very knowledgeable and helpful brought us places we would not have found ourselves.5 Stars from us.

title: Beautiful hotel to stay in Hue
comment: This hotel is absolutely beautiful. The staff were very friendly and helpful and made my experience even better. The room was clean and did not have any bad odor compared to other hotels I have been at.

title: Do not think twice, just book! :)
comment:
Visited this place as part of our honeymoon trip!

Top of the notch guest service, great location, clean room, and great value!

Highly recommended !

title: Exceptional
comment: The hotel is centrally located but quiet in a small side street. Our room was very large, the bed very comfortable and everything was very clean. The staff was very nice and helpful, helped us organize further transfers to Hoi An or a tour guide for the citadel. Breakfast was also fabulous. Nice rooftop with pool. We can highly recommend this place and would love to come back:)

title: Great Time at Jade Scene Hotel
comment:
Jade Scene Hotel is very much recommended!
The location is good bc it's walking distance to almost everything - old citadel, restaurants, commercial area, walking street.
The place is very cozy and aesthetic with all those wall designs. The roofdeck with pool gives a wonderful view of Hue.
The rooms are very clean and spacious. I booked a room good for 4 people.
The greatest part is the hotel staff. They are super nice, always greeting and smiling and attentive to the needs of guests.

This hotel deserves support!

title: Good experience
comment: Very good experience. Little more the hotel organized us a driver by the day to visit the Imperial tombs.

title: Super central, quiet, clean hotel with great service
comment:
Central and quiet location. Very friendly staff and always helpful with questions and organizing tours, transportation.
The room was huge, very clean.
Laundry service was great.

title: Great stay on Hue
comment: All people at the hotel where extremely friendly and did excellent job to feel me good. Location is good, there are many restaurants and bars to get food and drinks. The room was comfortible and clean, great value for the money

title: Great hotel near the center in a quiet place
comment: The rooms where clean and comfy and the service was great overall with attentive and English speaking personnel, I highly recommend their spa services with really fair prices and quality massages.

title: Great place for a stay in Hue with very pleasant staff.
comment: Central location for going out for a meal. A little walk to the city sites and very affordable with grab taxi. Extremely friendly and helpful English speaking staff. On arrival they provided without request a mal and gave all relevant information about where to eat and about the sites with opening hours and costs and how to get there. They were very helpful in trying to resolve a check-in problem with the airline. The roof terraces are superb with shading greenery and good views of Hue. Top marks.

title: Clean and great location
comment: Nice clean hotel in a great central location, staff were excellent and super friendly. Good breakfast buffet. Thanks, Josh & Kelsey :)

title: Location, service, transportation and room 10
comment: Very highly recommended hotel. Of those I've seen in Vietnam, the best. They will pick you up at the station or wherever, the rooms are amazing, it is well located, and Peter, our driver to Hoi An is a charmer. Highly recommended stopping at all sites of interest for an incredible price.

title: Perfect hotel in centrum of Hue!
comment: Very good hotel! Beautiful and in an optimal location. The staff are very kind and attentive. The rooms are very clean and well-equipped. Breakfast is complete and delicious. They helped us arrange a car, did our laundry, and picked us up at the train station… Just great! Highly recommended. The best one I’ve stayed at in Vietnam

title: Ideal for a stage
comment:
Great location, spacious room with all the necessary comfort.
Clean bathroom.
Charming and smiling staff.

title: Great.
comment:
Very good address, 1 street from the pedestrian street that comes alive in the evening, but we hear no noise from this street.
The sound insulation is at the top.
Super welcoming and friendly staff, they indicate the best activities to do in the city and surroundings.
Very clean rooms and comfortable bedding.
Good breakfast, there is Vietnamese and European breakfast
I recommend 100%

title: Very nice hotel in the center of Hue
comment:
We stayed two nights at the Jade Scene Hotel. Welcoming was exceptional, from the first minute the staff offered us refreshments while waiting for our room keys at the time of our departure, when we were helped to order long-distance taxis after enjoying the pool and shower one last time, whereas we had returned our rooms several hours before.
Mademoiselle Ha is very smiling, very good advice about activities and the city, and speaks excellent French.
The rooms are very spacious, pleasant, and offer a beautiful view of the rooftops of Hue.
I will definitely return to this establishment.

title: So lovely people and hotel!
comment: We were there during the flooting of the river on 27 and 28 Oct 2025. The hotel people were so nice although the hotel had 1 meter water inside and 2 meter in the street! Notwithstand food was made in the dark with no electricity. Also the girl at the reception was so helpfull and lovely. She together with Peter arranged a boat to escape to the airport and Peter even joined us! So many thanks!! Please choice this hotel to stay in, the deserve it more than ever!

title: Flooding
comment: Flooding +++ Feet in the water due to nearby river of perfumes ( mud +++ ) While telephone contact the day before everything goes well Booking by Expédia who charges the entire stay Moreover we can not leave from the!!!

title: A great manager and team
comment:
We stayed in this hotel yesterday and today at the time of the great flood. The fear of our lives. More electricity and 1.5 meters of water in the streets.
The team made us food despite everything, we provided candles, water .::
And so that we could spread the manager was swimming to get makeshift boats to guide us then to our driver 20 kms from there.
A very big thank you!!!

title: Wonderful stay in Hue
comment:
Great location walking distance to amenities. Quiet little street.
Family atmosphere in hotel, felt really well looked after.
Room was spacious and beds comfortable as well as really clean.
Good value for
Money.
Amazing swimming pool at the top - so warm perfect - for a night swim overlooking the city.
Best thing was definitely the staff which was lovely and attentive as well as very professional. I kept in touch with hotel staff as we flew just after the typhoon and they communicated clearly making it easy to decide to go ahead with the trip. Wonderful time- would highly recommend!

title: Perfect Stay
comment: The staff were incredibly kind and helpful throughout my stay. The hotel was spotless, the facilities well-maintained, and the room was spacious, quiet, and very comfortable. Highly recommended!

title: Hue trip
comment: Beautiful hotel with wonderful facilities - pool relaxing and spa service offered. Staff was kind and helpful. Great location to everything and very walkable. Lots of food options nearby.

It is an exceptional hotel were you will always be attended with a bright smile and helped whenever needed.
The pool is great as well.

title: CP value is high
comment: The hotel staff service is good, and will ask what needs, including car rental or tourism, the room is comfortable and clean, breakfast is abundant such price CP value is good, when checking out you can still use their pool and related facilities, recommend everyone to come

title: I highly recommend for the quality of all services
comment:
Hotel Very Neither Located With Perfect Welcoming
pool ,roof top,Linens Service
Everything to spend a very pleasant stay
A great breakfast extra

title: Perfect choice to stay in Hue
comment: Jade Scene Hotel is in the perfect location in Hue. Close to restaurants and cocktail bars, without any noise entering your room. Excellent staff so helpful with local information and advice on things to do during your stay around the city. Pool a nice welcome dip at the end of your day on the 8th floor. Roof top bar quite basic drinks wise, however lots of seating on different levels around including the pool area with long distance views. Rooms were spotless clean and beautifully decorated. Would highly recommend.

title: Good hotel!! Repeat.
comment:
The hotel is very good, quiet street, large room, comfortable bed..
The taxi driver you can hire with them, Pita, speaks English, took us from Hue to Hoi An making several stops and very friendly.
Recommended!

title: Perfect.
comment:
Service is really perfect thanks to the Welcoming staff who are very warm and welcoming.
Many thanks to them.
The pool, room and breakfast were perfect.

title: 2 days in Hue
comment: Beautiful Hotel well located, impeccable room, nice rooftop pool, and staff available for advice and help us. Plus check in early when you arrive it's great. I recommend

title: Hotel in Hue.
comment: A very nice hotel with a more than reasonable Price quality ratio, very hearty breakfast, great location. A beautiful pool and small terraces that dominate the city and give you a great 360 degree viewpoint. I would like to keep this secret to myself, but I am happy to share it. It’s a joke.....

title: Great stay
comment: We just finished a lovely 2 night stay at Jade scene hotel. The location is fantastic, rooms beautiful and even has a refreshing, clean pool. The staff were so friendly and gave lots of information but did not pressure us into anything. I would definitely stay here again. I also had a hot stone massage and it was Devine. Breakfast also had a great selection.

title: Family life in Hue
comment: Great experience for such a short period. We enjoyed the comfortable rooms, walking down and up the stairs, swimming on the pool and enjoying the surrounding views from the roof top terraces, and the fantastic massage experience on the bespoke spa room.

title: Really great hotel
comment: Lovely hotel, great room size, with nice view from both the room balcony and the roof terrace. We stayed for 2 nights and had a good rest!

title: Nice place to stay in Hue!
comment: Spacious room, very helpful and friendly personnel. Generous breakfast with various menu every morning. Nice swimming pool on the top.

title: Very nice staff and location the site visits of the hotel is perfect for all
comment:
Clean rooms with a double bed
In a quiet alley but not far from the busy streets
Air conditioning was a bit noisy and quite cold (difficulty changing the temperature)
Light in the bathroom a little low

title: Nice stay
comment: Eldora Hotel Hue exudes a sophisticated boutique charm with its ornate French neoclassical design and nostalgic atmosphere. The rooms are exceptionally spacious and feature luxurious details, including elegant free-standing bathtubs and classic furnishings. Its central location and panoramic rooftop pool make it a premier choice for exploring the imperial city in style.

title: Beautiful hotel conveniently located for sight seeing in Hue.
comment:
We spent 5 nights at the Eldora as the mid point of 12 week tour of SE Asia. On arrival the reception team were most welcoming and friendly. We were given two room entry cards (always a good sign) and then escorted to our room where we were taken through all of the controls and facilities , including a warning that the hot water runs very hot (which was true no matter what the time of day or night).

The room was beautifully furnished with large twin beds, comfortable pillows, a table, two chairs, a well stocked mini bar, complimentary water replenished daily and plenty of storage space.

The bathroom had both a walk in shower and roll top bath. Great for a luxurious soak after a day of walking around the city.

In addition there was a large safe in the room, just perfect as I was travelling with a MacBook and camera.

We only took breakfast in the restaurant as we had already planned dinners out. The staff were very friendly and attentive making sure we wanted for nothing. The food was plentiful and varied, covering every dietary requirement. Omelettes were freshly prepared, the danish pastries were delicious and the coffee sting and hot.

Reception provided an umbrella on the evening it was raining. They also arranged an English speaking driver and car to take us around 3 of the Emperor’s Tombs on one day. Even with the entry costs and tip at the end of the tour this worked out much cheaper than a group tour booked locally or online. This meant we could go around the tombs (and they are much more than just one building) at our own pace, enjoying the environment too.

Reception mentioned that our driver Nin had limited English which we were happy to accept, but he actually spoke very good English, telling us about the sites visited, the countryside we passed through and also about his family and Vietnamese life, particularly during the time of Covid and the impact that has had on tourism.

A big thank you to everyone that made our stay so enjoyable and memorable. Apologies I didn’t get the names of individuals to post here but you all did a fantastic job.

title: Nice hotel but feels empty
comment:
We had a two night stay here as part of a tour. The room and bathroom were nice and spacious. However the drain in the shower was very slow and nearly flooded.

We went to use the pool but were really disappointed. There were only 4 sun beds and although located on the. 14th floor it had a basement feel about it. The rooftop bar has been closed for a long time but not because it’s being refurbished, I guess there just isn’t the customers. That made it feel like a ghost town. We did eat in the restaurant one night, food was good but the restaurant absolutely empty so had no soul. Similarly with the downstairs bar which is a shame because it is a nice hotel. Breakfast was ok, the breakfast box we had to takeaway was good.

title: Classic and spacious
comment: Very classic hotel in furnishings and furnishings, large lobby and rich in details, very spacious rooms with large bathroom, with all amenities. Beautiful swimming pool on the upper floors, indoors, overlooking the city from the large windows. Great breakfast, with a prevalence of salty, as per Viet tradition. Recommended!

title: Absolutely Wonderful
comment: So stayed 2 nights so a brief visit to Hue but thoroughly enjoyed it. The hotel is in a great location for the centre and river. We had a panorama room on 9th floor and WOW such a beautiful room, very large room with 5 double windows. Massive comfortable bed and the bathroom was amazing with bath and walk in shower. There is a very nice pool on 14th floor but we just did not have time to enjoy it. The breakfast was very good with lots of choices and you could order speciality coffee if you wanted to (at an additional cost). Would have loved to have stayed a bit longer to enjoy the hotel and city as was really lovely but our tour of Vietnam included this brief stay. Would definitely recommend and come back here.

title: Good location, clean , but….
comment:
The location is great for seeing Hué, the room is clean and comfortable.
There is the usual noise from traffic ( to be expected). Unfortunately the rooftop bar has been closed for quite some time.
The breakfast was disappointing, with pastries being hard/overcooked, and cappuccino being an additional cost ( not so in other hotels).
The staff are helpful.
Looking at the price in booking.com , it’s very reasonable.
The pros outweigh the cons.

title: Three star Hotel feeling more like a 5 Star venue.
comment:
The hotel was off the main thoroughfare which meant it was quiet and peaceful of traffic. Sitting out on the veranda watching evening fall was so pleasant. The tree next to my balcony was full of grapefruits AND no mosquitoes in sight.
Inside the room was large neat and clean. I loved the bath room so nicely laid out and clean. I used room service. The young lady was prompt and accommodating. The food was good.

Breakfast was varied but not overwhelming and everything was too notch. Staff very kind and attentive. They have a shop full of interesting things l bought a pair of indoor slippers the have in the room.
This three star hotel felt more like a 5 star hotel to me.

title: We had a great stay at Eldora hotel
comment: Comfortable beds and a great breakfast. Very clean and beautiful with marble floors. Convenience, walkable location, near restaurants and shopping.

title: A Bit Of A Mix
comment:
Reception on arrival was warm and were advised that we should be aware that the hot water was “very hot”. Later, while washing hands and having a shower, the almost exact opposite proved to be the case, with having the hot water tap turned full on without any cold water added, resulting in tepid water at best.
Staff were very friendly.
Room was large, containing a very comfortable king-sized bed, small refrigerator that also served as a mini bar, desk, coffee table, three chairs, bedside cabinets, safe, electric jug, and television that provided a selective range of free view options, none of which were in English.
Power points were distributed throughout the room. However, the one located closest to the desk was dedicated for a phone and television socket, meaning that use of the computer had to be done with it resting on one’s knees in a chair or on the bed. A problem was that further exacerbated with all the power points having loose fittings for plugs.
Bathroom was of a good size and contained a good shower as well as a fantastic bathtub. Regrettably, a bathtub that could not be used, as the thought of soaking in a very tepid bath was not as appealing as the bathtub itself. It did however wonderfully provide face cloths for the first night, only to have these replaced with hand towels on the next. Great bench space, and great lighting, along with a good selection of complimentary personal items.
Excellent free Wi-fi was available.
An excellent laundry service was also provided by this Hotel.
Very well located in central Hue.
For dining purposes, the Hotel also had an exceptionally good restaurant, offering a wide variety of choices.

title: Great choice in Hue
comment:
Premise: the style is very, very personal, as in the picture.
The hotel is a modern structure with all amenities. The rooms are very spacious and with a bathroom also equipped with Jacuzzi. Cleaning is also daily towels even if left hanging.
Breakfast is held on the 2nd floor, where there is also the restaurant, and is very varied. They range from Vietnamese to European. Staff helpful and well prepared.

title: They don’t know about basics standards
comment: was very disappointed with the service at check-out. The staff told us that we had taken the white in-room slippers and asked us to return them, even though they were already used. This was honestly embarrassing and unacceptable for a hotel of this category. We travel a lot, and in any normal hotel you either throw away the used slippers or take them with you , that’s how it works. Their reaction showed a complete lack of understanding of basic hotel standards and left us with a very bad impression. I do not recommend this hotel based on this unprofessional behavior.

title: Cleanliness and kindness
comment: The hotel is very nice, although the taste of the decor is not ours. The rooms are huge, as is the bathroom and everything is very clean. The staff is very kind. We had dinner in the restaurant, where with the appropriate tips, they cooked a good pasta.

title: A little dated
comment: We were a bit disappointed by the Eldora. On the plus side the bed was very comfortable and our room was scrupulously clean. On the minus side, it felt a little dated and quite a lot was closed: spa and sky bar and the pool was very cold. Needs love

title: Very comfortable stay in hue.
comment: This hotel is grand and staff are very nice. Our room was huge with beautiful bedding. The bathroom was fabulous with free standing bath and separate large shower. Very clean. Breakfast was good with fruit and omelettes made which I like . Hotel very quiet. Hue busy in tourist area.

title: Excellent stay
comment: Modern and luxurious hotel just a few steps from the center of Huè. Varied breakfast and abundant earthquake, both sweet and savory. Spacious rooms equipped with a bathtub.

title: Clear 4*
comment: Good service. Loved the pool and breakfast was great. Wifi fast and rooms clean and very large. Fair priced cleaning of clothes. Nothing to hesitate about, safe and excellent hotel.

title: Yeah, sure.
comment:
The hotel is very well located and the great plus of this hotel is the attentive staff. They always pay special attention even if there are many customers. We had a large room on the 12th floor with double views of the city. The rooms have a little kitsch white furniture but that is a detail. Tastes and colors are not discussed.
The hotel is quiet. The carpet in the hallways is so thick that you could twist an ankle. The swimming pool on the top floor is good but it is very hot and for the little that there are families with children we do not get along anymore!
Breakfast is very good. The buffet offers a very wide choice.
I recommend this property.

title: Luxurious
comment: We only stayed one night but were impressed by the sumptuousness of the structure. Huge rooms with both bathtub and shower. Large and comfortable beds. ColaIone absolutely level both for variety and quality. Great devalued at the entrance but you can access from an alternative entrance to avoid stairs.

title: Grand looking hotel
comment: Hotel is quite grand, room decor was elaborate. We enjoyed the bathtub. The hotel has a good street view. Overall, clean and comfortable.

title: Hotel, with a good restaurant and a very complete breakfast service. Very large/elegant reception space
comment:
Very good room, with a beautiful bathroom (shower base and bathtub), with a bed view to the bathtub. Broad bed and very comfortable. Free coffee, tea and water in the room
Suit, slippers for access to the pool and the bedroom. Fresh and affordable drinks.

title: Very nice hotel
comment:
This is the most beautiful hotel in Vietnam
It is very well located, close to 'Night Walking Street', Trường Tiền Bridge
which allows to go to Dong Ba market
Breakfast is excellent with lots of choices
The pool is very nice
but the internet is to be reviewed

title: Good hotel
comment: I stayed at this hotel for two nights with a friend and we had a great experience. The room was clean, comfortable, and nicely decorated. The staff were all very friendly and helpful, and the breakfast was fresh and delicious, with a good variety. Even though our stay was short, everything was perfect. I would definitely stay here again!

title: Very nice hotel in the heart of town
comment:
The welcome is privileged, we feel like a VIP, we take care of you as soon as you arrive. We had a beautiful room of 40 m2 on the 7th floor. The furniture is predominantly white, queen bed, chest of drawers, armchair, mini bar. The bathroom is large, with an old-fashioned bathtub overlooking the bedroom, walk-in shower, very nice basin. Very nice swimming pool on the top floor, the bar is on the ground floor with very nice comfortable armchairs.
The breakfast is very varied and excellent, the grape breads are very good, many fruits, quality omelet. I recommend this hotel very clean and well located.

title: Lovely upmarket hotel in Hue
comment: Most beautiful of the hotels we stayed at in Vietnam. Our room was so lovely, had everything we needed and was central to walking street, shopping, massages etc. Never got to use the pool which was a shame as it was gorgeous. Breakfast was excellent also. The staff made us feel special by setting up the room for our anniversary and giving us a cute cake to share.

title: Superb place to stay in central Hué
comment:
Beautiful hotel, everything you would expect from a 4 star. Superb lobby and bar, super friendly reception, spacious room with king size bed, rich breakfast buffet.
Two downsides: at check-in, it is warned that the hot water tap in the room does not provide hot, but piping hot water. Second warning is that the bathroom floor will become slippery. True in both cases, but why don't they do something about it???

title: Good location
comment: The hotel is situated very central near many restaurants and bars and waking distance from the river. The hotel decor, not my taste, baroque kitsch, we had a big room and very big bathroom nice view from the window. The breakfast was buffet with a big variety . The service at the hotel is outstanding every request was immediately answered. In all a good stay

title: Tired hotel which has seen better days…..
comment:
The hotel has probably been stylish at one point in time, but it is in desperate need of a make over and modernization. We came in the evening and the hotel seemed deserted and empty, however the check-in at the reception was effective. We were given a room with water damage so we immediately called the reception, maintenance came and we ended up changing rooms. The reception was helpful, but the rooms are dated.

As it was late we wanted to have dinner at the restaurant, however there were no one in the restaurant – do not know if it is only open for breakfast. The sky bar is closed and this seems to have been the case for a while. The swimming pool area was dark, inviting and it did not seem very clean – definitely not something we were going to use.

The location is great and the breakfast was also very good with many choices.

title: Very classy hotel
comment:
Wonderful super luxury hotel the impressive rooms, reception and dining room, swimming pool needless to say amazing, is a hotel made with a lot of class and category.
Very central and a few minutes away you have many restaurants and lots of entertainment with lots of party and music.
I would certainly return to the same

title: He needs to be old. Beware of mold
comment: Pompous hotel that has certainly seen better days. Arrival in the evening with a half-empty lobby, very (too) soft lighting, bar closed or closing. Really sad. We go to the room and the musty smell is very strong and the feeling is that the humidity is very high. The thermostat does not allow you to put the dehumidification function. We sleep but the unhealthy air, combined with the location in front of the elevator (little soundproofing) pushes us to ask for a new room the next day. With extreme kindness they please us and the new room, on higher floors, is certainly better. Breakfast good, but not great for those who love dessert. Swimming pool, not used but view, beautiful. Ensuite bathroom large but with shower space where the toilet is also located. Result: if you shower then you can not use the toilet without getting wet by entering the space provided. Hotel that in my opinion could use a modern twist. Great location.

title: Amazing.
comment: In the heart of Hue Citadel, the Hotel is located in a place steeped in history, which invites to serenity. The staff is friendly, friendly. Thank you for this great experience.

title: Very nice hotel and located in a quiet street. The staff is very nice and welcoming.
comment:
The hotel is very nice in an Indochinese style and the rooms very comfortable.
The staff speaks English and Duong at the reception also speaks French. They are all pleasant and kind.
I recommend this place located within the citadel.

title: Amazing history and close to Imperial City
comment: Such an amazing hotel with rich history and very comfortable rooms. A short walk to the Imperial Palace and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Will stay here again the next time I visit Hue.

title: Disappointing for Hue
comment:
The location near the Imperial City is not an asset for this hotel. First of all, the rooms are small with no space and very dark. All rooms on the reception side are in plain sight as they are on the ground floor like the host otherwise. Even in broad daylight you had to turn on and so you had to pull back the curtains to be home. This hotel is quite remote from the current city and as most guests were in circuit with agencies. The drivers drop you off in front of the city. But for the evenings we had to take a taxi for us to go to free neighborhood.
Brief on Hue is much better

title: Conveniently located in Hue
comment: The ideal place for a quiet stay in Hue. Nice garden, swimming pool, spacious and comfortable room, excellent buffet breakfast. Inside the walls of the imperial city, in the immediate vicinity of the citadel.

title: Charming hotel
comment: Hotel with lots of charm quiet near the citadel. The rooms are ok, a little dark. The hot water in the shower works quite poorly. Meals and breakfast are ok

title: Nice hotel
comment:
The reception was smiling
friendly
Helpful staff
single room comfortable bedding
safe and free wifi TV
Free tea and coffee
~~
European power outlet
~~
shower 🚿 walk-in shower with everything you need for toilet and more ...
~~~
Air conditioning in the room
~~~
bar- massage -free parking-swimming pool..
~~~
Simple but good breakfast
~~~~
The dinner was excellent
~~~
The hotel is a former hospital located next to the Imperial City
~~~
Hue is a culturally interesting city like any other 💕..
Stayed from 2 to 4 February 26

title: Soothing yet near the crowds
comment: What a nice place to be, close to the Citadel and the forbidden city. Everything within walking distance. Pool not used but is definitely a plus.

title: Great Hotel in the center of Hue
comment:
Great Hotel in the center of Hue, 5min walking distance from the Old Citadel.
The hotel is really welcoming, the rooms are spacious and clean.
We tried the spa and the 60min massage was reinvigorating.
Full breakfast.

title: Unforgettable stay in Hue Historical Building
comment: Stay here. It’s like staying in a museum, with amazing staff and excellent food. Front desk lady Trinh is helpful and sincere. Restaurant manager does a great job, too. This is the former royal doctor’s home and facility, and well preserved and maintained. Comfortable room, surrounded by gardens. Location in the old city is unmatched. Why stay anywhere else in Hue?

title: Do not hesitate to stay here! 🪷
comment:
Do not hesitate to stay here. Staying at this beautiful hotel feels like you're at another one of Hue's incredible museums. The staff were so helpful and we are grateful to Trinh for kindly helping us with bikes and drivers. The restaurant is excellent and good value.
It is hard to leave!

title: Authentic experience in Hue
comment: A lovely authentic Vietnamese style hotel near the imperial Palace breakfast was outstanding. The setting is beautiful and the service wonderful I can highly recommend.

title: Great stay Hue
comment: Great stay. Lovely property. Excellent location and very nice staff. Housed in a complex that used to function as the medical clinic for the Emperor

title: Great stay at Hue
comment: We had an amazing stay here. Right next to the imperial city. We had dinner at their restaurant and loved the food. We also did a massage at their spa and loved it!

title: Stylish and well located
comment: This is a stylish hotel which is very reasonably priced for the standard. It’s right next to the Imperial City, so very convenient. Our room was nicely furnished and the bed was very comfortable. The water in the shower and the basin was hot (not always a given) and there was even conditioner in the shower (but sadly no body lotion). There’s a good sized pool and a comfortable bar. The restaurant had tables outside, and the property was far enough from the road to make al fresco dining a pleasure. The staff were invariably helpful, and in particular provided a solution when it turned out we’d booked our first night for January rather than December (oops!). Breakfast catered for both Vietnamese and western tastes. A choice of teas would have been nice — only Lipton’s was available — but after we mentioned it, they provided us with ginger tea.

title: An oasis in a pleasant city😊!
comment: Lovely atmosphere, fantastic staff. Excellent breakfast. Perfect location. Hotel well restored after the autumn rain disaster.

title: Perfect place with history
comment: The hotel is just next to citadel. It is very cute with very good breakfast. People are very nice and helpful but in my opinion the most important is localization and architecture of it

title: Nice hotel
comment:
A really nice hotel and very nice staff, I had a room right by the pool, good space and nice bed.
Breakfast is all right.
Their restaurant is less good.

title: Experience
comment: Verry good staf, room, food, good atmosphere 😁😁 love every thing, the bed and the bed very good sleep thanks you very good

title: A pearl
comment:
Wonderful experience in full relaxation, the staff is extremely friendly and ready to help you with any request and need.
Highly recommended the spa the girls are magical, we did aroma therapy.
Varied breakfast both sweet and savory.
The rooms are spacious and clean, the bed comfortable!

title: Comfortable and authentic hotel
comment:
Very nice and authentic hotel, highly recommended.
Staff always helpful and courteous, especially Tu Trinh.
Great breakfast and Main dishes vary from day to day

title: Romantic resort in Hue
comment: A gorgeous and cozy hotel with authentic design. You can feel Hue’s romantic atmosphere in every detail. This place is also historically famous for the royal pharmacy origin. I highly recommend to stay here when visiting Hue!☺️

title: Very nice establishment near the Imperial City
comment: Very nice place full of history. The rooms are very comfortable staff at the top. Breakfast is great. The decoration is tasteful and the place is close to the Imperial City. The place was inhabited by the medical mandarins.

title: Vacation Rentals in Hue
comment: This is a beautiful hotel close to the citadel, a must-see tourist attraction! We ate the evening meal at the hotel as well as breakfasts. The food is excellent, the staff is kind. Room 501 is spacious. However, there was no light because the window overlooked the hallway. It is possible to arrange the visit of the tombs with the hotel. That is what we have done and we do not regret it. We recommend this hotel for a tourist stay in Hue!

title: Great time in an authentic hotel
comment: Very nice experience at this hotel, the staff is very welcoming and responds quickly to our needs. The restaurant is top: quality at the level of dishes offered and the kindness of people

title: Everything is perfect thank you!
comment:
Very comfortable hotel, very well decorated with particularly helpful staff.
Breakfast is delicious
A restaurant available from 10 to 22h perfect after visits and inexpensive.
A stone's throw from the imperial city and the staff organizes the.tour of the tombs and pagoda if you wish
.Perfect location in Hue
Everything is done to make your stay very easy and pleasant.

title: Beautiful old Hue
comment:
Spatel d annam is a beautiful hotel located in the Citadel in Hue, one of the most beautiful cities we have ever visited.
The hotel itself is very classy and the staff are great.

title: Yeah, good!
comment: A very nice experience in this establishment where everything is done to make your stay easier and pleasant. Delicate hostesses, smiles, kindness, helpfulness. The rooms are perfect. Quality lunch and restaurant, honest prices. We booked a scooter from Welcoming for a morning at the sea and this morning the bus to Hoi An. Recommend and share!

title: Super relaxed
comment: This is a good place to sample the traditional Vietnamese atmosphere. Breakfast is delicious with plenty of options, it's full of greenery and the staff are enthusiastic and reassuring. I stayed three nights and want to come back soon. It's just that when there's a noisy group nearby, it sounds really loud.

title: An amazing hotel
comment: The staff is super friendly, the rooms are beautiful and the breakfast very very complete. It has a pool, although we couldn't use it because it rained was great, and it has a small garden. We arrived on a night bus from Hanoi, and we were let into our room for an extra fee, things that we found great. A 10 on everything

title: Great hotel with good location
comment:
The hotel makes a good impression overall. The rooms are clean and functional, so you can feel comfortable during your stay. The staff is friendly and eager to respond to the wishes of guests. Breakfast also offers a solid selection and is well suited to start the day.
The location is convenient as attractions and public transport are within easy reach.

title: Holidays
comment: The staff was very friendly, the rooms clean and the food good. The reception was very helpful also regarding questions facing the city. The hotel is very well located as you only need a few minutes walk to the citadel.

title: Excellent staff and hotel
comment: I stayed here for one night and had an amazing time, the staff were super friendly and helpful and took time to answer all questions and give advice. The check in team were especially friendly and helpful. The hotel has an onsite restaurant and food was incredible tasty. The room were was spacious and very comfortable with complimentary tea and coffee. I would definately recommend staying here if you visit Hue, as it it very close to the Citadel and easy to reach the city centre.

title: Peaceful, stylish, and unforgettable stay in the heart of Hue
comment:
This is the best place I’ve ever stayed!
Beautiful design, peaceful atmosphere, and incredibly friendly staff. A hidden gem right in the heart of Hue. Highly recommend!

title: Great stay in Hue
comment: Great hotel, beautiful and clean rooms. Location in Hue, so close to the Citadel, is perfect! The staff is really friendly. Both breakfast and the restaurant (lunch/diner) is great.

title: Lovely historic hotel in great location
comment: Spent 3 nights here and thought our rooms were beautiful and well appointed. Our rooms had a balcony which was great but could have benefited with an overhead fan. Lovely staff, great and extensive breakfast, a party of frogs going off in the garden, and the dinner we had there was excellent. Itt's a great location - just minutes walk to the Citadel and a cool and local feeling neighbourhood. But a 10 min Grab ride to to the thumping town centre. Because the floors are tiled there can be some noose from the corridor but nothing earplugs can't fix. Also -BEST pool temperature in Vietnam - actually cool and refreshing. I will be back

title: Good location
comment:
Nice hotel very close to the Imperial City so good location. Short walk to a nearby street for coffee shops. Ten minute walk to some waterside cafes for lunch.
Hotel itself was an old building and originally a medical centre/hospital so was looking forward to staying. Would have been nice if more was made of this history.
Room was comfortable and we slept very well. Bathroom was a bit tired - shower over the bath with a shower curtain.
Breakfast was just ok.
All our Vietnam hotels were so lovely that this one was probably our least favourite. No complaints just could do with some updates. Apparently, our room was upgraded but we did not realise until checking out.
Staff were friendly and helpful.

title: A M A Z I N G ! ✨️ ❤️
comment:
A M A Z I N G!
Amazing staff, especially Trinh at reception - very helpful and smiley happy person. 😊 The most comfortable bed and pillows and just perfect swimming pool for chilling and sunbathing. Hotel is right next to the Citadel and only 15 minutes walk over the other side of the river. Highly recommend ! 👌

title: Beautiful location
comment: Style hotel, very consistent with the environment. Good location a stone's throw from the Citadel. Rooms a bit dated, but well stocked and all in all comfortable. Not perfectly isolated from the common areas of the rest of the resort and therefore sometimes a little noisy for the passage or proximity of other guests. Characteristic restaurant.

title: Spatel d’ annam
comment: The hotel is absolutely perfect in every way – great services, delicious food, and amazing experiences. Located in the heart of the ancient town, it offers a unique blend of history and modern comfort. The rooms are cozy and well-equipped, and the staff is friendly and attentive. The restaurant serves a variety of dishes, from local specialties to international cuisine. Guests can also enjoy tours of historical sites, spa treatments, and a relaxing pool. This hotel is the perfect choice for anyone wanting to explore the city while enjoying luxury and comfort. Tks for Ms Tien -who work here- treating us so well

title: Very good stay
comment:
Very nice hotel with a very typical decoration, lovely, it feels good.
Nice room quite spacious. Thank you to Iss Tiem for welcoming us so well and for her kindness. The staff in general were very kind and we were happy with everything! Breakfast very good.
Small flat: the bathroom a little small

title: Nice hotel in a central location at the Imperial Palace. Unfortunately, it's a little old. Very nice staff.
comment:
Actually a snug hotel with a central location. Staff was very friendly and attentive as everywhere in Vietnam. The hotel has a restaurant and bar that also satisfies European expectations. Unfortunately, the hotel is already a bit old. In many places moisture damage appears. Hot water was not always available.
Measured according to European standard I would award 3 stars.

title: Good location. Hotel a little tired. Breakfast basic.
comment:
Good location just across the road from the imperial city. Superior Room was very small and a little bit tired. Restaurant food surprisingly great in the evening. Breakfast is very, very basic.

An easy 20 min walk over a couple of bridges to the main town. We enjoyed the walk but plenty of tuk tuks and transport available if needed

title: 10 / 10 pts🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
comment:
We stayed at Trinh and Tien's Spatula d'Annam in Hue.
It was very very nice.
The staff was very accommodating.
The food was delicious.
We would love to come back 🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰

title: Highly recommend!
comment: I have always had a great experience in Hue! The city's rich history and culture make it a special place to visit. This is the third time I have visited Hue and the second time I have stayed at this hotel within 03 years. This time, I booked the Duplex Room, and then they upgraded me to Premier Deluxe. It's so good! The room is most generously sized with a comfortable seating area and a large bathroom with a big bathtub. The staff are always nice and polite. I will come back.

title: Unique and beautiful, amazing staff
comment:
Such a unique and beautiful hotel, in what I think is the nicest part of the city.
The staff are all lovely, everyone always says hello (seriously everyone!). I hope management knows how lucky they are and looks after them. There were a few receptionists who helped us with various things and who were all so helpful and professional, but also warm and personable. I didn't get all of their names, but Tú Trinh and the other receptionists were so kind. They organised a birthday cake for me which was just so thoughtful and such a nice touch. When I come to Hue I would definitely stay here again and will be suggesting to anyone who asks to do the same.

title: Lovely boutique hotel
comment:
It’s a lovely presented hotel within the ancient citadel and walking distance to the Imperial city.
Our room was good with everything you would need but a very small bathroom and the shower inadequate. The power was very poor and the system probably in need of an upgrade.
Breakfast was good with an adequate selection and eggs cooked to order.
We ate in the hotel restaurant the first night but it wasn’t up to the expected standard. The pho was ok and hot but the beef meal was cold and chewy.
As always in Vietnam what makes an establishment is its staff and I couldn’t fault any of them, they were friendly, courteous and helpful.
Trinh the front office manager went out of her way to help me contact my bank at home when I encountered a fraud problem. Nothing was too much trouble and she recommended some good hotels too. Definitely service with a smile.
Thank you all for an enjoyable stay.

Brenda & John

title: Comfortable (but a little tired) spa in Hue old town
comment: We enjoyed our stay here. The location is great, in the old town and very close to the Imperial City. We had a Superior King Room with a private outside area overlooking the pool. The room was comfortable but small and quite tired. We also enjoyed many games guessing which of the many light switches controlled which light. We had an excellent massage at the spa and also enjoyed the steam room. Breakfast was limited in terms of the selection, and be aware that (in our experience) food is not replenished, so get there early! The bar and restaurant were very good. Staff were helpful.

title: 2 days in Hue
comment: Very pleasant stay, nice staff and always available, nice location in front of the old fortified city, shame that it is a little far from the lively city center. Pleasantly surprised to have free bikes available for the day.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
This is a really lovely hotel, with great food (breakfast very good). Rooms clean and spacious, with a lovely old fashioned feel to them. There is a nice bar area which serves cocktails.
The staff are excellent, helpful and professional. Would definitely recommend

title: A nice hotel in the center of the old town
comment: A very nice hotel. It is located in the old part of the city. The room is clean and very comfortable bed. Collation is a can poor, apart from the omelet, there was nothing. The spa is great. I had 2 treatments and I was very happy.

title: Great and calm Hotel in Hue, walking distance to Citadel.
comment: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The staff was incredibly friendly, attentive, and always ready to help. The hotel boasts a great ambience, complemented by a lovely restaurant and bar. The restaurant team went above and beyond to accommodate our special dietary preferences, which we greatly appreciated. Thank you for your exceptional hospitality—we will certainly recommend this hotel to our friends and look forward to staying here again!

title: Great.
comment: Beautiful location, enthusiastic staff. Luxury dorm room, located near the Grand Interior, the river, extremely beautiful view. I stood on the 25th floor and could see the whole city in my eye. Everyone who is here must come to try it once.

title: Elegant and Sophisticated Luxury with Excellent Service. Just... Not Much Nearby
comment:
The hotel gets five stars because both it, and the staff deserve 5 stars.

Our suite was gorgeous, the hotel is elegant and luxurious and immaculate - and our views were stunning in all directions.

The staff are supremely skilled. Helpful, always available, never in your face. In fact Tin, at the Front Desk is a particular jewel. He helped us navigate the chaos of Vietnam Airlines cancelling our flight to Cambodia, switching all passengers to Cambodia Airlines, failing to notify anyone of the flight change - and therefore being unable to check in.

We were stuck, he stepped right in, called the airlines and got everything sorted. Enormous help and an perfect example of the quality of service at the Vinpearl.

The breakfast is astonishingly good, with numerous stations offering any and every type of food you could imagine - all wonderfully prepared, presented and abundant.

Our only "complaint" has nothing to do with the hotel itself - but note to travelers, there is very little within walking distance: no nearby markets we could find, nothing of interest to visit, etc. This may be a failure on our part (though we have enjoyed great success everywhere else: Hanoi, Hoi An, Da Nang, Saigon, Siem Reap, et al) so the lack in Hue was surprising. Instead of going out and exploring, we chose to take a two night "luxury rest" here and it was wonderful. Great food, abundant drinks, comfort and relaxation.

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment:
This is a modern city hotel in a great location in Hue. It dominates the skyline.
It’s a great place to stay - comfort, staff, food and drink are all first class.
We had a deluxe room on the 23rd floor which afforded fantastic views of the city. If you want to go higher, there is a very good restaurant and rooftop bar.
All in all a great place to stay and highly recommended

title: Unmissable address in Huē
comment:
Unmissable hotel in the center of Huē, high-end service and services upon arrival.
Our room was located on the 25th floor and had a great view of the river.
The decoration is refined, the bathroom spacious and there is no lack of equipment.
The indoor pool with panoramic views is very nice and the water is very good.
We had an early train, so we couldn’t test the breakfast buffet but the reception team was kind enough to have us prepare takeaway bags.

title: Oasis of Calm when travelling though Vietnam
comment: Melissa Vinpearl provided a welcome high end respite from the smaller city hotels during our stay in Vietnam. Rooms huge, every facility perfect and breakfast/dinner wonderful. Walking distance to the imperial Palace and for markets/food tour start points. Fantastic rooftop bar and high enough that we were above the clouds (well it was raining!). Only negative - volume of the music in the rooftop bar if you want to talk !!

title: Absolutely AMAZING 10 🌟
comment: Wow! This hotel is absolutely stunning! From the spectacular set ir to the amazing staff and incredible views from the sky bar and our room. The breakfast was also incredible 🤤 Hands down a highlight stop to my vacation. Thinh @ the front desk went above and beyond and has a BEAUTIFUL voice! I caught him singing early in the morning when I snuck to the lobby because of my roommates snoring!

title: Good experience
comment: Excellent experience while staying at Melia Vinpearl Hue. Because I’m alone, I’ve spent a lot of time at the hotel. I was impressed by the hotel''s service, especially well impressed by you Spa staff named Trang, you were very enthusiastic and suggested a variety of attractive places to visit around Hue. Very Satisfied

title: A week chillaxing
comment: Amazing place to stay. Excellent staff and facilities. Our go to place when we stay in Hue. Highly recommended. Can't wait to go back 2027.

title: I'll bring back a good report of my stay at Melia Hue
comment:
Great to have a team of polite and helpful staff attending o our needs.
Counter staff are patient and their knowledge of English is ood and commendable.
Amenities in the rooms work well.
Cheerful and friendly environment at the restaurant. Well labelled food items catering to diverse tastes.
Well done.

title: Hotel
comment: Good and beautiful hotel. Friendly and courteous staff. Clean and big bed.

title: Great for families and business travelers
comment:
Clean, spacious, modern, comfy rooms. Very business like hotel but they lots of amenities for families. Wonderful indoor pool with a walled in toddler area that I found very helpful. Kids play room with some activities. Incredible range of breakfast items with fresh and delicious food.

Great place to stay.

title: Spotless hotel, great spa, delicious food, and excellent lounge service. Special thanks to Ms. Hiep!
comment: Amazing stay with excellent service

title: THE hotel in Hue
comment:
The Melia in Hue is the hotel that most Westerners stay in when visiting Hue, it is central and the tallest in the city.

It is modern as expected from the Melia chain, and it was a great two night escape given the bad weather we experienced.

We booked a suite Levels experience, which was fantastic. The levels lounge had a great view across the city, with free pouring wine, beer and selected cocktails for three hours, with small snacks. Tea and Coffee were available for the rest of the day.

The suite was fantastic, and in the U.K. would cost considerably more. Well worth the upgrade.

Staff were friendly and helpful in booking transfers and providing suggestions.

title: Wonderful
comment:
Great, modern, brand new feel-good hotel, fantastic views.
Restaurant (top) also highly recommended.

Would definitely come back.

title: Luxury in Hue
comment: We booked a Level Room and we checked in at The Level Lounge and due to our late arrival we missed the evening cocktails and they offered us two free cocktails at The Sky Bar, what an unexpected surprise. Our corner Level Room was huge with most amazing views. Bathroom facilities were exceptional and the free laundry items were very welcome. The Level Lounge is a great place to relax and enjoy snacks and drinks. Breakfast was good with a big variety. We did not make use of the pool and spa facilities but it looked amazing. All staff were very professional and helpful. The hotel is well located and most areas are within walking distance. If you planning a trip to Hue you cannot go wrong with this hotel.

title: A+ experience staying at this hotel, will be recommending to friends and family next time I visit Hue Vietnam
comment: Great stay, friendly hosts, clean rooms and professional staff, would recommend anyone to stay here, stayed on the 25th floor with stunning view of Hue! Great breakfast and recommended steak house dinner in the sky!

title: Modern Luxury in Hue
comment: The Vinpearl is a modern property in central Hue with expansive views. Our suite was expansive with river and city views from floor to ceiling windows in both living and bedroom. The Level lounge and Concierge access is definitely worth including. The staff was flexible and very helpful. .if you are looking for a modern 5 star property in Hue Vinpearl is an excellent choise.

title: EXCELLENT
comment: The location is beautiful, close to the center, we were especially taken care of by Noel, she was polite and helpful, and also helped us experience the very good food service, whatever tastes in Hue she knew. Our family was extremely happy

title: Luxury, fine hotels
comment: Great location, clean rooms, friendly staff. Next time I definitely stay with family when in Hué.

title: A lovely stay
comment: Certainly the tallest building in Hue, the Vinpearl can be seen anywhere in the city. We had a Level Deluxe room based on the 32nd floor with awesome views of the City. A wonderful room, very big and comfortable and being a Level room gave us access to the executive lounge for canopies, beers and wine for 3hrs each day and all other times, tea coffee and soft drinks. For the size of the hotel the swimming pool was small and about 7 sunbeds. There is a Steam room, Jacuzzi and Sauna but it is separated so men and women only. 2 lovely ladies of note that made our stay so nice are Hiep and Tam (i think thats her name, the new girl who usually is on reception but helped out on the Level). Overall, a great stay there.

title: Location, comfort and services
comment: A very comfortable hotel with all kinds of amenities. Attentive and hospitable staff. Very good location

title: Expectations are not met
comment:
First of all, Melia Vinpearl opened in 2018 and is one of the most expensive hotels in town, if not the most expensive. And that's how I'm gonna measure it.
Booked was a Premier room on "The Level", i.e. the Executive/Club floors. Corresponding to what the view great and the room spacious. You can see some wear and tear after almost 8 years but that is very much in line. You can also ignore the fact that the cosmetic mirror is not suitable for women under 1.75m. Breakfast is really good and very extensive. So far everything is fine, but then there are also several very negative points.
First of all, the elevators - I've never seen you have to wait so long for an elevator, the controls are underground. In the end everyone was usually at the top or everyone at the bottom, but you stood and waited. Talking to the other guests, you could tell it was normal.
The second item is "The Level". Booking comes with some benefits and just The Level Lounge. In the end, however, there is almost nothing left of it except the high floor - it is a waste of money.
As in other hotels with the concept, you check in and out comfortably in the lounge. Nice idea, only you can't get into the lounge without a keycard for the elevator. And when you check out you have to wait twice for the elevator - only effect: Waste of time.
Next benefit: Late checkout and early check-in upon availability. But if this is not available 30 minutes before the official time, you might not want to advertise it.
Another point: "welcome amenity in your room and a take – away gift upon your departure". A small dessert and fruit came into the room but at check out there was nothing. You certainly don't need to, but then why apply?
And the main point - the lounge. Between 15:30 and 18:30 there is wine, beer, canapés, otherwise soft drinks, nuts, cookies. That's the theory. On the first evening you had to wait 10 minutes for an orange juice and on the second evening there were simply no free tables. It's not like a hotel knows how many occupied rooms and guests you could have and then build the lounge accordingly. It was practically useless. Also the fact that all drinks run over the overwhelmed service is weird, why can't you put the drinks as usual for self-service? Funny austerity measure?
Unfortunately, I now have a negative point to make that is a little more serious. The safety of electrical installations. There were two points in the room that must never happen. At the cable of the dessert lamp, bare copper wires were exposed at the dimmer. The spot seems to have been patched before (insulating tape) but now the wires were exposed again, quite coincidence that there was no short circuit yet. So you could comfortably grip 220V with your fingers. This could still be described as negligent maintenance (Vietnam may not have close inspection obligations). But the second problem was fully intentional and also potentially life-threatening. Vietnam does not use standard sockets, mostly US or British plugs. Therefore, one usually finds universal socket, so here too. They can only make the grounding contact via pins, such as British plugs. But now they have bought a kettle with a metal housing and Schuko plug, which has no chance to connect the ground conductor. In short, once the kettle has a defect, you are perfectly connected to 220V.
I think after the description it is understandable why I cannot recommend the hotel.

title: Great stay in
comment: The hotel is excellent, up to the chain to which it belongs. Cleanliness flawless, super attentive and courteous staff, the restaurant on the 30th floor with breathtaking views of the city deserves a dinner.

title: Brilliant
comment:
Absolutely amazing stay, we were treated with highest regards as soon as we stepped into the hotel. Throughout the experience has been exceptional and i 100% recommend staying here.
