We stayed with the Level package which gave us access to the premium check-in and check out as well as premium lounge area and breakfast area. Definitely staying here again if I’m back in Hue.

title: Fantastic stay
comment:
We stayed here for 3 nights 15-18 Feb and cannot recommend the hotel enough. Any correspondence I had with the hotel ahead of time was swiftly responded to, and we decided to book the Level rooms based on the reviews (plus hubby liked the idea of somewhere to relax with a few glasses of wine).

Due to our flight time from Siem Reap changing, and then a subsequent delay, we arrived closer to 7pm as our flight was into DaNang airport. After being checked in on the 32nd floor, we were still offered a complimentary drink from the bar which was kind as we were outwith the time period. We also managed to snag a few of the canapés just before they got whisked away. They were superb!

Our room was gorgeous, a lovely huge bed (a bit firm for my husband but perfect for me), a lovely powerful shower and great views. Compared to what we stayed at in Siem Reap (and that was nice) , this was so decadent probably because it’s much more modern. As for breakfast…. Yum. A huge selection but we stuck with fruit, some of the Hue specialty dumplings, pho, and perhaps a wee pastry or two (their coconut pastry was really good). Fresh fruit juice was excellent too (sometimes it’s more like from a carton but this seemed truly fresh). Thankfully our 2 days of sightseeing were slow starts to enable us to enjoy breakfast and not rush off.

The staff we dealt with were all very pleasant and helpful and organised us a driver to take us to the tombs on our first day as I hadn’t quite organised myself ahead of time. He didn’t seem to charge much more given it was the eve of Tet. I think I paid 700k for 4 hours of his time.

Our only issue, and this was unfortunate, was that the few restaurants I had ear marked for trying out were closed due to Tet. Nobody’s fault, just one of those things, and we didn’t want anywhere fancy. We went to a little family run restaurant a mere 5 min walk away on our first night and ended up there again. It hit the spot.

It was an easy 15-20 min walk from the hotel to the citadel, and we ended up getting a Grab taxi afterwards to the pagoda along the river and then back again.

I suspect we won’t return to Hue again as we’ve seen all we’d like to see, but you never know. If we do, I won’t hesitate to return to this hotel again.

title: Excellence
comment:
The hotel is very well located, close to many restaurants and a fifteen minute walk from the Imperial City.
The staff is very attentive. The room is spacious and the Spa very nice.
Very good value for money if you go directly through the hotel website to book.

title: Room cleaner steals from room
comment: The hotel is good, but it is very unpleasant that the cleaning ladies steal things from the rooms. My wife's newly bought powder was stolen after cleaning the room. The hotel administration was not very helpful, they suggested calling the police for an item worth 60 euros. The manager, Mr. Linh, was unable to resolve the situation. Shame on this MELIA hotel. I will never return to this hotel. I SUGGEST YOU CHOOSE ANOTHER HOTEL.

title: 5 star hotel for a 3 star price!!
comment: A 5 star hotel at incredible prices!! Can walk all over town and easily find your way back to the tallest building in town. The breakfast was incredible - two hot to order stations, incredible breads, asian food, western food - the best breakfast of our trip!!! The pool and gym are gorgeous as well. Highly recommended

title: Reception, solution-oriented and professional
comment: What thrilled us most was the woman named Noel at the reception, who was with professionalism, very good English and courtesy with all problems immediately helped us. A reliable, solution-oriented work, thank you for this

title: Excellent hotel with some upgrade needed
comment: Overall this is a great hotel and its location is near a number of good restaurants. It’s also near the Hue Walking Street area that closes on weekends. Room is spacious and staff is very helpful and friendly. The breakfast spread is very good. There are both local and western food counters. We stayed on a high level and it overlooks the Perfume River and we had the blessing to watch the Lunar New Year fireworks. So why do I rate it 4 stars - because the television and the telephone doesn’t work well. Plus the electric sockets are quite loose to plug into. Especially those on the floor at the writing table. The television is dated and the screen colours are blurry. When we call the spa for appointment, the receptionist cannot hear us. Hopefully my next visit will be better.

title: Everything is absolutely perfect!
comment: From the room on the 28th floor until the availability of all the staff, everything is done to make this stay inoperative and the Melia sign a reference for our next destinies.

title: If I come back, I'll repeat hotel. It's super!
comment: Super hotel with very spacious and comfortable rooms. Very good bed, shower too and very cool views. The only criticism is that they could run a little better vacuum through the carpet (nowadays another type of floor would be better). The super complete breakfast for both Asians and Europeans. The pool not very large but quiet and pleasant. About the location: quite close to the river and bars and restaurants. You can walk to the citadel but we took a grab (for us very cheap), the same when visiting the graves etc. If I go back to Hue I'll repeat hotel.

title: Great Experience with Professional and Friendly Staff
comment:
The hotel is in a very convenient location, close to many attractions and restaurants. The service was outstanding, particularly from the Level team. Thao took great care of us and made the stay extra comfortable with attentive and friendly support. I would definitely stay here again.
If you want, I can make it sound more luxury, more emotional, or stronger appreciation for Thao

title: Very enjoyable hotel and service
comment: Ms. THAO's very passionate service helped us to connect with the drivers and the company we want to take the bus, so we can stay safe. Very good hotel, stay next time.

title: I really really love this place!
comment: Honestly the staff here are the best, most accommodating, friendliest, most wonderful staff at any hotel I’ve ever stayed at in my entire life. Check in and check out we’re both speedy, Friendly and we had to check out at 5:30 AM and the staff had breakfast boxes waiting for us to take on our journey. And we didn’t even have to request a breakfast box. They just offered to bring us one! The hotel itself is really beautiful and comfortable.We stayed in a rather large suite that was really well appointed. The bed was comfortable, the linens were very nice and the decor was fresh. The restaurants were all really good and the staff go out of their way every single day to make sure that every aspect of your experience is 100% wonderful. This is how all hotels should be. I really love this place and I would come back to Hue just to stay here!

title: Wonderful experience
comment: Modern property near the city center of Huè. Staff always available and attentive to every detail. We stayed in a room at The Level which gave us the opportunity to take advantage of several benefits including free laundry for two garments a day and after a few days of vacation was very useful. Amazing views of the city and breakfast with a wide selection that is banded beyond my expectations despite having traveled to all continents for over 40 years. Special thanks to Kim Mee

title: Five star luxury at an affordable price
comment: The hotel is fantastic and can compete with any 5 star hotel you have seen in other cities at a fraction of the cost. It is easy to find as it is the tallest building in Hue. The rooms are modern and luxurious with every amenity. The included buffet breakfast is huge with so many selections. Hint if you need laundry done, a laundry Dung Da Hue is a 5 minute walk from the hotel at a very reasonable price and when the laundry is done, they will deliver it at no cost to the hotel.

title: Great hotel
comment: This hotel was amazing from start to finish. We were greeted immediately at the door, bags were taken to our room and we were able to smoothly check in. The building itself was immaculate and permanently clean, the facilities were great and the restaurant at the top of the hotel, although not having the most amazing food This trip, had views second to none on our trip so far.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
Great hotel, spacious rooms, great breakfast. A special mention for CHRISTMAS who took care of booking us a guide with a driver for the tours.
Thank you.

title: Meliá Vinpearl Hue
comment:
The service at this hotel was very thoughtful and made my whole trip smooth.The room very clean and bigger than expected(even we are 3 with an extra bed)

It’s highly recommended !

title: Functional
comment:
Functional hotel without too much charm, with all the comforts of a 5 star accommodation. Although it might seem like a large hotel the truth is that, although it is a very tall building, there are few rooms per floor. Its location is fantastic to be able to walk through the best area of downtown Hub and friendly staff, as in all Vietnam.
However, the resignations of the rooms advertised on the website I think overestimate the surface. I stayed in a premium room that I don't think measures 47 m2. Breakfast is also nothing special and, in addition, the room in which it is served is very unwelcoming and with music at a volume that makes it even less comfortable. In any case the value for money of the hotel is more than right

title: Great!
comment:
Very friendly staff. Top room, clean with fantastic views.
Nice Sky Bar.
Breakfast buffet with rich offer.

title: Very average hotel in Hue
comment: The hotel is a physically imposing high rise in an otherwise historic Hue. The staff are pleasant and the public and private spaces are superficially nice. But beyond the surface things are very average. We paid for access to the Level lounge. Again, a nice space but the food offerings are very meager and uninspiring. The breakfast is similarly disappointing. Little or no fruit selection and a buffet of extraordinarily average quality. Even the Vietnamese dishes lack flavor or quality. They have a “Level” area for premium guests. That’s a bit of a joke as all they do is place you in a segregated room that lacks ventilation and is farther away from the food. When we asked for tea and coffee in this “elite” area the staff told us it was self service. It’s not a bad hotel but it’s not a great hotel either. It could be a lot better if the management improved the food offerings and made the Level a bit more premium.

title: Take me back!
comment:
This was probably the best experience I had at an hotel. The room was amazing, the bed was incredibly comfortable.

The VIEWS! Oh my!

However it was the staff that made this stay what it was. Every staff member we came across was so pleasant and went above and beyond. This started even before check in with a welcome email. It was also my birthday and they made it very special. I was greeted by so many staff with birthday wishes. Treats were left with a had written note from guest experience manager.

We spent alot of time with the Level concierge and had so many fun conversations, got lots of recommendations and learned so much about Hue. All the staff there was amazing but there was one in particular I spent so much time talking to and I am so upset I did not write down her name. The Level snacks were great and there was a daily open bar for a few hours in the afternoon.

The breakfast was the best at any hotel we had been to in Vietnam, in fact it was probably one of the best hitel breakfasts we have ever had.

Hue was a beautiful city and will hold a special part in our heart. We would go back to this hotel again in a heartbeat.

title: A nice hotel in a nice city.
comment: Had a wonderful stay in this hotel. I paid for the lounge experience and it did not disappoint. The staff were helpful, especially Nguyen. The breakfast buffet had many options, with even clearly marked vegan options. The hotel is a short walk from the restaurant/night life area which kept noise levels down.

title: We liked everything
comment: A good hotel, right in the center you can reach everything on foot, Imperial Palace about 2 km to the river about 800 m so really well located

title: I want to use this affiliated hotel next time!
comment: I spent three nights in a room with access to The Level Lounge and I can recommend it for its excellent service, dedicated staff and clean, well-maintained facilities. The only trouble is that there is no power source in the place where I use a hairdryer. This is a mystery for a five-star hotel, but it doesn't matter much.

title: Perfect place
comment: Amazing! I can't find the words. This place was the best. I want to come back here:)

title: Excellent!!!
comment:
I would say it’s the most beautiful hotel we stayed in before the final feet of our tour of Cambodia los Vietnam.
Both the location and the design of the building are beautiful. Especially the staff behavior was fantastic, but I've expressed my satisfaction to their managers before leaving the hotel and I want to mention it here. I was especially pleased with the kind care of the “Lam” in the breakfast room, and I was very happy with the close care of all the employees in the front desk when they found out about my inconvenience, including “Quewen.”
All the equipment in the rooms are very Newbie clean shiny rooms design very nice beds sheets very clean and very comfortable, bathroom and all the equipment are very nice.
I'm a traveler who travels a lot because of my profession and I've stayed in different hotels in various countries around the world, but I'm most pleased to say that the friendly and kind care of the staff is key, as well as the cleanliness and beauty of the hotel.
When you leave, I say I wish you had stayed longer, it comes first.

title: Excellent place to stay
comment: These wonderful people go out of their way to assist you and help in anything you want to do. They made reservations for me to attend a cooking class for example. We had a Level membership and stayed on the 31st floor. Amazing! I would go back or stay at any of their sister hotels. Thank you for a wonderful week long stay

title: Hue - short stay.
comment: All the facilities expected of an international hotel. Very clean and the staff were very friendly and helpful. Good location

title: A hotel has not missed if you are staying in Hue.
comment: Great location that offers a unique panorama of the city. Very good comfort in well equipped and spacious rooms. Breakfast served on the 7th floor will leave us only good memories because everything is fresh and good. Friendly staff and this hotel is undoubtedly one of the best addresses in Hue.

title: Exceptional hotel!
comment: This is an exceptional hotel! We had booked a room with Level Service. Our room was on the 32nd floor with an expansive view of the city, river, and mountains. Linens and towels were clean and in excellent condition. Level service included free canapés, wine, and cocktails from 3:30pm to 6:30pm. Delicious breakfast. Also, included free laundry of two items per night. Swimming pool was clean. Walking distance to restaurants and cafes. Excellent location. Highly recommended!

title: Nice hotel, good service
comment: Friendly, helpful pesonal, nice breakfast buffet, good location of the hotel, clean and nice room. Top Laundry—Service and wonderful massage from Lyna and Thuy. Highly recommended!

title: Only hotel to stay in in Hue
comment:
I only have positive things to say about this hotel. It was our favorite one out of all hotels we stayed in. We found that many 5 star hotels in Vietnam did things to about 90%. Not the Meliá. Everything here is 200% up to standard. Fantastic rooms with beautiful views. A exceptional breakfast, fantastic spa, pool and bar. The rooftop bar and restaurant are also something I can highly recommend. The dry cleaning service was fast and extremely good.
Thank you for a fantastic stay! I am wowed by this hotel

title: Noel the star at melia vinpearl hue
comment:
We had a lovely stay at the vin pearl hotel, room was clean and nice. The most outstanding thing about the vin pearl is the staff on reception they rang to check I was ok after being unwell. But the star of this hotel is Noel we asked for help trying to book the train ticket .Noel actually booked it for us she came up to our room as we were having trouble with the website she then printed the receipt out for us late in the evening and followed up with emails. she is wonderful asset to this hotel hope management appreciate you as we certainly do.
We ate at the restaurant also which was ok, apart from the steak which difficult to cut and eat the response from the restaurant was disappointing .

title: Excellent Hotel
comment: The hotel is very modern, the room with very spacious views and with a stunning view of the river and the whole city. Very complete breakfast and all the super friendly staff. Unbeatable location. We were very satisfied and would definitely come back!

title: Luxury in Hue
comment: We had the most wonderful experience here. The hotel staff is extremely attentive and professional. We upgraded our stay on the Level and received very nice amenities such as food credit which we used at their steak restaurant and access to the lounge with free flowing cocktails and wine daily and snacks. Beautiful hotel , the tallest building in Hue. Beautiful views from our room.

title: You will find peace, comfort, and a warm welcome; everyone is dedicated to their work.
comment: From the moment we stepped in, we felt like we were coming home. Everyone here took such good care of us. Every detail here shows genuine care for the customers. If we have the chance, we will definitely come back again. Thank you a thousand times.

title: Exceptional
comment: One of the best hotels in Vietnam. Room at 32. Stock The Level with private lounge. All staff are extremely friendly and accommodating. Breakfast, everything you want, very fine. THANK YOU

title: Loved my stay @ Hue , especially my hotel
comment:
Stayed for 3 nights in a level room , the service was great in the hotel overall , breakfast was awesome , you would be spoilt for choice , since we were limited in our dietery requirements , the chef @ breakfast made special meals which was thoroughly enjoyed .
The rooms are spacious , modern with breathtaking views .
My only constructive criticism is that the staff at the Lounge need more training , to offer customers more wine or beer when your glass is finished , replenish or be observant to replenishing the water , wafers etc when walking by .
Overall a great stay , upmarket , value for money .
The staff were more than courteous and ever willing to help , I would most definitely return .

title: Lives up to the expectations
comment:
How I discovered the Melia Vinpearl Hue was a simple google search “best buffet breakfast Hue” And for a city which in my opinion has the best food in Vietnam this was something to live up to. The hotel is large, polished with all the expected modern amenities - For example a mini Starbucks in the lobby. Location wise it is 3-4 blocks from the river and only a short walk to most of the key areas. There is an indoor pool that was delightful if only a little shallow.
And the final review, yes the breakfast was excellent. Plenty of east and west options with a pretty big Korean influence. I’d happy recommend staying here.

title: Hue Melia - great spot to stay.
comment:
This place is outstanding!
Fantastic rooms with amazing views of the city and Perfume River, fantastic amenities and fabulous breakfasts - traditional and western fare. All with a very friendly, professional and accommodating staff with great advice for local tips.
Great access to local markets and eateries, street food and shopping stalls.
A fantastic experience in Hue.
We'll be back to Melia.

title: It's ok, i guess
comment:
Yes it's a really nice hotel, yes the staff are attentive and helpful, the concierge is fantastic, breakfast is great. But there's lots of little things that made it a 3 star rating for me.
1. 4 lifts and you wait age's...not uncommon to wait 5-10 minutes for an already overcrowded lift
2. Lamps in the room with loose wiring need to be jiggled to make work, 1 power point did not work at all
3. My safe kept flashing "low battery" and stopping half way through the lock/unlock, no way I was trusting that. I had to ask twice for the battery to be changed and when I was told it was fixed, it wasn't.
4. My wife was in the bathroom when housekeeping arrived so I asked them to come back in 30 mins as we will be out then. They came back at 4pm, 6 hours later when we were asleep

Hue doesn't have a lot of options, overall a good hotel but ...meh....

title: The River of Perfumes
comment: Impeccable stay! Clean and helpful structure with respect to various needs as well as location in a great location with respect to the attractions of the city! Superb international breakfast

title: Best hotel in Huê with stunning view over the city
comment: Best hotel in Huê in highest building of the city. Stunning view over the city. Very bruce and friendly staff and comfortable and clean rooms. Thanks a lot!

title: Very good hotel with excellent service
comment:
Visited over Christmas 2025. The location is very central with extensive views.

The hotel is well organized and the rooms are large and comfortable.

We had club lounge access which was quite good including free drinks in the afternoon.

Service was excellent and the staff try very hard to help.

title: Worst experience ever
comment: Worst experience ever! We made a reservation for the last day of the year, but when we arrived, they were overbooked. The head receptionist was extremely rude, and we had to leave without any assistance or solution. Don’t go there!

title: Nothing Special
comment:
I changed to this hotel after relentless floods in the area. Ironically the lobby of this hotel flooded and they were closed 2 weeks. All the public spaces of this hotel are ugly and cavernous to me. The elevators took forever.
However our corner King suite club suite room was superb. Great space and bathroom. The in house food offerings are poor and the lounge and free drinks are always of a poor quality. Cheap gin and wines that you'd never buy and everything has pork pork pork. Besides the room and a reasonably comfortable bed, I can't recommend this hotel for more than a quick place to be to see the Imperial City

title: That's great. Can we highly recommend
comment:
Absolutely outstanding hotel – unqualified recommendation!

Our stay at Meliá Vinpearl Huế was simply fantastic and exceeded all our expectations. As soon as you enter the hotel you can feel the elegant atmosphere and the high quality standard.

The rooms are modern, very clean and stylishly decorated, with a fantastic view over the city and the Perfume River. The bed was extremely comfortable and we slept excellently.

We would like to emphasize the excellent service: The entire staff was friendly, attentive and professional at all times. You feel welcome and well looked after from the first moment.

The breakfast buffet was exceptional – a huge selection of international and Vietnamese food, all fresh and of high quality. Also the pool and spa area is beautiful and perfect for relaxing after a day of sightseeing.

The location of the hotel is also ideal: central but still quiet, with many sights, restaurants and cafes nearby.

Overall a luxurious, well run hotel that we would book again without hesitation at any time. Many thanks to the entire team for this unforgettable stay!
And don't forget to have a drink on the 35th floor.

title: Holiday stay
comment: The staff was excellent and the chief bellman was swift and got us out of the rain quickly. Amazing buffet style breakfast with many options and views of the entire city! Would book again.

title: Dominating the Skyline: Breathtaking Views & Unbeatable Location
comment:
I stayed at Melia Vinpearl Hue for 2 nights (Dec 23 – Dec 25) as a solo traveler.
Without a doubt, this hotel is the most prominent landmark in Hue, and my stay was exceptional. Here is a breakdown of the Pros and Cons for future guests.

​✅ PROS:
​1. Unbeatable Location & Accessibility:
The hotel is located right in the heart of the city. Being the tallest building in Hue, it is easy to navigate to and from anywhere. For a solo traveler, this central location was incredibly convenient for accessing all major tourist spots and local restaurants.

​2. Overwhelming Panoramic Views:
As you can see from my attached photos, the view from the room is simply spectacular. Whether it's the Perfume River winding through the city or the distant mountains, the scenery from the high floor is mesmerizing. Just sitting by the window gave me a sense of peace and healing.

​3. "The Level" Lounge – A Perfect Pit Stop:
I stayed in a Level room and had access to the lounge. The staff service was professional and warm. For a solo traveler walking around the city, the lounge served as a perfect "sanctuary" to drop by, grab a drink, and rest comfortably in the middle of the day.

​🔻 CONS (Note for Lounge Users):
​1. Limited Food at the Lounge:
While the lounge service is excellent, the food selection (canapés/evening cocktails) is quite limited. The variety is small, and the portions are light. Do not expect the lounge food to replace a full meal. It is strictly good for light snacks and drinks before heading out for dinner.

​[Verdict]
Despite the minor downside of the lounge food variety, the hardware (View & Room) and the location make up for everything. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Hue

title: Great option in Hue!
comment: We spent two days at the hotel. Well located, excellent facilities and a very welcoming staff. Highlight for an gym, the view of our room on the 20th floor and for breakfast. From the seventh floor the view is free.

title: Best place in town
comment: The hotel is modern, and the rooms are clean and quiet. Having upgraded, we also had access to the lounge with complimentary drinks and snacks. The staff is extremely kind and professional, with a good command of English. The breakfast is varied and of good quality. An excellent choice as a base for visiting the city of Hue.

title: 3 Nights in December…
comment: Stayed here for 3 nights in a deluxe room on the level. Good modern hotel, nice rooms and the service from the level was particularly good - special thanks to Thinh and the rest of the team. Location is really good with a short walk to walking street and the old citadel. Breakfast was good but I have had better. For what we paid for this I thought it was very good value and I certainly recommend it.

title: Warm Service and Unforgettable Experience
comment: We had a wonderful stay at Meliá Vinpearl Hue. The breakfast was excellent with great variety and quality. The Level Lounge impressed us with its elegant atmosphere and delicious canapés. Special thanks to Hung, the Manager, who kindly supported us with very useful and detailed information about Hue’s attractions, making our two-day visit truly memorable.

title: Beautiful and central, impeccable service
comment: Luxurious but not pretencious. Rooms are well sized, bathroom clean and big. We booked the Level and enjoyed happy hour every day with drinks and appetizers for free, in an exclusive area on level 32. Well worth purchasing. Staff are very attentive and service is excellent. We were served by Siep and others, everyone was impeccable. Thank you Melia!

title: MELIA a high experience in Hue!
comment: Wonderful hotel, incredible view being the tallest building in Hue. Buffet breakfast a highlight, as was the service from Hero and the other staff we encountered. Pool lovely too, as was sky bar!

title: 2 day visit
comment:
Great stay at this luxury hotel. Rooms were immaculate as was room service. First class restaurant served lovely food, steak recommended.
Worth upgrading to Club / Executive for afternoon tea and alcoholic drinks.
Wish we had stayed longer

title: Great hotel in the city centre
comment: Beautiful hotel in the town centre. The rooms were smart, with comfy beds and lovely linen. The breakfast was fantastic with great choice of both local and international options. The service was wonderful and the facilities ( indoor pool and gym) helped on raining days. The staff were great and attentive.

title: Great Staff at a Great Hotel
comment: We are having a wonderful stay. Genuine 5 star experience. Location is central and staff are friendly competent and always willing to support. Particularly Son and Kim Mee - superb ! Thank you.

title: Use this hotel
comment: When you arrive at hotel you already fell the good service here. Easy check and room was perfect/ Clean and good space. we had breakfast and that was also in top, so we can only recommand this hotel

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
Stayed here in early December.
The hotel is next to (above?) a shopping mall but you don't notice any noise.
The location is fine, it's about 8 minutes walk to the busier part of the center where many restaurants and cafes are located and in the evening so cozy busy.
Our spacious room was on the 24th floor, what a view.
Breakfast was decadent, delicious.
The indoor pool had lovely hot water, great.
An extra thank you to Natan from reception for his help with our private driver who spoke little English.

title: Fabulous hotel
comment: Everything was wonderful, from the welcome at reception to checkout! Level up was fabulous, unlimited cocktails and canopies from 3:30-5:30 and coffee, refreshments and cookies the rest of the time. Great breakfast and amazing room with 180 vista of the city! Would I book again… hell yeah!

title: Highest building in Hue city. Highly recommended!
comment: This hotel is the highest building in Hue city and you can enjoy the unblocked view from the room! The hotel is modern and connected to a small shopping mall. The room is clean too. We also enjoyed our drinks at the Zenith Sky Bar, again enjoying the beautiful night views. The staff are friendly and helpful.

title: Melia Vinpearl Hue Exceeded Expectations
comment:
Absolutely superb stay at the Melia Vinpearl Hue. My only regret is that we weren't able to stay longer!

Ethan was in contact with us prior to arrival and was able to let us check in early. He was available if needed throughout our stay. We also worked with Kim Kee when we left and she was very helpful.

We booked rooms on The Level and it exceeded expectations. Our rooms were stunning, The Level spaces were beautiful, and breakfast was excellent. We were only in Hue for 2.5 days and had multiple tours booked so we weren't able to enjoy the hotel as much as we would have liked - I will just need to stay here again on my next visit!

title: Excellent
comment: Excellent location, excellent environment and very friendly staff. Very beautiful city. The imperial city is beautiful

title: Exceptional
comment: Five stars with all the merits. Spacious and clean room, great quality amenities free, views of the whole city, fabulous gym and pool and a great breakfast. It is not far from the citadel.

title: 10/10 No Notes
comment: My second time at the Melia in Hue and it did not disappoint! I was upgraded to a beautiful room and had a lovely facial. Love the location of this hotel, love the friendly staff. While I was waiting on a Grab order, one of the people in the front was kind enough to give me a glass of water. My favorite hotel in Hue!

title: Massage bambú excellent
comment: I was there this morning and the experience was wonderful. The staff were very attentive. I recommend this bamboo massage. Very nice!!

title: Very comfortable base from which to explore the City.
comment:
Liked · An extremely well appointed hotel, room, friendly and helpful staff. Nice pool relaxation area. Lovely sky bar with great views on the top (34th) floor and a quality restaurant on the 33rd floor.

The breakfast was very extensive and a lot of choice, although perhaps not as wide a range of fresh fruit as I might have expected and some things eg croissants ran out for the later sittings.

Overall, highly recommended.

title: Fantastic!
comment: The Melia Vinpearl is an amazing hotel. Our stay was fantastic we have no complaints! The bed was super comfortable and staff are so great.

title: Great hotel for value, comfort and location
comment: Very comfortable rooms at a great value. The roof top bar was great during happy hour to watch the chaos of the town during rush hour. Well located close to the best restaurants.

title: The perfect base to explore Hue.
comment: A wonderful base from which to enjoy Hue. Also having so many quality facilities such as swimming pool, bars and restaurants was especially important for relaxation between tours.

title: Great trip
comment:
Everything is great!
Warmly welcome when I return
I like warm swimming pool especially during this cool weather
I like banana in gym area
And flexible late check out 12:30 of hotel
Thank you for everything

title: Our most memorable experience with friends at Meliá Vinpearl Hue
comment:
It was my first time staying at Meliá Vinpearl Hue, and I must say the guest service was superb. Everyone was courteous and attentive, making our stay both comfortable and enjoyable. From our beautiful, clean, and cozy room to the delightful breakfast buffet at Rumba, to the ever-smiling doorman, Bao — we are truly grateful for their warm hospitality.

One of our friends loves taking pictures, and a special thanks to Bao for his wonderful photographic skills — he really made our friend’s day. We are already looking forward to returning to Meliá Vinpearl Hue on our next visit.

title: Amazing Staff During the Flood – Truly Grateful
comment:
I happened to stay at Melia Vinpearl Hue right when the city was hit by a big flood. It could have been a scary experience, but the hotel staff were absolutely incredible! Even when the power went out and the water got high, they stayed calm, organized, and so caring toward every guest.

They gave us raincoats, helped carry heavy luggage, and even guided us safely through the water. When we had to move to another hotel by boat, the team made sure everyone was comfortable and safe. It was something I’ll never forget — not because of the flood, but because of how kind and professional everyone was.

Every single staff member went above and beyond, always smiling and helping with genuine warmth. I felt completely cared for the whole time.

Huge thanks to the Melia Vinpearl Hue team — you turned a difficult situation into a beautiful memory. I’ll definitely come back one day!

title: Hue city, See you again!
comment:
We traveled to Hue city with many plans and places need to visit. Unfortunately, the weather did not let us follow plan this time. The bad weather with heavy raining made the flooding and create the chaos in Hue.
We stayed hotel with no electricity and elevator. It sounds like a nightmare. But, we will not complain anything because our soul will not accept that. In the chaos, hotel staffs showed us that what definition serving to guests with true passion is. They help us from serving food, candles, luggage, until transfer us to another hotel.
I was impressed with one man and one lady going along with truck to transfer us. They came with us under raining and help us a lot.
Once again thank you.
We will come to Hue again to carry on all our plans. Really impressed with this place.

title: A safety place
comment:
Thank you
It is the first thing we would like to send to all the hotel staff. We were unlucky to travel to Hue in the flood days and suffered some difficulties - no electricity, water come to hotel, etc. but it is nothing to us when we see the staff dedications. They worked from the early morning to clean and fight with water come to lobby, they serve us meal buffet, they provided us amenities, they prepared the transportation and paid everything. Even they offer complimentary room for the last night which we think we deserve to pay after their dedication. So proud when hotel have the good staffs like this.
They did not come home and stay to help us instead of.
Really appreciated with all help from hotel. So professional and lovely.

title: Unforgettable trip
comment:
It will be one of the most unforgettable experiences in our life. We traveled to Hue from 25.10 and stay at Melia Vinpearl Hue. We heard the news for raining and flood but never think it like this way.
On 26th Oct, the water increased and flooded all the city. The water come to the lobby and our hotel cut off the electricity. If we looked at in the negative way, it was terrible because there was no elevator and electricity, we need to walk by stair from high floor. However, we did not look that way because it will be not fair. During the things happened, we got the well take care from the hotel staffs. They inform us when electricity was cut off, they provide the light and all support.
Surprisingly we still got the buffet by tomorrow morning and all staffs worked like nothing happened, but when i asked them and i know thay they could not contact to their family and no connecting. They worry about their family so much and they still serve us with all professional. Nothing to complain.
We checked out next day due to no electricity and hotel already prepare the truck to transfer us very safety. They brought our luggages from hight floor to lobby with the smile, super nice.
We said good bye and staffs see us off.
With all the dedication like this, we could not meet in any other hotel even it 5 or 6 star.
Deeply thank you.

title: A must stay!
comment: 5/5 our fav hotel on the trip! Amazing, room size, bed and service was outstanding! So clean! Great location can’t wait to come back to visit

title: Great experience!!!
comment:
Honestly one of the best places I’ve stayed at. Everything from the room to the food and service was just perfect. The room was super clean and comfy, and the staff everywhere were so friendly and helpful.

The breakfast at Rumba was amazing, so much to choose from and everything fresh. I loved spending time by the pool and having coffee at Moss bar — really chill vibe. The drinks at Sky Bar were great too, and the view is just wow.

Dinner at Alma restaurant was honestly one of my favorites, every dish was delicious. You can really tell the team there puts a lot of effort into what they do.

Every outlet I went to had great service, everyone smiling and always ready to help. Really felt taken care of from start to finish. Definitely a 5 star experience all around

title: Great experience at the Level Melia!
comment: I spent a several days in Hue at Meliá Vinpearl at the Level and it was a fabulous experience. The staff from the person greeting you to people behind the counter were very helpful and attentive which made my stay extra special. I would totally recommend this to anyone and consider upgrading to the Level.

title: Great Sky Bar
comment:
Great evening in Zenith sky bar, bar food was good and service was good from Khao.
Awesome views despite Typhoon Fengshen!

title: Come herw
comment: Really amazing Coffee cocktail with coconut flavours and good city views worth the trip out. Great service from Khoa!!!

title: Great staff, great service
comment:
The hotel is clean, quiet, and thoughtfully designed in every detail. My room was tidy, elegant, and had a lovely view. Everything made me feel comfortable and at ease. The staff at the front desk were friendly and professional, especially Kim Mee, who was always kind, attentive, and made me feel genuinely welcome.
Maybe it was the warm light in the lobby, or maybe it was Kim Mee’s smile, but somehow this place felt warmer than any other hotel I’ve stayed in.
I’ve found my Muse here ❤️❤️

title: Great
comment:
I had a great experience during my stay at the hotel. Everything was clean, comfortable, and well-organized. The staff were friendly and professional, always ready to help with anything I needed.

I especially want to thank Ms. Tran Thi Dieu Huyen for her exceptional service — she was kind, attentive, and made sure I felt completely welcomed throughout my stay. Her warm attitude and professionalism truly made a difference.

Highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a pleasant and worry-free stay. I’ll definitely come back again!

title: always can trust their standard
comment: always can trust their standard, eye for detail, and from-the-heart customer service. Me and my son travel to Hue quite often, as it is where my parents live. I choose Melia Vinpearl 10/10 times because I can always trust their quality service. The front office staff treats us like family coming back home, and the restaurant has taken care of our food (we have some diet) without us even opening our mouths. Love this place!

title: great
comment: I had a wonderful stay at the hotel. Everything was clean, comfortable, and well organized. The staff were polite and attentive, especially Ms. Tran Thi Dieu Huyen, who was exceptionally kind and professional. She made sure all my requests were handled quickly and with a warm attitude. Her hospitality truly enhanced my experience. I would definitely recommend this hotel and look forward to returning again.

title: Great Hotel in Hue
comment: This is a beautiful property in Hue in a good location. Our room was very comfortable, and all the staff were very professional and friendly. The pool area and rooftop have a great view and the there are multiple food options onsite. We really enjoyed our two night stay here while we explored Hue and would return to this property.

title: Great stay at Melia Hue
comment:
Very good experience during our stay at Melia Hue with the staff of the executive lounge who was with the little care particularly Kim Mee
Thank you for their attention and kindness
The hotel is very well located

title: Very good hotel
comment:
Very good hotel, convenient location, there is a shopping plaza including a supermarket next to the hotel , you can buy foods, other necessities easily.
Nice and friendly staffs, very helpful if you got questions. I will recommend it to my friends who come to visit Hue.

title: A wonderful stay
comment: The staff at Melia Hue Vinpearl are thoughtful. A clean hotel with amazing amenities and a good location. We were able to walk to the forbidden city within half and hour or a quick taxi ride.

title: Superb
comment: Very nice staff and always ready to help. Great breakfast. We would have liked to stay more than one night, to be able to test everything from breakfast. Very good location. An exceptional view.

title: High hopes delivered.
comment:
High rise hotel in central Hue. Great views from higher floor. Excellent international and Vietnamese buffet breakfast.

Very good sized swimming pool with bar.

Some distance from the iconic Emperor's Palace.

title: 5* All Round!
comment: We had a great stay here at the Melia Vinpearl in Hue. Lovely rooms and fantastic attention to detail. We paid for the Level room and enjoyed spending time in the Level area on the 32nd floor. Kim was particularly attentive, as was the guest experience manager, April. We appreciated their insight into things to do in Hue. Breakfast is delicious 😋 but I would highly recommend changing the orange juice - it would be so good to have the tasty orange juice we had everywhere else in Hue. A wonderful stay here, we look forward to coming back one day!!

title: Good and well located
comment:
The hotel is very good and the facilities are really five star hotel. We can have no complaint because also on arrival we were automatically upgraded and our room was super large and had spectacular views. You're greeted with a towelette and a drink. But there was some small problem, in our reservation my partner's email details had been dumped, which were not his real name and surname, but we had never had a problem with this during this trip, and in this hotel they were super thorough with that, we didn't understand each other, we were asked about the reservation details a lot of times, we had to contact agoda, change the details... a little cumbersome. We understand that they were doing their job and needed to verify that it was us, but we had just arrived from a long journey, tired, without eating, and we know that it was not their fault besides that being a security measure, but we found it too messy and too rigorous to begin with.
We also changed money there in the hotel itself and when they took the tickets they said that by hotel policy they could not take them because they were broken, we turned the tickets until we got to see what had a small broken 2mm that almost could not be seen. Still by chance and luckily we had smaller bills, but they looked at us with a magnifying glass when taking them.
Also when checking out, before doing so they said that they had to first check the room and check if what we had taken from the minibar was the right thing to do, before giving us the “go ahead” for check out. Again I understand it's their job and it's okay for them to be rigorous, but it made us feel a little uncomfortable.
Otherwise the Service is very good within the whole situation.
The Sky bar is great, and the pool is covered but also fantastic.
Ample amenities and towels, slippers and bathrobe are provided. Safe, dryer (not hotel), capsule coffee maker, infusions.
The elevators are very slow, but I guess it's normal in such a high hotel.
The bed is very comfortable (a bit hard, but for me it's fine), with several pillows, and the shower is very good. Cleanliness is very good.
In-room Food Service is pretty good, priced according to a five-star hotel in Vietnam.
It is very well located, and you easily grab Grab in front of the hotel.
Breakfast is buffet and is pretty good, correct. Our reservation was at The Level, which is supposed to have an exclusive part for breakfast and you have a corner with more coffees. In addition another benefit of The Level is a snack bar with some drinks, which is also quite good. We were also given a small detail and chocolates for being at The Level.
The service is exquisite, as you would expect in a five star hotel. They're watching you the minute they see you.
I put a five on it despite the little problems we had.

title: lovely day at Melia Vinpearl Hue
comment:
I had such a wonderful time at Melia Vinpearl Hue — the hotel is beautiful, elegant, and full of warmth. From the lobby to the view from my room, everything felt calm and classy.

But what I loved the most was my visit to YHI Spa. The moment I walked in, I could feel the peace — soft music, the gentle scent of essential oils, and such a cozy atmosphere.

I was treated by Van, one of the spa therapists, and she was truly amazing! Her hands were so skillful, her touch gentle yet firm — exactly what I needed after a long week. She made sure I felt comfortable every moment, and by the end of the treatment, I felt completely relaxed and recharged.

Thank you YHI Spa and Ms. Van for such a lovely experience. If you ever stay at Melia Vinpearl Hue, don’t miss the spa — it’s pure relaxation

title: Real destination
comment:
Melia Vinpearl Hue is a real friendly destination for me. I had 2 nights here at the heaven city view room in the center of the city. I love the Spa and the Pool here a lot. The staff here is very friendly and supportive. I will be back at soonest.

Tks for your hospitality

title: Amazing view of level premium room with views
comment: I had a great stay at Melia Hue. The service quality is very good, and the staff are friendly but still professional. I don’t need to go anywhere because I can enjoy everything right inside the hotel. There’s even a Starbucks inside, which is super convenient. Staying at The Level I really enjoyed all the benefits, especially the executive lounge on 32th floor. Highly recommend booking a level premium room with views, where you can see full amazing view of Hue city. Definitely will be back.

title: It was a great experience.
comment: I stayed at this hotel for one night and was very impressed with the hotel. The room was clean and comfortable, the view of the city from the window was beautiful. The staff were friendly and also introduced me to the hotel's various facilities and nearby attractions. Breakfast in particular was delicious and varied. I got up late, almost to the end of the buffet, and the staff were still very enthusiastic. What a great experience.

title: Top notch
comment:
Great rooms, fantastic bed linen, friendly and helpful staff and very good quality & variety at breakfast.
We used the pool and it was spotless and very enjoyable to swim in.

title: Absolutely amazing
comment:
An amazing hotel! Clean, neat, incredible food, pleasant and friendly staff, and great location!
Thinh at the reception is lovely and helped us exchange money at the hotel.
Very recommended while staying in the incredible city Hue.

title: Superb hotel
comment:
Superb 5 star hotel, Welcoming, cleanliness, facilities and especially breakfast up to its ranking.
Privileged location in relation to the Imperial City.
Staff attentive to your needs.
I particularly recommend

title: Hue 2025
comment:
Clean friendly
Spa was outstanding
Breakfast is rich and varied
Rooms and beds are very good

title: I wouldn't recommend my friends anywhere else but Meliá if they ever travel to Hue
comment: Friendly and welcoming staff, excellent and brand new facilities. The location is right in the middle of city which was convenient for both business and exploring the city. The view was also amazing, I wouldn't recommend my friends anywhere else but Melia if they ever travel to Hue

title: Great Hotel
comment: Riom was huge and the view was fantastic.Bathroom was well appointed and made for a pleasant stay. I doubt you could find a better hotel in Hue. I've had better breakfasts and seen bigger pools. But the room (premium) was excellent and the price was excellent.

title: After Melia Binper
comment: After the first visit the air conditioning room location is great for breakfast and after the visit is recommended especially the view is so great. I think Joe will come again on my next visit.

title: Honey Moon in the best hotel.
comment:
One of the best hotels we have ever stayed in, amazing views in an amazing city. The hotel staff have provided exquisite service; honorary mention to our Level assistant Lan, she helped us with everything we needed in the best way possible.
If you have the chance to stay here, don’t hesitate!

title: Amazing
comment:
Everything has been amazing here, the service is great and we had the honor to meet Lan a really great girl that has given us an exelent service and she has also recommended us both restaurants and streets to visit.

The hotel is verry neat and has amazing views.

title: Greeting and helpful
comment: Lan, Huyền, trà linh - reception and thảo và two Bellmans are so helpful. Nice Room good view, highly recommend 😍💚😍💚😍😍😍💚💚💚💚

title: 这是一家环境美妙、氛围非常友好的酒店。
comment: This stay left a truly astounding impression on me. When l first checked in, my room was onthe 11th floor, offering a fantastic view that stretched far into the distance. This afternoon, lchecked out at 2:35 PM, and the front desk didn't charge me for the overtime, which reallyshocked and baffled me. Upon arriving in Da Nang that evening, l realized l had left mypassport at the hotel. l needed it for a flight the next day. l contacted the front desk, and theysurprisingly said they would deliver it to me tonight for 200,000 Vietnamese dong. l wasoverjoyed. An hour later, Ms. Phuong, a beautiful, gentle woman who speaks clear English,contacted me via WhatsApp to say l wouldn't have to pay any shipping costs. They believedtheir housekeeper hadn't noticed my passport when l checked out, so they would cover theentire loss. This was even more shocking. lf l ever visit Hue again, !'ll definitely stay at thiswarm hotel again.

title: Expérience The Level
comment:
Very beautiful hotel, we are sad to leave so soon.
Thanks a lot to April, Linh and Quy for their kindness, hospitality and all the nice advices we received from them.
The breakfast was really good: lot of choices, and I had the best Virtnamese coffee since we arrived in Vietnam.
They have several restaurants, an indoor pool, and waw what an amazing view they have !
Our experienxe with "The Level" package was very nice ! Next time, we would definitely book a few nights extra.

title: A stay at melia vine pearl hue
comment:
Me and my boyfriend absolutely loved the experience at the melia vine pearl hue.
I did the Vietnamese massage and it was absolutely incredible !! It is a must do if you visit Hue, I absolutely recommend! The whole team is super super nice!

title: Perfect.
comment:
We had a wonderful stay with privileged access to the Level.
Excellent breakfast with a great choice.
Special thanks to Tranh and Thinh, the Level receptionists for their professionalism and smiles.
Large room with impressive views on the 32nd floor.

title: Great service, 5 stars absolutely
comment:
Meets international 5 stars standards.
The room is well appointed. I had a great view of the river.
The service is top notch. Speedy response to emails in perfect English. Front desk was efficient. The doorman Nghian ( I am not sure if this spelling is correct) was attentive and proactive. I dropped my sunglasses and he ran after me to give it back.
I was wearing a terrible outfit to Alma as I wanted to use my F&B credit for dinner and was too lazy to change into formal wear. Dillen was very kind and attended to me very professionally and did not give me attitude for my poor choice of clothes.
There only draw back was the F&B credit not showing up in the system when I was making payment. It was very strange as I had pre-confirmed the credit by email beforehand. Anyways it good sorted out and all's well.
I would happily stay here again if I am back to Hue

title: Sweetness of life in Hue
comment:
This hotel is one of the most beautiful in Hue. We had a great stay, probably a little too short. The triple room was of a satisfactory size. We arrived quite late and took the Service of Room Service, which is excellent. Breakfast is varied and qualitative worthy of the standing of the Mélia. The staff is very kind and responsive.
The rooftop with the cocktail bar is a great place to "chill" in the evening. The only downside is to go to the pool at the right time if you want to enjoy the deckchairs. We spent 21 nights in North and South Vietnam. The Melia Vinpearl Hué is one of our Top3 properties we have stayed at.

title: Amazing Hotel and Service
comment:
Being contacted by the hotel in the morning to confirm that the driver will be at the airport on our arrival in the afternoon was something no other hotel has done. It was great service by the hotel and you can relax knowing that the driver will be there and the hotel is expecting you.
Kim Mee checked us in and she was delightful and made us feel that we had made the choice in staying this hotel.
Our room was what we expected..AMAZING..The room type requested on high floor, river facing when booking was what we received, again great service.
The Breakfast was excellent and the Rooftop Bar was a great place to have drink and take in the view.
We booked a guided day tour that the hotel recommended which was a great day out visiting historical sites and the learning the history of Hue.
Highly recommend this hotel.

title: We recommend THE LEVEL plan
comment: This plan allows you to check in from the comfort of the LEVEL lounge on the 32nd floor. The rooms are very clean and well serviced with a good view. Free drinks are served in the lounge during the happy hour from 15:30-18:30. If the weather gets bad for sightseeing, you can relax in the hotel, which is very good.

title: Excellent location
comment:
Centrally located in Hue, this lovely hotel is super comfortable and well equipped. Breakfast was amazing but didn’t vary much during our stay. That being said, there were plenty of options to select from. We had access to the executive floor, the cocktails during happy hour were great as were the snacks.
Great service too.

title: Best Melia Hotel
comment:
This is the best Melia hotel I have been so far. Very quiet.
Staffs are very friendly and were ready to help out. Room is clean.
Great view!
I miss the churros they serves at the breakfast buffet.
I cant wait to go back to Hue and stay here again.
I will never forget this place
Melia is really good with location.

title: Very nice hotel, staff partly unprofessional
comment:
We stayed 2 nights at Melia Vinpearl Hue and booked The Level. The decor of the hotel is very nice and well maintained. The pool for the size of the hotel quite small. Breakfast in the 7th. Stock very good.
We had booked The Level because of the lounge and can only recommend it to a limited extent. The team on 1. Evening was very nice, great tips and information, really professional. On Feb. Evening another team was on duty and NOTHING worked like the day before. There was no asking for wishes, appetizers, food, juices and soft drinks not restocked, you even had to search for water and ask the team. Shortly before departure, one room card was coded so that the other did not work and I could not get out through the key lift. This should not happen to the trained The Level staff.

title: High quality, equipped hotel with panoramic views
comment:
Very nice reception, then led by the bellboy to a very opulently appointed room, with office corner, king size bed. Very high quality bathroom. Wonderful view over the city.
Swimming pool, also with panoramic views, here unfortunately some listless staff

title: August 2025
comment:
The location for this hotel is great. Only a short Grab to The Citadel.
The room was clean and lightfilled, with floor to ceiling windows. The facilities are good, and the service from the whole team was fantastic. Staying at The Level is worth the extra outlay.
Special mention to Quyen, who was so helpful and caring during our stay.

title: Great hotel with very good value for money in top location
comment:
Very friendly and efficient check in.

Modern beautiful room very spacious and clean with floor-to-ceiling windows and great views from the 19th century. Stock.

Great breakfast buffet.

Great pool and gym with views in the 8th. Stock.

Overall very many friendly staff.

Very good value for money!

title: Good choice for Hue.
comment: We spent a night here whilst exploring Hue. A really good hotel, centrally located and walking distance to a lot of places. Clean and spacious rooms, good breakfast, and staff were polite and professional.

title: Lovely stay
comment: Beautiful hotel in a great location. Excellent staff who could not do enough for you and a wonderful varied breakfast. Also enjoyed the in-house Starbucks

title: Very good hotel
comment: The service is good, decoration is very nice, modern. Very clean. Employees are professional, polite, warm. Willing to help when needed. We are very impressed.

title: The hotel is not managed like a 5-star hotel/The hotel is not managed like a 5-star hotel
comment:
The first contact is disappointing. The hotel is not run as a 5 star hotel.

Minute drop-off is not fully accessible as a car encroaches on space.

This probably explains this, no staff to welcome guests. I had to climb the few steps with my suitcase.

I had to pay for my entire stay at check-in.

The cleaning is not perfect (dressing on the floor of the room) and in any case has not been checked.

For the rest the room is in accordance with my expectations.

The first contact was disappointing. The hotel is not managed like a 5-star hotel.

The drop-off area is not fully accessible because a car is encroaching on the space.

This probably explains why there is no staff to greet guests. I had to climb the few steps with my suitcase.

I had to pay for my entire stay at check-in.

The housekeeping is not perfect (a bandage on the room floor) and in any case, everything was not checked.

Otherwise, the room met my expectations.

title: We enjoyed every moment
comment: Perfect stay! Everything was there to make us feel good. We really appreciated the "Level" level which gives access to some advantages such as a more luxurious room on the upper floors with a beautiful view and access to the lounge with frankly pleasant 4@6s! The buffet breakfast is more than generous. A nice large pool and a decent gym.

title: Modern Luxury Stay in Hue
comment:
We loved the Meliá Vinpearl as our base to explore Hue. We found it to be a luxury hotel with many modern amenities to enjoy each day we returned from incredible historic touring.

The room felt new, clean, and comfortable. The bed was relaxing and made for good sleep. The AC was excellent on a hot day. We enjoyed a drink at the SkyBar, and the breakfast each day was delicious and had a vast selection.

We selected “The Level,” and we would recommend it. The Melia team connected to the Level were outstanding. The check-in process was very nice. The happy hour each day was refreshing (and the cocktails good). The Level floor is near the top of the hotel so you enjoy beautiful views.

title: Excellent choice
comment:
We did not regret for a second the choice of this modern and comfortable hotel where we spent 3 nights.

Good location close to the hyper center within walking distance.
Building on 34 floors recognizable from a distance.
Skybar on the top floor very nice.
View from our room at 26 very good.
Bed 2m wide very comfortable.
Wide choice and quality of breakfast.
Gym tested and ok.

To find something wrong closed pool a little noisy but frankly this is anecdotal.

title: Fantastic stay – The LEVEL made all the difference
comment:
I stayed at Melia Hue in a Premium Room with The LEVEL access. Overall, it was a high-quality experience with some clear benefits, especially for travelers looking for a bit more comfort and quiet.

Check-in was smooth and done privately in The LEVEL Lounge, which made the arrival feel more relaxed. Staff were polite, professional, and helpful throughout the stay – no complaints there.

The room was clean, modern, and well-maintained. The bed was comfortable, and the view over Hue was a nice bonus. The LEVEL upgrade includes a few extras like better toiletries and welcome snacks – small things, but appreciated.

One of the best parts was access to the LEVEL Lounge. It offered a peaceful space to unwind, with decent drinks and a much calmer breakfast setting compared to the main restaurant. If you prefer quieter mornings and some extra privacy, this is worth considering.

Melia Hue delivers a solid mix of international hotel standards and local hospitality. While it’s not the most luxurious property out there, it offers good value for the price, especially if you go for The LEVEL.

title: Melia - July 2025
comment: Melia Vinpearl Hue was a great stay, with a stunning view over the city. Melia provided great hospitality. Eating dinner at the restaurant was a highlight.

title: July stay
comment: Was a really nice stay in a great location would highly recommend all the staff were very friendly. Great pool with a amazing view

title: Vinpearl style
comment: The Melia Hotel in Hue is truly a gem, offering a very beautiful and impeccably clean environment. Guests are consistently impressed by the exceptional customer service, making every stay memorable. The gym is well-equipped for fitness enthusiasts, and the pool is simply amazing, perfect for relaxation. A delightful surprise is the Level floor, where coffee and tea are available all day, adding a touch of luxury. The snack options are tasty, and the happy hour menu is excellent, providing great value. Overall, Melia Hue combines comfort, quality, and thoughtful amenities for a top-notch experience.

title: Good 'The level' experience.
comment: I booked a 'The level' room for my boys and I. The staff is amazing. Our suite was spacious and very comfortable. The pillow choice is amazing and I did not need to ask for a different pillow at all. My boys enjoyed the swimming pool. Breakfast was amazing and the choices were excellent. The reason I did not give a full score is because of the attentiveness of the server in the Level lounge during the afternoon canape session. I personally had to get up and ask for wine as they did not notice when I am done. And I was alone in the lounge most of the time, two days in a row. If you compare this to other hotel level/club lounges it is lacking the attention. Other than that I will stay here again.

title: Amazing experience
comment: This hotel is an outstanding one in Huế. It is a new modern design and is located in the city center. You can easily access tourist attractions . The breakfast is various selections and healthy. The rooms are convenient to use with new and necessary facilities. Hosts are friendly. We highly recommend it for your comfortable stay. Last but not least . You can have the whole view of Huế.

title: Amazing - highly recommended
comment:
Amazing in every aspect.
Thanks for Noet and Haley for your assistance at reception! The pool may not be the most relaxing, but there is a spa and some rooms have a bath tub

title: Hue Melia
comment:
We have had amazing stay!
Staff friendly and attentive , recommend places to see and do.
Special mention Trang in the level :)
Hotel
Is within walking distance to all amenities
:)

title: Level up and enjoy!
comment:
Paying the relatively low premium to get The Level extras was well worth it.

From the pre-arrival email, the early check in (after arriving on a morning train from Hanoi) and the complimentary food and drinks in the relaxing L32 Lounge to the personalised attention of the staff.

A call out to Kim Mee who organised private cars for local sightseeing and our transfer to Hoi An as well as our Perfume River dinner dragon boat trip.

Recognition too to Son who was always available for queries and finally Ethan - always present with a smile.

Finally to Quy in the lobby - always very attentive.

Breakfast buffet had a great variety of western and eastern foods - the pho was delicious.

YHI spa had a relaxed environment and an afternoon by the pool was a welcome respite from the heat.

Highly recommend trying the Alma steakhouse restaurant!

title: Friendly and pleasant staff
comment:
My husband and I stayed for 2 nights from the 7th to the 9th of June.

The hotel is well located in the city centre and is the tallest building commanding a bird's eye view from our 22nd floor room.

We were given a warm welcome by Hung who took us up to the Club lounge for check-in and offered us a cold welcome drink. Whenever we saw him throughout our stay he was always cheerful, helpful and eager to please.

Ms Huyen the duty manager at check-in was professional and personable. She helped us with currency exchange and getting and arranging for an English-speaking tour guide for our itinerary for the following day.

Our room was well-appointed, clean and of a good size and conveniently located on the same floor as the Club lounge.

The Club lounge is rather small with evening cocktails at a strange time of between 3.30 pm to 6.30 pm and the range of food is very limited. Breakfasts are not served in the lounge but guests have to go down to the restaurant where there's a designated area for Club room guests. However, we had the good fortune of having Ms Trang on duty in the lounge when we went for evening cocktails and she was very pleasant and hospitable.

The buffet breakfast spread was commendable with a good range of local cuisines which delighted us.

On the first night we had dinner of the local cuisine of Bun Bo Hue at the restaurant. It was well presented, substantial and delicious and the staff were friendly.

Although our stay was short it was comfortable.

title: Great hotel
comment:
It was a very comfortable hotel stay with the staff being very responsive.
The view from the room and lounge is also great.
There was a wide variety of breakfast and it was delicious.
The lounge was quiet and relaxed.

title: Loved the Melia
comment: Loved our stay at Melia. The breakfast was amazing. Lots of options Asian and Western choices. The bed was one of the most comfortable we have slept in. The chocolate on the bed each night made it even more special. The Level drinks and canapes were a lovely treat in the late afternoon. Our favourite cocktail was the Moscow Mule, and the wine was lovely. Quyen in the Level was friendly and gave us some good tips, as did our check in person. The pool was a nice place to cool off from a day touring in the heat. The view was amazing from the Level and the pool area. We received a breakfast box due to an early flight that was more than we expected. Hot and cold food and coffee. The staff are amazing we could not fault anything.

title: Wonderful hotel itself, but service and communication lacking from front desk
comment:
We stayed at the Melia for the second time as we had a good experience from the first stay. We came with a bigger party and booked the 2 bed apartment suite.

The hotel itself is stunning, clean and spacious. The rooms were big and the beds were perfect for the family. The bathroom was stunning, with a huge bathtub . The view from the room was beautiful, especially at night.

Breakfast buffet was big and exstensive and the staff, especially Miss Lan who we remembered from our previous visit, was there to provide the best service to our family. There is a huge range of western and asian foods, and all was delicious.

I would mention that overall the staff in the restaurant and lobby bell boys provide such a warm and welcoming service, but this did lack at the front desk. When we enquired about attractions, the staff at the front desk were a little cold and unfriendly, and it seemed like a chore to enquire about tourist attractions. Also, an elderly member of the family, needed assistance from the nurse in the morning, and this was not passed on from the front desk to the nurse, which meant no nurse visited the whole morning, waiting for 5 hours, till we chased it up - only did management, take accountability for the lack of communication being lost from the front desk, in which customer health and safety should be priority. So unfortunately, that was a huge downside from the weeks stay. As mentioned, there seems to be a lack of attentive customer service from the front desk, and communication , so this let down the overall experience to review this experience as a 5 star rating.

title: Beautiful hotel and very lovely staff
comment: Meliá Vinpearl Hue is a very elegant and stylish hotel, beautifully located for exploring the city. Our stay was relaxing and comfortable, and all the staff were consistently lovely — warm, professional, and attentive. A special thank you to Quyen and Trinh, whose kindness and care truly stood out. We felt very welcome and well looked after throughout our stay. Highly recommended.

title: Nice hotel with the best views over the city
comment: Great service stands it's effort to make everything possible. The view from the hotel over the entire city is . The Skybar with 360 degree panoramic view is highly recommended for sunset. The spa is also worth a visit. Breakfast has a wide selection of international food.

title: Great
comment: The hotel is beautiful and the staff employed here are all amazing. The room I stayed in was well kept daily and the temperature was amazing throughout my stay. The staff at Vinpearl (Hue) was what stood out, they were attentive and relaxed. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone.

title: Great.
comment: Beautiful location, enthusiastic staff. Luxury dorm room, located near the Grand Interior, the river, extremely beautiful view. I stood on the 25th floor and could see the whole city in my eye. Everyone who is here must come to try it once.

title: Elegant and Sophisticated Luxury with Excellent Service. Just... Not Much Nearby
comment:
The hotel gets five stars because both it, and the staff deserve 5 stars.

Our suite was gorgeous, the hotel is elegant and luxurious and immaculate - and our views were stunning in all directions.

The staff are supremely skilled. Helpful, always available, never in your face. In fact Tin, at the Front Desk is a particular jewel. He helped us navigate the chaos of Vietnam Airlines cancelling our flight to Cambodia, switching all passengers to Cambodia Airlines, failing to notify anyone of the flight change - and therefore being unable to check in.

We were stuck, he stepped right in, called the airlines and got everything sorted. Enormous help and an perfect example of the quality of service at the Vinpearl.

The breakfast is astonishingly good, with numerous stations offering any and every type of food you could imagine - all wonderfully prepared, presented and abundant.

Our only "complaint" has nothing to do with the hotel itself - but note to travelers, there is very little within walking distance: no nearby markets we could find, nothing of interest to visit, etc. This may be a failure on our part (though we have enjoyed great success everywhere else: Hanoi, Hoi An, Da Nang, Saigon, Siem Reap, et al) so the lack in Hue was surprising. Instead of going out and exploring, we chose to take a two night "luxury rest" here and it was wonderful. Great food, abundant drinks, comfort and relaxation.

title: Best hotel in Hue
comment:
This is a modern city hotel in a great location in Hue. It dominates the skyline.
It’s a great place to stay - comfort, staff, food and drink are all first class.
We had a deluxe room on the 23rd floor which afforded fantastic views of the city. If you want to go higher, there is a very good restaurant and rooftop bar.
All in all a great place to stay and highly recommended

title: Unmissable address in Huē
comment:
Unmissable hotel in the center of Huē, high-end service and services upon arrival.
Our room was located on the 25th floor and had a great view of the river.
The decoration is refined, the bathroom spacious and there is no lack of equipment.
The indoor pool with panoramic views is very nice and the water is very good.
We had an early train, so we couldn’t test the breakfast buffet but the reception team was kind enough to have us prepare takeaway bags.

title: Oasis of Calm when travelling though Vietnam
comment: Melissa Vinpearl provided a welcome high end respite from the smaller city hotels during our stay in Vietnam. Rooms huge, every facility perfect and breakfast/dinner wonderful. Walking distance to the imperial Palace and for markets/food tour start points. Fantastic rooftop bar and high enough that we were above the clouds (well it was raining!). Only negative - volume of the music in the rooftop bar if you want to talk !!

title: Absolutely AMAZING 10 🌟
comment: Wow! This hotel is absolutely stunning! From the spectacular set ir to the amazing staff and incredible views from the sky bar and our room. The breakfast was also incredible 🤤 Hands down a highlight stop to my vacation. Thinh @ the front desk went above and beyond and has a BEAUTIFUL voice! I caught him singing early in the morning when I snuck to the lobby because of my roommates snoring!

title: Good experience
comment: Excellent experience while staying at Melia Vinpearl Hue. Because I’m alone, I’ve spent a lot of time at the hotel. I was impressed by the hotel''s service, especially well impressed by you Spa staff named Trang, you were very enthusiastic and suggested a variety of attractive places to visit around Hue. Very Satisfied

title: A week chillaxing
comment: Amazing place to stay. Excellent staff and facilities. Our go to place when we stay in Hue. Highly recommended. Can't wait to go back 2027.

title: I'll bring back a good report of my stay at Melia Hue
comment:
Great to have a team of polite and helpful staff attending o our needs.
Counter staff are patient and their knowledge of English is ood and commendable.
Amenities in the rooms work well.
Cheerful and friendly environment at the restaurant. Well labelled food items catering to diverse tastes.
Well done.

title: Hotel
comment: Good and beautiful hotel. Friendly and courteous staff. Clean and big bed.

title: Lovely relaxing stay with very friendly staff 🥰
comment: We had a great stay at the Serene Palace Hotel. Despite only staying in Hue for one night, the staff could not have been more helpful and friendly, especially Amy and Catherine 🥰 they helped us to plan out our time in Hue and how to get around, and were so welcoming and warm. The breakfast was lovely and the room was clean and comfortable. We can’t wait to return!

title: Very nice
comment: Great location, quiet. Comfortable and clean room. Good breakfast. Very welcoming and available staff. Special mention to Amy who was kind, very helpful and professional

title: Great hotel!
comment: Very nice hotel. Great location and lovely staff. Catherine was exceptionally friendly and helpful with helping us organise our itinerary and bookings! Would definitely recommend!

title: Visit to Hue
comment:
The hotel is in a good location for downtown and to reach the river. To the citadel it takes 30 min walk.
The staff of the hotel super nice and extremely available to solve every problem. They watched us great when our son had a stomachache.
Overall very well.
Thank you.

title: Very good hotel with excellent hospitality
comment:
Excellent memory of the Serene Palace hotel and especially the welcome of Sarah and her kindness who made us very good recommendations (and even booked us the restaurant in town)
Thanks again!

title: We will return with great pleasure
comment: Beautiful room, very well located hotel and especially a very attentive Staff and especially Sarah who knew how to respond effectively to our various requests.

title: Serene palace hotel Hue
comment: Facilities were nice. Breakfast was very good. Sarah was extremely helpful and Fin was full of joy!

title: Visit Hue !
comment: We stayed in this hotel whilst on a three week tour of Vietnam, this hotel is wonderful. It is immaculately clean with friendly helpful staff who go above and beyond to make your stay positive, Catherine helped us on day one by explaining places to visit and timescales, she was exceptional. The whole team work so well together, it really was lovely. The hotel is located off a main road on a side street mainly used by the occasional moped. I know people have moaned about the works going on opposite, but it never bothered us,Hue is an incredible place to visit and we could have stayed longer. Best tip I can give is hire a moped to get about, we are in our 50s and 60s and had a blast,the hotel sorted it for us. Also the hotel does a fantastic breakfast!

title: Perfect hotel in Hue '
comment: Stayed 1 night at the hotel and everything was perfect. Special mention to Sarah as she looked after us perfectly: she showed us what to do and the logistic of the city and booked for us a transfer to Hoi An

title: Go ahead with your eyes closed. Great.
comment: Great location, clean Very nice and very welcoming staff Very available with a smile at all times. Special thanks to Catherine who gave us valuable information on the scene.
