title: Sarah the best
comment:
Sarah was Lovely with me and my girlfriend.
She mad this part of trip perfect in the hotel and she help us with the local life.

Ty a lot

title: Close to everything
comment: Friendly Staff. Him booked pickleball courts for us. A very cheerful fellow. Sarah at the front desk was also very pleasant, helpful and accommodating. Overall the entire staff and hotel met our needs nicely. Would recommend for cleanliness and convenience.

title: Great experience!
comment:
Great hotel. Great location. It is in a smaller street but it makes it quiet at night time. Rooms were quite big and clean.

We had good service, especially from Sarah who went above and beyond (helped us with tours, gave us local information and help book our route to next destination).

title: Staff with little care
comment: We loved our stay in Huế and the Serene Palace team really improved our stay! Clean and comfortable room, excellent breakfast, and we really thank the team especially Catherine for her valuable advice and help in booking the rest of our trip. We recommend!

title: I highly recommend
comment:
The hotel is very well located in the historical district of Hanoi.
The rooms are very comfortable and well soundproofed from the street.
Breakfast is very well stocked.

title: Stay in Hue
comment:
A really pleasant stay!!!
The hotel eat ideally located, a stone's throw from the city center and the river, which allows to fully enjoy the city.
The room is large, comfortable and very well equipped. Breakfast is varied and good, perfect for a good start to the day.
The staff is attentive, discreet, and always ready to give good advice.
A special thank you to Sarah, who welcomed us with great kindness upon arrival and guided us in our visits according to our desires. Thank you very much.

title: Amazing value
comment: I was really amazed at the hotel considering what we paid for it, it was just a side trip for one night for us from Hoi An and the breakfast was better than the hotel we were paying over double the same amount for in Hoi An . the staff were super nice, beds were comfortable. Location was perfect. Highly recommend.

title: A Sanctuary in the Heart of Hue
comment:
From the moment we arrived at **Hue Serene**, we knew we’d found a gem. The location is absolutely perfect—we were able to wander over to the Imperial City/Palace and explore an endless variety of incredible local restaurants all within a short, easy walk. Despite being so close to the action, the hotel remains remarkably peaceful, offering a quiet retreat after a long day of sightseeing.

Our room was spotless and well-maintained, but what truly elevated our stay was the incredible service. **Celine** at the concierge desk is a total star! She took the time to personally walk us through the local attractions, offering insider tips that made our daily itinerary so much richer. Her warmth and expertise made us feel like welcomed guests rather than just tourists.

The logistics were also seamless. The hotel arranged private transport for our palace tours and our eventual trip to the airport. The drivers were professional and punctual, which took all the stress out of navigating a new city. If you’re looking for a smooth, convenient, and genuinely friendly experience in Hue, this is the place to be.

title: Great hotel in fabulous lovatiom
comment:
We stayed here while in Hue and had a fabulous time. The room was nicely appointed and clean. We had a trip room which was spacious and comfortable Breakfast was great. Sarah the front desk attendant was amazing. Gave us lots of ideas and assisted with transfers.
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay and would recommend to anyone.

title: Hidden but cute
comment: It is located in a small street that connects the two main roads and so it is “difficult” to identify but once you arrive you are in a hotel all in all good, clean and well run, breakfast could be (to my taste) more varied but is still more than acceptable

title: Hue Imperial City
comment: Great welcome, staff attend to customer needs, clean and fragrant rooms. Hotel that although in the city center was very quiet.

title: Yeah, sure.
comment: The hotel is perfect. Clean, and very friendly staff. Not value for money

title: A successful short stay.
comment:
All the staff are friendly and helpful.
Sarah was exceptional helping us organise trips and taxis and has a very pleasant demeanour.
We will return.

title: Very well looked after
comment:
Very friendly hotel. All staff were exceptionally helpful with anything we needed or wanted to know.
The rooms were very clean and well maintained. The location was good with the Citidel being within walking distance.

title: Wowwwww!!!
comment: Great welcome from Sarah! She helped us a lot to organize our stay on Hue and prepare the rest of our vacation. He is such a super beautiful and very well placed. All the services offered by the hotel are of high quality. I would just say one word, it was perfect!!!

title: Very good experience
comment:
We were welcomed by Sara brought us good advice and recommendations to visit and make excursions, to book taxis and scooter.
The hotel was good, the room also, the breakfast nice. Slight downside on the water fountain very very slow.
Loved the experience with Serene hotel, the kindness of the staff, especially Sara

title: Loved every bit of it
comment: We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Hue Serene Palace - everything was great, starting from the super friendly staff to our spacious room with the balcony to the wonderful breakfast choices. The hotel can help with the hired driver - we used them for the transfer from Hoi An to Hue and then for the full day of sightseeing of the Mausoleums in the area.

title: Two nights in Huè
comment: Hotel located in a side street but in the center. Large room, on a top floor with balcony, satisfactory hygiene. Breakfast is both savory and sweet, typically Vietnamese, not really ideal for Italian tastes, however always available eggs, fruit and excellent local coffee. Very kind and very polite staff. Overall satisfied.

title: Great location and lovely staff
comment:
The hotel is in a quiet side street, close to the river and touristy area.
The staff we’re very friendly, especially Sarah, David and Kelly went out of their way to ensure we had everything we needed and that we knew how to best navigate seeing all the sights during our 3-day stay.
Breakfast was yum and had a great selection of foods.

title: Recommended
comment: Hue Serene Palace Hotel is located in an alley where you would not expect a hotel but once inside you feel warmly welcomed, friendly staff, nice spacious rooms, clean and fully equipped. During your stay you will be ensured that you lack nothing. Absolutely recommended!! And value for money.

title: Very good stay.
comment: Great location in a quiet street, 3min walk from the busy streets. Very nice staff, hearty and varied breakfast.

title: 2 great nights in Hue at Serene palace
comment:
We stayed at the Serene palace for 2 nights, comfortable rooms, very clean complimentary tea, coffee and fruit. Good breakfast and the staff were very friendly and helpful, special mention to Phin. We stayed in room 702 with balcony, could see across the city, very high up 🤣
Perfect location to shops and restaurants, would highly recommend

title: Strongly recommend to stay here, good value
comment: Good location and excellent service especially front desk Sarah, speak good English, always ready to help and made our stay comfortable and easy

title: A nice option in Hue!
comment: We had a nice stay at Hue Serene Palace Hotel in Hue. Tucked away in a narrow street/alley and centrally located. The staff are friendly, speak English, and care about the guests. They have a lot of information and tour/private options and gave you time to consider without pressure and followed through to ensure you have a good experience. We booked some before and during and everyone was on the same page (not just the person who booked it for us) which was impressive. Special thanks to Sarah at the front desk for making us feel like family and helping us throughout our stay!

title: We stayed 2 nights on a 20 day trip through Vietnam
comment: The hotel is located in a quiet alley close to restaurants. We were greeted by Sarah, smiling, warm and full of good advice. We recommend this comfortable hotel with a professional and kind staff.

title: Highly recommended
comment: Very competent guide, very friendly and helpful, all great. Would come back anytime. Good location for excursions and also to go to town in the evening.

title: Relaxing stay
comment:
The lovely staff at this hotel made it a great experience. I was able to check in about 11am after arriving by overnight train. Location is just off the main street and about 30 mins walk to the Imperial City. Breakfast was good.

Very close to two good restaurants- Mingle (vegetarian) and Nook.

title: Perfect accommodation in Hue
comment: Very nice place in a small alley. Very attentive service. Fresh fruit and water in the room every day. Tip top clean and well maintained. Very good breakfast.

title: Centrally located, enjoyable stay, good rooms, good service, good breakfast
comment:
The location was in a quiet street and close to the weekend walking precinct which is very lively after 6pm.
The rooms are well appointed, spacious, and very clean.
The staff a very helpful and willing to assist whenever asked.
Good value for money

title: On top!
comment:
Great location, in a quiet street but just two steps from the bustling center!!
The staff is welcoming and caring and the room is decent and very spacious.
Breakfast was great.

title: Recommended hotel
comment: We stayed 2 days at this great hotel, the staff very friendly and helpful, especially Sarah who in addition to her sympathy gave us great advice. Spacious and clean room, great breakfast

title: Hotel very friendly
comment: Clean and very welcoming staff. We enjoyed the location in a quieter street.We recommend.

title: Lovely
comment: Lovely staff, good breakfast, nice rooms,

title: Serene palace
comment: We had a wonderful stay at Serene Palace Hotel. The staff were incredibly kind, attentive, and always happy to help with anything we needed. Breakfast was excellent with a great variety and fresh options every morning. The hotel is in a perfect central location, making it easy to walk to shops, restaurants, and attractions. Comfortable, clean, and peaceful — we would happily stay here again.

title: Great service, convenient location
comment: We had a wonderful stay at Hue Serene Palace Hotel. The room was comfortable, clean, and well maintained, making it easy to relax after a day of sightseeing. What truly stood out was the exceptional service from Sarah and her team — they were incredibly helpful in providing detailed information about Hue’s attractions, arranging car for city tour, and organizing our transfer to Da Nang smoothly and efficiently. Their hospitality made our trip stress-free and memorable. Highly recommended!

title: Many thanks to the whole team
comment: Thanks to the whole team! We stayed here for six days in September 2025 and it was the best hotel of our holiday. Special thanks to Kelly, Phương and Henry for your helpfulness and kindness. I travel a lot professionally, but this staff is really exceptionally accommodating. Kelly is very professional and always has a solution if you need support, Phương and Henry are extremely friendly and help wherever they can. We will definitely come back when we are back in Hue. Thank you very much for the lovely and pleasant six days!

title: A group of 12 friends, from Montreal and Quebec! very clean rooms, welcoming staff, delicious breakfast!
comment: 12 friends from Montreal and Quebec. Very friendly staff. Clean rooms with balcony. Breakfast delicious. Central location, fairly quiet street, close to everything. We'll probably be back!

title: Good food, good service.
comment: People are very friendly. The service was very good but a little disorganized. I'll go back if I come back to this town.

title: Good Hotel in Hue
comment:
Perfect welcome with lots of kindness and good advice on nearby restaurants and visits to do.
Ideal location.
The hotel organized a boat tour to the Temple of Heavenly Lady, magical at nightfall.
Clean room, good bed, good breakfast.
Also note the attention and kindness of the staff.
The only downside of the work nearby plan balls that are quies.

title: Nice hotel
comment:
Very good hotel. Well placed. Clean rooms, very kind and attentive staff. Breakfast ok. Recommend
Little flat. Loud because works nearby. Too bad.

title: Great hotel
comment: Good location and the staff (e.g. Sarah) was very accommodating! Recommended!

title: Perfect.
comment: Great location, nice and large room, staff with great care, thank you Sarah for your valuable help and service!

title: Highly recommend this hotel if you are staying in Hue
comment: It was a very nice hotel. We had a big nice room on floor 6 with balcony. Fruit and water every day. The hotel was very centrally located near restaurants and shops but on a side street which meant that you were not disturbed by the city pulse. However, some house building on the street right now. Very nice staff who always greeted and gave good information about the city and all the sights. Good breakfast, very fruit o Vietnamese but also yoghurt o possibility to order omelette etc. Good Vietnamese coffee. We were picked up with a name tag at the airport which felt luxurious. Despite a 24-hour delay due to the flight, we had a good communication throughout and no hassle with the room.

title: Stay Hue
comment: Very good, spacious rooms, clean,. The host team is very attentive and good advice. Hearty lunch. Good location

title: Exceptional customer service from reception staff. Great location and value for money.
comment:
Great location close to restaurants and amenities. Rooms were clean. The place is great value for money. Decent breakfast buffet. 5 star service from staff. Friendly atmosphere. In particular, Sarah always had a welcoming smile and patient with all our enquiries. Helped with pre booking restaurant on our first night of arrival and suggested day trip options.
Kelly was also very helpful in making contact prior to our arrival to assist with any transportation needs. She helped to provide competitive transportation quotes for our airport pick-up as well as to our next city destination. She was readily contactable on WhatsApp, even on her day off.

title: Very well placed to visit Hue
comment: Great location, very friendly staff, very satisfying lunch, simple but clean room and comfortable bed

title: Great option in Hue
comment: We arrived early after an overnight train journey, we expected just to leave our bags and head out, but the receptionist took us through the check in process, giving us great tips for the area and promised a txt as soon as our room was ready, which she did within two hours. This was really appreciated, and great service thank you. This hotel is a great choice for a stay in Hue. It's excellent value, centrally located with big clean rooms. All the staff are incredibly welcoming. I would highly recommend this hotel.

title: Vietnamese ambiance in perfect location
comment: Excellent location, very welcoming and helpful personnel, comfortable beds. Authentic Vietnamese ambiance and very good breakfast. Highly recommended.

title: Exceptional staff in great hotel
comment:
Good hotel. Sarah from the reception was delightful in receiving us and providing us with a huge help to better organize our visit: not only did she give us all kinds of indications regarding the different options, but she also got us a driver immediately to make the most of the hours we had available. He also helped us arrange the transfer to Hoi An. It was just amazing.
The hotel is excellent for visiting the citadel and finding nearby restaurants and services. Recommended!

title: Excellent stay from every point of view
comment:
During our stay in Vietnam, my family and I were lucky enough to choose this hotel which turned out to be a real surprise. Since our arrival we were greeted with kindness and helpfulness by every member of staff, always attentive and smiling.

The professionalism of the staff was not limited to the service at the hotel: thanks to their valuable suggestions we could discover the city in an authentic way, living every moment in harmony and admiring its beauty with new eyes.

The room was comfortable and well cared for, but what made our experience special was the human warmth we felt. We never felt like mere guests, but part of a welcoming community.

We recommend this hotel to anyone who wants not only a pleasant stay, but also an experience that enriches the trip with unforgettable emotions and memories.
Eve Alexios Edward

title: Great and abordable hotel in Hue
comment:

title: Very good

title: Great hotel in Hue!

Kelly helped us a lot with organizing our trip. The private transport to Hoi An included a few other stops along the way. Highly recommend!

comment: This hotel has the best Bun Bo Hue broth in the world. It’s a hidden gem. An even bigger hidden gem is Thi and her colleagues. The hospitality and service is beyond measure. They were so kind, courteous, respectful, helpful and sincere in their efforts. It’s too bad that our stay was so short. We will definitely be back. Highly recommended for anyone who is traveling to Hue.

title: Perfect

title: Nice day trip in Hue
comment: The room was very nice and clean, we arranged a tour with the staff and they were very nice helping us, also the breakfast was good!

title: Overnight in Hue
comment: Spent a lovely night at the hotel. Kelly o reception was super helpful in arranging a taxi pick and and also private driver for the day. Lovely family room and facilities. Used the washing service too which was quick and competitively priced. A lovely stay, sorry we couldn't stay longer.

title: Thank you for making our stay rememberable!

title: Perfect place to visit Hue
comment: We had a great time, nice place, perfect position, clean and very kind staff. I totally recommend this hotel. Close to the nightlife streets

title: Nice trip
comment: The hotel met my expectations ; it was notably clean and well-maintained. The only minor issue was the location, which was slightly difficult to find. Regarding the dining, the food was acceptable. Overall, I am satisfied with my stay and the quality of the hotel.

title: Family holiday to Hue
comment: Very clean and comfortable hotel in a great location. The staff were all very friendly and the breakfast was delicious. The staff arranged transfers from Da Nang and to Hoi An and also booked a terrific group tour of the city. Highly recommend staying here.

title: Good place and very nice receptionist (Sarah)
comment:
I stayed one night at this hotel and the value for money is very good. Clean and comfortable room. Good location, 20 minutes from the imperial city on foot.
I highlight the kindness of Sarah, the reception girl who helped us a lot and treated us great at all times. Very happy!

title: Very nice hotel
comment:
Good location. Clean rooms.
Good value for money.
Received a lot of advice from the hotel, from Sarah. It was great

title: A very good stay at the hotel!
comment: The hotel meets all the conditions to make you feel comfortable during your stay. It has a great location, the staff are very attentive and solve all your questions and issues, and the rooms are comfortable and welcoming. A very good stay at the hotel!

title: Great hotel in central location!
comment:
Cannot fault for anything- location, rooms, hotel staff - everything was lovely!

We booked an airport pickup Da Nang airport ($55 USD) and Bo, our driver took us through a scenic route to show Hai Van pass, the lagoon and stopped for a coconut coffee. Bo also gave us restaurant recommendations and travel tips around Hue City.

Sarah and Kelly at the reception were lovely and checked us in right away. Room was comfortable with all amenities. The staff were keen to help with tours and any questions. Breakfast was delicious, we loved having fresh omelettes every morning.

We ended up staying another night to relax and enjoy the city. Walking street is just around the corner; the Imperial City is a short walk or quick grab ride. Sarah helped us book our transfer from Hue to Hoi An as well.

Absolutely will recommend to anyone travelling to Hue to stay here!

title: Total comfort
comment: Our experience was most pleasant. The friendly staff and all their attentions were fantastic. But the best was the comfort of the beds and pillows. Our best night in Vietnam in 3 weeks!! 🤩

title: Relaxing Day in Hue!
comment: We stayed for a day and had a great experience overall. The hotel staff were really helpful with our day planning and also arranged a great transfer to Hoi An!

title: Superb
comment:
We enjoyed the welcome at Serene Palace. The room was very good and the bed comfortable.
The whole team was very attentive to us!
I recommend without hesitation.

title: Good value for money. Family room was only $55 Aud

On wknd some streets close for cars and scooters from 5 pm which makes very easy to roam around in the market stalls. Staff is very friendly and helpful. title: What a breakfast !

title: Serene Palace Hotel

title: Nice hotel! Recommended!

title: Family vacation
comment: The staff and service here at Laguna Parkside are wonderful. They are polite, thoughtful, and very friendly. I communicate with them via the WhatsApp. Whether it’s to order food, transport, restocking supplies, they respond very fast. Thuy helped me check in and took such good care of us during our stay here in Laguna. I highly recommend her service, she is very knowledgeable, considerate, and she knows how to speak English. If you are planning on staying here and are traveling with children I recommend getting the suite with the pool. The kids enjoyed the pool and amenities here. I stayed at a lot of hotels around here but I think Laguna is the best one so far, 10/10 I highly recommend staying here for big parties or if you want a nice little getaway.

title: The Cherish Hotel in Hue has excellent service and is a great place to stay .
comment: All of the staff at the Cherish Hotel provided excellent customer service with a smile. Maya always made sure we were happy. What ever you needed Maya would make sure it would happen. I would love to stay at the Cherish Hotel next time I’m in Hue.

title: Great stay
comment: A great location for getting around. The desk arranged a tour for us. Wonderful breakfast and very clean rooms Highly recommend

title: 3 nights in Hue
comment: Location was great for walking to restaurants and the river and exploring. coffee shops close by. The staff were excellent and so kind more than happy to help with anything. Breakfast was excellent. We didn't use the pool but it looked nice. Our room was very comfortable lots of hot water. Everything was nice and clean. Would definitely stay here again if I'm ever in Hue.

title: Friendly staff and clean hotel
comment:
Only our room was in a bad location. Just next to our room, management apparently found it necessary to provide a desk and a room where staff had to walk back and forth all the time, without even considering that there are travelers staying who even want to sleep!

Staff is otherwise very friendly. 11th floor is completely for breakfast, but damn, it's so hot there! Turn that air conditioning down please 😁.

Tip, make sure you're not in room 514 or 516. Those are closest to those 2 noisy locations of the staff rooms that are always open

title: Good location
comment:
Good hotel that provides quality services The room was spacious and equipped with all amenities, the bathroom large and well equipped
Ideal for spending qq days in Hue

title: Great hotel Great location
comment: Great experience, friendly helpful staff . Only stayed one night but experience was impeccable... I struggle to think of even one flaw. Location is great .

title: The staff makes this hotel a treasure.
comment: I have stayed at Cherish Hotel about 6 times for a total of almost 20 nights. The reason I return again and again is the staff. Serena, supervisor at reception desk, is kind and cheerful and helpful, and speaks excellent English. Mary and others in the restaurant go out of their way to assist the guests in countless ways. In the spa, the massages by Amy and Tien are excellent and receptionist Nana is always smiling and helpful. All of the staff seem like old friends. Next year I definitely plan to return again.

title: Great location with small inconvenience
comment: Central, comfortable and very elegant, equipped with all the services of the category. Staff always friendly and helpful, strategic for visiting the town, practically 200 meters from the street that in the evening becomes a pedestrian area with bars and restaurants. Large rooms, ours however was not well cleaned and we had to ask the reception to come and do it. Excellent breakfast buffet on the 10th floor with dishes that change every morning. Too bad for the small inconvenience of cleaning our room because the hotel definitely deserves the top rating.

title: Warm and welcoming
comment: What a lovely hotel. Only stayed one night, wish it could have been more. Staff extremely courteous and helpful. Room was spotlessly clean and very quiet. Breakfast had a huge choice, fresh, delicious and very satisfying. Highly recommend this hotel.

title: Had a great time
comment:
The staff are extremely friendly and helpfull . Especially Loan on the front desk .
Breakfast restaurant was great and the pool is perfect

title: Well worth the stay at the Cherish
comment:
Been coming to this hotel for many years, service is excellent, rooms clean and well appointed for the price, lovely buffet breakfast included aswell. Nice swimming pool aswell
Highly recommend

title: Everything is fine
comment: Very central hotel just steps from the nightlife. Deluxe room with huge double bed. Breakfast served on the top floor with a great Vietnamese coffee. Very kind and loving staff. Everything clean. In the room you will find everything you need (also free water, tea, kettle, fruit)

title: Excellent choice
comment: Excellent all the way. Loan was particularly helpful and friendly. She is fluent in English as well. Breakfast great, room nice.

title: Hotels near the center
comment:
Cheris Hotel is a modern hotel located in the heart of Hue. In a few minutes walk you can reach the heart of the city, full of restaurants and very lively clubs, with loud music.
The property is very large and the rooms are spacious. We stayed in a kind of suite with two very large rooms and a huge bathroom, equipped with a shower of about 2 square meters. Very good cleaning.
The hotel has a micro pool, enough for a quick dip, but it must be said that the pool is not very well cared for and it is a bit sad. Much better the spa, which I tried: a full back, neck, shoulders and head massage rated 10 and praise!
Breakfast takes place on the eleventh floor, in a room with large windows and views of the city. The choice is really wide, both sweet and savory, and the Quality of food is great.

In summary: a modern hotel, clean and well located, with very spacious rooms, excellent breakfast and a top spa. The pool leaves something to be desired, but the overall experience is very positive.

title: Best little hotel in Hue
comment: We chose Cherish hotel from the previous great reviews they’ve been given. It did not disappoint - we wish we were staying longer! Warm and friendly staff made us so welcome especially Serena, Khi and Quan. Spacious room with city view, good sized pool with shade. Extensive breakfast - I recommend you try the pancakes! A perfect stay.

title: Very nice recommended!!!
comment: Nice clean hotel with every comfort in the rooms. Very good breakfast. The staff is very kind and really deserves a thank you from us. Really recommended!

title: Excellent location
comment:
Spacious room, clean and comfortable. Welcoming staff.
Very varied breakfast in a spacious room with views.

title: Great hotel
comment: Amazing hotel. Very Freindly staff and the rooms were very clean and comfortable and the breakfast was outstanding. Highly recommend.

title: Great hotel
comment:
Super helpful staff, very reasonable price.
The breakfast is lovely too. Definitely stay here again when visiting Hue.

title: Excellent friendly service
comment: Excellent hotel and service in the middle of Hue. We were warmly welcomed and on an early departure we were provided our breakfast as a packed meal due to being unable to make breakfast times. Wonderful service and highly recommend.

title: Exceptional
comment: Exceptional, I cannot recommend this hotel enough, the service, breakfast, pool, gym and our room were fabulous value. Serena at reception actively ensured our needs were met and expectations exceeded. We will be back.

title: Very good hotel near the center of Hue
comment: Great hotel near the exit center of Hue. Great spacious room with bathroom. Bathroom with toilet and bath. The room has a minibar and two complimentary bottles of water are provided daily. Breakfast is on the 11th floor. Spacious breakfast buffet. There is something for everyone. Friendly staff, friendly staff. The rooms are clean and look neat.

title: A Rare Five Star Experience
comment: this hotel is on a safe, walkable, and quiet street near very trendy stores! we were immediately greeted by Qúan/Charlie (bellman) who took our luggage into the lobby, where we were given fresh POG juice, and all the way up to your suite. this hotel was the only one willing to accommodate our request for a box and tape to pack our souvenirs. the hotel and suite was decorated in a vintage French colonial style with modern aspects. very appropriate for Hue! beds are very comfortable and this bathroom is the most Western style we have come across in our travels and CENTRAL AC!! wifi is also very strong and separate across the lobby and each floor individually. continental breakfast was the best we have had so far and has a wide variety of fresh foods, including house made yogurt (MUST TRY especially for settling your stomach). all of the staff was well mannered and very helpful. Qúan went above and beyond to help us find áo dài and a taxi to take us. please remember to to tip the helpful and DESERVING staff.

title: good experiance by cherish hotel
comment:
A very good hotel because when you be arrive they have a very good introduction off the hotel, nearby activities, a map off the city and they give a summerie of citadel, river etc. The room very clean and good for the price you pay. Specially i like the spa from hotel the Hotstone sesion because we have bad weather at that time. Breackfast was good.
Only one thing i less like the room 9 stock under restaurant was noissy in early morning you must ask for other stock.
All by all for this prize a good choice.

title: Very good hotel.
comment:
Very good hotel. Welcoming, helpful and patient staff.
Cleanliness: spotless.
There is a lift and a luggage service.
DPJ room a little cramped, but continental breakfast very good.
The room is okay, big.
The bathroom very functional.
Noise during work in the street. (But this hard step).
Close to restaurants.
For two nights.

title: Comfortable and friendly
comment: Cherish hotel is in a great location, near to the very busy and lively night restaurants. Also close to the market and Imperial Citadel. The staff were more than helpful, polite and very friendly. The room was a reasonable size with a small balcony, the bed was firm and the pillows were nice and soft. Had to be careful stepping in and out of the bath to have a shower. Breakfast was good with a huge selection of fruits, small goods, eggs your way, pastries, fruit juice, tea and coffee.

title: Comfortable Stay
comment: We had a comfortable stay. The room was quite large. The overall hotel is a little dated but is clean. The staff are very friendly and responsive. A buffet breakfast was included, which was delicious with a lot of variety to interest many tastes. The top floor dining area gives you some nice views of the neighborhood.

title: Cherish Hotel Hue Vietnam
comment: This is an excellent hotel: Good location, clean, excellent free breakfast buffet with a lot of variety of dishes and friendly staff. The bed is comfortable, decor modern and good quality amenities. You will not be disappointed. I enjoyed my stay.

title: Nice hotel with lots of amenities.
comment: Good hotel with large bed and therefore a somewhat small looking room. Also because there was also a table and two chairs placed. Good bathroom with nice bath and hot shower. Pool on outside hotel was somewhat on the cold side. Breakfast fine again.

title: Cherish Hotel Hue
comment: Warm welcome and very helpful at front desk. Close to entertainment but not on major road. Walkable to river and beyond. Big buffet breakfast with made to order omelets. Spa on second floor. Good views on top 11th floor where breakfast is served. Good coffee. Staff 👍

title: Nice clean friendly hotel good location
comment: Nice clean friendly hotel we stayed three nights and the location was really good for walking to the river or local eateries. It’s on a busy road but to be honest you don’t really notice it when you’re in the hotel. The rooms are nice and clean beds are comfy with a shower over the bath but this worked fine. The rooms are nice was cleaned every day and fresh towels supplied. We also got complimentary fruit left each day in the room which was a nice touch. Breakfast is of a good standard and a wide veriety for all nationalities so you’ll not leave hungry. Plenty fruit cereals and toast ect for our western pallet. All the staff were polite and friendly we would definitely stay here again and would say it’s really good value for money

title: The Cherish Hotel staff is the greatest
comment:
This recent stay was (I think) my sixth at this hotel. This is the only hotel I want in Hue.

There is much to like about Cherish Hotel, but the very best is the staff. There aren't sufficient words to describe how wonderful they are. Ms Tran Cam Nhung in sales, Serena at the front desk, massages by Tien and Amy with Nana as receptionist, Lisa and Mary and Thanh at the breakfast buffet with a view of the city. The housekeeping staff is cheerful and helpful, as is the entire staff. I love being here because everyone is so nice.

The hotel is in an excellent location with restaurants, a mall, ATMs, and everything else I need. The buffet breakfast is tasty and attractive to the eye.

Already I look forward to my next visit.

title: The Cherish Hotel - Best Quality Overall
comment:
My stay at the Cherish Hotel was definitely one of the best experiences I have had in years of travel. All the staff were very friendly. Especially one of the hostess at the front desk named Thu. She took the time to make sure I had everything I needed. She helped with booking tours and restaurant recommendations. She made my stay very special through her warm and caring attitude.
I enjoyed the breakfast buffet almost every day of my fifteen day visit. The variety of fresh fruit was the highlight of my morning meals. I used the laundry service twice and was very satisfied. The room was spacious and well appointed. The view from the balcony on the 9th floor was expansive. The bathroom was modern with great water pressure and good hot water.
The location in Hue was perfect for someone who enjoys walking. I wandered and found many delightful restaurants and shops all in an easy 30 minute range of walking. The Citadel and Dong Ba Market were easy walks with pedestrian paths on the bridges to make the trip more comfortable.
I will be back next year and look forward to another long stay at the Cherish Hotel.

title: Clean, comfortable, friendly
comment:
The hotel is well situated close to nightlife and the middle of town but is still quiet. Rooms are clean and comfortable - the beds were good and made for good sleep quality. Breakfast was excellent - a large array of western and Vietnamese food. All fresh and tasty. The crepes were a highlight.

The gym is well appointed and the pool a nice bonus.

The service was also excellent and really what makes Cherish stand out. John and his team went out of their way to make sure we were well cared for. Overall a lovely stay.

title: Central Vietnam tour
comment:
Stayed 2 nights in Cherish Hotel, Hue where we met the friendliest staffs. Our luggage bags were sent right up to 6th floor lobby and we walked up the stairs for welcoming drinks. Good standards of room , clean and comfortable. Breakfasts served are scrumptious and satisfying.
Easy to find foods near this hotel.

title: Great.
comment:
Super welcome from Huyen with great kindness.
On top
Very good service

title: Huyen made us a wonderful welcome
comment:
Great welcome
Unmatched kindness
Wonderful Hotel Ms Huyen received us with great delicacy

title: A very pleasant stay.
comment:
Very welcome, comfortable beds, varied buffet breakfast, staff with little care, including ms Huyen (who speaks a little French) and Linh at the reception...
A pleasant stay, we will come back.

title: With gratitude for all the kindness
comment: Very nice experience as a guest at Alba Spa Hotel in the days leading up to Lunar New Year festivities with special thanks to Thanh Huyen

title: Nice hotel and well placed
comment:
Nice hotel, well placed. Friendly staff and good breakfast.
Only downsides, having to pay extra to have green tea at breakfast and not being able to have a 2de key; which is not at all convenient when you are 2 and you do not have the same program 👎

title: Ok hotel with very caring reception staff.
comment: We arrived after a long train ride from HCMC and unfortunately my wife had fever and felt very bad. The receptionist Linh was exceptionel caring and helpfull as she also spoke very good english. The Hotel was clean and the staff friendly however in the dining area very little english was understood or spoken so very basic needs were difficult to get right. The hotel is situated in area from where it is easy to walk to many of the very interesting attractions in Hue and we enjoyed the stay taken the difficulties into account which included doctors visit and a short hospital visit as well as going to doctor. All asked to by Linh and other caring Receptionists employees.

title: Excellent hotel and spa
comment:
Excellent hotel, great location.
Massages with Thanh are a pure moment of relaxation and happiness, I recommend without hesitation

title: Very nice stay with attentive and friendly staff.
comment: The rooms and the hotel have good facilities. Above all, the staff with Huyen at the reception and everyone else are very friendly, accommodating and take great care of. Thanks to Huyen, who assisted me while I was unwell in health. She took wonderful care of me, it's not a given. We celebrated Christmas at the hotel and all the staff in the kitchen, reception etc. It was incredible. I highly recommend the hotel and the staff.

title: Cozy hotel
comment:
Nice and cozy hotel. Very nice breakfast ☕️
Hot and cold water in the spa 💦
Very friendly staff, especially Thi, Linh and Tri 😊🇻🇳

title: Little gem
comment: This has got to one of the best hotels I’ve stayed while travelling Vietnam all the staff are so kind and welcoming and the rooms are the most cleanest the breakfast is spot on as well 👍

title: Central location a stone's throw from the nightlife street.
comment: Very nice hotel in the center, a few steps and you reach the main street (and pedestrian in the evening on weekends) full of restaurants, bars, shops and nightlife. The staff is friendly and friendly, Welcoming with a good tea offered, room not very large but acceptable, quite clean. The breakfast room is very nice although with few sweet options in the buffet and lacks a coffee / cappuccino machine that, in my opinion, makes the difference. We tried a massage in the Spa, very professional and kind staff. For customers there is 15% discount for all services. There is also a free jacuzzi accessible to customers. Umbrellas and plastic rain capes are available.

title: Hue wonderful
comment: Wonderful stay in a super clean building. My linh in the reception was extremely nice. She accommodated us in every way. The jacuzzi time for guest was nice and refreshing. I would recommend no doubt. Also the restaurant was fantastic. Good prices and great food

title: Central location
comment: The hotel is very central, much is within walking distance or a short drive. The room was very spacious and clean, the breakfast was very varied and extremely delicious. A wonderful stay! Unfortunately, I didn't try the spa area, but my fellow travelers reported only positively.

title: Awesome place to stay in Huě
comment: Service was excellent, My Linh really looked after me and even let me use a room to grab a shower when I returned to get my bags after checkout. Super hotel for the money and the Jacuzzi was awesome. Had it to myself both times I used it! Thanks go the friendly staff- service par excellence and the rooms are great too plus a free breakfast.

title: Very good hotel
comment: Very good hotel well maintained, with a very friendly and dynamic staff always concerned to help people as quickly as possible. Special mention for Mrs. Thanh Huyen who really managed the surprise party offered by the guide and the agency on the occasion of my birthday!!!Hotel ++++

title: Great experience of Hotel and Spa
comment:
El Hotel es optimal choice. Very clean, rooms well equiped and large, very warm and helpful attention by personell. well ubicated in Hue close to Restaurants and those who like it, as well to bars.
I just had as well the best massage ever for Back, Neck and head at the spa of the Hotel by Mrs Thao Niki. ( and with over 70 years old I think I can judge)
All in all, a great experience

title: Nice, Kind and Central
comment:
A nice, spacefull and confortabel Bedroom, with names of the local Flora...Jasmin, Lothus...

Everything: massage, Spa, and Breakfast was very good.
Andl very kind and helpfull personal.
Good location to explore the City of Hue by your own: good cafés and restaurants in the near.

title: Excellent city hotel
comment:
Fabulous hotel, clean modern rooms, great breakfast catering for all tastes, and the added bonus of a fabulous jacuzzi for use at the end of a days sightseeing 🤩
The staff were very helpful and friendly and could not do enough to help. Our allocated room was a twin but when pointed out we wanted a double this was quickly rectified on check in without any fuss.

title: I night in Hue
comment: Fantastic hotel with amazing hot spa and pool in an amazing tropical setting. Lovely choice of breakfast. Room was lovely.shower was great and bed very comfortable. Close to resteraunts and shops. Coffee shop nearby. Short walk to river.

title: A great choice!
comment: This hotel did not disappoint. Excellent value. Super friendly and helpful staff. Beautiful jacuzzi surround by living walls of plants. Amazing breakfast with lots of choices and fresh fruits. Excellent location near shops and restaurants.

title: Bright rooms
comment:
We only slept one night in this hotel which is located in a quiet area with other hotels.
Our room, decorated in a modern style, was spacious and clean.
Spacious and clean even the bathroom.
Breakfast was quite varied although typical Vietnamese savoury dishes prevail.

title: Good situation, the rest may be better
comment:
The rooms are small, mini balcony. Well located in relation to the Perfume River for example. Decent breakfast but lack of proposal for continentals, eggs and cereals, the breads are all soft. The restaurant is affordable.
Nice SPA if not too crowded and with people swimming dressed...

title: Cosy hotel with fantastic staff and great rooms. All perfect.
comment:
This is a cozy little hotel with clean nice rooms and a very nice and service friendly staff. Special thanks to My Linh for professional help during our stay.
Lovely and varied breakfast. We had a great stay at this hotel. And Hué is a great city.

title: Great visit from the cruise port
comment:
Came here for a day pass off the cruise ship. About 25 minutes from port via the free shuttle. Day pass cost ~$11 USD and included chairs, umbrellas, bathrooms, pool, and one free drink. Quick easy access to beach (free if you don't want the other amenities). Spa services (~$28 USD for a hour pedicure and ~$15 USD for a 30 min foot massage poolside). Friendly staff, once you get inside past all the taxi drivers who are readily available to take you wherever you may want to go.

Note: did not see inside the villas/rooms.

title: A true place for retreat with family
comment:
Peaceful, nice resort and beautiful beach.
I stayed 2 nights with my family, our kids love the pool

title: It is not all gold that shines !!!
comment:
Unfortunately, we were very disappointed. We were really looking forward to this hotel...
The villa was large and nicely decorated, but unfortunately already a bit run down. The private pool was also nice but dirty and green (algae).
Breakfast was rather average for Vietnam, and nothing special. Dinner at the hotel restaurant was always a disaster. For example : you order a chicken burger and get a beefburger. After this was corrected, the side dishes were cold by now. At the 3. Trial then the meat was raw. Raw chicken can't be done !!! Even if you want to have your beef fried through, it is simply not feasible, we have always received raw meat... The cleanliness of the rooms and the facility leaves much to be desired, so could be better. Worst was the fungus that grew in our bedroom ... The fittings of the outdoor shower unfortunately only partially worked... This hotel has definitely not earned 5 stars , rather 2 stars+. When we were supposed to pay for the airport transfer, even though it is diligently advertised that it is free from 2 nights, it was clear for us: 1 x and never again !!!

title: Langco Bay Retreat is a 5-star standard.
comment: First-timer by friend Recommendation to Langco Bay Retreat, first felt polite, attentive staff. The food is beautifully presented, fresh and delicious, and the next time you visit Hué will definitely stay here.

title: Nice place with good staff
comment: We have 2 nights at Langco Bay Retreat with my friend and family during Tet. Breakfast is delicious. Room is clean and large with nice view from pool. I enjoy a quite room with a big garden, staff is friendly. Bellman is so nice. We are re recommend here for my friend in summer time. Will come back in near future.

title: Fresh air
comment: Very good, quiet, attentive service

title: All a Facade. Other than the room and the view, it was so disappointing.
comment: The room was wonderful. Everything else was in poor repair or unsafe particularly the two pools. The bar pool had no staff was dirty with rusty counter that had probably not been used or cleaned in a long time. The pool tiles were dangerously slippery causing a fall. Glass was served for iced coffee by the pool. The beach was littered. No lifeguard or assistance by the pool. The reception had no manager on duty. Apparently their day off. What was good was the friendly golf cart drivers who assisted with luggage.

title: Large rooms and beautiful views.
comment:
Easy check in, very nice spacious rooms.
Restaurant was good. Cam at front desk was very accommodating at checkout (and staff overall were perfect)

title: I found my lost phone.
comment:
Thanks to the friendly staff we were able to find the lost phone. Despite the late dawn of the night, he searched and looked together to cctv to find where his cell phone was. Even at breakfast, the staff always greeted me with smiling faces.
The resort is a little uncomfortable for the traffic, but it is quiet and recommended as a place to go.

title: Great staff and clean and beautiful resort
comment: The staff is amazing especially the girl at reception (CAM). Very helpful and considerate. We went at a wrong time with beach not open for activities but staff's behavior made it worth it. Do not go to market at entrance. Try to eat in resort. There are some good cafes and market on the other side of sea. Spa was really good. This location is 1 hour away from Danang so book this only for resort experience. Our villa was beautiful and very clean

title: 5 star
comment:
My stay at the resort was a truly upscale experience. The atmosphere is refined, tranquil, and thoughtfully designed in every detail. The room was spacious, modern, impeccably clean, and offered a sense of complete relaxation.

Service was exceptional — professional, courteous staff who assisted promptly. The dining experience was refined, with fresh ingredients and beautiful presentation.

A perfect destination for those seeking privacy, comfort, and a genuinely high-standard retreat. Absolutely worth returning. ✨

title: First visit to Langkobe Retreat!
comment:
CAM staff was friendly and was comfortable.
A variety of services are available, including free drop service to the airport or downtown Danang!
The next time it's good weather, I'd like it to be better if it doesn't come.

title: Beautiful resort with amazing staff!
comment:
Our stay here was amazing, the Manager went above and beyond for us and all the staff were so friendly and helpful! The rooms are beautiful, we had a two bedroom ocean pool villa and 1 bedroom twin ocean view room for our family of 5, which was perfect.

The location is very peaceful, the breakfast buffet was great and the swim pool bar was perfect for an afternoon drink or snack.

The kids loved the breakfasts, the pottery painting activity, Netflix on the TV’s (using our account), riding the bikes around the resort and of course swimming in our pool, the bar pool or the main pool.

Wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this report or to stay here again!

title: Nice resort with reasonable price
comment: Nice resort with a reasonable price. The villa was spacious with a garden view. The breakfast buffet with many choices. The resort is too far from the city centre so don't have many activities at the night time.

title: Perfect Rest
comment: Powerful for those who need rest. We eat, relax, swim and relax in Vietnam's quiet outskirts. We'll meet again next time 😍

title: Lovely resort to relax
comment:
Lang Co Bay Retreat itself is beautiful, on large lovely grounds with well kept, modern and luxurious rooms. We stayed in a 2BR ocean view villa motor 5 nights. Considering the standard of the resort appearing quite high, the cost of the villas was reasonable.
Pool bar was great and meals were reasonably priced and nice. Cheaper options outside the hotel but very little as far as other options go as there is very little in the area.
Beach along side the resort was clean and well maintained by the resort with activities available.
The only feed back in particular is that the tiling around each of the villa pools and larger pools is really quite slippery and dangerous when wet. I would be very cautious of having young kids and slipped over myself next to our villa pool.
Whilst the golf carts driving around the grounds are practical to assist guests, these seemed noisy quite late at night and early in the morning.
Reception staff were very friendly, but had quite limited English and on occasion was passed between multiple staff on the phone for someone to communicate with.
I would recommend this place for a couple of days to switch off and relax, but not for too long in the Lang Co area given there is little else to do outside the resort.
Whilst the temperature was really hot outside and it was nice to cool off, we found the hot water in shower didn’t quite warm up enough meaning the showers were a little too cold. Unfortunately we also had water issues in our Villa on the final evening and morning meaning there were times where our sinks and toilets had no running water. I would hope this was only a temporary issue for the resort.

title: Langco is a ghost town dont bother staying here
comment:
We were looking for a place to stay near a beach outside Da Nang.
The beach is beautiful (although many areas are now used as rubbish tips) but the whole area of Langco is not worth visiting.
All the beachside hotels are either closed or run down. The whole area collapsed after Corona and no one stays here anymore apart from day trippers on way from Da Nang to Hue. The actual hotel is well built but totally soleless.
For example: The same song is pumped out of the speakers non stop all day long.
We would not recommend staying here it’s a ghost town and there are many other areas that are much nicer.

title: A perfect 5 star
comment:
The rooms space neat and clean, view perfect, Asian delicacies but also western delicacies staff are nice and service is perfect.
This 5 star belongs to 5 star group.
There are play area for young children, free loan bike for indoor terrain and area good walking.

title: Rangko.
comment:
We stayed two nights in a single-story villa with ocean views!
It was so nice to see the sunrise from the pool in the morning!
The breakfast buffet had a variety of dishes, all delicious!
The pool was big and it was lovely to see the ocean!
The staff also treated me with a smile and greeted me as I walked in the morning, which made me feel comfortable!
It was lovely to see the sunrise from the beach, which was accessible from the stairs!
It was a lovely resort to repeat!

title: Very helpful and friendly staff. Communication in English OK, but not necessarily intoxicating.
comment: Very spacious rooms, very modern furnishings, very clean, with private pool and right on the beach. In fine weather a paradise. A big praise to the restaurant manager Pan, very friendly, helpful and accommodating, even strives to speak German.

title: Perfect retreat
comment: Visitors can unwind in luxurious seaside resorts, enjoy the fresh air, and participate in various water sports such as surfing and kayaking. The bay's serene environment and pristine beaches make it a perfect retreat for both leisure and professional gatherings.

title: Warmly recommend
comment: Disabled friendly, elevator,front desk 24/7, breakfast (optional), great location close to bars, shops, laundries, restaurants, night life. Clean, spacious rooms, cleaning daily, quiet, about 10 mins walk to bridge/river. The owner was very helpful with tours recommendations and more than that, she was very concerned about our safety (two women) and helped us to confirm a mistake in our train tickets. Bit far from night market but there are more markets during the day. 15 mins drive to train station. Warmly recommend.

title: Very good value for money
comment:
This hotel certainly impressed us. They organised a very reasonable van ride from Hoi An to their hotel, a one day tour at very competitive prices and transport from the hotel to Danang. When my wife slipped on the wet steps at the Citadel and cut open her arm, we got a grab immediately back to the hotel. The staff had been notified by the tour guide and had a full bag of medical goods from the pharmacy-- even fixed her arm.
The room was very clean, with an extremely comfortable bed. The breakfast had lots of choices and hotel location so close to walking street and loads of shops and restaurants.
We travel 6 month a year (retired) and I must say the staff at Amy were exceptional- so helpful and friendly. They even managed to send an international power adapter, that I had left in the room by mistake, to our hotel in Danang.
We will certainly be going back next year.

title: Excellent experience, we will come back!
comment: Very comfortable and clean room (we were at the white house apartments). Breakfast huge and very tasty. If you come to Hue, this Is the place where to stay.

title: A wonderful vacation.
comment: We arrived here in January 2026, the whole family was very happy and had a memorable experience here. Thank you to the staff for warmly welcoming us.

title: Worth the trip
comment: good service, quiet spaces, good views, and good air

title: Hue EcoLodge (central of Vietnam) Beautiful Oasis not far from city centre , very affordable too.
comment:
Beautiful Oasis Eco friendly place and on a river, not far from Hue city Centre, it is quiet setting great for family who love nature.

The place is nice beautiful and very clean, the staff is kind and very friendly.

The restaurant is nice over looking the beautiful swimming pool, the food is awesome and good.

The price is very affordable and included excellent breakfast.

The room is big and spacious eco friendly decorating, the bath room had wooden bathtub and very clean, there is also eco shower out door for those love naked show out door but privacy setting if you desired.

If you kind and generous, you can use massage (bind staff) to help out the unfortunate local people at affordable service, we did it.

All in all, we would return to Hue EcoLodge next time are in Hue. Actually referred to my fiancé to stay here for a few night not too long ago.

Thank you for the great job dear Hue Staffs.

title: Located far outside
comment: Located approx. 7 km outside the center, which makes spontaneous excursions/explorations difficult as a taxi is needed every time. Communication at reception in English was not always easy. The rooms are well equipped and reasonably sized.

title: Nice setting but well out of town
comment: This hotel is about 11 kms out of Hue so you need to Grab or taxi into town. No restaurants nearby. (We did not try the hotel’s restaurant). Nice pool. Large rooms but we found the bed hard. The staff put extra padding on it when we asked. The staff were responsive generally. The bath/shower was a tub you step into. There was loud music all evening from the local village. Bit of gecko activity in roof at night. Reasonable breakfast. It’s a nice setting.

title: Wonderful stay at Hue Ecolodge!
comment: The staff were professional, friendly, and always helpful. I really appreciated the peaceful and quiet atmosphere — perfect for relaxing and escaping the city. Everything was well organized, and the service made us feel very comfortable. I would definitely come back again next year.

title: A true haven of peace in the heart of nature
comment: A haven of peace in the heart of nature! Hue Ecolodge is a beautiful place, surrounded by greenery, ideal for rejuvenating. Mood is peaceful and relaxing. Our room was very nice, warm and comfortable, with a neat decoration in a local style. The staff is incredibly welcoming, always smiling and attentive. The food is delicious, fresh and full of Vietnamese flavors. Every meal was a real pleasure. I highly recommend this property to those looking for an authentic, comfortable and relaxing experience in Hue. Thank you to the whole team!

title: Little piece of paradise
comment:
Very exotic hotel away from the noise of the city
Very green!
Bicycle available at the Welcoming
Large swimming pool open 24 hours

Spacious air-conditioned and ventilated room with terrace

Watch out for the tap made available like all the additional equipment (hat...etc....) To put back in the room otherwise risk of billing 😉

title: Ok but give up the idea of enjoying the pool!!!
comment:
Overall performance correct even if several points tarnish the overall impression. The bungalows are very good and allow you to rest in peace and the gardens are quite relaxing and pleasant.
On the other hand, the location is almost 5 to 10 kilometers requires to stay at the restaurant in the evening. This is a decent table but on the other hand some waiters may lack friendliness and denotes other hotels where we stayed during our fortnight in Vietnam. A fire lights in the morning also had the defect of making its perfume smell in our bungalows. The huge negative is the opening of the pool to people outside the hotel (for a fee of course) which totally prevented us from enjoying the pool due to lack of free sunbed and crowds. At this expected level of delivery, this is not acceptable.

title: Unsettling massage experience with no help from staff
comment: We stayed here for 3 days and during our stay my wife booked a massage here and was confronted with 2 men who did not offer her any means of covering herself. She noticed she was stared at the entire time and felt very uncomfortable and unsafe. The massage itself was clearly performed unprofessionally as well. Later we noticed that regular staff members are performing the massages. Upon filing a complaint at the reception desk my wife was told there was nothing to be done about this and no further action was taken after talking to the manager for half an hour. It was clearly more important to the manager to make a profit than to take a violation like this seriously.

title: Totally recommend it!!!
comment: The place is so beautiful, the massages are soo good, the people and the menu are amazing and the room too! Worth it 100%!!

title: Very bof
comment:
The "green" side of this hotel is good, but there are limits:
- No TV in the rooms
- To have hot water, you have to press a switch
-You have a book directory in your room, and you have the price of each item in the room, you have the price of the toilet
-We have to go to the restaurant of the hotel because the hotel is far from everything
- No price of meals at the restaurant, forced to move
- The rooms are extremely expensive ($60 per night for the smallest room)
I would remind you that this is a 3-star hotel and has the TripAdvisor trophy.

In summary, I would not recommend this hotel.

title: Place that deserves
comment: Nice place. with many rooms distributed within a beautiful well-kept garden. Large room, cozy and complete with everything. Breakfast and great restaurant in a beautiful location. Large swimming pool with sun loungers and umbrellas. Possibility to take a walk to the lake

title: 100% recommend
comment: We had a beautiful stay in Hue Ecolodge! Everything was perfect, the room, the food, the pool and the staff. It is so peaceful! Close to the Perfume River. We 100% recommend Hue Ecolodge. You can also take a bike and visit the city. Thank you for everything !

title: Beautiful discovery in nature.
comment:
Welcome to the reception.
Accompaniment in our bungalow in the middle of the greenery.
Very spacious room, beautiful bathroom with wooden bathtub. Extra shower outside. Everything is very clean.
The environment of the bungalow is quiet with a large well-kept garden. Nice pool. Good restaurant, typical dishes also served for breakfast buffet. Smiling, friendly and responsive staff.

title: lovely place that I wouldn't come back to
comment:
We had a beautiful spacious room. The grounds are pretty with lots of landscaping. Nice pool and decent restaurant. We were too far out of town to find a different place to eat.

The room has all the amenities but one---hot water. I didn't know that you have to turn on a hot water heater. I only discovered this when I called reception to ask why there was no hot water. They told me to turn on the switch which I did. I didn't realize that the fuse also had to be turned on so in the end I didn't get my bath. They informed me that there would never be enough hot water to fill up the big wooden bathtub. That was a big disappointment. We should have been informed before we got excited about having a bath together.

We got set menu and again were a little disappointed because each set menu was for two persons only. This was not written anywhere on the menu. We each wanted different food and had to compromise. The food was beautifully presented and the service was prompt. I shouldn't have had to ask for fish sauce, soy sauce and fresh limes to season the soup. These are standard condiments here in Vietnam.

The bed's mattress was very hard and I did not sleep well.

Wonderful breakfast. Fresh mango and passion fruit, delicious pho.

title: Beautiful
comment: Located outside the city (15 minutes by taxi), the hotel is composed of self-catering “comfortable” bungalows set on a large riverside plot. A very nice place, very relaxing. Possibility of continuous meals on site. Bicycles available for walks in the surrounding villages. Nice pool.

title: Wonderful hotel in a quite street
comment: Great hotel, good location in a quiet street. The rooms are very clean and the bed comfy. The rooms are also beautiful. The breakfast ia good with many options. The staff are helpful and friendly.

title: Great stay
comment: The hotel was very attentive, the rooms were very comfortable, no noise, perfect sleep. We used the laundry service within 24 hours turnaround. Breakfast was very pleasant. We enjoyed our 3 nights stay and can thoroughly recommend.

title: Great staff
comment: Lovely hotel, excellent staff. Maybe a little bit far from the action.

title: Great hotel
comment: Great amentities and friendly staff

title: Family, great coffee in the room
comment:
Family , great bed, beautiful room, complimentary coffee is very good in taste. Newly built . I visited with my family of 20 people from Malaysia. Wifi is fast.
Location in town area, Go- Hue is walking distance, cafe and restaurant is just around the corner.

title: Top recommendation for Hue
comment: Very good hotel, nice service, all questions, answered quickly, they organized me a driver to Hoi An: about Lap an lagoon, lang co beach, dan cloud pass and the marble mountain. Including seafood lunch at Da Nang Strand, all wishes fulfilled, the staff at the hotel and the driver were super helpful, excellent service, time and again, I can only recommend!

title: Stay at the orchid Premium hotel
comment: We stayed 2 nights in this hotel , everything was perfect . The room is very nice , breakfast very good , and the location is perfect , we can do everything on foot. The staff is very attentive, especially Emma who did everything to make our stay ideal. We recommend

title: Great experience
comment: Everything is perfect. The location very convenient. Staff always attentive and friendly and very prepared in organizing trips and offering advice. Very comfortable beds. The breakfast was very good. The bathroom was ok. The room is dim. Very good cleaning.

title: Wonderful experience
comment: We received 5-star service from this lovely, clean boutique hotel set in a quiet street. All staff were helpful, courteous. A special ‘shout-out’ to Miss EMMA who went above and beyond her duty to assist us with our requirements with a smile. Thank you

title: Excellent !
comment:
Traveling Vietnam, our Hue's hotel was Orchid : excellent bedroom and services, specially Emma whom welcomed us so warmly and helped us !
Only negative point is swimming pool with no umbrella, that makes it quite impossible to use

title: Beautiful room
comment: Beautiful room and very welcoming staff

title: Wonderful time at the Orchid Premium Hotel
comment: We LOVED our stay at the hotel. The beds were super comfortable, the breakfast was tasty, it was in a good location and quiet. But more than that, we adored the staff. Linda cut us multiple mangoes that we brought in from the market, showing us the proper way to do it. Tina was so cheerful and fun, we had a great time doing a bathrobe fashion show with her. We wish we had more time here, we adored it.

title: Lovely hotel with great room decor and very pleasant and welcoming staff.
comment: Lovely welcome from from desk - great first impression. Rooms are very nicely decorated with lovely wall art and decent bathroom facilities. Lovely kimonos ! Good location around 10 mins walk from walking street and near to a decent number of bars and coffee houses. Recommended

title: Exceptional Value and Very Pleasant and Helpful Staff
comment: My wife and I spent 3 nights in one of the two premium rooms on the sixth floor. The room was a good size, clean and quiet, the bed and pillows were comfortable and the bathroom was adequate in size and clean. There were many good restaurants and coffee shops within easy walking distance. Breakfast in the hotel was good but variety was limited. Most notable was the always friendly, helpful staff who made us feel like family. Orchid Premium Hotel provides exceptional value and we highly recommend it for adult travelers.

title: Wonderful boutique hotel stay
comment:
Fabulous staff.
Wonderful room with super comfy bed & pillows.
Quiet location but walkable to lovely coffee stops, walking street etc.
The pool area was lovely & the hotel is spotless & beautifully decorated.
Staff are so nice & caring, ready to help you with anything you need.
They call you by your forename and after a while travelling that’s like a warm hug.
There’s a silk robe to relax in & embossed towels which gives this hotel a very nice feel.
Breakfast was a pleasant surprise…. Everything can be made to order or help yourself.
I’d suggest to book an extra day here at this gem of a hotel to explore more than the imperial city, tombs etc…..rest as you’ll be well looked after. Thanks again to all the wonderful staff.

title: Wow all over the 5/5 line
comment: Wow nice discovery! A very nice hotel with an exemplary welcome, hosts with little care for us pleasant stay. Hearty breakfast and guaranteed hot water.

title: Sublime experience 💫🙏💎🩵
comment:
Excellent hotel on all points exceptional comfort exceptional lunch welcome and impeccable service thank you for this very nice experience at this hotel very well manage owner and all staff 5⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️💫
A jewel 💎🙏💫🩵

title: Our expectations have been perfectly met.
comment: Very clean, attentive and professional staff. The food is fresh and delicious.

title: Nice accommodation, dear people
comment: Very pleasant hotel - staff extremely accommodating and very helpful. Palace area within walking distance rather far away, but other, authentic neighborhoods in the area. Overall quite recommended.

title: Hidden gem with an amazing staff
comment: This new boutique hotel is an absolute gem! Situated in a quiet quarter, just outside of the hustle it was a great area to find nice restaurants and a friendly approach of the locals. We booked the luxury double room for a good price. The rooms are stunnigly decorated in an oriental 'art deco' style. Fantastic bed, good shower and little balcony. Good breakfast with the first decent strong hotelcoffee that we had during our 4 week travel, a menu you can order from and a buffet as well. On top of all of this: an amazing staff! Genuinely friendly, helpfull people without beiing fake. The ladies helped me finding a tailor next door to make a not regular pillowsheet last-minute, it was ready in a day, made by a great and lovely tailor. Laundry was ready the same day. We would choose this hotel any ime again!

title: Excellent Superior
comment: My experience was fabulous. Paul & Linda sought to fulfill my every need and Linda was instrumental in conveying English-Vietnamese & Vietnamese-English translation to several of my drivers with very complex details and directional points necessary for my successful trip. Thank you Sprcial Shout out to Paul & Linda. Without them my trip would be nothing. I’m coming back next February and staying at The orchid!!!!!

title: Good value for money, convenient location
comment: A lovely place with really warm and welcoming staff. Comfy beds and good breakfast, convenient location. Quiet area although central. Good value for money, would definitely come back. Can help with bike rental

title: Very good trip with Paul
comment: We are very happy with the trip with Paul that took us from boo to hoi an . He is attentive and gave us as much time as we wanted at each stop. A big thank you to him. We recommend it.

title: Staff exceptional
comment: We wish the staff well in their endeavour to be the best hosts. We have never had such a warm and personal welcome as good as this.

title: Excellent
comment: Sunny gave us an excellent welcome really very kind. Paul made us a transfer by car, he showed us a lot of nice things. Hotel to recommend, very good stay.

title: Amazing stay
comment: We stayed 5 nites in this wonderful hotel! The free breakfast was delicious and we had a choice of both the buffet or the menu. The staff were incredibly efficient, professional, and catered to our every need to make sure we were as comfortable as possible. They addressed us by our names which made the experience personal and lovely. A Shout out to Sunny Dao who was most courteous and thoughtful! But I must say, the whole staff were wonderful. The convenient location made it so walkable. I Highly recommend this hotel.

title: Loved our stay
comment: Wonderful hotel. Most wonderful and friendly staff. We loved it. Thank you for everything. We hope to come back before too long

title: The Orchard Premium Hotel
comment: An amazing hotel. Luxury room! Fancy lobby. AMAZING staff! I wish I could remember all their names. But Sunny was so kind and very interested in my travels and making sure I had a great stay at the hotel. The room was VERY clean and so fancy. The bed was so comfortable. There was even a tiny balcony! The location was ok. Hard to walk to any good restaurants. There were two across the street. I didn't eat there. There is karaoke every night across the street! Ugh. Ha ha. But it ended around 9 pm. I would definely stay here again. Breakfast was delicious and a good variety of food. The staff make this hotel a perfect place to stay!

title: Great hotel
comment: It is a really good hotel, especially for the money. Thanks for the good service!! We gave 89kr per man for one night t

title: Good
comment:
Wonderful safe and funny driver. Would highly recommend a trip with Paul from Hue to Hoi an! Great guy!
Good hotelllllll

title: Great journey from Hue to Hoi An
comment: Paul was amazing! I get anxiety when driving with strangers and his driving put me at ease. He was patient, kind, and informative. We would highly recommend taking the journey from Hue to Hoi An with him. The stops were great also.

title: Clean and nice
comment: The best hotel we stayed in since we got to vietnam, easily up to european standards. It was like on the photos. Clean, comfy, well-maintained. The staff was nice and helpful. Breakfast was tasty.

title: Excellent!
comment: Wonderful, very nice driver took us to Hoi An with several stops! The staff at Orchid Hotel are incredibly nice and helpful, especially Tina. She is a sweetheart! 🥰 The beds are also great and everything very clean!

title: The place to stay in Hue, Vietnam.
comment:
Absolutely first rate stay at Orchid Premium.
Tremendous value, customer care and service beyond belief. Breakfast all freshly made, chosen off of a menu. Top marks all around at this one year old gem.
Highly recommended. David Humphrey, Canada.

title: Perfect hotel
comment: This hotel is an absolute GEM. We arrived to Hue around noon and they allowed us to check in early. We were greeted with fresh mango juice and fruit at reception. The front desk staffmember Emma helped us book a private tour guide and driver - Emma personally designed the tour for us and suggested where to go as well! When my partner fell ill, Emma helped me locate a pharmacy and instructions to get there. She also helped me extend our stay another day at a fair price to help him recover. She frequently checked to make sure he was feeling better. At breakfast, she remembered him again and made sure he was better. Breakfast was DELICIOUS and there were so many options both in the buffet and separate menu (also included). The room itself was absolutely gorgeous and so comfortable. I would 100% tell any friend to stay here. There is a lot of local food and coffee shops in the area and it is easy to walk around to find what you need. It is farther to the Imperial City - around a 15 min drive.

title: Beautiful hotel in great location
comment:
We loved this beautiful charming hotel in Hue . The bedrooms were beautifully decorated and spotlessly clean . Modern well appointed bathrooms and comfortable beds.
Ruby and Emmafan in reception took good care of us explaining how to get to the sites of interest .
We booked a tour to DMZ . I was a little reluctant as not my kind of thing but it was an amazing trip with stunning views of the countryside and rivers too .

title: Very good
comment: Loving our private transfer from Hue to Hoi An stopping for coffee on a beach before driving up into the mountains. Perfect. Thank you Paul 🥰

title: A nice stay
comment: We enjoyed our stay in hotel very much. It was located away from noisy streets, but still in the center. The room was super clean and well designed.almost all of the staff was English speaking and very helpful. I almost felt as at my home. Thank you!

title: nice 3 day stay
comment: it’s perfect place to stay.good location, freindly staff and exellent cleanness. we will come back here for sure.

title: Fantastic
comment: This hotel is wonderfull, I genuinely enjoyed it. The beds were super comfortable, breakfast was great and it’s in a great location.

title: Very good
comment:
I’m very happy to recommend this hotel,the rooms were very clean and tidy the service was great e
Specially the young man Paul he was very very helpful

title: Wonderful base.
comment: Great room, bed, shower, breakfast. Charming and attentive staff. Quiet location. I very strongly recommend this hotel.

title: Wonderful hotel! Beautiful Decoration and the most comfortable beds!
comment:
What an amazing hotel ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We have been traveling for two months and this has been our favourite place to stay. The deco is beautiful. The beds are beyond comfortable and so hard to get out of because you don’t want to leave them.
All the staff were so kind and helpful, they let us check in early and gave us advice about what to do in the city. Nice little pool at the top to enjoy city views. Great location. Would love to return here!

title: Excellent place for family and travelers.
comment: We had the best experiences at this hotel. Staffs were very pleasant and professional. The breakfast was fantastic. We would definitely recommend this hotel for any traveler.

title: Amazing staff!
comment: Amazing staff! Tend to you immediately, can store baggage there even when you check out. Very clean, and little snack on welcoming

title: Good trip with Paul fo Hoi An
comment: We made a trip with the driver Paul from Hue to Hoi An passing through Lap An lagoon and Lang Co beach we crossed Hai van pass, really top as a comfortable car organization, punctual, reserved satisfied us in all our requests, great fish lunch in Lang co independent beach Paul very top driver 💪🇮🇹

title: Highly recommended
comment: The hotel is in a very convenient location with lots of restaurants and caffes around. The staff is really helpfull and friendly . Very nice spacious rooms and clean and great breakfast . Highly recommended for your stay.

title: Highly recommended!
comment: Perfect experience at this hotel with unbeatable value for money. Very friendly staff, good facilities and good location.

title: Excellent stay at the orchid hotel
comment: Rooms are spacious, comfortable and clean. Many good restaurants nearby.walking distance to the citadel. The staff are friendly and helpful, their English is good. Organised a car and driver to go to Hoi An. Paul Driver very capable, and helpful, and speaks English well

title: Yeah, good!
