comment: Everything was absolutely perfect: the kindness of the welcome, the quality of the infrastructure, the comfort of the beds, the breakfast. Great time spent in this hotel

title: Very comfortable hotel with exceptional staff
comment: We stayed here for 2 nights and everything was great. Plenty of space in the bedroom and really comfortable bed. Quiet outside at night as it's in a cul-de-sac but cafes close by. The staff were outstanding, very competent and helpful

title: Superb hotel
comment: A really great hotel in Hue. Superb accommodation. Efficient, helpful and friendly staff. They go out of their way to make your stay enjoyable. Visits to the sights arranged for you and all information to help explore town on your own also provided. They have their own driver (Paul) who took care of us visiting temples and taking us to the airport - safe, friendly, and reliable. Reception, room service, breakfast - all staff who made our stay a real treat. Excellent value.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
Great clean hotel, good location, easy transport. The staff is very attentive, particularly, Kimchi, Tina and Ruby.

Thank you for everything!

title: Great experience. Highly recommended for cleaning, staff. Beautiful premium rooms.
comment:
Hotel suto in Hue. Very nice service, very kind staff.
Group trip of 12 people.
Given the heavy rain, we were allowed to use the breakfast room for a takeaway dinner.
Great experience.

title: Rebekah
comment: We had a great time in Hue and in the hotel.The very friendly and helpful people with us.The very rich breakfast and the driver Paul of the excursions fabulous

title: Great hotel, comfortable and great staff.
comment:
Fantastic stay. Rooms were great, super comfy beds, nice pool, nice breakfast.
Staff will do anything they can to help you and make you comfortable.
Thank you for a lovely stay.

title: good
comment: Driver Paul was safe driving and had peace of mind. It was nice to be friendly. The Orchid Hotel is located in 5 city centers making it easy to visit the city. I'm also glad that the staff at Orchid Hotel were kind people.

title: Group trip in Hue
comment: Very nice staying. Very kind and available personnel and very comfortable rooms. Definitely suggested for long or short staying in Hue.

title: Great hotel with very nice staff, nice room and great breakfast
comment: Great hotel. Very clean in good location. Extremely nice staff who were always very attentive. The rooms are great and have their own very pleasant charm. We had booked the breakfast option. The food was fresh and extremely delicious. For anyone who has a sweet tooth I can highly recommend the banana pancakes!

title: Great Driver transfer from Hue to Hoi An
comment: Great tour from Hue to Hoi An with Paul our driver. The City of Ghosts was amazing and the beautiful seafood lunch at Ha Sun Be Muoi Beach. Van Hoi pass, Marble Mountain all were safely navigated and we were delivered to our Hotel in Hoi An.

title: All very well.
comment:
We felt very comfortable here and have been advised by the friendly ladies Emma and Linda at the reception. Driver Paul brought us safely to Hoi An in really difficult conditions (very heavy rain and storm). Thank you!
Katrin and Thomas

title: Excellent hotel, top staff!
comment:
Hotel with neat decoration, very well located, quiet, 5 minutes from the center on foot.
Very attentive staff, with little care for the customer, especially Emma and Linda who did everything to make our stay perfect: tourist explanations about the city, quick dry cleaning, excellent breakfast. They even made us a fruit basket when we left for our trip! Many thanks also to Paul, who ensured our transfer to Hoi An, always listening to our requests for unscheduled stops of photo shoots, and who showed us around the places to see on the way.

title: Great staff service
comment: We had a great stay at The Orchid Premium Hotel Hue. The staff at this hotel were very attentive and very helpful. The rooms were clean and tastefully fitted out. There is a small swimming pool on the fifth floor which was great to cool down after a long day. We booked our Hue tour and our transport from Hue to Hoi An through the hotel front desk and they explained the itinerary to us and answered all our questions and concerns so we knew what to expect. Pricing of the tours & transport from the hotel was competitive. The only down side for this hotel is the location is about a 10 to 15 min walk to the night life & restaurants but the upside is that the location is quiet. There are some small eating places and cafes nearby.

title: Recommended
comment: Very friendly and helpful staff. Very nice rooms, quiet location, easy walking distance to center. We had a room with a small balcony.

title: Hotel Hue.
comment: Nice room, small bathroom. The private balcony in a 1x1 balcony theozo with a wall glued to 50cm. Zero views. Super friendly staff and breakfast made at the moment.

title: Charming
comment: We were well received by Elena after a night drive from Ninh Binh. Fresh fruit juice. Our bags were kept in the luggage storage. We were able to cool off before we had our room at midday. We had tourist explanations about the city. Paul was a caring driver for tours and the airport. Lucy and Elena took care of us at breakfast (very complete and varied) and during the day (quick pressing). Hotel with neat decoration. Nice room with small balcony. Quiet.

title: Great Value
comment: Great hotel and definitely recommend. The price is very reasonable, this hotel offered exceptional service, was very clean, and the breakfast was on point. Special shoutout to Lucy, who is impeccable and made me feel so welcome throughout the stay. She remembers your name, provided helpful recommendations, and went above and beyond.

title: Great stay, great welcome.
comment:
The hotel is very nice, very clean and very quiet.
Emma and tina welcomed us very kindly and gave us very good advice. Paul, the driver showed us around part of the area with patience, with a flexible drive.
The hotel is 2 steps from the center, and everything was perfect. I recommend you, best hotel of our trip
Patrick

title: Very good choice
comment:
Nice hotel, great location,
All the staff at the top, welcoming helpful and very professional (elena and lucy from reception Paul the driver )
The breakfast buffet is amazing.
Quiet and beautiful room.

title: My Hue adventure
comment: Was the best stay of my holiday so far with Kevin and Lucy so accomodating along with all the staff, there’s nothing they wouldn’t do to make you happy with your stay. The rooms were like a palace and the food was wonderful nothing to do but enjoy your holiday

title: Nice quiet hotel within walking distance of downtown
comment: Nice hotel within walking distance of the busy center - and therefore a bit quieter at the hotel. Small but nice pool on the roof to cool off. Very friendly staff who respond very well when something does go wrong and fix it quickly.

title: Orchid hotel in hue city
comment:
All good, good breakfast, good room and very good location.
Very friendly and helpful staff.
They managed the excursions very well.

title: A great hotel in Hue for family
comment:
We had a great stay here during our roadtrip to the South. Family room was spacious, large beds, soft mattress and pillows, bathroom in good condition. There is a small balcony for my husband to smoke. Above all, the staffs were very helpful and attentive. I am impressed by the bellman (sorry it’s been so long I could not remember his name).
Only one disadvantage is that the hotel parking area is too small. We had 2 cars, so 1 of our cars must be parked far from the hotel.

title: Sightseeing tour of Hue and surrounding areas.
comment: All great. The staff was very helpful. Linda, Paul and Ruby have been lovely. Super recommended. The hotel is very nice and the breakfast excellent.

title: Todo bien recomendable.
comment: It was super nice. Paul, Ruby and Quyen treated us very well. The people working there are so kind and alwayd available. The pool its also nice

title: Genial
comment:
Great Service, Quyen, Linda and Paul were amazing.
The perfect room and breakfast.
They helped us in everything

title: Perfect
comment: Our stay was only for one night but I must say very satisfied with the hotel and the very kind and friendly staff starting from the Welcoming of Tina and Linda .Paul perfect taxi driver. Good breakfast with buffet and poaaibilita choice on menu always included in the price. Room and bathroom clean and spacious. Great location with a 5 minute walk you get to the streets where there are restaurants and clubs. I highly recommend

title: A comfortable stay in a relaxing area.
comment: Our family had a great stay. The hotel's location is convenient, situated in a quiet and relaxing alley. The rooms were clean and quite well decorated. The receptionists were really helpful and recommended us many spots and things to eat, drink and see. Thanks to Ms Thanh & Binh for making our stay comfortable!

title: Excellent!
comment: Excellent hotel!! The situation and the Welcoming is great! There is always a solution with Tina, Sunny, Elena and Paul!! Do not hesitate to ask them to pick you up at the airport and advise you for the visits of your stay! We spent 2 days with Paul who led us to the graves and take us back to Hoi An. The rooms are beautiful and the breakfast is very good and very hearty!

title: Great hotel, great staff
comment: Loved our stay here. The hotel was clean, tidy, comfortable and good location. Good value for money. Breakfast was varied and delicious. The best part of all however, was the staff, they were very friendly, courteous, helpful, professional and informative, always treated us with a comforting smile and kindness. Our sincere thank you to Tina, Emma, Lucy, Henry, Ngoc and ALL the staff and especially our driver Paul Nguyen who went above and beyond, he was very, very helpful kind, informative, professional and the best driver I've had in the 6 the times I've travelled to Vietnam. Highly recommended this hotel !! The staff made it happen. Will definitely return.

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
We had a great time, Tina and Lucy are very kind and help you in all circumstances.
They can arrange you a city tour or whatever. The hotel is very comfortable and the pool is fantastic!
The room is very clean and comfortable and the breakfast is very varied.
Highly recommended!!!!!

title: Great Hotel
comment: What a great hotel and service. The rooms are beautiful and the most they have the most comfortable bed. We changed our original plans and the employees helpt uss with everything. There breakfast is verry good and the bathroom verry clean. Thank you staff of Orchid if we visit Hué again we will book your hotel again

title: Comfy stay for two
comment: Friendliest and most forthcoming staff ever. Clean and comfy rooms, great breakfast and good recommendations on what to do. Would love to come back to explore the city more. Unfortunately we only stayed a night but the people at the hotel made it easy and great after a long trip.

title: Excellent
comment: The pillows are the best I have tested and the bed also great staff to come back The site is quiet personal very smiling I would recommend this hotel to my friends and on Facebook the breakfast and excellent thank you to all the staff

title: Did not stay there due to an unexpected event but still had to pay full charge for something I did not use.
comment: They really only care about chaging you the money, no professional e-mail adress. Even if you can't stay due to a serious problem, and after explaining, they still charge you! And they then, after knowing the gravity of the situation have the nerve to say in an e-mail, again after charging you the money "when you come to Hue, please stay with us", after charging you full price for something you did not use.

title: A hotel for travelers
comment:
Amazing hotel, fun and small, rich breakfast with a fancy menu prepared for you on site, we heard there was a pool but we weren't there, walking distance from downtown and market 5 minutes,
Highly recommended, room big enough, crazy shower,
We offer laundry for a funny price.
Giving service and recommendations for attractions, not looking to make money on you, and another thing is a new hotel that opened six months ago!

title: Welcoming staff in a quiet location
comment: We absolutely recommend this hotel. The staff is amazing, extremely attentive and even addresses you by name during all interactions. A good location in a quiet side street. Rooms are nice and very clean. Breakfast was a good mix of Vietnamese and western styles.

title: Superb stay
comment: A big thank you to Tina and Paul thanks to whom we had a superb stay on Hue. The hotel is very well placed, quiet, perfect room and bedding. All the staff in general are charming and attentive. Tina brought us a lot of information and advice on the organization of our stay and Paul greatly facilitated our transfers.

title: Excellent...
comment: Great little hotel. Lovely staff, very good breakfast. Small pleasant rooftop pool. Proposal for a tour with efficient driver. Not too far from the pedestrian streets: 15 min walk. Thanks to Tina very attentive receptionist and Paul, our driver for 2 days, patient and rider.

title: A decent stay in a newly renovated hotel but with some notable shortcomings
comment:
The hotel is newly renovated and modern and is located at the end of a no-through road in a relatively quiet part of Hue. The rooms are nice and clean although we thought that some of the rooms had interiors which were a bit gaudy. There were some nice touches such as a fresh fruit platter and freshly squeezed mango juice upon arrival and some complimentary snacks were offered in the room.

There are a few restaurants and cafes nearby (but not loads), including Ca Phe Muoi, where Hue's famous salted coffee originated. Best of all, it is only 15k VND.

The breakfast was decent (I recommend the Bun bo Hue), however there were a couple of shortcomings. Firstly, even though it commenced at 6:30am, some of the dishes were still being prepared and not brought out until 7:30am such as the banh khoai (pancakes). Secondly there were a number of fried items, which are not suitable for a breakfast buffet when they have been sitting outside and become cold and greasy.

The other issue is you had to turn on the hot water 20 minutes before having a shower, and then remember to turn it off before using it because we were warned by the hotel that you could be scalded. When we followed these instructions, the hot water ran out whilst having a shower which was really annoying.

title: Go ahead with your eyes closed!
comment: A nugget this hotel. Very clean, the staff smiling and kind, and speaks good English and even a little French. Breakfast is delicious, prepared on site and hearty. They also managed our transfer from the airport, the driver was waiting for us with our name on arrival. We booked with them our transfer to Hoi An, the hotel offered us a good rate with 3 stops on the route with no time limit (Lang Co beach, Hai Van pass and Marble Mountain). A flawless one for us, we recommend this hotel. Thanks to Tina at the front desk, and Pao our driver.

title: Great hotel
comment:
Super great hotel
Ruby,Elena and Paul are super great receptionists have treated me well and very friendly
Great food, something for everyone
Rooms are very neat and beautifully made
The whole staff is super nice
I definitely recommend

title: New hotel with caring staff
comment: Fabulous new hotel with kind and friendly staff. We stayed in a spacious triple room with cozy soft beds, nice shower with a rain and handheld shower heads. Delicious breakfast of made to order eggs, local dishes and pastries. Swimming pool up on level 5.

title: Great hotel in Hue with the best employees
comment: Excellent hotel in Hue with a very good breakfast. But what makes this hotel really special is their employees. Big thank you to Tina, Emma and Elena for being so helpful, they are just the best, always with a smile and ready to help! My friend and I had such a wonderful stay, pity it was only one night! we´ll come again!

title: Amazing stay, can’t fault
comment: Had an amazing stay here for a 1 night stop in Hue. Staff were so friendly, facilities were all amazing and clean, breakfast was really tasty. And such good value for money! No complaints at all and would highly recommend to anyone looking to stay in Hue.

title: Very helpful
comment: A very friendly place, clean, good location. We arrived in Hue by bus, at 4.30 in the morning! The hotel welcomed us immediately, although our rooms were only booked from midday. What a lucky thing! Thanks for that, especially to Elena and Paul!

title: A beautiful discovery
comment:
We had a very nice room, very clean and in which nothing was missing.
The staff is lovely. Thanks to Tina and Emma for their kindness and kindness.
The location is great, close to everything and in a quiet street.
A very good address!

title: AMAZING PLACE IN HUE ..!!!
comment:
The hotel and services of this beautiful place are really TOP ..!
Splendid rooms with a very sought after decoration and very COCOONING .!!!
The delicious BREAKFAST is absolutely a flawless with a wide choice of dishes made to order ..!
The welcome is very warm and the staff Sunny and Henry are really adorable ..!
On my next trip, I will return without hesitation in this little gem ..!
Christine

title: Superb hotel
comment:
We stayed at this hotel for a night. Everything was perfect! The staff was very attentive, Tina welcomed us with kindness, gave us lots of tips to visit the surroundings.
Sunny and Henry even allowed us to shower the afternoon before taking our train when the state of play is normally at 12:00.

title: A Premium hotel at an affordable price
comment:
This is an entirely new, small but very nice hotel, which shines with cleanliness and aesthetics. Once we arrived, and during the check-in, we were offered from a glass of fresh juice, a dish with fruits and aromatized towels to freshen our hands. Our room at the attic was spacious and very romantic. The beds were huge, with wonderful cotton sheets and a super soft loft, which we sleep almost immediately....
The breakfast was very delicious and quality.
In the room there is also a free disc with coffee, tea, snack and 2 bottles of water, the TV is very large, there is also Netflix!!
The staff are all very kind and helpful. They guide you on the activities of the city and bring you a motorcycle for rent.
I would like to thank Miss Sunny and Co. Henry, for the warmth and hospitality. We recommend it for your stay in the city!!!

title: Excellent Hotel.
comment: Fantastic hotel, great location. Staff were exceptional, thanks Ruby and Tina. Room was spacious and very well decorated. A real gem find in Hue. Roof pool after exploring DMZ was great. Would highly recommend this wonderful hotel. Definitely stay here again.

title: Wonderful Experience
comment: We had a wonderful 3 night stay at the hotel. Especially the accommodating staff made our visit as comfortable as possible. For example, we had some problems with an excursion we had booked elsewhere and the staff helped us solve the problem. In the evening Sonny and Henry (who weren’t there in the morning) even asked us how the trip was. The entire team tries to make your stay as personal and pleasant as possible.

title: Great hotel with nice rooms and great staff
comment:
Our room was great. Very large and many windows with a beautiful view of the surrounding area.

Generally, everything is very new and clean in the hotel. Also the breakfast was very delicious with many choices.

The staff was extremely friendly, especially Tina & Lucy, who were very eager to make our stay as pleasant as possible.

The citadel is about 25-30 min walk.

title: PREMIUM Says It All!
comment: We were very satisfied with this beautiful hotel! Reception was very welcoming with a drink and fresh fruit tray while we were informed of options in the area to see and do. The hotel is very tastefully decorated, quiet, spotless, comfortable superior beds (best beds we’ve had in Vietnam). The two staff members we dealt with, Tina and Lucy, were amazing, always eager to please and make our stay the best. The delicious breakfast was both buffet and made to order with no limitations. We loved our stay here! We would recommend this hotel.

title: Excellent
comment:
Lovely hotel with very soft beds, breakfast was excellent and the staff really make you feel at home.
The ladies at the reception, Tina (Than) 2x and Lucy were super friendly. But also the ladies of the cleaning are very attentive. Everything else is just new, excellent.

title: Orchid
comment:
Thanh, Quyên are so nice. Many thanks. Hotel is pretty good. The scenery is amazing and a lot greenery.

Thanh, Quyên are so nice. Many thanks. Hotel is pretty good. The scenery is amazing and a lot greenery.

Thanh, Quyên are so nice. Many thanks. Hotel is pretty good. The scenery is amazing and a lot greenery.

title: Great experience
comment: Great stay at this hotel. Linda, Tina and Emma were incredibly nice and helped us in all situations. They booked a car to drop us off in Hoi An directly at our hotel. The hotel is very beautiful elegant and refined decoration, the welcome is memorable. We stayed one night but we could have stayed longer. Thank you again for this great experience!!

title: Excellent stay
comment:
The location of the hotel is very good next to several restaurants and about 30 minutes walk from the Imperial City.
Tina took care of me, she was very helpful and very kind.
The room was spacious, nothing was missing.
Excellent breakfast, buffet and à la carte (but you can order unlimited); there is something for everyone, savory and sweet.
I'll come back to this hotel.
Thanks Tina!

title: THE ORCHID PREMIUM HOTEL RECOMMENDED
comment:
Good location. The windows of our room overlooked the courtyard - there was a quietness.
The level of support created by the hotel staff is top class. A car was ordered for us from Da Nang and back to Da Nang.
Chief admin hotel manager mom Ruby Mom Ruby (because she loves babies and all the babies in her arms while moms eat)) angel 👼 Ruby!!! An atmosphere of hospitality and home comfort has been created.
The bed is uniquely soft and my dream is a combination of elasticity and softness

title: The perfect hotel!
comment: The most amazing hotel in Hue! Everything is fantastic, but the best thing about it is the staff. They are all so so kind and thoughtful. Particularly Linda, Elena, and Khuong. They helped us with everything we needed and made our stay truly special. They are such lovely people. I would stay at this hotel again for the wonderful staff. The breakfast is delicious, with a mix of buffet and food made to order. Everything was fantastic. The rooms were spacious and bright, and the hotel was nice and quiet. The air conditioning was also really good, much needed after hot days of walking! Perfect spot, close to walking street and good for pick ups for day trips. Beds super nice and comfortable and lovely hot shower. The hotel has a really good feel, and a great atmosphere of calm and kindness. It is excellent value for money, for how good it is and how much you get included. Particularly with the vast breakfast options and if you get laundry done, it is not expensive. We had a lovely time here in Hue. Thank you so much for everything!

title: Nice and clean hotel
comment: Nice and clean hotel, very modern and cozy. Small but functional balcony. The bathroom is also really nice and clean. The staff is really friendly and helpful. They gave us a lot of suggestions for the city and transportation and helped us book a bus to Hoi An. Big thanks to Linda and Emma! 😊 the location is also very nice, in a quiet street not far from restaurants, cafes and bars. I would totally recommend this hotel.

title: Amazing Stay!
comment:
This is an excellent stay! We stayed for 1 night whilst travelling up from South to North of Vietnam. It was so clean, the beds were the best we have stayed in throughout Vietnam.

Amazing service from housekeeping to front desk staff especially, Lucy & Linda.

Breakfast was also great!

Definitely recommend, and will stay again in the future.

title: Excellent staff services and amenities. Very attentive staff and overall hotel amenities. Excellent breakfast!
comment: Excellent service, excellent staff and overall amenities and breakfast , Asian and western. Attentive with full details at every step from check in to check out. Tina, Lucy and Ruby were all amazing! Will be back again real soon. Beautiful hotel. Need to come back for their breakfast so good !

title: Fantastic Huè
comment: We spent 2 days in this beautiful hotel. The staff welcomed us and assisted us impeccably, making us feel at home. The breakfast was really satisfying and we ate the best mango of Vietnam.Vivamente recommended.

title: Excellent Customer Service !
comment: It’s our third year to visit Vietnam and have been to many different Cities and Hotels. Our stay at The Orchid Premium in Hue was by far the most excellent customer service we experienced. The moment we arrived we were greeted by Ruby, Sunny and 2 more staff and served us fresh fruits and drinks. Our room was very clean and cozy. We always start our day with a beautiful smile and warm greetings from the staff at the breakfast room. The food selection was delicious. We had an early check-out to catch a train and no time to eat breakfast but Sunny put together pastries and fruits in a to go cup for us to bring. To the entire staff, Thank you so much for taking good care of us.

title: Great hotel in Hue
comment:
Very nice hotel in a central location. Room large, comfortable and very clean.
Staff incredibly friendly and helpful, just great. Also likes to help you with tours and similar.
Breakfast is varied and very delicious.

title: Top class service and comfort.
comment: Fabulous service, comfort & value. We received a warm welcome from Sunny, Henry & trainee Nhi. All spoke excellent English and offered advice on the city of Hue. Our room was spotless, the bed extremely comfort, and being on a side street, it was extremely quiet. Breakfast was good, with a wide choice of food available. We loved the rooftop pool as well. Thankyou to all staff. Highly recommend.

title: Stay and service Unforgettable
comment:
We had an unforgettable stay at the Orchid Premium Hotel and the whole team was in great care with us.
A special thank you to Sonny, Ruby and Julie who organized our trips as real professionals and welcomed us as family members.
Very comfortable rooms and exceptional breakfast
The driver I have who drove us to Hoi An was on top

title: great experience...recommended
comment:
Great hotel incredibly sweet warm people.
Very helpful.
Great breakfast, and the mini tour we booked at the hotel was recommended, the guide Yang was only 22 but spoke fluent English.
Our transit to Hoi An is also arranged by the hotel, just a very complete day trip with very nice flats, especially the last one at marble mountain was sensational.
The caves were woooow.
I say do....experience
Our driver and guide from this last trip Mr Hai was great. Had an unforgettable day.

Sander and Anja

title: Great hotel with professional staff and nice rooms
comment:
Very comfortable room with nice bed and furniture. The is very professional and super helpful. Also breakfast was very good, with local dishes typical from Hue.
The location is between touristical streets and the area eith local restaurants.
I strongly recommend!

title: Wonderful Staff and Hotel
comment:
The hotel staff is amazing. They take care of all your needs. The rooms were very clean. The air conditioning worked perfectly. We started each morning off with a freshly cooked breakfast selected from an excellent menu. The food was delicious.
The staff arranged tours for my wife and I each day and the tours were
first class.
The staff and hotel made our visit to
Hue Vietnam a wonderful experience.

title: Fantastic hotel
comment:
This hotel was fantastic. The rooms were very clean. The breakfast was delicious The staff was so gracious and helpful thank you Ruby for all of your help with our tours. The tours were so wonderful and so well done especially the tour guides this city is so rich in history and to have that shown and explained to me was fantastic. This was my first trip to Hue Vietnam. I would recommend to anyone this city to visit and to stay at this hotel
I absolutely enjoyed my visit here

title: Exceptional stay!
comment: Exceptional stay, the staff is smiling and at our care! They make sure the stay is perfect and it's successful! They speak good English, it's nice in Vietnam. Good breakfast, local dishes (be careful not to have breakfast late otherwise there is not much left). Scooter rental, cleaning service, location OK, great room. I recommend! Thanks to Elena and Jimmy for their welcome!

title: The fantastic hotel
comment:
I really enjoyed when stay at Orchid hotel.
The room is very nice and the bed very comfortable. The breakfast was so delicious and the staff very friendly and helpful especially Kevin and Elena.
I will back to this hotel the next trip to Hue city.

title: Very new and clean
comment:
Very new hotel. I stayed one night. Clean room, good breakfast (western and local), lovely and very motivated staff. Located in a relatively quiet side road. Didn’t try the pool on the rooftop, but it looked nice.
Nothing to complain about.

title: Brand new hotel.
comment: Thanks everybody at Orchid Premium hotel for a great stay. The building is new, all facilities up and running. Emma and Ruby and team were so kind from the moment we arrived. We rented a motorbike direct from hotel, no fuss. Breakfast was chosen from a menu and freshly prepared. Rooms very well styled with high level of fixtures and furnishings. A great place to stay

title: Thank you for this extraordinary experience
comment:
My stay at Alba Wellness Valley was incredible, and it's difficult to put the experience into words. If I had to describe it in one word, I would say healing. Both emotionally and physically. It's incredibly professional, and the team treats you as an individual. The place is surrounded by nature and has an extraordinary energy. But it's the people who work there that really make this place special. I felt safe at all times. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for this experience. I will be back soon.
Antoine

title: Alba - Oasis in the Heart of Vietnam
comment:
OVERALL
A perfect location, just 30 minutes outside of Hue, Alba is a wonderful oasis to get away, find peace and reconnect with the land and waters. The hotel offers sở many daily activities for all types: food, nature, healing, classes, excursions, even zip wire.

RESTAURANT
The hotel kitchen and dining staff were excellent, providing a wide range of options for all dietary concerns. My group had brunch and dinner every day and there was always something new to try. All the dishes were flavorful, colorful, and tasty. The preparation and presentation of the dishes were stellar. We could really experience with all of ours senses the passion, care and love invested in each meal.

SPA
The Onsen Spa is one of the many jewels of Alba Wellness. I highly recommend the foot reflexology treatments, the therapists excel in this form of bodywork. The Onsen area is an oasis of peace and rejuvenation. Mr. Nyoman, Head of Wellness, is a true weaver of magical healing. My appointments with him were intricately designed with his vast background in multiple therapeutic arts, complemented by his intuitive healing expertise. I was able to make massive shifts in my life during my short stay of seven days: mentally, physically, emotionally and spiritually. I will never forget the experience.

title: Fantastic relaxing stay
comment: Had an amazing 3 night stay at Alba Wellness Resort with 3 friends The hot springs, spa, onsen and movement therapies left us very relaxed. The check in and restaurant staff are fantastic and can not do enough for you. I throughly recommend a stay at Alba. Next time I will be staying 5-7 days as 3 was not long enough!

title: My experience at Alba was unforgettable.
comment:
My experience here was amazing! Good welcoming service, comfortable beds, bathroom, the decoration was eco-friendly that impressed me.
Additionally, they had hot spring, swimming pool, tube slides, water slides, highwire and 500km-zipline. I experienced all of them and my favorite was the zipline, it was peak!
Because the rooms are separated from the play area so it was quiet and peaceful, and easy to sleep. Because of many trees and plants around and inside the resort, the atmosphere was so clear, it was like living on mountains.
However, its location is far away from Hue downtown, about 45m driving car. So it was boring outside the resort.

title: A Healing Haven in Hue: Alba Retreat Bliss
comment:
Alba is truly a sanctuary for anyone seeking to get away, switch off, and deeply recharge. It is also the perfect destination for retreat facilitators looking for a location that has it all — from healing hot springs, fully equipped Yoga Shala, additional movement/healing modalities you can include or join, and spa therapies to nourishing food and serene natural surroundings.

What makes Alba exceptional is not only its setting but also its people. The staff are warm, attentive, and genuinely caring. Special thanks to Nyoman, Ms Linh, and the wonderful restaurant team, Duoc as well as the incredible spa staff — their friendliness and dedication elevate the whole experience.

I can honestly say I cannot fault this hot springs healing haven. It continues to call me back time and time again, and I always leave feeling renewed. Highly recommended for anyone seeking wellness, connection, and rest.

title: Onsen hot spa pools, fantastic massage, great food, wonderful people activities and service.
comment:
Jacqui & I were after a quiet and more reflective break away from our normal busy lives. The hot spa pools (Onsen) were a welcome surprise. The daily massage was fantastic.
Madame Chau restaurant was great with lovely staff and delicious food and drink.
Our respective "Programs" were interesting and sometimes challenging. It's now up to me to follow up with Tai Chi & Yoga after the sample I have enjoyed. We have been letting our friends know about our 10 days in paradise. We look forward to a return trip in the future.

title: Best experience of a life changing moments
comment:
The best retreat hands down. Treatments are just fabulous and plenty of variety, staff are exceptional with such care and consideration of what you need require to heal your body and mind.
Facilities are great and the food is delicious.
The onsen is unbelievable and massages are perfect.
A massive thank you to Newman and his incredible staff and everyone associated with this memorable establishment.
Kudos and Zen to all

title: 5 day detox retreat
comment:
Tried the 5 day detox retreat and amazing experience with everything!
Staff went above and beyond to make sure my stay and my itinerary was perfect.
All the activities were well curated. The juices and kombucha are top notch!
Outdoor hot spring was something out of a movie. Serene and peaceful place to stop thinking and get connected to your present self.

Hope I can go again and thanks again for everything!

title: The perfect place to reboot
comment:
We've been here on a detox program and we're absolutely thrilled. Tired of the bustle and stress of the city — and here it was possible to truly recover, both physically and emotionally.

The nature around us is incredible - harmony, silence, peace. Every day was filled with practices that helped slow down, feel connected to yourself and the world around you.

Special thanks to the staff - warm welcome, care, understanding, even though our English is modest.

It's one of the best places we've ever been.
If you're looking for a place to reboot, recover and have peace of mind, this is it.

We lived in a bungalow. And it's a delight! Spacious bedroom with soft, spacious sofa in poured concrete frame. It was cleverly done. The bed was soft and spacious, with a romantic soft canopy. There was a big TV in the middle of the room. And behind it is an exotic bamboo partition swing inside the bungalow, and next to it is a spacious bathroom. What was interesting was the shower outside, and it was so exotic!

Our program was very busy. Various meditation practices, many yoga practices. Even with our weak English, we have been able to draw positive lessons.
Japanese sauna in eight steps, a very cool experience I'll tell you.

In addition, there are hot springs in the territory, with varying temperatures. Warm to boiled. It will coolly relax in a warm spring in the silence of nature under the sound of birds and other animals.

Thank you very much Nyoman! He accompanied us through the whole program. And gave us valuable yoga experience and advice.

title: Amazing Team and Location = Luxury
comment: Here with a group of friends and we had an incredible time. So luxurious, the team are super kind, helpful with the highest attention to detail. Food was delicious and the spa + onsen next level. Highly recommend everyone had an amazing week and did not want to leave. Big thanks to Nyoman, Diep, Leah, Lyna, Phan Thi Ly, Tan, Men, Huy, All of the Madam Chau Restaurant team! Highly recommend. Beyond great value!

title: Great natural environment
comment:
Gorgeous environment, friendly staff and loved the hot springs!

Unfortunately, it is over priced. The rooms were very small. (The bungalows are larger)
Taking into consideration its location, and the poor access road, it could be cheaper.

title: A Unique Wellness and Adventure Retreat – Alba Wellness Valley, Hue
comment:
Alba Wellness Valley is the perfect choice for travelers seeking a blend of deep relaxation, holistic wellness, and outdoor adventure. Although it’s located outside Hue’s historic center (with a shuttle service available for those wanting to explore), most guests will likely choose to stay onsite and enjoy the resort’s outstanding facilities.

Set within beautiful, spacious grounds, Alba offers a truly restorative experience. Guests can soak in natural hot springs that meander through the gardens, relax in a traditional Japanese onsen (separated into male and female areas), or join daily yoga, sound therapy, and meditation classes (depending on availability). The onsite spa is excellent — daily massages were included with our room type, and the treatments were superb.

For more active travelers, Alba also offers early morning hikes and bike rides through the surrounding countryside, plus exciting activities like zip-lining across the resort grounds.

Accommodation is equally impressive. We stayed in one of the bungalows, which were exceptionally spacious, peaceful, and very comfortable — absolutely worth the extra cost. Bungalows are tucked away in a quieter area of the resort and have access to their own communal pool, creating an even more serene atmosphere.

Food was another highlight. Whilst not a vegan resort Alba does offer four dedicated vegan menus, which can be pre-ordered upon arrival — a thoughtful touch for wellness-focused guests and those with dietary preferences.

While the Japanese onsen experience is a special part of Alba’s wellness offering, note that bathing is nude (with separate facilities for men and women). Some guests may feel a little hesitant at first, but many found it to be a rewarding and authentic experience.

Overall, we loved every moment of our stay at Alba Wellness Valley. It’s a unique retreat that combines wellness, relaxation, and adventure in a beautifully natural setting. Highly recommended for anyone seeking to recharge both body and mind — with a little thrill-seeking on the side!

title: Magical place
comment:
The most magical and spiritual land in all of Vietnam!
Wellness is so beautiful!!
Got springs so relaxing, and I feel so safe with the medical staff Trang standing by in case if emergency.
Her smile is so beautiful!
I will keep coming back !!!!

title: Wonderful place
comment:
miss trang was lovely and helpful and very kind.

she was a very helpful first aid.

we were made very welcome and the breakfast was extra special

The hot springs were very nice in the morning
i would recomend

Tony from england

Good bye see you here one day

title: Zen, gastronomy, total well-being
comment:
3 nights in this exceptional resort
Amazing food and service
Multiple free activities
Very clean and zen place
Ideal for recharging in mineral-laden hot water baths
Really great to stay there for several days. Very reasonable rates compared to the services

title: Can I live here?
comment:
I hope we can spend at least 1 month here the next year.
The anytime anywhere breakfast, we have to say that is also, "anything" and is amazing. The activities all day long were amazing as well. I loved the tai chi lessons. The staff is so helpful and gentle and the spa is crazyyyy!! Everything was perfect. Thanks! ❤️

title: Unforgettable
comment: Truly one of the most relaxing, fulfilling and nourishing experiences of my life. I will always remember my time at Alba and hope one day I have the chance to return. The range of different meditation classes was incredible, and the daily Onsen and spa treatments were very special. You will not regret staying here!

title: Good value for money with caring staff
comment:
We enjoyed our stay at this gem of a hotel. Our room was comfortable and very clean. Breakfast was a delight with a small buffet and a range of food cooked to order for which you could have as many dishes as you liked.
The hotel is positioned close to many restaurants and the river.
The staff were extremely helpful and caring. They organised trips and taxis to collect us from the airport and take us to our next hotel. The staff always checked our transport arrived to collect us and even walked out with us with umbrellas if it was raining.
This hotel was good value and we highly recommend it.

title: Perfect stay in Hue
comment:
The Jade Hotel is the perfect place to stay in Hue.

The rooms are spacious, spotlessly clean, and very quiet — ideal for relaxing after a day of sightseeing. The location is right in the city center, making it easy to reach the main attractions.

The staff is incredibly friendly, welcoming, and always ready to help with any request.

The breakfast is also excellent, with a good variety of quality options.

Highly recommended!

title: Great stay in Hue.
comment: Extremely kind and helpful staff. Big clean twin room. Best hotel breakfast we experienced in Vietnam. We were upgraded to a larger twin room at negligible extra cost as the standard one was a bit too small for us. Special thanks to Oah, Moon, Nhi and Son for their cheerful hospitality.

title: 5 star service at 3 star prices- highly recommended
comment: Excellent in all areas! Location, 5 star service, breakfast, cleanliness… highly recommend this hotel it was one of the best we’ve stayed in.

title: The most friendly experience in Hue
comment: It is a clean and comfortable place at walking distance from good restaurants and the Citadel. Everything worked well. And the best of all was the staff. All of them were very helpful and attentive to us. No doubt we would return to Jade Hotel even in a tour with more budget.

title: Great hotel super welcome, lots of help for bus, plane, scooter, laundry. find the jacket and shipped
comment:
Our stay at the hotel, Jade was the best of our trip to Vietnam.
We were received by a team that always had a smile and organized our bus trip to Hoi An and our plane from Danang to Ho Chi Minh. I highly recommend this address for a stay in Hue.

title: Nice experience
comment: Very comfortable hotel, very attentive and kind staff! Very good breakfast. 2 private drivers (Peter and?) booked directly by the hotel efficient and attentive to our needs.

title: A comfortable 1 night stay
comment: The beds were comfortable and there were tea bags, coffees and a kettle, as well as snacks in the room. The air-con was very powerful (we switched it off at a certain point). The staff were pleasant. Probably a place for young travellers.

title: Nice hotel
comment: Good hotel, reasonable price, dedicated staff, thank you team for consulting and arranging trips for us. Well worth coming back next time.

title: Short BUT sweet stay !!!
comment: We had a wonderful stay at Jade Hotel.Great location and amazing staff . The staff also helped us with transportation to Hoi An . We highly recommended!!!

title: Good place to stay
comment: I had a great stay at Jade. The room was clean and comfortable, the staff were friendly, and the location was very convenient. The breakfast was tasty, and the overall service exceeded my expectations. I would definitely stay here again.

title: Perfect.
comment:
Very nice hotel near the points of interest of the city. Breakfast included at will, varied and delicious. Charming staff and speaking French. Comfortable room in which rest is ensured.
I recommend

title: Very positive experience
comment:
Friendly and helpful staff, always very smiling and ready to help.
Very nice room, large and clean, even the bathroom.
The Vietnamese breakfast was served at the table, very good, plus they brought us bread, jam, fruit and juice.
Thanks for everything!

title: A great hotel choice!
comment:
I stayed here as part of a 25 day Vietnam solo tour. I am not a fan of Vietnam at all but both my stay at this hotel plus this friendly town were excellent. I think the Angels must have been looking after me when I chose this hotel.
I arrived late afternoon by train & was presented with a welcome drink on arrival. Small gestures like this make you feel like you've chosen well.

I hadn't realised I'd booked a room which had no window as I'd never thought to check to see if there wasn't a window in the room. Somehow, I managed without one though. I was given the option to change room after 1 day but I had got used to it by then. Room was a good size with a lovely shower room, powerful shower, strong WI-FI & spotlessly clean.
The Staff here were excellent. There was an AMAZING young female receptionist who single handedly seemed to keep the place operating like a well oiled machine. She even sent me off to a funky cafe she used to work in thinking that I would like it (TRON CAFE & I loved it! Please go!).

The hotel is small enough to still have a bit of a personal feel to it & at breakfast you can see they attract a diverse crowd from older couples from Europe, younger adventurers & a few solo travellers. Abundant breakfast options served at your table. Sets you up nicely for the day.

I picked up Grab motorbikes from here very easily for excursions out to e.g the abandoned water park.

I would heartily recommend staying here if I was coming to stay in Hue again.

title: Excellant Stay
comment: Some of the most helpful staff we have encountered in Vietnam. The hotel is centrally located, the rooms comfortable, breakfast was the normal fare offered everywhere, the extra toast was good with kids. Overall would recommend a stay here.

title: Great Hue stay
comment: A really good two night stay. Comfortable and quiet but also very central, making it easy to walk to the main sights and restaurants. Staff were really friendly, helpful and professional. A great place to stay for a few nights while exploring Hue

title: 4 nights stay
comment:
The hotel is well dituated with easy access to the local markets, dpas and resteraunts. Lovely engaging and helpful staff, very pleasent and eager to oblige, especially at the front desk.
My room was lovely and spacious with a really comfy bed. Unfortunately my balcony was not private as it was next to the fire exit and the air conditioning fan was situated directly on the outside wall which made an extremely loud hum constantly. Also the double glazing did not keep the noise of the karaoke bars and barking dogs out unfortunately.

title: Friendly place
comment: Very quiet room, clean and spacious room with cable tv. Duc, Loc and La were very helpful and gave us good advice for our next trip. Worth the little extra. Great location and central. Massive reception and parking for bikes etc. Near DMZ bar.

title: Alba Thanh Tan Hot Spring Resort – A Peaceful Escape in Nature
comment:
Alba Thanh Tân Hot Spring Resort is a hidden gem for relaxation and wellness, nestled in the serene countryside of Hue, Vietnam. This resort offers a rejuvenating experience with its natural hot springs, Japanese-style onsen, and spa services, making it a perfect retreat for those seeking tranquility.

One of the highlights of the stay is the breakfast service, which can be enjoyed anywhere, anytime, allowing guests to savor delicious, fresh meals at their convenience. Whether you choose to dine in the comfort of your room, by the hot springs, or amidst the lush greenery, every meal feels like a special experience.

The rooms are clean, spacious, and thoughtfully designed, providing a cozy sanctuary to unwind. Waking up to the gentle sounds of nature—birds chirping, leaves rustling, and water flowing—makes life feel peaceful and truly relaxing. The resort’s atmosphere encourages you to slow down, breathe deeply, and immerse yourself in the beauty of nature.

A stay at Alba Thanh Tân is not just a getaway but a chance to reconnect with yourself and experience pure serenity.

title: Very pleased.
comment:
Nice hotel, clean, good breakfast.
Staff gentle, warm.

title: The hotel has very good service, enthusiastic and friendly staff, quick support whenever guests need. The room is clean.
comment: The hotel has very good service, enthusiastic and friendly staff, quick support whenever guests need. The room is clean, clean, full of amenities and carefully prepared. Quiet space, creating a comfortable feeling when resting. In addition, the accompanying services such as room cleaning, reception or customer support are all carried out very professionally. It was a pleasant experience and I will definitely come back in the future.
Clean, careful, enthusiastic staff also has a swimming pool.

title: All right.
comment: Ras and very welcoming hotel

title: All right.
comment: Very well received, very comfortable, very clean and very good value for money

title: Peaceful and pleasant quiet hotel
comment: Well placed, man-sized hotel, clean , friendly staff, quiet , perfect equipment. I recommend

title: Eden Hue
comment: Great location, impeccable staff

title: Wonderful place
comment:
They are happy to see their patrons. Very helpful and caring. I would chose to stay here again.
The location is perfect for a quiet stay or take a very short walk to all the restaurants & shops.
My room was perfect for me.
Very clean.
Breakfast was good and fresh with a good variety for everyone.
The atmosphere is modern without forgetting Vietnam's history.

title: A well curated and ideal hotel for a stay in Hue
comment:
The hotel is located very near, 5 min, to the walking street.

It's been a while ever since I found value for money in a hotel. The staff is very welcoming, polite and professional. Rooms are well furnished though I'd have loved to be able to borrow an iron. It feels great to stay around here.

title: ok
comment: good quality hotels, helpful staff, good value for service, family returning if the occasion

title: Vacation with family
comment: Good location room clean everything great

title: Fabulous stay! Will come again!
comment: Perfect location right in the middle of tourist dress shops, massage, redtaurants and next to the wonderful Pearl river. I came here twice... stayed over two weeks in total. Staff has always been super attentive, warm and friendly and always very polite and helpful. It's become like a home away from home. Breakfast is a huge range from healthy boiled veges and salad, to omelettes, pho, fruit, hot food and cereal, bread and pastries.

title: Excellent Experience
comment:
The hotel is in a great location, right in the center and hiking street of Hue, so there''s plenty of amenities around!
Breakfast is varied and tasty.
The receptionists were also friendly, hospitable, and very helpful!

I will start with the positives:
- The location is central. Close to walking street, the river and plenty of restaurants & Bars.
- Room was clean
- The staff at reception are friendly and helpful.

Negatives:
- lots of road noise, you will hear horns beeping and traffic noise coming till late at night
- if you are looking for the little services you get at slightly more expensive hotels you wont get it. You will have to fill empty water bottles supplied down in the lobby etc.
- the mattress was covered in plastic so ever time you moves the plastic scrunches and makes noise
- you will hear all noises and conversations that are occurring in the hallways and stairs, eco's throughout, you will feel as if you are apart of the conversation whilst lying in bed.
- breakfast is cold to slightly warm in the buffet, area is small and cramped so you run into people constantly. The toaster they have is terrible. (You will understand the annoyance if you stay here)
- we had no hot water in our room for showers the first night and staff didnt want to move us to a new room. They then fixed it however we then got about 2 minutes of hot water before it was freezing cold again.
- elevator was broken for the first day ( not a big deal as we didnt have luggage however be horrible for people who did)
- daily room service - if you sre expecting a full service then you are mistaken, they make your bed and replace you towels. Other than that they dont clean anything.

Overall you get what you pay for, if you want a cheap clean room with no service or attention to detail then this place is suitable.

If you like the little things then not the place to stay

title: Wonderful Stay at Eden Hotel Hue.
comment:

title: Excellent hotel, near imperial citadel - spacious and clean room and personal with great care.
comment: Travellers we recommend, warmly this hotel which deserves 4 stars. Excellent value for money, the rooms are very spacious and clean and the staff is really nice and helpful. title: The best staff in Vietnam 😍
comment: Had two nights here and regrets that I shouldn't stay any longer. The staff is the most welcoming and service-minded I have experienced in my time in Vietnam. Super good for English, smiling, and helpful. Thank you very much, you are beautiful! ♥️ Will definitely recommend staying here alone due to the staff. Breakfast is good, they provide water with when you have to go on a trip and check out. There was a little bad smell in my bathroom, but it also fixed it quickly. In addition, the location is quite brilliant, relatively quiet street and walking distance to most!

title: Highly satisfied. A good, reasonably priced hotel that offers great value for money
comment:
Highly satisfied. A good, reasonably priced hotel that offers great value for money.

Location (9/10): Very convenient, right in the central tourist and dining area. Easy walking distance to Trang Tien Bridge and Dong Ba Market. It's still quiet enough for a restful stay.

Rooms (9/10): The room was clean and came with all essential amenities. The bed was comfortable, ensuring a good night's sleep. The design is simple but cozy. Hot water was stable.

Service (10/10): The strongest point is the staff. They are incredibly friendly, enthusiastic, and quick to assist with any request. Always professional and smiling. They also offer around tours with resonable price, airport pick up

Breakfast (8/10): Good quality, enough to start the day feeling full.
Excellent choice for a trip to Hue. If you need a well-located, clean hotel with attentive service, I would definitely recommend this place.

title: A wonderful happy and immaculately clean Hotel
comment: The Gardenia . Immaculately clean, and rooms cleaned every day. Breakfast is humble but wonderful. Close to the town,the river and walking street. The staff are absolutely superb. So very helpful, polite and couldnt do enough to make our stay perfect. Thank you Han, Julia, Lisa and Misa for being so kind and helpful. We will miss you!!

title: Very nice budget friendly hotel.
comment:
This is great value hotel with everything you need for your stay in Hué and it’s in a great location. Our room was upgraded which was nice on arrival. The room we had was spacious and has a tv and air con. The shower was nice and hot with s-gel & shampoo and our room was cleaned on request. The only downside for me was you had to pre order your breakfast and also tell them what time you’ll be eating it.
All the staff were very nice and friendly.

title: Budget friendly boutique hotel in Hue
comment: Lovely little hotel, tucked away down an alley. Staff were brilliant, polite and helpful. Room was spotless, comfortable, quiet (except when there was a karaoke singer in a property behind, but it wasn’t constant or prolonged) with perfect air con, brilliant hot water shower - take care to set it at the right temp before getting in! - toiletries provided, more than enough towels and a big breakfast included. A few mins from the tourist area and some stunning restaurants. Can’t fault it, value for money and then some! The roof top pool is a bit small for swimming but great to cool off on a hot day.

title: Great value hotel

title: Charming hotel quiet and relaxing. Small care staff and excellent and varied food
comment:
Villa Louise is located by the sea with direct access and shaded sun loungers. It consists of a central building with dining room, living room and indoor pool overlooking the sea and at the back is the swimming pool and relaxation area with sun loungers and a library. Our room, the 37 overlooks the sea and imperial style with a Jacuzzi and outdoor shower in a small patio. Just sublime. There are other simpler rooms and villas in a beautiful park. A beach bar is under construction. The hotel is super quiet and about 30min from Hue by taxi for 6 Swiss francs.
The food is excellent and varied. Local and European cuisine, pizza and pasta. The owner is French.

title: Pleasant time spent at Villa Louise
comment:
This place was recommended by our hotel to spend a few hours by the sea, the hotel is located facing the sea with a magnificent view. We had the pleasure of meeting Michel, the owner of the place who is French. He welcomed us with great professionalism and kindness.
The beach bar with a second pool are being renovated and the place will soon be even more pleasant for guests.

title: Poor experience
comment: Poor experience. Our room had a very strong odor of damp and moldy. The whirlpool tub drained into or room. (Room 40). We were eventually moved to another room around midnight after attempting to clean up the water. Next room had no hot water and the electrical outlets shorted out. In the morning we tried to book a car and had zero luck. We were in Timbucktoo with no way back to the city. They offered to call a car for us when we asked how we get out of there. All in all a horrible stay.

title: Where the Beach?
comment: We wanted a break from Hue city. But we’d advise falling into the ‘visit the beach for the day’ trap. Despite the misleading pictures everywhere, this place doesn’t have beach access to the sea, or places to sit on at the beach. Is all a bit tired in the club too.

They are quick and friendly. Overall it is a great hotel.

title: Park view hotel
comment:
I stayed at Park View during my recent trip to Hue and had such a lovely experience. The hotel has a cozy, welcoming atmosphere and is in a great location — easy to get around and explore the city.

What really made the stay special was the warm and friendly service from the staff. Everyone was kind and helpful, always ready to assist. A special thanks to Quoc Huy, one of the bellmen, who greeted me with a smile and gave me great tips on where to go and eat like a local. Little things like that really make a difference when you're traveling.

Overall, it was a comfortable, relaxing stay. I’d definitely come back and would happily recommend Park View to anyone visiting Hue!

title: Highly Recommend!! If I have chance to travel Hue again, I will stay at Park view!!
comment: We love our stay here at Park View hotel. Our room has decent space and is very clean,and comfortable. This is the first time my husband and I have visited Hue. We stayed for two nights at a hotel with a diverse breakfast selection and an outdoor swimming pool, which is perfect for the hot days. The staff was very friendly, from check-in to check-out. In particular, my husband and I were very impressed with Mr. Quoc Huy the Bellman, who provided us with helpful information about tourist spots around Hue that we needed and assisted with our luggage promptly upon check-in. The location is right in the center, making it very convenient for anyone staying there. Highly recommend!!

title: Excellent
comment:
The restaurant at the top is beautiful the food is excellent and the staff smiling I strongly advise you to come
Van thank you for the good Service

title: Could really be better.....
comment:
At first glance a great hotel, with nice entrance and good looking lobby. After checking in we went to our room, we had 423. Here unfortunately not everything was ok. I will give a small list of the things that should be different in my experience.

There is no safe in the room while it is in the description. The inside/bottom of the bed was completely loose (digested), resulting in a lot of staff formation. The headboard behind the bed was completely full of grease stains from all the heads that had been against this. There was 2 queen beds made into 1 very wide bed. Of course, there is nothing wrong with this, but the duvet size must be correct. But it was not only too narrow, but also far too short. So this turned into cold feet. Furthermore, there was only a bedside table on one side, this is quickly solved after indicating it. The shower curtain had a bad smell, which made the bathroom smell bad.

This is not a review to “burn down” this hotel, but rather to help fellow travelers. And perhaps motivate the hotel management to do something with this. The staff is not to blame, they deserve a compliment, and were super friendly and helpful!

title: A wonderful hotel experience
comment:
What a fantastic hotel. I spent just one night here as part of a Just You tour of Vietnam.
The hotel has everything that you could need. The rooms were huge. The beds very comfortable.
A luxury bath and the best shower you could want.
There is a breakfast room on the 12th floor that has fantastic views. The selection of food is large and of very high quality. If you visit Hue I would definitely recommend this place as the place to stay.

title: More a 3 star but it’s ok
comment:
We stayed here for one night as part of a cycling trip.

Reception is modern but the bedrooms are rather dated. No balcony to sit on as it small and taken up by an air con unit.

We overlooked the pool and certainly the exterior walls of the hotel need painting.

Bathroom with overhead shower more suited for a short person.

Usual amenities- robes, fit flops, toothbrushes, shower gel and shampoo.

Breakfast was good but we arrived at 06.00 when it opened and not everything was ready.

Not sure how central the hotel is as we biked to sight see.

The hotel is okay but some modernisation required is some areas.

title: Perfect stay in Hue
comment:
Extremely clean and quiet. Extremely well located.

I really enjoyed my stay here and will go back again. In the case that there’s a strange noise in the room, just turn off the hot water heater and turn it back on when you need it.

Staff is friendly and helpful.

title: Nice hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel, big buffet for lunch , very good.
Great location. Beautiful swimming pool
Average Internet, no secure site
People at the reception very welcoming.

title: The Romance is at a happening place in Hue
comment: This is a fantastic location for a hotel in Hue. If you can possibly do it, book on a week-end. One block from the hotel, they close the streets to traffic, and it becomes a happening place! So fun! We walked to great restaurants without having to look for motorbikes or cars, we visited Bo's Tailor to get a shirt made within 24 hours, we felt the vibe and energy of Hue at night and loved it. The hotel itself is large but very lovely; they have umbrellas you can borrow if you need, and the breakfast is fantastic. Highly recommend.

title: Hotel review
comment: Lovely stay, great food. Rooms are wonderful as are the massage facilities & restaurants. Highly recommend. Short walking distance to markets. Staff extremely friendly and helpful

title: My fav place in Hue
comment:
My favorite place to stay with a group. Food amazing, service spectacular, receptionists are pure hearts, location is so good and already twice tried their SPA and it was so relaxing and good!
One of the best massages I had in Vietnam
♡
Looking forward to come back

title: great stay Romance Hotel
comment:
Excellent service, great staff highly recommend.
Wonderful food too. Big beds and room.

title: The perfect hotel, happy again!!!
comment: If anyone is looking for a perfect hotel, it is Romance Hotel Hue. We, my wife and I, unfortunately only spent 3 nights here, from 13 to 16 February 2026, but it was a perfectly successful stay. The room was excellent and had very good comfort, freestanding bathtub, shower, balcony etc. and only high quality materials were used! Rooftop pool and Sky bar. Breakfast is very good and every taste is taken care of. But the highlight is the friendly, helpful and competent staff in all areas of the hotel. We would especially like to thank Mrs. Dang from the reception who greeted us warmly and despite Tet-fest additionally organized our transport to the Ba Na Hills and Golden Bridge and to Hoi An!!! If we didn't have to travel further due to appointment we would have loved to stay. Full score!

title: really great hotel
comment:
great hotel, really great service...fast, friendly and helpful.
The location is very good, rooms spacious, great buffet Asian and European...the SPA absolutely top. Pool on 11 floor, amazing view

title: Ideal location
comment: Located in the middle of the tourist and restaurant district, a good 2.5 km from the Citadel. Large, neat rooms with all amenities. Full breakfast buffet.

title: Fantastic
comment: Really nice hotel, the attention was fantastic and the room was amazing. The breakfast couldn’t be better, it has everything you want

title: Happy with our short stay.
comment: Only stayed one night as we was passing through Hue but from what we saw we were very impressed, as you walk in you are greeted by friendly staff. The room was really big, there was a slight smell of damp but not over bearing. The bed was ok a little hard for our liking but this seem to be the normal all the hotels we have stayed in this trip. The breakfast was good plenty of choice. Impressed with our short stay.

title: Good choice
comment:

title: An experience of luxury
comment: Beautiful hotel where you can experience the feeling of luxury. The room we stayed in was overwhelmingly nice. The bathroom was large. The bed great to sleep in. The only downside was a dunking sound that sounded like a pump that sounded at half an hour interval. Fortunately not at night.

title: Perfekt

title: Clean but old
comment: Nice lobby but when you get upstairs, there is old carpet and it smells like humidity. Decent room, no balcony and mattresses are hard but very clean.

title: Outstanding Service
comment: Amazing hotel with friendly staff, great location, spacious rooms, comfortable beds, and a truly welcoming atmosphere.

title: At a glance of the lobby and top floor gorgeous
comment: The hotel has a beautiful imposing lobby with a beautiful aquarium. The rooms are large enough with comfortable beds; the shower is not very large, but the bathroom is new and modern. You will find in the bathroom, in addition to shampoo and bubble bath, also other useful items. If you have a room on the upper floors you will enjoy a magnificent view of the illuminated city skyline, especially at night; same thing on the top floor, where you will find the breakfast room, well stocked, and the pool with city view. We didn't experience it because the weather wasn't favorable. Recommended

title: Short breaks in Hue
comment: It is a very nice hotel. The staff is super friendly and helpful. Our hotel room was on the 7th floor. Floor and huge size. It was equipped with a 2.50 m wide bed and also the bathroom was awesome. A recessed bathtub in the ground area with full views of the city. The snack bar next to the entrance area is also recommended. Very delicious food. Even at breakfast nothing remained unfulfilled. The place is really recommended.

title: 3 subliminal nights in this luxury hotel!!!
comment:
Superb luxury hotel in Hue with smiling, charming, very welcoming staff...
xtra rooms with king size beds and exceptional views of the city and mountains , very large reception room superbly decorated and grandiose. The staff of the Front Office very nice and courteous.
Breakfast xtra with chef Ms Hông and personal F&B composed of Mr Hung, Ms Vui, Mr Q.Son and Ms Thanh. Exceptional dinner on the first night, super tasty dishes and impeccable restaurant service! Thank you very much to the whole Romance hotel team 😁😊😍
We will definitely return for a future trip!!!

title: Overall very good. Good breakfast.
comment: Some of rooms at Level 5 can't control room temperature. Rest all good. Foot massage is value for money. Hand shower has no hanger.

title: SUPER HOTEL
comment:
super hotel
a little old but super clean and well located
very large rooms all ok
Breakfast ok
super staff
close to the center and full of restaurants and bars
I RECOMMEND

title: Nice overnight stay with nice staff
comment: Great stay. Thank you!:) Good staff, great food, very clean and great location. Very central, just off Walking Street

title: Great experience
comment:
Great location, atmosphere, services, cleanliness, friendly staff and professional.
Breakfast was delicious with a variety of choices. Great coffee and deserts .

title: Recommended
comment:
Lovely hotel, excellent staff and location to central shops etc.
Great buffet breakfast. Clean rooms and great spa. Couldn't fault

title: Romance accommodation
comment: Nice hotel. Very clean room. Comfortable beds. Lots to choose from for breakfast buffet. Nice views. Close to restaurants.

title: Romance is the best
comment: All very good. Room is clean and breakfast is delicious. All the receptionist are fantastic and friendly. Highly recommend…

title: Very well located
comment: Hotel is super well located. Comfortable room with bath and good shower. helpful employees. Median breakfast. Indicate.

title: Hotel in Hue
comment:
Good hotel with great bar, restaurant, pool, and day spa.
Staff always friendly and welcoming.
Great place to stay on Hue

title: Clean and well located
comment:
This is a beautifully clean, well located hotel.
I had a little disagreement with the spa manager, but it was sorted by a lovely lady named Thùy Chung.
The spa is newly opened and quite beautiful, but the spa staff need more training in what an aromatherapy essential oil is and customer relations.
The shop also has some lovely clothing and souvenirs.
Overall, happy smiling staff, clean and well located.
I would definitely recommend this hotel.

title: Wonderful hotel in the centre of Hue.
comment: Wonderful stay in Romance hotel. Excellent service. Very central hotel with good nearby restaurants and lovely park near the river

title: Romance Pleasure 🙏
comment:
Romance is a little gem in Hue.
Staff are amazing so helpful and thanks to Tran she is awesome,giving a little guidance advising on amazing hotel features like the spa,it's a must do experience. The pool is amazing and book yourself a suite. You won't regret it.
Really loved our stay in this hotel and booked it last minute.

title: Absolutely brilliant Romance Hotel
comment:
Absolutely fabulous from the moment we arrived. The staff are all fantastic and a credit to the hotel.
A particular shout out to Trim who organised a fantastic couples vip massage. The masseur was lovely and truly magic.
It was my partners birthday whilst there and they presented him with a cake and sang to him at breakfast, without any prompt at all.
Wouldn't hesitate to recommend this hotel to anybody.

title: Highly Recommended for Hue
comment:
We arrived during the day the typhoon will be arriving Hue. It was quite an experience for us.

The staffs of Hotel Romance was so friendly and helpful from the moment we check in till check out. From front office to housekeeping and also the restaurant on the Ground Floor to the team at Breakfast Buffet at Level 11.

The room and breakfast was excellent.

Would highly recommend to any travellers to Hue.

title: One of the best
comment:
I had a truly enjoyable stay at this hotel. The swimming pool was clean, well-maintained, and perfect for relaxing after a long day. My room was spotless — very clean, comfortable, and quiet, which made for a great night’s sleep.

What stood out the most was the exceptional staff. Everyone was incredibly friendly and welcoming, always ready to help with a smile. Their warm hospitality really made a difference.

Highly recommend this hotel for anyone looking for comfort, cleanliness, and excellent service. I’d definitely stay here again!

title: Good hotel
comment: Good hotel with staff verry friendly and helpful… room is clean Breakfast so good. We had great time here……………………………….

title: Very nice
comment: Great breakfast and very spacious room. Close to the central street with many bars and restaurants where you can taste local dishes

title: Not good
comment: Rooms were damp with humidity. Got pressured to pay for water we never had just as we were leaving in taxi for airport. Felt like a scam as only drank free ones in room. Housekeeping guy also complained that we'd eaten takeaway pizza in our room. Gym and pool closed. Couldn't wait to leave!

title: Choose somewhere else
comment: Very average hotel. Dodgy dealing as you leave - try to get you to pay for new towels or linen if anything is marked. We had marked linen when we arrived and tried to get us to pay new one on check out. Said they had already laundered when we d only left room a few minutes before. Total bs and very disappointing. Also although cameras everywhere don't trust signature when buying a coffee and putting to room. Need to check your key too. Just all makes you feel uncomfortable.

title: First time in Hue City
comment: Love the ambience, the service from the moment we arrived and leaving. The staff were nice. The breakfast buffet was at 11th floor, came with a very nice view of the city, good service from the crea and good food.

title: Very good hotel I hue, Highly recomended 😁
comment:
Very Nice and clean hotel, with very friendly and service minded staff... The room was big, clean and with a nice view over the town.
Highly recomended 😁

title: Good hotel in downtown Hue
comment: Hotel in the center of Hue, great location to go out downtown for a walk and with plenty of restaurants nearby. The rooms are nice large and in my opinion recently renovated. The common areas instead are a bit dated and neglected, both the corridors and the pool area leave something to be desired. The breakfast, however, is the best I found in Vietnam for choice of food and variety of buffet .overall I would recommend it!

title: recommended!
comment:
-Nice staff
-very good food
-beautiful Mood
-good room service
-always helpful
-Nice helpful bouncer

title: Very pleasant experience
comment: Highly recommended hotel! The facilities are well maintained, very clean and the staff is extremely friendly. Breakfast very varied and with good views

title: Very friendly, excellent service at Romance Hotel.
comment:
5 star - Very friendly, excellent service

4 star - Room 701 clean, very large comfortable beds. Very good breakfast variety/quality. Central location. Good rooftop pool.

title: Good Price quality ratio
comment: Very good address downtown and yet quiet. Perfect bedding. The furniture had just been changed. Good choice for breakfast and rooftop pool is very good. Very good Price quality ratio. I really enjoyed being near restaurants and bars... and sleeping quietly at the same time.

title: Nice hotel, clean, friendly staff and perfect location. Walking distance to old town and entertainment center
comment: Nice hotel, clean and friendly staff. Perfect location, walking distance to old town and entertainment center. There are also bicycles that you can use for free. Hue is a beautiful city where you can see the old imperial era everywhere. The river makes it green and wide

title: Hue Romantic Hotel
comment: Breakfast buffet had a great selection! Their pool was lovely clean and the rooms were fantastic! The staff were the sweetest people, huge recommendation!

title: Excellent location
comment: Lovely stay. Excellent location and very friendly staff. Nice breakfast with everything you need in a buffet and the coffee is very good. Room a very nice size. Lovely views and Hue has a lovely night vibe when the streets are closed off for the weekends.

title: Viet Nam Trip
comment: Friendliness of staff and quality of food and accommodation first class. Loved the walking streets around the hotel. Treated to soccer game in neighbouring stadium where local team won. Lovely pool area to cool off. Highly recommended. A+

title: Comfortable and clean Hotel in a great location.
comment: Very comfortable stay at Romance Hotel. This Hotel is very clean, the pool on the top floor is great and the buffet breakfast contains a good selection of delicious food. Thanks Tram for a great stay! We will visit again as the rain was very heavy while we were here and we would love to see Hue again!

title: Good location
comment:
Hotel staff are welcoming, great location for perfume river, bars and restaurants.
Small pool area on roof top serving snacks and great selection of drinks.

Room are very western and we could have been in any hotel room in the world. Beds were not comfortable, very hard and worse sleep of our trip.
Beware of the sports stadium next door which Tannoy started at 5.30am and work us up with repetitive shouting.

title: Amazing stay!
comment:
The room was nice and clean and we had a huge bed! The AC worked well, so it was nice and cool in the room. The bathroom was neat and the shower was great. And most importantly the personal was incredibly kind and helpful!

Overal we really enjoyed our stay at Romance Hotel.

title: It was a good hotel.
comment:
Overall, it was a good cosplay hotel.
The fridge is well chilled, there is a convenience store nearby and you can walk to the royal palace of Füe.
The water pressure in the shower may be a little weak.
By the way, this is from Hue called Boom Bo.
It seems to have its own pho, but it seems to require an endorsement from Hue City to be able to call itself Vung Bo Hue.
Please note that relying on Google Maps word of mouth alone may fail.
Also, the water inside the palace is high, so you should buy one outside before you go.

title: My Experience At The Romance Hotel
