comment: The room was nice and cozy. I liked the big bed I had and the nice view from the 9th floor. The pillows were fluffy and comfortable. There were many choices to choose from at the buffet and the food was great. I loved the ice tea. The experience here was great.

title: Excellent accommodation and wonderful staff
comment:
The staff are absolutely wonderful and cannot do enough to make your visit a pleasurable one.
They put a note under the door to make sure we were ok when we had the do not disturb sign out for whole day. We were both sick with heavy colds.
Then they organised a dinner cruise and pick up on our behalf for our last night and mentioned to the tour operator it was our 50th wedding anniversary. When we got on the boat there was a lovely sign on our table.
As we were staying for 6 nights we were given a free drink frim the restaurant ir pool bar. Also some free laundry service

title: Nice hotel very well placed to visit Hue
comment:
Very large room , very comfortable beds, modern bathroom with shower and bathtub, very varied and good breakfast
Rooftop pool large enough
Staf very efficient and friendly.
Very well placed to visit Hue

title: Great hotel!
comment:
Good hotel, just outside the busy center. The breakfast was good with wide choice, room is large and clean, staff is very friendly.

The pool on the roof terrace is nice, there are only too few chairs and sunbeds. The people at the reception are very helpful.

title: Good experience
comment: Hotel close to everything, it is correct impeccable service. Swimming pool. With super good breakfast. we enjoyed our stay. Spacious room large bathroom is well equipped. I recommend for families. Everything is close to market at 20min.

title: Nice hotel!
comment: Nice hotel, right in the center of Hue making everything easily accessible. The rooms are spacious, the air conditioning works great and the breakfast is extensive. The staff will do everything to make you feel comfortable and help where possible. Definitely recommended when looking for a hotel in Hue.

title: Very good
comment:
Very good and tidy rooms. Well maintained. Staff courteous and helpful.
Breakfast top notch. All staff very friendly.Excellent bar service , with well made coffee and cocktails. Prices also very reasonable. Food was varied and well presented

title: Clean, comfortable and friendly
comment:
Well located, clean and comfortable hotel with excellent service. Varied and tasty breakfast buffet including typical Western and Vietnamese choices, and staff always willing to help.

We arrived early via the train and appreciated the early check in - thank you Romance team.

title: One of the best hotels in Hue
comment: Convenient location, near the walking street and delicious restaurants. The room is clean and comfortable, the balcony of the Suite room is the best. But above all, the attentiveness and friendliness of the staff. In addition, every breakfast, we also received 2 free drinks from the a la carte menu. 2 vouchers for drinks at the restaurant or bar + Free laundry 5 items every day during the stay. It's great, thank you Romance Hotel team. Unfortunately, because it was cold and rainy during our stay, we couldn't experience the swimming pool.

title: A decent hotel in a good location
comment:
Romance hotel - Hue:

We stayed here for two nights in March 2025. Conveniently located in the heart of the Hue city, this Hotel was very clean; the staff very friendly and always smiling and the breakfast spread was generous! They made vegetarian fried noodles for us, on both the mornings of our stay, on our request.
There were several attractions and eateries —-Indian, Italian etc nearby, and even small & big shops for buying souvenirs.
A very good hotel and a very friendly staff, particularly Ms. Diem was very kind and sweet. The restaurant staff was also nice and caring.

title: Very very loud
comment: The hotel is clean and in a good location, but is EXTREMELY loud. The rooms don’t have carpet so there is nothing to muffle sounds. Well past midnight we heard slamming cabinets and furniture screeching across the ground. This started up again before 6am. The “window” in the room just looks out into the hallway into this corridor spanning all the floors which doesn’t help with noise. Everything just echoes through there. If you are actually trying to get some sleep, this is not the place. The beds are old/lumpy/uncomfortable. They give you 3 tiny bottles of water.

title: A wonderful stay
comment:
We were delighted with our stay!
The room and the view are amazing! The staff is lovely and the location is great! A swimming pool and a superb breakfast buffet enhance the stay!
We highly recommend!!

title: Hôtel Romance Hué
comment:
Great location. Very welcome. Can make an effort on breakfast. (while an excellent French baker is installed less than 5 minutes walk from the hotel)
Very smiling and kind staff.
Very lively pedestrian street in the evening near the hotel

title: Top loves to come back here.
comment:
Lovely spacious room, light, very nice shower and super nice beds. But the staff in particular make the difference.
Nice, attentive and well engaged in their profession. Both at the reception, bar / restaurant in short of me they get a big 10.

title: Romance hotel
comment: Very nice and very friendly personel. Comfortable room with very good bathroomwith bath, separate shower and heated toilet. Restaurant is ok with good breakfast and nice view over the city. On tge ground floor there is a pleasant coffeebar/restaurant.

title: Excellent hotel
comment: Very nice room and very nice hotel with comfortable amenities. Very large bed and the bathroom is beautiful, bathtub with magnificent views. Great location it allows to be in the heart of the city. I recommend this hotel for a pleasant stay.

title: A lovely place to stay!
comment: We got upgraded, so we were blown away at the views and layout of our room. While, we only stayed for two nights, we made great use of the services and facilities available to us. We were so impressed by the buffet, restaurant and pool! Sad to have to move on, as staff were always so friendly and kind. A really lovely place to stay 🙂

title: Central location, friendly helpful staff.
comment:
The hotel was recommended by a friend and it proved to be an excellent choice .
Within walking distance of citadel and river. Lots of excellent restaurants around the corner.

Staff friendly and helpful.

Rooms very clean and tidy

Would recommend

title: Nice hotel
comment: We had room 518 on the fifth floor. It was spacious with a huge double bed, free toiletries and tea/coffee making facilities. The bathroom had a bath and a large walk-in shower cubicle. We stayed two nights and enjoyed the breakfast on both days, although it was a bit manic.

title: Hue
comment: The Romance Hotel is a wonderful hotel with wonderful staff, we had a pleasant walk around the local area to see the near by attractions and had a meal in a near by restaurant. We had a wonderful time. If we come back to the Hue area we would definitely stop at the Romace Hotel.

title: Excellent service
comment: Had been here for a few time, the service from the hotel is excellent, especially Tram she’s has been very helpful during my stay here. Location wise is at the city of hue, rooms a little smaller and old but overall it’s clean. Will visit again if there’s a chance I’m back to this city agaim

title: Fantastic hotel
comment: Fantastic hotel, good service (also laundry), friendly staff, good breakfast, nice bar, clean and spacy, nice pool area, wonderful city with a lot to explore. We were here only one night, but would for sure choose this hotel again and stay longer.

title: Romance Hotel, Hue
comment:
We stayed 2 nights at Romance in connection with a round trip.
The room was clean and large. Although it was facing the street, we were not disturbed by traffic noise. Breakfast was versatile, lots of sf fresh fruit!
And....the staff are really friendly, helpful and in a good way curious.

We can only recommend the hotel. It is so central and easy for walks

title: Romance Hotel Hue Vietnam
comment:
This hotel was okay, I wouldn’t classify it as a 4 star hotel. The staff were lovely, however there was no gym or spa as they said it was closed (in peak season) for maintenance!

They did recommend another spa place down the road we could get a massage from.

Breakfast was good with a variety of dishes.
It was a handy location to all sorts of restaurants and cafes.

title: Very good location
comment:
Great location, perfect location to discover the city by day (citadelle in particular) and in the evening (close to pedestrian streets for dinner). Spacious, comfortable, well insulated and clean rooms. Buffet breakfast with a pretty amazing choice, everyone can find his own.
Welcoming staff.

title: Modern and clean with warm and professional hospitality
comment: contemporary hotel w/ personalized service for family, business, or couples. Corner room with balcony overlooking neighboring stadium (jog/train alongside local teams). Large windows provide a lovely view from sunken tub. Light printing and Laundry service included.

title: Decent plaxw
comment: Very solid hotel what you see is what you get all is good regarding the rooms nice and clean the showers are abit average the pool is good and everything else is good regarding the facilities would recommend to people ……………………………………………………..

title: Perfect hotel for your stay in Hue
comment: It has been a formidable experience staying at the hotel, the facilities are perfect and the bed very comfortable. Quiet and with pool on the 11th floor that can make even more special the days in Hue. Plenty of restaurants nearby and the hotel which also has a great offer of cocktails and food. I would definitely repeat again.

title: Impressive!
comment: Perfect hotel, excellent sized room, fantastic staff including Lisa and all at reception, delicious buffet breakfast. Swimming pool was refreshing way to spend a couple of hours before or check in time, which was able to be brought forward (we arrived very early). Great value and I hope we can return very soon.

title: 2 nights stay
comment: Nice hotel. Affordable price. Wonderful and helpful staff. In a great location for dining and entertainment. Nearby are tourist attractions and the like. The room was clean and the bed comfortable. I would definitely stay here again if I return to Hue.

title: Satisfied
comment:
Good hotel, excellent breakfast.
Highly recommended.

title: Reasonable hotel, Exit Neighborhood!
comment: Central location in the city, delicious breakfast and very attentive and friendly staff. We had a room on the first floor overlooking a construction site. All the surrounding streets are pedestrianised at night and are a bustling noisy exit area. There were earplugs provided in the room. Rooms are ok, bathroom very dated and in need of refreshing, and the cockroach that was in the room was really a no go for us.

title: Perfect stay
comment:
Not disappointed in our choice. Hotel well placed in boo 20 min walk from the market, 40 min from the city, it is in a noisy area but we had been warned in advance and this did not prevent us from sleeping.The staff is very kind and arranged our transfer to Hoi an. We were able to use their laundry service.The breakfast is really very varied and delicious. We would have stayed longer
Thank you very much.

title: Lovely stay
comment: Clean, spacious, comfortable room. Lovely staff, great breakfast. Other rooms a bit noisy at times but the air con helped with that! Nice pool.

title: Great stay
comment: Hotel is great it's in a good location service is excellent the rooms are fine and has an excellent pizza bar attached to it breakfast are very good and I certainly stay here again

title: Hue diamond!
comment: Wonderful welcoming service and an excellent location for food, entertainment and vibe. Special thanks to the breakfast staff, especially Quin who went out of her busy way to make our morning meal perfect! Thanks Quin! Great job! Pleasant rooms and very good value for money!

title: Very good but noisy street side
comment: Very clean and good breakfast very varied and hearty. Efficient and inexpensive clothing cleaning service.

title: Un francais
comment: Very clean / quiet/ drinking water /good personal /

title: Great stay at Rosaleen Boutique Hotel
comment:
We had a great stay at this hotel. It truly feels like a 4-star property. The location is excellent, and the staff are very attentive and kind.
Breakfast was superb with a great variety of choices. The receptionist was also extremely helpful when we needed to call our airline to rebook our outbound flight—they even let us use their office phone to contact customer service.
We would definitely stay here again and highly recommend this hotel.

title: Clean, friendly, amidst the discos
comment: Hotel and staff are top. Breakfast, location and cleanliness of the hotel great. One point deduction for, discos directly in front of hotel. No sleep possible before 02:30 without hearing protection. Hotel puts Oropax on bedside table;-). Ideal for young party tiegers.

title: Thank you
comment: The Receptionist - Jenny is very friendly and helpful. Thank you 😊

title: Very good hotel
comment: Perfect excellent hotel, great location, quality services and impeccable service

title: Beautiful place
comment: A very nice personal hotel very welcoming good lunch I would come back anytime comfortable bed excellent place

title: Beautiful Hotel in Hue
comment: high quality special treatment, special mention for Jenny and Pear. hotel in the center very convenient to all services

title: Beautiful hotel un Hue'
comment: Highly recommended hotel, clean, spacious room, super breakfast. All the staff were incredibly friendly but a special thanks to Jenny and Pear for their kindness and their special thought at check out to give us a coffee for the trip.

title: Perfect !
comment: The staff is so welcoming and nice ! Nice room with all the commodities and very well located in the dynamic center of Hué.

title: A hotel able to accommodate...
comment:
A very well placed hotel in the lively center of Hue, 10 minutes by cyclo-push from the Imperial Citadel.
It was my 4th stay and nothing has changed! A welcome smiles and help on the points that upset you... a very reasonable price considering the hearty breakfast in all (just one regret, it would be better with its end at 10am...).
Huge rooms, about 35 m2, a super modern bathroom...
Super clean and well lit corridors at night... a beautiful swimming pool full of sun...
So, I give an excellent rating for all these points to this welcoming hotel!

title: Lovely hotel
comment: Lovely hotel and very helpful staff. Great breakfast and vi really enjoyed the pool in the morning!

title: Minimalistic Luxury
comment: This hotel is in the heart of night activities and great places to indulge in some local delights….the rooms are impeccable with modern fixtures… relaxation and oasis in Hue..the staff is wicked awesome and helpful.…Minialistic Luxury Welliness Comfort…

title: Great hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel right in the center in the lively, modern and refined area for a derisory price. Beautiful varied and hearty breakfast. We took a room with balcony, which is said to be more noisy because facing the music bars but it did not disturb us unduly. Good bedding, nice bathroom, charming and smiling staff. Small rooftop pool with toilet and shower if you arrive earlier than the check in scheduled at 2pm, it allows waiting in good conditions and we had the room at 12pm, which was really accommodating.
Nothing wrong! Yeah, good!

title: Wonderful stay.
comment: This hotel was located in a perfect area for walking around to little shops and wonderful outdoor restaurants. I had a city view, which other reviewers have mentioned as too loud, however i loved it and felt like it enhanced my stay in the vibrant city. The view was memorizing and the music made me feel part of the city when i was just in my room. The girl's, Pear & Jenny, at the front desk were so attentive to all our needs and greeted us warmly each time they saw us. My stature was only a few days and i wish i could have stayed longer.

title: Best customer service ever
comment: The customer service here was beyond excellent. Our air conditioner did not work and they offered us another room. We declined not wanting to pack all our stuff. They offered us another room to just sleep in, leaving our belongings in original room. Very thoughtful. They have apologized a dozen times, inviting us to some cocktail hour later. They always recognize us even though we are here for only 2 nights. Located downtown in great area. Loved this hotel. You would love it here also.

title: Friendly, helpful staff, comfortable hotel, with excellent breakfast.
comment: Everyone at Rosaleen Boutique Hotel was friendly and welcoming. Julie arranged a wonderful tour to Bach Ma National Park and Jenny and Pear helped with various issues that arose, always with a positive attitude. Wonderful staff, very nice hotel. I would stay here again.

title: Nice hotel in the city centre
comment: Food was good. Room with view to rooftops was not nice. Bathroom very good. Breakfast best in town. Friendly personnell.

title: Perfect experience
comment:
One of the best hotels in Hue by my taste, I made several and the one is really good at all levels, I even came back 2 years after I went there the first time.

The location is perfect, the staff pleasant and very helpful, the rooms are very spacious and have all the necessary equipment for a quality stay. The overall standing is very luxurious for a reasonable price, and it is felt in particular in the breakfast which is of a very good quality, with a lot of choices (more savory than sweet today, two years ago it was the reverse). Also, the amount of free water available is impressive, I attached a photo of the amount given over 4 days without consumption on our part. This is equivalent to 1.5 bottles per day per person.

The only downside to consider for some would be the noise, personally it never bothered me to sleep, but the hotel is close to two streets with bars that send music loud enough. Rooms with balconies are quite noisy until sometimes 2am, but on the other side of the building I didn’t even hear the noise.

If the noise is not the kind to disturb you I strongly advise! And even if the noise disturbs you, you just have to go to the reception and they will offer you without problem to change rooms if they have one available.

title: I wish I could stay longer
comment: A great location and a great experience. Jenny and Pear were a a great help when I got lost. I would stay here again next time I visit. A large room, clean and quiet stay near the river.

title: Great stay at the hotel, nice and pleasant staff. I highly recommend if you come to Hue, thank you for everything
comment: It was a great day at the ROSALEEN BOUTIQUE HOTEL. I highly recommend this hotel to all travelers to Hue

title: Great hotel in central location
comment: Very centrally located, surrounded by small cafes, restaurants and shops. To the citadel we let the taxi (order you the girls at the reception) drive us (price 20000 dong/per person=about 0.70 €...).But it is also all within walking distance. The hotel has a great impression, the rooms are spacious.

title: Comfortable
comment: Very nice staff and everything was very clean. Good location with more restaurants nearby. Good breakfast and nice cafeteria.

title: Central hotel with excellent breakfast
comment: Very friendly staff, excellent breakfast. Bicycle rental possible. Comfortable beds. Room size sufficient. We can recommend the hotel for a visit to Hue

title: Good place ^_^
comment: Great central location in the middle of the nightlife, but the windows are soundproofed very well. You don't hear any of the music outside. The staff is ready and prepared.

title: Highly recommended!!
comment: Too bad we stayed in this hotel only one night! Located in a very convenient area to all amenities. Very spacious and clean room, very rich and varied breakfast buffet. Beautiful pool that unfortunately we have not used. If I ever return to Hue I would still stay at Rosaleen boutique again

title: Another nice Vietnamese hotel that doesn’t cost much
comment: Nice hotel the staff is very welcoming as they are in most Vietnamese hotels. The breakfast buffet is quite generous and the lady cooking. The eggs is very nice. The only complaint is the room is overlooking a loud nightclub so music is playing well into the night which doesn’t make for a good sleep. The bed itself is comfortable.good shower

title: Hué
comment:
Good day.
They were very friendly and attentive. As usual, there is a rain guard in the room to be used on rainy days.

title: Good Hotel in City
comment:
Good Hotel in Central
The service ist really good
Breakfast good
Pool nice
Rooms have Bathtub
There are big rooms
Big bed also good

title: Lovely Hotel
comment: This hotel and lovely with spacious rooms. The room and bathroom were spotless. The staff were lovely and the pool clean (sadly rainy weather). The breakfast was extensive with many options. The location is central to many restaurants and cafes.

title: Two days in Hue.
comment:
We stayed two nights at this hotel, we are very satisfied, the room was very large and clean, just as the bathroom. Great and hearty breakfast. The very kind staff, always present discreetly for any eventuality.
Also highly recommended for the location!

title: Rosaleen Boutique Hotel
comment: For the price, it was good, the only thing is the noise from a bar near by until 3h am. But if you reserve a room on the opposite side of that bar you won't be bothered. Breakfast very ok again for the price. Perfect for a short stay

title: Super experience
comment: Great service and quality. Clean and spacious room. The breakfast was excellent. I recommend this place also for the great location.

title: An absolutely wonderful stay
comment:
An absolutely wonderful stay thanks to an exceptionally kind staff. A huge thank you to Jeny, Pear and Mr Anh, who were incredibly kind, smiling and always ready to help. Their warm welcome and grace made my trip even more beautiful. The room was clean, comfortable and nice.
Thank you from the bottom of your heart for your attention and humanity. I recommend this hotel wholeheartedly. 💛❤️‍🔥💖

title: Super friendly staff, noise from club
comment: Very friendly staff, and a good double bed. It was noisy though by the club opposite the hotel, where our room was opposite. I put my AirPods in. Maybe this was less so in other rooms. Sleep well though!

title: It's okay.
comment:
Very kind staff, we arrived immediately after the typhoon and despite the damage it was already all clean.
It is located in the heart of nightlife and close to many restaurants.

title: Friendly staff and great hotel
comment: The staff is really friendly and helpful! We had a small issue, but they fixed it right away! The breakfast is also really nice and a great start of the day.

title: At the center of the animations
comment: The hotel is well located, clean and very welcoming the streets are closed to scooters on weekends I recommend this hotel

title: Oh, good.
comment:
The environment is clean and the staff are kind and courteous. There are many places to eat, drink and play around.
It is close to the center of the city and easy to catch a taxi. I want to come here again when I'm on business or traveling. And I want to introduce them to friends, family and business partners.

title: Great
comment: I have a great time here. Very friendly staff. Room is clean and good for family of three. We will definitely return here.

title: Perfect location in the city centre
comment: Beautiful hotel, luxurious rooms, perfect Italian restaurant next door, where also the very rich breakfast can be enjoyed.

title: Exceptional customer service
comment:
The breakfast 10 star, good service and very healthy food. The cookie and her staff the best
The room is very clean, comfortable and the bed very soft.
Good hot water
Reception staff are the best in Hue.

I recommend this hotel.

title: Location, breakfast and friendly staff
comment: The hotel was very clean and clean. The breakfast was very good. Great location in the center. Very friendly and attentive staff

title: Nice hotel
comment:
The reception and support went smoothly and extremely friendly at all times. The hotel is clean and the rooms are nicely designed. In addition, breakfast is highly recommended as it offers a wide selection. I would book the hotel again.
Thank you very much

title: Excellent Cp value, customized preference
comment: A lot of bars, good hotel facilities and also a swimming pool, rental of motorcycles is convenient, the use of the motorcycle can get extra fun, and a good breakfast, a variety of traditional food and delicious, the hotel staff gave excellent assistance, happy to give assistance, hopefully the opportunity to visit again.

title: Central hotel
comment: The hotel is very good is very central the room was all right attended us despite and Lena and were very friendly, all are very friendly overall

title: Delicious breakfast, risible prices
comment: I had a very good experience. Although there is a noise from nearby restaurants, I think it would have been good to remove it. It was a bit of an off-season, so the prices were very risible and the breakfast was delicious with a wide menu. I swam in the hotel pool in the morning, and it was satisfying, too. I can recommend it.

title: A night in Hue
comment: Both the hotel, the location, and the breakfast was perfect. There was a little misunderstanding that they quickly fixed. I recommend this hotel. Very friendly staff, the reception girls were in charge of helping us in everything, gave us recommendations of where to eat and places to visit. If we go back to Hue, we will stay here again.

title: Overall experience good.
comment:
Our stay has been brilliant.Excellent customer service. Polite and courteous.
Knowledge, speak English clearly.

Good air conditioning. Shower has plenty of functions overall and hot.
Breakfast was good and plenty of choice.

title: Very good treatment
comment: The hotel is very well equipped, with air conditioning, swimming pool and a very varied and good buffet. Also well located. Advised!

title: A wonderful stay in Hue
comment: Hotel Rosaleen superb! Clean and comfortable room, very welcoming staff, varied and delicious breakfast. Ideal location in the center of Hue. Perfect stay, I highly recommend!

title: I really recommend this upscale hotel
comment:
Very nice hotel
Top staff
Great room very nice and comfortable!
And a very rich breakfast buffet!!

title: Nice stay in Hue
comment: Very quiet stay in the center of Hue, an oasis of tranquility. Also, the staff (especially Pear and Julie) very close and attentive.

title: Good breakfast, good staff
comment:
Good view , friendly staff
Near city center and night street , Đong Ba market , Truong Tien bridge
Beautiful decor
Ok to book room

title: Wonderful hotel with perfect location for my trip
comment: I had a wonderful stay at this hotel! The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, always ready to assist with anything I needed. The room was clean, spacious, and well-equipped with everything I could ask for. The location was perfect — right in the city center and just steps away from the walking street, making it very convenient to explore tourist attractions, enjoy local food, and get around the city. I especially enjoyed the breakfast buffet, which offered a great variety of fresh and delicious options. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

title: Friendly staff and great service
comment:
I had a really great time at the Rosaleen Hotel. Mr. Irene and Mr. Pier were very professional and friendly, and were very helpful throughout the stay. The staff was also careful and everything was well prepared so we could have a comfortable and enjoyable experience. I highly recommend!
The breakfast was very varied, all of which were Asian, Western, and Vietnamese.

title: I gave excellent over all!
comment: Nice and convenience place o like even the serbice , food, the front ladies and of course the maintenamce and Bellboys thank you so much for welcoming us. O will give ypi 5stars for that!.

title: 100% Recomendable!!!
comment: Superb stay at this hotel!!Very friendly staff who helped us at all times!and the tour they offer 100% recommended!!

title: Family trip !
comment: I would like to eat about food in here cause it’s really good. It has many food to choose. The location about this hotel is near famous place to visit. You should stay here when you come Huê !

title: Centrally located, lovely, helpful staff.
comment: Good stay for exploring Hue as it's centrally located, clean, good breakfast and nice pool, lovely helpful staff. Can recommend.

title: A Warm Welcoming in the Heart of Hui
comment:
I had a great stay at this hotel during my visit to Hue. The location is very convenient, close to many restaurants, shops, and a few steps from the main attractions like the Citadel and the Perfume River.
What really impressed me was the staff: they were amazingly helpful, very friendly and always ready to provide Service, whether it was for recommendations, transportation or any other need. Their hospitality made me feel very welcome and taken care of.
In summary, an excellent choice for anyone visiting Hue. I would return here without hesitation

title: Excellent place
comment: Good place to stay if you come to visit HUE. I had an excellent stay at this hotel! From the moment I arrived, the staff was warm, professional, and very attentive. Check-in was quick and smooth, and I immediately felt welcomed. The room was spotless, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything I needed. They are in the city center, and there are a lot of restaurants around the hotel for you to try the local food.

title: Recommended 100%
comment: Cleanliness of 10, very cool pool, comfortable beds, excellent Service and very good breakfast! Good location close to the center!

title: Remarkable
comment:
Wonderful hospitality!
Nhanh from the front desk made my stay truly remarkable with her kindness and expert tips

Enjoy this wonderful city with this great hotel

title: Good stay
comment:
We enjoyed staying here and our room was clean and comfortable. Only one mirror in the bathroom, would be helpful to have another in the room.
The area had a few nightclubs that we could hear from our room. Not too much of an issue but it wasn’t like this last year. Ear plugs were provided by the hotel which helped.

The staff were very friendly and helpful as always.

title: Lovely couple of nights in huê
comment: Had a wonderful two day stay, the room was nice cool and clean, the staff where also polite and helpful even when I locked myself out.

title: GREAT ROOM
comment:
We had this hotel included in our Vietnam tour and it was the best of the whole trip. The room was very spacious and had a double bed and a single that came great for us to put a suitcase.
The welcome drink was very delicious and refreshing.
The area is very touristy so there are many hotels and a lot of restaurants.

title: Awesome
comment:
I had a wonderful stay at Rosaleen Boutique Hotel. The room was clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, and the location was perfect for exploring the city.

A special thanks to Ms. Nhi and Xuan at the reception for their warm hospitality and excellent assistance. They went out of their way to arrange everything for my stay and provided very helpful information about the city, local attractions, and nearby shops. Their friendly approach and attention to detail made my visit even more enjoyable.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Hue!

title: Adorable
comment: The stay at the hotel went very well from check-in to our departure. The receptionists were lovely and helpful. Special thanks to Jenyfer and Pear for kindly wishing me a happy birthday with a cake, while wearing their ao dai.

title: All right!
comment: The hotel complies is clean and well located. The only catch is that it is in front of a disco, but the room has earplugs to facilitate rest. Your receptionists Pear and Jenny very attentive at all times.

title: Rosaleen Boutique Hotel
comment: Comfortable hotel, located right in the city center, Hue's walking street which I like the most, the nearby restaurants are very delicious, will stay again when coming to Hue

title: Friendly staff at good hotel
comment: Great hotel. We arrived early and were helped by lovely ladies Jenny and Julie. We could already use the swimming pool and around noon our room was ready. Great room and good breakfast. Location is absolutely perfect. No cars and scooters aloud after 6pm. Restaurants in the area are great.

title: Very cute.
comment:
Great hotel, equipped with all amenities. Central location. The breakfast was great.
Great accommodation to visit Hue.
Special mention to Jenny and Julie at reception, very professional, kind and always smiling, thank you 🙏🏼

title: Visit Hue
comment:
The hotel is located in the city centre. You can choose a quiet room without balcony or a room with balcony opposite the disco. The rooms are spacious and tidy.
Jenny and Lena thank you for the good care and nice reception.

title: Very nice hotel in the middle of the city
comment: It was very nice to be here. the hotel has a lovely pool and a nice coffee shop next door (really recommended) and all the people were very nice

title: very good stay
comment:
Thank you for your stay.
We very much enjoyed being housed at the Rosaleen Hotel. The staff was very welcoming and the breakfast very complete.
We recommend.

title: Daytime top but then...
comment: The hotel itself is fine. Friendly staff good rooms.....but!!! The rooms on the street side are not doable by the discotheque which can be heard loudly with the doors open until noon. After 12 hours less loud..still huge noise. It's nice that they put down earplugs but they don't help!! The hotel is really fine but I would NEVER book this hotel with children.

title: Amazing hotel!
comment: Amazing hotel right in the heart of the city. Easy to get to all restaurants and bars. Super clean and amazing breakfast!! Love this city’s vibe and this hotel was perfect! Super friendly staff too! Everyone was helpful and tried to make our stay as pleasant as possible!

title: Hue, beautiful city
comment:
The hotel located in the heart of a busy alley in the evening, bars, restaurants, music, souvenir shops...you are absolutely not bored.
The staff extremely kind, the girls at the reception were very attentive, the room we had clean shackle, comfortable beds, varied breakfast , salads, noodles, soup, sausages, chicken, pancakes, cakes, fruit...
I highly recommend

title: A wonderful time at Hue
comment: The client service is phenomenonal and i thoroughly enjoyed my experience. I would recommend this to any family or any size who wish to travel to Hue.

title: Zentral gelegenes Hotel . Sehr hilfsbereites Personal.
comment: Sehr guter Swimmingpool Pool. Exzellentes Frühstück. Backpacker neighborhood. A closed Street on the Weekends with Bands and Play. A lot of Restaurants Ariane and the Parfum River . Will come again and again. Very good beds to sleep. Very helpful

title: Well located nice hotel
comment: Nice hotel, some street noise but still slept well.Extended breakfast.Friendly staff!.Good shower!Top. All the way in the center of the exit neighborhood so lots to see. Nice cocktails nearby. And for sushi lovers also definitely look at the end of the street around the corner!

title: Very Nice!
comment: We had a very nice stay at this hotel, breakfast and service on point! Beds were of good quality, everything was clean and well taken care of.

title: best hotel in Hue
comment: I think the restaurant is really good and their swimming pool is also really good and delicious and it was very centrally located

title: Night in Huè
comment:
I had a lovely stay here! The atmosphere is friendly and welcoming, with staff who make you feel at home from the moment you arrive. The hotel itself is comfortable and well-maintained.

The location is excellent, right in the heart of Huế’s lively nightlife and restaurant area, and just a short walk from the Perfume River.

Would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting Huế looking for a convenient and warm place to stay!

title: Nice hotel like staff
comment:
A very nice hotel with courteous staff!
Breakfast, which was included, covered every taste. Sweet-savory, hot-cold food. The place was very clean.

title: Great 3 Night Stay
comment: Top tier customer service when we arrived, amazing rooms and facilities including a massive pool, and one of the best hotel breakfasts I have ever had with an egg station! Exceptional location between the 3 walking streets, very close to amazing restaurants and cheap beer which is always a positive. Would highly recommend for both families and couples, even solo travellers would have a great time!

title: Loved it here!
comment: Beautiful and comfortable hotel! Super friendly staff and great service. The breakfast was delicious and great location in the center of Hue. Lots of great nightlife nearby

title: A Wonderful Experience!
comment: I had an amazing experience at this place! The staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and always ready to help with a smile. The atmosphere was cozy and inviting, making it the perfect spot to relax and enjoy my meal. The food was absolutely delicious, beautifully presented, and full of rich, authentic flavors. Every detail, from the decor to the background music, was thoughtfully arranged to create a warm and pleasant ambiance. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for excellent service, great food, and a memorable dining experience. I will definitely be coming back!

title: On top
comment: Perfect location. In the evening the streets are only pedestrian then perfect for walking and close to restaurant. The room was very large with a very large bed. Everything was clean with a very large breakfast with lots of choices. Staff at the top too! I recommend ++

title: Perfect hotel
comment: The hotel near the local monument in hue . The room is good and clean but floor was broken in some point. In future when I will visit hue again, I hope I will come to stay in this hotel again.

title: Great Location and Friendly Service
comment: Great location, clean room, Breakfast was delicious and the staff were friendly always ready to help. I had a comfortable stay and would come back in the future!

title: Nice hotel, friendly staff.
comment:
Nice hotel, friendly staff. We enjoyed. Good price. Nice swimming pool, good location. Airco working well enough.

The hotel is right next to a street where you can find all the nice restaurants and bars to have a good night out eating and drinking with friends.

title: Satisfied guest............ ................................................................ .................... .
comment:
Excelentní stay , nice staff, excelentní brealfast, no problems during tha stay.......
............. ..........................................................................
We will Continental to rosaleen boutique hotel

title: Very pleasant and quiet stay I recommend the hotel
comment: Stay at Hue Hotel Rosaleen we were greeted by very gracious hostesses Ngọc Jenny, Xuân Julie and Phục Pear. hotel well located quiet spacious room with a big bed pillows like cotton, nothing to say on the clean side, breakfast there is choice, access to shops nearby, in the evening very lively area

title: Good hotel
comment:
The room is clean, spacious and comfortable to stay at. The bed is ok too.
The Breakfast is good and it starts early. It gives plenty of time to get ready for the upcoming tour.
The location is central to the city. Lots of walking distance place to eat and drink.

title: Excellent hotel
comment:
Very good service, warm welcome
The hotel is very well located to visit the city center on foot.
The rooms are spacious and well equipped.
The pool on the 2nd floor is very nice
As for the breakfast, it is very complete, there is something for everyone.

I highly recommend

title: Great location.
comment: The staff were extremely helpful and attentive. The room was OK and we were grateful they could change our room last minute due to an injury and could not use "step in bath". A small.issue with ants on both beds,staff were quick to change sheets and spray, but they returned next day. Hot water switch!!! Turn it on before shower!! Buffet breakfast was OK, staff weren't particularly attentive, friendly but didn't clear plates or attempt to engage. Generally hotel is a little run down but nice enough for a short stay. Didn't use pool upstairs. Great location and near some very good restaurants and only 30min walk to citadel.

title: Very good
comment: In the middle, friendly staff, can be a little louder in the evenings because the party mile is not far away. You're very central to that. Great breakfast, walking distance to the palace, very chic. The pool is well usable, the rooms are very large, clean and large bathrooms

title: Nghỉ dưỡng
comment:
Best Hotel in town
- Location , view, atmostphere are awasome
- Staff and food must rate 5 *.
They also have the best Pizza restaurant in the building and served traditional cocktails with vietnam ingrediments - so inspration for me and my partner

title: Avis hôtel Rosaleen
comment:
Very welcome staff, well placed hotel in the city center. Spacious and very clean room. Swimming pool
Good breakfast with choice. Hotel to advise.................................................................................................

title: Good Hotel
comment:
Julie and Pear are very kind and helpful., always smiling. 😍 thank you for their services and skills. This makes us want to come back, the room is very clean and nice. We don't continue.
Regards Trần Monique

title: Flying visit to Hie
comment:
Great little hotel, very central and close to some fab restaurants and facilities! Madam Thu round the corner is delish!

It was a very quick visit to see some sights before heading home so didn’t get to use many of the facilities offered by the hotel, but the room was fine, beds comfy and the water pressure was amazing in the shower (long hair girls will understand!)
My only negatives is that the air con isn’t amazing in the rooms and the lift is very hot! But that’s the only
Bad thing I have to say!! Staff were very kind and helpful especially Pear and lenna from the reception team, who saved me from being ripped off!!

I saw the pool but sadly didn’t get to jump in it which would have been a treat in the heat after a day or visiting the sites!!

It’s fairly buzzy at night but I didn’t hear any noise on the 6th floor.

title: Perfect.
comment: The hostesses are incredibly efficient and helpful! Many thanks to Phuoc, Nhi and Xuan for their kindness! They knew how to respond to all our service requests and a hostess speaks particularly good French it is very convenient but we needed to request services

title: Julie and Jenny serve their guests very friendly and warmly
comment:
The people are so friendly and kind in this hotel. The rooms are very big and clean… if I ever come agan in Hue i will stay here again. i would love to say big thanks to all the stuffs…

…………………………………………………..
…………………………………………………..
…………………………………………………..
…………………………………………………..

title: Fantastic location and friendly staff
comment: Really comfy bed and nice shower in the room. Super friendly and very accommodating staff (special mention to Pear, Nhi and Anh) who will help you take your bags up and serve a welcome drink on arrival. Very central location, within walking distance of the Imperial Citadel and the local bars/restaurants.

title: Magic break by the river of perfumes
comment: Superb stop at the Rosaleen Hotel in Hue. Quiet room, cool which is very appreciable when it's 35°C outside, a pool with delicious water, without anyone so almost privatized. In the heart of the city of Hue, particularly lively in the evening.

title: Kindness without limits.
comment: The hotel is in the center.very well located, next to restaurants and nightclubs. The best the kindness of the receptionists, they have sought us taxis, masseurs, everything we have asked for with a wonderful smile. Thank you Pear and Lenna, the best without a doubt. We'll be back.

title: Great holiday.
comment:
Very good staff service.
The rooms are clean, the bathrooms are clean.
In the center of travel
The breakfast was full, delicious and spotless.
Love the delicious coffee shop below the hotel.
Beautiful backdrop view of a view room with a street vibe
The staff em phuc at the reception desk were very friendly.

title: Good location and friendly staff
comment:
Nice hotel and we thought it was the perfect location. Pear and Lenna was kind and very helpful with recommendations.
Good vibes on street and good food very close by.
Breakfast was good and it was nice with a pool. Not many sunbeds, but it worked out fine.

title: We had a good stay
comment: We stayed two nights at Rosaleen Boutique Hotel and we enjoyed it. Easy to find foods, walkable, easy transport. The front desk staffs and porters are very friendly. Thank you to Jenny who checking us in and Pear & Irene who checking us out. The hotel is in a nightlife area, it is very noisy at night but they provided earplugs for a good night sleep. Our room was at level 6 and I was able to sleep without the earplugs.

title: Life is great at Rosaleen Hotel!
comment: Great refined hotel with a very pleasant welcome, very attentive staff, changes possible. The room retained is spacious with full amenities, a good shower, air conditioning if needed, a well-stocked breakfast, unlimited ... everything to rest after beautiful walks through the city - big thank you to the team - Michèle, Joël and Alexandre

title: Ms. Pear is just great
comment: Vetnam is a beautiful country the people are all friendly our hotel is very nice the staff is accommodating just enchanting the hospitality is just great you can eat everything Mrs. Pear is a helpful and very thoughtful for my well

title: Hotel very good
comment: Staff are very friendly and helpful. Rooms are clean and we slept well. Breakfast was great and I look forward to seeing you again. We're here at the hotel for two nights and tomorrow we're leaving. Thank you to Ms. Pear

title: Nice clean hotel
comment:
The rooms are nice and spacious and clean.
Because they themselves indicated that our room may suffer from the hue walking street (loud music) we could look at other rooms. They were only a bit smaller than we liked, hence the room chosen where you can get some noise nuisance.
Yes the music was very good to hear in our room, but we had no trouble with this ourselves and slept wonderfully.
Breakfast is delicious and extensive and staff very friendly. Location is top

title: Happy days
comment:
Great spot to stay in Hue. Comfortable bed, the breakfast includes local specialties (fruit soup was particularly good) and it’s on the pedestrian street without being loud. Would stay again.

I can’t submit this without 200 characters so here is an additional sentence.

title: Hôtel rosaleen
comment:
Super stay pear and nhi welcome to the top
I recommend this hotel without restriction
You can go with your eyes closed
Clean well equipped spacious rooms super breakfast well located all staff is very welcoming helpful attentive

title: 1 night for the family
comment: Very nice hotel and very lovely staffs. We'd been here for 1 night only but we'll comeback Hue in few months later and definately return here. A little bit noise cause the hotel is right in the middle of city but it's very convenience for walking around

title: Central and quiet hotel
comment: Friendly and welcoming staff who gave great tips on sights and restaurants. Centrally located for several attractions. Nice breakfast area. Nice room, but it required earplugs to sleep. They were ready in the room.

title: First time in Hue
comment: First time i've visit Hue and stayed in this hotel was a good choice. Friendly staffs, good breakfast, comfortable bed... etc. The best part is it close to everywhere. The area is bustling at night so i had a great time with my buddies.........

title: A nice surprise
comment:
Very well placed in the city , the area is certainly a bit noisy, many restaurants and bar this is compensated by the ease of access to the sightseeing points
If you are walkers you can even go without problem to the citadel on foot

An excellent breakfast with lots of choices!

title: What great experiences at the Rosaleen Hotel. I'm very, very happy. The best hotel I would like to come back to.......
comment: The service is excellent. The receptionist is kind. The room is well equipped. The atmosphere is quiet. My requests are well met by the staff. I'm very happy. This is a hotel I always recommend for my friends if they come to Vietnam

title: Superb stay
comment: Very friendly staff, including (Chau & Phuc), very clean and comfortable hotel with large bedroom and bathroom, superb pool, excellent breakfast buffet with local and also western cuisine, I will definitely return with my friends

title: Great stay
comment: Very good location, the area is very lively in the evening, you can find a variety of restaurants and bar. The staff are very attentive, spacious room, you can take a walk along the river and reach the other side of the bank to stroll to Dong Ba market,

title: Great location and helpful, friendly staff
comment:
We had the pleasure of staying at the Rosaleen Boutique Hotel when visiting Hue, Vietnam. The location is great. The streets bordering the hotel are blocked off to traffic, at least on the weekend which was great! Breakfast was very nice with many choices and their in house restaurant was nice for a casual pizza dinner.
The room was spacious, clean with all the amenities you need. The staff are lovely, friendly and helpful. We were booked for a day tour and our driver was late and Chau and Xuan, hotel staff members approached us and made a call and resolved the problem. They were so kind and helpful.
I was recommend without reservation and would definitely stay there again.

title: Rosaleen in people's hearts!
comment: Very nice hotel in the heart of the activity at the same time very relaxed. Super warm welcome and comfortable room and large balcony. The buffet breakfast very complete and generous! All the friendly staff! The pool is very nice good service!

title: Great hotel!
comment: The staff was very friendly especially Ms Phuc and Nhi. The breakfast was lovely and very well set out there was a huge variety aswell. The bed was comfy and very soft. They supplied us with any Toiletries we may have forgotten which was really useful.

title: 3 nights in Hue
comment:
Great location, very welcoming staff.
Clean, nice and comfortable room.
Fabulous breakfast with lots of choices.
You can go with confidence, we had a great time here.
The nice thing is that the street is closed to traffic from Friday to Sunday from 6pm to the next morning.

title: Wonderful place to stay
comment: This hotel is lovely. The rooms are very clean and have everything that you need. The staff are exceptional. Ms. Xuan and Nhi were so kind and very helpful with anything that I needed. I would definitely stay here again. The hotel is centrally located and the town is lovely

title: A visit to Hue in Vietnam.
comment: Based on a 3 Star hotel it was in a central area and a 3 minute walk too a great selection of restaurant. The room was very new and clean. There were combs, toothbrushes etc provided. The included breakfast was very good with a full spectrum of local and western breakfast.

title: Rosaleen boutique hotel
comment:
The hotel is very quiet although in the city center.
The staff is very friendly.
The hotel has an outdoor swimming pool that we could not use due to the capricious weather.
Comfortable bedding and good hearty breakfast.
I recommend it.
Michel

title: Lovely hotel in Hue
comment: We had two nice nights here. Spacious rooms with comfortable beds and a delicious full breakfast. Many tasty restaurants right around the corner. A very friendly welcome and always friendly help during our stay of Xuan, Phuc and Chau at the reception. Thank you so much!

title: Great hotel in a great location
comment: Fantastic hotel in the vibrant centre of Hue. Be sure to request a room on the quiet side of the hotel though. If you're on the quiet side you'll sleep well, the other side is apparently quite loud to to the music from local bars and clubs. A special thank you to Chau and Xuan on the front desk who were absolutely wonderful.

title: Great stay in
comment: We stayed only one night in Hue, we had a great time, the very kind staff (Xuan and Nhi) welcomed us and assisted us in a great way. Very large room, comfortable and clean, relaxing pool available. Recommended

title: Great location and hotel
comment:
Great hotel, great location to explore HUE. Your in the middel of all the restaurants and pubs. Very friendly staf the rooms are very nice and clean. Breakfast is next door but its really great and big .

Every thing you would like to see is on walking distance but of course you can also take a taxi, bike or book a tour. We explored Hue by ourselves and that was great.

title: Secret of a successful stay.
comment:
A very good stay in the hotel, very good, quiet and comfortable.
The welcome was really great with always smiling.
A special thank you to Xuan who made a lot of effort to speak French and to Nhi, always ready to help.
A Ghent Thank you

title: Hotel charming
comment:
Smiling and welcoming
Full breakfast comfortable hotel nice with swimming pool (café bar atmosphere around with what it implies sound level) charming hygiene room more or less correct...
Thanks to XUAN PHUC CHAU for their kindness...

title: Perfect Service
comment: Very clean an beautiful Hotel with attentive fabulous personnel. We were informed about a club at the other side of the street, but it was not loud for us and we did not have any problems at nighttime. The two receptionists, phuc and xuan, deserve special mention as they helped us plan our sightseeing and gave us good tips.

title: Hue short break
comment: Great hotel, in a central location, rooms with balcony can be a bit noisy with music from nearby pubs into the early hours, good size rooms and a big bed, Great breakfast withselectionsforeveryone, very friendly staff, especially front of house

title: Thanks to Nhi+Xuan at the front desk!
comment:
Located downtown, it was good for food, transportation and facilities.
Breakfast was very good in number and taste.
I should have eaten at night.
I got to Hue early on the night train.
Mr. Nhi+Xuan from the front desk
You've been very pleasant.
He even suggested a tour.
Thanks to you, I think I was able to spend a very fulfilling time in Hue.
I would also like to take care of you.
Thank you very much.

title: Great Location
comment:
The hotel is ideally located in the walking street area so a great location for eating and shopping.
The location is very close to the river for accessing the market and for a stroll along the river.
For those who like walking it's not too far from the Royal Citadel.
Breakfast was good but taken in the building next door.
Staff were extremely helpful in providing information on where to eat/drink as well as what to see and how to get there.
Rooms were large and very comfortable.
Only reason for giving it 4 stars is that there a bigger hotels with more amenities available although at a much higher price.
Given its location we would definitely stay here again when in Hue.

title: Beautiful city, lovely hotel
comment: My experience in Hue City was really great.. and this hotel is one of many special things i love. Specially the front office assistants. I had been warmly welcomed and I enjoyed the time in my room. The noise didn’t disturb me much. I’ll come back

title: 10 out of 10
comment: I have had a great experience here. The room, breakfast, receptionists... very impressed me. Highly recommend for you guy if you visit Hue city. I'll definately come back ..........................................................

title: BEST STAY IN HUE
comment: I had an amazing stay at Roseleen Hotel! The service exceeded my expectations, and I was especially impressed by the receptionists, Chau and Phuc. They were incredibly kind, super helpful, and always went the extra mile to assist customers. Their warm hospitality made my experience even better. The hotel itself was excellent, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a comfortable and welcoming place to stay. I will definitely be coming back!

title: Very nice hotel in Hue
comment:
Very comfortable hotel near the center
It has a very nice swimming pool outside and the possibility to have a delicious breakfast with many choice.
The room is clean and the receptionists are very kind, I appreciate everything in the hotel.

title: Very good stay!
comment:
Very luxurious hotel and well located. Their pool looks amazing even if we couldn't use it due to the rain. Good breakfast choice in the adjacent building with a tasty variety of sweet and savoury choices.
The staff is extremely kind and attentive!
I rated 4 stars instead of 5 as the room was too hot and humid despite the low temperature outside. To sleep comfortably you need to have the AC on.

title: Very Comfortable Stay
comment:
The hotel was very comfortable with generous sized rooms. We had previously read reviews about noise from the adjacent street, and the hotel also messaged us after booking to let us know of potential noise disturbances. Maybe due to our room being at the back of the hotel, but the noise from the street wasn't a problem at all.

Unfortunately due to weather we couldn't enjoy the pool but it looked like a great place to spend some time on a sunny day.

Breakfast included many options and overall we had a great stay - we wish we could have stayed longer!

title: Very good hotel
comment:
Excellent hotel, good breakfast in the to nearby location. Good pool nice to have a bath. The beds were reasonable.
Staff were very helpful and very friendly. If we are in the area again then we definitely book Rosaleen.. There are also very good restaurant nearby

title: Excellent, friendly & clean at the Rosaleen Boutique Hotel
comment: Rooms clean, service great, receptionist staff absolutely helpful, polite, informative & welcoming. Had a wonderful experience at the Rosaleen Boutique Hotel in Hue Vietnam. Would highly recommend to stay here to all my family & friends

title: Excellent Location
comment:
Good location within walking distance to river activities and eateries. Bars and clubs closeby
The room is large. Shower leaking water into bathroom floor when having shower. A slight installation problem. Water should flow into the bathtub instead but it flows out onto the floor
There's a good variety and selection for breakfast.
Staff very friendly and helpful

title: Highly recommended!!!
comment: We were very pleased with the service they provided. Hotel is clean, modern and close to everything. Everyone was so kind and helpful. Will definitely stay again at the hotel for our next trip. Highly recommended. Thank you so much for the stay!!!

title: Good place to stay
comment: Very good reception and treatment of the staff!!Located in the heart of the city.Spacious and clean room and bathroom. The only downside is that you have to turn on a key 15 minutes early to have hot water, and it's just roasted fast.

title: A very poor room
comment: A very grand and impressive entrance and check-in desk but once behind the smart facade that plush veneer soon fades / the rooms are wanting - bad lighting in the bathroom standing in your own shadow do you can’t see yourself shave - the tap in the sink makes such a noise when you turn it on, the lavatory seat slides to one side when you sit on it and the bedroom windows are covered with condensation do you can’t see out!!

title: Great central location in a comfortable hotel with plentiful breakfasts.
comment: We had an excellent stay in this hotel. The room was really spacious and the extra large double bed was very comfortable. Superb breakfasts with a massive selection served in the restaurant next door (through the cafe and up a flight of stairs). Perfectly placed to explore all Hue has to offer. We were on the second floor next to the swimming pool which might get a bit noisy but it wasn’t warm enough to swim so very peaceful for us and anyway the pool closes at 9pm. Would recommend.

title: If you want to sleep, change places
comment:
If you want to sleep at night, you must definitely change places.
One side of the hotel overlooks a very lively downtown street, but the real problem is that there is a nightclub that plays music at very loud volume from 5/6 in the afternoon until 3 in the morning without ever stopping.
Back in the room at about 7pm we immediately highlighted the problem (the windows almost shook and we were on the 7th floor), we asked the reception if they knew until what time the place would be open and the girl replied that she did not know but probably around 12am / 1am they would turn everything off and that they were full and could not change the room, on the bedside table we would find earplugs.
We certainly weren't happy, but at least we knew that sooner or later the music would end.
Seeing the movement that there was the hotel then a doubt arose so we went to see on Booking.com and there was not only one free room for sale, but two! I also went to Google to see the club hours and it was clearly stated that EVERY DAY closed at 3am. Obviously the girl at reception knew this but preferred to tease us not to have problems and not make the effort to change rooms.
The result: the windows shook until 3am, our alarm clock was at 6am and we didn't sleep anything, even with the caps.
It is unacceptable for a customer to have to pay to sleep on top of a disco and for the answer to the problem to be a trivial “well put the caps on”.
The reception staff are well aware of the problem, as the first thing the receptionist said to us the next morning when we told her we hadn't slept, was noise.
Take a hotel a little out of the center rather, at least you will sleep soundly.

title: The noisiest hotel I have ever stayed in
comment:
Impossible to sleep. Incredibly loud music echoing across the street until past three am. Flashing lights shone through the curtains. Hotel gives a polite note stating that it’s a popular area and therefore noisy so provides earplugs however these are completely ineffective and the noise surpasses even my own personal Loop earplugs plus white noise at full volume. They claim that the doors are soundproof but this can’t be true. Room 301 virtually vibrates. Staff at front desk assured us it would be quiet from 12am, when asked again suggested 1am. It eventually stopped around 4am.

I requested a room change but they were full so I requested a partial refund for the night I did not sleep. I moved for the second night but in the event that is not an option I would suggest avoiding this hotel if you value sleeping. Also the bathroom was full of mould, the shower was broken and there were hairs in the bath. It’s convenient for the party street and breakfast was nice but I would not stay here again.

title: Highly recommended!
comment: Everything about this little gem of a boutique hotel in downtown Hue was exceptional. Front desk staff was responsive and caring, room was clean. Bed was incredibly comfortable and the view from the seventh floor room was remarkable. A very pleasant surprise awaits you!

title: Very good hotel
comment:
The hotel is perfect. The rooms are clean. The bedding is very good. Breakfast is quality and diverse.
The welcome is exceptional, especially Chau and Phuc who are adorable and good advice.
Hotel with very good value for money.

title: lovely hotel in the heart of Hue’
comment:
the hotel has a fantastic good location, it is easy to walk to everything,
The staff is incredibly helpful and always great smiling 😄,
we felt welcome from the first minute we were there, breakfast is good, we had a family suite, nice large room with a large balcony, WIFI works well,

title: The most awesome stay in Hue!
comment: Very nice room amenities and comfy bed. The staff hotels are also really nice! The room size is suitable both the bedroom and the toilet. The hotel is directly right in the walking street making it very conveniece to access places. A really good cafe called Da.me and pizza restaurant Pizz.a is located right by the hotel and they serve the most delicious food! We would come back here every time in Hue.

title: tet holiday in vietnam at hue
comment: The best restaurant food and staff. Thank you for having me, Quynh, Tien, Maika, Thanh you made my time tasty and fun. Great food and friendly cheerful staff. Located at the Rosaleen Hotel in Hue. Reception was so welcoming with tea and green bean treat.

title: Nice hotel!
comment: Good place to stay in Hue! The room is clean and very convenient. The room space is quite big as well. The Cafe in the hotel is so tasty and good vibe. There is also the walking street in some night in front of the hotel that you can enjoy your time! Hope to go back for sure!

title: Will come back again soon
comment:
this is the second time I’ve been staying here, I absolutely love this hotel! Its prime location in the city center makes it incredibly convenient, with easy access to a variety of fantastic restaurants and vibrant bars just a short walk away. Whether you’re looking for a quick bite, a fine dining experience, or a lively night out, this area has it all.

The service at the hotel was excellent—friendly, attentive, and always ready to help with a smile. It felt like they truly cared about making our stay as comfortable as possible.

One of the highlights was the café right next door, which I’d confidently say is one of the best in the city. The coffee was rich and perfectly brewed, and the ambiance was cozy and inviting—a great spot to relax after a day of exploring.

title: Comfortable and pleasant stay
comment: Staff are very friendly and rooms are clean. There are cafe and restaurant just next to the door. The location is very good too. Totally worth the price. Would say the only one option that ppl go with. There are also a lot of historical pieces are shown in the lobby such as traditional clothes.

title: The hotel you will want to visit in Hue.
comment: Very nice hotel and restaurant inside. I love their cafe called Da:me too especially their garlic bread. Also its location is in the prime spot as it located at the middle of Hue walking street thus it is very easy for the tourists to explore many local shop and experience nearby.

title: Very nice stay!
comment: The hotel is conveniently located on the walking street with many restaurants and shops, and a nice cafe in front. The staffs were attentive and very nice, and the room was comfortable with well-equipped facilities. We had a very lovely stay :)

title: Highlights
comment: A beautiful well located hotel. On our arrival the front of house reception was exceptional- thank you Pear, Xuan and Mr Tuan for ensuring our welcome was so friendly- (not to mention the refreshing local drink and nibble ). You informed us of the many local attractions 😊

title: Comfort and kindness
comment: Many thanks to Pear, Xuan, Mr Tuan. Very nice hotel, comfortable, very central, excellent breakfast. For Italians is also available the pizza all in all good. The staff is very friendly and helpful. Highly recommended.

title: The restaurant
comment:
We slept very Well. The bed and covers where very good.
Breakfast in the restaurant was nice.
Especially we enjoyed the Coffee. Which was eksactly like we want it.
Quynh - a Young waitresse at the restaurant, was very kind and sweet. And Providing exellent care of the costumers.

title: The worst hotel of our lives
comment: My wife and I travel a lot and have seen it all. We know how to value things at their fair price. We must value things fairly, taking into account all the circumstances.In this case, it was a scam. Although the stay was affordable, we booked it because it had a terrace, pool, dining room, etc., none of this exists, even though they show it in their photos and offer these services on their website.Not to mention that nothing works, not even the shower or the electrical outlets. Everything is so dirty and so old.

title: I feel conned
comment: I stayed this morning...Dirty and old hotel.I have been sold with other photos very far from reality...And pool and ghost terrace...Not to mention the very dirty bathtub and faucets that almost no water comes out.. And door q does not close well.A horror.. I made the mistake of paying before entering the room...

title: Bath for decoration only
comment:
Booked the hotel on basis of the nice big rooms with a large bathtub. What is failed to be shown in the pictures is the real life sign saying they can only be used for showers due to lack of water. False advertising at its best.
The pool water resembled stagnant pond water and not something that looked wise to get into.
If you want a cheap room with a bed, this is your place. If you want a bath or use of a pool as advertised then book elsewhere

title: Gem of a hotel in great location.
comment:
I discovered this hotel through a travel blog recommendation, and it turned out to be a fantastic find. The rooms are spacious and comfortable, featuring a king-size bed, balcony, high-quality towels, and well-supplied bathroom. The location is excellent, with plenty of great dining options nearby.

My My was exceptionally helpful and friendly, offering excellent restaurant recommendations and arranging a wonderful bus trip to Hoi An. Her warmth and hospitality made our stay even more enjoyable.

Overall, this hotel is a hidden gem — offering outstanding comfort, service, and value for money. Highly recommended.

title: We travel from Laos to Hue, Nha Trang, Danang
comment:
In April, my family and I stayed at Vina spa hotel Hue, Vietnam. We were warmly welcomed by the hotel. Thank you to all the hotel team and hope to have the opportunity to use the service again in the future.
We traveled from Laos to Hue, Nha Trang, Danang, and spent 8 days in Laos. The trip was very enjoyable, seeing many cities in Vietnam. Vietnamese people are very friendly and welcoming to foreigners. At each stop, we were greeted with a lovely smile and given advice throughout our trip.
Thank you very much
🙏🙏🙏

title: Good value hotel in a quiet location
comment:
Good value hotel in an equally good location. It’s a 30 min walk to the citadel, 10 mins to a lively bar area and if that’s not your thing then there’s an array of restaurants and coffee shops all in the area. Directly opposite is a very nice coffee shop. It’s down a side road so was very peaceful.
My room had a good view of the perfume river, was clean and the bed was comfortable. Amenities included a safe,hairdryer, tea coffee and water. The shower produced plenty of hot water, while the a/c worked well.
The staff are very friendly and helpful and they were able to securely store my rented bicycle while rented scooters can park outside. Laundry is 25k/kilo.
The only minor negatives were a bin in the room rather than just the toilet bin would have been useful, there was a little bit of mold in the bathroom, particularly around the window, and the plug mechanism in the shower/bath to lift up the plug didn’t work.
Overall though I was very happy with my stay and I’d definitely use this hotel again if ever I return to Hue.

title: Recommended for a stay in Hue
comment:
Recommended for a stay in Hue.
Our room was simple but it was what we needed.
La
location is super central and quiet and the staff really nice and helpful, if you miss or need anything just ask them! Good and fast breakfast. Thank you.

title: Highly recommend this hotel !
comment: Very nice hotel, very well maintained ! The best I had since I'm in Vietnam for quality-price. Nice and competent staff, clean and good smelling quality bedding and towels. Very good hearty breakfast with homemade jam. In addition to being very well located near everything, it's on a quiet street with no noise. I hignhly recommend !

title: Great hotel, perfect staff and affordable
comment: A particularly pleasant experience of a hotel in an older building but located in a very quiet alley. So no noise from the city. The welcome by Mrs. Phuong from the reception was cordial in fine English. The location of the hotel and the sights were made clear on the basis of a map. Room 301 was spacious with air conditioning, fan, shower, sink, toilet. A defect in the air conditioning was fixed in no time. The mattress was pleasantly supportive. The room was made daily spic and span by the always cheerful ladies Hang and Thu. The elevator was small but worked well. Breakfast with plenty of choice was made fresh by cook Di Hong. Also Mrs. Trang from the reception spoke good English, was always cheerful, enthusiastic and ready to give tips. The 24-hour occupation was completed by the very cordial Mr. Nhat. This well-priced hotel has a wealth of staff who make its guests feel comfortable. Tip for owner Mrs Lien: keep these staff on board!

title: An ideal place to stay in Hue
comment: A perfect place to stay in Hue. Hotel located in an alley near the center, very quiet, with city views for some rooms. Proximity to places to visit in the city. Spacious and well equipped rooms. Very good breakfast. The welcome and service are perfect, very pleasant staff. On request, organizing tours with hotel pickup, booking bus to Hoi An (with small commission, normal...). Very friendly atmosphere and exceptional value for money. Thank you to Lien the owner of the hotel for welcoming and organizing the stay, with all his team. Recommended without reservation.

title: A cozy place
comment: Comfortable, with spacious rooms, full breakfast and wonderful care, ready to help you in everything

title: Great value for money!
comment: Really comfortable beds, wonderful, attentive staff & a great free breakfast. The room had everything I needed, it was great value for money! I’d recommend this place to anyone who is looking for somewhere to stay that doesn’t have the noise of being on a loud street!

title: Good hotel with very good breakfast
comment:
It is really very nice, an extremely friendly welcome. The rooms are modern, maybe a bit simple but large and clean. Breakfast (Asian and European) was considerably better than expected that were really 4 stars. Very good selection of sausage, cheese, omelette freshly prepared, and Asian products.
The hotel is about 10 minutes walk from the city center.

title: Hue experience
comment:
Excellent hotel. Great breakfast buffet, located near one of the food markets and close to some shopping
Beds are huge and comfortable. Ms Huyen is very professional and will provide information for all of your needs highly recommended for a few days in this heritage city

title: All right.
comment:
The hotel is located in the middle of Hue City. It is a four star hotel and the rooms are large and Ok. In the room that were ahead it was a bit noisy in the early morning hours when guests left and in the late evening hours when guests arrived.
Facilities like pool, spa and bar were not used by me and I can therefore say nothing about these.

title: Nice room, affordable price
comment:
Hotel more than correct, spacious and clean room with balcony, perfect bathroom.
Very interesting price.
Very welcoming and friendly team, attentive and available to help and advise.
Thanks again.

title: Simple, clean comfortable, caring.........
comment:
Thanks for a great stay.
Not 5 Star (our choice) but very clean, comfortable with especially caring, efficient Staff .
This was demonstrated when my wife fell ill and the empathy and assistance from the Staff was amazing. Thanks to all.

title: Greetings and thanks for MS HUYEN LE
comment:
Good hotel, great breakfast. Ms. HUYEN LE very kind at the reception who advised us well for every request.
My sister found the ATM and card that fell out of her wallet when she paid for the laundry.

title: Very pleasant visit
comment: Great location, very clean! I breakfast is very varied! Attentive, considerate staff. I especially thank Huyen for his kindness to us! A kind young woman, very smiling! Another big thank you Huyen for your kindness!

title: Hue orchid riverside villa
comment:
The hotel is nice and clean.The rooms are spacious.
Out of sight of the river and it is close to the city.
They just don't have a lift so watch out for that.
The service is unfortunately not entirely friendly and do little to no effort for you.
Are sometimes not even present.

title: Awesome stay
comment: I love this hotel. It's modest and typical affordable hotel in vietnam. The locations is great. Very central to eveything. The staff is really friendly ans welcoming. They were very helpful with every request I had. Huyen was warm and welcoming. Huyen made me feel home while staying her and she has a fantastic smile. She is half the reason I will be back here.

title: Very bad experience with Reservation at THE HOSTEL & KLY APARTMENT HOTEL (Dutch, Vietnam)
comment:
I’m on a three-week self-driving trip across Vietnam, and I’ve traveled many provinces from South to North. Today I was on my way back to Saigon and intended to visit Hue (my outer country), so I booked via Booking.com. However, I had 2 very bad experiences with this Overnight Reservation in THE CITY OF JAPAN
THE BEST CULTURE EXPERIENCES
- I booked 1 room for 2 adults at the BÁNHÁ HOSTEL lodge (Jiang 16 Hai Ba Trèm 18, Hue, Vietnam) around noon because I was in Guangping at that time and planned to go to Hue in the evening.
- Then a friend calls me to confirm and asks when I'm coming, and I say I'm coming in the evening. He switched off the phone and a few minutes later another friend called me and told me that his place was out of power and it was coming back tomorrow, so I canceled my booking on Booking.com.
- After you at the hotel switched, I talked to the family who went with me and found the reason for the switch was not very reasonable, because now power will notify the shutdown schedule very clearly the time for the customer, the accommodation cannot be unknown. So I decide if
cancel your Booking and wait for it to see what’s going on.
- About 18.30 we arrived at the lodge, it rained, but the entire lighting area, I asked around, said no power cuts. He called us a brother, and he said there were no rooms available at this time ❯.
- I delivered a Booking.com confirmation and he had to call a manager named Zhuangping to talk to me. The other boyfriend said my room had a electrical break, the friend of Zhuangping said he had a heated or some kind of water line... When I questioned about the power outage, the friend of Zhuangping told me to talk over the phone...
- She came over to me one time when she concluded she had notified me and asked me to cancel the booking (I didn’t cancel on Booking.com) so when she fixed it she hired someone else (I saw two Westerners in the door)
