- I asked her how to do it now and she said there was only one small room left (this very small room seemed to be for the staff in, there was no room to store, the toilet was dirty and very small, just a small sink and a balloon next door) and I didn't agree to take that room so you said the room was all out...When I said I was filming the video for evidence, asking her to confirm it again, she switched on...
- Finally, while the outdoors are raining and I asked the accommodation to be responsible for getting another room for me, the brother after chatting with the Zhuangping manager still urged me to walk through the surrounding accommodations for another room.
MORNING EXPERIENCE
- Thinking that it would be tired and time-consuming to stay to settle with the Peng An accommodation, we decided to go Booking.com to find another hotel. And we opted for KLY APARTMENT HOTEL (36 Nguyen Tri Ping, Hue, Vietnam), just a three-minute drive from the accommodation.
- As a result, this time we didn't make Reservations directly through Booking.com but directly through the hotel to confirm availability.
- Going to KLY APARTMENT HOTEL, I asked your receptionist (like his name Ki My) I wanted a 2-person Reservation, she checked and said the room price was double that on Booking.com 😅
- I asked why Booking.com was only half the price, and he urged me to book on the go, and you clicked on the computer all the time (it was just me and him). I opened up my phone for Reservation and the lounger app had just expired (the person I told my receptionist had probably downloaded the room when he prompted me to book via the app).
- I asked your receptionist why I was checking on Booking.com just a few minutes ago, and when I asked you, the app said it, while I was asking you, you asked for a room??? You explained that every hotel app sells just a few rooms, so I don’t book right now so I’m sure someone else booked it (although it’s Wednesday around 7:00 and it’s raining in the open air... ==> A good explanation for the poor, Pro business.
- So I decided to run straight to my aunt's house in Da Nang on a rainy night because I was too tired on my way to Hue.

I can’t sleep tonight because of the very bad experiences of the hotel industry in Hue, you’re wrecking the face of Hue, of the country and the people of Vietnam, asking why our people are still poor...

title: Great experience
comment:
We stayed at Century Riverside Hue for four nights in late November 2025.
The staff we wonderful, & the location was great.
Sally Drake & Tony Favero

title: A nugget
comment:
Great welcome from the owner, ready to help.
Comfortable room, clean.
Everything was perfect. I recommend 200%

title: Great.
comment:
The room was clean and comfortable. A special mention to the owner who is really adorable.
We had a plate of fruit as well as a welcome drink and he is really attentive to give us advice and make us have a good stay.
My son and I loved it.
Thanks to the whole team and the owner.

title: Wonderful!!!!
comment: Homestay really nice with very good bedding, excellent breakfast with fresh fruit, banana pancakes... The stay was extraordinary thanks to the help and welcome of the manager who does everything to make his guests feel good!

title: Business trip felt like a vacation
comment: This is a fabulous find, an oasis really. I stayed here for almost two weeks on business. It was a 5 or 10 minute Grab ride to most of my meetings as well as most restaurants. There was a washer conveniently in my spacious one bedroom apartment. Full breakfast by the pool. Staff is super friendly and helpful.

title: It's just super on cost-quality.
comment: This hotel was the cheapest on our trip to Vietnam, but no less than hotels of recognized brands. Very convenient location: on a tourist street, but in a quiet alley. Nearby inexpensive shops, massages, street cafes, in general all infrastructure. The Imperial residence is a 25-30 minute walk away. Family atmosphere. Large room with balcony, there is a refrigerator, tea/coffee kettle, balcony (which is not common in guest houses). It's a good breakfast. All in all, a wonderful place to be in Hue.

title: Super Friendly
comment:
Highly recommend a stay here !!!!
Vietnamese people are friendly but the lady who owns this is super friendly and helpful and can arrange everything you want. Stayed two nights and room spotlessly clean very big and comfy and the shower probably had the hottest water I’ve ever had in a hotel anywhere, and the location is amazing right bang in middle of bars and restaurants but down a tiny alley so still quiet.
Only thing was WiFi didn’t really work but I’m sure if I’d mentioned it the lady wouldn’t have stopped till problem was solved but had sim so didn’t matter and wasn’t important.
Thank you for a lovely stay in Hue.

title: Family-owned and Operated, This Centrally-located Hotel Strives to Please Its Guests
comment:
Centrally located a block and a half from the city’s lovely walkway along the Perfume River, and right around the corner from “Vo Thi Sau”, the street that converts into a “walking street” and very popular “block party” on Friday and Saturday nights. It is near many good restaurants, and only about four blocks from where the “Dragon boats” dock.

The staff went out of their way to assist us in every way they could. For example, they helped us find a good and inexpensive “fragrance-free” local laundry to enable us to refresh our clothes midway through our 16-day trip. Although that bulk “wash, dry, and fold” service did not include starch and ironing, 2 kilos of laundry cost less than would two shirts done in a hotel, if ironed and returned on hangers.

(Note that some Vietnamese laundries use so much Downy and dryer sheets that the smell lingers even after many washings). After having learned this the hard way on a previous trip to Viet Nam, I am now very careful about this.

I am happy to recommend this hotel. I was happy there and expect you will be too.

title: A pleasant surprise
comment: We stayed at this hotel, on the occasion of our wedding anniversary, we had a great time, they gave us an exceptional treatment, we were pampered from the first minute, the hotel has an enviable location, is located a short walk from the center of the nightlife and the most famous restaurants, top cleaning, unsurpassed breakfast, varied and full of everything you could wish for, we will definitely return.

title: Good hotel
comment: Central of attraction.. good location. Near walking street and citadel to walk around. Best hotel and staff . Reception friendly and polite.

title: The best hotel Hue!
comment:
Very friendly and professional staff made a great impression from the moment we arrived. Nice clean room with cold aircon, soft beds and hot water in the en-suite bathroom. High quality Samsung LED TV with channels and internet to choose from. The impressive included buffet breakfast had the best selection of our trip this far! Also friendly English speaking restaurant staff! Staff assisted with our luggage, and moved our motorcycles for secure storage overnight.
All considered a great find and well worth visiting.

title: Best budget hotel in Hue
comment: Perfect location, and the hotel staff were very polite ( everyone be it the receptionist or any other person), they were very friendly, cleanliness is top notch and amenities were also quite good considering the price. One of the best budget hotels in Hue, highly recommend this hotel

title: Great hotel for the price
comment: Great reception by reception.ottima the room and I would say good breakfast la mattina.posizione in the center a few steps from the short pedestrian street... we are under New Year's Eve and the preparations and decorations are everywhere...

title: Amazing! Delighted
comment: Amazing hotel! This is the first time we finally come across a hotel where the photos are in line with reality! The staff is incredibly kind and welcoming. The rooms are beautiful and the place with the pool are breathtaking. I recommend this property 100%

title: Fanciful hotel and trustworthy easyriders
comment:
A great hotel, clean rooms , loving decor and a warm family Tam! We felt very comfortable and would love to come back.
Mrs. Tam helped us book an easyrider tour from Hue to Hoi An. The tour was fantastic: a beautiful route and lower riders Bi and Bob got us safely through traffic. A great recommendation!
Bi was a driver, tour guide, motivation coach and photographer at the same time. Wonderful!

title: Great location
comment: I had a great time at Tam family homestay. The family is very helpful and warm welcoming. They took time to give me advice on places to go and visit. It's a lovely city, quiet neighborhood , cozy rooms nicely and confortable with a nice swimming pool and breakfast available to get your day well started + bicycles available to sightseeing !

title: Family stay
comment:
We stayed 3 nights at Tam we liked it very much, the family room was top, she gave us a lot of advice for places to visit
Only flat the underwear of our missing daughter during the machine....

title: Fabulous stay in Hue
comment: Tam was the best hostess- providing us with an itinerary within minutes of us arriving, tips for local restaurants and what we should do during our short stay in Hue. The Homestay was spotlessly clean, the beds comfortable and a good breakfast. It was nice to be in such a local area— and to feel welcomed by such a friendly family

title: Amazing experience in housing Tam and his family
comment: Wonderful experience in Hue. The accommodation has everything you could need on your visit, from a comfortable and pleasant place, careful cleaning, location (in a much more local area but also close to everything), and above all a service from Tam and his family of the highest standard. The recommendations Tam made to us were spectacular, as it gave us the opportunity to meet the most local face of the city. They also provided us with bikes to move around, which helped us a lot in addition to adding to the experience (with our river walks). I would recommend this accommodation to anyone who will spend a few days in Hue, I assure you that you will not regret it. Thank you Tam and family for a few unrepeatable days:)

title: Perfect place to visit Hue
comment:
Tan's house is a great place to spend some time in Hue
The house is very nice, the rooms are perfectly equipped and pretty
Fresh filtered water fountain available
Tan warmly welcomed us, gave advice on Hue. One
Big thank you to her!!
Breakfast is made to order with different choices
We borrowed bikes, everything is easily accessible from this homestay
It was great!

title: Very nice experience at tam family hotel
comment:
We had an excellent relationship with our host the Tam Family, the hotel was confortable and close by the citadelle.
We arrived late but we were warmly welcomed,
We recommend this place for a stay nearby the citadelle, which is incredible to visit.

title: Hue Imperial City
comment: This hotel is potentially great for its central location in the city, walking to the market, the imperial citadel and the riverside. The room we were assigned on the fourth floor was very clean, quiet, with a fairly large bathroom and a small terrace. Unfortunately at this time it does not have a breakfast room that was located on the top floor, so panoramic, sauna room and Turkish bath are closed. In general, the hotel looks a bit shabby. On the other hand, the reception is good, the girl who welcomed us, recommended a great transfer to Hoi An for which I thank you again

title: Wonderful stay at Charming Riverside Hotel
comment: Wonderful stay at Charming Riverside Hotel. Goo location close to cafes and restaurants . Rooms are very clean with fridge, TV, AC, hair-dryer etc. Extremely comfortable bed. Friendly, helpful staff. Would have no problem recommending this hotel in Hue.

title: Great hotel, we can only recommend
comment: The whole staff and the owner couple were very friendly and accommodating. We had the 2 bedroom villa. It was very clean, well equipped, comfortable beds and very quiet. Great and very tasty breakfast selection. Well located, you can reach everything on foot.

title: Hidden gem of Hue with true hospitality.
comment:
Hue River Side Villa is a hidden gem in Hue. Quietly located by the river, but only a few steps away from the vibrant nightlife of Hue.
What makes this place so special? It is nicely designed and well built, the rooms are cozy and comfortable. But what makes this place even better are their people. So friendly and helpful in all regards. You feel like coming home when staying here.

title: Beautifully located hotel with first-class Service
comment: Hotel located on the river. There were three of us who had a family villa that even had two rooms. Breakfast is excellent. Laundry we washed cheaply. The Riverside Villa is centrally located and you very quiet. And above all, the staff is incredibly friendly and helpful the pool is small but fine.

title: A wee gem
comment:
This is a lovely little hotel and the staff are very helpful. It's spotlessly clean and the location is perfect. While it's on the riverside, a short walk down an alleyway finds you in the main tourist shopping area.
The breakfast is delicious and plentiful, and once again, the staff are so kind and helpful.

The rooms are very small, and if it rains, you can go a little stir crazy as there isn't anywhere to sit that the staff don't use.
There are also a lot of quite steep stairs, so if you have mobility issues, this isn't the place for you.
But this is a wee gem.

title: Hue Riverside Villa
comment: The hotel staff were incredibly hospitable - so genuinely kind, caring and attentive. We felt very well looked after, the room was clean and tidy, the beds comfy and they organised our bikes to Hoi An (alongside our luggage transfer)! Would recommend!!

title: Riverside Villa Hue
comment: This is such a little gem of a hotel. Tucked away down a lovely walkway-just far enough away from the hustle and bustle of the evening centre. Beautiful rooms immaculately clean and spacious. The staff were incredibly helpful and organised cars and transfers and generally anything we asked for. Loved the plunge pool to cool off and fab cocktails. Breakfast set us up for the whole day. Many thanks to the team at Riverside villa

title: Exceptional and genuinely friendly
comment:
The thing that makes this stay exceptional is the people, including:

Bao Qui
Chau Thi Minh Hai
Nguyen Giap
Hang
Loc
Ty
My
Vy
Nhat

Everyone was extremely friendly, and helpful in every way possible. It was so relaxing as everyone was genuinely engaging and looking to help. They will help arrange anything you need, tours, advice etc.

Location: could not be better. Close to walk to everything yet a relative oasis off the street and with a river walk in front.

Rooms: Well designed and renovated. Hot shower, comfortable bed, TV, fresh filtered water.

Pool: small but great to cool off in

Eco: glass reusable water bottles, water filter at reception, paper straws.

Breakfast: great choice of western and local, fresh fruit, fresh bread. Good coffee.

Bikes: we borrowed 2 bikes to go to Thank Toan bridge which was fun.

It was a pleasure staying 5 nights. Many guests stay only one two but if staying in the Hue area do choose this place, you’ll be pleased you did.

Thank you for helping us learn a bit of your language and culture and for making us welcome in Hue 🙏🙏🙏

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

title: Riverside relaxation
comment: I stayed here for two nights and I wish I could have stayed for longer! Such a nice place, with very friendly and kind staff who made me feel very welcome. Being by the river was great – the road is close by, but you don't hear it in the room, and at night it's definitely quiet enough. There were many options for breakfast, and I enjoyed the pancake and coffee very much. The room was modern with everything I needed for a comfortable stay. I would be happy to come back again and hopefully I will be able to.

title: Great hotel in Hue
comment:
We stayed here for two nights and wish it had been longer. Two bedrooms clean and everything you needed in amenities.
The staff were welcoming and couldn’t do enough to make us feel comfortable.
The breakfast was also one of the best we have had on our travels with great coffee to start the day. The staff organised a great tour of Hue which was also great and allowed us to cover a lot in one day.
Thank you to all the staff in this hotel they were amazing and hope to visit again

title: Fabulous Place to Stay 😊
comment:
We stayed at this absolutely lovely place for 3 nights whilst travelling in Vietnam and had an excellent experience!
The whole place was immaculately clean, modern and very well furnished. Our room was bright and well equipped with everything we needed. The bathroom and shower were great, hot water plentiful and lovely soft towels.
Staff were amazing, warm, friendly, smiley and helpful. They arranged a trip for us down the perfume river at sunset which was stunning and gave us lots of helpful advice on sightseeing, restaurants etc.
We had a few cocktails each evening during happy hour overlooking the perfume river and some snacks.
Breakfasts were a great start to the day with lots of choice, plentiful and beautifully presented. again staff were warm, efficient and chatty.
The plunge pool was a real asset in the heat and kept every clean!
If you are going to Hue I highly recommend this place to stay it’s 5 ✨

title: A LOVELY PLACE TO STAY IN HUE!
comment: Hue Riverside villas is the perfect stop for your stay in Hue. The room and facilities are spotlessly clean and to a high standard. It was quiet as it's not on a road, a walkway runs in the front of it. The team are amazing and totally take care of you, we felt like royalty! I would definitely stay here again!

title: A definite place to go to, food simply amazing
comment: Excellent small hotel right on the river. Recently renovated to a high standard. All the staff were fabulous from Quy who we met at reception to the waitress who served breakfast. We loved the fact that we were within walking distance to cafes and restaurants, and the Citidel. Despite being minutes from the action, the hotel was very quiet and you had no idea you were in a busy city.

title: Good stay in hue
comment:
Great hostel in a central location, convenient for getting around everywhere on foot.
They offer a good breakfast in the morning and organize excursions and experiences at reasonable prices.
The room was large and comfortable, but a major downside was the high level of humidity inside.
Recommended for a short stay.

title: Great stay!
comment:
Great stay at Shark Homestay! We arrived early in the morning and were able to Check in early. All the staff is very kind and very welcoming.
Possibility to book bus tickets to other cities via the hotel🙌

title: Good homestay
comment: Good homestay and nice staffs. Reasonable price. Will come back here many times. Clean and good rooms. We enjoy here so much

title: Hotels in Hue
comment:
You get what you pay for. We thought it was a good stay for the money and good location ift. the old palace.

The beds are a bit hard and the bathroom a bit small, but expected ift price and that it is a hostel.

There was a little much noise from the hallway some evenings.

The staff was super nice and helpful.

Good little breakfast.

title: Amazing stay
comment: Staff are so kind and helpful. Always keeping the smile. They suggest me a tour with a reasonable price and ot was amazing.

title: so nice
comment: It was my first time visiting Vietnam, and I was truly impressed by my experience at this hotel. The staff were incredibly friendly and always ready to help, making me feel safe and welcomed even though it was my first time in the country. The room was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped. The convenient location made it easy for me to explore the city. Thanks to the hotel’s warm hospitality and professionalism, my first trip to Vietnam became even more special. I will definitely come back!

title: Excellent place and very friendly staff
comment:
Very nice staff, attentive and attentive to customers.
Very good value for money and very spacious, clean and comfortable rooms.
Very good location.

title: Hotel I Recommend
comment:
The staffs are very friendly, especially Ms Hieu.
The hotel location is near to the eateries area.
No complaints about the cleanliness of the hotel.

title: Friendly staff, lovely room, nice location
comment:
Last year I stayed in THE TIMES HOTEL for 15 days.
According to this experience, it wasn't a question of where I wanted to keep up this year.
Here is the reason:
Hieu, Ly, and Thành are the lovely Ladies who make this Hotel work. And they are good at it.
Most of the time, you will be in contact with Hieu, the receptionist.
She speaks good English, is always friendly, and is not just doing a good job; it seems she is living it!
The rooms are clean, will be cleaned daily, and furnished nicely.
In other words, I loved my room. I lived there for a little over two months this year and wish I could live there for a few more.

The breakfast was delicious and reasonable

The street on which THE TIMES HOTEL is located is small and charming. It has many shops, restaurants, massage salons, and even a tattoo studio.

If you have any questions, problems, or whatever, ask Hieu. I am sure she will find the solution quickly—because she is Hieu!
Guess where I live during my next Huế stay!

title: Quiet stay in the heart of the tourist area, kindness and zenitude of the entire hotel team
comment: Every time I travel to Hue, I stay at the TIMES Hotel. The rooms are well-appointed, clean, and the manager is very friendly, responsive, and very professional. The location is perfect for exploring, and the hotel rents motorcycles and bicycles at competitive prices—don't hesitate.

title: Great Value, Close to All you'll need - Friendly & Helpful, Comfortable & Clean
comment: What a wonderful welcome from The Times Hotel we got...pleased with the room, clean & comfortable, nothing too much trouble & help with booking transport to next destination, pleasant & smiles from reception staff & housekeeping, loaned us a kettle for the room, allowed to to leave luggage after check out until transport arrived, even offered us a shower if we needed...Lovely friendly & helpful lady on reception who went above and beyond to help with all we needed - would definitely recommend the Times Hotel - great food just opposite & few yards away, close to bars, eateries, massage & spas etc, grab bikes everywhere, 5min to main walking street and bars etc,.small shops close too - ideal place to stay in Hue - 5star treatment from start to finish 😀

title: Unbeatable Hospitality!
comment: Hieu, the hostess, has been more than hospitable and accommodating for me over the past 5 months. I have stayed in the hotel so many times, so many rooms, different floors, all perfect. Comfy beds, quiet street, near the buzz and grest value. For months I never knew.there were ground floor rooms, but once she confirmed, she held the rooms for when my mobility-limited family came over to visit. She looked after my family so well despite their mobility issues!

title: The best host and service
comment:
Hiue has been the best host on our trip through Asia. She’s very helpful and she assisted really well with our requests. The room was spotless and smelled good.

The location is amazing and there are a lot of restaurants and cafes closed to the hotel.

title: Perfect hotel and 5* staff
comment: Tucked in a calm alley of Hue but close to the bubbly pedestrian area, this hotel has a perfect quality-price ratio: modern and spacious bedroom, shower stall, comfortable bed and daily cleaning. The cherry on the top is Hieu at the reception!

title: recommended.
comment:
We will start from an excellent location, friendly staff, friendly, helpful thing Hieu really charm of a girl, anything you will always ask with a smile, courtesy and willingness to help, the old town, minutes walk from Night walk street and there are restaurants and bars very close.
The room is simple but clean, great for the price.
Highly recommended!

title: Recommended and affordable
comment: Very helpful staff, friendly, cheerful, set up. Room very clean. Shower separately with shower screen next to toilet. No breakfast with various fruits,fine coffee. The buns warmed her up for us. All around top in the middle of the old town. Lots of cheap dining options around the corner, so also laundry. For the onward journey to Hieu has booked all trains. She speaks very good English and is very anxious that the hotel guests are well. Thank you Hieu+Team

title: Very good Hotel. Recommended!
comment: We stayed in The Times Hotel for two nights. We enjoyed our stay very much. Service ist excellent and very friendly. Especically Hieu was very kind. Breakfast is also very tasty. The Hotel ist located very close to the old quarter but in a calm small Street. We can defenitely recommend the Hotel.

title: Great stay
comment: We had a great time staying at this hotel. The room was clean, and comfortable, with a huge bed. fast wifi. The owner was exceptionally welcoming and helpful with good recommendations. Very close to the touristic area without being noisy at night. Highly recommended.

title: Recommended homestay in Hué
comment:
Highly recommended. Room new and very clean. Everything very nicely decorated. The hosts are extremely friendly and helpful.
Breakfast was delicious every day (eggs, sausages, bread, fresh fruit and very good Kafffee.
The location in a small alley is also top, we walked to the citadel maybe half an hour.
Thanks to the team, it was a very pleasant stay.

title: Deluxe room with brick wall view
comment:
In the reservation it stated:
- Deluxe room with garden view.
What I had was a ground floor room with a brick wall behind the curtains.
- Complimentary tea.
There was a kettle but no tea and no coffee.
I’ve read lots of reviews talking about a friendly and helpful staff, I barely met some of them, the guy who waited for me when I arrived at night (very kind and smiling but no English) and the girls in the morning (no English either, so it had been impossible to solve a breakfast misunderstanding).
The surrounding area is very local but there aren’t many places to eat.
Most Hue’s attractions and the city centre are far (2/2.5 km), no walking with July high temperatures.
My experience don’t match with most of the reviewers’ ones.

title: We wont be back
comment:
When we arrived, we both thought a beautiful calming garden with fish pond etc
We were then taken to our room,
the room was damp,thankgod we took mosqiito spray they were all around bed and windows,we tried to clean the toilet and wash area,we opened the door put the fan on as th ac wasnt working,
When the cleaner came into the room there was no toilet roll left, no dry clean towels just one bath towel
Tv well that was a different thing again
dogs were barking it was loud on times with who lived there.
We would never reccommend the nana homestay to anyone
states central !! but to what ?the area was filthy

title: Affordable clean accommodation away from Hue centre
comment: Budget friendly room in neighbourhood away from the centre but within earshot of the cathedral bells from St Joseph’s. Shower was hot. Bed was comfy. Room was clean. A kitchen is available should you wish to cook your own food but we did use this facility. Staff are friendly and welcoming. Recommended.

title: Friendly and helpful front desk but hotel could be better
comment: This is for a review for my stay in a private room. The staff at the hotel are very friendly and try to be helpful, so the service is 5 stars! The only issue is that the rooms were subpar at best. The rooms were so humid and there was a musky smell to it. Maybe because it’s in an old building but everything felt worn down and the cleaning could have been better. Overall, it’s good if you need a place to stay for a night or two at most. The location is also great as it’s right in the night pedestrian street with all the restaurants and cafes nearby.

title: Beautiful quiet relaxing resort atmosphere
comment: Great value resort for the price. Beyond Expectation for a 3star hotel…more like 4star resort. Breakfast buffet was very good, complete with a lot of variety of food. Room is spacious and very clean. Pool area very clean, dining hall beautiful. Location lil away from big city but if want quite relaxing resort right by the beach then is a perfect choice for a reasonable price.

title: King and Queen??the most beautiful resort hotel and spa, plus on the ocean and right by the golf course!
comment: We have the best service, immaculate hotel room and breakfast included for less than 50. Canadian per night. Golf course is next door. The rooms are on the ocean , what more could you ask for.

title: Good Resort with reasonable price
comment: The bedroom is spacious and comfortable, the view of the sea is wonderful. The breakfast buffet is delicious but not much. The check-out procedure is slow so customers have to wait quite a long time. Need to improve the quality of service.

title: Amazing Resort
comment:
I stayed here for two nights at the end of May. The resort is amazing, room was luxurious, the restaurant (including breakfast) was delicious, the spa was great and the staff are very friendly.

The only issue was due to no ATM, bank transfer from resort to taxi, Grab picking-up from resort or quick taxi pick-up and the location being far from everywhere else. The reception staff wasn't able to assist me with paying for a taxi but luckily my travel agent made a bank transfer to the driver (Hopefully the resort will eventually find a solution, noting that they are still fairly new).

Regardless, I would definitely book another stay immediately. Comparing to other hotels across Vietnam, this resort is value for money - feels like a 5 star resort at the cost of a 3 star hotel. Highly recommended.

title: Unprofessional and Unprepared – Disappointing Check-in Experience
comment:
I stayed at SBH Gloria Hue and was very disappointed with the lack of professionalism. Despite the official check-in time being 2:00 PM, I had to wait in the lobby until 3:00 PM to receive my room. This was not due to any issue with documentation, as all my personal papers were fully in order.

There was clearly no preparation in advance for guest arrivals. This is not what I expect from a hotel of this standard, and it left a very poor impression right from the beginning of my stay.

title: bad staff training, worse hotel manager, almost lost my bicycle there
comment:
We’re a group of cyclists from around the world who stayed here for a night due to its convenient location and affordable price. Unfortunately, price doesn’t always mean quality.
I parked my bicycle in the designated area near reception. After dinner, I noticed it was missing. Shockingly, staff were unaware and initially blamed me for not asking the guard to watch it - even though both the guard and staff saw me park it there. They then shifted blame among themselves.
Eventually, the bike was found elsewhere on the property, apparently taken by another guest without permission while staff were inattentive. They wouldn't even tell me exactly where it was found.
The next morning, the hotel manager - a young Spanish - briefly apologized in an insincere tone, blaming his staff and excusing himself as "new" rather than taking responsibility.
I also found a cockroach in my room but didn’t manage to take a photo. The hotel felt quite empty, and dinner service was extremely slow.
In short, although the hotel is new and affordable, it clearly lacks basic organization, accountability, and proper staff training.

title: satisfied holiday
comment: beautiful resort, pleasant service. breakfast was excellent. suitable for families with children, or for those who want a quiet holiday. Excellent cleanliness throughout the complex. The only minor thing that can be criticized is the sea. The visibility is not good, but it is refreshing.

title: Execllent !!!
comment: I had an amazing stay at SBH Gloria Resort! The ambiance was incredibly relaxing, with beautiful surroundings and well-maintained facilities. The staff were so friendly and attentive, always going above and beyond to make our stay perfect. The rooms were spacious and comfortable, offering stunning views. The resort's location was ideal, close to many of Hue's attractions. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking to unwind in a peaceful, luxurious environment. Can’t wait to return

title: In a word fantastic
comment: What a great hotel. Clean rooms, clean bathrooms. Breakfast thick fine. Beds really slept heavenly. We will be back here on DEFINITELY again.

title: Wonderful service even before we arrived
comment:
First, what must be mentioned is the fantastic service we have received, starting even before we arrived. The hotel contacted us to organize any last-minute details. We wrote to them on arrival day to ask for a transfer from the airport.. This was organized promptly, easily, and at a reasonable price. they also helped us reserve and get to a fantastic dinner at the Ancient Hue Garden House

Additionally, staying in one of the Royal suites is an incredible experience. The rooms are decorated all in wood with large beds and luxurious bathrooms. Well worth the small additional cost.

Finally, the hotel is in a very popular district with restaurants bars, and nightlife of all kinds. Would gladly return.

title: Vegetarian food in Hué
comment: Great Vietnamese vegetarian food! Good atmosphere and lovely staff. Nhi was super lovely!

title: Great Hue experience
comment:
Service was exceptional
Royal suite was beautiful
Shower large. Everything about the Thong Dong Boutique Hotel was exceptional.
But, bring ear plugs as it is quite noisy in the evenings

title: Stillness in Hue
comment: The hotel represents the essence of Hue. Unique, relaxed space in the central of Hue. I stayed here as a solo once and came back with my family and had a great time both times. Highly recommended

title: If I come back to Hue, I'll come back to that establishment. Quality price absolutely correct
comment:
The location of this establishment is in the center of Hue town, close to restaurants, shops, and also the river
The staff is just adorable, welcoming and helpful.
The room is spacious with a small balcony overlooking the street. Very clean. There is controlled ventilation, if the window is closed, we still have fresh air coming in. This is very nice, because with open window you can hear too much noise from the bar and club at night, in the surroundings.
Breakfast neat and delicious, à la carte.
The large umbrellas provided did us a good service for our excursion to the citadel and the valley of the temples 😊

title: 2 nights
comment: It is a nice place to stay and you are well located. However, it is useful to know that they have a vegetarian restaurant

title: Good and rising
comment: We felt very comfortable at the hotel in Huế. The team is super friendly and striving, and you can tell that the house is still under construction – but that’s what makes it kind of likeable: It gets noticeably better by the day. Clean rooms, pleasant atmosphere, good base for exploring the city. We would definitely come back!

title: I love this hotel!!!
comment:
I absolutely love my stay here! The architecture was unlike anything I've seen before - beautifully designed with a unique, cozy atmosphere that instantly made me feel at home.
What really surprised me how affordable it was, especially located in city center which having high quality and attention to details through the space. I would definitely recommend this place and attention to details through the space. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a unique stay that balancing between working and lifestyle values!!

title: Good location!!
comment: Room is spacious. Really impressed with restroom. Right in the corner of western district in Huế. Convenient to walk to restaurants and bars in walking street. Highly recommended!!!

title: Good location, nice hotel
comment: I Love It, good quality room ,nice staff, the food and coffee at the lobby is excellent . Location is in the central of the city

title: Nice premiere deluxe double
comment: big bedroom , spacious toilet. Good location right in western district hue. I booked Premiere Deluxe Double, and i love it. Nice bathtub!!! Will be back!!

title: Highly recommended!
comment:
I planned a solo trip to Hue to take a break from my busy life. I want to stay in a place in city center, but it need to be quiet and cozy.

This is why I feel so lucky after staying in Thong Dong for 5 days in my solo trip. The room in this boutique was comfortable and beautifully decorated, especially focusing on Hue traditional styles with modern amenities.

I appreciate the dedication of the staff, which always ready to assist. I believe that if I return to Hue, I will book Thong Dong for my next trip.

I would definitely recommend it to anyone lookibg for a cozy and convenient place to stay in Hue.

title: Very good location and comfy bed!
comment: I had a good time here at Thong Dong Quan Boutique during my short business trip in Hue. Location is great, few steps walking to Perfume river. Close to restaurants, cafe, and spa. Very spacious room. Highly recommended

title: A hidden gem in Hue!
comment: A hidden gem in Huế. Elegant design, kind-hearted staffs, and peaceful vibes. I will definitely come back on my next trip. The breakfast was simple but delicious with fresh local ingredients. Sitting by the street, and watching Hue wake up was the best part of my trip.

title: Good location. Comfortable bed!
comment: Comfortable bed. Bathroom is big and clean. Also nice location! It’s located in central of hue which close to shops and restaurants, spa. Right in Western district. Highly recommended! I would love to be back.

title: Very good location!
comment: The boutique hotel is located in nice area. Few steps to Perfume river. Walking distance to restaurants and bars in Hue. Rooms and beds are clean and standardized. Highly recommend!!!

title: Bad experience
comment: Low quality Service presence of giant cockroaches in the rooms and the staff do not put their own to help you remedy it. No commercial gesture despite the inconvenience. Don't. I would have taken pictures but I preferred you avoid that.

title: Not a perfect American hotel but above par for the area. I would stay there again!
comment:
There were a lot of mixed reviews on this hotel, and after staying there (and 2 other places in Hue) I understand why. There were 9 of us in 4 rooms.
Here's what I learned
All the hotels had nice air conditioners and clean white bedding. friendly staff (that depended on Google Translate, but it worked perfectly). They also all had one or two windows that didn't seal, allowing noise to come in. Every single one had paint bubbling or chipping. Hand soap and hand towels were not common anywhere in the city. We used the included body wash as soap. They all provide shampoo, body soap, a toothbrush, tiny toothpaste, a hot water kettle, a hair dryer, a comb, and Q-tips. No irons, no conditioner,

The humidity there is real! The only wear and tear in any of them was cosmetic. Everything functions as it should. But you could definitely see and smell signs of the excess moisture in all three places we stayed.

Jamine (now called Cusiana) excelled at customer service and the breakfast bar. The staff reserved motorbikes and taxis for us and could also book tours. We loved the glass elevator and took it often. We stayed for the better part of 2 1/2 weeks. It is a quick walk to the river, and there are more restaurants, hotels, coffee shops, and stores than you could need. The road the hotel is on closes at night, so more people can safely walk. They party hard and work hard in this city. Everyone was friendly and I felt safe letting my teens lose in the hotel and in pairs along the street. The area is shockingly safe. The store owners put up a sheet to say they are closed. No locks, some didn't even have doors, and no one even came close to taking anything.

I never thought Viet Nam was a place i would visit butI will say it was worth the 36 hour travel days.

title: Fantastic stay
comment: Laura is an amazing woman, she made our stay a very special experience, nothing was too much trouble and she was always smiling. Rooms clean and spacious and bed was very comfortable. Breakfast was delicious especially the pancakes. Perfect location for getting around on foot.

title: Best just conceivable simply good accommodation
comment:
The "Four Seasons " is the best accommodation booked so far in Vietnam at a sensational price-performance ratio.
There is little to add to the usual praising comments, everything is almost perfect.
Here are some important basic information: The property is located in a quiet pedestrian-only side street, 50 metres from the nearest main street.
That's why it's very quiet and relaxed here despite the hustle and bustle.
Our room had two double beds, was sufficiently large, had large windows and even a small balcony.
Air conditioning, fridge and even a small wardrobe are available.
There is no room safe, valuables can be deposited at reception.
The hotel has a lift.
The simple breakfast is prepared according to your wishes, originally there are no fixed breakfast times after 7 am, everything is organized relaxed according to your wishes.
The "garden" is a view of the neighboring property, and the pool rather an extended bathtub of about 2 x 6 m in size, very original.

The everywhere mentioned friendliness especially of Laura I can also confirm, you personally feel well looked after, and receives many good advice for staying in Hué.

That's why I really hate to leave here! Thank you 🪷

title: Grand Time At Hui Four Seasons
comment: We have had a fantastic couple of days at the Hue Four Seasons with Laura and Michael. Great location and fantastic service during trying times due to the typhoon. Great location with bars clubs cafe's and restaurants a minutes walk away. Very close to all the ancient sites too. We have lived being here. Thankyou Laura and Michael.....10 out of 10 A+++

title: Quiet, comfortable in the center
comment: Excellent Welcoming. Clean, bright and comfortable rooms with views of the garden trees. Good bedding. Quiet. Well located close to the lively streets.

title: Excellent Service!!
comment: Small budget friendly family hotel. Laura and Michael welcome you with a drink and warm smile. They offer an excellent Service and help you with everything (taxi, guide, washing clothes and even send your keys to your next place if you forget them ..... Bedankt Laura). Good rooms, some basic but excellent value for money. Quietly located at the end of an alley but within walking distance of the entertainment district and the Citadel / market. Nice à la carte breakfast.

title: Very good is welcoming
comment:
We had a great comfortable bed in a room with balcony and very bright. Laura is very valuable with her advice.The hotel is located near the citadel, close to everything
All kinds of restaurants and shops are on the streets around

title: Very good hotel with warm welcome and close to the imperial city and restaurants
comment: Very friendly welcome by Laura. We had a bright room with balcony. Breakfast is plentiful with plenty of options. The neighborhood is nice with lots of restaurants The imperial city is near Taxis for less than 2 euros (Xanh very good with app)

title: Excellent hotel for a very good price!
comment: We had an excellent stay here! Our room was clean and comfortable, bathroom was nice and well stocked with soap/shampoo etc. Breakfast was very tasty but best of all was the hotel owner, Laura, who was very welcoming and friendly! Hotel is very well located to the main walking streets of hue, and is approx 30 mins walk to the citadel/imperial city. We were able to leave our luggage here on our final day to collect in the evening. Such good value for money, can’t recommend highly enough! :)

title: The best little hotel!
comment: This was easily one of my favorite places that I've stayed in Vietnam. The hotel room was clean and comfortable, the breakfast was delicious, and the service is some of the best you could ever hope for. They helped us with restaurant recommendations and booking an affordable car with a great driver. I loved this hotel and would definitely stay there again if I find myself back in Hue. This is a really wonderful, family-run business and I highly recommend the Hue Four Seasons.

title: 1 night in Huè
comment: I have no words to describe the kindness and the good energy that you perceive in this hotel. Laura and her family are wonderful and the hotel is very beautiful, clean and spacious. I very recommend this place to everyone who stay in Huè because I think there is not a better place. Thank you Laura, always with your sun inside!❤️ Sofia, Isabella, Arianna, Francesca

title: Good service
comment: I had a truly fantastic experience. The service was top-notch, and the staff were absolutely wonderful. They were extremely friendly and attentive from the moment we arrived, ensuring every part of our stay was comfortable and memorable.

title: Good beer, nice place
comment:
Goooooood beer and ginger beer!! :-) The waiter Mr. Thai was very nice and friendly.
You get peanuts for free with your drinks. We did not eat there, so I can’t say anything about the food.

Futhermore, they did our laundry properly. It was easy - you leave your laundry there and get in the next day.

title: The staff was super friendly!
comment:
The staff was super friendly!

The hotel is very close to many restaurants, cafes, bars, massages, convenient shops

The room is nice and clean, especially the balcony one

A massive collection of craft beers from Vietnam, Belgium, Germany, etc., at the bar downstairs.

title: Great stay!
comment: Our stay at this Asia Hotel was absolutely fantastic! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ The rooms were clean and comfortable, the staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, and the location made it easy to explore everything nearby. We especially loved the delicious breakfast and the relaxing atmosphere throughout the hotel. Highly recommend to anyone visiting the area — we’ll definitely be back!

title: Beautiful buffet breakfast and pool!
comment:
I had a very nice, one night stay at this hotel as part of a tour group. The room was a good size, the bathroom was clean, and the bed was comfortable.

The hotel is in a good location with many restaurants nearby.

Its buffet breakfast was the best we had in Vietnam with many options. Don’t forget that there is an egg station in the restaurant foyer.

Unfortunately, I didn’t have time to use the pool as it looked very inviting.

If I ever visit Hue again, I would not hesitate to stay here.

title: Very pleasant stay
comment: Hotel is in great location. Lots of shops, bars and restaurants nearby. There was an excellent choice for breakfast and although we didn’t use the pool it looked good. The room was spacious and had toiletries on offer. Overall a very pleasant stay.

title: Modern clean comfortable hotel in Xue
comment: Fairly good hotel. Comfortable clean room. Good bed and good shower pressure. Food upstairs in buffet for breakfast. Comfortable stay overall.

title: Didn’t need an alarm clock if you get this room!
comment: Hue in general is a great overnight stay. Our group decided on Asia Hotel in the middle of town. The room was clean, with a tub and a glass into the bedroom !! Spacious with a window at the fire escape. We thought it was perfect until 6 am when we heard a lot of chopping and glass tinkling- our peaceful room was on top of the kitchen!!!! Room 802!

title: Very Good comfortable hotel
comment:
We only stayed at the Asia hotel for 1 night and had a good stay during our tour of Vietnam.
I can say that it was the most comfortable night sleep I had in the 2 weeks touring.
Breakfast was substantial and there was lots of choice.
The staff were lovely and very helpful with any advice or guidance.
There are lots of good restaurants close by within 5 mins walk.
We would definately stay at the Asia hotel again.

title: A perfectly acceptable stay in Hue
comment: This hotel was part of our G Adventures itinerary and was perfectly acceptable for a one night stay in Hue. Nice room and good location for strolling to the livelier parts of town. Breakfast was reasonable though a little crowded. We didn’t use the pool due to a hectic schedule. The photos may be a little flattering but I’m sure it would be OK for a quick dip on a hot day.

title: Enjoyable stay
comment:
Stayed here for one night as part of a tour. It’s a typical tourist class SE Asia hotel, a little faded but perfectly okay. It’s well placed for exploring the city with plenty of restaurants nearby (DMZ down the road was nice). You do get a bit of noise from the street but the windows are pretty good.
Breakfast was nice and all the staff were very friendly and helpful.

title: Asia Hotel Stay
comment:
The Asia Hotel was a lovely stay for our night in Hue. If I return to Hue, I wouldn’t hesitate to stay again.
The staff was friendly and helpful, and our room was HUGE, though not all of them are as large as the one we got.
The breakfast buffet is second to none.

title: Amazing stay – lovely holiday
comment: Very central, lot of restaurants around for all kind of tastes, clean room, comfortable bed... But best of all is the very friendly staff, so helpful and friendly. I feel familiar with them since the first day. They will plan all your tours and help you with the local sightseeing . We had a nice stay here. We can never forget the warm greetings from the staff anytime we entered the hotel. Made us feel at home

title: Cozy and Convenient Stay for Couples in the Heart of the City
comment: A perfect hotel for couples! It may be small, but it's very comfortable. The bed was cozy, and the location couldn't be better. Just a 5-minute walk to the old town, in a quiet and safe neighborhood. It's also close to the city center and train station, with full security—great for families and couples. The hotel has modern facilities, and the room is bright with plenty of natural light.

title: A Perfect Romantic Proposal at the Hotel
comment: My partner and I had the most romantic proposal at this hotel. Before booking, I checked many reviews online, and they were all quite positive. The room here was not only spacious but also had a very elegant, modern, and cozy style—perfect for creating a romantic atmosphere. The staff were incredibly helpful, assisting with everything from room setup to decorating with fresh flowers, candles, and a sweet cake. What impressed me the most was that they even suggested a few creative ideas for the decor and prepared everything exactly as I had requested, right on time. The hotel is centrally located but still peaceful, and the romantic setting made the proposal even more perfect. From our room’s balcony, we had an unforgettable view of misty pine hills. My partner was truly surprised by the proposal. Everything was flawless, thanks to the hotel's support. We're really grateful!

title: A Warm and Memorable Stay
comment: Right from the moment I stepped into the hotel, I felt the warm welcome from the staff. They were always smiling and very helpful with check-in and providing all the necessary information. They even recommended beautiful photo spots and places with delicious food. What impressed me the most was the hotel's attention to detail, from neatly folded towels to having tea, coffee, and bottled water ready in the room. I will definitely come back in the future and recommend this hotel to my friends and family.

title: Very good service
comment: This hotel is very new one in the center. They have a parking for car and motorbike in front of hotel. Very good service and friendly staff. I'll advise this hotel to my fam and friend, Room is good for a 3-star property. Nice and cosy interior deco. Location is perfect. Central yet off the noisy touristy walking street 👍👍👍

title: Nice old hotel
comment: Conveniently located old hotel. Rooms were spacious and clean. Nice little pool. Breakfast is good. The staff is not too helpful, a few were still friendly, but not at all service-oriented.

title: Very good I recommend
comment:
Hello,
I've been to your establishment before in 2025. I recommend it, very well located to walk in the evening and enjoy the craftsmen and restaurants.
The rooms are of excellent quality (normal for a five star) as well as breakfast. The staff is very professional and always smiling.
Hélène

title: Quiet yet central hotel
comment: 2 nights we felt very comfortable here. Huge rooms and bathrooms, very good and rich breakfast buffet with cafe machine that produces great cappuccino. Good range at the bar. Attentive service!

title: good conference stay
comment: very friendly environment. Room good. breakfast very good. We were in the frame af a KMC conférence in CDC . was very interesting and useful

title: Good option for Hue
comment: A very solid option when in Hue. Staff are very friendly and accommodating and it’s in a handy location for bars and restaurants. Has a nice pool and decent breakfast but some aspects are looking “a little tired”. Having said that it is exceptional value for money. Rooms are spacious and cleaned very well and massive bed which is great. I would definitely consider staying again if in Hue.

title: Amazing stay!
comment:
Villa Hué Hotel is a great place to stay in Hue. The rooms are spacious and comfortable. The pool is ideal for swimming in this strong heat.
Cleaning the rooms every day. Breakfast is quality and varied.

title: Nice stay!
comment:
Excellent stay at Villa Hué Hotel where everything was perfect: room, breakfast and cooking lessons. Beautiful stay and pool was ideal!

The heart of the kitchen was private with a chef and a passionate team. Experience to do I recommend!

title: Fabulous
comment: Fabulous! Loved the swimming pool! The breakfast was great. I slept really well. They even had a bathroom with a bath tub! So relaxing. I had a wonderful time here and absolutely loved the real Vietnamese coffee - I usually hate coffee so hats off!

title: A cracking Hue Hotel
comment: A great Vietnam hotel. Super clean, big well equipped bedrooms and a good breakfast. Staff are very friendly. Superb value and we’d happily recommend. It terms of luxury standards we’d say a strong 3.5 star hotel but a 5 star review. Well located and easy to view hue

title: A slice of heaven in the perfect location
comment:
My husband and I were extremely happy with our stay at the Hue Sweethouse 2 Homestay. The accommodation was centrally, located with easy access to excellent restaurants and interesting sites. The room itself was very clean and comfortable, and in particular, the staff were very accommodating and helpful. In particular, we appreciated staff member, Lisa, who was working at the desk when we arrived and was excellent, going above and beyond the call of duty to provide us support. We will definitely stay here again if we come back to Hue in future.
We loved everything. We hope to be back again.

title: Stay here if you're coming to Hue!
comment:
Cannot stress enough how wonderful this place was--hard to imagine anything else beating it in terms of value for the cost.. We were greeted with some free juices shortly after arriving, and all the staff were super nice. Sam helped us check in, gave us some great recommendations, and was incredibly welcoming. Lots of options for breakfast!

The location was very good to access the imperial city and a bunch of good restaurants and bars. The rooms were beautiful, very clean, and with an absurdly comfortable bed. In general the place was quiet--when we came down for breakfast the first day we couldn't believe how many people were staying there since we thought we were the only ones! They did have to do some rather loud construction/drilling on our first morning, but they warned us about it well ahead of time.

If you're coming to Hue, stay here.

title: A very nice hotel
comment:
We stayed one night in this hotel which was perfect: quiet in a small alley, next to very good restaurants.
The staff is lovely, the decoration is very relaxing. Breakfast is really hearty and delicious with homemade yogurt.
Anyway, go ahead!

title: An absolutely pleasant and comfortable stay
comment: Absolutely the best of the locations used during our trip. Modern but at the same time very cozy and comfortable. Very pleasant breakfast. Impeccable service and thoughtful. Only flaw lack of a lift

title: Great place with a nice personal touch
comment:
Great place with a nice personal touch. Very sweet and helpful staff that gave excellent tips for the 2 days I visited Hue. Room was spacious and luxury. I felt very welcome. Great breakfast too and the centre is around the corner. I was able to rent a bicycle to visit the famous pagoda's in a day (much nicer to cycle by yourself than to join an organised tour in my opinion).
Great value for money and I would definitely stay here again.

title: Fantastic!
comment: Fantastic family-run hotel! The rooms were spotless, airy, modern, and full of light. The bed was very comfortable and the shower warm (and easy to use!) Breakfast was delicious (get the pancake!) Service was attentive and friendly, they even organised the easy rider for us to go to Hoi An. They have a really cute dog, too. Located in a small, quiet street, you can get to the river and two cafés in just a few steps, and the buzzing streets in a couple of minutes (we appreciated the position, as some hotels are right by very loud karaoke bars...) We cannot recommend this enough!

title: Nice stay in Eva Homestay
comment: Beautiful stay at Eva homestay, we spent 3 nights. Room are clean and well maintained. Good location, close to restaurants and quiet during night time.

title: eva homestay
comment:
Kind welcome by owner, a detailed info session of whats around, tourist highlights and pricing variabilities.

The Good
* central location and able to walk to many places
* Room large enough for 2 people and a few bags
* 2 small bottles of water and drinking water available if needed
* Beds very firm but surprisingly ok, pillows seem to be years old and should be replaced.

The Not So Good
* Noise - rooms hear all chat and noise from entry level reception (owners loungeroom), it echoes straight up staircase. Family eating, children etc... unpleasant if you are trying to rest in your room.
* remote for tv missing, found one in another room that worked our
* Hairdryer supplied but no points near a mirror, no outlet in bathroom and one outlet on wall isnt near a mirror
* Room 201 is dark, the door windows to small balcony are painted over in black. The one fixed light in room is stark big bright neon globe. The 2 windows are dark as only 1.5m from neighbours so hardly any light filters in, and you have zero privacy, sadly you cannot leave the blackened door open (we did to get a little light in and ended up with a room full of mosquitos)
* Hot water. First shower is ok, anyone going second can get a cold shower, only happened once.

title: Wonderful Stay at Eva's!
comment:
I stayed at Eva's four nights and really loved my stay. It can be hard to choose accomodation, but I found Eva's Homestay on a forum. Wow- so glad I booked!
Eva's Homestay is in a great location, beautiful coffee shops nearby, easy walk to the river and great restaurant recommendations from Eva, I had everything I needed. My balcony room was also clean and spacious, with kettle, fridge, hairdryer etc. Perfect.
I arrived with nothing organised and Eva was super helpful at booking tours and making suggestions. I even did a half day tour with her brother to the DMZ and Vinh Moc tunnels- he's an excellent driver! And lovely.
What a talented family! Do her cooking class. I loved my week and can't wait to come back.
( Eva has many repeat visitors- maybe book early!)

title: Exceptional stay in the heart of Hue
comment: We spent 3 days at the Hotel Lam Garden. Lam and his family gave us an exceptional welcome by giving us all the advice to visit Hue in the best conditions. His wife prepares delicious breakfasts with Hue's specialties. The rooms are spacious, the bedding excellent, air conditioning and fridge.

title: Fantastic accommodation with family connection
comment:
Lam, his wife and sons are the best hosts we had in Vietnam.
Super friendly, never intrusive, excursions at very fair prices.
The homestay is very clean, you don't have any clammy linen in the rainy season, you just almost feel at home.
Breakfast is very rich.
In short, you can't complain about anything!
I would recommend this homestay to anyone!!!

title: Top homestay!
comment:
What a great homestay. The rooms are very large with 2 large beds. We had a room at the front with balcony and was wonderfully quiet. The administrators are such lovely people who want to help you with everything. We had wonderful 2 nights, rented scooters from them and they booked our night bus, beforehand we could rinse off.
We would highly recommend it, it is ideally located, everything at good distance, western food almost 5 min walk and all around Vietnamese.
Breakfast was fine, that's all you need anyway!
Big kudos to Lam and his wife My.

title: Unforgettable Stay at Lam’s Garden Boutique Homestay in Hue - 110% recommendable
comment:
Our stay at Lam’s Garden Boutique Homestay in Hue was truly unforgettable. The hosts, Lam and My, are among the warmest and most dedicated hosts we’ve ever met. They provided us with numerous recommendations for local restaurants, adventures in the area, and more. On-site, we conveniently rented a moped to explore the city and its surroundings.

The rooms are not only beautiful and spacious but also impeccably clean—worthy of more than five stars! Breakfast was abundant and delicious, featuring freshly prepared soup, fresh fruits, bread with jam, omelets, along with coffee and orange juice. Here too, we’d gladly give more than five stars.

We’ve fallen in love with this homestay, largely due to the wonderful hosts. When we return to Vietnam, a visit to Lam and My is a must.

Additionally, we enjoyed an unforgettable transfer from Hue to Hoi An with Lam! Traveling comfortably by car through stunning rural landscapes, we encountered beautiful rice fields, impressive family temples, and incredibly remarkable cemeteries. We’re glad we chose this trip with Lam instead of options like LeFamilyRider (moped). Firstly, the car ride was comfortable for the long journey; secondly, we could stop anytime for photos or questions (Lam speaks excellent English and has many stories to share!); and thirdly, we experienced much more than the typical tourist itinerary.

We highly recommend this homestay to anyone staying in Hue. The hosts’ tips, tours, and their hospitality are 110% recommendable!

Overall rating: 10 out of 5 stars! Simply amazing.

Thank you, Lam and My, for the wonderful time and hospitality—you are true friends we look forward to visiting again!

title: Amazing Value!
comment: Given the low price, I didn't know what to expect. But our experience here was 5* . We were greeted by a very friendly and helpful host, who served us tea and passionfruit. The room was clean and comfortable. The location was surprisingly quiet, but still convenient.

title: Great Homestay. Book early or miss out!
comment:
This is a hidden gem in centre of Hue. The host was super helpful and gave us good advice about where to eat. He organised a private car to take us to Hoi An. The place is immaculate and very well run. Our room was very large with a balcony.

Although the weather was dull and wet, Mr Tam suggested where we should go, and we were able to fit in the five major sites with the help of a very nice Grab taxi driver who stayed with us till we finished.

Mr Tam was always at home to welcome us back with hot tea. He made us feel very welcome.

title: great location
comment: Mandarin Homestay is an ideal place to rest, fresh air and quiet, even better, the place has a cafe and Hue restaurant for you and your family.

title: Excellent
comment: Very nice little hotel with adorable courtyard.All rooms look out with a small terrace into the courtyard.Situated off one of the canals.Quiet and good surroundings.Staff very friendly.Perfectly clean.At breakfast there is no buffet,you choose 2 options.With the grave 13 minutes to the forbidden city,you can also stroll well there

title: Pacalou
comment:
Our stay in the homestay was great with the impeccable Welcoming from Aiden which was extremely accommodating, it allowed us to access our room ahead of schedule.
The rooms are of an excellent level of comfort and the location is perfect

title: The best place to stay in Hue
comment: A few places are worth going out of your way to review and this one is definitely worth the time to recommend! Room was cool, comfortable, and spacious, and Phong took care of us from start to finish by planning a day trip and private driver to Hoi An, and prepared a pho breakfast that was among the best things we have eaten here! It is quiet and in a very authentic and nice part of the city, with a beautifully maintained courtyard to rest in when you are done for the day. Walk a few blocks and have dinner at Vespa Beer - it is all locals and served us an incredible variety of seafood, and you don’t even have to cross the bridge!

title: Good location
comment: Great location. Dinner with the other guests. Excellent quality price. Welcome back. Speak French. Interesting. 5 bedrooms.

title: Beautiful and quiet city. We felt very safe and relaxed around the city center and walking through the neighborhoods.
comment: This was exactly what we were looking for, a family homestay that is budget friendly, clean and quiet. This residence has a quaint neighborhood lily pond in the back of the house. Close to through streets and walking oriented. Tours picked us up at the door, so made it super simple to navigate the city. Taxi's are very affordable.

title: Tranquility by the River
comment:
The place is ideal for a getaway from the hustle and bustle of the rat race. We spent 4N5D and wished we had more time to explore the beauty of Huê. We got ourselves the deluxe tripple room as we traveled with our son. And what a great decision it was! The view of the Perfume River from the balcony is breathtaking. The manager, Phuon and his team provide a grade-A service: from giving us great recommendations for food, things-to-do etc. You just need to ask.

We were honoured to have met with the owner of the hotel, Mr Tien. We sat for a drink and learned how the place was built. Totally inspiring!

Perfect place for a family getaway or a romantic villas for couples. We made friends with other globe trotters and the village dog, La La. What can I say, best place to be at in Huê (not to far off from the city, but far enough to find peace and tranquility). Definitely a go-to hotel, in Huê.

title: Paradise by the water
comment:
Mr Phuong was a perfect host for our stay in this little paradise by the water. We enjoy the sunset in the pool, quiet while being close to the city center. Address to recommend ++ if you want to enjoy the charms of Hue.
Sophie & Dimi

title: Comfortable and friendly.
comment: Great room. Early check in available, friendly staff. Close by to all attractions and the town. Booking offices for trips snd money exchange next door.

title: Please do not miss this place
comment: Everything was just perfect- located in a quiet area but in the historic citadel. It also has the best coffee, very clean and perfumed sheets and towels and a very modern room with such a comfortable bed and pillow. It was so worth the price we paid and wish we could have stayed longer!!

title: Do not hesitate very nice welcome
comment:
Very nice surprise considering the price we would learn a little
We have price 2 rooms one with balcony one without both were very good with window there are not always staff in Vietnam and very welcoming we gave us room on arrival 7am we had taken a night bus
Close to all scooter rentals and they help you organize tour and transportation
You can go with your eyes closed

title: Excellent
comment: Lovely homestay in a green, relaxing setting. Spacious room, well appointed and clean. Breakfast quality, EXCELLENT. We were touched by the unique history of this couple, their generosity, kindness and love of sharing: a rewarding encounter. Thank you very much.

title: Amazing!!
comment: Peaceful and pleasant accommodation. Jean and his companion, are super endearing, kind and with little care. But they don’t just have these qualities, they are people with huge hearts who do a lot of things to help children and people. The exchange with them was very interesting and the opportunity to visit the adjoining home and share a moment with the children were magical moments. Thanks to them for all that.

title: Quiet, friendly and well located
comment: A typical guesthouse run by a young, friendly and helpful team. In the background of a small street , the place is quiet and not far from the tourist district. The rooms are not very large but comfortably equipped. It was our second stay in Hue

title: Better options available
comment:
Positives:
The bed is very comfortable and the hotel is a short walk to the wonderful Non Hue restaurant.
Negatives:
The room is very small and the bathroom tiny. The photos are misleading.
Don't book if you want to sleep past 6am. The kitchen staff arrive and the shouting, banging and grinding wakes everyone up. We were upstairs but could hear it all so I can't imagine how loud it must be in the rooms downstairs closer to the kitchen.
The hotel doesn't allow shoes inside. That is mildly annoying but when you are given plastic slippers 5 sizes too big to use it becomes a trip hazard particularly on the stairs.

title: The hotel is nice. There are everything you need for a short term staying. And also the staff is very friendly:)
comment:
The hotel is nice. There are everything you need for a short term staying. And also the staff is very friendly:)
The hotel is good located.
I was staying there for a 2 nights. The room was clean, there was a hot water in the shower. In general I enjoyed it here

title: Two night stay, with a visitor?
comment: First the staff were always trying to provide a good service and were helpful. Rooms have nice decor but some areas were not cleaned in a long while, under bed, under fridge etc. hence we had a cockroach visit us the first night and it out smarted me. Staff moved us to another room for the night and said they would clean the original room. We moved back in the next day but the dirty areas were the same! I found the cockroach again and got it this time. Staff were very apologetic!!!! Hotel then asked us not to give a bad review but went ahead and filled out a review on Booking.com as though it was us that wrote it!!! They said it was amazing, we have reported them!!!

title: Best Value, Brilliant Accomodation in Hue
comment:
Spotlessly clean, the housekeeping staff work so hard and wanted us to have a most comfortable stay. All of the staff at this hotel were most helpful & attentive.
It's in an excellent location to explore Hue in a quiet little side st.
Exceptiondl value for money too. We'd definately stay here again.
Thank you everyone at Vina Vintage Hotel

title: Great budget accommodation in the center of Hue
comment: We had a great time in Hue the hotel vina vintage is very central is top top clean, the room huge, the staff lovely we would recommend it anytime. Were spoiled with ginger tea

title: Uncomfortable stay but good location
comment:
Easy to find, good location.
But the mattress was very firm and hard to sleep on. Also they placed us in a room right beside the reception / lobby and it wasn’t sound proof. We heard people come and go all night so it was hard to sleep. I would not stay here again for risk of being put in this room.

title: Moldy Hotel
comment: I went to see a hotel room before I made decicion to spend time in there. A staff was friendly, but when I saw the room it wasn't great. First when I came there the whole hotel smelled so much moldy, so I think the hotel is over priced. It don't look the same what in pictures its. So I won't recommend to go there and spend a night.

title: A great place.
comment: The room was clean, not too big, and had a nice balcony. Daily cleaning and changing of towels. Ladies in the reception were very friendly and helpful. They provide a hand-drawn map of the town, which is useful. Luggage can be stored downstairs after the check-out hour.

title: Very good homestay
comment:
Location was good as not far from the main tourist area. Staff is very friendly and helpful especially Yan. She loves a chat😊.
Good eateries nearby like Nook and Mingles for breakfast.
You have to take off shoes outside but they provide slippers. I used my own.
Beds were comfortable. Rooms were clean.
Water bottles provided every day.
I didn't quite understand why the wardrobe was right against the bed so in order to hang clothes one had to climb on the bed. There was plenty of space at the other end .
Otherwise very good .

title: Great place to stay
comment: I had a great experience here. The staff were all really friendly. The location was great. The room had 2 bathrooms and a balcony. A nice social area to relax. Good value for money

title: Wonderful stay in Hue
comment:
Facilities: Nice, clean and just open
Staffs: Helpful, friendly
Location: Near Truong Tien Bridge, right in the city center
Food: Good, breakfast buffet with a wide variety of delicious options
Wi-fi: Good, stable
Room: Spacious, cozy
Will stay again. Recommend!

title: Very pleased.
comment:
The hotel is beautiful and new, Indochine design combines contemporary, luxurious and refined space. I was especially impressed with the story between the two periods of the hotel and very impressed with the welcome drink, very Huế. Extremely landscaped location, right in the center and close to School Bridge, Hung River should be convenient for travel and sightseeing.
Breakfast is varied and high-quality.
The staff is friendly, enthusiastic and always ready to support, making the stay experience more complete.

title: Absolute Amazing
comment:
Our first experience at Grand Royal Riverside Hue was nothing short of exceptional, offering a true reflection of five-star hospitality in every detail.

From the moment of arrival, the welcome was warm, professional, and effortlessly elegant. The team demonstrated genuine care and attentiveness, ensuring that every interaction felt personalized rather than procedural. The check-in process was smooth and refined, setting the tone for what would become a consistently impressive stay.

The ambiance of the hotel strikes a perfect balance between sophistication and comfort. The design thoughtfully blends modern luxury with subtle local cultural elements, creating a space that feels both elevated and authentic. Every area—from the lobby to the dining spaces—was impeccably maintained and visually harmonious.

The culinary experience stood out as a highlight. Each dish was presented with finesse and delivered a well-balanced flavor profile, showcasing both creativity and technical precision. The service team displayed strong product knowledge and an intuitive understanding of guest needs, enhancing the overall dining journey.

Rooms were beautifully appointed, offering a serene retreat with high attention to detail in both comfort and functionality. Housekeeping standards were consistently excellent, reflecting a commitment to quality and guest satisfaction.

What truly distinguishes the experience is the level of service. The staff’s professionalism, combined with their genuine warmth, creates a welcoming atmosphere that feels both luxurious and heartfelt. Every detail, no matter how small, was handled with care and intention.

Overall, this stay confidently demonstrates that Grand Royal Riverside Hue delivers on the promise of five-star hospitality. It is a destination where service, design, and culinary excellence come together seamlessly, leaving a lasting impression and a strong desire to return.

title: Very good hotel, suitable for rest when arriving.
comment: The hotel is beautiful architecture and luxury, central location close to fun spots, west street, view of the river Hang, friendly and professional staff, I will continue to choose this hotel to stay in the next times to Huế.

title: The hotel is located right in the center, convenient for traveling as well as viewing the city and the dream river.
comment: Diverse food enthusiastic staff

title: New hotel, luxury, unique architecture
comment:
The new hotel is located right in the center of the city, next to the money school bridge, Grand Interior, Lansing. There are many restaurants and restaurants around. Particularly the evening walk in the river next to the hotel is relaxing
New staff communicate gently professional, attentive, cute luggage staff, move luggage quickly

title: I had a great stay at Grand Royal Riverside Hue - Fusion Collection
comment:
The hotel has a convenient location, easy access to the attractions and central areas. The rooms are beautiful, clean, comfortable and carefully prepared.

What impressed me most was the very friendly, enthusiastic staff and always ready to support guests throughout their stay.

Besides, the quality of the food at the restaurant, especially the breakfast buffet and dinner, is really excellent. The food is varied, tasty and presented very beautifully.

I’m completely happy with the experience here and will definitely recommend the hotel to friends and family in the future.
Very worth experiencing.

title: Best stay in Hue
comment:
We had a wonderful family trip staying at this hotel for three nights with my two aunties and uncle in Hue City, which is my mother’s hometown. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the staff, who were incredibly friendly, attentive, and always ready to help. Their excellent service made us feel comfortable and well taken care of throughout our stay.

The food was another highlight of our experience. Every meal was delicious, with a wide variety of options that suited everyone’s tastes—especially the breakfast, which was truly special and something we looked forward to each day. A special thank you to Ngọc and Dương at the Jade and Ginger restaurant for their wonderful service and warm hospitality.

The hotel itself had a relaxing and pleasant atmosphere, making it perfect for a family getaway. We were able to spend quality time together and truly enjoy our vacation.

Overall, we had a fantastic experience and really appreciated the great service and hospitality. We would definitely come back again in the future.

title: A Truly Refined and Memorable Stay
comment:
I had a wonderful stay at Grand Royal Riverside Hue - Fusion Collection. The hotel is elegant and beautifully designed, the room is exceptionally comfortable, and the staff deliver truly outstanding service—gracious, attentive, and highly professional.

What made the experience even more special was the restaurant.
