During dinner, we experienced their Earth Hour initiative—an inspiring program that raises awareness for environmental protection—which made the evening even more meaningful to me. The space was transformed into a romantic candlelit setting, creating an intimate, serene, and beautifully curated atmosphere for me and my family.

It was not just a stay, but a refined experience that reflects true hospitality. I stayed for one night and checked out today, and I look forward to returning in the near future.

title: Hotel in the center, good service.
comment: The hotel is located in the center of the city so it is easy to go anywhere. The room is clean, there is a balcony that receives the wind so the space is very pleasant, not damaged. The buffet menu is extremely rich and tasteful. In addition, staff here are enthusiastic, attentive and always ready to support guests. I will return to the hotel if there is a chance.

title: Excellent
comment:
Fantastic hotel, beautiful rooms and the restaurant food was excellent.
Excellent service too

title: Congratulation
comment: Perfect, thank you Jade. It's a beautiful diner

title: Overall , it was a unforgettable staying
comment: Definitely !! With 5-star standards, we got so many memorable touches. Especially, Jade and Ginger All-day dining, where I felt like a home gave me and my friends extraordinarily Gouridon Service about Wagyu Steak A5. Don't forget the bottle of Old World Red Wine. That was amazing moments at this property Huế City. Highly Recommendation about this Destination.

title: Great experience at Grand Royal Riverside Hue, a fusion collection
comment:
Just finished the 3 day 2 night trip from TP.HCM, I was really impressed with the experience at Grand Royal Riverside Hue. Unlike Saigon, entering the hotel is to immediately feel the quiet and luxury of the Fusion brand.
If you are a lover of the ancient beauty of Indochine style, this is indeed a 'masterpiece' that cannot be ignored. Right from the waiting room, I was fascinated by the delicate intersection between French architecture and very Huế.
The perfect combination between the characteristic cotton brick flooring, the warm but equally prominent gold walls and the combination of the dark wooden interior resembles an art painting.
Modern and comfortable room space. The mild yellow light in the room further enhances the beauty of Indochina. In particular, each room has a wide and beautiful balcony overlooking the surrounding space. I am in room 813, the view to the river Hunan dream, a right corner if the shooting will give a beautiful European vibe.
Three days and two nights spent in Huế and at the hotel, I felt like time was slowing down. An artistic experience in the heart of the city where the souls who love the beauty from Saigon will be passionate.

title: Review
comment: Ksan beautiful, attentive, very nice

title: Family-friendly hotels
comment: New hotel, large rooms, comfy beds to sleep well without waking up. Near the center, visiting Tai Hang or the Hunan River is convenient. Delicious restaurant buckwheat breakfast, coming back with family

title: February 28
comment:
Great new hotel. Nice territory. Good service and nice people, we were helped by Kong
The location is good, taxi or rented bike is easy to reach the main attractions.
I recommend the hotel

title: Super modern hotel
comment: Super nice modern and new hotel. The staff was super friendly and helpful. The rooms were beautiful and the breakfast must definitely be booked ! We will definitely come back.

title: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Wonderful stay – highly recommended!
comment:
I had a wonderful stay at Lumiere Boutique Vy Da, a new hotel in the center of Hue city. The booking process was quick and easy.

The rooms are beautiful and reasonably priced, with many great photo spots around the hotel. The restaurant serves delicious food, and the outdoor gala dinner was fun – especially the fresh draft beer!

The new pickleball court is a great bonus. It was amazing to enjoy social pickleball during my holiday. The staff are lovely and very friendly.
I will definitely come back again.

title: Beautiful Hotel and Best Restaurant in Hue
comment:
I stayed at Lumiere Boutique Vy Da two days ago and had a truly great experience.

The hotel is clean, modern, and very well maintained. The room was comfortable, stylish, and everything worked perfectly. The bed was very comfortable, and I had a great sleep. The location is peaceful and ideal for relaxing, while still being convenient to explore Hue.

A special thanks to Mr. Công Cường, the Front Office Manager — he was extremely helpful and professional. He assisted me with everything I needed and made my stay even more enjoyable. Truly excellent service.

The restaurant has a beautiful view and is honestly one of the best places in the city. The atmosphere is amazing, and it’s a perfect spot to enjoy a meal and relax.

Overall, I highly recommend this hotel and would definitely stay here again.

title: Top hotel
comment: Comfortable room and well service staff was friendly

title: Wonderful experience
comment: I recently stayed at Lumiere Boutique Vy Da and had a wonderful experience. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful from check-in to check-out. The breakfast was delicious and thoughtfully prepared. The room was beautiful, clean, and well-designed, with all the amenities in excellent, like-new condition. Overall, it was a very comfortable and enjoyable stay. I will definitely come back on my next visit!

title: My favourite hostel in Vietnam :)
comment:
Had some initial trouble staying the first night at Amy 2 due to bad weather / flooding. However the staff were brilliant with communication and I was excited to stay at this hostel the next night. Stayed in the four bed dorm at Amy 1 for one night and I wish I could have stayed longer.

All the staff I met were so so lovely, especially Daniel, Sarah and Lisa! Thank you for making me so welcome, chatting away to me about my trip and giving me great advice about my travels and Vietnam as a whole. Lisa, thank you especially for your hospitality, whether you were cooking breakfast early or pointing me in the right direction for a mini mart, you really went above and beyond :)

If I come back to Hue in the future, I'll definitely be staying at Amy 1! My favourite hostel in Vietnam so far!!

title: Nice for a Breif Stay in Hue
comment:
Nice place to stay for a brief visit Hue. The rooms are quite small which is normal. It’s in a nice location that’s walkable and close to everything.

The bathroom we had also functioned as a shower which is either nice or not depending on how you see it. Overall I would stay here again no problem.

title: Felt like home
comment:
Some places you stay.
And some places truly welcome you in.
Timothy Homestay in Huế feels like the second.
Each morning I roll out my yoga mat in the common space so my husband can keep sleeping. As the house slowly wakes up, guests wander through, some sitting on the sofa, others stopping to chat. Before long, strangers become travel companions.
When we arrived after a long train ride, the host had snacks waiting for us. A small gesture that felt incredibly thoughtful after a long day of travel.
Breakfast is simple and perfect. Fresh bánh mì, fruit, tea, and coffee.
In the evenings people naturally gather to talk, share stories, and have a drink together. Conversations stretch longer than expected.
The hosts are wonderful and happy to help arrange trips, transportation, restaurant recommendations, and the best places to explore in Huế.
Our room is huge and comfortable, but the real magic here is the sense of community.
You arrive as a guest.
Soon it feels like home.

title: The best I've ever met
comment:
Beautiful structure, looks like a fairy tale. The breakfast was great. Free bikes. Loving staff.
Really exceptional. They helped me in everything, booking for me a night bus to Nha Trang since it was raining a lot in Hue. They took both my ticket and the Grab, making sure no one was cheating me.

title: The hotel is clean, close to the center, close to the Penny Bridge and walking street. Friendly staff, enthusiastic.
comment: Very clean, easy to travel.

title: Excellent quality of service.
comment:
I spent four nights in the hotel and was very happy with the experience.

I am very impressed with the attitude of the staff, all very gentle, polite and always enthusiastic support. I feel friendly and professional in the way they communicate with the guests.

During my stay, I felt very comfortable and welcome. This is definitely a considerable option if you are looking for a accommodation with service, good location

title: Good simple hotel, very well located, very nice staff !
comment: Very nice welcome in this very well situated hotel in the center of the city, we really enjoyed our stay. The rooms are ok, some issues with humidity but nothing major.

title: Lovely place great breakfast
comment: Lovely hotel, super clean with friendly and helpful staff, breakfast is amazing! Choose the local dishes, you won’t be disappointed!

title: Very good Hotel
comment: Very good hotel, the staff is very welcoming, attentive and available. We had arrived by night bus and therefore early enough at the hotel, the room not being available given the time, the staff offered to use the showers from the changing room of the pool which was very appreciable and welcome. Breakfast made by Binh was perfect to start the day.

title: Wonderful stay
comment: Wonderful, friendly staff; lovely modern and clean rooms and a really great location for wandering around the city. Highly recommend!

title: Big heart in the heart of Huế
comment:
Clean, modern, friendly, right in the heart of Huế. All at a great price point.

Benh and the crew are super lovely and super helpful.

Delicious beef noodle soup is available for breakfast by the pool, too.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

title: Great stay! Value for money
comment: Really helpful staff and a great stay! Honestly surprised by the price I paid vs what I got. I highly recommend 💯

title: Perfect place
comment: This is our second year in a row staying here , we love it. Fantastic service, great , friendly staff and excellent prices. Walking distance to everything.

title: Everyone should choose to get there
comment: Business-friendly downtown hotels, spotless rooms

title: Buon hotel
comment:
Clean hotel, great rooms, breakfast to improve (they asked us the day before what we wanted for breakfast). Not central location but in a few minutes walk you are in the streets of the premises.
Good value for money, recommended

title: N
comment: The place wouldn’t except our agoda booking and told us that we had to book again and they then gave us a room for the same price with no air conditioning that was used by someone else. Then they said that they cleaned it and there was still garbage everywhere and dirty everything. Do not stay here would not recommend

title: Lovely staff, friendly and helpful
comment: The staff are very kind and friendly here. I stayed in the 4 bed dorm for two nights. The laundry service was good and very cheap. The clothes smelled lovely. The breakfast was prepared fresh and was very good. Unfortunately I cannot give this place 5 stars, simply because of the smell from the bathroom and the little flies that appeared from the drain pipe. However, the staff make up for any shortcomings. The dorm also comes with a little privacy curtain which is very nice. Overall, it was a good stay. Can’t fault the price.

title: Go with eyes closed !
comment: We had the most amazing time at Bon Ami. Fin is the kindest person, and provides the very best quality. The rooms are clean and well lighted, with blinds and facilities within the room. Very good breakfast included in the formula, and Fin helped us on bus reservations and even proposed to send me my lost shoes to my next place !! I would recommend a 100%.

title: The hotel has a very green area.
comment: The house offers a very nice view, a clean room and a large bed compared to other places I have been. The host enthusiastically guided us to the tourist attractions and invited us for afternoon tea.

title: Very nice hotel, owner at the top.
comment: This hotel was perfect for our stay in Hue. The owner was perfect, I had forgotten my bag on the bus between Hue and Hoi An, she managed to contact the right people who found it and delivered it to me at my new hotel in Hoi An. Otherwise the hotel is very nice and clean. I recommend. Eric&Sophia

title: Friendly staff, but not suitable for light sleepers
comment:
I stayed for 3 nights in a double room with a balcony. The room was newly renovated and equipped with a nice warm shower, a desk, a clothing rack, and airconditioning. Additionally, there is a washing machine with built-in dryer in the kitchen available for use at a reasonable fee. Breakfast was really good, in particular the banana pancake.

The hotel is a 15-minute walk from the city center, where there are plenty of restaurants to choose from. It’s a 14-minute taxi ride to the Huế Imperial City, making the location very convenient.

The owner is a friendly and communicative woman who messaged me before my arrival and kept me informed about breakfast and other practical details. Aside from the owner, there’s an employee who prepares breakfast. She was very kind and spoke good English. They were both excellent listeners and showed real empathy when I brought up the neighbors' relentless karaoke noise.

Despite the advertisement on Booking.com, the accommodation neither provides bikes nor offers bike rentals. Another disappointment was the curtain rail, which was installed too far from the window, leaving a gap that let in light all night. However, those were just minor details.

The real issue during my stay was the extreme noise pollution from the neighbors. I’m perplexed by reviews on Booking.com calling this a quiet neighborhood. During my stay, neighbors blasted music and sang karaoke until midnight, only to start again at 7:00 AM. In between, a rooster and barking dogs woke me at 3:30 AM and kept going for hours. As a light sleeper, enduring constant noise for 3 consecutive nights was unbearable.

I sympathize with the hotel owner, as she has no control over her neighbors’ relentless karaoke or their unmanaged pets. But as a guest, it completely ruined my stay. I'm especially frustrated that other reviews on Booking.com praised the neighborhood's quietness, which influenced my decision to book here. Yet, I experienced the worst noise in 6 months of traveling in Southeast Asia. After 3 exhausting nights, I left completely sleep-deprived.

title: Beautiful Place to stay
comment: From the moment we arrived we felt so warmly welcomed . Lilly was fantastic . Nothing we requested was too hard for her . The room was good size , clean and bed comfortable. Thankyou very much to you all . We had a lovely fun days in Hue

title: A must stay
comment: This was BY FAR the best place we stayed in Vietnam. We loved every minute of being there, even in the pouring rain! The rooms are beautiful, the breakfast is lovely and the staff are amazing. The manager is the best, the night security gentleman is lovely and we wished we could have stayed longer. Please don’t skip this stop.

Quite honestly, this homestay offers a level that some hotels can not reach! Ultra friendly and dedicated staff, large and clean and beautiful rooms with air co
Swimming pool certainly small but it has the merit of existing! Location a little outside the center. Take 20 minutes on foot to get there
For us the best homestay / hotel of our stay c was top

title: I choose to be critical, for the sake of honesty, which Google Maps is lacking thereof.
comment:
Great decoration, great staffs, great house.

Sucky neighborhood, there's a neighboring rooster that always wakes us up at 5 in the morning, f.. u.

More about the neighborhood, its very loud. you can pretty much hear the engine of every single crazy motorist on the road outside of the house. It probably mean the house is not properly sound insolated. Theres a trash truck that sounds like a TANK, that comes to the house at 00:00 everyday. Good luck sleeping through that, it takes the thing 5 minutes to go past the house. What the actual f? Worst location I've ever slept in. Great bed tho. Makes zero sounds while fornicating. 2/5.

title: Very good stay, pleasant atmosphere
comment: Very nice establishment, decorative room and clean. Well equipped airco tv kettle shower and bath overlooking decorative garden with terrace and jacuzzi. Staff understanding and speaking English.Good breakfast to choose from. Small flat noisy neighbors but it always ends at 22.00 hour. The taxi fare to the Imperial City is +/_ 40,000vnd. Typical market 3 minutes down the street.

title: Lovely homestay is exactly what this place is.
comment: Lovely homestay is exactly what this place is. The hosts that we met were all lovely. It was close enough to everything we needed for us. The room was lovely. The breakfast was lovely. Visited the Imperial Palace. Had a walk around. Not a lot of time for much more. We were only here for a day.

title: It’s all in the name.
comment: Smart, clean, quiet rooms, just beyond the tourist district. Comfortable beds and hot water. Want more? The host, Lien is accommodating with advice and help such as organising onward travel. As the property name suggests, Lien, her helpers and the home are quite lovely.

title: Great place to stay!
comment: Quaint hotel with lovely people. Was a very good place to stay, with a generous breakfast.

title: Great location, nice people
comment: The place was really quiet and clean. The location is perfect and everyone here was really nice and helpful especially Hien who helped as with everything including transportation.

title: Sky homestay
comment:
Lovely stay at a clean and well run homestay.
Everything was immaculate and the Host obviously loves what they do.
Friendly and Helpfull.
Location is close enough to visit most of the Hue Icons and travel around the city is inexpensive so grab a car or a bike for the further excursions.
Would advise to stay if visiting Hue

title: Charming homestay created by an extraordinary host
comment: Homestay absolutely charming! Ms Thien is an extraordinary host: warm, hyper responsive and helpful. She organized several transports with great efficiency and gave me great advice (like visiting the local market 2 steps away: really local, not a market for tourists). The rooms are very well equipped and decorated. The homestay is away from the street, in the middle of a neighborhood of inhabitants, so quiet and authentic. Staying here means living a warm and authentic experience. I regret staying only 1 night in Hue!

title: family run business, atmosphere is homely.
comment: staff friendly , accommodation is clean, of good standard. wide choice for breakfast & yummy food provided.

title: Excellent
comment: We were very pleased with the accommodation, especially the host (owner), but also with the staff who prepared us breakfast. Thank you very much for the support and help with the health problem! This accommodation I can recommend!!!

title: Visit to Hue
comment: A nice place to stay with a friendly feel to it. The staff are lovely and very helpful. The bedroom is a good size but I found the bed a bit hard and uncomfortable. You have to order your breakfast the night before, it was nice but limited choice. Our shower was over the bath so if you need a walk in shower you may have to request one.

title: Very clean hotel.
comment:
Very nice hotel ,quiet ,big room and very very clean ,breakfast, very good and nice staff and friendly.
We recommend to anyone definitely will come back in this place.

title: Great experience - 🫶
comment: It is wonderful to know about this hotel. The rooms and the staff are truly excellent. The service is absolutely worthy of a five-star rating. The reception staff are always enthusiastic and helpful, and it is rare to find a hotel that makes me want to return as soon as possible like this one. Thank you all very much.

title: Frankly and clean and friendly hotel after
comment:
This is a 5-day hotel.

It is a hotel with a unique interior, spacious space and a focus on convenience. Spacious, pleasant, clean and friendly. Air fan with air conditioning is more comfortable and convenient for temperature control.

When I travel often, the most important thing I think about is the cleanliness of the bathroom. The bathroom is clean. (The bathroom is beautiful.)

And the bed was comfortable. You can watch YouTube on TV and use a variety of streaming sites (except for Netflix) I came deliberately late to celebrate the New Year, all together countdown events and it was so happy time. Everyone is friendly. Greet me with a smile every time I come in.

Breakfast is served as a meal. If there is a shortage, you can buy more, or you can choose from a variety of foods and drinks. Each serves delicious and homemade yogurt and delicious coffee. Employees can send and receive messages directly, so discomfort is actively reflected, and breakfast can be ordered.

Locally, it takes more than a 15-minute walk from the tourist street but there are many famous restaurants 3-5 minutes away. DONALD TRUNG HUẾ (Crispy fork), Gia vi (Vietnamese pancakes), Quán Bánh Chi (banbeo/post-traditional cuisine), homemade backpackers, cheap and beautiful cafes (La hue), and numerous bubble shops. And you can easily walk to the large Martins Go hue and Vincomplex.

True, the first floor café of the hotel is also very cheap and offers a variety of menus and is delicious. The view from the front and back of the hotel is good. Small park and lots of big trees make you feel greenish

title: Excellent
comment:
I had a really lovely stay at this homestay. The place was clean, cozy, and felt very welcoming. The host was super friendly, helpful, and always quick to respond.
Breakfast included local dishes and fruit, which I really enjoyed.
I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to other travelers 😊

title: Hue homestay.
comment: The host is excellent, she is very accommodating and always trying to help with food recommendations, bike rentals and making sure your stay is comfortable. The room was spacious and the bed was very comfy, the location of the property is good as it’s tucked away from the noise but only a short walk to the restaurants and bars.

title: Excellent
comment:
Large, comfortable room
Nice pool
Delicious breakfast
Helpful staff
Some near restaurants have delicious food, i really enjoy it
Villa is near to some famous destination of Hue: The Citadel, The Walking Street and Train Station, 30 minutes to the Phu Bai AirPort
Worth the money

title: Great modern hotel with friendly staff
comment: We stayed at this hotel for two nights. The staff is very friendly and attentive. The rooms are great and modern. The pool is a bit cold but perfect for a refreshment on hot days. The hotel is centrally located, you can explore a lot on foot from there. We would recommend the hotel.

title: Good banquet experience
comment:
Thanks to Ms. Thao Nguyen, receptionist, for her kindness and enthusiasm.
Good banquet service and very delicious meal.

title: Modern
comment: Lovely stay here in this modern clean and comfy room, had everything we needed. Lovely Anna on reception was especially helpful and couldn’t do enough for us, thank you.

title: I highly recommend
comment: Excellent accommodation where we spent 4 nights. Excellent value for money. Spacious and clean room, huge bed, nice balcony. The place is quiet and the owner very nice. Possibility to rent bicycles, scooters or book a bus ride.

title: Great place to stay in Hue
comment: Location is great just minutes walking from the busy area. The room is big and clean with a huge bed, fridge and cool air conditioning.The owner is very helpful and communication is very easy trough WhatsApp. There are motorrbikes for rent on site for 120-150k dong a day. Transport to da nang or hoi an also available on sitr for 180k dong. I highly recommend this homestay 10/10

title: Beautiful and quiet homestay in the center
comment:
I had a long day of work in Ho Chi Minh City. It was accidentally earned a homestay day downtown that was very quiet.
I will definitely come back. Please recommend it to other guests.

title: This is a best place ever
comment: People in here are so friendly, they took me to many amazing places in Hue. This place is close to nature. The Vietnamese food is good. Visitors can go camping, boating, fishing, cycling, or simply enjoy the fresh air. The view around here are amazing too.

title: Good stay at the hostel
comment:
Very nice place to spend a couple of nights, super kind personnel.

Trang was super kind and helped us to book buses to our next destination.

Recommend it.

title: Cozy place in Hue city
comment: such a cozy and peaceful place to stay, enjoy coffee, tea and traditional food. When you stay here, you will see the fish swimming and the bird singing in the branches of tree besides

title: Moon Homestay, Hue review
comment: We stayed two nights as a family at moon homestay in hue, it is a new guesthouse in great location in the old town just outside the citadel, was nice to share with the owners family who were able to organise taxi and tours in Hue, in the evenings we walked across the bride over the perfume river to eat around walking street area, Alex

title: Ideal Hotel Hue
comment: I've been spending 4 nights in Ideal Hotel Hue. Good price/vale - friendly personnel, good clean room. Hotel is located very central. I made the contract with travel guestreservation what I cannot recomment as the took 80% of commisions and extra charges, so I lost the financial advantage by this overcharge. Do your contract directly with Ideal Hotel, the reception speaks nicely endlish or choose Agoda for their correct conditions

title: Absolutely dreadful place
comment:
This place is absolutely dreadful. The room was filthy, the bedding was stained with age, the towels were threadbare. The safe didn't working the wifi didn't exist. We arrived at 9.30am and breakfast was supposed to be served until 10am, there was no food in sight in the breakfast area. The carpets were filthy in the hallway and the lift door was also filthy
There were cigarette butts in the pkants on the balcony, the hotel is supposed to be a non smoking establishment .
I would avpidstaying at the place at all costs.
We left after 30mins and we were not asked why we were leaving at all.

title: Wonderful Hue
comment:
We stayed at this lovely homestay for 3 nights in the King room with Balcony
The room was clean and comfortable and being able to sit on the bakcony and watch the street life below was a bonus.
The location is brilliant right in the heart of everything and only a short walk to the Perfume river and the wonderful walks around it and the colourful parklands.
Our host is a beautiful lady who speaks very good english is so warm and welcoming able to providehelp with anything related to where to eat and what to see. She provides a nice breakfast each morning.
I highly recommend staying at the Lavande if visiting Hue.

title: Beautiful resort
comment: Amazing experience, Hang was amazing too. Golf good, but I am not so good. Very nice accommodation and beautiful location. Thank you

title: There is potential but still lots to improve
comment:
My room was spacious with lots of daylight. The area was also surprisingly quiet even though it's very close to one big busy road. There are many restaurants nearby. Staff was kind.

I had some problems and unfortunately it felt it was not run fully professionally:
- I requested two days cleaning for my room. It just happened the second evening when I spoke with a staff member directly.
- I had bought a bus ticket from Hue to Hoi An a couple days prior to my departure through this hostel. Also paid my ticket then and everything was supposed to be ok. When I was leaving in the morning, it came out they had forgotten to buy me a ticket. I was even asked if I was staying until evening (no, I was supposed to leave in 30 min). I got explanations about a delay because the bus was broken etc. When I was finally picked up it came out that my 9 am bus wasn't broken up. It was an 11 am bus. Instead of being at Hoi An at noon, I was there 4pm which meant my plans for the day was ruined totally.
- I personally think breakfast should always include at least one drink. No need to be a fancy coffee but at least something.

title: Yeah, sure.
comment:
I slept in the women’s dorm with 4 beds.

The bathroom is dedicated to women and in the dormitory. The beds are clean and comfortable.

The women's dormitory is on the top floor with a very nice small terrace

I was able to have my laundry washed at the hotel.

It is a 5-minute walk from the Imperial City, in the modern city. You can walk across the bridge.

The owners are very nice and helpful. They helped me get some stuff I had forgotten by having a grab sent to me at the bus station. I had a very good stay for a very attractive price.

Thank you.

title: Perfect stay in Hue
comment: We were here as a couple and are absolutely thrilled. The location is unbeatable. You are immediately in the action, but it is still pleasantly quiet. Our room had a nice balcony and the breakfast was really good, with even our European wishes being taken into account. Of particular note is the great service! We were able to drop off our laundry at very short notice and the staff was generally super helpful with tips for the city. All at an unbeatable price. Absolutely recommend!

title: Best Hostel & Homestay in Vietnam
comment: Very clean and organized homestay with private room and hostel room. I was surprised to have the good quality staying environment with this cheap price. I stayed in the hostel room for more than one week, the room is clean, air condition is working perfect . The hostel room has a balcony so that the roommate is bright. The room is very spacious, the owner did not try to put more beds to keep the space for the 4beds’ customers. Some other popular hostels I stayed in Hue were stuffed with beds in a small room lol, this is why I feel so great in this homestay. It’s very convenient to visit the royal palace in hue as the homestay just in the citadel. The owner’s family are very friendly. They offer free filtered water and free ice from the fridge. I have been using their fridge all the time during my staying.

title: Unpleasant experience
comment: I had booked at this hotel, but on arrival the owner or receptionist informs me that Booking had been wrong and that I did not have the room, that I had to cancel it and that she got me for 100000 vdn plus the same room in her hotel, we are traveling in Southeast Asia and it is the first time it happens to me, quite unpleasant this person and I hope that it does not happen to many more people who want to take advantage of the situation.

title: Good stay
comment: Nice owner. The hotel is not very convenient for the citadel because it is 30 minutes walk but is in a quiet area with inexpensive premises. Breakfast prepared every morning at the moment, with various choices. Good room. Really low price for what you get.

title: Nice small hotel near pedestrian street of Hue!
comment: Love that this family-owned hotel was so close to the nightly pedestrian street for easy access! Rooms are spacious though the bathroom itself is pretty small but everything was very clean. Only issues are that the beds are a bit firm, the hot water runs out quickly (due to it probably being a small individual water heater) and there’s only one trash can which is located in the bathroom. WiFi is very stable and fast though which is nice as well as there’s a Smart TV in the room with access to Netflix! Despite the minor issues, this hotel is a solid choice for those wanting to stay close to the center of Hue!

title: Good for one night
comment:
We were visiting Hue and booked this hotel. The rooms are really nice and clean.
Welcoming could, however, be warmer...

title: Good value for price of rooms.
comment: Reasonably priced clean rooms. A bit noisy from people walking past our room in the hallway at night and kids in the pool at 6.30 am. Excellent location. Easy walk to lots of bars and restaurants. Good pool.

title: A pretty average but clean hotel
comment: We arrived at the hotel very early in the morning and found the night manager asleep on the sofa with the lights turned off. It wasn’t the best first impression but all the other staff were very friendly and helpful. The hotel itself is very clean and modern with good wifi and a decent location. The breakfast is basic but for the price, you get what you pay for however I would suggest giving the coffee a miss!! Overall, it’s a perfectly fine place to lay your head, have a nice shower and good sleep in a clean bed. Otherwise I would say it’s pretty average.

title: Small bungalows right on the lagoon
comment: After driving the beautiful High van pass we had a stop over in Lang Co. the location of B&H is great. The lagoon is right in front. Small clean bungalows which was all we needed for one night. Or son slept on a sofa which was not a problem, maybe some sheets for him would have been nice. The pool is great for a dip and the people are friendly. The prices are on the higher side. All in all a good stop for a night.

title: Beautiful and quiet homestay in the center
comment:
I had a long day of work in Ho Chi Minh City. It was accidentally earned a homestay day downtown that was very quiet.
I will definitely come back. Please recommend it to other guests.

title: Disappointing
comment:
The area, including the grounds of YesHue, have obviously been very badly damaged by recent floods and it feels a bit like staying on a building site as they work to put the river and facilities back to how it was. The bungalow was done out nicely but our rain shower was broken so we had to sit in the bath to shower.
I admire what they are trying to do but at the moment it’s not good value for money.

title: A horror DO NOT book here are bugs
comment: Horrifying, the worst accommodation of our whole stay in Vietnam. The room was not the one we booked, not to say that the photos do not correspond with those offered on the internet. The room was not prepared, it was uncleaned. Full of spider webs (we counted more than 10 when going to shower) and bugs, cockroaches in the shower. Even a spider in bed. Besides, there is a lot of noise outside and it is a horror to sleep. DO NOT stay here, not recommended.

title: 0 soundproofing
comment: The truth is that it has been the last establishment of our trip to Vietnam, we have all been wonderfully well except in this one. It is a shame because the hotel is very authentic but very poorly maintained. And in the evening the night receptionist had a party with his friends in the garden so we could not sleep all night despite having complained on several occasions did not stop until 3 in the morning. The rooms do not have the walls up to the ceiling so you hear absolutely everything from the next room. If you want to rest or sleep definitely this is NOT your hotel.

title: Beautiful japanese style resort
comment: I am glad I picked this beautiful resort during my vacation in Hue. The resort is a lil bit far from the center but you do not need to go anywhere. Everything in the resort includes fabulous onsen, delicious buffet, large lake with many koi fish. I highly recommend this place for people who want to enjoy peaceful atmosphere .

title: Good service
comment: Nice hotel,good service,good food

title: Great place, nice to rest and reset
comment: Everything was extraordinary

title: Clean, quiet resort — perfect for relaxing
comment:
Overall, it’s a clean and peaceful resort, great if you just want to relax and get away from the city. I really liked how well everything was maintained, and the villas are super nice and comfortable.
The staff were good overall, but it would be even better if the reception team were a bit more friendly.
Breakfast was okay, nothing too special. Local dishes like bun bo Hue weren’t that great, so if you want to try proper local food, I’d recommend going outside.
Since there’s a lot of greenery around, there are quite a few insects, so just keep that in mind.

title: Very relaxing place
comment: It was a good stay worth for the money five star service specially Khanh he s very helpful high recommend 👍

title: Staying at Kobi Onsen Resort
comment:
I had a really memorable and fun stay at KOBI Onsen Resort Huế, Affiliated by Melia. You can say that you are impressed by the quiet, peaceful space of a resort located far from the center of Huế. The onsen area is extremely clean, warm mineral water is pleasant, recommended for those who travel to heal, reset themselves.
The staff here is friendly, has a friend of the Yellow Light reception enthusiastically supported him from the time of check-in, introducing clear information. Overall, this is an ideal place to relax, relax and enjoy the peaceful space. I will definitely come back and recommend it to friends and relatives.

title: Short stay at Kobi Onsen
comment: The service was very good and the staff was very nice especially Ngọc and Trung.

title: Good service.
comment: Good service, sister's reception and Mr. Central support staff are very cute, our spouse is very happy

title: Good.
comment: Very good service, enthusiastic staff, super good take-care spouse

Everything in the resort includes fabulous onsen, delicious buffet, large lake with many koi fish. I highly recommend this place for people who want to enjoy peaceful atmosphere .

comment: Very good service, enthusiastic staff, super good take-care spouse

title: Amazing.
comment: In the heart of Hue Citadel, the Hotel is located in a place steeped in history, which invites to serenity. The staff is friendly, friendly. Thank you for this great experience.

title: Very nice hotel and located in a quiet street. The staff is very nice and welcoming.
comment:
The hotel is very nice in an Indochinese style and the rooms very comfortable.
The staff speaks English and Duong at the reception also speaks French. They are all pleasant and kind.
I recommend this place located within the citadel.

title: Amazing history and close to Imperial City
comment: Such an amazing hotel with rich history and very comfortable rooms. A short walk to the Imperial Palace and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Will stay here again the next time I visit Hue.

title: Disappointing for Hue
comment:
The location near the Imperial City is not an asset for this hotel. First of all, the rooms are small with no space and very dark. All rooms on the reception side are in plain sight as they are on the ground floor like the host otherwise. Even in broad daylight you had to turn on and so you had to pull back the curtains to be home. This hotel is quite remote from the current city and as most guests were in circuit with agencies. The drivers drop you off in front of the city. But for the evenings we had to take a taxi for us to go to free neighborhood.
Brief on Hue is much better

title: Conveniently located in Hue
comment: The ideal place for a quiet stay in Hue. Nice garden, swimming pool, spacious and comfortable room, excellent buffet breakfast. Inside the walls of the imperial city, in the immediate vicinity of the citadel.

title: Charming hotel
comment: Hotel with lots of charm quiet near the citadel. The rooms are ok, a little dark. The hot water in the shower works quite poorly. Meals and breakfast are ok

title: Nice hotel
comment:
The reception was smiling
friendly
Helpful staff
single room comfortable bedding
safe and free wifi TV
Free tea and coffee
~~
European power outlet
~~
shower 🚿 walk-in shower with everything you need for toilet and more ...
~~~
Air conditioning in the room
~~~
bar- massage -free parking-swimming pool..
~~~
Simple but good breakfast
~~~~
The dinner was excellent
~~~
The hotel is a former hospital located next to the Imperial City
~~~
Hue is a culturally interesting city like any other 💕..
Stayed from 2 to 4 February 26

title: Soothing yet near the crowds
comment: What a nice place to be, close to the Citadel and the forbidden city. Everything within walking distance. Pool not used but is definitely a plus.

title: Great Hotel in the center of Hue
comment:
Great Hotel in the center of Hue, 5min walking distance from the Old Citadel.
The hotel is really welcoming, the rooms are spacious and clean.
We tried the spa and the 60min massage was reinvigorating.
Full breakfast.

title: Unforgettable stay in Hue Historical Building
comment: Stay here. It’s like staying in a museum, with amazing staff and excellent food. Front desk lady Trinh is helpful and sincere. Restaurant manager does a great job, too. This is the former royal doctor’s home and facility, and well preserved and maintained. Comfortable room, surrounded by gardens. Location in the old city is unmatched. Why stay anywhere else in Hue?

title: Do not hesitate to stay here! 🪷
comment:
Do not hesitate to stay here. Staying at this beautiful hotel feels like you're at another one of Hue's incredible museums. The staff were so helpful and we are grateful to Trinh for kindly helping us with bikes and drivers. The restaurant is excellent and good value.
It is hard to leave!

title: Authentic experience in Hue
comment: A lovely authentic Vietnamese style hotel near the imperial Palace breakfast was outstanding. The setting is beautiful and the service wonderful I can highly recommend.

title: Great stay Hue
comment: Great stay. Lovely property. Excellent location and very nice staff. Housed in a complex that used to function as the medical clinic for the Emperor

title: Great stay at Hue
comment: We had an amazing stay here. Right next to the imperial city. We had dinner at their restaurant and loved the food. We also did a massage at their spa and loved it!

title: Stylish and well located
comment: This is a stylish hotel which is very reasonably priced for the standard. It’s right next to the Imperial City, so very convenient. Our room was nicely furnished and the bed was very comfortable. The water in the shower and the basin was hot (not always a given) and there was even conditioner in the shower (but sadly no body lotion). There’s a good sized pool and a comfortable bar. The restaurant had tables outside, and the property was far enough from the road to make al fresco dining a pleasure. The staff were invariably helpful, and in particular provided a solution when it turned out we’d booked our first night for January rather than December (oops!). Breakfast catered for both Vietnamese and western tastes. A choice of teas would have been nice — only Lipton’s was available — but after we mentioned it, they provided us with ginger tea.

title: An oasis in a pleasant city😊!
comment: Lovely atmosphere, fantastic staff. Excellent breakfast. Perfect location. Hotel well restored after the autumn rain disaster.

title: Perfect place with history
comment: The hotel is just next to citadel. It is very cute with very good breakfast. People are very nice and helpful but in my opinion the most important is localization and architecture of it

title: Nice hotel
comment:
A really nice hotel and very nice staff, I had a room right by the pool, good space and nice bed.
Breakfast is all right.
Their restaurant is less good.

title: Experience
comment: Verry good staf, room, food, good atmosphere 😁😁 love every thing, the bed and the bed very good sleep thanks you very good

title: A pearl
comment:
Wonderful experience in full relaxation, the staff is extremely friendly and ready to help you with any request and need.
Highly recommended the spa the girls are magical, we did aroma therapy.
Varied breakfast both sweet and savory.
The rooms are spacious and clean, the bed comfortable!

title: Comfortable and authentic hotel
comment:
Very nice and authentic hotel, highly recommended.
Staff always helpful and courteous, especially Tu Trinh.
Great breakfast and Main dishes vary from day to day

title: Romantic resort in Hue
comment: A gorgeous and cozy hotel with authentic design. You can feel Hue’s romantic atmosphere in every detail. This place is also historically famous for the royal pharmacy origin. I highly recommend to stay here when visiting Hue!☺️

title: Very nice establishment near the Imperial City
comment: Very nice place full of history. The rooms are very comfortable staff at the top. Breakfast is great. The decoration is tasteful and the place is close to the Imperial City. The place was inhabited by the medical mandarins.

title: Vacation Rentals in Hue
comment: This is a beautiful hotel close to the citadel, a must-see tourist attraction! We ate the evening meal at the hotel as well as breakfasts. The food is excellent, the staff is kind. Room 501 is spacious. However, there was no light because the window overlooked the hallway. It is possible to arrange the visit of the tombs with the hotel. That is what we have done and we do not regret it. We recommend this hotel for a tourist stay in Hue!

title: Great time in an authentic hotel
comment: Very nice experience at this hotel, the staff is very welcoming and responds quickly to our needs. The restaurant is top: quality at the level of dishes offered and the kindness of people

title: Everything is perfect thank you!
comment:
Very comfortable hotel, very well decorated with particularly helpful staff.
Breakfast is delicious
A restaurant available from 10 to 22h perfect after visits and inexpensive.
A stone's throw from the imperial city and the staff organizes the.tour of the tombs and pagoda if you wish
.Perfect location in Hue
Everything is done to make your stay very easy and pleasant.

title: Beautiful old Hue
comment:
Spatel d annam is a beautiful hotel located in the Citadel in Hue, one of the most beautiful cities we have ever visited.
The hotel itself is very classy and the staff are great.

title: Yeah, good!
comment: A very nice experience in this establishment where everything is done to make your stay easier and pleasant. Delicate hostesses, smiles, kindness, helpfulness. The rooms are perfect. Quality lunch and restaurant, honest prices. We booked a scooter from Welcoming for a morning at the sea and this morning the bus to Hoi An. Recommend and share!

title: Super relaxed
comment: This is a good place to sample the traditional Vietnamese atmosphere. Breakfast is delicious with plenty of options, it's full of greenery and the staff are enthusiastic and reassuring. I stayed three nights and want to come back soon. It's just that when there's a noisy group nearby, it sounds really loud.

title: An amazing hotel
comment: The staff is super friendly, the rooms are beautiful and the breakfast very very complete. It has a pool, although we couldn't use it because it rained was great, and it has a small garden. We arrived on a night bus from Hanoi, and we were let into our room for an extra fee, things that we found great. A 10 on everything

title: Great hotel with good location
comment:
The hotel makes a good impression overall. The rooms are clean and functional, so you can feel comfortable during your stay. The staff is friendly and eager to respond to the wishes of guests. Breakfast also offers a solid selection and is well suited to start the day.
The location is convenient as attractions and public transport are within easy reach.

title: Holidays
comment: The staff was very friendly, the rooms clean and the food good. The reception was very helpful also regarding questions facing the city. The hotel is very well located as you only need a few minutes walk to the citadel.

title: Excellent staff and hotel
comment: I stayed here for one night and had an amazing time, the staff were super friendly and helpful and took time to answer all questions and give advice. The check in team were especially friendly and helpful. The hotel has an onsite restaurant and food was incredible tasty. The room were was spacious and very comfortable with complimentary tea and coffee. I would definately recommend staying here if you visit Hue, as it it very close to the Citadel and easy to reach the city centre.

title: Peaceful, stylish, and unforgettable stay in the heart of Hue
comment:
This is the best place I’ve ever stayed!
Beautiful design, peaceful atmosphere, and incredibly friendly staff. A hidden gem right in the heart of Hue. Highly recommend!

title: Great stay in Hue
comment: Great hotel, beautiful and clean rooms. Location in Hue, so close to the Citadel, is perfect! The staff is really friendly. Both breakfast and the restaurant (lunch/diner) is great.

title: Lovely historic hotel in great location
comment: Spent 3 nights here and thought our rooms were beautiful and well appointed. Our rooms had a balcony which was great but could have benefited with an overhead fan. Lovely staff, great and extensive breakfast, a party of frogs going off in the garden, and the dinner we had there was excellent. Itt's a great location - just minutes walk to the Citadel and a cool and local feeling neighbourhood. But a 10 min Grab ride to to the thumping town centre. Because the floors are tiled there can be some noose from the corridor but nothing earplugs can't fix. Also -BEST pool temperature in Vietnam - actually cool and refreshing. I will be back

title: Good location
comment:
Nice hotel very close to the Imperial City so good location. Short walk to a nearby street for coffee shops. Ten minute walk to some waterside cafes for lunch.
Hotel itself was an old building and originally a medical centre/hospital so was looking forward to staying. Would have been nice if more was made of this history.
Room was comfortable and we slept very well. Bathroom was a bit tired - shower over the bath with a shower curtain.
Breakfast was just ok.
All our Vietnam hotels were so lovely that this one was probably our least favourite. No complaints just could do with some updates. Apparently, our room was upgraded but we did not realise until checking out.
Staff were friendly and helpful.

title: A M A Z I N G ! ✨️ ❤️
comment:
A M A Z I N G!
Amazing staff, especially Trinh at reception - very helpful and smiley happy person. 😊 The most comfortable bed and pillows and just perfect swimming pool for chilling and sunbathing. Hotel is right next to the Citadel and only 15 minutes walk over the other side of the river. Highly recommend ! 👌

title: Beautiful location
comment: Style hotel, very consistent with the environment. Good location a stone's throw from the Citadel. Rooms a bit dated, but well stocked and all in all comfortable. Not perfectly isolated from the common areas of the rest of the resort and therefore sometimes a little noisy for the passage or proximity of other guests. Characteristic restaurant.

title: Spatel d’ annam
comment: The hotel is absolutely perfect in every way – great services, delicious food, and amazing experiences. Located in the heart of the ancient town, it offers a unique blend of history and modern comfort. The rooms are cozy and well-equipped, and the staff is friendly and attentive. The restaurant serves a variety of dishes, from local specialties to international cuisine. Guests can also enjoy tours of historical sites, spa treatments, and a relaxing pool. This hotel is the perfect choice for anyone wanting to explore the city while enjoying luxury and comfort. Tks for Ms Tien -who work here- treating us so well

title: Very good stay
comment:
Very nice hotel with a very typical decoration, lovely, it feels good.
Nice room quite spacious. Thank you to Iss Tiem for welcoming us so well and for her kindness. The staff in general were very kind and we were happy with everything! Breakfast very good.
Small flat: the bathroom a little small

title: Nice hotel in a central location at the Imperial Palace. Unfortunately, it's a little old. Very nice staff.
comment:
Actually a snug hotel with a central location. Staff was very friendly and attentive as everywhere in Vietnam. The hotel has a restaurant and bar that also satisfies European expectations. Unfortunately, the hotel is already a bit old. In many places moisture damage appears. Hot water was not always available.
Measured according to European standard I would award 3 stars.

title: Good location. Hotel a little tired. Breakfast basic.
comment:
Good location just across the road from the imperial city. Superior Room was very small and a little bit tired. Restaurant food surprisingly great in the evening. Breakfast is very, very basic.

An easy 20 min walk over a couple of bridges to the main town. We enjoyed the walk but plenty of tuk tuks and transport available if needed

title: 10 / 10 pts🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
comment:
We stayed at Trinh and Tien's Spatula d'Annam in Hue.
It was very very nice.
The staff was very accommodating.
The food was delicious.
We would love to come back 🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰

title: Highly recommend!
comment: I have always had a great experience in Hue! The city's rich history and culture make it a special place to visit. This is the third time I have visited Hue and the second time I have stayed at this hotel within 03 years. This time, I booked the Duplex Room, and then they upgraded me to Premier Deluxe. It's so good! The room is most generously sized with a comfortable seating area and a large bathroom with a big bathtub. The staff are always nice and polite. I will come back.

title: Unique and beautiful, amazing staff
comment:
Such a unique and beautiful hotel, in what I think is the nicest part of the city.
The staff are all lovely, everyone always says hello (seriously everyone!). I hope management knows how lucky they are and looks after them. There were a few receptionists who helped us with various things and who were all so helpful and professional, but also warm and personable. I didn't get all of their names, but Tú Trinh and the other receptionists were so kind. They organised a birthday cake for me which was just so thoughtful and such a nice touch. When I come to Hue I would definitely stay here again and will be suggesting to anyone who asks to do the same.

title: Lovely boutique hotel
comment:
It’s a lovely presented hotel within the ancient citadel and walking distance to the Imperial city.
Our room was good with everything you would need but a very small bathroom and the shower inadequate. The power was very poor and the system probably in need of an upgrade.
Breakfast was good with an adequate selection and eggs cooked to order.
We ate in the hotel restaurant the first night but it wasn’t up to the expected standard. The pho was ok and hot but the beef meal was cold and chewy.
As always in Vietnam what makes an establishment is its staff and I couldn’t fault any of them, they were friendly, courteous and helpful.
Trinh the front office manager went out of her way to help me contact my bank at home when I encountered a fraud problem. Nothing was too much trouble and she recommended some good hotels too. Definitely service with a smile.
Thank you all for an enjoyable stay.

Brenda & John

title: Comfortable (but a little tired) spa in Hue old town
comment: We enjoyed our stay here. The location is great, in the old town and very close to the Imperial City. We had a Superior King Room with a private outside area overlooking the pool. The room was comfortable but small and quite tired. We also enjoyed many games guessing which of the many light switches controlled which light. We had an excellent massage at the spa and also enjoyed the steam room. Breakfast was limited in terms of the selection, and be aware that (in our experience) food is not replenished, so get there early! The bar and restaurant were very good. Staff were helpful.

title: 2 days in Hue
comment: Very pleasant stay, nice staff and always available, nice location in front of the old fortified city, shame that it is a little far from the lively city center. Pleasantly surprised to have free bikes available for the day.

title: Beautiful hotel
comment:
This is a really lovely hotel, with great food (breakfast very good). Rooms clean and spacious, with a lovely old fashioned feel to them. There is a nice bar area which serves cocktails.
The staff are excellent, helpful and professional. Would definitely recommend

title: A nice hotel in the center of the old town
comment: A very nice hotel. It is located in the old part of the city. The room is clean and very comfortable bed. Collation is a can poor, apart from the omelet, there was nothing. The spa is great. I had 2 treatments and I was very happy.

title: Great and calm Hotel in Hue, walking distance to Citadel.
comment: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The staff was incredibly friendly, attentive, and always ready to help. The hotel boasts a great ambience, complemented by a lovely restaurant and bar. The restaurant team went above and beyond to accommodate our special dietary preferences, which we greatly appreciated. Thank you for your exceptional hospitality—we will certainly recommend this hotel to our friends and look forward to staying here again!

title: Wonderful Hue
comment:
We stayed at this lovely homestay for 3 nights in the King room with Balcony
The room was clean and comfortable and being able to sit on the bakcony and watch the street life below was a bonus.
The location is brilliant right in the heart of everything and only a short walk to the Perfume river and the wonderful walks around it and the colourful parklands.
Our host is a beautiful lady who speaks very good english is so warm and welcoming able to providehelp with anything related to where to eat and what to see. She provides a nice breakfast each morning.
I highly recommend staying at the Lavande if visiting Hue.
